translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔ na bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ na ɩ, dãbãɛ kpɛ wʊ naa ka wʊ mɩrɛ na wʊ wa gbur dumo a Yesu niem tɩ 'yɛr a lɛ jaa na ɩ.

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking, some people came from Jairus' home and said, “Your daughter has died! Why bother the teacher anymore?”
translation_verse: A Yesu ba 'yɛr baar ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩbɛ kɔ̃ɔ yi a Jairusɩ yir wa 'yɛr wʊ, “A fʊ bie kpi naa. Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wiwile go?”

english_verse: Jesus heard what they said, and he said to Jairus, “Don't worry. Just have faith!”
translation_verse: Yesu ba chɛlɛ a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “Taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ. Sɔɔ ma dɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus did not let anyone go with him except Peter and the two brothers, James and John.
translation_verse: Yesu ba sɔɔ ka nɩrɛ jaa tu wʊ ɛ, ka Pita nɩ Jemesɩ nɩ a wʊ yɛbile Jɔɔn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: They went home with Jairus and saw the people crying and making a lot of noise.
translation_verse: Ban wa ta a Jairusɩ yir, Yesu nyɛ naa a nɩbɛ na kõnõ ŋmiere chɛlsɩ.

english_verse: He took the twelve-year-old girl by the hand and said, “Talitha, koum!” which means, “Little girl, get up!” The girl got right up and started walking around. Everyone was greatly surprised.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ vaa ir chiine. Yuomo pie nɩ ayi bie lɛ. Ka a yele 'maa ba nɛɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus ordered them not to tell anyone what had happened. Then he said, “Give her something to eat.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpaal ba naa jũu ka ba taa vɛ̃ ka a nɩrɛ jaa wõ naa ɛ. Tɩ 'yɛr ɩka ba kʊ a pɔɔbile bʊ̃diir ka wʊ di.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples crossed the lake and brought the boat to shore near the town of Gennesaret.
translation_verse: Ban wa gɔ̃ɔ a man do lũ a gboro a Genesaretɩ gɔ̃ɔn,

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Prophets are honored by everyone, except the people of their hometown and their relatives and their own family.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ nyɛrɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jie jaa, tɩchɛ a wʊ mãɛ tẽe nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ sɛ̃ lɛ waa nyɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: But when Herod heard about Jesus, he said, “This must be John! I had his head cut off, and now he has come back to life.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Hɛrɔd na wa wõ, wʊ 'yɛr naa, “A Jɔɔn 'lɔ ɩn vɛ̃ ka ba ŋmaa a wʊ ju lɛ, yi.”

english_verse: After the apostles returned to Jesus, they told him everything they had done and taught.
translation_verse: A Yesu nɩtʊ̃nsɩ lɩɛb wa lɔ̃ɔ taa a wʊ sɛ̃, na ba wa man a lɛ jaa ban tʊ̃ tɩ wiil a nɩbɛ, na ba kʊ a Yesu.

english_verse: The next Sabbath he taught in the synagogue. Many of the people who heard him were amazed and asked, “How can he do all this? Where did he get such wisdom and the power to work these miracles?
translation_verse: Ka a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir wa ta, ka wʊ kpɛ be a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie tɩ piel wile, ka a nɩyɔɔ bala na wõ nɛɛr 'maa. Ka ba sʊrɔ, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ a daba nyã nyɛ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ nyã? Yɛ̃ buor lɛ a nyã wʊn tara na wʊ gba tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃?

english_verse: Isn't he the carpenter, the son of Mary? Aren't James, Joseph, Judas, and Simon his brothers? Don't his sisters still live here in our town?” The people were upset because of what he was doing.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a mɩmɩɛrɛ lɛ ɛ? A ba ɩ a Mɛɛr bie lɛ ɛ, a wʊ yɛbil ɩ Jemesɩ nɩ Josesɩ nɩ Judas nɩ Simon ɛ? Ka a wʊ yɛpɔbɔ mɩ be ka a sɩ sɛ̃ ɛ?”

english_verse: He told them, “You may take along a walking stick. But don't carry food or a traveling bag or any money.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta de bon jaa ɛ, yɩ tara dadiirsɩ tɛɛ. Yɩ ta tara bʊ̃diir ɛ, bɩɩ wʊʊr ɛ, bɩɩ yɔ̃ɔ libie a yɩ sɩɩr gãma pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If any place won't welcome you or listen to your message, leave and shake the dust from your feet as a warning to them.”
translation_verse: Tẽe jaa pɔ yɩn wa kpɛ ka baa de yɩ ɛ, bɩɩ sɔɔ a 'yɛr ɛ, yɩn wa yire yɩ kpoor a yɩ gbɛɛ tã-uul ka a di a ba dɛɛr dãasɩɛ.”

english_verse: Herodias had a grudge against John and wanted to kill him. But she could not do it
translation_verse: Ka a Hɛrɔdiyas tara nɩ a Jɔɔn jɛɛr bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ kʊ wʊ, tɩchɛ waa tʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: because Herod was afraid of John and protected him. He knew that John was a good and holy man. Even though Herod was confused by what John said, he was glad to listen to him. And he often did.
translation_verse: A Hɛrɔd bɔ̃ɔ naa a Jɔɔn na ɩ nɩsʊ̃ nɩ chɛchɛ, na wʊ joro a Jɔɔn dãbãɛ, na wʊ gu wʊ tara. A Hɛrɔd wa wõ a Jɔɔn 'yɛr a ma sɔb wʊn nɩbir, tɩchɛ wʊ ma bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ chɛlɛ a wʊ 'yɛr.

english_verse: I swear that I will give you as much as half of my kingdom, if you want it.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ põl kʊ a pɔɔbile, “Bon jaa fʊn sʊɔr ala ɩ a n nãalʊ̃ʊ ŋmaa gba lɛ, n na kʊ fʊ naa.”

english_verse: The girl left and asked her mother, “What do you think I should ask for?” Her mother answered, “The head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Ka wʊ yi chen tɩ sʊʊr a wʊ ma, “Bo lɛ ɩn sʊɔr?” Ka a wʊ ma 'yɛr wʊ, “Tɩ sʊɔr a Jɔɔn Kɔ̃suor ju.”

english_verse: The girl hurried back and told Herod, “Here and now on a serving plate I want the head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔbile yi pɔɔ fɔɔ lɛ kpɛ a nãa sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Jɔɔn Kɔ̃suor ju a la'yɛlma pɔ kʊ ma a pʊ̃pãanyã.”

english_verse: Herod was very sorry for what he had said. But he did not want to break the promise he had made in front of his guests.
translation_verse: A nãa pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ bala wʊn bʊɔl na wʊn põl kʊ a pɔɔbile jũu, waa bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ tɔr ɛ.

english_verse: The guard put the head on a serving plate and took it to the girl. Then she gave it to her mother.
translation_verse: 'yɔ̃ɔ a la'yɛlma pɔ waan, wa kʊ a pɔɔbile ka wʊ de kʊ a wʊ ma.

english_verse: When John's followers learned that he had been killed, they took his body and put it in a tomb. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Matthew
translation_verse: A Jɔɔn poturbo na wõ a lɛ, ba chen tɩ 'mɔɔ wʊ na ba ũu.

english_verse: But so many people were coming and going that Jesus and the apostles did not even have a chance to eat. Then Jesus said, “Let's go to a place where we can be alone and get some rest.”
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ yɔɔ na waara tɩ chiine jũu, jaa gba ba be be a ban di ɛ. Be lɛ ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ wa a sɩn tɛɛ chen a jie 'lɔ a nɩbɛ na ba be ɛ, a yɩ tɩ jãnɛ pɛ̃n.”

english_verse: They left in a boat for a place where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Ba kpɛ naa a gboro bala tɛɛ chen a jie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: That evening the disciples came to Jesus and said, “This place is like a desert, and it's already late.
translation_verse: Mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa mʊrɔ a wʊ poturbo wa naa wa 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “A ka ɩ naa mɔgɔ̃ɔ, tɩ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ mɩ mʊrɔ;

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You give them something to eat.” But they asked him, “Don't you know it would take almost a year's wages to buy all of these people something to eat?”
translation_verse: Ka be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr sɔɔ ba, “Yɩn mãɛ yɩ kʊ ba bʊ̃kɔ̃ɔ a ba di.” Ka a poturbo 'yɛr ɩka, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ sɩn nyɛ a libie anyãna? Nɩbʊ̃'yen ŋmɛrsɩ aniin sãyar gba! Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ sɩn ɩ kʊ ba jaa bʊ̃diir?”

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “How much bread do you have? Go and see!” They found out and answered, “We have five small loaves of bread and two fish.”
translation_verse: A be lɛ a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ aŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tara? Yɩ chen tɩ kaa.” Be lɛ ba chen tɩ kaa tɩ wa 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Paanʊ̃ɔsɩ anũu, nɩ jãmɛ ayi.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to tell the people to sit down on the green grass.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a poturbo a ba ɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa a ba jɛ̃ gbulsɩ a mɔ'yɔlɔ ju.

english_verse: All of them saw him and were terrified. But at this same time he said, “Don't worry! I am Jesus. Don't be afraid.”
translation_verse: bojũu ba jaa nyɛ wʊ naa ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba. Ajienaa, ka a Yesu tãn, “Yɩ nyɔɔ nyãa! Maa lɛ! Yɩ taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus took the five loaves and the two fish. He looked up toward heaven and blessed the food. Then he broke the bread and handed it to his disciples to give to the people. He also divided the two fish, so everyone could have some.
translation_verse: A Yesu de naa a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ anũu nɩ a jãmɛ ayi ala na wʊ kaa saaju tɩ dʊl puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan. Wʊ de naa a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ŋma ŋma tɩ de kʊ a wʊ poturbo tɩ 'yɛr, “Yɩ de põ a nɩbɛ.” Tɩ lɛ de a jãmɛ ayi ala mɩ ŋma põ a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: After everyone had eaten all they wanted,
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ ba jaa din, na ba tɩɩ,

english_verse: Jesus' disciples picked up twelve large baskets of leftover bread and fish.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ ka a poturbo wob a bʊ̃ŋmaara 'yɔ̃ɔ pɛr pie nɩ ayi.

english_verse: At once, Jesus made his disciples get into the boat and start back across to Bethsaida. But he stayed until he had sent the crowds away.
translation_verse: Ajienaa, ka a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ poturbo a ba kpɛ a gboro na ba de nie chiine a Betɩsaida tɩ wʊ na wɛl a nɩbɛ bar.

english_verse: Then he told them goodbye and went up on the side of a mountain to pray.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa bar ba wa baar, wʊ do naa a tɔ̃ɔ ju ɩka wʊ tɩ puor.

english_verse: Later in the evening he was still there by himself, and the boat was somewhere in the middle of the lake.
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa sɔɔrɔ, a gboro be naa a man sãlsɔɔ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ be a wɛyõo, 'lɔ tɛɛ.

english_verse: He could see that the disciples were struggling hard, because they were rowing against the wind. Not long before morning, Jesus came toward them. He was walking on the water and was about to pass the boat.
translation_verse: Wʊ nyɛ naa a wʊ poturbo ka ba mɔ̃nɔ̃ a gboro faara bojũu a sɛsɛbɛ furo na tuoro ba. A wɛr na wa gbʊrɔ a chaarfʊ, wʊ yin chiine a kʊ̃ɔ ju waara a ba sɛ̃, ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ po ba.

english_verse: When the disciples saw Jesus walking on the water, they thought he was a ghost, and they started screaming.
translation_verse: Ban wa nyɛ wʊn chiine a kʊ̃ɔ ju a lɛ, ba tɩɛr ɩka kpĩin lɛ, na ba ŋme chɛlsɩ,

english_verse: He then got into the boat with them, and the wind died down. The disciples were completely confused.
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa kpɛ a gboro pɔ ka a sɛsɛbɛ ŋmaa vʊʊr. Ka a nɛɛr 'maa ba yɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: Their minds were closed, and they could not understand the true meaning of the loaves of bread. Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Matthew
translation_verse: Baa dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ala par ɛ, bojũu a ba ju ba wõnõ nyaar ɛ.

english_verse: As soon as they got out of the boat, the people recognized Jesus.
translation_verse: tɩ tɔ̃ɔ yi a gboro pɔ, nɩbɛ nyɛ naa a Yesu bɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: So they ran all over that part of the country to bring their sick people to him on mats. They brought them each time they heard where he was.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ jon yɔ a wɛr 'lɔ wʊ jaa na ba tuo a ba baalsɩ nɩ sɔ̃n chiin jie jaa ban wõ ɩka wʊ be naa.

english_verse: In every village or farm or marketplace where Jesus went, the people brought their sick to him. They begged him to let them just touch his clothes, and everyone who did was healed.
translation_verse: Jie jaa wʊn chen, tẽkpɛ̃ɛ pɔ bɩɩ, tẽbile pɔ bɩɩ, ka a tẽe kõkoor lɛ̃ɛɛ, ba ma gaal naa a ba baalsɩ a chãa pɔ. Ba ma sʊɔrɔ naa a Yesu ɩka wʊ sɔɔ ka ba sɩɩr a wʊ fuu nɛɛ gba, bala jaa na sɩɩr, ma sa naa.

english_verse: Some Pharisees and several teachers of the Law of Moses from Jerusalem came and gathered around Jesus.
translation_verse: A Faraseemɩne nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe bamɩne yi naa a Jerusalɛm wa lɔ̃ɔ a Yesu sɛ̃,

english_verse: You are good at rejecting God's commands so that you can follow your own teachings!
translation_verse: “A ba ɩ ka yɩ de yɛ̃ bar a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ tufʊ tɩ turo a lɛ a yɩn mãɛ na bin ɛ.

english_verse: They noticed that some of his disciples ate without first washing their hands.
translation_verse: na ba nyɛ a wʊ poturbo ka ba dire nɩ nũdɛbɛ. Ka a lɛ wiil ɩka baa pɛɛ a ba nuur a, “Puorfʊ pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees and many others obey the teachings of their ancestors. They always wash their hands in the proper way before eating.
translation_verse: A Faraseemɩne nɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ba maa di ka bala ba pɛɛ a ba puorfʊ pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ, na ba turo a lɛ a ba nɩbɛrɛ na bin.

english_verse: None of them will eat anything they buy in the market until it is washed. They also follow a lot of other teachings, such as washing cups, pitchers, and bowls.
translation_verse: Bala wa yi daa wa, ba maa di ka bala ba pɛɛ a pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ ɛ. Ban turo a ba bin yɔɔ ala jũu, ba ma pɛɛn a ŋmama, dʊʊr nɩ a kulaar.

english_verse: The Pharisees and teachers asked Jesus, “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? Why do they eat without washing their hands?”
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a Faraseemɩne nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe sʊʊr a Yesu, “Bo lɛ so ka a fʊ poturbo ba turo a lɛ a sɩ nɩbɛrɛ na bin ɛ, na baa pɛɛ a ba nuur ɛ tɩ dire nɩ nũdɛbɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus replied: You are nothing but show-offs! The prophet Isaiah was right when he wrote that God had said, “All of you praise me with your words, but you never really think about me.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a Isaiya dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a yɩn nɛɛr ayi dẽme 'yɛr na wʊ sɛb. Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa, ‘A yɩn nɩbɛ banyãna 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma naa nɩ a yɩ nɛɛ, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ pʊtɩɛr jãa a n sɛ̃.

english_verse: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.”
translation_verse: Pɔrɔ lɛ yɩ puoro ma, bojũu yɩ wile naa nɩsaal nɛbinsɩ tɩ tɩɛr ɩka maa nɛɛ lɛ.’ (Isaiya

english_verse: You disobey God's commands in order to obey what humans have taught.
translation_verse: Yɩ bar naa a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ tɩ turo a lɛ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ na bin.

english_verse: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they own has been offered to God.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka yɩn 'yɛr ɩka a sɛɛ na, nɩrɛ wa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ sãa bɩɩ a wʊ ma, ‘Bon jaa ɩn naa kʊ fʊ, n den kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.’

english_verse: And you ignore God's commands in order to follow your own teaching. You do a lot of other things just as bad. What Really Makes People Unclean (Matthew
translation_verse: Yɩn ɩrɛ a nɩtɔ̃ jũu, ka yɩ kaara a Nãaŋmɩn Nɛɛ pɔrɔ tɩ turo a lɛ yɩn mãɛ na bin. Yelyɔɔ mɩ ben be yɩn ɩrɛ nɩ nyɛtaa a nɩtɔ̃.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said: What comes from your heart is what makes you unclean.
translation_verse: Na wʊ mɩ lɛ 'yɛr ɩka, “Bon nyã na yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus called the crowd together again and said, “Pay attention and try to understand what I mean.
translation_verse: A Yesu lɛ bɔ̃ɔ bʊɔl a nɩyɔɔ ka ba lɩɛb wa a wʊ sɛ̃. Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ chɛl wõ ɩn 'yɛrɛ tɩ na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples had left the crowd and gone into the house, they asked him what these sayings meant.
translation_verse: Sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn wa bar a nɩyɔɔ bala tɩ kpɛ a yir, a wʊ poturbo sʊʊr wʊ naa a sʊkpa par.

english_verse: He answered, “Don't you know what I am talking about by now? You surely know that the food you put into your mouth cannot make you unclean.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ mɩ ɩ naa a nɩbɛ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a par bɩɩ? Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka bon jaa ba be be ka nɩrɛ na de di na wʊ dɛɛ ɛ,

english_verse: It doesn't go into your heart, but into your stomach, and then out of your body.” By saying this, Jesus meant that all foods were fit to eat.
translation_verse: bojũu wʊ maa kpɛ a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊɔm lɛ wʊ ma suu na wʊ tɩ yi.” Yesu 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ na wʊ wiil ɩka a bʊ̃diir a jaa sɛɛn difʊ.

english_verse: unfaithfulness in marriage, greed, meanness, deceit, indecency, envy, insults, pride, and foolishness.
translation_verse: nɩ a nyuur, nɩ a putuo, nɩ jire, nɩ kakaba, nɩ bɔbier, nɩ yosɔ̃ɔ, nɩ pɔlyele nɩ a jɔlyele.

english_verse: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
translation_verse: A yeldɛbɛ anyãna a jaa lɛ ma yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus left and went to the region near the town of Tyre, where he stayed in someone's home. He did not want people to know he was there, but they found out anyway.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Yesu yi a be na wʊ chen a Tire wɛr pɔ. Wʊ tɩ kpɛ naa a yir ãsʊɔ pɔ, tɩ waa bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ ka wʊ ben be ɛ. Tɩchɛ wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔɔl ɛ.

english_verse: A woman whose daughter had an evil spirit in her heard where Jesus was. And at once she came and knelt down at his feet.
translation_verse: Ala a pɔɔ na tara wʊ bipɔɔ ka a sɩdɛɛr tara, ajienaa wʊn wʊ wõ a Yesu 'yɛr, wʊ wan wa lo gbur dumo a wʊ niem.

english_verse: The woman was Greek and had been born in the part of Syria known as Phoenicia. She begged Jesus to force the demon out of her daughter.
translation_verse: A pɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ɛ, na wʊ dɔ̃ɔ yi be a Siriya Fonisiya paal pɔ. Wʊ sʊɔr naa a Yesu ɩka, wʊ dii a sɩdɛɛr bar a wʊ bipɔɔ pɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “The children must first be fed! It isn't right to take away their food and feed it to dogs.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Bar ka a bibiir di a lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ, taa de a bibiir bʊ̃diir kʊ baar ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “That's true! You may go now. The demon has left your daughter.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A nɩtɔ̃ fʊn 'yɛr jũu, kulo. A sɩdɛɛr bar naa a fʊ bipɔɔ.”

english_verse: When the woman got back home, she found her child lying on the bed. The demon had gone. Jesus Heals a Man Who Was Deaf and Could Hardly Talk
translation_verse: Wʊ kul tɩ nyɛ a bie na gã a gado ju, tɩ a sɩdɛɛr yi.

english_verse: Jesus left the region around Tyre and went by way of Sidon toward Lake Galilee. He went through the land near the ten cities known as Decapolis.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ yi naa a Tire wɛr pɔ, na wʊ tu a Sidon suu a Galilee man pɔ, na wʊ tɩ chen a Dekapolisɩ paal pɔ.

english_verse: Some people brought to him a man who was deaf and could hardly talk. They begged Jesus just to touch him.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka nɩbɛ bamɩne waan daba na ɩ wõo, na waa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ 'yɛrɛ sʊ̃ ɛ. Ba sʊɔr a Yesu ka wʊ sɩɩr a daba nɩ a wʊ nũu na wʊ sãa wʊ.

english_verse: After Jesus had taken him aside from the crowd, he stuck his fingers in the man's ears. Then he spit and put it on the man's tongue.
translation_verse: Ka Yesu tara a daba yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ɛ, na wʊ de a wʊ nubie su a daba tobɔɔr pɔ, be lɛ wʊ chɩr nataar tɩ sɩɩr a daba jãlbir.

english_verse: Jesus looked up toward heaven, and with a groan he said, “Effatha!” which means “Open up!”
translation_verse: Na wʊ dʊl kaa a saaju tɩ vʊʊr na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “Efata!”, a par lɛ a Yesu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ, yuo.

english_verse: At once the man could hear, and he had no more trouble talking clearly.
translation_verse: Ajienaa ka a daba tobo yuo ka a jãlbir lɩɛb ka wʊ piel 'yɛrɛ jaa chɛchɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told the people not to say anything about what he had done. But the more he told them, the more they talked about it.
translation_verse: Yesu kpaal ban jũu ɩka ba taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ. Tɩchɛ a lɛ wʊn kpãa ba lɛ lɛ ba mɩ 'yɛrɛ yʊɔrɔ nɩ a jie wʊ jaa.

english_verse: They were completely amazed and said, “Everything he does is good! He even heals people who cannot hear or talk.”
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ nɛɛ 'maan yɔɔ jaa ka ba 'yɛrɛ, “Wʊ ɩn yele jaa sʊ̃. Wʊ gba ma vɛ̃ naa ka wõo wõnõ, tɩ jãlbir lɩɛb 'yɛrɛ chɛchɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus warned them, “Watch out! Guard against the yeast of the Pharisees and of Herod.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a Faraseemɩne paanʊ̃ɔ dãbɩl nɩ a Hɛrɔd paanʊ̃ɔ dãbɩl mɩ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus explained clearly what he meant. Peter took Jesus aside and told him to stop talking like that.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr naa anyã chãa pɔ, ka a Pita tara wʊ yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ɛ tɩ piel mii 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ.

english_verse: “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat.
translation_verse: “A nɩbɛ banyã ɩrɛ naa nɩbaal, bojũu ber ata nɩ nyã ban be a n sɛ̃, baa lɛ tara bon na di ɛ.

english_verse: Some of them live a long way from here. If I send them away hungry, they might faint on their way home.”
translation_verse: Maa mɩ bar ba ka ba kulo nɩ a kɔ̃, ban tɩ lon sɔr pɔ, bojũu bamɩne yin tɛɛr.”

english_verse: After Jesus told the crowd to sit down, he took the seven loaves and gave thanks. He then broke the loaves and handed them to his disciples, who passed them out to the crowd.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr naa a nɩbɛ, ka ba jãnɛ tẽe, tɩ na wʊ de a paanʊ̃ɔsɩ ayopõi ala puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ ŋma ŋma de kʊ a wʊ poturbo ka ba de põ a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: They also had a few little fish, and after Jesus had blessed these, he told the disciples to pass them around.
translation_verse: Ba tara naa a jãbil amɩne, ka wʊ de a ala mɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ 'yɛr ɩka a poturbo ba de põ a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: he got into the boat with the disciples and crossed to the territory near Dalmanutha. A Sign from Heaven (Matthew
translation_verse: Ajienaa, 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo 'mantaa kpɛ a gboro pɔ, na ba chen a Dalmanuta paal pɔ.

english_verse: The Pharisees came out and started an argument with Jesus. They wanted to test him by asking for a sign from heaven.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Faraseemɩne wa sʊrɔ wʊ yelsʊʊrsɩ, bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba bɛɛr wʊ kaa, na ba 'yɛr ɩka wʊ wiil ba jãnɛ kɔ̃ɔ ka ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: The disciples had forgotten to bring any bread, and they had only one loaf with them in the boat.
translation_verse: A wʊ poturbo ĩin naa ba tara paanʊ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ tara bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ a gboro pɔ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking and asked, “Why are you talking about not having any bread? Don't you understand? Are your minds still closed?
translation_verse: Yesu na bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ, wʊ sʊʊr ba naa, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ 'yɛrɛ ɩka yaa tara paanʊ̃ɔ ɛ? Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a par sɛrɛ ɛ? A yɩ nyãa kpɛ̃mɛ na mɩ?

english_verse: Jesus took him by the hand and led him out of the village, where he spit into the man's eyes. He placed his hands on the blind man and asked him if he could see anything.
translation_verse: Yesu nyɔɔ naa a jɔ̃ɔ nũu tɩ tɔɔ wʊ yin a tẽe chɛchɛ. Wʊ tɩ chɩr nataar 'yɔ̃ɔ a daba nɩbie pɔ tɩ dɔɔl wʊ a nũu tɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ nyɛn bon bɩɩ?”

english_verse: The man looked up and said, “I see people, but they look like trees walking around.”
translation_verse: Ka a daba dʊɔ kaa tɩ 'yɛr, “N nyɛn nɩbɛ na kaara tɩɩr kaar na ba vire yʊɔrɔ.”

english_verse: Once again Jesus placed his hands on the man's eyes, and this time the man stared. His eyes were healed, and he saw everything clearly.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu lɛ de a wʊ nuur pɔɔ a daba nɩbie, ka a wʊ nɩbie yuo, ka wʊ nyɛrɛ pãa nyɛ bomo a jaa chɛchɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said to him, “You may return home now, but don't go into the village.” Who Is Jesus? (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Kulo, ta lɛ kpɛ a tẽe pɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus warned the disciples not to tell anyone about him. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu kpãa ba, “Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ a n 'yɛr kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus began telling his disciples what would happen to him. He said, “The nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses will make the Son of Man suffer terribly. He will be rejected and killed, but three days later he will rise to life.”
translation_verse: Yesu piel wile ba na wʊ 'yɛrɛ ɩka a Nɩsaal Bie na din dɔɔyɛ yele yɔɔ pɔ, ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a ba bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe tɔr wʊ bar, na ba kʊ wʊ. Tɩchɛ a ber ata daar wʊn ir naa a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr.

english_verse: But when Jesus turned and saw the disciples, he corrected Peter. He said to him, “Satan, get away from me! You are thinking like everyone else and not like God.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu lɩɛb kaa a wʊ poturbo tɩ mɩ mii 'yɔ̃ɔ a Pita 'yɛrɛ, “Tɔɔ chen be, Satan! A fʊ tɩɛr ɩn nɩrɛ tɩɛr, waa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus then told the crowd and the disciples to come closer, and he said: If any of you want to be my followers, you must forget about yourself. You must take up your cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ bʊɔl a nɩyɔɔ nɩ a poturbo ka ba wa a wʊ sɛ̃, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ turo ma, a nɩnyɩnɛ na 'laara a wʊ mãɛ tɩ de a daa na ɩ dɔɔyɛ nɩ kũu, tɩ turo ma.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me and for the good news, you will save it.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bʊɔrɔ a wʊ nyɛvʊr, a wʊ nyɛvʊr na bɔr na, tɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ a wʊ nyɛvʊr bɔrfʊ a maa nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã jũu, na faa wʊ naa.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ tara naa a wɛr nyã bonsɩ a jaa tɩ a wʊ sɩɛ wɛ, bo tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ be be?

english_verse: What could you give to get back your soul?
translation_verse: Bɩɩ bo lɛ nɩrɛ na de tɛɛn a wʊ sɩɛ?

english_verse: Don't be ashamed of me and my message among these unfaithful and sinful people! If you are, the Son of Man will be ashamed of you when he comes in the glory of his Father with the holy angels.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ mɩ nyɛ naa a maa nɩ a n 'yɛrbie ka a ɩ vã yele a nɩbɛ banyã na tɔr Nãaŋmɩn bar, nɩ a putudẽme sɛ̃, a Nɩsaal Bie mɩ na kaa naa a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ ka wʊ ɩ vĩ sʊɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn wa lɩɛb wa nɩ a wʊ Sãa tɩɩr 'matãan a malaka chɛchɛsɩ.”

english_verse: I can assure you that Elijah has already come. And people treated him just as they wanted to, as the Scriptures say they would. Jesus Heals a Boy (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka a Elaija wa naa ka ba ɩ a lɛ jaa ban bʊɔrɔ kʊ wʊ nɩtãa a lɛ ban sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ.”

english_verse: After Jesus and the disciples had gone back home and were alone, they asked him, “Why couldn't we force out that demon?”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa kpɛ a yir 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ poturbo tɛɛ, ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bãa lɛ so ka sɩn ba tʊ̃ɔ a sɩdɛɛr nyã dii bar ɛ?”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked a child to stand near him. He put his arm around the child and said,
translation_verse: Yesu vɛ̃ naa ka bibile kɔ̃ɔ ir ara a ba jaa sãlsɔɔ. Wʊ 'mɔɔn a bie tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ba,

english_verse: And his clothes became much whiter than any bleach on earth could make them.
translation_verse: A wʊ fuu pɛl nyɩlɛ gar bʊ̃pɩla jaa nɩrɛ na maal a ka a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: Then Elijah and Moses appeared and were talking with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a Elaija nɩ a Mosesɩ, wa daa yi a ba sɛ̃. Ka bala nɩ a Yesu 'mataa 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: The shadow of a cloud passed over and covered them. From the cloud a voice said, “This is my Son, and I love him. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Ka a julõjuur wa pɔɔ ba, tɩ kɔkɔr 'yɛr a be a julõjuur pɔ, “N binʊ̃nãa lɛ a nyãna. Yɩ chɛlɛ a wʊ 'yɛr.”

english_verse: At once the disciples looked around, but they saw only Jesus.
translation_verse: Ajienaa ban ɩka ba kaa, baa lɛ nyɛ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, tɩ nyɛ a Yesu tɛɛ.

english_verse: So they kept it to themselves. But they wondered what he meant by the words “raised from death.”
translation_verse: Baa 'yɛr kʊ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, tɩ 'yɛrɛ na ba sʊrɔ taa a kũu pɔ irfʊ par.

english_verse: The disciples asked Jesus, “Don't the teachers of the Law of Moses say that Elijah must come before the Messiah does?”
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bo lɛ so ka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe 'yɛr ɩka Elaija lɛ na de nie wa?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Elijah certainly will come to get everything ready. But don't the Scriptures also say that the Son of Man must suffer terribly and be rejected?
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a Elaija de nie wa chɔɔr a yele jaa. Tɩ ba mɩ sɛb ɩka a Nɩsaal Bie na din dɔɔyɛ yɔɔ ka ba tɔr wʊ bar.

english_verse: When Jesus and his three disciples came back down, they saw a large crowd around the other disciples. The teachers of the Law of Moses were arguing with them.
translation_verse: Ban wa ta a poturbo ŋmaa bala sɛ̃, ba nyɛn nɩyɔɔ na ara jilʊ̃ ba ka a bala nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe chɩrɛ taa.

english_verse: They brought the boy, and as soon as the demon saw Jesus, it made the boy shake all over. He fell down and began rolling on the ground and foaming at the mouth.
translation_verse: Ka ba waan a bie. A sɩɛ na wa nyɛ a Yesu, wʊ ir tãa a bie ka wʊ lo tẽe, mɩrɛ tɩ bile tɩ furo a natafuul.

english_verse: “When you welcome even a child because of me, you welcome me. And when you welcome me, you welcome the one who sent me.” For or against Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na de a bibiir banyãna taaba a n jũu, maa lɛ wʊ de. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa mɩ na de ma, a ba ɩ maa lɛ wʊ de ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma lɛ wʊ de.”

english_verse: The crowd was really surprised to see Jesus, and everyone hurried over to greet him.
translation_verse: Ka nɩbɛ na wa nyɛ a Yesu na waara, ka ba nɛɛ 'maa ka ba jo tuor puor wʊ.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What are you arguing about?”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr a wʊ poturbo, “Bo lɛ yɩ chɩrɛ taa a lɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus said, “You people don't have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you? Bring the boy to me.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Aa, a yɩn nɩbɛ banyã na ba tara sɔɔfʊ ɛ, n be a yɩ sɛ̃ kor ta ŋmɩnɛ? N tara kãnyir ŋmɩnɛ kʊ yɩ? Waan a bie wa kʊ ma.”

english_verse: Jesus asked the boy's father, “How long has he been like this?” The man answered, “Ever since he was a child.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu sʊʊr a bie sãa, “Sɔ̃ɔ buor lɛ a piel wʊ a nɩtɔ̃?” Ka a sãa 'yɛr, “A bibile daar jaa lɛ a piel wʊ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw that a crowd was gathering fast, he spoke sternly to the evil spirit that had kept the boy from speaking or hearing. He said, “I order you to come out of the boy! Don't ever bother him again.”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa nyɛ a nɩyɔɔ na joro lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a jie, wʊ tãn a sɩdɛɛr, “Fʊ̃ʊ sɩdɛɛr na ma vɛ̃ ka nɩbɛ ɩ wõn, wa yi a bie pɔ na fʊ taa lɛ ɩrɛ wa kpɩɛrɛ a wʊ pɔ go ɛ!”

english_verse: The spirit screamed and made the boy shake all over. Then it went out of him. The boy looked dead, and almost everyone said he was.
translation_verse: Ka a sɩɛ ŋme chɛlma tɩ dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bie yɔɔ tɩ yi, ka a bie gã kaara fɩka kũu. Ka a nɩbɛ 'yɛr, “Wʊ kpi naa!”

english_verse: But Jesus took hold of his hand and helped him stand up.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu nyɔɔ a wʊ nũu tɔɔ, ka wʊ ir ara.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Only prayer can force out this kind of demon.” Jesus Again Speaks about His Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ tɛɛ lɛ na vɛ̃ a fʊ dii a sɩɛ nyã ka wʊ yi.”

english_verse: Jesus left with his disciples and started through Galilee. He did not want anyone to know about it,
translation_verse: Ba yin a jie 'lɔ tɩ tu a Galilee tal. Yesu ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ a jie ban be ɛ,

english_verse: because he was teaching the disciples that the Son of Man would be handed over to people who would kill him. But three days later he would rise to life.
translation_verse: bojũu wʊ wile naa a wʊ poturbo, “Ban de naa a Nɩsaal Bie kʊ a nɩbɛ, ka ba kʊ wʊ. Ka a ber ata daar wʊn ir naa, na wʊ tara nyɛvʊr.”

english_verse: The disciples did not understand what Jesus meant, and they were afraid to ask. Who Is the Greatest? (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ baa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ joro dãbãɛ ɩka ba sʊʊr wʊ.

english_verse: The worms there never die, and the fire never stops burning.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a ‘Bufulo ba kpire ɛ, ka a bũu mɩ ba kpĩine ɛ.’ (Isaiya

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to his home in Capernaum. After they were inside the house, Jesus asked them, “What were you arguing about along the way?”
translation_verse: Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo wa ta na a Kapenahum. Ban wa kpɛ a yir, a Yesu sʊʊr ba naa, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ chɩrɛ taa a sɔr pɔ a lɛ?”

english_verse: They had been arguing about which one of them was the greatest, and so they did not answer.
translation_verse: Ka ba ɩ jaa gbulo, bojũu a sɔr pɔ ba chɩrɛ na taa ɩka an lɛ ɩ a kpɛ̃ɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down and told the twelve disciples to gather around him, he said, “If you want the place of honor, you must become a slave and serve others!”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa jãnɛ wʊ bʊɔl naa a wʊ poturbo Pie nɩ Ayi na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A yɩ ãsʊɔ wa bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ de nie, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ wʊ ɩ a yɩ jaa bile, na wʊ ɩ a yɩ jaa tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃.”

english_verse: Salt is good. But if it no longer tastes like salt, how can it be made salty again? Have salt among you and live at peace with each other.
translation_verse: “Nyaar ɩ naa, tɩchɛ a nʊ̃ɔ wa baar, ban lɛ bʊɔl wʊn nyaar ɔ? Yɩ ɩ nyaar, na yɩ tara nyã'maar kʊ taa.”

english_verse: John said, “Teacher, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But he wasn't one of us, and we told him to stop.”
translation_verse: Ka a Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Wiwile, sɩ nyɛ naa nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ mɩ na de a fʊ yuor na wʊ dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ ka a yire. Ka sɩ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ bar bojũu waa ɩ a sɩ ãsʊɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: Don't stop him! No one who works miracles in my name will soon turn and say something bad about me.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta dii wʊ bar ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na de a n yuor tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ̃ 'yɛr ma 'yɛrdɛɛr go ɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who isn't against us is for us.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na ba jɛɛr nɩ sɩ ɛ, pʊɔ sɩ naa.

english_verse: And anyone who gives you a cup of water in my name, just because you belong to me, will surely be rewarded. Temptations To Sin (Matthew
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na kʊ yɩ kɔ̃'maar nɩ ŋmele, yɩn ɩ a maa sofʊ jũu, a nɩnyɩnɛ kʊ̃ wa faa a wʊ sãyar ɛ.

english_verse: It will be terrible for people who cause even one of my little followers to sin. Those people would be better off thrown into the ocean with a heavy stone tied around their necks.
translation_verse: “Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ vɛ̃ naa a bʊ̃bil banyãna ãsʊɔ na sɔɔ ma ɩ yelbier, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bala 'mɔɔ nɩɛr lũ yɔɔl a wʊ nyĩe pɔ daa 'yɔ̃ɔ a man pɔ, ala sa.

english_verse: If your eye causes you to sin, get rid of it. You would be better off to go into God's kingdom with only one eye than to have two eyes and be thrown into hell.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a fʊ nɩbir mɩ vɛ̃ naa ka fʊ ɩ yelbier, 'loo bar. Fʊn tɩ kpɛ Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ nɩ nɩbifɩɛ sa naa fʊn tara a nɩbie ayi tɩ tɩ kpɛ a wõm jie.

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What does the Law of Moses say about this?”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu mɩ sʊʊr ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Mosesɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr?”

english_verse: They answered, “Moses allows a man to write out divorce papers and send his wife away.”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Mosesɩ bar sɔr ɩka daba wʊ sɛb dãasɩɛ gãn tɩ na wʊ tɔr a wʊ pɔɔ bar.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Moses gave you this law because you are so heartless.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A yɩ nyãkpãɛn jũu lɛ so ka wʊ sɛb a lɛ.

english_verse: But in the beginning God made a man and a woman.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a wɛr pielfʊ, Nãaŋmɩn maal daba nɩ pɔɔ. (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: That's why a man leaves his father and mother and gets married.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, daba na bar a wʊ sãa nɩ a wʊ ma tɩchɛ ka 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ pɔɔ ɩ bʊ̃'yen,

english_verse: He becomes like one person with his wife. Then they are no longer two people, but one.
translation_verse: ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen. (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: And no one should separate a couple that God has joined together.”
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, bon 'lɔ jaa Nãaŋmɩn na 'mataa, nɩrɛ wʊ ta nyɔɔ wɛl ɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were back in the house, they asked him about what he had said.
translation_verse: Ban wa lɩɛb kul a yir, a Yesu poturbo sʊʊr wʊ naa a 'yɛr nyã go.

english_verse: He told them, “A man who divorces his wife and marries someone else is unfaithful to his wife.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Daba jaa na tɔr wʊ pɔɔ bar tɩ kul pɔɔ yuo, wʊ maal yelbier.

english_verse: Some people brought their children to Jesus so he could bless them by placing his hands on them. But his disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ dɔ̃ɔ waara nɩ a ba bibiir ɩka Yesu wʊ dɔɔl ba a wʊ nũu, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ poturbo mii 'yɔ̃ɔ ba.

english_verse: I promise you that you cannot get into God's kingdom, unless you accept it the way a child does.”
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ jaa na ba sɔɔ de a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩtãa a bibile ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ be ɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw this, he became angry and said, “Let the children come to me! Don't try to stop them. People who are like these little children belong to the kingdom of God.
translation_verse: Yesu na wa nyɛ a lɛ a wʊ poturbo na ɩ, wʊ nyɛn suur na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bar a bibiir ka ba wa a n sɛ̃, na yɩ ta ŋmaa ba sɔr ɛ. A ba nyãna taaba lɛ so a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ.

english_verse: Jesus looked closely at the man. He liked him and said, “There's one thing you still need to do. Go sell everything you own. Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come with me.”
translation_verse: Yesu kaa naa a daba nɩ nʊ̃fʊ, tɩ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A chɛ fʊn yelbʊ̃'yen. Kul tɩ da a fʊ bonsɩ a jaa de põ nɔ̃n dẽme, ala lɛ fʊn tara bʊ̃mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Tɩ na fʊ pãa wa turo ma.”

english_verse: When the man heard Jesus say this, he went away gloomy and sad because he was very rich.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nyã vɛ̃ naa ka a daba sɔ̃ nie na wʊ kul pʊsɔ̃ɔ, bojũu tara sʊɔ lɛ wʊ ɩ.

english_verse: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, “It's hard for rich people to get into God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Yesu kaa gʊɔr na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, “A tara sʊɔ kpɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ!”

english_verse: The disciples were shocked to hear this. So Jesus told them again, “It's terribly hard to get into God's kingdom!
translation_verse: A 'yɛrbie anyãna vɛ̃ naa ka ba nɛɛr 'maa, tɩchɛ ka wʊ lɛ 'yɛr go, “Bibiir, a ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ nɩrɛ jaa na na kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ!

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: An ɩn kɔ̃mɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃, nyɔɔma na na kpɛ kparpĩi bɔɔ pɔ gar tara sʊɔ na na kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus' disciples were even more amazed. They asked each other, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo pãa ɩ chĩcham, tɩ lɩɛb sʊrɔ taa, “An lɛ na pãa tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ?”

english_verse: Jesus looked at them and said, “There are some things that people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu kaa ba tɩ 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ sɛ̃ 'lɔ, a ɩn tuo, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ba lɛ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ yele jaa ba ɩ tuo ɛ.”

english_verse: The disciples were confused as Jesus led them toward Jerusalem, and his other followers were afraid. Once again, Jesus took the twelve disciples aside and told them what was going to happen to him. He said:
translation_verse: Ba dɔ̃ɔ de a sɔr duoro a Jerusalɛm ka Yesu de a nie, tɩ a wʊ poturbo nɛɛr 'maa ka bala mɩ na turo joro dãbãɛ. Wʊ tɔɔ naa a Pie Nɩ Ayi yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ 'yɛr kʊ ba a lɛn na wa a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: We are now on our way to Jerusalem where the Son of Man will be handed over to the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses. They will sentence him to death and hand him over to foreigners,
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr naa, “Sɩn chiine a Jerusalɛm tẽe pɔ, be lɛ ban tɩ de a Nɩsaal Bie kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe, ka ba ɩka wʊ sɛɛn kũu, na ba nyɔɔ wʊ kʊ a nɩbɛ na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: and they answered, “When you come into your glory, please let one of us sit at your right side and the other at your left.”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Vɛ̃ ka a sɩ ãsʊɔ jãnɛ a fʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ loor, ka 'yen mɩ jãnɛ a fʊ gʊba loor a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “You don't really know what you're asking! Are you able to drink from the cup that I must soon drink from or be baptized as I must be baptized?”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a bon yɩn sʊɔrɔ ɛ. Yɩn tʊ̃ɔ nyũn a dɔɔyɛ ŋmele 'lɔ ɩn wa nyũn, bɩɩ kpɛ a dɔɔyɛ 'lɔ pɔ ɩn wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ kaar ɔ?”

english_verse: “Yes, we are!” James and John answered. Then Jesus replied, “You certainly will drink from the cup from which I must drink. And you will be baptized just as I must!
translation_verse: Ka a ba 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ.” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩn nyũn a ŋmele 'lɔ ɩn na nyũn, na yɩ so a kʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn na so,

english_verse: But it isn't for me to say who will sit at my right side and at my left. This is for God to decide.”
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ loor nɩ a n gʊba loor 'lɔ n ba tara sɔr ɩka n kʊ yɩ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ lɛ tara sɔr ɩka wʊ de a jiir anyãna kʊ a bala wʊn chɔɔr.”

english_verse: When the ten other disciples heard this, they were angry with James and John.
translation_verse: A poturbo pie bala na chɛ na wa wõ a yele, ba nyɛn suur 'yɔ̃ɔ a Jemesɩ nɩ a Jɔɔn.

english_verse: But Jesus called the disciples together and said: You know that those foreigners who call themselves kings like to order their people around. And their great leaders have full power over the people they rule.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu bʊɔl ba jaa 'mataa tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a bala na ɩ a nãmɩne a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ma fɩrɛ naa a nɩbɛ, ka a nɩbɛrɛ ma wile a ba kpãɛn.

english_verse: And if you want to be first, you must be everyone's slave.
translation_verse: ka a 'lɔ mɩ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a nɩdiere, wʊ ɩ a yɩ jaa gbãgbaa.

english_verse: The Son of Man did not come to be a slave master, but a slave who will give his life to rescue many people. Jesus Heals Blind Bartimaeus (Matthew
translation_verse: A Nɩsaal Bie mɩ gba ba wa, ɩka ba wa tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ wʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ wa naa ɩka wʊ wa tʊ̃ kʊ ba, na wʊ de a wʊ nyɛvʊr lɩɛ faan nɩyɔɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to Jericho. And as they were leaving, they were followed by a large crowd. A blind beggar by the name of Bartimaeus son of Timaeus was sitting beside the road.
translation_verse: Ba pãa wa naa a Jeriko. Ban wa kpɛ a Jeriko tɩ yire, nɩyɔɔ turo naa Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo, ka a jɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Batimayus, Timeyus bidaba, jãnɛ a sɔr kõkoor sʊɔrɔ bomo.

english_verse: When he heard that it was Jesus from Nazareth, he shouted, “Jesus, Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa wõ ka a Yesu na yi a Najaretɩ lɛ, ka wʊ piel gboolo, “Yesu, David Bie, kaa n nɩbaal!”

english_verse: Many people told the man to stop, but he shouted even louder, “Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ bamɩne ɩka wʊ pɔɔ a nɛɛ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ pãa chɛnɛ mal gboolo, “David Bie, kaa n nɩbaal!”

english_verse: Jesus stopped and said, “Call him over!” They called out to the blind man and said, “Don't be afraid! Come on! He is calling for you.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu tɛɛ ara tɩ 'yɛr, “Yɩ bʊɔl wʊ.” Ka ba bʊɔl a jɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr wʊ, “'Maa nyãa! Ir ara, wʊ bʊɔlɔ fʊ naa.”

english_verse: The man threw off his coat as he jumped up and ran to Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ vaa ir lɔb a fɔbaa bar tɩ wa a Yesu sɛ̃.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you want me to do for you?” The blind man answered, “Master, I want to see!”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr wʊ, “Bãa fʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal kʊ fʊ?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n nyɛrɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “You may go. Your eyes are healed because of your faith.” At once the man could see, and he went down the road with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Chiine! Fʊ sa naa, fʊn sɔɔ ma jũu.” Ajienaa, wʊ nyɛrɛ naa, na wʊ turo a Yesu ka ba de a sɔr.

english_verse: That evening, Jesus and the disciples went outside the city. A Lesson from the Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: A jãanʊɔr na wa ta, Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturo lɩɛb chen a Betanɩ.

english_verse: They asked, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: Ba wa sʊʊr wʊ naa, “An lɛ kʊ fʊ a sɔr ka fʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a anyã? Fʊ tara naa a sɔr ɩka fʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a anyã ɔ?”

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, say, ‘The Lord needs it and will soon bring it back.’ ”
translation_verse: Ka nɩrɛ wa sʊʊr yɩ ɩka bãa lɛ yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ, yɩ 'yɛr wʊ ɩka, a yɩ Soro lɛ bʊɔrɔ wʊ, tɩ wʊn lɩɛb waan fɔɔ.”

english_verse: The disciples left and found the donkey tied near a door that faced the street. While they were untying it,
translation_verse: Ba chen tɩ nyɛ a bʊ̃bile ban lũ a yõo dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ. Ban wa foro,

english_verse: some of the people standing there asked, “Why are you untying the donkey?”
translation_verse: nɩbɛ bamɩne na ara a be sʊʊr ba naa, “Bãa lɛ yɩ foro a bʊ̃bile ɩrɛ nɩ?”

english_verse: They told them what Jesus had said, and the people let them take it.
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr a lɛ a Yesu na ɩka ba 'yɛr, ka a nɩbɛ bar ba.

english_verse: In front of Jesus and behind him, people went along shouting, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord!
translation_verse: Ka a bala na be a niem nɩ a bala na be a puor, pãa chɩlɛ gɔ̃nɔ̃ 'yɛrɛ, “Yãan yooo! Nãaŋmɩn wʊ sʊ̃ʊ a 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃! (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: God bless the coming kingdom of our ancestor David. Hooray for God in heaven above!”
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn wʊ sʊ̃ʊ a sɩ sãa David nãalʊ̃ʊ na waara! Yãan yooo! Sɩ dãn Nãaŋmɩn yɔɔ jaa!”

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses heard what Jesus said, and they started looking for a way to kill him. They were afraid of him, because the crowds were completely amazed at his teaching.
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ wa wõ a nɩtɔ̃ bʊɔrɔ sɔr 'lɔ ban tu kʊ wʊ, tɩ na ba joro wʊ dãbãɛ bojũu a nɩyɔɔ nɛɛr 'maa ba naa a wʊ wiilfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: So Jesus said to the tree, “Never again will anyone eat fruit from this tree!” The disciples heard him say this. Jesus in the Temple (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a tɩɛ, “Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ lɛ wa pɔr a fʊ wɔ̃mɔ̃ di ɛ.” A wʊ poturbo wõ naa a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr.

english_verse: Then he taught the people and said, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be called a place of worship for all nations.’ But you have made it a place where robbers hide!”
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka wʊ pãa wile ba na wʊ 'yɛr, “A Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa a wʊ gãn pɔ, ‘N yir ɩ naa a yir a nɩbʊrɔ ba jaa na wa puor ma,’ (Isaiya

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples: Have faith in God!
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ sɔɔ de Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples reached Jerusalem, he went into the temple and began chasing out everyone who was selling and buying. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and the benches of those who were selling doves.
translation_verse: Ban wa ta a Jerusalɛm, Yesu chen tɩ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Puorfʊ Yir bɛchaar pɔ dire a nɩbɛ bala na chiin a bonsɩ tɩ daara nɩ a bala na daara. Wʊ daa naa libitɛɛrbɛ tɛɛbʊlsɩ lɩɛb kpa, tɩ da a bala mɩ na daara a papasɩ dakɔɔr lɔb.

english_verse: Jesus would not let anyone carry things through the temple.
translation_verse: Waa sɔɔ ka a nɩrɛ jaa tuo bon jaa tun a bɛchaar 'lɔ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Everything you ask for in prayer will be yours, if you only have faith.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, fʊ̃ʊ puor Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔr bon jaa tɩ sɔɔ ɩka, wʊn ɩn kʊ fʊ, wʊn ɩ naa.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to Jerusalem. And as he was walking through the temple, the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses came over to him.
translation_verse: Ba lɛ wa naa a Jerusalɛm go, ka a Yesu tɩ kpɛ yʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Puorfʊ Yir bɛchaar pɔ. A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ wa naa a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N sʊʊr yɩ sʊʊrfʊ bʊ̃'yen. Yɩn wa tʊ̃ɔ wiil ma a par, n mɩ na wiil yɩ naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kʊ ma a sɔr ka n tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a anyã.

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?”
translation_verse: Jɔɔn na dɔ̃ɔ suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ wʊ a sɔr bɩɩ, nɩbɛ lɛ kʊ wʊ a sɔr? Yɩ 'yɛr n kaa!”

english_verse: They thought it over and said to each other, “We can't say that God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: A ba lɩɛb chɩrɛ taa, “Sɩn be 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ tʊ̃ wʊ, wʊn sʊʊr sɩ naa, ka bo lɛ so ka saa sɔɔ wʊ ɛ?

english_verse: On the other hand, these people think that John was a prophet. So we can't say it was merely some human who gave John the right to baptize.” They were afraid of the crowd
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn mɩ 'yɛr ɩka nɩrɛ lɛ tʊ̃ wʊ, a ba ɩ ɛ.” Ba joro naa a nɩbɛ dãbãɛ, bojũu nɩrɛ jaa sɔɔ naa ɩka a Jɔɔn ɩn Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: and told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus replied, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.”
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ ba 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “Saa bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.” Ka a Yesu mɩ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N mɩ kʊ̃ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kʊ ma a sɔr ka n tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a anyãna ɛ.”

english_verse: It is also true that we must love God with all our heart, mind, and strength, and that we must love others as much as we love ourselves. These commandments are more important than all the sacrifices and offerings that we could possibly make.”
translation_verse: A fʊ nʊ̃ wʊ nɩ a fʊ nyãa, nɩ a fʊ tɩɛr wʊ jaa, nɩ a fʊ kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa, na fʊ lɛ nʊ̃ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ nɩtãa a fʊ mãɛ, a yele anyãna tufʊ ɩn gar dʊ̃n fʊn kʊ chʊm kʊ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ bɔɔrlorsɩ a jaa.”

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you think the owner of the vineyard will do? He will come and kill those renters and let someone else have his vineyard.
translation_verse: “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tɩɛr ɩka a puo sʊɔ na ɩ naa? Wʊn wan wa kʊ a pokaarba banyãna ba jaa tɩ de a puo kʊ nɩyor!

english_verse: When it was harvest time, he sent a servant to get his share of the grapes.
translation_verse: A wɔ̃fʊ sɔ̃ɔ wa ta naa ka wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ gbãgbaa ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ chen a nɩbɛ bala sɛ̃ tɩ de a wɔ̃mɔ̃ amɩne.

english_verse: But they said to themselves, “Someday he will own this vineyard. Let's kill him! That way we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: “Tɩchɛ a pokaarba na wa nyɛ a bie, ba 'yɛr kʊ taa, ‘A nyã lɛ ɩ a bʊ̃dire! Yɩ ɩ a sɩ kʊ wʊ, tɩ chɛ ka a bonsɩ ɩ a sɩ sofʊ.’

english_verse: So they grabbed the owner's son, killed him, and threw his body out of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba nyɔɔ wʊ kʊ lɔb bar a puo kõkoor.

english_verse: This is something the Lord has done, and it is amazing to us.’ ”
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro lɛ tʊ̃ a nɩtɔ̃ ka sɔb sɩ a nɩbie.’ ” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: The leaders knew that Jesus was really talking about them, and they wanted to arrest him. But because they were afraid of the crowd, they let him alone and left. Paying Taxes (Matthew
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Juu nɩbɛrɛ bʊɔrɔ sɔr ɩka ba nyɔɔ a Yesu, bojũu ba bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka bala lɛ wʊ lɔb a sʊkpa gbɛb. Tɩchɛ ba joro naa a nɩyɔɔ bala dãbãɛ, na ba bar wʊ tɩ lɩɛb chen.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were up to, and he said, “Why are you trying to test me? Show me a coin!”
translation_verse: Sɩ yab bɩɩ sɩ ta yab ɛ?” Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu bɔ̃ɔn a ba nɛbɛr yele ban waan, na wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Bo lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ bɛɛr ma kaa? Yɩ de a libir ãsʊɔ waan ka n kaa.”

english_verse: You surely know about people being raised to life. You know that in the story about Moses and the burning bush, God said, “I am the God worshiped by Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.”
translation_verse: A kũu pɔ irfʊ yele yɩ kar a Mosesɩ gãn pɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn nyɛ a tɩbile na 'lɩrɛ bũu, ka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ‘N ɩ naa a Abraham Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Isaakɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Jekɔb Nãaŋmɩn.’ (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: The Pharisees got together with Herod's followers. Then they sent some men to trick Jesus into saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Ba lɛ tʊ̃ naa a Faraseemɩne bamɩne nɩ nɩbɛ bamɩne na yi a nãa Hɛrɔd sɛ̃, ka ba wa bɛr Yesu nɛɛ nyɔɔ wʊ, a wʊ 'yɛrbie pɔ.

english_verse: They went to him and said, “Teacher, we know that you are honest. You treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are. And you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. Tell us, should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?”
translation_verse: Ba wa na wa 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Wiwile, sɩ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka fʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ. Nɩbɛ 'yɛrbie maa tʊ̃ɔ a fʊ pʊtɩɛr lɩɛb ɛ, bojũu fʊ maa chɛlɛ a lɛ nɩrɛ jaa na be ɛ. Tɩchɛ fʊ wile na a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr nɩ yelmãɛ. A tara naa sɔr ɩka sɩ yab a lõpo kʊ a nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa bɩɩ?

english_verse: They brought him a silver coin, and he asked, “Whose picture and name are on it?” “The Emperor's,” they answered.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba de a libir kur ãsʊɔ waan, ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “An foto nɩ a yuor lɛ be a libir pɔ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Siisa lɛ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.” The men were amazed at Jesus. Life in the Future World (Matthew
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ de a 'lɔ na ɩ a Siisa sofʊ na yɩ yab wʊ, na yɩ mɩ de a 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sofʊ na yɩ mɩ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.” Ka ba faa tɩ nyɔɔr a nɛɛr ara nɩ.

translation_verse: Wʊ ɩ naa vʊr Nãaŋmɩn, waa ɩ kũn Nãaŋmɩn ɛ. Yɩ tul naa.”

translation_verse: Ba mɩ ma fɔlɔ naa a pɔɔkɔɛ, na ba mɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn kor, bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩbɛ ba kaara ba. A nɩbɛ banyãna 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ na kpɛ̃mɛ naa.”

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe that people would rise to life after death. So some of them came to Jesus and said:
translation_verse: ) Nɛɛ jaa ba be be ɩ kpɛ gar a anyã ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: You are completely wrong! You don't know what the Scriptures teach. And you don't know anything about the power of God.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yaa nyɛ yɩn bɔr, bojũu yaa bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛbɛ nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw that the man had given a sensible answer, he told him, “You are not far from God's kingdom.” After this, no one dared ask Jesus any more questions. About David's Son (Matthew

translation_verse: Wʊ lɩɛb wa nyɛ ba go ka a ɩ ba gur naa bojũu gʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ba naa. Baa bɔ̃ɔ ŋmɩnɛ ban lɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu ɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus returned to the disciples the third time, he said, “Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough of this! The time has come for the Son of Man to be handed over to sinners.
translation_verse: Wʊ lɩɛb wa a ba sɛ̃ a gbɛɛ ata sɔ̃ɔ wa sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ chɛnɛ na gã guro na yɩ pɛ̃nɛ ɔ? A sɛɛ naa! A sɔ̃ɔ ta naa. Nyɛ, ba gar 'yɔ̃ɔ a Nɩsaal Bie kʊ a yelbe-ɩrbɛ!

english_verse: Get up! Let's go. The one who will betray me is already here.” Jesus Is Arrested (Matthew
translation_verse: Yɩ vaa ir, ka sɩ chen a ba sɛ̃. Nyɛ, a n gagaraa na waara!”

english_verse: Someone standing there pulled out a sword. He struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a bala ãsʊɔ na ara gbʊr a Yesu vʊ̃ɔ a wʊ sʊɔ chɛn a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa gbãgbaa toor ŋmaa.

english_verse: Jesus was still speaking, when Judas the betrayer came up. He was one of the twelve disciples, and a mob of men armed with swords and clubs were with him. They had been sent by the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Yesu na chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ lɛ ka Judas na ɩ a wʊ poturo pie nɩ ayi ãsʊɔ tɩ daasãa, nɩ nɩbɛ na tara sɔbɛrɛ nɩ dakʊrsɩ waara nɩ a Yesu nyɔɔfʊ jie. A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ lɛ tʊ̃ ba.

english_verse: Judas had told them ahead of time, “Arrest the man I greet with a kiss. Tie him up tight and lead him away.”
translation_verse: Judas dɔ̃ɔ wiil a nɩbɛ mana ɩka, “A 'lɔ ɩn na tɩ puor mʊʊr a kɔtɩr yɩ nyɔɔ a 'lɔ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ tara wʊ chiin.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the mob, “Why do you come with swords and clubs to arrest me like a criminal?
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “A mɔ̃ nɩbier lɛ n ɩ ka yɩ waan sɔbɛrɛ, nɩ dakʊrsɩ a n nyɔɔfʊ jie ɔ?

english_verse: Day after day I was with you and taught in the temple, and you didn't arrest me. But what the Scriptures say must come true.”
translation_verse: Bɩbir jaa lɛ n ma dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, na n wile yɩ a Puorfʊ Yir pɔ, tɩ yaa nyɔɔ ma ɛ. Tɩchɛ a ɩ naa a lɛ ɩka a tu a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr.”

english_verse: All of Jesus' disciples ran off and left him.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu poturbo ba jaa bar wʊ tɩ jo.

english_verse: One of them was a young man who was wearing only a linen cloth. And when the men grabbed him,
translation_verse: Pɔlbile kɔ̃ɔ mɩ na vaar fɔbaa tɛɛ turo nɩ a Yesu, ba nyɔɔ wʊ naa.

english_verse: he left the cloth behind and ran away naked. Jesus Is Questioned by the Council (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka wʊ mɩɩr a fɔbaa 'yɔ̃ɔ ba tɩ jon sal'mʊɔr.

english_verse: Finally, some men stood up and lied about him. They said,
translation_verse: Ka a bamɩne mɩ ir ŋmaa jire 'yɛr ɩka,

english_verse: Peter replied, “That isn't true! I don't know what you're talking about. I don't have any idea what you mean.” He went out to the gate, and a rooster crowed.
translation_verse: Ka a Pita chɩɩr tɩ 'yɛr, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ fʊn 'yɛrɛ par ɛ.” Tɩ na wʊ tɔɔ chen tɩ ara a dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ.

english_verse: Peter had followed at a distance, and when he reached the courtyard of the high priest's house, he sat down with the guards to warm himself beside a fire.
translation_verse: Pita mɩ turo naa a puor jaa na wʊ wa tɩ kpɛ a bɔɔrlo nãa yir bɛchaar pɔ, na wʊ 'mataa jãnɛ nɩ a bala na kara a Puorfʊ Yir uoro bũu.

english_verse: The chief priests and the whole council tried to find someone to accuse Jesus of a crime, so they could put him to death. But they could not find anyone to accuse him.
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ nɩbɛrɛ na chɛ bʊɔrɔ yele kɔ̃ɔ na wiil ɩka Yesu sɛɛn kũu, tɩ baa nyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: At once the high priest ripped his robe apart and shouted, “Why do we need more witnesses?
translation_verse: Ka a bɔɔrlo nãa tɔɔ a fuu chɩɛr nɩ suur, tɩ sʊʊr, “Bãa lɛ sɩn lɛ bʊɔrɔ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ lɛ 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr go?

english_verse: This time Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't even know the man you're talking about!”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita pɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ mãɛ, tɩ pɔrɔ kʊrɔ ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ a daba nyã 'yɛr yɩn 'yɛr ɛ.”

english_verse: “We heard him say he would tear down this temple that we built. He also claimed that in three days he would build another one without any help.”
translation_verse: “A ba sɛ̃, wʊ 'yɛr naa ɩka, ‘A Puorfʊ Yir nyãna a nɩrɛ nũu na mɛ, ɩn ŋmɛr wʊ naa tɩ na n de ber ata mɛn 'lɔ na ba ɩ nɩrɛ nũu bʊ̃mɩɛraa ɛ.’ ”

english_verse: But even then they did not agree on what they said.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a ba 'yɛr mɩ ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen ɛ.

english_verse: The high priest stood up in the council and asked Jesus, “Why don't you say something in your own defense? Don't you hear the charges they are making against you?”
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa ir ara tɩ sʊʊr a Yesu, “Faa 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr sɔɔrɔ ba bɩɩ? Bo dãasɩɛsɩ lɛ anyãna ban dire dɔɔlɔ fʊ. A ɩn yelmãɛ ɔ?”

english_verse: But Jesus kept quiet and did not say a word. The high priest asked him another question, “Are you the Messiah, the Son of the glorious God?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu ɩ jaa gbul, waa 'yɛr sɔɔ wʊ ɛ. Ka a bɔɔrlo nãa lɛ sʊʊr wʊ go, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ sɩn 'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Bie na ɩ a Nɩ-iraa ɔ?”

english_verse: You heard him claim to be God! What is your decision?” They all agreed he should be put to death.
translation_verse: Yɩn mãɛ wõ naa a lɛ wʊn fere. Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ tɩɛr?” Ka ba jaa 'yɛr ɩka wʊ sɛɛn kũu.

english_verse: Some of the people started spitting on Jesus. They blindfolded him, hit him with their fists, and said, “Tell us who hit you!” Then the guards took charge of Jesus and beat him. Peter Says He Doesn't Know Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Be lɛ a bamɩne piel chɩrɛ nataar 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ wʊ, ka a bamɩne mɩ pɔɔ a wʊ nɩbie tɩ ŋme wʊ, tɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Wiil sɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ŋme fʊ.” Ka a bala mɩ na guro a Puorfʊ Yir mɩ ŋme ŋme wʊ.

english_verse: The servant girl saw Peter again and said to the people standing there, “This man is one of them!”
translation_verse: A pɔɔbile na wa nyɛ a Pita a be, wʊ lɛ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ na ara a be, “A nyã mɩ ɩ naa a ba ãsʊɔ.”

english_verse: While Peter was still in the courtyard, a servant girl of the high priest came up
translation_verse: Pita jãnɛ naa a be a bɛchaar pɔ, ka a bɔɔrlo nãa gbãgbapɔɔbile ãsʊɔ wa wa.

english_verse: and saw Peter warming himself by the fire. She stared at him and said, “You were with Jesus from Nazareth!”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa nyɛ a Pita na uoro a bũu, wʊ kaa wʊ naa lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ 'yɛr, “Fʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ turo a Yesu na yi a Najaretɩ.”

english_verse: “No, I'm not!” Peter replied. A little while later some of the people said to Peter, “You certainly are one of them. You're a Galilean!”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita lɛ chɩɩr go. A ba kor ɛ, tɩ a bala na ara gbʊr a Pita mɩ 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, fʊ ɩ naa a ba ãsʊɔ, bojũu Galilee lɛ fʊ mɩ yi.”

english_verse: At once the rooster crowed a second time. Then Peter remembered that Jesus had told him, “Before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.” So Peter started crying.
translation_verse: Ajienaa lɛ ka a nɔraa mɩ tɔ̃ɔ kõ a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ. Ka a Pita pãa tɩɛrtɔ a lɛ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Fʊn chɩɩr ma naa gbɛɛ ata, tɩ ka a nɔrdɔ̃ɔ kõ gbɛɛ ayi.” Pita na wa tɩɛr bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ, ka wʊ kõ yɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: Early the next morning the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met together with the whole Jewish council. They tied up Jesus and led him off to Pilate.
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa chaar bibio, a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ nɩbɛrɛ na chɛ, lɔ̃ɔn guor taa lũ a Yesu tara wʊ chiin tɩ kʊ a nãa Pilate.

english_verse: But the chief priests told the crowd to ask Pilate to free Barabbas.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ dʊ̃ a nɩbɛ toor ɩka, ba 'yɛr ɩka, wʊ yuo a Barabasɩ bar.

english_verse: Pilate asked, “But what crime has he done?” “Nail him to a cross!” they yelled even louder.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Pilate sʊʊr ba, “Bãa wʊ ɩ? Bo tʊ̃dɛɛr lɛ wʊ tʊ̃?” Tɩchɛ ka ba tãna kpɛ̃ɔ jaa, “Kpa wʊ a daa ju!”

english_verse: But Jesus did not answer, and Pilate was amazed. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Yesu ba haa nɛɛ ɛ, ka a 'maa a Pilate nɛɛ.

english_verse: They made fun of Jesus and shouted, “Hey, you king of the Jews!”
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa piel laara wʊ, “Yãan yooo, Juu nɩbɛ nãa!”

english_verse: Then Pilate questioned him again, “Don't you have anything to say? Don't you hear what crimes they say you have done?”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Pilate sʊʊr a Yesu, “Faa 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr jaa ɛ, nyɛ lɛ ban sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ fʊ a yuor jã!”

english_verse: Pilate wanted to please the crowd, so he set Barabbas free. Then he ordered his soldiers to beat Jesus with a whip and nail him to a cross. Soldiers Make Fun of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Pilate na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ pɛl a nɩbɛ pʊɔ jũu, wʊ yuo naa a Barabasɩ kʊ ba. Wʊ vɛ̃ naa ka ba fɔb a Yesu yɔɔ jaa, tɩ de wʊ kʊ a sojasɩ ɩka, ba tɩ kpa wʊ a daa ju, ka wʊ kpi.

english_verse: On it was a sign that told why he was nailed there. It read, “This is the King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Ba sɛb naa a yele 'lɔ jũu ban kʊn wʊ mar a daa jũu ɩka, “A JUU NƖBƐ NÃA.”

english_verse: They yelled, “Nail him to a cross!”
translation_verse: Ka ba tãn, “Kpa wʊ a daa ju!”

english_verse: A Roman army officer was standing in front of Jesus. When the officer saw how Jesus died, he said, “This man really was the Son of God!”
translation_verse: A sojasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na ara a be a Yesu niem na wõ a wʊ chɩɩrfʊ, tɩ nyɛ a lɛ mɩ wʊn ŋmaa a vʊʊr, wʊ 'yɛr naa, “Yelmãɛ jaa, a daba nyã ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie.”

english_verse: The soldiers led Jesus inside the courtyard of the fortress and called together the rest of the troops.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a sojasɩ tara a Yesu kpɛ̃n a nãa yir kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ pɔ, tɩ bʊɔl a ba taaba sojasɩ lɔ̃ɔ taa.

english_verse: And at that time there was a prisoner named Barabbas. He and some others had been arrested for murder during a riot.
translation_verse: Barabasɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ pʊɔ a nɩbɛ bamɩne pɔ, na dɔ̃ɔ ir jɛɛr nɩ a paal nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na ba kʊ nɩbɛ, ka ba nyɔɔr ba pɔɔ.

english_verse: The crowd now came and asked Pilate to set a prisoner free, just as he usually did.
translation_verse: Nɩyɔɔ wa naa a Pilate sɛ̃ wa sʊɔr wʊ ɩka, wʊ ɩ kʊ ba a lɛ wʊn ma ɩ.

english_verse: Pilate asked them, “Do you want me to free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n ir a Juu nɩbɛ nãa kʊ yɩ bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Pilate knew that the chief priests had brought Jesus to him because they were jealous.
translation_verse: Pilate bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nyuur ban tara nɩ a Yesu lɛ vɛ̃ ban nyɔɔ wʊ waan a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Then Pilate asked the crowd, “What do you want me to do with this man you say is the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate sʊʊr ba go, “Tɩ n ɩ ŋmɩnɛ nɩ a 'lɔ yɩn bʊɔlɔ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa?”

english_verse: When the soldiers had finished making fun of Jesus, they took off the purple robe. They put his own clothes back on him and led him off to be nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Ban wa la wʊ a nɩtɔ̃ wa baar, ba yaa naa a fuu 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ bar, tɩ de a wʊ mãɛ fuu su wʊ, na ba pãa de wʊ chiin ɩka ba tɩ kpa wʊ a daa ju.

english_verse: Simon from Cyrene happened to be coming in from a farm, and they forced him to carry Jesus' cross. Simon was the father of Alexander and Rufus. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: A sɔr pɔ, ba nyɛn Simon na yi Sirenɩ tẽe pɔ, Aleksanda nɩ Worofʊs sãa lɛ. Mʊɔ pɔ lɛ wʊ yi tala, ka ba nyɔɔ wʊ fɩr ka wʊ de a Yesu daa tuo.

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses also made fun of Jesus. They said to each other, “He saved others, but he can't save himself.
translation_verse: Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ, a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe mɩ laara wʊ, na ba 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Nyɛ, wʊ faan bamɩne, tɩ wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ a wʊ mãɛ faa ɛ!

english_verse: Pilate was surprised to hear that Jesus was already dead, and he called in the army officer to find out if Jesus had been dead very long.
translation_verse: Pilate na wa wõ ɩka a Yesu kpi naa, a 'maa wʊn nɛɛ. Be lɛ wʊ bʊɔl a sojasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ka wʊ wa, ka wʊ sʊʊr wʊ, “A Yesu kpin bɩɩ?”

english_verse: A man named Joseph from Arimathea was brave enough to ask Pilate for the body of Jesus. Joseph was a highly respected member of the Jewish council, and he was also waiting for God's kingdom to come.
translation_verse: a Josefʊ na yi a Arimatɩya tẽe pɔ, na ɩ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ãsʊɔ ban 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, tɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Nãalʊ̃ʊ, nyɔɔn nyãa chen a Pilate sɛ̃, tɩ sʊɔr a Yesu ãgãn ɩka wʊ ũu.

english_verse: The soldiers took Jesus to Golgotha, which means “Place of a Skull.”
translation_verse: Ba chiin naa a Yesu tɩ tãn a be ban bʊɔlɔ a Yesu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ, Gɔlgɔta. A par lɛ ɩka, Julaa Jie.

english_verse: They nailed Jesus to a cross and gambled to see who would get his clothes.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba kpa wʊ a daa ju. Ba põ naa a wʊ fɔɔr na ba ŋme gbãm bɔ̃ɔ a ala ãsʊɔ jaa na na de.

english_verse: People who passed by said terrible things about Jesus. They shook their heads and shouted, “Ha! So you're the one who claimed you could tear down the temple and build it again in three days.
translation_verse: A bala na tala a be a wʊ kpafʊ jie tʊrɔ wʊ, vavire a ba jur 'yɛrɛ, “Wooo, a fʊ̃ʊ nyã na 'yɛr ɩka fʊn sɔ̃ɔ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Puorfʊ Yir nyã bar tɩ mɛ wʊ a ber ata,

english_verse: If he is the Messiah, the king of Israel, let him come down from the cross! Then we will see and believe.” The two criminals also said cruel things to Jesus. The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Vɛ̃ a 'lɔ na 'yɛr ɩka, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa, na wʊ ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ nãa, suu a daa ju a sɩ kaa, tɩ na sɩ pãa sɔɔ.” A bala mɩ ban kpa gbʊr wʊ, lɛ lɛ ba mɩ tʊ wʊ.

english_verse: After the officer told him, Pilate let Joseph have Jesus' body.
translation_verse: Ka a sojasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ, wʊ kpi naa.” Ka a Pilate sɔɔ ɩka a Josefʊ wʊ tɩ yɔɔ a Yesu ãgãn.

english_verse: About noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until around three o'clock.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa ara a gar ju sãlsɔɔ, a wɛr wʊ jaa sɔb naa wa tɩ tãn a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ balfʊ sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Then about that time Jesus shouted, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?” which means, “My God, my God, why have you deserted me?”
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ lɛ, ka a Yesu chɩɩr bʊɔl, “Eloi, eloi, lama sabakatanɩ.” A par lɛ a Yesu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ ɩka, “N Nãaŋmɩn, n Nãaŋmɩn, bo lɛ so ka fʊ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ ma?”

english_verse: Some of the people standing there heard Jesus and said, “He is calling for Elijah.”
translation_verse: A bala na ara gbʊr a be wõ na ba 'yɛr, “Yɩ chɛlɛ! Elaija lɛ wʊ bʊɔlɔ.”

english_verse: One of them ran and grabbed a sponge. After he had soaked it in wine, he put it on a stick and held it up to Jesus. He said, “Let's wait and see if Elijah will come and take him down!”
translation_verse: Ka a daba ãsʊɔ jo chen tɩ 'mɔɔ sapɔ 'lɔr a dãmiir amɩne pɔ, na wʊ chab daa tur a Yesu ɩka wʊ mʊʊr, tɩ na wʊ lɛ 'yɛr, “Yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ kaara, Elaija na wa yɔɔ wʊ naa bɩɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus shouted and then died.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu chɩɩr tɩ ŋmaa a vʊʊr.

english_verse: It was now the evening before the Sabbath, and the Jewish people were getting ready for that sacred day.
translation_verse: A daar 'lɔ ɩ naa a ba Chɔɔrfʊ Bɩbir ban na chɔɔr a ba mãɛ, bojũu a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ wa mʊr, a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir piel naa. A jãanʊɔr na wa tara

english_verse: Joseph bought a linen cloth and took the body down from the cross. He had it wrapped in the cloth, and he put it in a tomb that had been cut into solid rock. Then he rolled a big stone against the entrance to the tomb.
translation_verse: Josefʊ dãn fɔbaa na wʊ tɩ yɔɔ a Yesu ãgãn vil wʊ chiin tɩ ũu, a yaa ban chɩ kʊsɩr pɔ. Ba bil kʊsɩr wa pɔɔ a yaa nɛɛ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joseph were watching and saw where the body was placed.
translation_verse: A Mɛɛr na yi a Magdala, nɩ a Mɛɛr na ɩ a Josesɩ ma, nyɛ naa a jie 'lɔ ban ũu wʊ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus appeared in another form to two disciples, as they were on their way out of the city.
translation_verse: A anyã puor lɛ, a Yesu lɩɛb nɩyuo na wʊ dũu a ba ayi na de sɔr chiine a tẽe ãsʊɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Then the disciples left and preached everywhere. The Lord was with them, and the miracles they worked proved that their message was true. ANOTHER OLD ENDING TO MARK'S GOSPEL
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a poturbo yi chen tɩ mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jie jaa. Be lɛ ka a Soro 'mataa tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ ba, ka a wʊ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ anyã ban tʊ̃nɔ̃ wiil ɩka a wʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɩn yelmãɛ.

english_verse: Very early on Sunday morning, just as the sun was coming up, they went to the tomb.
translation_verse: A Pɛ̃nfʊ divɩɛ bio daar, bibio mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na pur baar, ba chen naa a yaa par.

english_verse: On their way, they were asking one another, “Who will roll the stone away from the entrance for us?”
translation_verse: A kʊsɩr na pɔɔ a yaa nɛɛ ba gbʊr ɛ, ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “An lɛ na tɩ bil a kʊsɩr bar sɩ a yaa nɛɛ?”

english_verse: But when they looked, they saw that the stone had already been rolled away. And it was a huge stone!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ban dʊɔ kaa a ba nidaa, a kʊsɩr 'lɔ bil yi a yaa nɛɛ.

english_verse: The women went into the tomb, and on the right side they saw a young man in a white robe sitting there. They were alarmed.
translation_verse: Ban tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a yaa pɔ, ba nyɛn pɔlbile na su fuu pɩla jãnɛ nɩ a nũsʊ̃ɔ loor, ka pɩla ɔɔ ba.

english_verse: Now go and tell his disciples, and especially Peter, that he will go ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there, just as he told you.”
translation_verse: Yɩ lɩɛb kul tɩ 'yɛr a wʊ poturbo nɩ a Pita ɩka, wʊ de yɩn nie chiine a Galilee, be lɛ yɩn tɩ nyɛ wʊ, nɩtãa a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ.”

english_verse: They will handle snakes and will drink poison and not be hurt. They will also heal sick people by placing their hands on them. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Ban ma 'mɔɔr waba. Bala wa nyũ bon na tara lɔɔ, tɩ a kʊ̃ ɩ ba yele ɛ. Baalaa ban dɔɔl a ba nũu, wʊn sa naa.”

english_verse: But when these disciples told what had happened, the others would not believe either. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Ba lɩɛb chen a Jerusalɛm tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a ba taaba, tɩchɛ baa sɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who believes me and is baptized will be saved. But anyone who refuses to believe me will be condemned.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã, ka ba so wʊ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, wʊn nyɛn a Nãaŋmɩn faafʊ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba sɔɔ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ na wɛ naa.

english_verse: After the Lord Jesus had said these things to the disciples, he was taken back up to heaven where he sat down at the right side of God.
translation_verse: A Soro Yesu na wa 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ kʊ a wʊ poturbo, Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ do a saaju tɩ jãnɛ a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ loor.

english_verse: Afterwards, Jesus appeared to his eleven disciples as they were eating. He scolded them because they were too stubborn to believe the ones who had seen him after he had been raised to life.
translation_verse: A ba kor ɛ, tɩ a Yesu lɛ dũu a Pie nɩ Bʊ̃'yen na 'mataa dire. Wʊ miin 'yɔ̃ɔ ba a ba ba sɔɔfʊ pɔ, nɩ a ba nyãkpãɛn jũu, bojũu baa sɔɔ de a bala na nyɛ wʊn ir a kũu pɔ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Then he told them: Go and preach the good news to everyone in the world.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ yɔ a wɛr wʊ jaa, na yɩ mʊɔl 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã kʊ a nɩbʊrɔ ba jaa.

english_verse: Everyone who believes me will be able to do wonderful things. By using my name they will force out demons, and they will speak new languages.
translation_verse: A jãnsɩ anyã na turo naa bala na sɔɔ. Ban de naa n yuor diin sɩdɛbɛ ka a yi, na ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrbʊlsɩ 'yɛrfʊ.

english_verse: Many people have tried to tell the story of what God has done among us.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a nɩyɔɔ na mɔ̃ man a lɛ na ɩ a sɩ ber anyã pɔ,

english_verse: They wrote what we had been told by the ones who were there in the beginning and saw what happened.
translation_verse: a lɛ ɩn yelmãɛ, ba dɔ̃ɔ be be na ba nyɛn nɩbir a pielfʊ, na ba ɩ a 'yɛr nyã gbãgbaar.

english_verse: So I made a careful study of everything and then decided to write and tell you exactly what took place. Honorable Theophilus,
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n baraa Teofilusɩ, n mɩ mɔ̃n vɩɛr a 'yɛr tɩ tãn a pielfʊ nyɛ ka a ɩ yelmãɛ lɛ, ka n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n sɛb a lɛ na tu taa kʊ fʊ.

english_verse: I have done this to let you know the truth about what you have heard. An Angel Tells about the Birth of John
translation_verse: Ka fʊ na tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a lɛ ban wiil fʊ ɩn yelmãɛ.

english_verse: When Herod was king of Judea, there was a priest by the name of Zechariah from the priestly group of Abijah. His wife Elizabeth was from the family of Aaron.
translation_verse: A Judiya Nãa Hɛrɔd sɔ̃ɔ, a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ ben be ban bʊɔlɔ Jekariya wʊ pʊɔ naa a Abija gbul pɔ ka a wʊ pɔɔ yuor di Elijabetɩ na yi a Aaron bʊrɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Both of them were good people and pleased the Lord God by obeying all that he had commanded.
translation_verse: Ba jaa ayi yele tor Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ka ba turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ na 'yɛr na baa tara chɛfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: But they did not have children. Elizabeth could not have any, and both Zechariah and Elizabeth were already old.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ baa tara bie ɛ, bojũu a Elijabetɩ abbaa ka 'lɔ naa sɩrɛ jaa nyɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: One day Zechariah's group of priests were on duty, and he was serving God as a priest.
translation_verse: A mɩ lʊɔr wa ta a Jekariya ka wʊ̃n tʊ̃ a bɔɔr lofʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: According to the custom of the priests, he had been chosen to go into the Lord's temple that day and to burn incense,
translation_verse: Gbãm lɛ ba gba ir wʊ nɩtãa lɛ a ba bɔɔrlo tʊ̃mɔ̃ na be, ka wʊn ma kpɛ a puorfʊ yir tɩ chʊm a tãɩ nyũu vɩla ala.

english_verse: All at once an angel from the Lord appeared to Zechariah at the right side of the altar.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn malaka wa dũu wʊ be a tãɩ nyũu vɩla chʊmfʊ jie a nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

english_verse: Zechariah was confused and afraid when he saw the angel.
translation_verse: Jekariya na wa nyɛ wʊ a lɛ, pɩla ɔɔ wʊ naa ka dãbãɛ kpɛ wʊ.

english_verse: But the angel told him: Don't be afraid, Zechariah! God has heard your prayers. Your wife Elizabeth will have a son, and you must name him John.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a malaka 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Jekariya ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn wõn a fʊ sʊɔrfʊ, a fʊ pɔɔ Elijabetɩ na dɔɔn dabile ka fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ yuor Jɔɔn.

english_verse: His birth will make you very happy, and many people will be glad.
translation_verse: A wʊ yele na ɩn nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ fʊ ka fʊ chɩlɛ ka nɩyɔɔ mɩ chɩlɛ a wʊ dɔɔfʊ jũu.

english_verse: Your son will be a great servant of the Lord. He must never drink wine or beer, and the power of the Holy Spirit will be with him from the time he is born.
translation_verse: An ɩ wʊn ɩn kpɛ̃ɛ a Nãaŋmɩn niem, wʊ kʊ̃ nyũ dãa ban 'yɔ̃ɔ dãbɩl ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na sɛɛ wʊn be a ma pʊɔm.

english_verse: John will lead many people in Israel to turn back to the Lord their God.
translation_verse: Wʊn lɩɛb naa a Isɩral nɩbɛ yɔɔ jie waan a ba Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: He will go ahead of the Lord with the same power and spirit that Elijah had. And because of John, parents will be more thoughtful of their children. And people who now disobey God will begin to think as they ought to. This is how John will get people ready for the Lord.
translation_verse: Wʊn den a sɩ Soro nie nɩ a sɩɛ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ be a Elaija 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ lɩɛb sãamɩne ka ba tara a ba bibiir tɩɛr. Ka bawõnsɩ mɩ nyɛ yɛ̃ na ba maala yeltorsɩ na wʊ vɛ̃ ka nɩbɛ mɩ chɔɔr ba mãɛ gun a sɩ Soro.”

english_verse: Zechariah said to the angel, “How will I know this is going to happen? My wife and I are both very old.”
translation_verse: Ka a Jekariya sʊʊr a malaka, “Ŋmɩnɛ ɩn ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ a nɩtɔ̃ fʊn 'yɛr? Maa nɩ n pɔɔ jaa kor naa.”

english_verse: The angel answered, “I am Gabriel, God's servant, and I was sent to tell you this good news.
translation_verse: Ka a malaka 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Maa lɛ a Gabɩrɛl na ma ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem, 'lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ ma nɩ a 'yɛr nyã ɩka n wa 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã kʊ fʊ.

english_verse: You have not believed what I have said. So you will not be able to say a thing until all this happens. But everything will take place when it is supposed to.”
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu fʊn ɩn wõo fʊ kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr ɛ, wa tãn a bɩbir 'lɔ a anyãna na ɩ bojũu faa sɔɔ de a 'yɛr ala na wa ɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na sɛɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The crowd was waiting for Zechariah and kept wondering why he was staying in the temple so long.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ bala na be a yõo chɛlɛ a Jekariya wʊ̃n kor a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir, ka chĩcham kpɛ ba.

english_verse: When he did come out, he could not speak, and they knew he had seen a vision. He motioned to them with his hands, but did not say a thing.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka wʊ wa yi tɩ wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr ɛ, ka a nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka wʊ nyɛn nyɛfʊ kɔ̃ɔ bojũu nuur kaalfʊ lɛ wʊ mana nɩ ba tɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: When Zechariah's time of service in the temple was over, he went home.
translation_verse: A lɛ a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ bɩbie na wa baar be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir, wʊ lɩɛb kul a wʊ yir.

english_verse: Soon after this, his wife was expecting a baby, and for five months she did not leave the house. She said to herself,
translation_verse: A anyã puor lɛ ka wʊ pɔɔ Elijabetɩ tara pʊɔ na wʊ sɔɔl ŋmɛrsɩ anũu.

english_verse: “What the Lord has done for me will keep people from looking down on me.” An Angel Tells about the Birth of Jesus
translation_verse: Na wʊ pãa 'yɛrɛ, “Nyɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal ma, a wʊ maal vɩla bɩbir vɩɛ naa ka wʊ ir ma a vĩ yin a nɩbɛ niem bar.”

english_verse: One month later God sent the angel Gabriel to the town of Nazareth in Galilee
