translation_verse: Elijabetɩ pʊɔ na wa ta ŋmɛrsɩ ayʊɔb, Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ naa a Gabɩrɛl a tẽe na be a Galilee paal pɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Najaretɩ,

english_verse: with a message for a virgin named Mary. She was engaged to Joseph from the family of King David.
translation_verse: be lɛ pɔɔsarbile kɔ̃ɔ be, ka daba ban bʊɔlɔ Josefʊ na ɩ a Nãa David yɔ̃ɔ ŋmaa baraa na kul ka a pɔɔbile yuor di Mɛɛr.

english_verse: The angel greeted Mary and said, “You are truly blessed! The Lord is with you.”
translation_verse: A malaka chen a wʊ sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “N puorfʊ naa, fʊ ɩn nɩ'yɔ̃ɔ naa, Nãaŋmɩn ben a fʊ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: Mary was confused by the angel's words and wondered what they meant.
translation_verse: Ka dãbãɛ nyɔɔ a Mɛɛr nɩ a puorfʊ nyã bʊrɔ, na wʊ sʊrɔ wʊ mãɛ a puorfʊ nyã par.

english_verse: Then the angel told Mary, “Don't be afraid! God is pleased with you,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a malaka 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, fʊ ɩn nɩ'yɔ̃ɔ naa Nãaŋmɩn niem.

english_verse: and you will have a son. His name will be Jesus.
translation_verse: Fʊn tara na pʊɔ dɔɔ dabile, na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ yuor Yesu.

english_verse: He will be great and will be called the Son of God Most High. The Lord God will make him king, as his ancestor David was.
translation_verse: Wʊn ɩn kpɛ̃ɛ, ka ba bʊɔlɔ wʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na be a Saaju Bie. A sɩ Soro Nãaŋmɩn na den a wʊ sãa David nãalʊ̃ʊ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: He will rule the people of Israel forever, and his kingdom will never end.”
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ na di a Jekɔb yir nãa jaa kpo kpo, a wʊ nãa kʊ̃ wa baar ɛ.”

english_verse: Mary asked the angel, “How can this happen? I am not even married!”
translation_verse: Ka a Mɛɛr sʊʊr a malaka, “N ba ta daba sɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ ŋmɩnɛ ɩn ɩrɛ wa dɔɔ a bie?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “The Holy Spirit will come down to you, and God's power will come over you. So your child will be called the holy Son of God.
translation_verse: Ka a malaka 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na wa kpɛ fʊ naa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ wa ger pɔɔ fʊ a bichɛchɛ 'lɔ fʊn na dɔɔ, ban bʊɔlɔ wʊ̃n Nãaŋmɩn Bie.

english_verse: Your relative Elizabeth is also going to have a son, even though she is old. No one thought she could ever have a baby, but in three months she will have a son.
translation_verse: Nyɛ a fʊ yɛbɛ Elijabetɩ gba na ɩ a pɔɔ abbaa na wʊ nyɔ̃ɔ tɩ wʊ tara na pʊɔ na dɔɔ bie, chuur ayʊɔb nɩ nyã wʊn gal.

english_verse: Nothing is impossible for God!”
translation_verse: Yele jaa ba ɩ tuo Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ.”

english_verse: Mary said, “I am the Lord's servant! Let it happen as you have said.” And the angel left her. Mary Visits Elizabeth
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Mɛɛr 'yɛr, “Nyɛ, Nãaŋmɩn gbãgbaa lɛ n ɩ, a ɩ a lɛ kʊ ma fʊn 'yɛr?” Ka a malaka bar wʊ tɩ chen.

english_verse: A short time later Mary hurried to a town in the hill country of Judea.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ a Mɛɛr pɔɔ yi do a tɔ̃ɔ ju a Judiya tẽe pɔ.

english_verse: She went into Zechariah's home, where she greeted Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Wʊ tɩ kpɛ naa a Jekariya yir na wʊ puor a Elijabetɩ.

english_verse: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, her baby moved within her. The Holy Spirit came upon Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Elijabetɩ na wõ a Mɛɛr puorfʊ ka a bie ɔɔ lɩɛb be a wʊ pʊɔm ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛɛ a Elijabetɩ.

english_verse: Then in a loud voice she said to Mary: God has blessed you more than any other woman! He has also blessed the child you will have.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ ŋme chɛlma 'yɛrɛ, “Nãaŋmɩn sʊ̃ʊ fʊn gar a pɔbɔ ba jaa, na wʊ mɩ sʊ̃ʊ a bie 'lɔ na be a fʊ pʊɔm.

english_verse: Why should the mother of my Lord come to me?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nyɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ na kaara, ka a n Soro ma wa a n sɛ̃?

english_verse: As soon as I heard your greeting, my baby became happy and moved within me.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃n wa wõ a fʊ puorfʊ a bie na gã a n pʊɔm ɔɔn lɩɛb nɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: The Lord has blessed you because you believed that he will keep his promise. Mary's Song of Praise
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ fʊ ɩ an ɩ fʊ sɔɔn de a lɛ a n Soro na tʊ̃, ka ba wa 'yɛr fʊ ɩka an ɩ naa a lɛ.”

english_verse: Mary said: With all my heart I praise the Lord,
translation_verse: Ka a Mɛɛr 'yɛr, “N pɛɛn Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a pʊɔ wʊ jaa.

english_verse: and I am glad because of God my Savior.
translation_verse: A n sɩɛ chɩlɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a n Fafaara 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God cares for me, his humble servant. From now on, all people will say God has blessed me.
translation_verse: An ɩ wʊ tɩɛrtɔ a wʊ gbãgbapɔɔbile mãɛ siirfʊ. An yi dɩna chiine, a dɔɔ tu taa ba jaa na bʊɔlɔ ma naa bɔɔsʊ̃n sʊɔ.

english_verse: God All-Powerful has done great things for me, and his name is holy.
translation_verse: An ɩ a Tʊ̃ɔfʊ Sʊɔ lɛ maal a lɛ kʊ ma. A wʊ yuor ɩn chɛchɛ.

english_verse: The Lord has used his powerful arm to scatter those who are proud.
translation_verse: A wʊ nũu tʊ̃n tʊ̃bɛrɛ, wʊ yɛ̃yɛl naa a bala na bʊɔrɔ a yuor a ba tɩɛr pɔ bar.

english_verse: God drags strong rulers from their thrones and puts humble people in places of power.
translation_verse: Wʊ dɔɔn nãmɩne a ba nãa dakɔɔr jur bar, tɩchɛ na wʊ 'mɔɔr a bala na siir a ba mãɛ ka ba do saaju.

english_verse: God gives the hungry good things to eat, and sends the rich away with nothing.
translation_verse: Wʊ kʊ naa a kɔ̃ dẽme bʊ̃sʊ̃n, tɩ dii a tara dẽme bar nũjaalsɩ.

english_verse: The Lord made this promise to our ancestors, to Abraham and his family forever!
translation_verse: Wʊ sʊ̃ʊn a wʊ gbãgbaa Isɩral tɩ tɩɛrtɔ ɩka wʊ kaa Abraham nɩ a wʊ yɔn nɩbaal bɩbir jaa, nɩtãa lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a sɩ sãamɩne.”

english_verse: Mary stayed with Elizabeth about three months. Then she went back home. The Birth of John the Baptist
translation_verse: Mɛɛr jãnɛ na a Elijabetɩ sɛ̃ ŋmɛrsɩ ata tɩ lɩɛb kul a wʊ tẽe.

english_verse: When Elizabeth's son was born,
translation_verse: Elijabetɩ dɔɔfʊ bɩbir wa vɩɛ naa ka wʊ dɔɔ dabile.

english_verse: her neighbors and relatives heard how kind the Lord had been to her, and they too were glad.
translation_verse: Ka a bala na kpɩɛrɛ gbʊr a Elijabetɩ nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme na wõ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal vɩla kʊ wʊ ba pʊɔ mɩ pɛl naa a wʊ kaar.

english_verse: Eight days later they did for the child what the Law of Moses commands. They were going to name him Zechariah, after his father.
translation_verse: A ber aniin daar ba wa naa ɩka ba wa ŋmaa a bie yʊɔr, na ba ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba de a sãa yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ bʊɔlɔ a Jekariya.

english_verse: But Elizabeth said, “No! His name is John.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a ma ba sɔɔ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛr, “A bie yuor din Jɔɔn.”

english_verse: The people argued, “No one in your family has ever been named John.”
translation_verse: A ba 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Fʊ bal nɩrɛ jaa ba di a yuor nyã ɛ.”

english_verse: So they motioned to Zechariah to find out what he wanted to name his son.
translation_verse: Tɩ na ba pãa 'lɩɩr sʊʊr a sãa a yobuor wʊn bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba 'yɔ̃ɔ a bie.

english_verse: Zechariah asked for a writing tablet. Then he wrote, “His name is John.” Everyone was amazed.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ man ba ɩka ba kʊ wʊ bon ka wʊ sɛb, wʊn ben wa de a bon na wʊ sɛb, “A bie yuor din Jɔɔn.” Ka nɛɛr 'maa ba jaa.

english_verse: All the neighbors were frightened because of what had happened, and everywhere in the hill country people kept talking about these things.
translation_verse: Ka dãbãɛ kpɛ a bala jaa na gbʊr a be ka nɩbɛ 'yɛrɛ ka a yaar de a Judiya tẽn ala na be a tɔ̃n ju.

english_verse: Everyone who heard about this wondered what this child would grow up to be. They knew the Lord was with him. Zechariah Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na wõ a nɩtɔ̃ a ma 'maa wʊn nɛɛ ka wʊ ma sʊʊr, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a bie nyã na wa kaara?” Bojũu a Soro nũu dɔɔl naa a bie.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit came upon Zechariah, and he began to speak:
translation_verse: Jekariya na ɩ a sãa, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛɛ wʊ naa ka wʊ 'yɛrɛ,

english_verse: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel! He has come to save his people.
translation_verse: “Pɛɛfʊ wʊ ta a Isɩral Nãaŋmɩn, bojũu wʊ wa naa wa faa a wʊ nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Our God has given us a mighty Savior from the family of David his servant.
translation_verse: Wʊ kʊ sɩn gãdaa ɩka wʊ faa sɩ na yi a wʊ gbãgbaa Nãa David yir,

english_verse: Long ago the Lord promised by the words of his holy prophets
translation_verse: nɩtãa lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ tu a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ chɛchɛ bala sɛ̃ a kõr jaa ka ba 'yɛr,

english_verse: to save us from our enemies and from everyone who hates us.
translation_verse: ɩka wʊ faa sɩ a sɩ dɔ̃dẽme sɛ̃, na wʊ faa sɩ a bala na laar sɩ nuur pɔ.

english_verse: God said he would be kind to our people and keep his sacred promise.
translation_verse: Wʊ maal a nɩtɔ̃ ɩka wʊ wiil nɩbaal kʊ a sɩ sãamɩne, na wʊ lɛ tɩɛr a wʊ nɛtɩr chɛchɛ 'lɔ,

english_verse: He told our ancestor Abraham
translation_verse: a lɛ wʊn pɔ kʊ a sɩ sãakpã Abraham.

english_verse: that he would rescue us from our enemies. Then we could serve him without fear,
translation_verse: Wʊ pɔn 'yɛr ɩka, wʊn faa sɩ naa a sɩ dɔ̃dẽme nuur pɔ, ka sɩ puoro wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ joro dãbãɛ ɛ,

english_verse: by being holy and good as long as we live.
translation_verse: na sɩ ɩ chɛchɛ nɩ nɩtorsɩ a wʊ niem a ber a jaa.

english_verse: You, my son, will be called the prophet of God Most High. You will go ahead of the Lord to get everything ready for him.
translation_verse: A fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ a n bie ban bʊɔlɔ fʊ naa a saaju Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ, an ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ na de a sɩ Soro nie chɔɔr a wʊ sɔr,

english_verse: You will tell his people that they can be saved when their sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: na fʊ vɛ̃ ka wʊ nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔ a faafʊ sɔr, na ba nyɛ yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ.

english_verse: God's love and kindness will shine upon us like the sun that rises in the sky.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na tara nɩ sɩ nɩbaal jũu, wʊ vɛ̃ naa ka a fafaara pur chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ yi a saaju,

english_verse: On us who live in the dark shadow of death this light will shine to guide us into a life of peace.
translation_verse: na wʊ chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ a bala na kpɩɛrɛ a libe pɔ, tɩ be a kũu gãagiel pĩlem, na wʊ wiil a sɩ gbɛɛ ka a de nyã'maar sɔr.”

english_verse: As John grew up, God's Spirit gave him great power. John lived in the desert until the time he was sent to the people of Israel.
translation_verse: A bie nʊ̃ɔ naa ka a sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ be a wʊ sɛ̃. Mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ lɛ wʊ kpɩɛrɛ tɩ tãn a bɩbir 'lɔ wʊn na wiil a wʊ mãɛ kʊ a Isɩral nɩbɛ.

english_verse: About that time Emperor Augustus gave orders for the names of all the people to be listed in record books.
translation_verse: A ber ala pɔ, a paal Nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa Agustus 'yɛr naa ɩka ba sɔr a nɩbɛ ba jaa na be a Worom paal pɔ.

english_verse: At this time a man named Simeon was living in Jerusalem. Simeon was a good man. He loved God and was waiting for him to save the people of Israel. God's Spirit came to him
translation_verse: Daba kɔ̃ɔ dɔ̃ɔ be a Jerusalɛm ban bʊɔlɔ Simeon na wʊ ɩ nɩtor na waa baala Nãaŋmɩn ɛ. Wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ a Isɩral nɩbɛ faafʊ bɩbir ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ be a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Everyone had to go to their own hometown to be listed.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa kul a wʊ mãɛ tẽe ka ban tɩ sɔr wʊ.

english_verse: So Joseph had to leave Nazareth in Galilee and go to Bethlehem in Judea. Long ago Bethlehem had been King David's hometown, and Joseph went there because he was from David's family.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a Josefʊ mɩ na yi a Najaretɩ tẽe na be a Galilee wɛr pɔ, na wʊ chen a Judiya wɛr pɔ, a Nãa David tẽe ban bʊɔlɔ a Bɛtɩlɛhɛm, bojũu a Nãa David yir lɛ wʊ yi tɩ lɛ ɩ a wʊ bal nɩrɛ.

english_verse: Mary was engaged to Joseph and traveled with him to Bethlehem. She was soon going to have a baby,
translation_verse: Josefʊ tara na a Mɛɛr na tara a pʊɔ wʊn bʊɔrɔ a kulfʊ 'mataa chiin ka ban tɩ sɔr ba.

english_verse: she gave birth to her first-born son. She dressed him in baby clothes and laid him on a bed of hay, because there was no room for them in the inn. The Shepherds
translation_verse: Ka wʊ dɔɔ a pɔɔsarbie ka wʊ ɩ dabile a wʊ vil wʊ a fɔbaa gaal a dʊ̃n mʊɔr 'wɔfʊ jie bojũu baa nyɛ jie na kpɛ a sãanba kpɛfʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: All at once an angel came down to them from the Lord, and the brightness of the Lord's glory flashed around them. The shepherds were frightened.
translation_verse: Ka a Nãaŋmɩn malaka yi a saaju wa a ba sɛ̃, ka Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr chaar pɔɔ ba, ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba.

english_verse: But the angel said, “Don't be afraid! I have good news for you, which will make everyone happy.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a malaka 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ lɛ n waan a yɩ sɛ̃, an ɩn chɩlfʊ kpɛ̃ɛ kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: This very day in King David's hometown a Savior was born for you. He is Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: A dɩna tãsɔɔ ba dɔɔ naa a Fafaara a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Nãa David tẽe pɔ. Wʊ ɩ naa a sɩ Soro nɩ a Nɩ-iraa.

english_verse: “Praise God in heaven! Peace on earth to everyone who pleases God.”
translation_verse: “Tɩɩr wʊ ta a Nãaŋmɩn na be a saaju, ka nyã'maar mɩ be a nɩbɛ bala na pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ a wɛr pɔ.”

english_verse: After the angels had left and gone back to heaven, the shepherds said to each other, “Let's go to Bethlehem and see what the Lord has told us about.”
translation_verse: A malakasɩ na wa bar ba tɩ lɩɛb do a saaju, ka a pɛchiinbɛ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Yɩ ɩ a sɩ chen a Bɛtɩlɛhɛm tẽe pɔ, tɩ kaa a yelnyɩnɛ na ɩ ka a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ 'yɛr sɩ.”

english_verse: They hurried off and found Mary and Joseph, and they saw the baby lying on a bed of hay.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba pɔɔ chen tɩ nyɛ a Mɛɛr nɩ a Josefʊ nɩ a bipɩla na gã a dʊ̃n mʊɔr 'wɔfʊ jie.

english_verse: When the shepherds saw Jesus, they told his parents what the angel had said about him.
translation_verse: A lɛ ban wa nyɛ wʊ, ba 'yɛr naa a lɛ a malaka na 'yɛr kʊ ba a bibile yele.

english_verse: But Mary kept thinking about all this and wondering what it meant.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Mɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a anyãna a wʊ pʊɔm tara tɩɛrɛ.

english_verse: As the shepherds returned to their sheep, they were praising God and saying wonderful things about him. Everything they had seen and heard was just as the angel had said.
translation_verse: A pɛchiinbɛ lɩɛb chen a piir jie tɩ dãna Nãaŋmɩn na ba pɛɛrɛ wʊ a ala a jaa ban wõ tɩ nyɛ a lɛ a malaka na 'yɛr kʊ ba.

english_verse: Eight days later Jesus' parents did for him what the Law of Moses commands. And they named him Jesus, just as the angel had told Mary when he promised she would have a baby. Simeon Praises the Lord
translation_verse: A ber aniin na wa ta, ba ŋmaa wʊn a yʊɔr tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ a yuor Yesu, a yuor nyã lɛ a malaka 'yɛr kʊ a Mɛɛr tɩ ka wʊ wa tara a pʊɔ.

english_verse: The time came for Mary and Joseph to do what the Law of Moses says a mother is supposed to do after her baby is born. They took Jesus to the temple in Jerusalem and presented him to the Lord,
translation_verse: Mɛɛr na wa baar a padɔɔr a lɛ a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na 'yɛr, Josefʊ nɩ a Mɛɛr den a bie chiin a Jerusalɛm na tɩ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: just as the Law of the Lord says, “Each first-born baby boy belongs to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Soro na 'yɛr, “Yɩ de dabil dɔ̃ɔ jaa kʊ a Soro.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: The Law of the Lord also says parents have to offer a sacrifice, giving at least a pair of doves or two young pigeons. So that is what Mary and Joseph did.
translation_verse: Ba den a bɔɔrlo bomo ala a Soro na 'yɛr ɩka, “Ŋmama ayi bɩɩ papa pɔlɔ ayi tɩ pɔl a ba mãɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata

english_verse: and told him that he would not die until he had seen Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ ɩka wʊn nyɛ naa a Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ a Soro na tʊ̃ nɩ nɩbir tɩ kpi.

english_verse: When Mary and Joseph brought Jesus to the temple to do what the Law of Moses says should be done for a new baby, the Spirit told Simeon to go into the temple.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ vɛ̃n ka Simeon chen be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, ka a ɩ a Josefʊ nɩ a Mɛɛr mɩ waan naa a ba bie Yesu a be na wa ir a nɛɛ.

english_verse: Simeon took the baby Jesus in his arms and praised God,
translation_verse: Ka a Simeon de a bie 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nũu pɔ tɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan 'yɛrɛ,

english_verse: “Lord, I am your servant, and now I can die in peace, because you have kept your promise to me.
translation_verse: “Tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊɔ, nɩtãa lɛ fʊn tɩr a fʊ nɛɛ kʊ a maa na ɩ a fʊ gbãgbaa, fʊn tʊ̃ɔ bar ma sɔr nɩ nyã'maar.

english_verse: and foreign nations will also see this.
translation_verse: 'lɔ fʊn chɔɔr ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ wʊ.

english_verse: Your mighty power is a light for all nations, and it will bring honor to your people Israel.”
translation_verse: Wʊn ɩn chãa wiil a nɩbɛ bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ ɩ tɩɩr kʊ a fʊ nɩbɛ Isɩral.”

english_verse: Jesus' parents were surprised at what Simeon had said.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sãa nɩ a ma nɛɛ 'maa a lɛ a Simeon na 'yɛr a wʊ yele.

english_verse: Then he blessed them and told Mary, “This child of yours will cause many people in Israel to fall and others to stand. The child will be like a warning sign. Many people will reject him,
translation_verse: Ka a Simeon pãa 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ ba, tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a Mɛɛr na ɩ a ma, “A bie nyãna lɛ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ a Isɩral nɩbɛ, ka ba yɔɔ na ŋme gbɛr lo tɩ ir, na wʊ ɩ jãnɛ ka ban 'yɛrɛ kpɛrɛ nɩ wʊ.

english_verse: and you, Mary, will suffer as though you had been stabbed by a dagger. But all this will show what people are really thinking.” Anna Speaks about the Child Jesus
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ yɔɔ pʊtɩɛr na gãn chãa pɔ, ka a fʊ̃ʊ mɩ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ fɩka sʊɔ ban chɔr fʊ.”

english_verse: The prophet Anna was also there in the temple. She was the daughter of Phanuel from the tribe of Asher, and she was very old. In her youth she had been married for seven years, but her husband died.
translation_verse: Pɔɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ben be ban bʊɔlɔ Ana na wʊ ɩ Fanuwɛl bie na wʊ ɩ Aserɩ bal nɩrɛ, na wʊ ɩ pɔɔ nyɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ kul sɩrɛ maal yuomo ayopõi.

english_verse: years old. Night and day she served God in the temple by praying and often going without eating.
translation_verse: ). Waa gala a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma ben be na wʊ ma gal bʊ̃diir tɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tãsɔɔ nɩ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: At this time Anna came in and praised God. She spoke about the child Jesus to everyone who hoped for Jerusalem to be set free. The Return to Nazareth
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ wʊ wa a ba sɛ̃ tɩ dãn Nãaŋmɩn tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr a bie 'yɛr kʊ a bala jaa na chɛlɛ a Jerusalɛm faafʊ bɩbir.

english_verse: After Joseph and Mary had done everything that the Law of the Lord commands, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee.
translation_verse: A lɛ a Josefʊ nɩ a Mɛɛr na wa ir a nɛɛ maal a lɛ a Soro na bin, ba lɩɛb kul a Najaretɩ na ɩ a ba tẽe na be a Galilee wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: The child Jesus grew. He became strong and wise, and God blessed him. The Boy Jesus in the Temple
translation_verse: Be lɛ a bie tɩ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ fɔ̃ɔ na wʊ sɛɛn yɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ be a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: And when Jesus was twelve years old, they all went there as usual for the celebration.
translation_verse: Yesu na wa nyɛ yuomo pie nɩ ayi ba tara wʊn don a Difʊ nyã jie nɩtãa lɛ ban ma ɩrɛ.

english_verse: After Passover his parents left, but they did not know that Jesus had stayed on in the city.
translation_verse: A Gõl Bar Difʊ ber na wa baar, ba lɩɛb kulo a ba tẽe tɩchɛ a Yesu bar a Jerusalɛm ka baa bɔ̃ɔn ɛ.

english_verse: They thought he was traveling with some other people, and they went a whole day before they started looking for him.
translation_verse: Ba tɩɛr ɩka wʊ taa pɔɔ a ba nɩbɛ kulo nɩ tɩ chen bɩbir bʊ̃'yen baa nyɛ wʊ ɛ, na ba pãa yʊɔrɔ bʊɔrɔ wʊ a ba nɩbɛ nɩ a ba nɩbɔ̃ɔnsɩ nɩ a ba barmɩne sɛ̃.

english_verse: When they could not find him with their relatives and friends, they went back to Jerusalem and started looking for him there.
translation_verse: Ban ba wa nyɛ wʊ ɛ, ba lɩɛb chen a Jerusalɛm a wʊ bɔfʊ jie.

english_verse: Three days later they found Jesus sitting in the temple, listening to the teachers and asking them questions.
translation_verse: A ber ata daar lɛ a ba tɩ nyɛ wʊ a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, ka wʊ jãnɛ a wiwiilbe chara pɔ chɛlɛ a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ na wʊ sʊrɔ ba sʊʊrfʊsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone who heard him was surprised at how much he knew and at the answers he gave.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na wõ a lɛ wʊn ire a 'yɛrsɩ par a chɔ̃ chɔ̃ nɛɛ 'maa ba naa.

english_verse: When his parents found him, they were amazed. His mother said, “Son, why have you done this to us? Your father and I have been very worried, and we have been searching for you!”
translation_verse: A sãa nɩ a ma na wa nyɛ wʊ a ba nɛɛ mɩ 'maa ba naa ka a ma sʊʊr, “Pa n bie, bo lɛ fʊ maal sɩ a nɩtɔ̃, ka maa nɩ a fʊ sãa yɔbɔ fʊ lɛ̃ɛɛ wa faa?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Why did you have to look for me? Didn't you know that I would be in my Father's house?”
translation_verse: Ka Yesu sʊʊr a ma, “Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ yʊɔrɔ bʊɔrɔ ma? Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka ɩn be naa a n Sãa yir ɛ?”

english_verse: But they did not understand what he meant.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ baa bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna wʊn 'yɛr kʊ ba par ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus went back to Nazareth with his parents and obeyed them. His mother kept on thinking about all that had happened.
translation_verse: A wʊ ir pɔɔ ba, a ba pãa kul a Najaretɩ a wʊ tɩ wõnõ a ba toor, tɩchɛ ka a ma 'yɔ̃ɔ a 'yɛr anyãna a jaa a wʊ pʊɔm.

english_verse: Jesus became wise, and he grew strong. God was pleased with him and so were the people.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ yɛ̃ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɛ ka wʊ yele nʊ̃mɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ nɩ a nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

english_verse: When tax collectors came to be baptized, they asked John, “Teacher, what should we do?”
translation_verse: Lõpodierbe mɩ wan a Jɔɔn sɛ̃ ɩka wʊ so ba a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, na ba mɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Wiwile sɩ mɩ ɩ ŋmɩnɛ?”

english_verse: Do something to show that you really have given up your sins. Don't start saying you belong to Abraham's family. God can turn these stones into children for Abraham.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka yɩ befʊ wiil ɩka yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr. Yɩ ta chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a yɩ mãɛ ɩka, Abraham lɛ ɩ a sɩ sãa, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ɔn maal a kusɩbɛ anyãna a ba lɩɛb ɩ a Abraham bibiir.

english_verse: But to Herod the ruler, he said, “It was wrong for you to take Herodias, your brother's wife.” John also said Herod had done many other bad things.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a nãa Hɛrɔd na de a wʊ yɛbɛ pɔɔ Hɛrɔdiyas kul, Jɔɔn 'yɛr wʊ naa ɩka a ba tara sɔr ka wʊ kul wʊ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛr wʊ a dɛbɛ amɩne wʊn ɩ.

english_verse: Melchi, Addi, Cosam, Elmadam, Er,
translation_verse: Melki bidaba, Adi bidaba, Kosam bidaba, Elmadam bidaba, Erɩ bidaba,

english_verse: Everyone became excited and wondered, “Could John be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ toor chɛlɛ, pãa tɩɛrɛ ɩka a Jɔɔn lɛ tɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa.

english_verse: Annas and Caiaphas were the Jewish high priests. At that time God spoke to Zechariah's son John, who was living in the desert.
translation_verse: Anasɩ nɩ Kayafasɩ bala lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn de a wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Jekariya bidaba Jɔɔn be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Isaiah the prophet wrote about John when he said, “In the desert someone is shouting, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord! Make a straight path for him.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Isaiya na sɛb a wʊ gãn pɔ, “Nɩrɛ 'yɛrɛ naa be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ, ‘Yɩ chɔɔr a sɩ Soro sɔr, na yɩ maal a wʊ sɔr ka wʊ tor.

english_verse: Then everyone will see the saving power of God.’ ”
translation_verse: Nɩsaal bʊrɔ ba jaa na nyɛn Nãaŋmɩn faafʊ.’ ” (Isaiya

english_verse: Crowds of people came out to be baptized, but John said to them, “You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala na waara a Jɔɔn sɛ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Yɩn waa bibiir, an lɛ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka yɩ jo yi a Nãaŋmɩn suur na waara a yɩ sɛ̃?

english_verse: The crowds asked John, “What should we do?”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala sʊʊr wʊ, “Ŋmɩnɛ sɩn pãa ɩ?”

english_verse: Some soldiers asked him, “And what about us? What do we have to do?” John told them, “Don't force people to pay money to make you leave them alone. Be satisfied with your pay.”
translation_verse: Sojasɩ bamɩne mɩ wan wa sʊʊr wʊ, “Sɩn mɩ, sɩ ɩ ŋmɩnɛ?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ta fɩr nɩrɛ de libir ɛ, yɩ ta mɩ ŋmaa jir kara dɔɔl nɩrɛ ɛ, na yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ sãyar sɛɛn yɩ.”

english_verse: John said, “I am just baptizing with water. But someone more powerful is going to come, and I am not good enough even to untie his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
translation_verse: A Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Maa 'lɔ kʊ̃ɔ lɛ n suoro yɩ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na gar ma na wa naa, a wʊ nafɔɔr mibe gba, n ba sɛɛ ɩka n for ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ na de Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nɩ bũu son yɩ.

english_verse: In many different ways John preached the good news to the people.
translation_verse: Jɔɔn kpãa ban nɩ yelyɔɔ na wʊ 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊ ba.

english_verse: Finally, Herod put John in jail, and this was the worst thing he had done. The Baptism of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Hɛrɔd lɛ maal dɛɛr wʊn vɛ̃ ka ba nyɔɔ Jɔɔn tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ.

english_verse: While everyone else was being baptized, Jesus himself was baptized. Then as he prayed, the sky opened up,
translation_verse: Ban ba nyɔɔ a Jɔɔn pɔɔ sɛrɛ ɛ, wʊ so naa a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ na wʊ mɩ so a Yesu a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ. Ka a Yesu sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka a saaju yuo.

english_verse: and the Holy Spirit came down upon him in the form of a dove. A voice from heaven said, “You are my own dear Son, and I am pleased with you.” The Ancestors of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ de papa ãgãn suu wa 'mar a Yesu ju, tɩ a kɔkɔr yi be a saaju 'yɛr, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a n Bidanʊ̃naa ka fʊ yele pɛl a n pʊɔ.”

english_verse: Simeon, Judah, Joseph, Jonam, Eliakim,
translation_verse: Simeon bidaba, Juda bidaba, Josefʊ bidaba, Jonam bidaba, Eliyakim bidaba,

english_verse: Matthat, Levi, Melchi, Jannai, Joseph,
translation_verse: Matatɩ bidaba, Levi bidaba, Melki bidaba, Janai bidaba, Josefʊ bidaba,

english_verse: Mattathias, Amos, Nahum, Esli, Naggai,
translation_verse: Matatiyasɩ bidaba, Amosɩ bidaba, Nahum bidaba, Esili bidaba, Nagai bidaba,

english_verse: Maath, Mattathias, Semein, Josech, Joda;
translation_verse: Maat bidaba, Matatiyasɩ bidaba, Semeyin bidaba, Josekɩ bidaba, Joda bidaba,

english_verse: Joanan, Rhesa, Zerubbabel, Shealtiel, Neri,
translation_verse: Joanan bidaba, Aresa bidaba, Jerubabel bidaba, Sealtɩɛl bidaba, Neri bidaba,

english_verse: Joshua, Eliezer, Jorim, Matthat, Levi;
translation_verse: Josua bidaba, Eliyeja bidaba, Jorim bidaba, Matatɩ bidaba, Levi bidaba,

english_verse: Melea, Menna, Mattatha, Nathan, David,
translation_verse: Melea bidaba, Mena bidaba, Matata bidaba, Natan bidaba, David bidaba,

english_verse: Jesse, Obed, Boaz, Salmon, Nahshon;
translation_verse: Jesɩ bidaba, Obed bidaba, Boajɩ bidaba, Salmon bidaba, Nason bidaba,

english_verse: Amminadab, Admin, Arni, Hezron, Perez, Judah,
translation_verse: Aminadab bidaba, Aram bidaba, Hejoron bidaba, Perejɩ bidaba, Juda bidaba,

english_verse: Jacob, Isaac, Abraham, Terah, Nahor,
translation_verse: Jekɔb bidaba, Isaakɩ bidaba, Abraham bidaba, Tera bidaba, Nahor bidaba,

english_verse: Serug, Reu, Peleg, Eber, Shelah;
translation_verse: Serugu bidaba, Wɛru bidaba, Peleg bidaba, Eber bidaba, Sela bidaba,

english_verse: Cainan, Arphaxad, Shem, Noah, Lamech,
translation_verse: Kainan bidaba, Afakadɩ bidaba, Sem bidaba, Nowa bidaba, Lamekɩ bidaba,

english_verse: Methuselah, Enoch, Jared, Mahalaleel, Kenan,
translation_verse: Metusela bidaba, Enok bidaba, Jared bidaba, Mahalaleel bidaba, Kenan bidaba,

english_verse: After the sun had set, people with all kinds of diseases were brought to Jesus. He put his hands on each one of them and healed them.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na wa mʊrɔ nɩbɛ waan naa ba baalsɩ a Yesu sɛ̃, ka wʊ dɔɔl ba a wʊ nũu na wʊ sãa baal jaa bʊrɔ ban waan.

english_verse: Then the devil led Jesus up to a high place and quickly showed him all the nations on earth.
translation_verse: A tɩɩ lɛ tara wʊn don tɔ̃ɔ ju tɩ wiil wʊ a nãa di jiir a jaa na be ka a wɛr pɔ

english_verse: Just worship me, and you can have it all.”
translation_verse: Ala ɩ, fʊ gbur dumo puor ma fʊ̃ʊ lɛ so.”

english_verse: Finally, the devil took Jesus to Jerusalem and had him stand on top of the temple. The devil said, “If you are God's Son, jump off.
translation_verse: A tɩɩ lɛ tara wʊn chiin a Jerusalɛm ka wʊ tɩ do a puorfʊ yir jie 'lɔ na do na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie ɔɔ lo a tẽe,

english_verse: He taught in the Jewish synagogues, and everyone praised him. The People of Nazareth Turn against Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Wʊ tɩ wile naa a nɩbɛ a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jiir ka a nɩrɛ jaa pɛɛrɛ wʊ.

english_verse: Jesus went back to Nazareth, where he had been brought up, and as usual he went to the synagogue on the Sabbath. When he stood up to read from the Scriptures,
translation_verse: Yesu lɩɛb chen a Najaretɩ be wʊn nʊ̃ɔ, a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar wʊ tɩ kpɛ̃n a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir an ɩ lɛ lɛ wʊ ma ɩrɛ na wʊ ir ara na wʊn kar gãn.

english_verse: “The Lord's Spirit has come to me, because he has chosen me to tell the good news to the poor. The Lord has sent me to announce freedom for prisoners, to give sight to the blind, to free everyone who suffers,
translation_verse: “Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ be naa a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, bojũu wʊ ir ma naa ɩka n tɩ 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a nɔ̃n dẽme, naa mɩ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ gbãgbaar ka ban so ba mãɛ, naa 'yɛr kʊ jɔ̃n ka ba yuo, naa 'yɛr faa a bala ban gere,

english_verse: and to say, ‘This is the year the Lord has chosen.’ ”
translation_verse: naa 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn maal vɩla yuon kʊ ba.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Jesus closed the book, then handed it back to the man in charge and sat down. Everyone in the synagogue looked straight at Jesus.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ pilʊ̃ a gãn de kʊ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ tɩ jãnɛ, ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa na be a lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir kpa a nɩbie 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ.

english_verse: All the people started talking about Jesus and were amazed at the wonderful things he said. They kept on asking, “Isn't he Joseph's son?”
translation_verse: Ba jaa 'yɛrɛ naa a wʊ sʊ̃ 'yɛr ka ba nɛɛr 'maa a 'yɛr vɩɛlsɩ na yire a wʊ nɛɛ pɔ ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “A ba ɩ a Josefʊ bidaba lɛ a nyã ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: You will certainly want to tell me this saying, “Doctor, first make yourself well.” You will tell me to do the same things here in my own hometown that you heard I did in Capernaum.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, yɩn sʊʊr ma naa nɩ a sʊkpa nyã, ‘Tɩtɩlɛ, tɩɩl a fʊ mãɛ, maal a ala fʊn maal a Kapenahum ka a fʊ tẽe.’ ”

english_verse: But you can be sure that no prophets are liked by the people of their own hometown.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, ba maa de Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ a wʊ mãɛ tẽe pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Once during the time of Elijah there was no rain for three and a half years, and people everywhere were starving. There were many widows in Israel,
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka pɔɔkɔyɔɔ ben a Isɩral nɩbɛ wɛr pɔ a Elaija sɔ̃ɔ, a war bũu 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ ŋmaa a yuom ata nɩ ŋmɛrsɩ ayʊɔb a wɛr wʊ jaa.

english_verse: but Elijah was sent only to a widow in the town of Zarephath near the city of Sidon.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ba tʊ̃ a Elaija a pɔɔkɔɛ ba nyã ãsʊɔ jaa sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩ tʊ̃ wʊ a pɔɔkʊɔr na be a Jarefat na be a Sidon wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: During the time of the prophet Elisha, many men in Israel had leprosy. But no one was healed, except Naaman who lived in Syria.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ Elisa sɔ̃ɔ, kɔ̃kɔ̃n mɩ ben a Isɩral nɩbɛ wɛr pɔ tɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba sa ɛ, ka Naaman na yi a Siriya wɛr pɔ ba lɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: But Jesus slipped through the crowd and got away. A Man with an Evil Spirit (Mark
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka wʊ fʊɔl yi a nɩyɔɔ bala sãlsɔɔ a lɛ na wʊ chen.

english_verse: Jesus went to the town of Capernaum in Galilee and taught the people on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ suu chen a Kapenahum na be a Galilee wɛr pɔ, ka a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ka wʊ piel wile a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: His teaching amazed them because he spoke with power.
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ wiilfʊ 'maa ba nɛɛ bojũu a wʊ 'yɛr tara na kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: There in the synagogue was a man with an evil spirit. He yelled out,
translation_verse: Daba mɩ ben a be a lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir na tara a dɛɛr sʊɔ, ka a sɩdɛɛr be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a wʊ ŋme chɛlma sʊʊr,

english_verse: Jesus ordered the evil spirit to be quiet and come out. The demon threw the man to the ground in front of everyone and left without harming him.
translation_verse: Ka Yesu tãn wʊ, “Pɔɔ a nɛɛ tɩ wa yi a daba 'yɔ̃ɔ.” A sɩdɛɛr daan a daba lɔb a nɩbɛ niem tɩ na wʊ yi a daba 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩ waa 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ baal ɛ.

english_verse: They all were amazed and kept saying to each other, “What kind of teaching is this? He has power to order evil spirits out of people!”
translation_verse: Ka a nɛɛr 'maa a nɩbɛ ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “Wiilbuor mɩ nɩ nyã? Wʊ den kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ 'yɛr kʊ a sɩdɛbɛ ka a yi.”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over that part of the country. Jesus Heals Many People (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ yele yaar de a tẽn ala na jilʊ̃ a be.

english_verse: Jesus left the synagogue and went to Simon's home. When Jesus got there, he was told that Simon's mother-in-law was sick with a high fever.
translation_verse: Yesu yi naa a lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir na wʊ chen a Simon yir. Ka ãgãn tɔ a Simon dãɛ ma ka ba sʊɔr a Yesu ɩka wʊ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ.

english_verse: So Jesus went over to her and ordered the fever to go away. Right then she was able to get up and serve them a meal.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ guun ger a pɔɔ na wʊ tãn a ãgãn tʊl ka wʊ bar a pɔɔ, ka wʊ sa na wʊ ir maal bʊ̃diir kʊ ba.

english_verse: Demons went out of many people and shouted, “You are the Son of God!” But Jesus ordered the demons not to speak because they knew he was the Messiah.
translation_verse: Sɩdɛbɛ yin a nɩyɔɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ tãna 'yɛrɛ, “Fʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn Bie.” Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu tãn ba ka ba ta 'yɛrɛ ɛ, an ɩ ba bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa.

english_verse: The next morning Jesus went out to a place where he could be alone, and crowds came looking for him. When they found him, they tried to stop him from leaving.
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa chaar Yesu yin tɩ jãnɛ a jie ãsʊɔ wʊ yõ, ka a nɩbɛ yɔbɔ wʊ tɩ nyɛ a jie wʊn be ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ bar ba tɩ chen ɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “People in other towns must hear the good news about God's kingdom. This is why I was sent.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A sɛɛ naa ɩka n 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ 'yɛr kʊ a tẽn anyã mɩ bojũu a lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ ma.”

english_verse: So he kept on preaching in the synagogues in Judea.
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr be a a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ yie a Juu nɩbɛ tẽe pɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus would often go to some place where he could be alone and pray. Jesus Heals a Man Who Could Not Walk (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ wʊ ma chɛnɛ na tɔɔ wʊ mãɛ yin chɛ̃chɛ̃ tɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: When Jesus saw how much faith they had, he said to the man, “My friend, your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: Yesu na nyɛ a lɛ ban sɔɔ de, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a baalaa, “N baraa, a fʊ yeldɛbɛ vɛ̃n bar.”

english_verse: Jesus got into the boat that belonged to Simon and asked him to row it out a little way from the shore. Then Jesus sat down in the boat to teach the crowd.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ kpɛ a gboro ãsʊɔ pɔ na ɩ Simon bon tɩ sʊɔr wʊ ɩka wʊ daa wʊ ka wʊ jãan a gogoro bãlãa. Wʊ pãa jãnɛ naa a gboro pɔ tɩ wile a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: “Master,” Simon answered, “we have worked hard all night long and have not caught a thing. But if you tell me to, I will let the nets down.”
translation_verse: Ka a Simon 'yɛr, “Kpãkpãana, tãsɔɔ jaa lɛ sɩ lɔb lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ saa nyɔɔ bon ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊn 'yɛr go, ɩn lɔbaa.”

english_verse: They did this and caught so many fish that their nets began ripping apart.
translation_verse: Ban wa lɔb, ba nyɔɔr jãyɔɔ ka a lɔyaarsɩ ɩrɛ na chɩɛr.

english_verse: Then they signaled for their partners in the other boat to come and help them. The men came, and together they filled the two boats so full that they both began to sink.
translation_verse: Ka ba 'lɩɩr a ba taaba na be a gboro ãsʊɔ pɔ, ka ba wa sʊ̃ʊ ba. Ba wa naa ka a gborsɩ a jaa ayi wa sɛɛ ka ba ɩrɛ na mʊr.

english_verse: His partners James and John, the sons of Zebedee, were surprised too. Jesus told Simon, “Don't be afraid! From now on you will bring in people instead of fish.”
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a Jemesɩ nɩ Jɔɔn na ɩ a Jebedee bibiir na ɩ a Simon taaba. Ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a Simon, “Ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, an yi dɩna chiine fʊn nyɔɔrɔ na nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.”

english_verse: The men pulled their boats up on the shore. Then they left everything and went with Jesus. Jesus Heals a Man (Matthew
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba tɔɔ a gborsɩ waan a gogoro nɛɛ wa bar bomo a jaa tɩ turo a Yesu.

english_verse: News about Jesus kept spreading. Large crowds came to listen to him teach and to be healed of their diseases.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a wʊ yele chɛnɛ ŋme yaar a jie wʊ jaa ka a nɩyɔɔ wa chɛlɛ a wʊ 'yɛr ka wʊ sãa a ba baalsɩ.

english_verse: But because of the crowd, they could not get him to Jesus. So they went up on the roof, where they removed some tiles and let the mat down in the middle of the room.
translation_verse: Ban ba wa nyɛrɛ sɔr a nɩyɔɔ jũu, ba don naa gar ju tɩ yuo bɔɔ tur bar ka wʊ suun a sɔ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ sãlsɔɔ tɩ gã a Yesu niem.

english_verse: Is it easier for me to tell this man that his sins are forgiven or to tell him to get up and walk?
translation_verse: 'Yɛr buor lɛ ɩ kɔ̃mɔ̃kɔ̃mɔ̃? N 'yɛr ɩka a wʊ yeldɛbɛ vɛ̃n bar bɩɩ n 'yɛr ɩka wʊ ir chiine?

english_verse: But now you will see that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” Jesus then said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and walk home.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩtɔ̃ lɛ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a maa Nɩsaal Bie tara na kpɛ̃ɔ a wɛr pɔ na vɛ̃ yeldɛbɛ bar.” Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a dagbɛrɛ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ ir 'mɔɔ a fʊ sɔ̃ɔ kulo nɩ.”

english_verse: At once the man stood up in front of everyone. He picked up his mat and went home, giving thanks to God.
translation_verse: Ajienaa ka wʊ vaa ir ara a ba niem, 'mɔɔ a wʊ bʊ̃gãnaa pɛɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn kulo nɩ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed and praised God. What they saw surprised them, and they said, “We have seen a great miracle today!” Jesus Chooses Levi (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka nɩrɛ jaa nɛɛ 'maa ka ba dãna Nãaŋmɩn. Ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba ka ba 'yɛrɛ, “Sɩ nyɛn yelkal bala dɩna.”

english_verse: Later, Jesus went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the place for paying taxes. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.”
translation_verse: A anyã puor Yesu yin tɩ nyɛ lõpodiere ban bʊɔlɔ Levi na jãnɛ diere wʊ lõposɩ, ka wʊ bʊɔl wʊ, “Ir turo ma.”

english_verse: Levi left everything and went with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a Levi vaa ir bar bomo a jaa tɩ turo wʊ.

english_verse: In his home Levi gave a big dinner for Jesus. Many tax collectors and other guests were also there.
translation_verse: Levi maal bʊ̃diir kʊ a Yesu a be a wʊ yir na wʊ bʊɔl a taaba lõpodierbe nɩ nɩyɔɔ ka ba wa 'mataa dire.

english_verse: The Pharisees and some of their teachers of the Law of Moses grumbled to Jesus' disciples, “Why do you eat and drink with these tax collectors and other sinners?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Faraseemɩne nɩ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe hũhũnõ nɩ a yele nyã sʊrɔ a Yesu poturbo, “Bo lɛ so ka yɩ 'mataa dire nɩ a lõpodierbe nɩ a tʊ̃dɛbɛ tʊ̃nbɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Healthy people don't need a doctor, but sick people do.
translation_verse: Ka Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A ba ɩ nɩrɛ na kpɛ̃mɛ lɛ chiine tɩtɩlɛ jie ɛ, tɩchɛ baalaa lɛ ma chen.

english_verse: I didn't come to invite good people to turn to God. I came to invite sinners.” People Ask about Going without Eating (Matthew
translation_verse: N ba wa ɩka n wa bʊɔl a nɩtorsɩ ɛ, n wa naa ɩka n wa bʊɔl a tʊ̃dɛbɛ tʊ̃nbɔ ka ba wa lɩɛb tɩɛr.”

english_verse: Some people said to Jesus, “John's followers often pray and go without eating, and so do the followers of the Pharisees. But your disciples never go without eating or drinking.”
translation_verse: Ka ba lɛ sʊʊr a Yesu, “Ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ ka Jɔɔn poturbo nɩ a Faraseemɩne poturbo ma jɛ̃n kɔ̃ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn, tɩchɛ ka a fʊ̃ʊ poturbo ma tɔ̃ɔ kpal a dib nɩ a nyũfʊ a lɛ a tɔ̃tɔ̃?”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “The friends of a bridegroom don't go without eating while he is still with them.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Fʊn tʊ̃ɔ maal a bala ban bʊɔl a pɔɔ paalaa jie ka ba jɛ̃n kɔ̃ a pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ na chɛnɛ be a ba sɛ̃ ɔ?

english_verse: But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bɩbir kɔ̃ɔ na wa vɩɛ naa ka a pɔɔ paalaa sɩrɛ yi a ba sɛ̃, a ber ala pɔ 'lɔ ban jɛ̃n nɩ kɔ̃.”

english_verse: Jesus then told them these sayings: No one uses a new piece of cloth to patch old clothes. The patch would shrink and make the hole even bigger.
translation_verse: Sʊkpa nyã lɛ wʊ lɔb kʊ ba, “Nɩrɛ maa ŋmaa fɔpaalaa sɛ choo fɔkoraa pɔ ɛ, 'lɔ be ɩ a lɛ a fɔpaalaa na chɩɛraa a fɔkoraa, bʊ̃paalaa nɩ bʊ̃koraa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'mataa ɛ.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The new wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ maa 'yɔ̃ɔ dãbãɩn a dãa wɔkoraa pɔ ɛ, 'lɔ be ɩ a lɛ a dãbãɩn na pur naa a wʊɔ ka a dãa kpaar ka a wʊɔ mɩ sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: New wine must be put only into new wineskins.
translation_verse: Ba ma den dãbãɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ a dãa wɔpaalaa pɔ.

english_verse: No one wants new wine after drinking old wine. They say, “The old wine is better.”
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ wa nyũ a dãgaa wʊ maa lɛ bʊɔrɔ a dãbãɩn ɛ, wʊ ma 'yɛr ɩka a dãgaa ɩn gar a dãbãɩn.”

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, so he told the man to stand up where everyone could see him. And the man stood up.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Yesu bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ ban tɩɛrɛ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba 'lɔ nũu na kpi, “Ir ara ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ fʊ.” Ka a daba ir ara.

english_verse: Some Pharisees said, “Why are you picking grain on the Sabbath? You're not supposed to do that!”
translation_verse: Ka a Farasee bamɩne sʊʊr ba, “Bo lɛ yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ na ba tara sɔr a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ɛ?”

english_verse: Long ago your own people did these same things to the prophets. So when this happens to you, be happy and jump for joy! You will have a great reward in heaven.
translation_verse: A bɩbir nyã wa vɩɛ yɩ chɩlɛ nɩ pʊpɛl, bojũu a yɩ sãyar waa naa na be a saaju. Lɛ lɛ a ba sãakpãmɩne dɔ̃ɔ maal a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless anyone who curses you, and pray for everyone who is cruel to you.
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a bala na pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ, na yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a bala na gere yɩ.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “On the Sabbath should we do good deeds or evil deeds? Should we save someone's life or destroy it?”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu pãa 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N sʊʊr yɩ kaa, bo lɛ sɛɛ ɩka a maal a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar, fʊ maal vɩla bɩɩ fʊ maal dɛɛr? Fʊ kʊ nɩrɛ bɩɩ fʊ faa nɩrɛ, bɩɩ fʊ sɔ̃ɔ bar?”

english_verse: One was Simon, and Jesus named him Peter. Another was Andrew, Peter's brother. There were also James, John, Philip, Bartholomew,
translation_verse: A bala wʊn ir lɛ, Simon wʊn lɛ kʊ yopaalaa Pita, nɩ a wʊ yɛbɛ Andiru, Jemesɩ, Jɔɔn, Filip, Batolomi,

english_verse: On another Sabbath Jesus was teaching in a synagogue, and a man with a paralyzed right hand was there.
translation_verse: A Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ãsʊɔ, wʊ ben a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir na wʊ wile, ka a daba ãsʊɔ be be a nũsʊ̃ɔ na kpi.

english_verse: The teachers and the Pharisees were furious and started saying to one another, “What can we do about Jesus?” Jesus Chooses His Twelve Apostles (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a suur kpɛ ba ka ba guoro taa a lɛ ban na ɩ a Yesu.

english_verse: The next morning he called his disciples together and chose twelve of them to be his apostles.
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa chaar a bibio, wʊ bʊɔl naa a poturbo ka ba wa a wʊ sɛ̃, ka wʊ ir a ba pɔ pie nɩ ayi bʊɔlɔ ba nɩtʊ̃nsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone was trying to touch Jesus, because power was going out from him and healing them all. Blessings and Troubles (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa bʊɔrɔ a Yesu sɩɩrfʊ bojũu kpɛ̃ɔ yire naa a wʊ pɔ sãana a ba jaa baalsɩ.

english_verse: Matthew, Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus. The rest of the apostles were Simon, known as the Eager One,
translation_verse: Matiu, Tomasɩ, Jemesɩ na ɩ Alfayasɩ bidaba, Simon na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a wʊ wɛr yele,

english_verse: Jude, who was the son of James, and Judas Iscariot, who later betrayed Jesus. Jesus Teaches, Preaches, and Heals (Matthew
translation_verse: Jemesɩ bidaba Judas, nɩ a Judas Isɩkariyot 'lɔ lɛ wa ɩ a gagaraa.

english_verse: You well-fed people are in for trouble. You will go hungry! You people who are laughing now are in for trouble. You are going to cry and weep!
translation_verse: Nɛbier kpɛ̃n a yɩn na tɩɩ a pʊ̃pãanyã kɔ̃ na kpɛ yɩ naa. Nɛbier kpɛ̃n a yɩn na laara a pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩn lɛ nɩbaal na wa kpɛ a yɩ kõnõ.

english_verse: These people had come to listen to Jesus and to be healed of their diseases. All who were troubled by evil spirits were also healed.
translation_verse: Ba wa naa ɩka ba wa chɛl a wʊ 'yɛr tɩ wʊ sãa a ba baalsɩ. Wʊ sãan a bala ba jaa na tara a sɩdɛbɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you hungry people. You will have plenty to eat! God will bless you people who are now crying. You will laugh!
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl lɛ kʊ a yɩn a kɔ̃ na kpɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩn lɛ na wa tɩɩ. Pʊpɛl lɛ kʊ a yɩn na kõnõ a pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩn wa laara naa.

english_verse: God will bless you when others hate you and won't have anything to do with you. God will bless you when people insult you and say cruel things about you, all because you are a follower of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl lɛ kʊ yɩ a nɩbɛ na wa 'laar yɩ, na ba oo yɩ bar, tɩ tʊrɔ yɩ na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ yuor fɩka bʊ̃dɛɛr a maa Nɩsaal Bie jũu.

english_verse: You are in for trouble when everyone says good things about you. That is what your own people said about those prophets who told lies. Love for Enemies (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɛbier kpɛ̃n a yɩn nɩbɛ jaa na bʊɔlɔ yɩ yo sʊ̃, lɛ lɛ a ba sãakpãmɩne mɩ dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔlɔ a jir 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ a yosʊ̃n.

english_verse: If you give to others, you will be given a full amount in return. It will be packed down, shaken together, and spilling over into your lap. The way you treat others is the way you will be treated.
translation_verse: Yɩ de tɩr, Nãaŋmɩn mɩn kʊ yɩ naa, man vɩla tɩ dib 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩ yɛ yɛɛ ka a yaara, an kpaar dɔɔl a yɩ gbɛɛ ju. A bon 'lɔ yɩn man tɩr, 'lɔ mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na man kʊ yɩ.”

english_verse: is like someone who dug down deep and built a house on solid rock. When a flood came and the river rushed against the house, it was built so well that it didn't even shake.
translation_verse: Wʊ kaara fɩka nɩrɛ na mɩɛrɛ yir na wʊ tuu a dachin par kparaa bɔɔ tɩ pɔɔn kʊsɩr na mɛ a dachin dɔɔl. Kʊ̃ɔ wa yaar yi jilʊ̃ a yir, ka a kɔ̃sɛbɛ ŋmiere a yir tɩ waa dam ɛ, bojũu ba mɛ wʊn sʊ̃.

english_verse: If someone slaps you on one cheek, don't stop that person from slapping you on the other cheek. If someone wants to take your coat, don't try to keep back your shirt.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ wa 'ma fʊ tʊkpal pɔ, lɛ lɩɛb a bʊ̃'yen ka wʊ lɛ 'ma, nɩrɛ wa de a fʊ fuu kpɛ̃ɛ ta mɔ̃ɔ wʊ a fuu bile ɛ.

english_verse: Give to everyone who asks and don't ask people to return what they have taken from you.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wa sʊɔr fʊ bon de kʊ wʊ, nɩrɛ wa de a fʊ bon taa lɛ wa sʊrɔ wʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: Treat others just as you want to be treated.
translation_verse: A lɛ yɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka a nɩbɛ ba maal kʊ yɩ, yɩ mɩ maal a lɛ kʊ ba.

english_verse: If you love only someone who loves you, will God praise you for that? Even sinners love people who love them.
translation_verse: “Ala ɩ yɩ nʊ̃ naa a bala na nʊ̃ yɩ, yobuor lɛ yɩ nyɛ? A yelbetʊ̃nbɔ gba mɩ nʊ̃n a bala na nʊ̃ ba.

english_verse: If you are kind only to someone who is kind to you, will God be pleased with you for that? Even sinners are kind to people who are kind to them.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ maala na vɩla kʊrɔ a bala na maal yɩ a vɩla, yobuor lɛ yɩn nyɛ? A yelbetʊ̃nbɔ gba mɩ ɩrɛ naa a lɛ.

english_verse: Have pity on others, just as your Father has pity on you. Judging Others (Matthew
translation_verse: Yɩ ɩ nɩbibaal dẽme nɩtãa lɛ a yɩ Sãa na ɩ a nɩbibaal sʊɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said: Don't judge others, and God won't judge you. Don't be hard on others, and God won't be hard on you. Forgive others, and God will forgive you.
translation_verse: “Yɩ ta tɔɔr nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ wa tɔɔr a yɩ 'yɛr ɛ. Yɩ ta 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ ta 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ 'yɛr ɛ. Yɩ vɛ̃ kʊ nɩrɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ vɛ̃ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: Jesus also used some sayings as he spoke to the people. He said: Can one blind person lead another blind person? Won't they both fall into a ditch?
translation_verse: Sʊkpa nyã lɛ a Yesu lɛ lɔb kʊ ba, “Jɔ̃ɔ na tʊ̃ɔn jɔ̃ɔ tɔɔ? Ba jaa ayi kʊ̃ lo bɔɔ pɔ ɛ?

english_verse: Are students better than their teacher? But when they are fully trained, they will be like their teacher.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ na jãna wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ gar a wʊ wiwile ɛ, tɩ 'lɔ wa jãn baar wʊn tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ wiwile kaar.

english_verse: You can see the speck in your friend's eye, but you don't notice the log in your own eye.
translation_verse: “Ŋmɩnɛ a fʊ kaara a dabile na be a fʊ yɛbɛ nɩbir pɔ, tɩ ba chɛlɛ a dakpɛ̃ɛ na be a fʊ̃ʊ nɩbir pɔ ɛ?

english_verse: How can you say, “My friend, let me take the speck out of your eye,” when you don't see the log in your own eye? You show-offs! First, get the log out of your own eye; then you can see how to take the speck out of your friend's eye. A Tree and Its Fruit (Matthew
translation_verse: Bɩɩ Ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ ka fʊ 'yɛr kʊ a fʊ yɛbɛ, n yɛbɛ vɛ̃ ka n ir a a dabile bar a fʊ nɩbir pɔ, tɩ ba ire a dakpɛ̃ɛ na be a fʊ̃ʊ nɩbir pɔ ɛ? Fʊ̃ʊ nɩbɛlɛ nyã, de nie ir a dakpɛ̃ɛ a fʊ nɩbir pɔ bar na fʊ pãa nyɛrɛ tʊ̃ɔ ir a dabile a fʊ yɛbɛ nɩbir pɔ bar.

english_verse: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
translation_verse: “Tɩsʊ̃ ba wɔ̃nɔ̃ bidɛbɛ ɛ, bɩɩ tɩdɛɛr mɩ ba wɔ̃nɔ̃ bisʊ̃n ɛ.

english_verse: You can tell what a tree is like by the fruit it produces. You cannot pick figs or grapes from thornbushes.
translation_verse: Tɩɛ jaa a wʊ wɔ̃mɔ̃ lɛ ba ma de bɔ̃ɔn wʊ. Ba maa pɔr kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ gʊtɩɛ ju ɛ, bɩɩ pɔr 'wɔ̃rɔ tamiir tɩɛ ju ɛ.

english_verse: Good people do good things because of the good in their hearts, but bad people do bad things because of the evil in their hearts. Your words show what is in your heart. Two Builders (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩsʊ̃ a yelsʊ̃ ala na be a wʊ pʊɔm lɛ wʊ ma 'yɛrɛ, ka a nɩdɛɛr mɩ ma 'yɛrɛ a yeldɛbɛ ala na be a wʊ pʊɔm. Ala na sɛɛ a pʊɔ lɛ a nɛɛ ma 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Why do you keep on saying that I am your Lord, when you refuse to do what I say?
translation_verse: “Ŋmɩnɛ a yɩ bʊɔlɔ ma ɩka Soro, tɩ na yaa turo a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɛ?

english_verse: But anyone who hears what I say and doesn't obey me is like someone whose house wasn't built on solid rock. As soon as the river rushed against that house, it was smashed to pieces!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na wõ a n 'yɛr tɩ na waa maala ɛ, wʊ kaara fɩka nɩrɛ na mɛ yir dɔɔl a tãn mʊɔr ju, waa tuu tɩ mɛ ɛ. A kɔ̃sɛbɛ wa yin ŋme a dachin, ka a dachin wʊ jaa lo ŋmɛr.”

english_verse: I have officers who give orders to me, and I have soldiers who take orders from me. I can say to one of them, ‘Go!’ and he goes. I can say to another, ‘Come!’ and he comes. I can say to my servant, ‘Do this!’ and he will do it.”
translation_verse: Bojũu maa mãɛ tara na nɩbɛrɛ ɩn joro dãbãɛ, naa mɩ tara a sojasɩ ka ba mɩ be a n pĩlem. Maa 'yɛr kʊ ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ, chen wʊ ma chen naa, bɩɩ ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ wa, wʊ ma wa naa. N ma 'yɛr kʊ a n gbãgbaa, maal anyã, ka wʊ ma maal.”

english_verse: He loves our nation and even built us a synagogue.”
translation_verse: bojũu wʊ nʊ̃n a sɩ nɩbɛ na vɛ̃ ka ba mɛ a sɩ lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie.”

english_verse: When the Lord saw the woman, he felt sorry for her and said, “Don't cry!”
translation_verse: A lɛ a Soro na wa nyɛ a pɔɔ, nɩbaal kpɛ wʊ naa ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a pɔɔ, “Ta kõnõ ɛ.”

english_verse: The leaders went to Jesus and begged him to do something. They said, “This man deserves your help!
translation_verse: Ba wan a Yesu sɛ̃ wa sʊɔr wʊ yãayãabɩlɛ 'yɛrɛ, “A daba nyã sɛɛ naa ɩka fʊ tɩ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ,

english_verse: Simon answered, “I suppose it would be the one who had owed more and didn't have to pay it back.” “You are right,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Ka a Simon 'yɛr, “N tɩɛr ɩka a 'lɔ sãn na waa lɛ.” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Sɩrɛ fʊ 'yɛr.”

english_verse: In this town an army officer's servant was sick and about to die. The officer liked his servant very much.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a soja nɩdiere gbãgbaa wʊn nʊ̃ yɔɔ jaa bɩɛrɛ ɩrɛ na ŋmaa vʊʊr.

english_verse: So Jesus went with them. When Jesus wasn't far from the house, the officer sent some friends to tell him, “Lord, don't go to any trouble for me! I am not good enough for you to come into my house.
translation_verse: Yesu pɔɔ ba naa ka ba 'mataa chiine tɩ gbʊrɔ a daba yir, ka wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ barmɩne ka ba tuor 'yɛr a Yesu ɩka. “N Soro, ta bal a fʊ mãɛ ɛ, bojũu n ba sɛɛ ka fʊn wa kpɛ a n yir ɛ.

english_verse: And I am certainly not worthy to come to you. Just say the word, and my servant will get well.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so gba maa mãɛ na ba 'la wa a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ. Tɩchɛ 'yɛr bir tɛɛ an sãan a n gbãgbaa.

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “In all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!”
translation_verse: A lɛ a Yesu na wõ a nɩtɔ̃ a daba nyã na ba ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ na 'yɛr, ka nɛ'maa wʊ, ka wʊ lɩɛb 'yɛr kʊ a nɩyɔɔ bala. “A Isɩral nɩbɛ pɔ gba, n ba nyɛ a sɔɔfʊ nyã bʊrɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The officer's friends returned and found the servant well. A Widow's Son
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ barmɩne bala wʊn tʊ̃ lɩɛb kpɛ a yir tɩ nyɛ ka a gbãgbaa sa.

english_verse: As they came near the gate of the town, they saw people carrying out the body of a widow's only son. Many people from the town were walking along with her.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa gbʊr a tẽe dɔ̃dɔr kpɩɛraa ba tuon kũu wa yin na ɩ a pɔɔ bidabʊ̃'yen tɩ wʊ ɩ pɔɔkʊɔr. Ka a tẽe 'lɔ nɩbɛ yɔɔ mɩ pʊɔ wʊ.

english_verse: Jesus went over and touched the stretcher on which the people were carrying the dead boy. They stopped, and Jesus said, “Young man, get up!”
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ chen tɩ sɩɩr a kũu ban tuo, ka a bala na tuo a ba ara. Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Pɔlbile, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ ir.”

english_verse: The boy sat up and began to speak. Jesus then gave him back to his mother.
translation_verse: Ka a kũu vaa ir jãnɛ tɩ piel na wʊ 'yɛrɛ ka Yesu de wʊ kʊ a ma.

english_verse: Everyone was frightened and praised God. They said, “A great prophet is here with us! God has come to his people.”
translation_verse: Dãbãɛ kpɛ̃n ba jaa ka ba pɛɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrɛ nɩ, “Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrkpɛ̃ɛ ãsʊɔ lɛ yi sɩ, Nãaŋmɩn wan ɩka wʊ wa sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ.”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over Judea and everywhere else in that part of the country. John the Baptist (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu yele ŋme yaar a Judiya paal wʊ jaa nɩ a tẽn ala na gbʊr.

english_verse: John's followers told John everything that was being said about Jesus. So he sent two of them to ask the Lord, “Are you the one we should be looking for? Or must we wait for someone else?”
translation_verse: na wʊ tʊ̃ ba a Soro sɛ̃ ka ba tɩ sʊʊr wʊ kaa, “Fʊ̃ʊ ɩ a 'lɔ na wa bɩɩ sɩ chɛlɛ nɩyuo?”

english_verse: When these messengers came to Jesus, they said, “John the Baptist sent us to ask, ‘Are you the one we should be looking for? Or are we supposed to wait for someone else?’ ”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ bala wa a Yesu sɛ̃ wa 'yɛr, “A Jɔɔn kɔ̃suor lɛ tʊ̃ sɩ a fʊ sɛ̃ ɩka sɩ wa sʊʊr fʊ kaa, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a 'lɔ na wa bɩɩ sɩ chɛlɛ nɩyuo?”

english_verse: At that time Jesus was healing many people who were sick or in pain or were troubled by evil spirits, and he was giving sight to a lot of blind people.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ mɩ lɛ Yesu sãa baalsɩ, bala na tara a sɩdɛbɛ na wʊ yuon jɔ̃n nɩbie.

english_verse: Jesus said to the messengers sent by John, “Go and tell John what you have seen and heard. Blind people are now able to see, and the lame can walk. People who have leprosy are being healed, and the deaf can now hear. The dead are raised to life, and the poor are hearing the good news.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a bala a Jɔɔn na tʊ̃, “Yɩ lɩɛb kul tɩ man kʊ a Jɔɔn a lɛ yɩn nyɛ tɩ wõ, jɔ̃n nyɛrɛ naa ka gbɛrsɩ chiine ka kɔ̃kɔ̃n sa, ka wõn wõnõ, ka kũusɩ ir ɩ vʊɛ, ka a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mɩ ta a nɔ̃n dẽme.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who doesn't reject me because of what I do.”
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ a n yele na ba bãr wʊ lɔb ɛ.”

english_verse: After John's messengers had gone, Jesus began speaking to the crowds about John: What kind of person did you go out to the desert to see? Was he like tall grass blown about by the wind?
translation_verse: A bala a Jɔɔn na tʊ̃ na wa chen baar, Yesu piel 'yɛrɛ a Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊrɔ a nɩyɔɔ bala, “Bo lɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ a kaafʊ jie? A jɩmur a sɛsɛbɛ na dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ bɩɩ?

english_verse: What kind of man did you really go out to see? Was he someone dressed in fine clothes? People who wear expensive clothes and live in luxury are in the king's palace.
translation_verse: Ala ba ɩ lɛ ɛ, bo yɩ chen tɩ nyɛ? Daba na su bʊ̃pɩɛl ɔ? Kai, a bala na suro a bʊ̃sʊ̃n, na ba dire a bʊ̃sʊ̃n nãa yir lɛ ba ma be.

english_verse: What then did you go out to see? Was he a prophet? He certainly was! I tell you that he was more than a prophet.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ yɩ tɩ nyɛ? Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ɔ. Ɔ̃ɔ, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka wʊ gar Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures, God calls John his messenger and says, “I am sending my messenger ahead of you to get things ready for you.”
translation_verse: A anyã yele lɛ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, ‘Ɩn tʊ̃ naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ka wʊ de a fʊ nie na wʊ tɩ chɔɔr a fʊ sɔr kʊ fʊ.’ (Malakaɩ

english_verse: No one ever born on this earth is greater than John. But whoever is least important in God's kingdom is greater than John.
translation_verse: N 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka bala pɔɔ na dɔɔ ka a wɛr pɔ ba ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ gar a Jɔɔn ɛ, tɩchɛ 'lɔ mɩ na ɩ jaa pʊʊr a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ gar wʊ naa.”

english_verse: Everyone had been listening to John. Even the tax collectors had obeyed God and had done what was right by letting John baptize them.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa lɔ̃ɔn a lõpodierbe gba na wõ a lɛ a Yesu na 'yɛr, ba sɔɔ naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn yele tor naa, na ba sɔɔ ka a Jɔɔn so ba a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But the Pharisees and the experts in the Law of Moses refused to obey God and be baptized by John.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Faraseemɩne nɩ a bala na bɔ̃ɔ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ, bala mãɛ tɔr naa a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, bojũu baa sɔɔ ka a Jɔɔn so ba a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say: What are you people like? What kind of people are you?
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Ba boo lɛ ɩn de a dɩna nɩbɛ naa man? Bo lɛ ba nyɛtãan?

translation_verse: Ba nyɛntãan bibiir na jãnɛ daa pɔ bʊɔlɔ taa, ‘Sɩ pɛɛlɛ naa a laa 'lɩr tɩ yaa sɛɛrɛ bãnɛ ɛ, na sɩ kõnõ kõyiel tɩ yaa ŋmara nɩbikʊ̃ɔ ɛ.’

english_verse: But because the Son of Man goes around eating and drinking, you say, “Jesus eats and drinks too much! He is even a friend of tax collectors and sinners.”
translation_verse: Ka a maa Nɩsaal Bie wa na n dire na n nyuro ka yɩ lɛ 'yɛr, ‘Wʊ dire na ba gala ɛ, na wʊ nyuro dãa, na wʊ ɩ a lõpodierbe nɩ a tʊ̃dɛtʊ̃nbɔ baraa.’

translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɛ̃ ma wiil a lɛ wʊn tor a wʊ bibiir pɔ.”

english_verse: When a sinful woman in that town found out that Jesus was there, she bought an expensive bottle of perfume.
translation_verse: Pɔɔ ben a tẽe pɔ na wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃dɛbɛ, wʊn wa wõ ɩka a Yesu ben a Farasee yir, wʊ den a kãnyũvɩla na sɛɛ pãrtɔbile na wʊ chiin.

translation_verse: Yesu lɩɛb tor a pɔɔ tɩ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a Simon, “Fʊ nyɛn a pɔɔ nyãna? Ɩn wa kpɛ a fʊ yir, faa kʊ ma kʊ̃ɔ ɩka n pɛɛ gbɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a pɔɔ pɛɛn a n gbɛɛ nɩ a wʊ nɩbikʊ̃ɔ tɩ de a wʊ jukɔɔl fɩɛl bar.

english_verse: So I tell you that all her sins are forgiven, and that is why she has shown great love. But anyone who has been forgiven for only a little will show only a little love.”
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ fʊ ɩka a wʊ tʊ̃dɛbɛ ala a jaa vɛ̃n kʊ wʊ, bojũu a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ waa naa. Tɩchɛ a 'lɔ Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ jaa pʊʊr kʊ a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ mɩ ɩn jaa pʊʊr.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the woman, “Your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: A Yesu pãa 'yɛr kʊ a pɔɔ, “A fʊ yeldɛbɛ vɛ̃n bar.”

translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn 'lɔ, n vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yelsɔɔlsɩ, tɩchɛ a bala na chɛ, sʊkpar lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ ba, ‘Ba ma kaa naa tɩ maa nyɛ ɛ, na ba ma wõnõ tɩ ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ.’ (Isaiya

translation_verse: A bʊ̃bie ala na lo a gʊʊr pɔ ɩn a bala na wõ a 'yɛr, tɩchɛ ka a ãgãn nyã vɔlaa nɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ nɩ a bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ fãɩn ba ka baa tʊ̃ɔ dɔɔ bie ɛ.

english_verse: Those seeds that fell on good ground are the people who listen to the message and keep it in good and honest hearts. They last and produce a harvest. Light (Mark
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a bʊ̃bie ala na lo a kɔjɔ̃ pɔ, ɩn a bala na wõ a 'yɛr na ba sɔɔ den nyãa ara nɩ pʊpɛl, ka a kãnyir vɛ̃ ka ba dɔɔ jur.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the disciples, “Don't you have any faith?” But they were frightened and amazed. They said to each other, “Who is this? He can give orders to the wind and the waves, and they obey him!” A Man with Demons in Him (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa sʊʊr a wʊ poturbo, “Nyɩnɛ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ be?” Ka ba mɩ de dãbãɛ sʊrɔ nɩ taa, “Nɩ an lɛ anyã, na 'yɛr ka a sɛsɛbɛ nɩ kʊ̃ɔ tu a wʊ nɛɛ?”

english_verse: But Jesus answered, “Someone touched me, because I felt power going out from me.”

translation_verse: Ka daba ban bʊɔlɔ Jairusɩ na ɩ a lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir nɩdier, wa gbur dumo a Yesu niem sʊɔrɔ wʊ yãayãabɩlɛ ɩka wʊ wa a wʊ yir,

english_verse: So they went to Jesus and woke him up, “Master, Master! We are about to drown!” Jesus got up and ordered the wind and waves to stop. They obeyed, and everything was calm.
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo tɩ sãɩ wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “Kpãkpãana, a kʊ̃ɔ na di sɩ naa.” Ka a Yesu ir tãn a sɛsɛbɛ nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ na ɔɔrɔ, ka a sɛsɛbɛ ŋmaa vʊʊr ka a kʊ̃ɔ mɩ lo jaa jomm....

english_verse: He said this because Jesus had already told the evil spirit to go out of him. The man had often been attacked by the demon. And even though he had been bound with chains and leg irons and kept under guard, he smashed whatever bound him. Then the demon would force him out into lonely places.
translation_verse: Bojũu Yesu dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a sɩdɛɛr ɩka wʊ yi a daba 'yɔ̃ɔ. Gbɛɛ yɔɔ jaa lɛ a ma ir a daba ka ba ma gbar a nuur nɩ a gbɛɛ nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ kaara wʊ, tɩ wʊ ma kar a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ bar ka a sɩdɛɛr ma dii wʊ bar be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ wʊ yõ.

english_verse: Jesus asked the man, “What is your name?” He answered, “My name is Lots.” He said this because there were “lots” of demons in him.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr wʊ, “A fʊ yuor lɛ di bo?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Nɩyɔɔ.” Bojũu sɩdɛyɔɔ lɛ kpɛ wʊ.

english_verse: the man who had been healed begged to go with him. But Jesus sent him off and said,

english_verse: “Go back home and tell everyone how much God has done for you.” The man then went all over town, telling everything that Jesus had done for him. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Matthew
translation_verse: “Lɩɛb kul a fʊ yir tɩ man a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ kʊ fʊ.” Lɛ lɛ ka a daba kul a tẽe pɔ tɩ mana kʊrɔ a nɩbɛ a lɛ a Yesu na ɩ kʊ wʊ.

translation_verse: Yesu na wa lɩɛb wa, a nɩyɔɔ tuor de wʊ, bojũu ba dɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ wʊ.

english_verse: because his twelve-year-old child was dying. She was his only daughter. While Jesus was on his way, people were crowding all around him.
translation_verse: bojũu a wʊ bipɔɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ na nyɛ yuom pie nɩ ayi lɛ kpire. Yesu na de a sɔr chiine ka a nɩyɔɔ mɩl pɔɔ wʊ.

english_verse: The woman knew that she could not hide, so she came trembling and knelt down in front of Jesus. She told everyone why she had touched him and that she had been healed at once.

english_verse: Jesus said to the woman, “You are now well because of your faith. May God give you peace!”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “N bipɔɔ, a fʊ sɔɔfʊ sa fʊ naa, kulo nɩ nyã'maar.”

english_verse: While Jesus was speaking, someone came from Jairus' home and said, “Your daughter has died! Why bother the teacher anymore?”

english_verse: Jesus went into the house, but he did not let anyone else go with him, except Peter, John, James, and the girl's father and mother.

translation_verse: Tɩchɛ wʊn ba ɩrɛ a lɛ ɛ, tɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ sɔɔl a wʊ mãɛ bar jũu, wʊ sʊʊr naa Yesu, “Nɩbuor lɛ ɩ a n tɔ sʊɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: As a man was going down from Jerusalem to Jericho, robbers attacked him and grabbed everything he had. They beat him up and ran off, leaving him half dead.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Daba kɔ̃ɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ yi Jerusalɛm chiine Jeriko ka a nãnyisɩ tɩ var wʊ be a sɔr pɔ. Ba yaar naa fuusɩ tɩ ŋme ŋme wʊ, ka wʊ vɔɔ chɛ bãlãa naa kpi, ka ba bar wʊ tɩ chen.

english_verse: A priest happened to be going down the same road. But when he saw the man, he walked by on the other side.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ mɩ de a sɔr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, wʊn tɩ nyɛ a daba, wʊ gõl bar tɩ chen.

english_verse: Later a temple helper came to the same place. But when he saw the man who had been beaten up, he also went by on the other side.
translation_verse: Ka a Nãaŋmɩn Puorfʊ yir tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ mɩ waara wa nyɛ, na wʊ mɩ gõl tu jiyuo chen.

english_verse: A man from Samaria then came traveling along that road. When he saw the man, he felt sorry for him
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na ɩ a Samariya nɩrɛ mɩ tu a sɔr 'lɔ a daba na gã, wʊn wa nyɛ wʊ, nɩbaal kpɛ wʊ naa.

english_verse: and went over to him. He treated his wounds with olive oil and wine and bandaged them. Then he put him on his own donkey and took him to an inn, where he took care of him.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ tɔɔ ta a daba pʊr dãa pɛɛn a natɩɛ bar, tɩ maal kãa fɔ, tɩ de fɔbaa lũ pɔɔ. Na wʊ 'mɔɔ a daba dɔɔl a wʊ bʊ̃ɔ ju chiin a sãanba gaa jie tɩ gãn.

english_verse: The next morning he gave the innkeeper two silver coins and said, “Please take care of the man. If you spend more than this on him, I will pay you when I return.”
translation_verse: Wɛr na wa chaar, wʊ den a kpãna libikue ayi kʊ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kaara a sãanba tɩ 'yɛr, ‘Kaara wʊ, maa wa lɩɛb gɔr, ala ba wa ta ɛ, ɩn lɛ yab kʊ fʊ.’ ”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “Which one of these three people was a real neighbor to the man who was beaten up by robbers?”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr a daba, “A nɩbɛ ata banyãna, buor sʊɔ lɛ ɩ a daba nyã, a nãnyisɩ na ŋme tɔ sʊɔ?”

english_verse: The expert in the Law of Moses answered, “The one who showed pity.” Jesus said, “Go and do the same!” Martha and Mary
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kaa a wʊ nɩbaal.” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Mɩ chen tɩ maal a lɛ nɛ.”

english_verse: The Lord and his disciples were traveling along and came to a village. When they got there, a woman named Martha welcomed him into her home.
translation_verse: Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo na chiine ba vɩɛn kpɛ tẽbile kɔ̃ɔ pɔ, ka pɔɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Mata ka wʊ de ba na ir ba sãan.

english_verse: She had a sister named Mary, who sat down in front of the Lord and was listening to what he said.
translation_verse: A Mata tara na yɛbɛ ban bʊɔlɔ Mɛɛr, ka 'lɔ jãnɛ a Soro gbɛɛ par chɛlɛ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Martha was worried about all that had to be done. Finally, she went to Jesus and said, “Lord, doesn't it bother you that my sister has left me to do all the work by myself? Tell her to come and help me!”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Mata wʊ yõ sõsoro nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃, na wʊ wa tɔɔ ta a Yesu sɛ̃ 'yɛr, “N Soro, a ba bã fʊ a n yɛbɛ na bar a tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ka n sõsoro nɩ ɛ? 'Yɛr wʊ ka wʊ ir wa sʊ̃ʊ ma.”

english_verse: The Lord answered, “Martha, Martha! You are worried and upset about so many things,
translation_verse: Ka a Soro 'yɛr, “Mata, Mata fʊ fɩrɛ na fʊ mãɛ ka suur kʊrɔ fʊ.

english_verse: but only one thing is necessary. Mary has chosen what is best, and it will not be taken away from her.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yelbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ fɛr, Mɛɛr ir naa a bʊ̃sʊ̃ nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ faa wʊ yin a wʊ sɛ̃ ɛ.”

english_verse: So I tell you to ask and you will receive, search and you will find, knock and the door will be opened for you.
translation_verse: “Lɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩ sʊɔr, Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ yɩ naa. Yɩ kaa yɩn nyɛ naa, yɩ kpoor a pãn wʊn yuo naa.

english_verse: As bad as you are, you still know how to give good gifts to your children. But your heavenly Father is even more ready to give the Holy Spirit to anyone who asks. Jesus and the Ruler of Demons (Matthew
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a yɩn gba na ɩ nɩdɛbɛ bɔ̃ɔn vɩla ma ɩ kʊ a yɩ bibiir, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an ɩ ka yɩ Sãa na be a saaju kʊ̃ de a Sɩɛ kʊ a bala na sʊɔr wʊ ɛ?”

english_verse: And suppose your friend answers, “Don't bother me! The door is bolted, and my children and I are in bed. I cannot get up to give you something.”
translation_verse: Ka wʊ gã be a die pɔ tɩ 'yɛr, ‘Ta dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma ɛ, a pãn pɔɔ naa ka maa naa bibiir be gã, n kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ ir kʊ fʊ bon go ɛ.’

english_verse: Which one of you fathers would give your hungry child a snake if the child asked for a fish?
translation_verse: A yɩn na ɩ a sãamɩne, buor sʊɔ bie lɛ na sʊɔr wʊ jãm ka wʊ de waa kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: So Jesus told them, “Pray in this way: ‘Father, help us to honor your name. Come and set up your kingdom.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn ma wa sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yɩ 'yɛr, Sɩ Sãa, sɩ kʊ naa a fʊ yuor tɩɩr. A fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ wʊ wa.

english_verse: Forgive our sins, as we forgive everyone who has done wrong to us. And keep us from being tempted.’ ”
translation_verse: Vɛ̃ a sɩ maal dɛbɛ bar, bojũu sɩ mɩ vɛ̃n kʊ a bala jaa na maal sɩ a dɛɛr. Ta sɔɔ ka bɛɛr kaa nyɔɔ sɩ ɛ.”

english_verse: Everyone who asks will receive, everyone who searches will find, and the door will be opened for everyone who knocks.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sʊɔr, wʊn nyɛ naa, ka a 'lɔ mɩ na kaara nyɛ, ka a pãn mɩ yuo kʊ a 'lɔ na kpoor.

english_verse: Just as Jonah was a sign to the people of Nineveh, the Son of Man will be a sign to the people of today.
translation_verse: Bojũu, lɛ a Jona na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ jãnɛ kʊ a Ninive dẽme, lɛ mɩ lɛ a maa Nɩsaal Bie na ɩ a jãnɛ kʊ a dɩna nɩbɛ.

english_verse: While Jesus was still talking, a woman in the crowd spoke up, “The woman who gave birth to you and nursed you is blessed!”
translation_verse: A nyãna lɛ a Yesu 'yɛrɛ ka a pɔɔ ŋme chɛlma be a nɩyɔɔ pɔ tɩ 'yɛr, “Pʊpɛl lɛ kʊ a fʊ ma 'lɔ na dɔɔ fʊ, nɩ a wʊ bɩr fʊn 'yɛn.”

english_verse: Jesus forced a demon out of a man who could not talk. And after the demon had gone out, the man started speaking, and the crowds were amazed.
translation_verse: Yesu dire naa a sɩdɛɛr na be daba yɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ wõo. A sɩdɛɛr na wa yi a daba 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ, ka nɛ'maa a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Others wanted to put Jesus to the test. So they asked him to show them a sign from God.
translation_verse: Ka a bamɩne mɩ bɛɛr wʊ kaara na ba bʊɔrɔ jãnɛ na yi saaju.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, and he said: A kingdom where people fight each other will end up in ruin. And a family that fights will break up.
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ ban tɩɛrɛ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nãa jaa na jɛɛrɛ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ a wʊ nãa na sɔ̃ɔ naa. Yir nɩbɛ mɩ na ir jɛɛrɛ taa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'mataa kpɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If Satan fights against himself, how can his kingdom last? Yet you say that I force out demons by the power of Beelzebul.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ, ala ɩ a Satan lɩɛb jɛɛrɛ nɩ a wʊ mãɛ, ŋmɩnɛ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ na ɩ ara? N 'yɛr naa nɩtɔ̃ bojũu yɩ 'yɛr ɩka a Beeljebul lɛ n de dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ.

english_verse: If I use his power to force out demons, whose power do your own followers use to force them out? They are the ones who will judge you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a Beeljebul lɛ n tara dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ, tɩ a bala na ɩ a yɩ poturbo bo lɛ ba tara dire nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ? A lɛ jũu, bala lɛ na ɩ a yɩ 'yɛr tɔɔrbɔ.

english_verse: When a strong man arms himself and guards his home, everything he owns is safe.
translation_verse: “Gãdaa na gu a wʊ yir nɩ jɛɛr bomo, a wʊ bonsɩ maa dam ɛ.

english_verse: You Pharisees are in for trouble! You love the front seats in the synagogues, and you like to be greeted with honor in the market.
translation_verse: Nɛbier ben a yɩn Faraseemɩne sɛ̃, bojũu yɩ nʊ̃ naa a nɩbɛrɛ jaa jie a yɩ lɔ̃ɔfʊ yie pɔ na yɩ mɩ nʊ̃ a daa pɔ puorfʊ.

english_verse: A teacher of the Law of Moses spoke up, “Teacher, you said cruel things about us.”
translation_verse: Ka a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwile ãsʊɔ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, a anyãna fʊn 'yɛr, sɩ jaa lɛ fʊ 'mataa tʊrɔ.”

english_verse: When an evil spirit leaves a person, it travels through the desert, looking for a place to rest. But when it doesn't find a place, it says, “I will go back to the home I left.”
translation_verse: “Sɩdɛɛr ban wa dii bar ka wʊ yi nɩrɛ pɔ, wʊ ma chen dal pʊɔ ju tɩ bʊɔrɔ pɛ̃nfʊ jie, na waa nyɛ ɛ, na wʊ pãa wa 'yɛr, ‘Ɩn lɩɛb kul a nɩrɛ 'lɔ pɔ ɩn yi tɩ chɛ bar.’

english_verse: When it gets there and finds the place clean and fixed up,
translation_verse: Wʊn wa lɩɛb wa, wʊ nyɛn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kaara yir kaar ban pɩɩr tɩ chɔɔr wʊ sʊ̃.

english_verse: it goes off and finds seven other evil spirits even worse than itself. They all come and make their home there, and that person ends up in worse shape than before. Being Really Blessed
translation_verse: Ka wʊ pãa tɩ bɔ sɩɩr ayopõi na tara putuo gar wʊ ka ba chen tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a be. Ka a daba pãa ɩ dɛɛr gar a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ be.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “That's true, but the people who are really blessed are the ones who hear and obey God's message!” A Sign from God (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, a bala na wõ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr na ba turo, bala lɛ ɩ a pʊpɛl dẽme.”

english_verse: The Pharisee was surprised that he did not wash his hands before eating.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Farasee nɩrɛ jʊrɔ a Yesu ka a ɩ waa pɛɛ a ba pɛɛfʊ ɛ, ka nɛɛ 'maa wʊ.

english_verse: You Pharisees are in for trouble! You give God a tenth of the spices from your gardens, such as mint and rue. But you cheat people, and you don't love God. You should be fair and kind to others and still give a tenth to God.
translation_verse: “Nɛbier ben a yɩn Faraseemɩne sɛ̃, bojũu bʊ̃bile jaa yɩn da lɔ̃ɔn badʊʊ gba vaar, yɩ ma ir a da ŋmaa tɩ na yɩ ĩin vɩla maalfʊ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ bar. Ala lɛ yɩn taa irɛ na yɩ ta ĩin a ala na de nie bar ba maal ɛ.

english_verse: As crowds were gathering around Jesus, he said: You people of today are evil! You keep looking for a sign from God. But what happened to Jonah is the only sign you will be given.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ na waara 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ka Yesu 'yɛr, “A dɩna nɩbɛ banyãna ɩn putudẽme tɩ bʊɔrɔ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ka a na ɩ jãnɛ, tɩchɛ ba kʊ̃ nyɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ, ka a Jona jãnɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When the judgment comes, the Queen of the South will stand there with you and condemn you. She traveled a long way to hear Solomon's wisdom, and yet here is something far greater than Solomon.
translation_verse: A Siba Pɔɔ Nãa na yin a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar na wʊ wa 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩn dɩna nɩbɛ 'yɛr, bojũu wʊ dɔ̃ɔ yi be a tẽtɛɛr wa chɛl a Nãa Solomon yɛ̃ 'yɛr, tɩchɛ yɩ kaa a 'lɔ na gar a Solomon ben ka.

english_verse: The people of Nineveh will also stand there with you and condemn you. They turned to God when Jonah preached, and yet here is something far greater than Jonah. Light (Matthew
translation_verse: A 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar Ninive nɩbɛ na ir 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩn dɩna nɩbɛ 'yɛr, bojũu ba lɩɛb ba tɩɛr a Jona na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊ ba, yɩ kaa a 'lɔ na gar a Jona ben ka.

english_verse: No one lights a lamp and then hides it or puts it under a clay pot. A lamp is put on a lampstand, so everyone who comes into the house can see the light.
translation_verse: “Nɩrɛ jaa ba be na chʊm fãtɩn na wʊ sɔɔl bar ɛ, bɩɩ de laa kpa pɔɔ ɛ. Wʊ ma dɔɔl bar a dɔɔl fʊ jie, ka a bala na kpɩɛrɛ nyɛ a chãa.

english_verse: Your eyes are the lamp for your body. When your eyes are good, you have all the light you need. But when your eyes are bad, everything is dark.
translation_verse: A fʊ nɩbir ɩn a ãgãn fãtɩn. A fʊ nɩbie wa ɩ, a fʊ ãgãn wʊ jaa ma sɛɛn nɩ chãa. Tɩchɛ ala ba wa ɩ ɛ, a fʊ ãgãn wʊ jaa ma ɩn libe.

english_verse: You fools! Didn't God make both the outside and the inside?
translation_verse: Jɔlɔ banyã, a ba ɩ a 'lɔ na maal a yõo 'lɔ lɛ mɩ maal a pʊɔ ɛ?

english_verse: Yes, you are really in for trouble. You build monuments to honor the prophets your own people murdered long ago.
translation_verse: Nɛbier ben a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ bala a yɩ sãamɩne na kʊ, yɩn lɛ mɛ a ba yar.

english_verse: When Jesus finished speaking, a Pharisee invited him home for a meal. Jesus went and sat down to eat.
translation_verse: Yesu na wa 'yɛr baar, Farasee nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ bʊɔl wʊ naa ka wʊ tɩ di bʊ̃diir, lɛ lɛ wʊ chen tɩ kpɛ jãnɛ a bʊ̃diir par.

english_verse: So the Lord said to him: You Pharisees clean the outside of cups and dishes, but on the inside you are greedy and evil.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Soro pãa 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Faa nyɛ, a yɩn Faraseemɩne ma pɛɛr naa a ŋmama nɩ a laar dũkur, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ pʊɔ sɛɛn fɔlfʊ nɩ putuo.

english_verse: If you would only give what you have to the poor, everything you do would please God.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a ala na be a laa pʊɔm, yɩ de kʊ a nɔ̃n dẽme ka a bonsɩ a jaa pãa vɩɛlɛ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: But you are in for trouble! You are like unmarked graves that people walk on without even knowing it.
translation_verse: Nɛbier ben a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu yɩ kaara naa fɩka yar nɩbɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ do yʊɔrɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: You teachers are also in for trouble! You load people down with heavy burdens, but you won't lift a finger to help them carry the loads.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “A yɩn Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe nɛbier ben a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu yɩ ma tuon nɩbɛ tuor na tɩrɛ tɩ na yɩ maa ir a yɩ nubir gba tɩɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: You must think that was the right thing for your people to do, or else you would not have built monuments for the prophets they murdered.
translation_verse: A lɛ yɩn maal din dãasɩɛ ɩka a yɩ sãamɩne lɛ. Bala lɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ka yɩ mɩ mɛ a ba yar.

english_verse: Because of your evil deeds, the Wisdom of God said, “I will send prophets and apostles to you. But you will murder some and mistreat others.”
translation_verse: A nɩtɔ̃ jũu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ yɛ̃ sʊɔ 'yɛr, ‘N tʊ̃n a n 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ nɩ a n nɩtʊ̃nsɩ a ba sɛ̃, ka ban ir bamɩne kʊ tɩ ge bamɩne.’

english_verse: You people living today will be punished for all the prophets who have been murdered since the beginning of the world.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yele tuon a yɩn dɩna nɩbɛ. A Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ bala ban kʊ a kõr jaa, yɩn lɛ na yab a ba sãn.

english_verse: This includes every prophet from the time of Abel to the time of Zechariah, who was murdered between the altar and the temple. You people will certainly be punished for all of this.
translation_verse: Piel a Abel jãɩ sɔ̃ɔ tɩ tãn a Jekariya ban kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie nɩ a puorfʊ jie chara pɔ. Ɔ̃ɔ, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka a yɩn dɩna nɩbɛ lɛ na yab a jaa sãn.

english_verse: You teachers of the Law of Moses are really in for trouble! You carry the keys to the door of knowledge about God. But you never go in, and you keep others from going in.
