english_verse: Pilate asked Jesus, “Are you the king of the Jews?” “Those are your words,” Jesus answered.
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate sʊʊr a Yesu, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa ɔ?” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ, fʊ̃ʊ baa 'yɛr.”

english_verse: Pilate told the chief priests and the crowd, “I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate pãa 'yɛr kʊ a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛ, “N ba nyɛ chɛfʊ jaa a daba nyã jie ɛ.”

english_verse: After Pilate learned that Jesus came from the region ruled by Herod, he sent him to Herod, who was in Jerusalem at that time.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa bɔ̃ɔn ka a Hɛrɔd paal nɩrɛ lɛ, wʊ vɛ̃ naa ka ba tara wʊ chiin tɩ kʊ a Hɛrɔd, ka ɩ a Jerusalɛm lɛ wʊ mɩ be a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: Herod asked him a lot of questions, but Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Na wʊ sʊʊr a Yesu sʊʊr yɔɔ tɩ waa haa wʊ nɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: That same day Herod and Pilate became friends, even though they had been enemies before this. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Hɛrɔd nɩ a Pilate dɔ̃ɔ tara taa nɩ 'yɛr, tɩ a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ba maal a 'yɛr.

english_verse: As Jesus was being led away, some soldiers grabbed hold of a man named Simon who was from Cyrene. He was coming in from the fields, but they put the cross on him and made him carry it behind Jesus.
translation_verse: A lɛ ban chiine a Yesu, ba nyɔɔn daba yuor na di Simon, Sirenɩ lɛ wʊ yi na wʊ yi a yõo tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a tẽe pɔ. Ba fɩr wʊn de a Yesu daa tuo wʊ ka wʊ turo nɩ wʊ.

english_verse: One of the criminals hanging there also insulted Jesus by saying, “Aren't you the Messiah? Save yourself and save us!”
translation_verse: A nɩdɛbɛ bala ban lɔ̃ɔ kpan wʊ, ãsʊɔ tʊrɔ wʊn 'yɛrɛ, “A ba ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa ɛ? Faa a fʊ mãɛ tɩ mɩ faa sɩ.”

english_verse: Pilate called together the chief priests, the leaders, and the people.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Pilate bʊɔl a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a tẽe nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa lɔ̃ɔ taa.

english_verse: Pilate wanted to set Jesus free, so he spoke again to the crowds.
translation_verse: Pilate na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ bar a Yesu wʊ lɛ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ go.

english_verse: Pilate spoke to them a third time, “But what crime has he done? I have not found him guilty of anything for which he should be put to death. I will have him beaten with a whip and set free.”
translation_verse: Gbɛɛ ata lɛ wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Bo? Bãa dɛɛr lɛ wʊ ɩ? Maa ba nyɛ dɛɛr jaa wʊn sɛɛn kũu ɛ. A lɛ jũu ɩn vɛ̃n ka ba fɔb wʊ tɩ bar wʊ.”

english_verse: The people kept on shouting as loud as they could for Jesus to be put to death.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka ba chɛnɛ tãna bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ kpa wʊ a daa ju, ka a ba gɔ̃mɔ̃ wa tʊ̃ɔ wʊ.

english_verse: He freed the man who was in jail for rioting and murder, because he was the one the crowd wanted to be set free. Then Pilate handed Jesus over for them to do what they wanted with him. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: A Barabasɩ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ dam a tẽe na wʊ kʊn nɩrɛ ka ba nyɔɔ wʊ pɔɔ, wʊ yuo wʊn bar tɩ kʊ ba a Yesu.

english_verse: If this can happen when the wood is green, what do you think will happen when it is dry?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩbɛ maala naa a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a tɩɛ na chɛnɛ ɩ a 'maar, ŋmɩnɛ ban ɩ wʊ 'lɔ wa ko?”

english_verse: Around noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until the middle of the afternoon.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ dɔ̃ɔ gbʊrɔ a garju sãlsɔɔ tɩchɛ ka a chãa ɩ jaa gbɛb, ka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ wa tɩ vɩr.

english_verse: Two criminals were led out to be put to death with Jesus.
translation_verse: Dɔɔr ayi na maal dɛɛr, ka ba nyɔɔr ba 'matãan a Yesu chiine a kʊfʊ jie.

english_verse: Jesus said, “Father, forgive these people! They don't know what they're doing.” While the crowd stood there watching Jesus, the soldiers gambled for his clothes. The leaders insulted him by saying, “He saved others. Now he should save himself, if he really is God's chosen Messiah!”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ ara kaara wʊ, ka a Juu nɩbɛ nɩbɛrɛ ara kpɛrɛ wʊ na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Wʊ ma faan bamɩne, vɛ̃ a wʊ faa a wʊ mãɛ ala ɩ 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na ir.”

english_verse: The soldiers made fun of Jesus and brought him some wine.
translation_verse: Ka a sojasɩ mɩ wa ɩrɛ wʊ laara, na ba de a dãmiir kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: They said, “If you are the king of the Jews, save yourself!”
translation_verse: Tɩ na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa, faa a fʊ mãɛ.”

english_verse: But the other criminal told the first one off, “Don't you fear God? Aren't you getting the same punishment as this man?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ 'lɔ gɔ̃nɔ̃ wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “Faa joro Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ ɛ, an ɩ a kũu 'lɔ lɛ fʊ mɩ kpire.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I promise that today you will be with me in paradise.” The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, dɩna maa nɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tẽvɩla pɔ.”

english_verse: The sun stopped shining, and the curtain in the temple split down the middle.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ ba lɛ chaar go ɛ, ka a fɔbaa 'lɔ ban lũ var a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir die pɔ 'mar ayi.

english_verse: Then they went to prepare some sweet-smelling spices for his burial. But on the Sabbath they rested, as the Law of Moses commands.
translation_verse: Tɩ na ba pãa lɩɛb kul tɩ chɔɔr a tãɩ nɩ a kãnyũu vɩla na tɩ fɔ a Yesu ãgãn, tɩchɛ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir jũu, baa dam ɛ, ba pɛ̃n naa a lɛ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ na 'yɛr.

english_verse: A crowd had gathered to see the terrible sight. Then after they had seen it, they felt brokenhearted and went home.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa na lɔ̃ɔ taa a be nyɛn a lɛ na ɩ ka ba lɩɛb pʊsɔ̃ɔ, na ba waala kulo.

english_verse: All of Jesus' close friends and the women who had come with him from Galilee stood at a distance and watched. Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a wʊ nɩbɔ̃ɔnsɩ pʊɔn a pɔbɔ bala na tu wʊ yi a Galilee ara tɛɛr tɩ kaara a lɛ na ɩrɛ.

english_verse: There was a man named Joseph, who was from Arimathea in Judea. Joseph was a good and honest man, and he was eager for God's kingdom to come. He was also a member of the council, but he did not agree with what they had decided.
translation_verse: Wʊ tɔr naa a lɛ ban 'yɛr nɩ a lɛ ban ɩrɛ. Wʊ yi naa a Judiya paal pɔ tẽe ban bʊɔlɔ Arimatɩya, wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ.

english_verse: Joseph went to Pilate and asked for Jesus' body.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ chen a Pilate sɛ̃ tɩ sʊɔr a Yesu ãgãn ɩka wʊ ũu.

english_verse: He took the body down from the cross and wrapped it in fine cloth. Then he put it in a tomb that had been cut out of solid rock and had never been used.
translation_verse: Na wʊ pãa yɔɔ a kũu suun tɩ vil wʊ a fɔpɩla pɔɔ tɩ ũu wʊ a yaa ban chɩ kʊsɩr pɔ, ban ba ũu nɩrɛ sɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It was Friday, and the Sabbath was about to begin.
translation_verse: A daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ba mɩ chɔɔrɔ ka a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir na piel.

english_verse: The women who had come with Jesus from Galilee followed Joseph and watched how Jesus' body was placed in the tomb.
translation_verse: A pɔbɔ bala nɩ a Yesu na 'mataa yi a Galilee wa, ba tu naa a Josefʊ tɩ nyɛ a yaa nɩ a lɛ ban ũu a Yesu.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene, Joanna, Mary the mother of James, and some other women were the ones who had gone to the tomb. When they returned, they told the eleven apostles and the others what had happened.
translation_verse: Mɛɛr na yi Magdala, nɩ Joana nɩ a Jemesɩ ma Mɛɛr nɩ a bamɩne na pʊɔ ba lɛ man a anyãna kʊ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ.

english_verse: When they found the stone rolled away from the entrance,
translation_verse: Ba tɩ nyɛn ka a kʊsɩr bil yi a yaa nɛɛ pɔ.

english_verse: they went in. But they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus,
translation_verse: Ka ba kpɛ tɩchɛ baa nyɛ a Yesu ãgãn ɛ.

english_verse: and they did not know what to think. Suddenly two men in shining white clothes stood beside them.
translation_verse: A ba ara bẽne a lɛ nɛ ka a dɔɔr ayi wa dũu ba ka a ba bʊ̃sursɩ pɛl saa nyɩɩrfʊ kaar.

english_verse: The women were afraid and bowed to the ground. But the men said, “Why are you looking in the place of the dead for someone who is alive?
translation_verse: Ka a dãbãɛ kpɛ a pɔbɔ, ka ba kpa kpa jur a tẽe, tɩchɛ ka a dɔɔr sʊʊr ba, “Bo so ka yɩ bʊɔrɔ a vʊr a kũusɩ pɔ?

english_verse: ‘The Son of Man will be handed over to sinners who will nail him to a cross. But three days later he will rise to life.’ ”
translation_verse: ‘Ban nyɔɔ naa a maa Nɩsaal Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩdɛbɛ nuur pɔ, ka ba kʊ ma a daa ju, tɩchɛ a ber ata daar, ka n lɛ ir ɩ vʊr.’ ”

english_verse: That same day two of Jesus' disciples were going to the village of Emmaus, which was about eleven kilometers from Jerusalem.
translation_verse: A daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a wʊ poturbo ayi chiine naa a tẽbile ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Emayusɩ na ba jãan a Jerusalɛm ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What were you talking about as you walked along?” The two of them stood there looking sad and gloomy.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Bo lɛ yɩ chiine mana kʊrɔ taa a lɛ mɔ̃?” Ka a nɩbaal kpɛ ba a ba tɛɛ ara.

english_verse: We had hoped that he would be the one to set Israel free! But it has already been three days since all this happened.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ 'lɔ lɛ sɩn mɩ tɩɛrɛ ɩka wʊn faan a Isɩral nɩbɛ. A ala na ɩ dɛɛr jaa nɩ nyã, ber ata nɩ nyã a lɛ na ɩ.

english_verse: Some women in our group surprised us. They had gone to the tomb early in the morning,
translation_verse: A sɩ pɔbɔ bamɩne lɛ wa 'maa sɩ nɛɛ, a bibio nyãna lɛ ba chen a yaa par,

english_verse: Some men from our group went to the tomb and found it just as the women had said. But they didn't see Jesus either.
translation_verse: Ka a sɩ taaba bamɩne pãa mɩ chen a yaa par tɩ nyɛ ka ɩ a lɛ nɛ a pɔbɔ na 'yɛr lɛ, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ mãɛ baa nyɛ wʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the two disciples, “Why can't you understand? How can you be so slow to believe all that the prophets said?
translation_verse: Ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yɩ faa tɩɛr lɛ, na yaa tʊ̃ɔ tɩɛr tɔ na yɩ sɔɔ de a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na 'yɛr ɛ?

english_verse: Didn't you know that the Messiah would have to suffer before he was given his glory?”
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a Nɩ-iraa na din a dɔɔyɛ anyãna tɩ na wʊ pãa kpɛ a wʊ tɩɩr pɔ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus then explained everything written about himself in the Scriptures, beginning with the Law of Moses and the Books of the Prophets.
translation_verse: Wʊ piel naa Mosesɩ nɩ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ba jaa, na wʊ pãa wiil ba a par a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr a wʊ mãɛ 'yɛr.

english_verse: They begged him, “Stay with us! It's already late, and the sun is going down.” So Jesus went into the house to stay with them.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka ba sʊɔr wʊ yãayãabɩlɛ 'yɛrɛ, “Lɩɛb kpɛ wa gã a sɩ sɛ̃, bojũu mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ 'mʊr baar.” Ka wʊ lɩɛb kpɛ na gã a ba sɛ̃.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down to eat, he took some bread. He blessed it and broke it. Then he gave it to them.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a ba tɩ 'mataa jãnɛ a bʊ̃diir par na di, ka wʊ de a paanʊ̃ɔ na puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ piel ŋmara põnõ ba.

english_verse: At once they knew who he was, but he disappeared.
translation_verse: Ka a ba nɩbie pãa yuo, ka ba bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a Yesu lɛ, tɩ wʊ bɔr a ba niem.

english_verse: They said to each other, “When he talked with us along the road and explained the Scriptures to us, didn't it warm our hearts?”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Ala lɛ so wʊn 'yɛrɛ nɩ sɩ a sɔr pɔ ka a nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ sɩ a lɛ, wʊn wiil sɩ a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ.”

english_verse: So they got up and returned to Jerusalem. The two disciples found the eleven apostles and the others gathered together.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba vaa ir fɔɔ jaa lɩɛb chen a Jerusalɛm tɩ nyɛ a Pie Nɩ Bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Yesu poturbo bamɩne na lɔ̃ɔ taa.

english_verse: And they learned from the group that the Lord was really alive and had appeared to Peter.
translation_verse: Na ba 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a sɩ Soro ir ɩ vʊr, na wʊ ir a wʊ mãɛ wiil a Simon.”

english_verse: Then the disciples from Emmaus told what happened on the road and how they knew he was the Lord when he broke the bread. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: A ba ayi bala pãa man a lɛ na ɩ a sɔr pɔ nɩ a lɛ ban de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a Yesu lɛ wʊn wa ŋma a paanʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: While Jesus' disciples were talking about what had happened, Jesus appeared and greeted them.
translation_verse: A anyãna ban chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ ka a Yesu mãɛ wa ara a ba sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: They were frightened and terrified because they thought they were seeing a ghost.
translation_verse: Ka a dãbãɛ kpɛ ba a ba mii a lɛ a gbɛ gbɛ, tɩɛr ɩka kpĩin lɛ ba nyɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Why are you so frightened? Why do you doubt?
translation_verse: A wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Bo lɛ so ka a dãbãɛ kpɛ yɩ a lɛ, a nɩ bo lɛ so ka yɩ baala a lɛ?

english_verse: Look at my hands and my feet and see who I am! Touch me and find out for yourselves. Ghosts don't have flesh and bones as you see I have.”
translation_verse: Yɩ kaa nyɛ a n nuur nɩ a gbɛɛ, maa mãɛ lɛ, yɩ sɩɩr ma kaa, kpĩin ba lɛ ɛ. Kpĩin maa tara ãgãn nʊ̃n nɩ kɔɔr nɩtãa lɛ yɩn nyɛ ma ɩn tara ɛ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.
translation_verse: Wʊn 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ baar, wʊ wiil ban a wʊ nuur nɩ a wʊ gbɛɛ.

english_verse: The disciples were so glad and amazed that they could not believe it. Jesus then asked them, “Do you have something to eat?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ baa chɛnɛ sɔɔ de sɛrɛ ɛ, nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ba naa ka a nɛɛr 'maa ba, ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Yaa tara bon na kʊ ma ka n di ɛ?”

english_verse: They gave him a piece of broiled fish.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba kʊ wʊ jãŋmaa ban wɔ̃,

english_verse: He took it and ate it as they watched.
translation_verse: ka wʊ 'wɔb be a ba niem.

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “While I was still with you, I told you that everything written about me in the Law of Moses, the Books of the Prophets, and in the Psalms had to happen.”
translation_verse: Wʊ pãa 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A anyãna lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ chɛnɛ be a yɩ sɛ̃. Yele a jaa na sɛb a Mosesɩ nɛɛ pɔ, nɩ a ala na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ gãn pɔ, nɩ a yiel gãn pɔ, a n jũu na ɩ naa lɛ.”

english_verse: He told them: The Scriptures say that the Messiah must suffer, then three days later he will rise from death.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A anyãna lɛ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, a Nɩ-iraa na din dɔɔyɛ na wʊ kpi na wʊ lɛ ir ɩ vʊr a ber ata daar.

english_verse: They also say that all people of every nation must be told in my name to turn to God, in order to be forgiven. So beginning in Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Ban den a wʊ yuor mʊɔl kʊ nɩbʊrɔ ba jaa, ka ãsʊɔ jaa wa lɩɛb a wʊ tɩɛr, Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ naa a wʊ yeldɛɛr bar, Jerusalɛm lɛ an piel.

english_verse: you must tell everything that has happened.
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ ɩ a anyãna dãasɩɛ dẽme.

english_verse: I will send you the one my Father has promised, but you must stay in the city until you are given power from heaven. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Mark
translation_verse: A maa na tɩ tʊ̃ naa a 'lɔ a n Sãa na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ yɩ, tɩchɛ yɩ chɛnɛ jãnɛ a Jerusalɛm, ka a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ wa yi a saaju wa pɔɔ yɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus led his disciples out to Bethany, where he raised his hands and blessed them.
translation_verse: Wʊ tara ban yin tɩ gbʊrɔ nɩ a Betanɩ na wʊ tur a nuur saaju sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ ba.

english_verse: As he was doing this, he left and was taken up to heaven.
translation_verse: A lɛ wʊn sʊɔr a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ ba, wʊ bar ba naa ka Nãaŋmɩn 'mɔɔ wʊ don be a saaju.

english_verse: After his disciples had worshiped him, they returned to Jerusalem and were very happy.
translation_verse: A ba pãa gbʊr dumo puor wʊ tɩ lɩɛb pʊpɛl kul a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: They spent their time in the temple, praising God.
translation_verse: Bɩbir jaa lɛ ba ma chen be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir tɩ dãna a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: From the very beginning the Word was with God.
translation_verse: Wʊ dɔ̃ɔ be a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ a pielfʊ daar.

english_verse: received its life from him, and his life gave light to everyone.
translation_verse: A wʊ pɔ lɛ nyɛvʊr be, a wʊ nyɛvʊr nyã lɛ kʊrɔ bomo a jaa chãa.

english_verse: The light keeps shining in the dark, and darkness has never put it out.
translation_verse: A chãa nyã lɛ chaara a libe pɔ, ka libe ba tʊ̃ɔ wʊ kpĩin ɛ.

english_verse: God sent a man named John,
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃n daba na di Jɔɔn.

english_verse: who came to tell about the light and to lead all people to have faith.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ wa di a dãasɩɛ na wʊ 'yɛr a chãa nyã 'yɛr, ka a nɩrɛ jaa na tu a wʊ sɛ̃ sɔɔ de a chãa.

english_verse: The true light that shines on everyone was coming into the world.
translation_verse: A yelmãɛ chãa nyã lɛ chaara 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩrɛ jaa na waara a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: The Word was in the world, but no one knew him, though God had made the world with his Word.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr dɔ̃ɔ be a wɛr pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn gba maal a wɛr tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: He came into his own world, but his own nation did not welcome him.
translation_verse: Wʊ wa naa a wʊ mãɛ paal pɔ, tɩchɛ a wʊ mãɛ nɩbɛ ba de wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: They were not God's children by nature or because of any human desires. God himself was the one who made them his children.
translation_verse: Baa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bibiir nɩrɛ dɔɔfʊ kaar ɛ, bɩɩ nɩrɛ bɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ lɛ maal ba a wʊ bibiir.

english_verse: The Word became a human being and lived here with us. We saw his true glory, the glory of the only Son of the Father. From him the complete gifts of undeserved grace and truth have come down to us.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr wa ɩ naa nɩrɛ na wʊ jãnɛ a sɩ sɛ̃. Sɩ nyɛ naa a wʊ tɩɩr, a tɩɩr nyã na ɩ a Sãa Bidabʊ̃'yen tɛɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ yi a Sãa sɛ̃ wa, na wʊ tara wãɛfʊ nɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: Because of all that the Son is, we have been given one blessing after another.
translation_verse: A wãɛfʊ sɛɛ wʊ naa, ka a wʊ maal vɩla lʊɔr sɩ jaa bʊ̃'yen 'yen dɔɔlɔ taa waara a sɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. The only Son, who is truly God and is closest to the Father, has shown us what God is like. John the Baptist Tells about Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Nɩbʊ̃'yen jaa ba nyɛ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, tɩchɛ a Bidabʊ̃'yen tɛɛ 'lɔ na be a Sãa lõboor lɛ wiil sɩ a lɛ Nãaŋmɩn na be.

english_verse: The religious authorities in Jerusalem sent priests and temple helpers to ask John who he was. He told them plainly, “I am not the Messiah.”
translation_verse: Ka a Jɔɔn 'yɛr ba, “N ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃ ɩka wʊ wa faa a wʊ nɩbɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Then when they asked him if he were Elijah, he said, “No, I am not!” And when they asked if he were the Prophet, he also said “No!”
translation_verse: Ka ba lɛ sʊʊr wʊ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Elaija bɩɩ? Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “N ba ɩ wʊ ɛ.” Ka ba lɛ sʊʊr wʊ ka 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ɔ? Ka wʊ ɩka, “Kai.”

english_verse: Finally, they said, “Who are you then? We have to give an answer to the ones who sent us. Tell us who you are!”
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Tɩ an lɛ fʊ pãa ɩ? A sɩn tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a bala na tʊ̃ sɩ, 'yɛr sɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ fʊn ɩ.”

english_verse: John answered in the words of the prophet Isaiah, “I am only someone shouting in the desert, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord!’ ”
translation_verse: Jɔɔn den a lɛ a Isaiya na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb na wʊ 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ a kɔkɔr 'lɔ na tãna a dãlpʊɔ pɔ, ɩka yɩ chɔɔr a Soro sɔr.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Some Pharisees had also been sent to John.
translation_verse: A Faraseemɩne tʊ̃n nɩbɛ bamɩne a Jɔɔn sɛ̃.

english_verse: They asked him, “Why are you baptizing people, if you are not the Messiah or Elijah or the Prophet?”
translation_verse: Ba wa sʊʊr wʊ naa, “Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ baa ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Nɩ-iraa ɛ, bɩɩ a Elaija ɛ, bɩɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ ãsʊɔ ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ a fʊ suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ?”

english_verse: John told them, “I use water to baptize people. But here with you is someone you don't know.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Jɔɔn 'yɛr ba, “Maa den kʊ̃ɔ suoro nɩ a nɩbɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ ben a yɩ pɔ, yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Even though I came first, I am not good enough to untie his sandals.”
translation_verse: An ɩ maa lɛ de nie wa gba, n ba sɛɛ ɩka n for a wʊ nafɔbɔ mibe gba ɛ.”

english_verse: John said this as he was baptizing east of the Jordan River in Bethany. The Lamb of God
translation_verse: Jɔɔn be naa a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ puorfʊ jie suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, a Jordan man gɔ̃ɔn na be a Betanɩ, be lɛ wʊ 'yɛr a 'yɛr anyãna.

english_verse: The next day, John saw Jesus coming toward him and said: Here is the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!
translation_verse: Wɛr na wa chaar, Jɔɔn nyɛn a Yesu na tor wʊ waara ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Pɛraabile, 'lɔ lɛ na de a wɛr nɩbɛ yeldɛbɛ bar.

english_verse: He is the one I told you about when I said, “Someone else will come, who is greater than I am, because he was alive before I was born.”
translation_verse: Wʊ ɩ naa a 'lɔ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka, ‘nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na wa naa, wʊ gar ma naa, bojũu 'lɔ dɔ̃ɔ be be tɩ ba wa dɔɔ ma.’

english_verse: I didn't know who he was. But I came to baptize you with water, so that everyone in Israel would see him.
translation_verse: Maa ba bɔ̃ɔ a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊn ɩ ɛ, tɩ naa wa suoro yɩ nɩ kʊ̃ɔ ka bala jaa na be a Isɩral na nyɛ wʊ.”

english_verse: I was there and saw the Spirit come down on him like a dove from heaven. And the Spirit stayed on him.
translation_verse: A Jɔɔn dãasɩɛ nɩ nyã, “N ben be nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na yi saaju fɩka ŋmam, wa 'mar wʊ, ka a Sɩɛ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Before this I didn't know who he was. But the one who sent me to baptize with water had told me, “You will see the Spirit come down and stay on someone. Then you will know that he is the one who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.”
translation_verse: N ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊn ɩ ɛ. A 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma ɩka n wa suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ ma, ‘A nɩrɛ 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊn wa nyɛ a Sɩɛ na suu wa 'mar na waa yi ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ na suoro a nɩbɛ nɩ a Sɩɛ.’

english_verse: I saw this happen, and I tell you that he is the Son of God. The First Disciples of Jesus
translation_verse: N nyɛn a anyã na ɩ, 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bidabʊ̃'yen.”

english_verse: The next day, John was there again, and two of his followers were with him.
translation_verse: A wɛr na chaar go, Jɔɔn ara na a be nɩ a wʊ poturbo ayi.

english_verse: When he saw Jesus walking by, he said, “Here is the Lamb of God!”
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ nyɛ Yesu na tala, ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Yɩ nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Pɛraabile.”

english_verse: John's two followers heard him, and they went with Jesus.
translation_verse: A Jɔɔn poturbo ayi bala na wõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr, ka ba turo a Yesu chiine.

english_verse: When Jesus turned and saw them, he asked, “What do you want?” They answered, “Rabbi, where do you live?” The Hebrew word “Rabbi” means “Teacher.”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa lɩɛb nyɛ ba, wʊ sʊʊr ba naa, “Bo yɩ bʊɔrɔ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Wiwile nyɩnɛ fʊ kpɩɛrɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Come and see!” It was already about four o'clock in the afternoon when they went with him and saw where he lived. So they stayed on for the rest of the day.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩ wa bɔ̃ɔ a jie.” Ba jãnɛ naa a wʊ sɛ̃, bojũu mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ bal baar a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: One of the two men who had heard John and had gone with Jesus was Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ ayi bala na wõ a lɛ Jɔɔn na 'yɛr ka ba turo a Yesu, ãsʊɔ lɛ Andiru na ɩ a Simon Pita yɛbɛ.

english_verse: The first thing Andrew did was to find his brother and tell him, “We have found the Messiah!” The Hebrew word “Messiah” means the same as the Greek word “Christ.”
translation_verse: Lɛ a Andiru na de nie ɩ lɛ, wʊ bɔ naa a wʊ yɛbɛ Simon 'yɛr wʊ, “Sɩ nyɛn a Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ na wa faa a wʊ nɩbɛ ban bʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto.”

english_verse: Andrew brought his brother to Jesus. And when Jesus saw him, he said, “Simon son of John, you will be called Cephas.” This name can be translated as “Peter.” Jesus Chooses Philip and Nathanael
translation_verse: Andiru tara naa a yɛbɛ waan a Yesu sɛ̃. Yesu na wa nyɛ wʊ, ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Jɔɔn bidaba Simon, ban bʊɔlɔ fʊ naa Sɩfasɩ.” A wʊ par lɛ Pita.

english_verse: Philip then found Nathanael and said, “We have found the one that Moses and the Prophets wrote about. He is Jesus, the son of Joseph from Nazareth.”
translation_verse: Filip mɩ chen tɩ nyɛ Natanɩɛl 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Sɩ nyɛn a 'lɔ a Mosesɩ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na sɛb a wʊ yele, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Yesu na yi a Najaretɩ, Josefʊ bidaba.”

english_verse: Nathanael asked, “Can anything good come from Nazareth?” Philip answered, “Come and see.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Natanɩɛl sʊʊr wʊ, “Yelsʊ̃ na tʊ̃ɔ yi a Najaretɩ tẽe ɔ?” Ka a Filip 'yɛr, “Wa kaa.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw Nathanael coming toward him, he said, “Here is a true descendant of our ancestor Israel. And he isn't deceitful.”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa nyɛ a Natanɩɛl na tor wʊ waara, wʊ 'yɛr naa, “Yɩ nyɛ a sɩ sãakpã Isɩral yɔ̃ɔ na ba tara bɛlfʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: “How do you know me?” Nathanael asked. Jesus answered, “Before Philip called you, I saw you under the fig tree.”
translation_verse: Ka a Natanɩɛl sʊʊr a Yesu, “Ŋmɩnɛ fʊ ɩrɛ wa bɔ̃ɔ ma?” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Filip na wa bʊɔlɔ fʊ, ka n nyɛ fʊ naa a kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ tɩɛ pĩlem.”

english_verse: Nathanael said, “Rabbi, you are the Son of God and the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Natanɩɛl 'yɛr, “Wiwile, fʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn Bie nɩ a Isɩral Nãa.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Did you believe me just because I said that I saw you under the fig tree? You will see something even greater.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr sɔɔ wʊ, “Fʊ sɔɔ ma naa, bojũu ɩn 'yɛr ɩka n nyɛ fʊ naa a kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ tɩɛ pĩlem ɔ? Fʊn nyɛn yelbɛrɛ ka a gar lɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain you will see heaven open and God's angels going up and coming down on the Son of Man.”
translation_verse: Na wʊ 'yɛr, sɩrɛ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ ɩka fʊn nyɛn saaju na yuo ka a Nãaŋmɩn malakasɩ suro tɩ duoro a maa Nɩsaal Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: Three days later Mary, the mother of Jesus, was at a wedding feast in the village of Cana in Galilee.
translation_verse: A ber a nyã puor, Yesu ma Mɛɛr be naa a pɔɔ ban kulo a tẽe na be a Galilee paal pɔ, ka ba bʊɔlɔ Keena.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples had also been invited and were there.
translation_verse: Ba bʊɔl Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo ka ba mɩ be be a pɔɔ kulfʊ jie.

english_verse: When the wine was all gone, Mary said to Jesus, “They don't have any more wine.”
translation_verse: A dãa na wa baar, Mɛɛr 'yɛr kʊ Yesu, “A nɩbɛ dãa baar naa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Mother, my time hasn't yet come! You must not tell me what to do.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “N ma, n sɔ̃ɔ ba ta ɛ, ta wiil ma a lɛ ɩn na ɩ ɛ.”

english_verse: Mary then said to the servants, “Do whatever Jesus tells you to do.”
translation_verse: Mɛɛr lɩɛb 'yɛr kʊ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, “Yɩ ɩ lɛ Jaa a Yesu na wa 'yɛr ɩka yɩ ɩ.”

english_verse: At the feast there were six stone water jars that were used by the people for washing themselves in the way that their religion said they must. Each jar held about
translation_verse: Kʊsɩɛ dʊʊr ayʊɔb ben be, be lɛ a nɩbɛ ma ɔ̃ɔ a kʊ̃ɔ pɛɛ a ba mãɛ lɛ a ba puorfʊ na ɩka ba ɩ. Yoi anaar bɩɩ anũu lɛ ma sɛɛ ãsʊɔ jaa.

english_verse: Jesus told the servants to fill them to the top with water. Then after the jars had been filled,
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ɩka ba ɔ̃ɔ kʊ̃ɔ sɛɛ a dʊʊr.

english_verse: he said, “Now take some water and give it to the man in charge of the feast.” The servants did as Jesus told them,
translation_verse: An wa sɛɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ pãa ɔ̃ɔ a kʊ̃ɔ amɩne kʊ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ na kaara a pɔɔ paalaa yele.” Ka a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ɩ a lɛ a Yesu na 'yɛr ba.

english_verse: and said, “The best wine is always served first. Then after the guests have had plenty, the other wine is served. But you have kept the best until last!”
translation_verse: na wʊ 'yɛr, “Nɩbɛ ma den nie waan a dãnʊ̃ɔ, bala wa nyũ tɩɩ baar, ka ba pãa waan a ala na ba bɔ̃ɔ nʊ̃mɔ̃ ɛ. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ bin a dãnʊ̃ɔ bar wa ta a baaraa.”

english_verse: But Jesus was talking about his body as a temple.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a puorfʊ yir nyã a Yesu na 'yɛrɛ, ɩ naa a wʊ ãgãn lɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Not long before the Jewish festival of Passover, Jesus went to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, ka a Juu nɩbɛ Gõl Bar Difʊ ta, Yesu don a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: So he took some rope and made a whip. Then he chased everyone out of the temple, together with their sheep and cattle. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and scattered their coins.
translation_verse: Wʊ den miir maal kpaara diin ba bar a puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, nɩ a ba piir nɩ a niin. Wʊ tɩɛ naa a libitɛɛrbɛ tɛɛbʊlsɩ lɔb ka a libie yɛ̃yɛl.

english_verse: The disciples then remembered that the Scriptures say, “My love for your house burns in me like a fire.”
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo pãa tɩɛr tɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr, “Lɛ ɩn nʊ̃ a fʊ yir 'moro man fɩka bũu.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: “Destroy this temple,” Jesus answered, “and in three days I will build it again!”
translation_verse: Ka Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩ ŋmɛr a puorfʊ yir nyãna, tɩ ka n de ber ata mɛn wʊ go.”

english_verse: There he found people selling cattle, sheep, and doves in the temple. He also saw moneychangers sitting at their tables.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ tɩ nyɛ nɩbɛ na daara niin, piir nɩ papar, a Juu nɩbɛ puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ. Wʊ nyɛn bamɩne mɩ na jɛ̃n tɛɛbʊlsɩ tɛɛrɛ libie.

english_verse: Jesus said to the people who had been selling doves, “Get those doves out of here! Don't make my Father's house a marketplace.”
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a bala na daara a papar, “Yɩ yin a papar a ka, na yɩ ta maal ma a Sãa yir daa difʊ jie ɛ.”

english_verse: The Jewish leaders asked Jesus, “What miracle will you work to show us why you have done this?”
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛrɛ pãa sʊʊr a Yesu, “Jãnɛ buor lɛ fʊn maal wiil sɩ ka a ɩ fʊ tara na sɔr fʊn maal a lɛ?”

english_verse: And when he was raised from death, his disciples remembered what he had told them. Then they believed the Scriptures and the words of Jesus. Jesus Knows What People Are Like
translation_verse: Yesu na wa ir a kũu pɔ, ka a wʊ poturbo tɩɛr yuo a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr, na ba pãa sɔɔ de lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr nɩ lɛ mɩ a Yesu na 'yɛr.

english_verse: In Jerusalem during Passover many people put their faith in Jesus, because they saw him work miracles.
translation_verse: A be a Jerusalɛm a Gõl Bar Difʊ na wa ta, nɩyɔɔ sɔɔn de a wʊ yuor, bojũu ba nyɛn a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ wʊn tʊ̃.

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their hearts, and he would not let them have power over him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Yesu na bɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ jaa tɩɛr, waa sɔɔ de wʊ mãɛ kʊ ba ɛ.

english_verse: No one had to tell him what people were like. He already knew.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ nɩrɛ lɛ na 'yɛr wʊ lɛ nɩbɛ na be ɛ, bojũu wʊ bɔ̃ɔn nɩrɛ jaa tɩɛr.

english_verse: There was a man named Nicodemus who was a Pharisee and a Jewish leader.
translation_verse: Daba dɔ̃ɔ be be a Faraseemɩne pɔ, ka a wʊ yuor di Nikodimasɩ, wʊ mɩ ɩ naa a Juu nɩbɛ nɩdiere ãsʊɔ.

english_verse: One night he went to Jesus and said, “Rabbi, we know that God has sent you to teach us. You could not work these miracles, unless God were with you.”
translation_verse: Wʊ dɔ̃ɔ chen a Yesu sɛ̃ tãsɔɔ na wʊ tɩ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ tʊ̃ fʊ ɩka, fʊ wa wiil sɩ. Fʊ kʊ̃ naa tʊ̃ɔ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ anyãna tʊ̃ ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn ba be a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I tell you for certain that you must be born from above before you can see God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu haa 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, fʊ̃ʊ ba nyɛ dɔɔ paalaa ɛ, fʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that before you can get into God's kingdom, you must be born not only by water, but by the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, fʊ̃ʊ na kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ, ka baa dɔɔ wʊ nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ nɩ a Sɩɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Humans give life to their children. Yet only God's Spirit can change you into a child of God.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ a nɩrɛ na dɔɔ ɩ naa nɩrɛ bie, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ mɩ lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ nɩrɛ lɩɛb ka wʊ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie.

english_verse: Don't be surprised when I say that you must be born from above.
translation_verse: Ta ɩ a nɛɛ 'maa fʊ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka a sɛɛ naa ka ba dɔɔfʊ dɔɔ paalaa ɛ.

english_verse: Only God's Spirit gives new life. The Spirit is like the wind that blows wherever it wants to. You can hear the wind, but you don't know where it comes from or where it is going.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ tɛɛ lɛ tɩrɛ a nyɛvʊr paalaa. A Sɩɛ kaar naa sɛsɛbɛ na furo chiine jie 'lɔ wʊn bʊɔrɔ, fʊn tʊ̃ɔn wõ a dɔɔn, tɩchɛ fʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn yi ɛ, bɩɩ a jie wʊn chiine ɛ.”

english_verse: “How can this be?” Nicodemus asked.
translation_verse: Ka a Nikodimasɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “Ŋmɩnɛ an ɩ wa ɩ a lɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: How can you be a teacher of Israel and not know these things?
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu haa 'yɛr, “Ŋmɩnɛ fʊ ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ wiwile tɩ ba bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna ɛ?

english_verse: I tell you for certain we know what we are talking about because we have seen it ourselves. But none of you will accept what we say.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, sɩ 'yɛrɛ naa ala sɩn bɔ̃ɔ, na sɩ di a ala sɩn 'yɛrɛ dãasɩɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba de a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: If you don't believe when I talk to you about things on earth, how can you possibly believe if I talk to you about things in heaven?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yaa sɔɔ de a wɛr nyã bonsɩ 'yɛr ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ yɩn ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ de ala ɩ, n 'yɛr naa saaju bonsɩ 'yɛr?

english_verse: No one has gone up to heaven except the Son of Man, who came down from there.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ba do saaju jaa ɛ, ka a Nɩsaal Bie na yi a be wa tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And the Son of Man must be lifted up, just as the metal snake was lifted up by Moses in the desert.
translation_verse: A Nɩsaal Bie na 'mɔɔn saaju nɩtãa lɛ a Mosesɩ na maal a kur jɩɛ 'mɔɔ a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Then everyone who has faith in the Son of Man will have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ka nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na pãa sɔɔ de a Nɩsaal Bie na tara na nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: God loved the people of this world so much that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who has faith in him will have eternal life and never really die.
translation_verse: “Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ naa a nɩbɛ na be ka a wɛr pɔ yɔɔ jaa, na wʊ de a wʊ Bidabʊ̃'yen tɛɛ kʊ sɩ, nɩrɛ jaa wa sɔɔ de wʊ, wʊ kʊ̃ wɛ ɛ, tɩ tara a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: God did not send his Son into the world to condemn its people. He sent him to save them!
translation_verse: Bojũu, Nãaŋmɩn ba tʊ̃ a wʊ Bidabʊ̃'yen nyã a wɛr pɔ ɩka wʊ wa sɔ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ wa naa ɩka wʊ wa faa ba.

english_verse: No one who has faith in God's Son will be condemned. But everyone who doesn't have faith in him has already been condemned for not having faith in God's only Son.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa sɔɔ de a Nãaŋmɩn Bidabʊ̃'yen nyã, wʊ kʊ̃ sɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba wa sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ, wʊn sɔ̃ɔ wʊn bar, bojũu waa sɔɔ de a Nãaŋmɩn Bidabʊ̃'yen tɛɛ nyã yuor ɛ.

english_verse: The light has come into the world, and people who do evil things are judged guilty because they love the dark more than the light.
translation_verse: A baaraa nɩ nyã, chãa wan ka a wɛr pɔ, tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ nʊ̃n libe gar a chãa, bojũu a ba maalfʊ ɩn bier.

english_verse: People who do evil hate the light and won't come to the light, because it clearly shows what they have done.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ bala na ɩrɛ a bier 'laar chãa, ba kʊ̃ sɔɔ yi chãa pɔ ɛ, bojũu a chãa na wiil naa a lɛ ban be.

english_verse: But everyone who lives by the truth will come to the light, because they want others to know that God is really the one doing what they do. Jesus and John the Baptist
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa na be be nɩ yelmãɛ ma wan chãa pɔ, bojũu ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a ba taaba ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ maala a lɛ ban maala.”

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples went to Judea, where he stayed with them for a while and was baptizing people.
translation_verse: A nyã puor, Yesu nɩ a wʊ poturbo 'mantaa chen Judiya be lɛ wʊ jɛ̃n ba bãlãa, na wʊ suoro nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: John's followers got into an argument with a Jewish man about a ceremony of washing.
translation_verse: Jɔɔn poturbo bamɩne nɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ chɩrɛ nɩ taa nɩ a ãgãn pɛɛfʊ yele.

english_verse: They went to John and said, “Rabbi, you spoke about a man when you were with him east of the Jordan. He is now baptizing people, and everyone is going to him.”
translation_verse: Ba chen a Jɔɔn sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “Wiwile, fʊ 'yɛr a daba 'lɔ sɛ̃ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ be a Jordan man gɔ̃ɔn. Wʊ suoro na nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ka nɩrɛ jaa chiine a wʊ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: John replied: No one can do anything unless God in heaven allows it.
translation_verse: Ka Jɔɔn haa 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɩ bon jaa ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn na be a saaju baa sɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You surely remember how I told you that I am not the Messiah. I am only the one sent ahead of him.
translation_verse: Yɩn mãɛ chɛnɛ na tɩɛr a ŋmɩnɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr yɩ ɩka n ba ɩ a Nɩ-iraa ɛ. Tɩchɛ wʊ tʊ̃ ma naa ka n de a wʊ nie.

english_verse: At a wedding the groom is the one who gets married. The best man is glad just to be there and to hear the groom's voice. That's why I am so glad.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na kulo a pɔɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a pɔɔ sʊɔ. A wʊ bɩbɩɛlɛ pʊɔ ma pɛl naa wʊn ara a be wõnõ a pɔɔ sʊɔ kɔkɔr. Ala lɛ so ka a n pʊɔ mɩ pɛl.

english_verse: Jesus must become more important, while I become less important. The One Who Comes from Heaven
translation_verse: A sɛɛ naa ɩka Yesu wʊ do, tɩchɛ ka maa suu.

english_verse: God's Son comes from heaven and is above all others. Everyone who comes from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks about earthly things. The one who comes from heaven is above all others.
translation_verse: “Nãaŋmɩn Bie nyã lɛ yi a saaju, 'lɔ lɛ gar ba jaa, nɩrɛ na yi ka a tẽe ɩn a tẽe tʊɔr na wʊ ma 'yɛrɛ a tẽe bomo 'yɛr. A 'lɔ na yi a saaju wa gar a bomo a jaa.

english_verse: He speaks about what he has seen and heard, and yet no one believes him.
translation_verse: Wʊ ma 'yɛr naa a lɛ wʊn nyɛ nɩ a lɛ wʊn wõ tɩ ãsʊɔ jaa maa sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: But everyone who does believe him has shown that God is truthful.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa sɔɔ de, a wiil naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn ɩ naa yelmãɛ sʊɔ.

english_verse: The Son was sent to speak God's message, and he has been given the full power of God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Bojũu, Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ naa a wʊ Bie ka wʊ wa 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr. Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa ka a wʊ Sɩɛ sɛɛ wʊ.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has given him everything.
translation_verse: A Sãa nʊ̃ naa Bie na wʊ de yele a jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nũu pɔ.

english_verse: Everyone who has faith in the Son has eternal life. But no one who rejects him will ever share in that life, and God will be angry with them forever.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na sɔɔ de a Bie tara na nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tɔr wʊ, ba tara a nyɛvʊr nyã ɛ, tɩ Nãaŋmɩn suur be a wʊ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: But Jesus' disciples were really the ones doing the baptizing, and not Jesus himself. Jesus and the Samaritan Woman
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Yesu poturbo lɛ dɔ̃ɔ suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, a ba ɩ Yesu mãɛ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus left Judea and started for Galilee again.
translation_verse: Yesu bar naa Judiya tɩ lɩɛb chiine a Galilee go.

english_verse: This time he had to go through Samaria,
translation_verse: Ka a ɩ Samariya lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka wʊ tu.

english_verse: “You are a Jew,” she replied, “and I am a Samaritan woman. How can you ask me for a drink of water when Jews and Samaritans won't have anything to do with each other?”
translation_verse: Ka a Samariya pɔɔ 'yɛr, “Fʊ̃ʊ Juu nɩrɛ, maa mɩ Samariya pɔɔ, taa ɩ ŋmɩnɛ ka fʊ ɩka n kʊ fʊ kʊ̃ɔ ka fʊ nyũ,” sɩn nɩ Juu nɩbɛ na ba mʊɔrɔ taa bũu ɛ?

english_verse: “Sir,” the woman said, “you don't even have a bucket, and the well is deep. Where are you going to get this life-giving water?
translation_verse: A pɔɔ 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, faa tara bʊ̃-ɔ̃ɔnaa ɛ, ka a lɔ-ɔ̃ɔ mɩ yulʊ̃, nyɩnɛ lɛ fʊn nyɛ a kʊ̃ɔ ala na kʊrɔ a nyɛvʊr?

english_verse: Our ancestor Jacob dug this well for us, and his family and animals got water from it. Are you greater than Jacob?”
translation_verse: A sɩ sãakpã Jekɔb lɛ tuu a lɔ-ɔ̃ɔ nyãna kʊ sɩ, ka wʊ yɔn nɩ a wʊ dʊ̃n nyuro. Fʊ̃ʊ bɛrma gar a Jekɔb bɩɩ?”

english_verse: But no one who drinks the water I give will ever be thirsty again. The water I give will become in that person a flowing fountain that gives eternal life.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa na nyũ a kʊ̃ɔ ala ɩn na kʊ wʊ, kɔ̃nyũur kʊ̃ lɛ kpɛ wʊ go ɛ. A kʊ̃ɔ ala ɩn na kʊ wʊ kaara kɔ̃bulaa na yire, naa kʊrɔ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: The woman replied, “Sir, please give me a drink of that water! Then I won't get thirsty and have to come to this well again.”
translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔ 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ yãayãabɩlɛ, kʊ ma a kʊ̃ɔ ala ka n nyũ, ka a kɔ̃nyũur ta lɛ nyɔɔ ma ka n suu a lɔ-ɔ̃ɔ nyã pɔ go ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Go and bring your husband.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “Kul tɩ tara a fʊ sɩrɛ waan.”

english_verse: The woman answered, “I don't have a husband.” “That's right,” Jesus replied, “you're telling the truth. You don't have a husband. You have already been married five times, and the man you are now living with isn't your husband.”
translation_verse: Fʊ dɔ̃ɔ kul sɩrbɛ anũu, tɩ a daba 'lɔ sɛ̃ fʊn be a pʊ̃pãanyã ba ɩ a fʊ sɩrɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The woman said, “Sir, I can see that you are a prophet.
translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔ 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ n nyɛ naa a fʊ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: My ancestors worshiped on this mountain, but you Jews say Jerusalem is the only place to worship.”
translation_verse: A sɩ sãakpãmɩne, a tɔ̃ɔ nyã ju lɛ ba ma do tɩ puor a Nãaŋmɩn tɩchɛ a yɩn Juu nɩbɛ 'yɛr ɩka Jerusalɛm tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a puorfʊ jie.”

english_verse: Jesus said to her: Believe me, the time is coming when you won't worship the Father either on this mountain or in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Pɔɔ sɔɔ de ma, sɔ̃ɔ waara an kʊ̃ ɩ a tɔ̃ɔ nyã ju bɩɩ Jerusalɛm yɩn do tɩ puor a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn go ɛ.

english_verse: You Samaritans don't really know the one you worship. But we Jews do know the God we worship, and by using us, God will save the world.
translation_verse: A yɩn Samariya nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ yɩn puoro ɛ, a sɩn Juu nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔ naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ sɩn puoro. Bojũu a sɩ jie lɛ Nãaŋmɩn na tu faa nɩbɛ.

english_verse: But a time is coming, and it is already here! Even now the true worshipers are being led by the Spirit to worship the Father according to the truth. These are the ones the Father is seeking to worship him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɔ̃ɔ waara, wʊ gɔr ta baar, a bala na puoro a Nãaŋmɩn sɩrɛ jaa, a sɩɛ na wiil ba naa ka ba puor a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ yelmãɛ. Ba nyãna puorfʊ lɛ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: God is Spirit, and those who worship God must be led by the Spirit to worship him according to the truth.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ɩn sɩɛ, bala na puoro wʊ a sɩɛ pɔ wʊn wiil ba naa ka ba puor wʊ nɩ yelmãɛ pɔ.”

english_verse: The woman said, “I know that the Messiah will come. He is the one we call Christ. When he comes, he will explain everything to us.”
translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔ 'yɛr, “N bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka a Nɩ-iraa na wa naa, a 'lɔ sɩn na bʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto. 'Lɔ wa wa, wʊn wiil sɩ naa yele a jaa par.”

english_verse: “I am that one,” Jesus told her, “and I am speaking to you now.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a pɔɔ, “Maa lɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɩ fʊ̃ʊ na 'yɛrɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã.”

english_verse: The disciples returned about this time and were surprised to find Jesus talking with a woman. But none of them asked him what he wanted or why he was talking with her.
translation_verse: Ka a ɩ a poturbo mɩ tɔ̃ɔ ta nyɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ nɩ a pɔɔ ka a nɛɛr 'maa ba. Tɩchɛ ba ãsʊɔ jaa ba 'la sʊʊr wʊ bo lɛ wʊ bʊɔrɔ bɩɩ bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ nɩ a pɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The woman left her water jar and ran back into town, where she said to the people,
translation_verse: A jie lɛ a pɔɔ bar a yuor tɩ jo kul a tẽe pɔ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ,

english_verse: “Come and see a man who told me everything I have ever done! Could he be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: “Yɩ wa nyɛ daba na 'yɛr ma ala a jaa n na dɔ̃ɔ maal. Kaa 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa naa 'lɔ bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Everyone in town went out to see Jesus.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na be a tẽe pɔ yin chen na tɩ kaa a Yesu.

english_verse: While this was happening, Jesus' disciples were saying to him, “Teacher, please eat something.”
translation_verse: An wa ɩrɛ a lɛ ka a poturbo sʊɔr a Yesu. “Wiwile yãayãabɩlɛ, di bʊ̃diir.”

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I have food you don't know anything about.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N tara na bʊ̃diir yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ a yele ɛ.”

english_verse: His disciples started asking each other, “Has someone brought him something to eat?”
translation_verse: Ka wʊ poturbo piel sʊrɔ taa, “Nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ lɛ tɔ̃ɔ waan bon kɔ̃ɔ wa kʊ wʊ ka wʊ di bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus said: My food is to do what God wants! He is the one who sent me, and I must finish the work that he gave me to do.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “N bʊ̃diir lɛ ka n ɩ a lɛ Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, 'lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ ma, ka n baar a tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'lɔ wʊn kʊ ma ɩka n tʊ̃.

english_verse: You may say there are still four months until harvest time. But I tell you to look, and you will see that the fields are ripe and ready to harvest.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'lɔ 'yɛr naa ɩka a chɛn ŋmɛrsɩ anaar ka a ŋmab ta, maa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka, yɩ kaa yɩn nyɛn a por bonsɩ na mʊ̃ɔ sɛɛ ŋmab.

english_verse: Even now the harvest workers are receiving their reward by gathering a harvest that brings eternal life. Then everyone who planted the seed and everyone who harvests the crop will celebrate together.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã gba, a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ bala na ŋmara nyɛrɛ naa a ba sãyar, ban lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bʊ̃ŋmarsɩ waara nɩ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Ka a bala na bʊr a bʊ̃bie nɩ a ŋmaŋmarba pãa 'mataa chɩlɛ.

english_verse: So the saying proves true, “Some plant the seed, and others harvest the crop.”
translation_verse: A sʊkpa na ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka, bamɩne lɛ bʊr ka bamɩne mɩ ŋma.

english_verse: I am sending you to harvest crops in fields where others have done all the hard work.
translation_verse: Maa tʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ naa ɩka, yɩ chen tɩ ŋma a puo 'lɔ pɔ a bamɩne na tʊ̃ hãn.”

english_verse: A lot of Samaritans in that town put their faith in Jesus because the woman had said, “This man told me everything I have ever done.”
translation_verse: Nɩyɔɔ na yi a Samariya tẽe pɔ sɔɔn de Yesu, bojũu a pɔɔ 'yɛr kʊ ba ɩka, “A daba nyã 'yɛr naa a lɛ jaa n na dɔ̃ɔ maal.”

english_verse: They came and asked him to stay in their town, and he stayed on for two days.
translation_verse: Ba wan wa sʊɔr wʊ ɩka wʊ jãnɛ a ba tẽe, ka wʊ jɛ̃ be ber ayi.

english_verse: Many more Samaritans put their faith in Jesus because of what they heard him say.
translation_verse: A Samariya tẽe dẽme yɔɔ jie mɩ lɛ sɔɔn de Yesu bojũu ba wʊn a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr.

english_verse: They told the woman, “We no longer have faith in Jesus just because of what you told us. We have heard him ourselves, and we are certain that he is the Savior of the world!” Jesus Heals an Official's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Be a ba 'yɛr kʊ a pɔɔ, “A ba ɩ lɛ fʊn 'yɛr kʊ sɩ jũu sɩ sɔɔ de a Yesu ɛ, sɩn mãɛ wõ naa a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr kʊ sɩ, ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ na faa a wɛr nɩbɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus had said, “Prophets are honored everywhere, except in their own country.” Then two days later he left
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr naa, “Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ nyɛrɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jie jaa, tɩchɛ a ba tẽe dẽme ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba ɛ.”

english_verse: and went to Galilee. The people there welcomed him, because they had gone to the festival in Jerusalem and had seen everything he had done.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa ta a Galilee, a nɩbɛ de wʊn nuur ayi a be, bojũu ba mɩ dɔ̃ɔ chen a Jerusalɛm a Gõl Bar Difʊ jie tɩ nyɛ a lɛ jaa wʊn maal.

english_verse: While Jesus was in Galilee, he returned to the village of Cana, where he had turned the water into wine. There was an official in Capernaum whose son was sick.
translation_verse: Yesu na wa be a Galilee, wʊ lɩɛb chen a Keena tẽe pɔ be wʊn dɔ̃ɔ lɩɛb a kʊ̃ɔ ka a ɩ a dãa. Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ kɔ̃ɔ ben Kapenahum ka a wʊ bie bɩɛrɛ.

english_verse: And when the man heard that Jesus had come from Judea, he went and begged him to keep his son from dying.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa wõ ɩka a Yesu yin a Galilee wa a Judiya, wʊ chen tɩ sʊɔr wʊ ɩka wʊ sãa a wʊ bie na kpire.

english_verse: Jesus told the official, “You won't have faith unless you see miracles and wonders!”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, “Yɩn baa nyɛ jãnɛ nɩ nɛ'maa yele ɛ, yɩ kʊ̃ sɔɔ de ɛ.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Lord, please come before my son dies!”
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, yãayãabɩlɛ, wa ka a n bie ta kpi ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “Your son will live. Go on home to him.” The man believed Jesus and started back home.
translation_verse: A Yesu pãa 'yɛr, “A fʊ bie sa naa, kulo a yir.” A daba sɔɔn de a lɛ a Yesu na 'yɛr na wʊ lɩɛb kulo a yir.

english_verse: Some of the official's servants met him along the road and told him, “Your son is better!”
translation_verse: Ka a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ na yi a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ yir tuor wʊ a sɔr pɔ 'yɛr, “A fʊ bie sa naa.”

english_verse: He asked them when the boy got better, and they answered, “The fever left him yesterday at one o'clock.”
translation_verse: A wʊ sʊʊr ba a sɔ̃ɔ buor a bie na sa, ka ba 'yɛr, “Jãa mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na vɩrʊ̃ lɛ a ãgãn tul bar wʊ.”

english_verse: The boy's father realized that at one o'clock the day before, Jesus had told him, “Your son will live!” So the man and everyone in his family put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a bie sãa tɩɛr tɔ an ɩ a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ vɩr naa a jãa, a Yesu na 'yɛr, “A fʊ bie sa naa.” A daba naa bala ba jaa na be a wʊ yir sɔɔn de a Yesu.

english_verse: This was the second miracle that Jesus worked after he left Judea and went to Galilee.
translation_verse: A nɛ'maa yelsɩ ayi lɛ anyã Yesu na tʊ̃ wʊn yi a Judiya na wʊ chen a Galilee.

english_verse: Later, Jesus went to Jerusalem for another Jewish festival.
translation_verse: A anyã puor, a Juu nɩbɛ tara na lɔ̃ɔ di ka a Yesu chen a be a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: In the city near the sheep gate was a pool with five porches, and its name in Hebrew was Bethzatha.
translation_verse: A tẽe pɔ, gbatarbile ben be ka a jɛ̃bɛrsɩ anũu be be. A jie gbʊr a be ban bʊɔlɔ a piir dɔ̃dɔr, ka a Juu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr pɔ a ba bʊɔlɔ Betesda.

english_verse: Beside the pool was a man who had been sick for
translation_verse: A gbatarbile 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ koor mɩ lɛ nɩbaala na bɛ yuom lɩjɛr nɩ pie nɩ aniin (

english_verse: You have not believed his message, because you refused to have faith in the one he sent.
translation_verse: Yaa sɔɔ a wʊ 'yɛr ɛ, bojũu yɩ tɔr na yaa sɔɔ de a 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the man and realized that he had been crippled for a long time, he asked him, “Do you want to be healed?”
translation_verse: Yesu na wa nyɛ a daba, wʊ bɔ̃ɔn naa wʊn gbɛr kor, ka wʊ sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ sa bɩɩ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “Sir, I don't have anyone to put me in the pool when the water is stirred up. I try to get in, but someone else always gets there first.”
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, n ba tara nɩrɛ na 'mɔɔ ma 'yɔ̃ɔ a kʊ̃ɔ pɔ 'lɔ wa dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, n ma mʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n kpɛ, tɩchɛ ka a nɩrɛ ma dɔ̃ɔ ma nie kpɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “Pick up your mat and walk!”
translation_verse: A Yesu pãa 'yɛr wʊ, “'Mɔɔ a fʊ bʊ̃gãnaa chiine.”

english_verse: Right then the man was healed. He picked up his mat and started walking around. The day on which this happened was a Sabbath.
translation_verse: Ajienaa ka a daba sa, na wʊ 'mɔɔ a sɔ̃ɔ chiine. A Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir daar lɛ a anyãna ɩ.

english_verse: When the Jewish leaders saw the man carrying his mat, they said to him, “This is the Sabbath! No one is allowed to carry a mat on the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛrɛ na wa nyɛ a daba na tuo a sɔ̃ɔ, ka ba 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir lɛ, nɩrɛ jaa ba tara sɔr ɩka wʊ tuo a wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir ɛ.”

english_verse: But he replied, “The man who healed me told me to pick up my mat and walk.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr, “A daba 'lɔ na sa ma lɛ 'yɛr kʊ ma ɩka n 'mɔɔ a sɔ̃ɔ chiine.”

english_verse: They asked him, “Who is this man that told you to pick up your mat and walk?”
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Nɩbuor lɛ 'yɛr fʊ ɩka fʊ 'mɔɔ a sɔ̃ɔ tuo chiine?”

english_verse: But he did not know who Jesus was, and Jesus had left because of the crowd.
translation_verse: A daba ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a Yesu a nɩbuor wʊn ɩ ɛ, Yesu kpɛ̃n a nɩyɔɔ bala pɔ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus met the man in the temple and told him, “You are now well. But don't sin anymore or something worse might happen to you.”
translation_verse: A nyã puor, a Yesu nyɛn a daba a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ na wʊ 'yɛr wʊ, “Fʊ pãa sãn pʊ̃pãanyã, taa wa ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr go ɛ, ka amɩne wa pɔɔ fʊ gar a lɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The man left and told the leaders that Jesus was the one who had healed him.
translation_verse: Ka a daba chen tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a Juu nɩbɛrɛ, Yesu lɛ ɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sa ma.

english_verse: They started making a lot of trouble for Jesus because he did things like this on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Ba piel bʊɔrɔ sɔɩ na ɩ Yesu yele bojũu wʊ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a anyãna a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “My Father has never stopped working, and this is why I keep on working.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr ba, “N Sãa ba vɛ̃ anyãna tʊ̃fʊ ɛ, ala lɛ so ka n mɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃.”

english_verse: Now the leaders wanted to kill Jesus for two reasons. First, he had broken the law of the Sabbath. But even worse, he had said God was his Father, which made him equal with God. The Son's Authority
translation_verse: A nɩbɛrɛ tara na yele ayi ban bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba kõn Yesu. Wʊ sɔ̃ɔ naa a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir yele, tɩchɛ a dɛɛr 'lɔ jaa lɛ wʊn 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn ɩ naa a wʊ Sãa, na wʊ de a wʊ mãɛ ka 'lɔ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɩ bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: Jesus told the people: I tell you for certain the Son cannot do anything on his own. He can do only what he sees the Father doing, and he does exactly what he sees the Father do.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka a Bie kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal bon jaa ɛ. Wʊn tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a lɛ tɛɛ wʊn nyɛ a Sãa na maala, bojũu a Bie ma maal naa a lɛ nɛ wʊn nyɛ a Sãa na maala.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has shown him everything he does. The Father will show him even greater things, and you will be amazed.
translation_verse: A Sãa nʊ̃n a Bie na wʊ wiil wʊ a yele a jaa wʊn maal. A Sãa gba na wiil wʊn yelbɛrɛ ka yɩ nɛɛr 'maa.

english_verse: Just as the Father raises the dead and gives life, so the Son gives life to anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: A lɛ a Sãa na ma sãɩ a kũu na wʊ kʊ wʊ nyɛvʊr, lɛ lɛ a Bie mɩ na kʊ a ãsʊɔ jaa wʊn bʊɔrɔ a nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: A Sãa gba ba tɔɔrɔ nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩka a Bie wʊ tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr.

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: A Sãa bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a Bie nɩtãa lɛ ban 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ wʊ. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wa tɔr ba 'yɔ̃ɔ a Bie ɛ, lɛ mɩ lɛ wʊ tɔr, ba 'yɔ̃ɔ a Sãa na tʊ̃ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, ãsʊɔ jaa na wõ a lɛ ɩn na 'yɛr tɩ sɔɔ de a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma, tara na nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Ba kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ 'yɛr ɛ. Wʊ yin kũu pɔ, tɩ kpɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, sɔ̃ɔ waara, wʊ ben ta ka a kũn na wõ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie kɔkɔr. A bala na wõ naa, na ir tara nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Sãa tara na kpɛ̃ɔ kʊrɔ nyɛvʊr. Wʊ den a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ kʊ a Bie ka wʊ mɩ tara nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Wʊ kʊ wʊn sɔr ɩka wʊ tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr, bojũu wʊ ɩ naa Nɩsaal Bie.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: “Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a 'maa yɩ nɛɛ ɛ. A sɔ̃ɔ na wa naa, ka a kũn wõ a Nɩsaal Bie kɔkɔr,

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: na ba yire a ba yar pɔ. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa na maal vɩla, na yin kpɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ, ka a ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ na maal dɛɛr na yin kpɛ sɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: N kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal bon jaa nɩ maa mãɛ kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ 'yɛr ma a lɛ ɩn na tɔɔrɔ ka a n tɔɔrfʊ tara sɔr bojũu n turo naa a wʊ nɛɛ, a ba ɩ n ɩrɛ na lɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: “Maa 'yɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a n mãɛ, sɔr jaa ba be be na wiil ɩka yelmãɛ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ ben be na 'yɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma, ka n mɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɩn yelmãɛ.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: “Yɩ tʊ̃n nɩbɛ a Jɔɔn sɛ̃ ka wʊ tɩ 'yɛr ba a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: N ba dɩɛl lɛ nɩbɛ na 'yɛrɛ a n 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ yɩ naa anyãna ka yɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Jɔɔn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ fɩka fãtɩn na chaar yɔ̃ɔ ka yɩ pʊɔ pɛl, a yɩ chɩl a chãa nyã pɔ bãlãa.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: “Bon kɔ̃ɔ na tɩrɛ gar a lɛ a Jɔɔn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a n 'yɛr, naa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala a Sãa na kʊ ma ɩka n tʊ̃. A anyãna a jaa 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ ma, naa wiil ɩka a Sãa lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: A Sãa mɩ na tʊ̃ ma 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ ma, tɩchɛ yaa wõ a wʊ kɔkɔr bɩɩ nyɛ a wʊ nie jaa ɛ.

english_verse: You search the Scriptures, because you think you will find eternal life in them. The Scriptures tell about me,
translation_verse: Yɩ ma chɛ̃pɛ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn gãma, bojũu yɩ tɩɛr naa ɩka be lɛ yɩn nyɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Maa 'yɛr lɛ a gãma anyãna 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ tɔr naa na wa a n sɛ̃ wa nyɛ nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: “N baka ba be nɩrɛ pɛɛfʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: but I do know that none of you love God.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: Maa waan naa a n Sãa yuor, ka yaa de ma ɛ. Tɩchɛ yɩn den nɩbɛ na waan ba mãɛ yuor.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ yɩn ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ? Yɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka a yɩ barmɩne ba pɛɛrɛ yɩ, ka yɩ baka ba be a pɛɛfʊ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ na kʊ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: “Tɩchɛ, yɩ taa tɩɛr ɩka ɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn 'yɛr a Sãa niem ɛ. Yɩ den a yɩ tɩɛr dɔɔl Mosesɩ, 'lɔ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Maa 'yɛr lɛ a Mosesɩ na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb, ala ɩ yɩn ta sɔɔ wʊ, yɩn taa sɔɔ ma naa.

english_verse: But if you don't believe what Moses wrote, how can you believe what I say?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn ba sɔɔ a lɛ a Mosesɩ na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ yɩn ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr?”

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: ) Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa na chɛlɛ a Sãa sɛ̃, na wʊ jãn yi a wʊ sɛ̃, na wa naa a n sɛ̃.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Ka ba ta ɩka ba de wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a gboro pɔ, tɩ ajienaa ka a gboro mɩ ta a gogoro nɛɛ a jie 'lɔ ban chiine.

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Nɛ'maa tʊ̃buor lɛ fʊn tʊ̃ ka sɩ nyɛ tɩ sɔɔ de fʊ? Bo lɛ fʊn ɩ?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa a n sɛ̃ ɛ, ka a Sãa na tʊ̃ ma baa tɔɔ wʊ waan ɛ, ka n sãɩ wʊ ka wʊ ir ɩ vʊr a ber baaraa daar.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Dabile ben ka na wʊ tara a chi jɔ̃n paanʊ̃ɔ anũu nɩ jãmɛ ayi, tɩ bo an maal a nɩyɔɔ banyãna?”

english_verse: The ground was covered with grass, and Jesus told his disciples to tell everyone to sit down. About
translation_verse: Mʊɔr pɔɔn a tẽe wʊ jaa, ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a poturbo ka ba ɩ a nɩbɛ jãnɛ jãnɛ. A nɩbɛ bala dɔ̃ɔ ɩ tur anũu (

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: Na ba tɩ kpɛ a gboro pɔ piel gɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a Kapenahum. A jãanɔ'maar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ Yesu ba wa a ba sɛ̃ sɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus crossed Lake Galilee, which was also known as Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: A anyã puor, Yesu gɔ̃ɔ naa a Galilee man gɔ̃ɔn be ban bʊɔlɔ a Tiberiyas.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Nɩyɔɔ tu wʊn chen ban nyɛ wʊn tʊ̃ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ na wʊ sãa baalsɩ.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Ka a Filip 'yɛr, “Faa bɔ̃ɔ ka an den ŋmɛrsɩ aniin sãyar a fʊn dãn paanʊ̃ɔ jaa pʊʊr kʊ a nɩbɛ banyãna ɛ?”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Andiru na ɩ a Simon Pita yɛbɛ, a Yesu poturo ãsʊɔ lɛ, ka wʊ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Yesu den a paanʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nũu pɔ tɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, tɩ de a paanʊ̃ɔ põ a nɩbɛ, na wʊ lɛ de a jãmɛ mɩ põ ba.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ di lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ, ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a poturbo ɩka ba wob a bʊ̃ŋmaara ala na chɛ, ka a bon jaa ta wɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu na wa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka ba bʊɔrɔ naa na fɩr wʊ ka wʊ ɩ a ba nãa, wʊ don a tɔ̃ɔ ju wʊ yõ.

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa chaar, a nɩyɔɔ bala na jãnɛ a man gɔ̃ɔn bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka gboro bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be be. Ka Yesu naa poturbo ba 'mataa kpɛ wʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ bala tɛɛ lɛ chiine.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Yɩ ta tʊ̃nɔ̃ bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃diir anyã na sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃diir anyã na kʊ yɩ nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, ala lɛ a maa Nɩsaal Bie na kʊ yɩ. Bojũu 'lɔ lɛ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɔr ɩka wʊ ɩ a lɛ.”

english_verse: They started arguing with each other and asked, “How can he give us his flesh to eat?”
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ piel chɩrɛ taa nɩ suur na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a daba nyãna na ɩrɛ wa kʊ sɩ a wʊ ãgãn ka sɩ 'wɔb?”

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: A sɛsɛkpɛ̃ɛ furo na ka a kʊ̃ɔ dãdaala.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo na wa mɔ̃ kpɛ sɔɔ jaa, ba nyɛn a Yesu na chiine a kʊ̃ɔ ju waara a gboro par ka dãbãɛ kpɛ ba.

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Maa lɛ, yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Ka gboi amɩne na yi Tiberiyas wa ara gbʊr a be a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan tɩ ka a nɩbɛ di a bʊ̃diir.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ na wa nyɛ ka a Yesu bɩɩ a wʊ poturbo ba be be ɛ, ba kpɛ̃n a gboi ala chiine a Kapenahum na tɩ bɔ a Yesu.

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Ban wa tɩ nyɛ wʊ a manyal gɔ̃ɔn, ba sʊʊr wʊ naa, “Wiwile, dabor fʊ wa ka?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊ̃rɔ yɩ, yɩ yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ma a ba ɩ a nɛ 'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ yɩn nyɛ ɩn tʊ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃diir yɩn di tɩɩ jũu.

english_verse: “What exactly does God want us to do?” the people asked.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bãa lɛ sɩn na ɩ na sɩ tʊ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “God wants you to have faith in the one he sent.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ nyã ɩka yɩ sɔɔ de a 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃.”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: A sɩ sãakpãmɩne din a maana a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb. Wʊ kʊ ba naa a bʊ̃diir na yi saaju ka ba di.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a ba ɩ Mosesɩ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ a bʊ̃diir ala na yi a saaju ɛ, tɩchɛ a n Sãa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ a yelmãɛ bʊ̃diir ala na yi a saaju.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃diir ɩ naa a 'lɔ na yi a saaju wa, na wʊ wa kʊrɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ nyɛvʊr.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, an yi a dɩna tɩ chiine, kʊrɔ sɩ a bʊ̃diir ala.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Be a Yesu pãa 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ a bʊ̃diir ala na kʊrɔ nyɛvʊr, 'lɔ jaa na wa n sɛ̃ kʊ̃ lɛ chiin kɔ̃ ɛ. 'Lɔ jaa mɩ na sɔɔ de ma, kɔ̃nyũur kʊ̃ lɛ kpɛ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a lɛ n na 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, yɩ nyɛ ma naa tɩ yaa sɔɔ de ma ɛ.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Bala ba jaa a Sãa na kʊ ma, ban wan a n sɛ̃. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa mɩ wa wa a n sɛ̃, n kʊ̃ dii wʊ bar ɛ.

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: Bojũu, n ba yi a saaju wa ɩka n wa ɩ a n bɔfʊ ɛ, tɩ n wa naa ɩka n wa ɩ a Sãa bɔfʊ. 'Lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: A nyã lɛ ɩ a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma bɔfʊ, ka n taa ɩrɛ wa vɛ̃ ka bala jaa wʊn kʊ ma bɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n sãɩ ba, ka ba ir ɩ vʊɛ a ber baaraa daar.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Bojũu, a n Sãa bɔfʊ nɩ nyã ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa na kaa a Bie na wʊ sɔɔ de wʊ, ban tara naa a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, ka n sãɩ ba, ka ba ir ɩ vʊɛ a ber baaraa daar.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ piel hũhũnõ bojũu a Yesu 'yɛr ɩka, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a bʊ̃diir 'lɔ na yi a saaju wa.

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛrɛ, “A ba ɩ a Yesu lɛ a nyã ɛ, a Josefʊ bidaba, a wʊ sãa nɩ a wʊ ma sɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɛ? Ŋmɩnɛ wʊ ɩrɛ wa 'yɛr ɩka saaju lɛ n yi wa?”

english_verse: Jesus told them: Stop grumbling!
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr ba, “Yɩ bar a hũhũfʊ.

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa ba nyɛ a Sãa ɛ, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, 'lɔ tɛɛ lɛ nyɛ a Sãa.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ de ma tara na nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Maa lɛ ɩ a bʊ̃diir ala na tara nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: A yɩ sãakpãmɩne dɔ̃ɔ di a maana a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ tɩ chɛnɛ kpi.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a bʊ̃diir 'lɔ na yi a saaju wa nɩ nyã, 'lɔ lɛ nɩrɛ na di na wʊ kʊ̃ kpi ɛ.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Maa lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr bʊ̃diir 'lɔ na yi a saaju wa. Ala ɩ nɩrɛ di naa a bʊ̃diir nyãna, wʊn ben be jaa kpo kpo. A bʊ̃diir nyã ɩ naa a n ãgãn ɩn de kʊrɔ a nɩbɛ na be a wɛr pɔ, ka ba na nyɛ nyɛvʊr.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ. Yɩn baa 'wɔb a Nɩsaal Bie ãgãn na yɩ nyũ a wʊ jãɩ ɛ, yaa tara nyɛvʊr ɛ.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'wɔb a n ãgãn na wʊ nyũ a n jãɩ tara na a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, tɩ ka n sãɩ wʊ a wʊ ir ɩ vʊr a ber baaraa daar.

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: A n ãgãn ɩ naa bʊ̃dimãɛ, ka n jãɩ mɩ ɩ bʊ̃nyũmãɛ.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'wɔb a n ãgãn na wʊ nyũ a n jãɩ, be naa a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ka n mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Sãa na ɩ a nyɛvʊr sʊɔ na tʊ̃ ma ka n be be a Sãa jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na 'wɔb ma mɩ na ben be a maa jũu.

english_verse: The bread that comes down from heaven isn't like what your ancestors ate. They died, but whoever eats this bread will live forever.
translation_verse: A bʊ̃diir nyã lɛ yi a saaju wa. Sɩ sãakpãmɩne dɔ̃ɔ di a maana tɩ kpi, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na di a bʊ̃diir nyã na ben be kpo kpo.”

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ wile ba a Juu nɩbɛ lɔ̃ɔfʊ yir a Kapenahum ala lɛ wʊ 'yɛr a nyãna.

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu poturbo yɔɔ na wa wõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr, ka ba 'yɛr, “A fʊ wiilfʊ nyã kpɛ̃mɛ na kpɛ, an lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ de?”

english_verse: Jesus knew that his disciples were grumbling. So he asked, “Does this bother you?
translation_verse: Yesu na bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ a poturbo na hũhũnõ, ka wʊ sʊʊr ba, “A nɩtɔ̃ chɛ yɩn bɩɩ?

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ an pãa kaara, yɩn wa nyɛ a Nɩsaal Bie na duoro a jie 'lɔ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ be?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ na kʊrɔ a nɩrɛ nyɛvʊr ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ. Nɩrɛ mãɛ fɔ̃ɔ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal bon jaa ɛ. A 'yɛr ala ɩn 'yɛr yɩ, ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr, naa ɩ Nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩ bamɩne ba sɔɔ ɛ.” Bojũu, Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa a pielfʊ a 'lɔ na ba sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ, nɩ a 'lɔ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ 'yɛr, “Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ so ka n 'yɛr ɩka ãsʊɔ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa a n sɛ̃ ɛ, ka a Sãa baa waan wʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: An yi a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a poturbo yɔɔ ŋmaan yi na baa lɛ turo wʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr a Pie Nɩ Ayi bala, “A yɩn mɩ, yɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yi ŋmaa yi bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Be a Simon Pita 'yɛr, “N Soro, an sɛ̃ lɛ sɩn chen? An ɩ fʊ̃ʊ tɛɛ lɛ tara a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: Sɩ sɔɔn de na sɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ ɩ naa a chɛchɛ sʊɔ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu haa 'yɛr, “A ba ɩ maa lɛ ir a yɩ Pie Nɩ Ayi ɛ? Tɩchɛ ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ ɩ Satan tʊɔr.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛrɛ naa a Judas na ɩ a Pie Nɩ Ayi ãsʊɔ na wa gar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ. Wʊ ɩ naa a Simon bidaba na yi Isɩkariyot.

english_verse: Jesus decided to leave Judea and to start going through Galilee because the leaders of the people wanted to kill him.
translation_verse: A anyã puor, Yesu yi naa Judiya tɩ yʊɔrɔ a Galilee paal pɔ, bojũu a Juu nɩbɛ bʊɔrɔ naa a wʊ kʊfʊ.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Juu nɩbɛ sɛɛr pɔ lɔ̃ɔ di bɩbir na wa gbʊrɔ,

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: a Yesu yɛbil 'yɛr wʊ naa, “Yi a ka chen a Judiya ka a fʊ poturbo mɩ tɩ nyɛ a fʊ nɛ 'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba bʊɔlɔ a wʊ yuor ba sɔɔlɔ ɛ. Fʊn maala a nyãna, wiil a fʊ mãɛ ka nɩbɛ jaa nyɛ fʊ.”

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wʊ mãɛ yɛbil ba sɔɔ de wʊ gba ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My time hasn't yet come, but your time is always here.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a Yesu 'yɛr ba, “A n bɩbir ba vɩɛ ɛ, yɩn bɩbir vɩɛ naa.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: A wɛr nɩbɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'laar yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ ba 'laar ma naa bojũu n 'yɛr ba naa ɩka a lɛ ban ɩrɛ ɩn dɛɛr.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Yɩn, yɩ chiine a lɔ̃ɔ di jie. Maa ba chiine a lɔ̃ɔ di jie sɛrɛ ɛ, bojũu n bɩbir ba vɩɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr naa lɛ tɩ chɛnɛ jãnɛ a Galilee.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: A wʊ yɛbil na wa chen a lɔ̃ɔ di jie baar ka wʊ mɩ ir sɔɔl chen.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: A lɔ̃ɔ di jie lɛ a Juu nɩbɛ jʊrɔ wʊ tɩ sʊrɔ taa, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ a daba 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ be?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: A nɩyɔɔ bala bʊlɔ na 'yɛrɛ kʊ̃rɔ taa, “A Yesu ɩn nɩsʊ̃.” Ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛrɛ, “Nɩbɛlɛ lɛ wʊ ɩ.”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ baa 'lara 'yɛrɛ ka a yire chãa pɔ ɛ, bojũu ba joro naa a Juu nɩbɛrɛ dãbãɛ.

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: A lɔ̃ɔfʊ na wa põ jãtaa, Yesu don kpɛ a Juu nɩbɛ puorfʊ jie na wʊ tɩ piel wile.

english_verse: The leaders were surprised and said, “How does this man know so much? He has never been taught!”
translation_verse: Ka a nɛɛr 'maa a Juu nɩbɛrɛ ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “Ŋmɩnɛ a daba nyã ɩrɛ wa bɔ̃ɔ a nɩtɔ̃ wʊn ba jãn ɛ?”
