english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A wiilfʊ nyã ba yi a n sɛ̃ ɛ, a yi naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma sɛ̃.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kaa ir ɩka wʊn ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ, wʊn bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka a wiilfʊ nyã yin Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ bɩɩ n mãɛ lɛ n wile.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛrɛ a wʊ mãɛ 'yɛr, bʊɔrɔ na 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊrɔ a wʊ mãɛ. Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ bʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊrɔ a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ wʊ, a nɩnyɩnɛ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ ka a bɛlfʊ ba be a wʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Mosesɩ baa dɔ̃ɔ bin a Nɛɛ kʊ yɩ ɛ? Tɩ yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba tʊ̃ɔ tu ɛ. Bo 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ kʊ ma?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala 'yɛr, “Sɩdɛɛr lɛ fʊ tara, an bʊɔrɔ fʊ kʊfʊ?”

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Mosesɩ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ wiil yɩ a yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ an ba ɩ 'lɔ sɛ̃ lɛ a dɔ̃ɔ yi ɛ, tɩ yi a sãakpãmɩne sɛ̃, ka ba ma ŋmaa yʊɔr a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar.

english_verse: in order to obey the Law of Moses. Why are you angry with me for making someone completely well on the Sabbath?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩn tʊ̃ɔ ŋmaa bibile yʊɔr a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar tɩ ka a Mosesɩ nɛɛ 'lɔ wʊn bin ba sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, bo lɛ so ka yɩ nyɛ suur 'yɔ̃ɔ ma nɩrɛ ɩn sa a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar?

english_verse: Don't judge by appearances. Judge by what is right.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta bʊ̃nɔ̃ tɔɔr ɛ, tɩ yɩ tɔɔrɔ a lɛ na tor.”

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ bamɩne na yi Jerusalɛm piel sʊrɔ taa, “A ba ɩ a daba nyã lɛ ba bʊɔrɔ a kʊfʊ ɛ,

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: nyɛ wʊn ara 'yɛrɛ chãa pɔ, ka baa 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr ɛ? A nɩbɛrɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka 'lɔ lɛ a Nɩ-iraa bɩɩ?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn bɔ̃ɔ naa a jie 'lɔ a daba nyãna na yi. A Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ wa wa, nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn na yi ɛ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Yesu chɛnɛ na wile a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, na wʊ tãna 'yɛrɛ, “Ɔ̃ɔ yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ma naa, na yɩ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a jie 'lɔ n na yi. N ba be ka nɩ n mãɛ kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa, wʊ sɛ̃ lɛ n yi, 'lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: A anyã lɛ ba ta bʊɔrɔ a wʊ nyɔɔfʊ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa ba lɩɛb wʊ nũu sɩɩr wʊ ɛ, bojũu a wʊ bɩbir ba vɩɛ ɛ.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: A nɩyɔɔ bala pɔ, bamɩne chɛnɛ na sɔɔ de wʊ na ba 'yɛrɛ, “A Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ wa wa, wʊn tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ gar a daba nyã bɩɩ?”

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Faraseemɩne wõn a lɛ a nɩyɔɔ bala na bʊlɔ 'yɛrɛ a Yesu 'yɛr, ka a bala naa Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ tʊ̃ a puorfʊ yir kakaarba ka ba tɩ nyɔɔ wʊ waan.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Be a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “N be naa yɩ sɛ̃ bãlãa, tɩ naa pãa lɛ lɩɛb chen a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma sɛ̃.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Yɩn wa yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ma, tɩchɛ yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ ma ɛ, a be n na be yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa be ɛ.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ pãa sʊrɔ taa, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ a daba nyã na pãa chen ka sɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ wʊ ɛ? Wʊn chen naa be a sɩ nɩbɛ na yaar jɛr a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ tɩ wile ba bɩɩ?

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊ 'yɛr ɩka, yɩn wa yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ma tɩ yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ ma ɛ, a be n na be yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa be ɛ.”

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: A bɩbir baaraa daar na ɩ a lɔ̃ɔ di bɩbir kpɛ̃ɛ, Yesu ir ara tɩ tãn 'yɛr, “Kɔ̃nyũur wa kpɛ nɩrɛ, wʊ wa a n sɛ̃ wa nyũ.

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de ma nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr, nyɛvʊr kʊ̃ɔ na joro na yire a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr lɛ wʊ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ, a bala na sɔɔ de wʊ ka wʊn kʊ ba. A Sɩɛ ba dɔ̃ɔ wa ɛ, an ɩ a Yesu ba nyɛ a tɩɩr sɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ na wa wõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr, ka bamɩne 'yɛr, “A daba nyã ɩn Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ yelmãɛ.”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛrɛ, “A nyã lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Nɩ-iraa.” Ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛr, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ na ɩrɛ wa yi Galilee?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn gãn ba 'yɛr ɩka David yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊn ɩ na wʊ yi Bɛtɩlɛhɛm, a tẽe 'lɔ a David na dɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ ɛ?”

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ ŋma dẽ dẽ a Yesu juu.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Bamɩne mɩ ta bʊɔrɔ na ɩka ba nyɔɔ wʊ tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa ba 'la sɩɩr wʊ nɩ wʊ nũu ɛ.

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: A puorfʊ yir gugurbo lɩɛb chen a Farasee nɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ sɛ̃, ka ba sʊʊr ba, “Ŋmɩnɛ wʊ ɩ ka yaa waan wʊ ɛ?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Ka a bala ban tʊ̃, ka ba 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ jaa ba 'yɛr 'yɛr a daba nyã kaar ɛ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Ka a Faraseemɩne sʊʊr ba, “Wʊ mɩ ben bɛl yɩ wɛ?

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: Yɩ nyɛn a Faraseemɩne nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ka ba sɔɔ de wʊ?

english_verse: And these people who don't know the Law are under God's curse anyway.”
translation_verse: Kai, tɩchɛ a nɩyɔɔ ba nyãna ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ ɛ, ba ben pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ gba.”

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Nikodimasɩ na dɔ̃ɔ chen a Yesu sɛ̃ mɩ ɩ naa a ba ãsʊɔ sʊʊr ba,

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: “A nɛɛ ba kʊ sɩ sɔr ɩka sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ yele ka saa wõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr bɩɩ maala ɛ?”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ mɩ yin Galilee bɩɩ? Jʊʊr kaa, a la ɩ fʊ nyɛn Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ na yi Galilee.”

english_verse: Everyone else went home,
translation_verse: Ka ba jaa yaar kul a ba yie.

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu mɩ do a Olive Tɩɩr Tɔ̃ɔ ju.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Wɛr na wa chaar bibio pipi, Yesu lɩɛb wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, be lɛ a nɩbɛ ŋmaa jilʊ̃ wʊ tɩ wʊ jãnɛ wile ba.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Mosesɩ Nɛɛ wiwiilbe, nɩ a Faraseemɩne wa 'mataa waan pɔɔ ban nyɔɔ na gãn daba. Ba vɛ̃n ka a pɔɔ ir ara a ba jaa niem,

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: tɩ ba 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “Wiwile, a pɔɔ nyãna lɛ gãn daba ka sɩ nyɔɔ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: A Mosesɩ Nɛɛ 'lɔ 'yɛr ɩka sɩ lɔb wʊ nɩ kʊsɩɛ kʊ.”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Ba 'yɛr naa a lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba bɛɛr Yesu kaa na ba tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ 'yɛr, 'yɛr a wʊ yele. Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu guun de a nubir sɛɛrɛ nɩ a tẽe.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
translation_verse: Tɩ ba chɛnɛ sʊrɔ wʊ, ka wʊ dɔl 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ben ka ba maal dɛɛr ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊ de nie lɔb a pɔɔ nɩ a kʊsɩr.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ lɛ guun sɛɛrɛ a tẽe go.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: A anyãna ban wõ, ba piel yire bʊ̃'yen 'yen, a danyɔ̃n lɛ de nie. A wa tɩ chɛ naa a Yesu nɩ a pɔɔ tɛɛ na ara a be.

english_verse: Jesus stood up and asked her, “Where is everyone? Isn't there anyone left to accuse you?”
translation_verse: Yesu dɔl ir sʊʊr a pɔɔ, “Nyɛ ba be? Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa ba 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ yele ɛ?”

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Ka a pɔɔ 'yɛr, “Kai nɩkpɛ̃ɛ.” Ka Yesu mɩ pãa 'yɛr wʊ, “Maa mɩ kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ yele ɛ, chiine, taa lɛ wa maala yeldɛɛr go ɛ.”

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ na wʊ 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ a wɛr nyã chãa, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na turo ma kʊ̃ lɛ chen libe pɔ ɛ, tɩ wʊn tara na nyɛvʊr na ɩ chãa.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Ka a Faraseemɩne chɩrɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “Fʊ bʊɔrɔ na yuor 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ fʊ mãɛ, ka a fʊ yobɔ ɩ pɔrɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ n bʊɔrɔ naa yuor 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a n mãɛ, a n yobɔ tara na sɔr. Bojũu n bɔ̃ɔ naa jie ɩn yi wa, naa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a jie ɩn chiine. Tɩchɛ yɩn, yaa bɔ̃ɔ a jie ɩn yi wa ɛ, yaa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a jie ɩn chiine ɛ.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Yɩ den nɩsaal tɩɛrsɩ tɔɔrɔ nɩ 'yɛr, maa ba tɔɔrɔ nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ ɩn tɔɔr naa 'yɛr, a lɛ ɩn na tɔɔr na tor naa bojũu n ba ɩ n yõ ɛ, a Sãa na tʊ̃ ma pʊɔ ma naa.

english_verse: Your Law requires two witnesses to prove that something is true.
translation_verse: A sɛb a yɩ nɛɛr pɔ ɩka, nɩbɛ ayi 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: N 'yɛrɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a n mãɛ, ka a Sãa mɩ na tʊ̃ ma 'yɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Nyɩnɛ a fʊ Sãa be?” Ka Yesu 'yɛr “Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ma ɛ, bɩɩ a n Sãa ɛ, ala ɩ yɩ ta bɔ̃ɔ ma naa, yɩn taa bɔ̃ɔ naa n Sãa mɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr naa a 'yɛr nyã wʊn wile ba a puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ gbʊr a libie lɔb fʊ jie. Tɩ nɩrɛ jaa ba nyɔɔ wʊ ɛ, an ɩ a wʊ bɩbir ba vɩɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba go, “N chiine na, yɩn wa yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ma tɩ na yɩ kpin a yɩ yelbier. Jie ɩn chiine, yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa be ɛ.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ pãa sʊrɔ taa, “Wʊn kʊn wʊ mãɛ bɩɩ? Ala lɛ so wʊn 'yɛr ɩka, ‘A jie ɩn chiine yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa be ɛ.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ, “Yɩn yin ka tẽe, maa yin saaju. A wɛr nyã pɔ lɛ yɩ yi, maa mɩ ba yi a wɛr nyã pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: N 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka yɩn kpin naa yɩ yelbier, ala ɩ yaa sɔɔ de ma nɩ a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka n ɩ naa ɛ, sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, yɩn kpin naa yɩ yelbier.”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɛ sʊʊr wʊ, “An fʊ ɩ?” A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “N ɩ naa a 'lɔ ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a kõr jaa.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: N tara na yɔɔ ɩn taa 'yɛr tɔɔr a yɩ 'yɛr, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, ala ɩn wõ yi a wʊ sɛ̃ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Baa bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka a wʊ Sãa 'yɛr lɛ wʊ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Be a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩn wa 'mɔɔ a Nɩsaal Bie a saaju yɩn bɔ̃ɔ naa a nɩrɛ 'lɔ ɩn ɩ, na yɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka n ba ɩrɛ yele nɩ maa kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ naa a lɛ a Sãa na wiil ma.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma be naa n sɛ̃, waa bar ma n yõ ɛ, bojũu n ma ɩrɛ naa lɛ na pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ bala na sɔɔ de wʊ, “Ala ɩ yɩ sɔɔn turo a lɛ ɩn wiil yɩ, yɩn ɩ naa a n poturbo yelmãɛ.

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: Yɩn bɔ̃ɔn a yelmãɛ, ka a yelmãɛ for yɩ bar ka yɩ so yɩ mãɛ.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Sɩn ɩ naa Abraham yɔn, na saa ɩ nɩrɛ jaa gbãgbaar ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ fʊ 'yɛr ɩka ban for sɩn bar ka sɩ so sɩ mãɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ jaa na maal dɛɛr ɩn a dɛɛr gbãgbaa.

english_verse: And slaves don't stay in the family forever, though the Son will always remain in the family.
translation_verse: Gbãgbaa maa be a yir kor ɛ, a bie 'lɔ ma ben be kor.

english_verse: If the Son gives you freedom, you are free!
translation_verse: Ala wa ɩ a Bie for fʊn bar, fʊn son fʊ mɩ sɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn na yɩn ɩ Abraham yɔn tɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ kʊ ma, bojũu yaa sɔɔ a n 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Maa 'yɛrɛ yɩ naa a lɛ ɩn nyɛ a n Sãa sɛ̃, ka yɩn mɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ yɩn wõ a yɩ sãa sɛ̃.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Abraham lɛ ɩ a sɩ sãa.” Be a Yesu 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ Abraham bibiir lɛ yɩ ta ɩ, yɩn taa maal a lɛ a Abraham na dɔ̃ɔ maal.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Yɩ ben bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ kʊ ma a nɩrɛ na 'yɛr yɩ a yelmãɛ ɩn wõ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Abraham ba dɔ̃ɔ maal lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Yɩ ɩrɛ naa a lɛ a yɩ sãa mãɛ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ.” Ka ba 'yɛr, “Saa ɩ sɛ̃sɛ̃ bibiir ɛ, sɩn Sãa tɛɛ sɩn tara lɛ Nãaŋmɩn.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ta ɩ a yɩ Sãa, yɩn taa nʊ̃ ma naa. Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ n yi naa be be ka a pʊ̃pãanyã. N ba waan a n mãɛ yuor ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Bo lɛ so ka a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ba chaar kʊ yɩ ɛ? Bojũu yaa tʊ̃ɔ wõ a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: A yɩ sãa ɩn tɩɩ, a yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ maal a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ. An yi a pielfʊ jaa nɩkʊrɔ lɛ wʊ ɩ, waa tara yelmãɛ ɛ, yelmãɛ bãlãa jaa ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. 'Lɔ wa ŋmaara a jire, lɛ wʊ be, jir ŋmara lɛ wʊ ɩ, na wʊ ɩ a jie a jaa sãa.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa na 'yɛrɛ a yelmãɛ yaa sɔɔ de ma ɛ.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: A yɩ ãsʊɔ na 'yɛr ɩka wʊ nyɛn ɩn maal dɛɛr ɔ? Ala ɩ yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ, bo lɛ so ka yaa sɔɔ de ma ɛ?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn tʊɔr wõnõ naa a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ. Yɩn ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊɔr ɛ, yaa wõnõ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ ɩka Samariya lɛ fʊ yi na fʊ tara a sɩdɛɛr.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Maa ba sɩdɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ naa a n Sãa, tɩ yɩn ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma ɛ.

english_verse: years old!” they said. “How could you have seen Abraham?”
translation_verse: ) sɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ na fʊ nyɛ Abraham?”

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, ala ɩ nɩrɛ turo naa maa 'yɛr, wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ kũu ɛ.”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛ pãa 'yɛrɛ, “Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa fʊn tara a sɩdɛɛr. Abraham kpi naa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ kpi, tɩchɛ ka fʊ 'yɛr ɩka ala ɩ nɩrɛ turo naa a fʊ 'yɛr wʊ kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ kũu ɛ.

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ bɛrma gar a sɩ sãa Abraham bɩɩ? Wʊ kpi naa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ mɩ kpi. An fʊ tɩɛr ɩka fʊ pãa ɩ naa?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If I honored myself, it would mean nothing. My Father is the one who honors me. You claim that he is your God,
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ n ben 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a n mãɛ tɩɩr, a n tɩɩr na ɩn pɔrɔ. A n Sãa 'lɔ yɩn 'yɛrɛ ɩka a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ, 'lɔ lɛ kʊrɔ ma a tɩɩr.

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ gba ɛ, maa bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa. Ala ɩ n 'yɛr naa ɩka n ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ, ɩn ɩ naa jir ŋmara a yɩ kaar. Tɩchɛ maa bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa, naa turo a wʊ 'yɛr bie.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, sɛrɛ tɩ ba wa dɔɔ Abraham, ka maa dɔ̃ɔ be be.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: A nyãna, ka ba wob kʊsɩbɛ ɩka ba lɔb wʊ kʊ, tɩchɛ ka a Yesu sɔɔl fʊɔl na wʊ yi a be a ba puorfʊ yir pɔ.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Yesu na chiine a lɛ, wʊ nyɛn daba ban dɔɔ ka wʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: “No, it wasn't!” Jesus answered. “But because of his blindness, you will see God work a miracle for him.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A daba nyã ba maal dɛɛr ɛ, a wʊ sãa naa ma mɩ ba maal dɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩn a lɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ na tʊ̃ a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: An chɛnɛ ɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, sɩn tʊ̃ naa a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma tʊ̃mɔ̃. Wɛr na sɔb naa ka nɩrɛ kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃mɔ̃ tʊ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: Ɩn chɛnɛ be a wɛr pɔ, maa lɛ a wɛr chãa.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa 'yɛr a lɛ baar, wʊ chir nataar bun tãn a tẽe na wʊ bɛ a daba nɩbie.

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “Chen, tɩ pɛɛ a Siloam kʊ̃ɔ pɔ.” A Siloam par lɛ, Tʊ̃fʊ. Wʊ chen tɩ pɛɛ nyɛrɛ wa a yir.

english_verse: The man's neighbors and the people who had seen him begging wondered if he really could be the same man.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩbɔ̃ɔnsɩ bala na dɔ̃ɔ ma nyɛ wʊ na sʊɔrɔ, ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “A ba ɩ a daba nyãna lɛ ma sʊɔrɔ ɛ?”

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Bamɩne 'yɛr ɩka 'lɔ lɛ, ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛr, “Nɩnyɛtaa lɛ.” Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ.”

english_verse: “Then how can you see?” they asked.
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Ŋmɩnɛ a nɩbie ɩrɛ wa yuo fʊ?”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr kʊ ba. “Daba ban bʊɔlɔ Yesu lɛ bu tãn bɛ ma a nɩbie tɩ 'yɛr ma ɩka n chen a Siloam tɩ pɛɛ. Lɛ lɛ n chen tɩ pɛɛ naa nyɛrɛ.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ wʊ be?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “N ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: A bɩbir 'lɔ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ bu a tãn na wʊ yuon a daba nɩbie ɩn a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ka Faraseemɩne sʊʊr a daba lɛ wʊn ɩrɛ wa nyɛrɛ. Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Tãn lɛ wʊ bɛ ma a nɩbie ka n pɛɛ be nyɛrɛ.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Ka a Faraseemɩne bamɩne 'yɛr, “A daba nyã ba yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, waa sɔ̃nɔ̃ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir ɛ.” Tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne mɩ sʊʊr, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ yelbe-ɩrɛ na tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a nɛ'maa yele nyã?” Na ba ŋma jiir ayi.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Ka ba lɩɛb sʊʊr a daba, “Bo fʊ tara na 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr? Fʊ nɩbie ba lɛ wʊ yuo.” Ka a daba 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ lɛ wʊ ɩ.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ ba sɔɔ de ɛ ɩka a daba dɔ̃ɔ jɔ̃ɔ tɩ wa nyɛrɛ ɛ, ka ba bʊɔl a sãa naa ma.

english_verse: and asked them, “Is this the son that you said was born blind? How can he now see?”
translation_verse: Ba sʊʊr ba naa, “A yɩ bie lɛ a nyã ɔ? A nyã lɛ yɩ dɔɔ ka wʊ ɩ a jɔ̃ɔ? Ka ŋmɩnɛ wʊ ɩrɛ wa nyɛrɛ?”

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Ka a sãa naa ma 'yɛr, “Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ bie lɛ, a sɩ dɔɔ wʊ ka wʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ lɛ wʊn ɩrɛ wa nyɛrɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã saa bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, bɩɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yuo wʊ a nɩbie saa bɔ̃ɔ ɛ. Waa ɩ bibile ɛ, yɩ sʊʊr wʊ, wʊn 'yɛr kʊ wʊ mãɛ.”

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: A Faraseemɩne lɛ bʊɔl naa a daba 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a jɔ̃ɔ a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ 'yɛr wʊ, “'Yɛr yelmãɛ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa a daba nyã na ɩ yelbe-ɩrɛ.”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ wʊ ɩn yelbe-ɩrɛ bɩɩ waa ɩ ɛ, n ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, yelbʊ̃'yen ɩn bɔ̃ɔ nɩ nyã. N dɔ̃ɔ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, n nyɛrɛ naa.”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Bo lɛ wʊ ɩ fʊ? Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊ ɩ yuo fʊ a nɩbie?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr, “N ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr tɩ yaa chɛlɛ ɛ. Bo yɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ lɛ wõ ka a ɩ go? Yɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ mɩ lɩɛb a wʊ poturbo bɩɩ?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: A ba tʊrɔ wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a wʊ poturo, sɩn ɩ naa Mosesɩ poturbo.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛr kʊ Mosesɩ, tɩchɛ a daba 'lɔ saa bɔ̃ɔ jie wʊn yi gba ɛ.”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Ka a daba 'yɛr, “A 'maa man nɛɛ yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ jie wʊn yi ɛ, tɩ yuo ma a nɩbie.

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn ba chɛlɛ a yelbe-ɩrbɛ ɛ. Wʊ ma chɛlɛ naa a bala na joro wʊ tɩ maala a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa ba dɔ̃ɔ wõ ɩka ba yuon nɩrɛ ban lɔ̃ɔ dɔɔn jɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a daba nyã ba ta yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ naa tʊ̃ɔ bon jaa maal ɛ.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ 'yɛr kʊ a daba, “A fʊ̃ʊ, yelbier pɔ lɛ ba dɔɔ fʊ, ŋmɩnɛ fʊn ɩrɛ wa wiil sɩ,” tɩ dii wʊ bar a ba pɔ.

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu na wõ ɩka ba dii naa a daba bar, wʊ bɔ wʊn wa nyɛ wʊ, na wʊ sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ sɔɔn de a Nɩsaal Bie ɔ?”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Ka a daba sʊʊr wʊ, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ an lɛ, wiil ma ka n sɔɔ de wʊ.”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Fʊ nyɛ wʊ naa pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩrɛ jaa, 'lɔ lɛ 'yɛrɛ nɩ fʊ.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a daba pãa 'yɛr, “N Soro n sɔɔn de,” tɩ gbur dumo puor wʊ.

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr, “'Yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie lɛ n wa ka a wɛr pɔ. Jɔ̃n na nyɛrɛ naa ka nɩbinyɛrɛ mɩ lɩɛb ɩ jɔ̃n.”

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard Jesus say this, they asked, “Are we blind?”
translation_verse: Ka a Faraseemɩne bamɩne na be a wʊ sɛ̃ wõ a lɛ na ba sʊʊr, “Bo ya! A sɩn mɩ ɩn a jɔ̃n ɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “Ala ɩ yɩ ta ɩn jɔ̃n, yɩ kʊ naa tara chɛfʊ a dɛɛr pɔ ɛ. Tɩchɛ, yɩn ben 'yɛr ɩka yɩ nyɛrɛ naa, yɩ chɛnɛ na be a yɩ dɛɛr pɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na maa tu a piir jɔɔ dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ tɩ do a dachin kpɛ, ɩn nãnyie nɩ nɩfara.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: A dɔ̃dɔ̃guro ma yuon a pãn kʊ a pɛchinɛ, ka a piir chɛlɛ a wʊ kɔkɔr. Wʊ maa bʊɔl naa a wʊ piir yoe, na wʊ ŋmaa ba yin.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ wa ŋmaa a wʊ piir a jaa ka a yi, wʊ ma den nie ka a turo wʊ, bojũu ba bɔ̃ɔ naa a wʊ kɔkɔr.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ba kʊ̃ wa tu sãan jaa ɛ, ban jon yi a wʊ sɛ̃ bojũu baa bɔ̃ɔ sãan kɔkɔr ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr ba go, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, maa lɛ a piir dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: A bala ba jaa na dɔ̃ɔ ma nie wa ɩn nãnyisɩ nɩ nɩfarba, tɩchɛ a piir ba chɛlɛ ba ɛ.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Maa lɛ a dɔ̃dɔr, nɩrɛ jaa na tu ma kpɛ, wʊn nyɛn faafʊ. Wʊn ma kpɛ̃n tɩ yi na wʊ nyɛrɛ bʊ̃diir.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Nãnyie ma wa naa ɩka wʊ wa ju, na wʊ kʊ, tɩ sɔ̃ɔ bar. Maa wa naa ka ban nyɛ nyɛvʊr, na ba nyɛ wʊ tɩ põn bar.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Maa lɛ a pɛchiin sʊ̃, a pɛchiin sʊ̃ sɔɔn kpi a wʊ piir 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: A pɛchinɛ 'lɔ ban yara, waa so a piir ɛ. 'Lɔ wa nyɛ gbõgboro na waara, wʊ ma tɛɛn a piir bar tɩ jo, ka a gbõgboro yɛ̃yɛl a piir tɩ nyɔɔr amɩne.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Wʊ ma jon a lɛ an ɩ libie tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃, a piir yele ba bã wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and they know me.
translation_verse: “Maa ɩ naa a pɛchiin sʊ̃, n bɔ̃ɔ naa a n piir, ka n piir mɩ bɔ̃ɔ ma.

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Sãa na bɔ̃ɔ ma ka n mɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Sãa, ɩn sɔɔn kpi a piir 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: N tara na piir amɩne na ba be a jɔɔ nyã pɔ ɛ, ɩn waan ba naa, ka ba mɩ wa chɛlɛ a n kɔkɔr, ka ba ɩ pɛgbul bʊ̃'yen na ba tara pɛchiin bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: A n Sãa na nʊ̃ ma par nɩ nyã, n sɔɔ naa na kpi tɩ lɛ ir ɩ vʊr go.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ baa faara wʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ maa mãɛ lɛ sɔɔ na kpi. N tara na kpɛ̃ɔ na bar a nyɛvʊr naa lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ na de wʊ go. A nyã lɛ a n Sãa 'yɛr ma ɩka n ɩ.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nyã lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Juu nɩbɛ ŋma dẽ dẽ.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Ka a ba yɔɔ 'yɛrɛ ɩka, “Sɩdɛɛr lɛ wʊ tara, na wʊ gele, bo 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ chɛlɛ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne 'yɛrɛ, “A nyãna ba ɩ nɩrɛ na tara sɩdɛɛr 'yɛr ɛ, a sɩdɛɛr na tʊ̃ɔn yuo jɔ̃ɔ nɩbie ɔ?”

english_verse: That winter, Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Temple Festival.
translation_verse: A ɩ naa uon ka ba maala a ba puorfʊ yir Pɔlfʊ lɔ̃ɔ di be a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Ka Yesu be be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar ãsʊɔ pɔ, na wʊ yʊɔrɔ a be ban bʊɔlɔ a Solomon Jɛ̃bɛr.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Be a Juu nɩbɛrɛ bamɩne ŋmaa jilʊ̃ wʊ sʊrɔ, “A baalfʊ nyã fʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ, dabor an wa baar? Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa 'lɔ, 'yɛr kʊ sɩ chãa pɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr, “N dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr yɩ, yɩn lɛ ba sɔɔ de ɛ. A nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃ nɩ a n Sãa yuor, 'yɛr naa n 'yɛr.

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn lɛ ba sɔɔ de ɛ, bojũu yaa ɩ a n piir ɛ.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: A n piir ma chɛlɛ naa a n kɔkɔr, n bɔ̃ɔ ba naa ka ba ma turo ma.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: N kʊ ban nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Ba kʊ̃ wɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ba 'loo faa a n nũu pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: A n Sãa 'lɔ na de ba kʊ ma, wʊ gar bomo a jaa. Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ba 'loo faa a n Sãa nũu pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Maa naa n Sãa jaa ɩn bʊ̃'yen.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ wob kʊsɩbɛ ɩka ba lɔb wʊ go.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “N tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃yɔɔ yi a Sãa sɛ̃, buor sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ pãa be lɔɔrɔ ma?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “Saa lɔɔrɔ fʊ a anyã ãsʊɔ jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ fʊn fere sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn yuor, tɩ mɩ ɩ nɩsaal.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: In your Scriptures doesn't God say, “You are gods”?
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “A ba sɛb a yɩ Nɛɛ pɔ ɩka, ‘N 'yɛr naa ɩka, yɩ ɩn ŋmɩmɛ ɛ?’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: You can't argue with the Scriptures, and God spoke to those people and called them gods.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl naa a bala a wʊ 'yɛr, na wa a ba sɛ̃, ŋmɩmɛ, Nãaŋmɩn sɛɛr ba be na wa sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a 'lɔ a Sãa na kaa ir a wʊ bɔfʊ pɔ, na wʊ tʊ̃ ka a wɛr pɔ. Bo lɛ so ka yaa bara ma ɛ, bojũu n 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn Bie lɛ n ɩ?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa sɔɔ de ma ɛ, ala ɩ n ba maala a lɛ a Sãa na maala ɛ.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ n tʊ̃ naa, yɩn gba ba sɔɔ de ma ɛ, yɩ sɔɔ de a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, yɩn bɔ̃ɔn a par ɩka a Sãa ben a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ka n mɩ be a Sãa 'yɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Ka ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ a wʊ nyɔɔfʊ go, tɩ chɛ ka wʊ fʊɔl yi.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu lɩɛb gɔ̃ɔ a Jordan man gɔ̃ɔn, a jie 'lɔ a Jɔɔn na dɔ̃ɔ suoro a nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ na wʊ jɛ̃ a be,

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: ka nɩyɔɔ wa a wʊ sɛ̃ wa 'yɛrɛ, “Jɔɔn gba ba dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ nɛ 'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɛ, a ala a jaa wʊn 'yɛr a daba nyã 'yɛr, ɩn yelmãɛ.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a nɩyɔɔ sɔɔ de wʊ.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Ka a yɛpɔbɔ tʊ̃ 'yɛr a Yesu, “Sɩ Soro, a fʊ baraa bɩɛrɛ naa.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Yesu na wõ a lɛ, a wʊ 'yɛr, “A baal nyã ba ɩ kũu baal ɛ, tɩ an wiil Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr tɩ mɩ vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn Bie yuor yi.”

english_verse: But he stayed where he was for two more days.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ wʊn wõ a Lajarusɩ baal tɩ na wʊ chɛnɛ jãnɛ a be wʊn be ber ayi.

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ poturbo, “Yɩ ɩ a sɩ lɩɛb chen a Judiya.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a poturbo 'yɛr, “Wiwile, daar yɛ̃ yɛ̃ nyãna ba lɛ a Juu nɩbɛrɛ ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba lɔb fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a fʊ lɛ chiine a be go?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A ba ɩ a bɩbir tara na a wʊ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ chaarfʊ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ? Nɩrɛ wa chiine a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ wʊ maa ŋme gbɛr ɛ, wʊ nyɛ naa a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ chãa.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ tãsɔɔ lɛ wʊ chiine, wʊn ŋmen gbɛr, bojũu waa tara chãa ɛ.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa 'yɛr a lɛ baar, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A sɩ baraa Lajarusɩ gur naa, tɩchɛ ɩn chen tɩ sãɩ wʊ.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ poturbo 'yɛr, “Sɩ Soro, ala ɩ wʊ gur naa, wʊn ir naa.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Yesu 'lɔ 'yɛr naa ɩka wʊ kpi naa, tɩchɛ ka a poturbo 'lɔ tɩɛr ɩka a gʊ̃ɔ sʊ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: A yɩ jũu, a nʊ̃mɔ̃ ma naa ɩn ba be be ɛ, ka yɩ na sɔɔ de ma. Tɩchɛ, yɩ ɩ a sɩ chen a wʊ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: A wʊ poturo ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Tomasɩ na ba lɛ bʊɔlɔ wʊ Naa 'yɛr kʊ a bala na chɛ, “Yɩ ɩ a sɩ 'mataa chiin wʊ mɩ tɩ kpi.”

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Yesu na wa ta a be, wʊ nyɛn ka a ɩ ba ũu naa Lajarusɩ maal ber anaar.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Betanɩ nɩ a Jerusalɛm mɩ ba jãa ɛ.

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ yɔɔ chen ɩka ba tɩ puor a Mata nɩ a Mɛɛr a ba yɛdaba kuor.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Mata na wa wõ ɩka Yesu waara naa, wʊ yin tɩ tuor wʊ, tɩchɛ kaa Mɛɛr 'lɔ jãnɛ a yir.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Mata 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “N Soro, fʊ̃ʊ ta dɔ̃ɔ be ka, a n yɛdaba kʊ̃ naa kpi ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A fʊ yɛdaba na ir naa a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Mata 'yɛr kʊ a Yesu, “N bɔ̃ɔn na wʊn na ir a kũn irfʊ daar, a ber baaraa sɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Maa lɛ ɩ a kũu pɔ irfʊ, nɩ nyɛvʊr, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ de ma, 'lɔ kpi gba, tɩ wʊn tara na nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Ka a Mata 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ, n Soro, n sɔɔn de ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn Bie, 'lɔn na wa ka a wɛr pɔ.”

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa 'yɛr a lɛ baar wʊ lɩɛb kul tɩ bʊl 'yɛr kʊ a yɛbile Mɛɛr, “A wiwile ben ka tɩ sʊrɔ fʊ.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: A Mɛɛr na wa wõ a lɛ, ka wʊ vaa ir chen a Yesu sɛ̃.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Yesu ba kpɛ a tẽe pɔ sɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ chɛnɛ ara a be a Mata na tuor wʊ.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ bala na wa a kuor puorfʊ jie be a Mɛɛr sɛ̃ a yir, na nyɛ a lɛ wʊn vaa ir yire, ka ba turo wʊ tɩɛr ɩka a yaa par lɛ wʊ chiine a kõn jie.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Mɛɛr na tɩ ta a jie nyɛ a Yesu a be, wʊ gbur dumo a Yesu niem tɩ 'yɛr, “N Soro, fʊ̃ʊ ta dɔ̃ɔ be ka, a n yɛdaba kʊ̃ naa kpi ɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Yesu na nyɛ a lɛ wʊn kõnõ ka a Juu nɩbɛ bala na bɩɛl wʊ mɩ kõnõ, nɩbaal kpɛ wʊ naa ka a suur nyɔɔ wʊ.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: A wʊ sʊʊr ba, “Nyɩnɛ yɩ ũu wʊ?” Ka ba 'yɛr, “N Soro, wa nyɛ a jie.”

english_verse: Jesus started crying,
translation_verse: Ka Yesu kõ.

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ pãa 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Nyɛ lɛ wʊn nʊ̃ a Lajarusɩ.”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka bamɩne pãa 'yɛr, “Wʊn dɔ̃ɔ yuo a jɔ̃ɔ nɩbie, kaa ɩ wʊ kʊ̃ naa tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a Lajarusɩ ta kpi bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Ka nɩbaal kpɛ a Yesu, ka wʊ tɔɔ ta a yaa par. Kʊsɩr bɔɔ lɛ, ka ba 'mɔɔ a kʊsɩr ãsʊɔ pɔɔ a nɛɛ.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Yɩ bil a kʊsɩr bar.” Tɩchɛ a Mata an ɩ a wʊ yɛdaba lɛ kpi, ka wʊ 'yɛr, “N Soro, wʊn nyuro naa, ber anaar nɩ dɩna ban ũu wʊ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Ka Yesu 'yɛr, “N ba 'yɛr fʊ ɩka fʊ̃ʊ sɔɔ de, fʊn nyɛn Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr ɛ?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba bil a kʊsɩr bar, a Yesu kaa saaju tɩ 'yɛr, “N Sãa, fʊ son puorfʊ, fʊn wõ a n sʊɔrfʊ.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa fʊn wõnõ a n sʊɔrfʊ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛr naa ka a na sʊ̃ʊ a nɩbɛ banyãna na ara a ka, a ba sɔɔ de ɩka, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Yesu na 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ wʊ bʊɔl kpɛ̃ɔ jaa, “Lajarusɩ, wa yi.”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka a kũu yi, ka a gbɛɛ naa nuur ban vil a fɔpɩɛl pɔɔ ka a fɔbaa mɩ pɔɔ a ju. A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ yaar a kũu fɔɔr bar wʊ ka wʊ chen.”

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a Juu nɩbɛ bala na wa ɩka ba wa puor a Mɛɛr, nyɛn a lɛ a Yesu na ɩ, a ba sɔɔ wʊ.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne chen a Faraseemɩne sɛ̃ tɩ man a lɛ a Yesu na maal.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Faraseemɩne nɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ bʊɔl taa lɔ̃ɔfʊ na ba 'yɛr, “Ŋmɩnɛ sɩn ɩ, a daba nyã na ben tʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ a nɩtɔ̃?

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩn be bar wʊ ka wʊ maala lɛ, nɩrɛ jaa na sɔɔn a wʊ yele, a Worom nɩbɛ wa wõ a yele ban wa wɛl sɩ naa a jisʊ̃ nɩ a tẽe bar.”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Ka a ba ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Kayafasɩ na ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a yuon 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ 'yɛr, “Yaa tara tɩɛr jaa ɛ.

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a sɛɛ naa ka nɩbʊ̃'yen na kpi kʊ a nɩyɔɔ gar a nɩyɔɔ ba jaa na wɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: A nyã ba yi a wʊ mãɛ sɛ̃ ka wʊ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊn ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a yuon 'lɔ, ala lɛ wʊ de nie dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka a Yesu na kpin kʊ a Juu nɩbʊrɔ ba jaa.

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ bala tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ lɔ̃ɔ taa a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir bala na yɛ̃yɛl na wʊ maal ba a ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: An yi a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ba bʊɔrɔ na sɔr na kʊ a Yesu.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: A lɛ juu Yesu ba lɛ yʊɔrɔ chãa pɔ a Juu nɩbɛ jie ɛ, tɩ chen jiyuo na gbʊr a mɔgɔ̃ɔ na wʊ tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a tẽbile ban bʊɔlɔ Eferɛm, be lɛ wʊ tɩ 'mataa jɛ̃n a wʊ poturbo.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ Gõl Bar Difʊ gbʊr naa, ka ba yɔɔ yi a tẽbil do a Jerusalɛm tɩ pɔlɔ a ba mãɛ chɛlɛ nɩ a bɩbir.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Ba kaara na bʊɔrɔ a Yesu a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir, sʊrɔ taa, “Ŋmɩnɛ yɩ tɩɛr, wʊn wa naa a lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie bɩɩ?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a Faraseemɩne 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ jaa wa bɔ̃ɔ a jie a Yesu na be, wʊ 'yɛr ka ba tɩ nyɔɔ wʊ.”

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ sʊ̃ʊ ma tʊ̃, wʊ turo ma, jie jaa ɩn be a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sʊ̃nɔ̃ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃ mɩ na ben be. Ka a n Sãa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a 'lɔ na sʊ̃nɔ̃ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Ba 'mɛl bɛ vaɩ yi tuoro nɩ wʊ pãa chɩlɛ gɔ̃nɔ̃, “Yãan yooo, Nãaŋmɩn wʊ sʊ̃ʊ a 'lɔ wʊn tʊ̃. (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yesu nyɛn a bʊ̃pɔl na wʊ do jãnɛ nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Be lɛ Mɛɛr de kãnyũu vɩla daa na ɩ tuo wa pʊr 'yɔ̃ɔ a Yesu gbɛɛ pɔ, tɩ lɩɛb a jukɔɔl fɩɛlɛ nɩ ka a nyũu de a yir wʊ jaa.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Ba maal bʊ̃diir kʊ wʊ a be, ka a Mata põnõ a bʊ̃diir. Lajarusɩ pʊɔ naa a nɩbɛ bala na lɔ̃ɔ jɛ̃n Yesu a bʊ̃diir jie.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a wʊ poturo ãsʊɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Judas na yi a Isɩkariyot, 'lɔ lɛ na wa gar 'yɔ̃ɔ a Yesu sʊʊr,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Bar a pɔɔ jaa jomm, wʊ bin a kãnyũu nyãna gun a n ũufʊ bɩbir.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: A nɔ̃n dẽme na ben a yɩ sɛ̃ bɩbir jaa, tɩchɛ maa kʊ̃ be a yɩ sɛ̃ bɩbir jaa ɛ.”

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Ba chen a Filip na yi a Betɩsaida na be a Galilee wɛr pɔ sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka sɩ nyɛ a Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Faraseemɩne pãa 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Yɩ nyɛ, saa lɛ tʊɔrɔ bon jaa maala ɛ. Nyɛ, a nɩbɛ ba jaa ben turo wʊ.”

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Sãa, kʊ a fʊ yuor tɩɩr.” Be lɛ a kɔkɔr pãa 'yɛr yi saaju, “N dɔ̃ɔ kʊ wʊ a tɩɩr, ɩn lɛ kʊ wʊ naa a tɩɩr go.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: “Wʊ jɔ̃ɔn a ba nɩbie bar. Na wʊ pɔɔ a ba tɩɛr bar, baa lɛ nyɛrɛ ɛ. Ba kʊ̃ mɩ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a par a ba tɩɛr pɔ ɛ, na ba lɩɛb wa a n sɛ̃ ka n sãa ba ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Wɛr na wa chaar, a nɩyɔɔ bala na wa a Gõl Bar Difʊ jie, wõ naa ɩka Yesu ben a sɔr pɔ waara a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “A yɩn Jerusalɛm nɩbɛ, yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ, Yɩ nyɛ a yɩ nãa na do bʊ̃pɔl waara nɩ.” (Jekariya

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: A wʊ poturbo ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna a jaa par ɛ, tɩ a Yesu na wa ir ɩ vʊr, ba tɩɛr yuo ɩka anyãna lɛ ba dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka ba mɩ maal a lɛ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a nɩyɔɔ yi tuoro wʊ, bojũu ba wõ naa ɩka wʊ tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Philip told Andrew. Then the two of them went to Jesus and told him. The Son of Man Must Be Lifted Up
translation_verse: Filip chen tɩ 'yɛr kʊ Andiru ka ba 'mataa chen tɩ 'yɛr a Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “A sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ka Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ a Nɩsaal Bie tɩɩr.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, chibir baa ũu tẽe ɛ, wʊn chɛnɛ na ɩ a chibir bʊ̃'yen. Tɩchɛ 'lɔ wa lo tẽe kpi, wʊ ma dɔɔn chibiyɔɔ.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ a wʊ nyɛvʊr na bɔr wʊ naa, tɩchɛ 'lɔ na 'laar a wʊ nyɛvʊr a wɛr nyã pɔ, wʊn tara na a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: “Pʊ̃pãanyã, n pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩ n 'yɛr bo? N 'yɛr ɩka a Sãa wʊ faa ma a sɔ̃ɔ nyãna pɔ bɩɩ? Kai, a sɔ̃ɔ nyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n wa.

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala na ara a be wõ naa na ba 'yɛr, saa lɛ tãna, ka bamɩne mɩ 'yɛr malaka ãsʊɔ lɛ 'yɛrɛ nɩ wʊ.

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “A ba ɩ maa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a kɔkɔr 'yɛr ɛ, tɩ yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ka a wɛr nyã 'yɛr na tɔɔr. Pʊ̃pãanyã, ban ir naa wɛr nyã nãa Satan bar.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa, bala wa 'mɔɔ ma a saaju, ɩn tɔɔn nɩbɛ ba jaa waan a n sɛ̃.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɛr a lɛ na wʊ wiil kũu 'lɔ tɔ wʊn na kpi.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Ka a nɩyɔɔ bala 'yɛr, “Sɩ wõn yi a Nɛɛ pɔ ɩka, a Nɩ-iraa naa 'lɔ na ben be kpo kpo, tɩ ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ a fʊ 'yɛr ɩka ban 'mɔɔn a Nɩsaal Bie a saaju? An lɛ a Nɩsaal Bie 'lɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: A Yesu pãa 'yɛr ba, “Ber bãlãa lɛ a chãa na be a yɩ sɛ̃, yɩ chiine a chãa pɔ wʊn chɛnɛ be be ka a libe taa pɔɔ yɩ ɛ. Nɩrɛ na be libe pɔ ba bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn chiine ɛ.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɔɔ de a chãa, yɩn chɛnɛ tara wʊ na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a chãa bibiir.” Yesu na wa 'yɛr a lɛ baar, wʊ yin chen a baa nyɛ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Yesu gba, wʊn tʊ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ a ba sɛ̃, tɩ baa chɛnɛ sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Ka a Isaiya 'yɛr ɩ yelmãɛ. Lɛ wʊn 'yɛr a kõr jaa, “Sɩ Soro an lɛ sɔɔ de a sɩ 'yɛr, an lɛ a Soro mɩ wiil a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ?” (Isaiya

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Ban ba tʊɔrɔ sɔɔrɔ ɛ, bojũu a Isaiya 'yɛr jie ãsʊɔ,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Isaiya 'yɛr naa nɩtɔ̃, bojũu wʊ dɔ̃ɔ nyɛ a Yesu tɩɩr na wʊ 'yɛrɛ a wʊ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: An sɔɔ be a lɛ tɩ nɩbɛrɛ yɔɔ bamɩne sɔɔn de wʊ. Tɩchɛ a Faraseemɩne dãbãɛ jũu baa 'lara 'yɛrɛ ɛ, ka ba taa dii ba bar a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr kpɛ̃ɔ jaa, “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ de ma a ba ɩ maa tɛɛ lɛ wʊ sɔɔ de ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ sɔɔn de a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nyɛ ma mɩ nyɛn a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: N wan a wɛr pɔ nɩtãa chãa, ka nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɔɔ de ma kʊ̃ lɛ be libe pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: “A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na wõ a n 'yɛr, tɩ na waa tu ɛ, n kʊ̃ tɔɔr a wʊ 'yɛr ɛ. N ba wa ɩka n wa tɔɔr a wɛr 'yɛr ɛ, tɩ n wa faa wʊ.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ ben be, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tɔr ma na waa de a n 'yɛr bie ɛ, a 'yɛr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ wʊ ju ɩn 'yɛr lɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ a 'yɛr a ber baaraa daar.

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: N ba 'yɛrɛ n mãɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛr naa a lɛ a Sãa na tʊ̃ ma 'yɛr ma ɩka n 'yɛr.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka a wʊ 'yɛr kʊrɔ na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Ala lɛ so ka n 'yɛr yɩ a lɛ nɛ a Sãa na 'yɛr.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, tɩ a Gõl Bar Difʊ ta, Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a wʊ bɩbir vɩɛ naa ka wʊn yi ka a wɛr nyã pɔ lɩɛb chen a Sãa sɛ̃. Wʊ nʊ̃ naa bala na ɩ a wʊ tʊɔr a wɛr nyã pɔ, wʊ nʊ̃ ban tɩ tãn a wʊ kũu.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Ba põn a jãanʊɔr bʊ̃diir, ka a ɩ tɩɩ de nie kpɛ Judas na ɩ Simon na yi Isɩkariyot bidaba ka wʊ tɩ gar 'yɔ̃ɔ a Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Sãa den bomo a jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nũu pɔ, an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ wʊ yi na wʊ lɛ lɩɛb chiine a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ bar a bʊ̃diir tɩ ir na wʊ yaa a fuu bar tɩ de fɔfɩɛlaa sɛ a sɩɛ pɔ.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Na wʊ pʊr kʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ la'yɛlma pɔ piel pɛɛrɛ a wʊ poturbo gbɛɛ tɩ ma fɩɛl a fɔfɩɛlaa 'lɔ wʊn sɛ a sɩɛ pɔ bar.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa ta a Simon Pita ka wʊ 'yɛr, “N Soro, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ na pɛɛ a maa gbɛɛ ɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “Faa bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ ɩn ɩrɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊn wa bɔ̃ɔn daar kɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita 'yɛr, “Kai, faa be na wa pɛɛ a n gbɛɛ ɛ.” A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Maa ba pɛɛ a fʊ gbɛɛ ɛ, saa lɛ be taa ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Nɩrɛ na so kʊ̃ɔ baar gbɛɛ tɛɛ lɛ wʊ ma wa pɛɛ, a wʊ ãgãn wʊ jaa yi naa. A yɩn mɩ yi naa an ba ɩ yɩ jaa lɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ̃ɔn a lɔn na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, ala lɛ so ka wʊ 'yɛr ɩka a ba ɩ ba jaa lɛ yi ɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Wʊn wa pɛɛ a ba jaa gbɛɛ baar, wʊ lɛ den a fuu su tɩ jãnɛ nɩ a wʊ jie, tɩ sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃ ɩn ɩ par ɔ?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma bʊɔl ma naa Wiwile bɩɩ Soro, yelmãɛ yɩ 'yɛr an ɩ a lɛ n ɩ.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: N maal wiil yɩ ɩka yɩ maala a lɛ ɩn ɩ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, gbãgbaa ba ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ gar a wʊ soro ɛ. Tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ mɩ ba ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ gar a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: “Yɩ jaa ba lɛ n 'yɛrɛ ɛ, n bɔ̃ɔ naa a bala ɩn ir. Tɩchɛ lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ na ɩ naa a lɛ an sɛb, ‘A 'lɔ ɩn lɔ̃ɔ dire nɩ na lɩɛb ɩ ma bier.’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: “N 'yɛr yɩn a pʊ̃pãanyã tɩchɛ ka a ba ta sɛrɛ ɛ, ala wa ta ka yɩ sɔɔ de ma ɩka Maa lɛ.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Ka a poturo 'lɔ dɩɛl a Yesu tɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “N Soro, an lɛ fʊ 'yɛrɛ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Yesu na 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ baar a wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ naa ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, a yɩ ãsʊɔ na tɩ gar 'yɔ̃ɔ ma.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: A Yesu poturo ãsʊɔ wʊn nʊ̃ na jɛ̃ gbɛb wʊ,

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: 'lɔ lɛ a Simon Pita 'lɩɩr 'yɛr, “Sʊʊr wʊ kaa, an lɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ?”

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: An ɩ a Judas lɛ tara a ba libie wʊɔ, ka bamɩne tɩɛr ɩka Yesu tɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ wʊ ɩka wʊ da bon kɔ̃ɔ waan a ba wa maal a lɔ̃ɔ di jie bɩɩ wʊ kʊ nɔ̃n dẽme bon kɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: A lɛ a Judas na wa de a paanʊ̃ɔ baar wʊ yi naa, tãsɔɔ mɩ lɛ.

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nyɛn tɩɩr tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ naa a Bie tɩɩr, wʊn maal naa lɛ ajienaa.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: “N bibiir, n kʊ̃ lɛ be a yɩ sɛ̃ kor ɛ. Yɩn wa yʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ma tɩ a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ, lɛ mɩ lɛ n 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a pʊ̃pãanyã. A jie 'lɔ ɩn chiine yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wa be ɛ.

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Ka a Simon Pita sʊʊr wʊ, “N Soro, nyɩnɛ fʊ chiine?” A Yesu 'yɛr, “A jie ɩn chiine, fʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tu a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ, tɩchɛ daar kɔ̃ɔ fʊn tu naa.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita sʊʊr wʊ, “N Soro, bo lɛ so ka n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tu fʊ a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ? Ɩn sɔɔn kpi a fʊ jũu?”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “Fʊn sɔɔn kpi kʊ ma? Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ ɩka nɔraa kʊ̃ kõ sɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ fʊ chiir gbɛɛ ata ɩka faa bɔ̃ɔ ma ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr kʊ a poturbo, “Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a yɩ pʊtɩɛr vavire ɛ, yɩ sɔɔ de Nãaŋmɩn na yɩ mɩ sɔɔ de ma.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: De yɔɔ be na a n Sãa yir, ala ba ta ɩ lɛ ɛ, n kʊ̃ naa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɛ. N chiine naa na tɩ chɔɔr a jie kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Maa wa chen tɩ chɔɔr a jie baar, ɩn lɩɛb wa de yɩ ka yɩ tɩ be a n sɛ̃, ka yɩ mɩ tɩ be a jie 'lɔ ɩn be.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a jie 'lɔ ɩn chiine sɔr.”

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Ka Tomasɩ sʊʊr wʊ, “N Soro, sɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ a jie fʊn chiine ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ sɩn ɩrɛ wa bɔ̃ɔ a sɔr?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ a sɔr, a yelmãɛ, nɩ a nyɛvʊr. Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ chen a Sãa sɛ̃, na waa tu a n jie ɛ.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ma naa, yɩn bɔ̃ɔn a Sãa mɩ. An be yi a dɩna yɩ bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa, na yɩ nyɛ wʊ mɩ.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Ka Filip 'yɛr, “N Soro, wiil sɩ a Sãa a lɛ na sɛɛ sɩ naa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Filip, a mɔ̃ faa bɔ̃ɔ ma ɔ, a kõr jaa ɩn be a yɩ sɛ̃? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na nyɛ ma nyɛn a Sãa. Ŋmɩnɛ fʊ 'yɛr ɩka n wiil yɩ a Sãa?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Faa sɔɔ de ɩka n ben a Sãa 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a Sãa mɩ be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ? A 'yɛrbie ala ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a ba ɩ maa mãɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩ a Sãa na be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɔɔ de a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka n be naa a Sãa 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a Sãa mɩ be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, bɩɩ yɩ sɔɔ de a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de ma, wʊn tʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala ɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃. Wʊn tʊ̃n tʊ̃bɛrɛ gar anyãna, bojũu n chiine naa a Sãa sɛ̃.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Bon jaa yɩn de a yuor sʊɔr, ɩn maal wʊn kʊ yɩ, ka a Sãa nyɛ tɩɩr tu a Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Yɩ de a n yuor sʊɔr ma bon jaa, ɩn maal wʊ naa.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: “Ala ɩ yɩ nʊ̃ ma naa, yɩn tu naa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Ka n sʊɔr a Sãa ka wʊ kʊ yɩ a Sʊ̃nɔ̃ ãsʊɔ, ka wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃ jaa kpo kpo.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: A yelmãɛ Sɩɛ 'lɔ, a wɛr nɩbɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ de wʊ ɛ, bojũu baa nyɛ wʊ ɛ, bɩɩ bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa an ɩ wʊ kpɩɛrɛ naa a yɩ sɛ̃, na wʊn be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: N kʊ̃ bar yɩ nɩtãa kpɩɩr ɛ, ɩn lɩɛb wa a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: A chɛn bãlãa a wɛr nɩbɛ kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛ ma go ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ na nyɛ ma naa. Bojũu ɩn tara na nyɛvʊr ka yɩn mɩ na a nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: A bɩbir 'lɔ wa vɩɛ, yɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka n be naa a n Sãa 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka yɩ mɩ be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka n mɩ be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na de a n 'yɛr na wʊ turo, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ ma. 'Lɔ jaa mɩ na nʊ̃ ma, a n Sãa mɩ na nʊ̃ wʊ naa, ka maa mɩ nʊ̃ a nɩnyɩnɛ, naa wiil wʊ a n mãɛ.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Judas, a ba ɩ a Judas 'lɔ na yi a Isɩkariyot ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ 'yɛr, “Tɩchɛ, n Soro bo lɛ so ka fʊ wiil a fʊ mãɛ kʊ sɩ, tɩ na faa wile a fʊ mãɛ kʊrɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa nʊ̃ ma naa, wʊn turo naa a n wiilfʊ. A n Sãa na nʊ̃ wʊ naa, ka sɩ wa be a wʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba nʊ̃ ma ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tu a n wiilfʊ ɛ. A 'yɛrbie anyãna yɩn wõ ba ɩ maa mãɛ 'yɛr ɛ, a yin a Sãa na tʊ̃ ma sɛ̃.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “A anyãna a jaa lɛ n 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, ɩn chɛnɛ be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Sʊ̃nɔ̃ 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ, 'lɔ lɛ a Sãa na tʊ̃n a n yuor. Wʊn wiil yɩ naa a yele a jaa, na wʊ mɩ jɛɔ yɩ ala a jaa ɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr yɩ.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: Nyã'maar pɔ lɛ n bar yɩ, a maa mãɛ nyã'maar lɛ n bar kʊ yɩ. N ba kʊ yɩ nɩtãa lɛ a wɛr nɩbɛ na ma kʊ ɛ. Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka yɩ tɩɛr vavire ɛ, ka yɩ joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: “Yɩ wõn a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka n chiine naa tɩ ɩn lɩɛb wa a yɩ sɛ̃. Ala ɩ yɩ ta nʊ̃ ma naa, yɩ pʊɔ naa pɛl naa ɩn chiine a Sãa sɛ̃ an ɩ a n Sãa lɛ bɛrma gar ma.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: N den nie 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, tɩchɛ ka a na wa ɩ, ala wa ɩ, yɩn sɔɔn de.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Maa nɩ yɩn kʊ̃ lɛ 'yɛr kor ɛ, bojũu a wɛr nyã nãa Satan waara naa, tɩ waa tara kpɛ̃ɔ a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a wɛr nɩbɛ na bɔ̃ɔn ɩka n nʊ̃ naa n Sãa naa maal a lɛ nɛ a n Sãa na 'yɔ̃ɔ ma. Yɩ ir a sɩ chen.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ ɩ a tɩwɔ̃n sʊ̃ ka a n Sãa mɩ ɩ a tɩkaara.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Wʊ ma ŋman a wilsɩ ala na be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩ ba wɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ. A wilsɩ ala mɩ na wɔ̃nɔ̃, wʊ ma chɔɔr 'mɛl bar ka a wɔ̃ yɔɔ.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'lɔ, a 'yɛr ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ chɔɔr yɩ naa.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Yɩ mar a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka n mɩ mar a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. Wile jaa kʊ̃ wɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃ a wʊ mãɛ ɛ, ka waa mar a tɩwɔ̃naa 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. Yɩn mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wɔ̃mɔ̃ wɔ̃ ɛ. Yɩn mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ wɔ̃mɔ̃ wɔ̃ ɛ, ka yaa mar a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: “Maa lɛ ɩ a tɩɛ, yɩn mɩ lɛ a wilsɩ, ala ɩ nɩrɛ be naa a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ka n mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊn wɔ̃n wɔ̃mɔ̃ yɔɔ. Maa ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bon jaa ɩ ɛ.
