english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, wʊ nyɛntãan a wile ban lɔb bar ka wʊ ko. Ba ma wob a wilbie anyãna lɔb 'yɔ̃ɔ bũu pɔ ka a di.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ be naa a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a n 'yɛr be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩ sʊɔr bon jaa yɩn bʊɔrɔ, yɩn nyɛ naa.

english_verse: When you become fruitful disciples of mine, my Father will be honored.
translation_verse: A nyã lɛ ɩ a n Sãa tɩɩr yɩn wa wɔ̃nɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃ yɔɔ, a mɩ nɩ wiil naa ɩka yɩ ɩ naa n poturbo.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: “Lɛ a Sãa na nʊ̃ ma, lɛ mɩ lɛ n nʊ̃ yɩ. Yɩ ara a n nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ tu naa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr, yɩn be naa a n nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ ɩn tu a n Sãa 'yɛr naa be a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ n 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ka n pʊpɛl be a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a yɩ chɩlfʊ mɩ sɛɛ.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: A n 'yɛr ɩn kʊrɔ yɩ nɩ nyã. Yɩ nʊ̃ taa nɩtãa lɛ ɩn nʊ̃ yɩ.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: A nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ na gar a nʊ̃fʊ a jaa lɛ nɩrɛ na sɔɔ kpi kʊ a wʊ barmɩne.

english_verse: And you are my friends, if you obey me.
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ ɩ a n barmɩne ala ɩ yɩ ɩrɛ naa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: N ba lɛ bʊɔlɔ yɩ gbãgbaar go ɛ, bojũu tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ba bɔ̃ɔ lɛ a wʊ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na ɩrɛ ɛ. N bʊɔlɔ yɩ naa n barmɩne, bojũu n 'yɛr yɩn a lɛ jaa ɩn wõ yi a n Sãa sɛ̃.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Yɩn baa ir ma ɛ, tɩchɛ maa lɛ ir yɩ ɩka yɩ tɩ wɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃, a wɔ̃mɔ̃ ala na kʊ̃ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ. A Sãa na pãa kʊ yɩ naa bon jaa yɩn sʊɔr a n yuor pɔ.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: A nyãna lɛ n 'yɛr ɩka, yɩ nʊ̃ taa.

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: “Ala wa ɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ 'laar yɩ naa, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka ba dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'laar ma.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr tɔ a 'yɛr 'lɔ ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ. Gbãgbaa ba ɩ kpɛ̃ɛ gar a wʊ soro ɛ. Ala ɩ ba ge ma naa, ba mɩ na ge yɩ naa. Ala ɩ ba tu naa a n wiilfʊ, ba mɩ a n tu naa a yɩ wiilfʊ mɩ.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ban maal yɩ naa a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ a n yuor jũu, bojũu baa bɔ̃ɔ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma ɛ.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n ba ta wa 'yɛr 'yɛr kʊ ba ɛ, ba kʊ̃ naa tara yeldɛɛr ɛ, pʊ̃pãanyã baa tara a ba yeldɛɛr lɩɛb tunfʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na 'laar ma mɩ 'laara a n Sãa mɩ.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Maa ta ba tʊ̃tʊ̃mɔ̃ na ba sɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ jaa na ba ɩ ɛ, ba kʊ̃ naa tara yeldɛɛr ɛ. Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã ba nyɛn a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃, tɩ chɛnɛ 'laar ma nɩ a n Sãa.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a anyã ɩ naa ka a ɩ yelmãɛ a lɛ an sɛb a Nɛɛ pɔ, ‘Ba 'laar man pɔrɔ.’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: “A Sʊ̃nɔ̃ na wa na, a 'lɔ na yi a Sãa sɛ̃. A yelmãɛ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊ yin a Sãa sɛ̃, wʊn 'yɛr yɩ naa a n 'yɛr.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɩ na 'yɛr naa a n 'yɛr bojũu yɩ ben a n sɛ̃ a pielfʊ jaa.”

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “A anyãna a jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, ka yɩ taa bar yi a sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Ban dii yɩn bar a ba lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie. Bɩbir kɔ̃ɔ na vɩɛ naa, ka ba kʊ yɩ tɩ tɩɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ ba tʊ̃.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Ban ɩ naa anyãna, bojũu baa bɔ̃ɔ a Sãa ɛ, bɩɩ a maa ɛ.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: N 'yɛrɛ yɩ naa anyãna ka a bɩbir wa vɩɛ yɩn tɩɛr tɔ, ɩka n dɔ̃ɔ kpãa yɩ. N ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɛ, bojũu n be naa a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: “Pʊ̃pãanyã n chiine naa a 'lɔ na tʊ̃ ma sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a ãsʊɔ jaa ba sʊʊr ma a jie ɩn chiine ɛ.

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: A anyãna ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ jũu lɛ a yɩ pʊʊr sɔ̃ɔ ɔ?

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a yɩ jũu a sɛɛ naa ɩka n chen. Maa ba chen ɛ, a Sʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊ̃ wa a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ maa chen ɩn tʊ̃ wʊn ka wʊ wa a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: The Spirit will come and show the people of this world the truth about sin and God's justice and the judgment.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ wa wa, wʊn wiil a wɛr nɩbɛ a ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka ba bɔr naa, lɛ a yeldɛɛr nɩ yeltorsɩ na be, nɩ lɛ wʊn na tɔɔr a ba 'yɛr.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Wʊn vɛ̃ naa a ba bɔ̃ɔ a ba yeldɛɛr ban ba sɔɔ de ma ɛ.

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: Ba bɔr naa nɩ a yeltorsɩ, bojũu n chiine naa a Sãa sɛ̃, yɩ kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛ ma go ɛ.

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: Ba mɩ bɔr naa nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ yele, bojũu a wɛr nyã nãa Satan 'yɛr tɔɔr naa.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: “N chɛnɛ na tara 'yɛr yɔɔ nɩ taa 'yɛr yɩ tɩchɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yelmãɛ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wa wa, wʊn wiil yɩ naa a yelmãɛ wʊ jaa par. Wʊ kʊ̃ 'yɛr a wʊ mãɛ 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩ wʊn 'yɛr naa a lɛ tɛɛ wʊn wõ, na wʊ lɛ 'yɛr yɩ a ala na wa.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Wʊn waan na tɩɩr wa kʊ ma, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a ala na ɩ a n bon.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Ala a jaa a Sãa na so ɩ naa a n bon. Ala lɛ so ka n 'yɛr ɩka a Sɩɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a ala na ɩ a n bon.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: “A chɛn bãlãa yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ ma go ɛ, ka a pãa lɛ ɩ bãlãa ka yɩ nyɛ ma go.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo bamɩne sʊrɔ taa, “A par nɩ bo wʊn 'yɛr ɛ ɩka, ‘A chɛn bãlãa yɩ kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛ ma go ɛ, ka a pãa lɛ ɩ bãlãa ka yɩ lɛ nyɛ wʊ go, nɩ wʊn lɛ 'yɛr ɩka, n chiine naa a Sãa sɛ̃?’ ”

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Ba chɛnɛ na sʊrɔ taa, “A chɛn bãlãa par nɩ bo? ‘Sãa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ,’ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa ban bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba sʊʊr wʊ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ sʊrɔ nɩ taa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka, ‘A chɛn bãlãa yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ ma go ɛ, ka a lɛ ɩ bãlãa ka yɩ nyɛ ma go’?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩn kõnõ na ka yɩ pʊʊr sɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ka a wɛr nɩbɛ chɩlɛ. Yɩ pʊʊr na sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ pʊsɔ̃ɔ na lɩɛb pʊpɛl.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Pɔɔ wa dɔɔrɔ ãgãn ma chɩrɛ wʊ naa ka a ɔɔrɔ wʊ bojũu a wʊ dɔɔfʊ bɩbir vɩɛ naa. Tɩchɛ 'lɔ wʊ dɔɔ baar, wʊ ma ĩin naa a wʊ dɔɔyɛ bojũu wʊ dɔɔn nɩrɛ a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ a yɩn mɩ, yɩ pʊʊr na sɔ̃ɔ naa a pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩchɛ ɩn lɛ wa nyɛ yɩn go ka yɩ pʊʊl pɛl, ka a nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ faa wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: A bɩbir 'lɔ wa vɩɛ, yɩ kʊ̃ lɛ sʊʊr ma bon go ɛ. Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a n Sãa na kʊ yɩn bon jaa yɩn sʊɔr a n yuor pɔ.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: An wa ta a pʊ̃pãanyã, yaa de a n yuor sʊɔr bon gba ɛ. Yɩ sʊɔr, yɩn nyɛ naa, ka yɩ pʊpɛl na sɛɛ.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: “Sʊkpar lɛ n lɔɔrɔ 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ a anyãna, a bɩbir wa vɩɛ, n kʊ̃ lɛ lɔb sʊkpar go ɛ, tɩchɛ ɩn 'yɛr yɩ naa a n Sãa 'yɛr chãa pɔ.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: A bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, yɩn sʊɔr naa nɩ a n yuor. N ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka maa lɛ na sʊɔr a Sãa kʊ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: An ɩ a Sãa nʊ̃ yɩ naa bojũu yɩ nʊ̃ ma naa na yɩ sɔɔ de ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ n yi.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: A Sãa sɛ̃ lɛ n yi wa ka a wɛr pɔ, pʊ̃pãanyã n lɛ bara naa a wɛr tɩ lɩɛb chiine a Sãa sɛ̃.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu poturbo pãa 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Pʊ̃pãanyã fʊ pãa 'yɛr ka a chaar faa lɛ lɔɔrɔ sʊkpar go ɛ.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã sɩ nyɛn ɩka fʊ bɔ̃ɔn yele a jaa, na faa lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ sʊʊr fʊ sʊʊrfʊsɩ ɛ. Ala lɛ so ka sɩ sɔɔ de ɩka Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ fʊ yi.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Ka a Yesu sʊʊr ba, “Yɩ pãa sɔɔn de a pʊ̃pãanyã ɔ?

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bɩbir kɔ̃ɔ na wa vɩɛ naa, wʊ ben ta, ka yɩ jaa na yɛ̃yɛl ka ãsʊɔ jaa kul a wʊ yir tɩ chɛ ma bar a n yõ. Tɩ n ba ɩ a n yõ ɛ, a n Sãa be naa n sɛ̃.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: “N 'yɛr yɩ naa anyãna ka yɩ na tara nyã'maar an ɩ yɩ ben a n 'yɔ̃ɔ. A wɛr nyã pɔ yɩn din dɔɔyɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ nyɔɔ nyãa, bojũu n tʊ̃ɔn a wɛr.”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: A Yesu na wa 'yɛr a anyãna baar, wʊ kãan saaju tɩ 'yɛr, “N Sãa, a bɩbir vɩɛ naa, kʊ a fʊ Bie a tɩɩr ka a fʊ Bie mɩ kʊ fʊ a tɩɩr.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Bojũu, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ kʊ wʊ sɔr ka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ ba jaa na wʊ kʊ ba a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, a bala ba jaa fʊn de kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: A nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ nɩ nyã, ka ban bɔ̃ɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ, na ɩ yelmãɛ sʊɔ, nɩ a Yesu 'lɔ fʊn tʊ̃.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: N waan na tɩɩr wa kʊ fʊ a ka a wɛr pɔ, naa baar a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala fʊn kʊ ma ɩka n tʊ̃.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n Sãa kʊ ma a tɩɩr a fʊ niem, a tɩɩr 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ tara tɩchɛ na fʊ wa maal a wɛr.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: “N wiil fʊn kʊ a bala fʊn de kʊ ma ka a wɛr pɔ, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ so ba tɩ na fʊ wa de ba kʊ ma, ba tu naa a fʊ 'yɛr.

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã ba bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka bon jaa ɩn tara yin a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Bojũu, a 'yɛr ala fʊn kʊ ma, n 'yɛr kʊ ba, ka ba sɔɔ de. Ba bɔ̃ɔn yelmãɛ jaa ɩka fʊ̃ʊ sɛ̃ lɛ n yi naa wa, na ba sɔɔ de ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: Bala 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n sʊɔrɔ fʊ, n ba sʊɔrɔ fʊ kʊrɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala fʊn kʊ ma an ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ so ba.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Bon jaa ɩn tara ɩ naa a fʊ sofʊ, ka bon jaa fʊn mɩ na tara ɩ a n sofʊ. N nyɛn tɩɩr yi a ba jie.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Maa kʊ̃ lɛ be ka a wɛr pɔ go ɛ, tɩchɛ bala 'lɔ chɛnɛ na be ka a wɛr pɔ, n waara a fʊ sɛ̃. Sãa sʊ̃, gu ba nɩ a fʊ yuor kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ pɔ, a yuor 'lɔ fʊn kʊ ma ka ban ɩ bʊ̃'yen, nɩtãa lɛ maa nɩ fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Ɩn be a ba sɛ̃, n gu ban naa kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ fʊn kʊ ma. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa ba bɔr ɛ, ala ba ɩ a 'lɔ tɛɛ an sɛɛ ɩka wʊ bɔr ka a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ na ɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: “N waara naa a fʊ sɛ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩchɛ ɩn chɛnɛ be ka a wɛr pɔ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ a anyãna ka ban tara a n pʊpɛl wʊ jaa.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: N kʊ ban a fʊ 'yɛr, ala lɛ so ka a wɛr nɩbɛ 'laar ba, baa lɛ chɛnɛ pʊɔ ba go ɛ, nɩtãa maa na ba pʊɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: N ba sʊɔrɔ fʊ ɩka fʊ ir ba yin ka a wɛr pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊ guro ba a dɛɛr sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Baa lɛ pʊɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ pɔ ɛ, nɩtãa n mɩ na ba pʊɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Oo ba nɩ a fʊ yelmãɛ, a fʊ 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ fʊn tʊ̃ ma a wɛr nɩbɛ sɛ̃, lɛ lɛ n mɩ tʊ̃ ba a wɛr nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: A ba 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n oo a n mãɛ kʊ fʊ, ka ba mɩ na oo a ba mãɛ sɩrɛ jaa kʊ fʊ.

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: “A ba ɩ bala tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n sʊɔrfʊ ɛ, n mɩ sʊɔrɔ na kʊrɔ a bala na wa sɔɔ de ma tu a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa ɩka fʊ vɛ̃ ka ba jaa ɩ bʊ̃'yen. N Sãa, nɩtãa lɛ fʊn be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka n mɩ be a fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ. Ba mɩ be a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a wɛr nɩbɛ na sɔɔ de ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: N kʊ ban a tɩɩr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ wʊ ju fʊn kʊ ma, ka ba na ɩ bʊ̃'yen nɩtãa maa nɩ fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: N ben a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka fʊ mɩ be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ. Ka ba jaa mɩ na 'mataa ɩ bʊ̃'yen ka a wɛr nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tʊ̃ ma na fʊ nʊ̃ ba gba nɩtãa a lɛ fʊn nʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: “N Sãa, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a bala fʊn kʊ ma, ba mɩ be a jie 'lɔ ɩn na be, na ba nyɛ a n tɩɩr. A tɩɩr 'lɔ fʊn de nie kʊ ma, bojũu fʊ nʊ̃ ma naa tɩ na fʊ wa maal a wɛr.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: “N Sãa, a fʊ yele tor naa, tɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ fʊ ɛ, maa bɔ̃ɔ fʊ naa, ka a n poturbo mɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tʊ̃ ma.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: N vɛ̃n ka ba bɔ̃ɔ fʊ, ɩn chɛnɛ na maal ba ka ba bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ fʊ pʊɔrɔ ka a nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ fʊn nʊ̃ ma na be a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ka n mɩ be a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: A bɔɔrlo nãa gbãgbaa ãsʊɔ, wʊ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ toor lɛ a 'lɔ a Pita na dɔ̃ɔ chɛ ŋmaa 'yɛr, “A ba ɩ n nyɛ fʊ naa fʊn be a wʊ sɛ̃ a kãa tɩɩr jie 'lɔ ɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Wʊ lɛ sʊʊr ban go, “An lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ?” A ba 'yɛr, “Yesu na yi Najaretɩ.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “N ba 'yɛr yɩ ɩka ‘Maa lɛ.’ Ala ɩ maa lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ, yɩ ɩ ka a nɩbɛ banyã chiine.”

english_verse: Then everything will happen, just as I said, ‘I did not lose anyone you gave me.’ ”
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ ka a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka, “A bala fʊn kʊ ma, n ba vɛ̃ ka ãsʊɔ jaa bɔr ɛ.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Simon Pita na tara sʊɔ na wʊ vʊ̃ɔ chɛn a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ gbãgbaa nũsʊ̃ɔ toor ŋmaa. A gbãgbaa yuor din Malkusɩ.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Ka a sojasɩ nɩ a ba nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'matãan a gugurbo bala ban tʊ̃, nyɔɔ a Yesu na ba lũ.

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Pita 'lɔ ara a yõo dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ. A poturo nyã a bɔɔrlo nãa na bɔ̃ɔ, yin wa 'yɛr a pɔɔbile 'lɔ na kaara a dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ tɩ tara a Pita kpɛ̃n.

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɔɔr kʊrɔ naa ka a gbãgbaar nɩ a gugurbo bala gbɔɔ saalaa bũu ara uoro ka a Pita mɩ tɩ ara uoro.

english_verse: The high priest questioned Jesus about his followers and his teaching.
translation_verse: A bɔɔrlo nãa sʊʊr naa a Yesu, ba boo lɛ ɩ a wʊ poturbo nɩ bo lɛ wʊ ma wile?

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Bo lɛ so ka fʊ sʊrɔ ma a lɛ? Sʊʊr a bala na wõ a n 'yɛr, ba bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Wʊ chɛnɛ na lũ tɩchɛ ka a Anasɩ vɛ̃ a ba tara wʊ chiin a bɔɔrlo nãa Kayafasɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba tara a Yesu yin a Kayafasɩ yir bibio pipi na ba chiin a Worom nɩkpɛ̃ɛ yir. A Juu nɩbɛ mãɛ ba kpɛ be ɛ, bojũu baa bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba sɔ̃ɔ ba mãɛ na ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ di a Gõl Bar Difʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a Pilate yi a yõo tɩ sʊʊr ba, “Bo yelbier yɩ ɩka a daba nyã ɩ naa?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛr, “'Lɔ ba ta maal yelbier ɛ, sɩ kʊ̃ naa tara wʊ waan a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ.”

english_verse: And so what Jesus said about his death would soon come true.
translation_verse: A ɩn a lɛ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr wiil a kũu 'lɔ tɔ wʊn na kpi.

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Pilate lɩɛb kpɛ tɩ bʊɔl a Yesu sʊʊr, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: A Yesu sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ tɩɛr a lɛ bɩɩ nɩbɛ lɛ 'yɛr a n 'yɛr kʊ fʊ?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate 'yɛr, “Fʊ tɩɛr ɩka n ɩn Juu nɩrɛ bɩɩ? A fʊ mãɛ nɩbɛ nɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ baa nyɔɔ fʊ waan a n sɛ̃, bo fʊ̃ʊ ɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “A n nãalʊ̃ʊ ba yi ka a wɛr pɔ ɛ, ala ɩ a wɛr pɔ lɛ wʊ dɔ̃ɔ yi, a n poturbo naa jɛb faa ma ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ ta nyɔɔ ma ɛ. Tɩchɛ a n nãalʊ̃ʊ ba yi a ka ɛ.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Ka a Pilate pãa sʊʊr wʊ, “Ka ala ɩ a lɛ, nãa lɛ fʊ ɩ wɛ?” Ka Yesu 'yɛr, “Fʊ 'yɛr vɩla fʊn 'yɛr ɩka nãa lɛ n ɩ, ala 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ ba dɔɔ ma ka n wa ka a wɛr pɔ, naa wa 'yɛr a yelmãɛ 'yɛr. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ɩ yelmãɛ sʊɔ chɛlɛ naa lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ.”

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩ binfʊ lɛ ɩka n ma ir nɩrɛ a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ kʊ yɩ a Gõl Bar Difʊ daar. Yɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n yuo a yɩ nãa kʊ yɩ bɩɩ?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: A ba tãna 'yɛrɛ, “Kai, saa bʊɔrɔ wʊ ɛ, Barabasɩ lɛ sɩ bʊɔrɔ.” Tɩchɛ a Barabasɩ mɩ ɩn nɩkʊrɔ.

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Pilate vɛ̃ naa ka ba nyɔɔ a Yesu chiin tɩ fɔb.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Ka a sojasɩ de gʊʊr wob jupil su a Yesu, tɩ mɩ de fuu jã ile ile na ba su wʊ.

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa ma tɔɔ ta a wʊ sɛ̃ 'yɛrɛ, “Sɩ puor fʊ naa Juu nɩbɛ nãa,” tɩ ma 'ma 'ma wʊ.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Pilate lɛ yin wa a Juu nɩbɛrɛ sɛ̃ go wa 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ nyɛ, ɩn vɛ̃n ka ba yi waan wʊ, ka yɩn mãɛ nyɛ ɩka, n ba nyɛ yelbier jaa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Ban wa yin a Yesu, wʊ sun a gʊʊr jupil nɩ a fuu jã ile ile 'lɔ, ka a Pilate 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ nyɛ a daba.”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: A bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a puorfʊ yir gugurbo, ban wa nyɛ a Yesu, ka ba tãna 'yɛrɛ, “Kpa wʊ a daa ju. Kpa wʊ a daa ju.” Tɩchɛ ka a Pilate 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn, yɩ de wʊ tɩ kpa wʊ a daa ju, maa 'lɔ n ba nyɛ yelbier jaa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ 'yɛr, “Sɩ tara na nɛɛ, sɩn 'yɛr, ka a nɛɛ 'lɔ ɩka wʊ sɛɛn kũu, bojũu wʊ bʊɔlɔ naa wʊ mãɛ Nãaŋmɩn Bie.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Pilate na wõ a nɩtɔ̃ ka dãbãɛ gba kpɛ wʊ.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ lɩɛb kpɛ na wʊ tɩ sʊʊr a Yesu, “Nyɩnɛ fʊ yi?” Tɩchɛ Yesu ba haa nɛɛ sɔɔ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “Faa tara kpɛ̃ɔ bãlãa jaa a n jie ɛ, ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn ba de yin saaju kʊ fʊ ɛ. A lɛ jũu nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nyɔɔ ma wa kʊ fʊ, wʊ lon yeldɛɛr pɔ gar fʊ.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Pilate na wõ a nɩtɔ̃, wʊ yin naa Yesu tɩ jãnɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ dakɔɔ ju, a jie ban bʊɔlɔ Kʊsɩpãn. Ka a Juu nɩbɛrɛ mɩ bʊɔlɔ a jie Gabata.

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: A Gõl Bar Difʊ bãnsɩ daar mɔ̃tɔ̃tuo sɔ̃ɔ, Pilate 'yɛr kʊ a Juu nɩbɛrɛ, “Yɩ nyɛ a yɩ nãa.”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka Pilate vɛ̃ a ba nyɔɔ a Yesu chiin na tɩ kpa ka a sojasɩ tara wʊ.

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a sojasɩ chen tɩ kar a bala ban lɔ̃ɔ kpan a Yesu gbɛɛ.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Ka a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Pilate, “Ta sɛb ɩka a Juu nɩbɛ nãa ɛ, fʊn taa sɛb ɩka a daba nyã 'yɛr ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ nãa.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: A Yesu na nyɛ a wʊ ma na ara, ka a poturo 'lɔ wʊn nʊ̃ mɩ ara gbʊr wʊ, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a ma, “A fʊ bie lɛ a 'lɔ.”

english_verse: and he carried his cross to a place known as “The Skull.” In Aramaic this place is called “Golgotha.”
translation_verse: Yesu yin tuo a wʊ mãɛ daa chiin a jie 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Julaa Jie. Tɩchɛ ka a Juu nɩbɛ mɩ bʊɔlɔ a jie, Gɔlgɔta.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Pilate sɛb sɛbie 'mar a daa ju ɩka, YESU NA YI NAJARETƖ, A JUU NƖBƐ NÃA.

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Kɔkɔɛ ata lɛ wʊ sɛb, a Juu nɩbɛ kɔkɔr, Worom nɩbɛ kɔkɔr nɩ a Greek dẽme kɔkɔr. Ka a Juu nɩbɛ yɔɔ kar a sɛbie bojũu a jie ban kpa wʊ ba jãan a yir ɛ.

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Ka ba 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa, “Yɩ ta ɩ a sɩ chɩɛr a fuu nyã ɛ, yɩ ɩ a sɩ gba gbãm kaa an lɛ na di?” Ba ɩn a lɛ ka a ala na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ na ɩ yelmãɛ, “Ba põn a n fuur tɩ de a n fuu gbãn gbãm.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Yesu ma nɩ a wʊ ma yɛbɛ, Klopasɩ pɔɔ Mɛɛr nɩ a Mɛɛr 'lɔ mɩ na yi a Magdala ara naa be a wʊ daa par.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ban wa ta a Yesu sɛ̃, ba nyɛn ka a ɩ wʊ kpi naa ka baa kar a wʊ gbɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: A jie 'lɔ ban kpa a Yesu, pobile ben be, ka yaa paalaa mɩ ban ba ũu nɩrɛ jaa ɛ, mɩ be be.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Yesu bɔ̃ɔn naa pʊ̃pãanyã ɩka yele a jaa pãa baar naa ka a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, na ɩ yelmãɛ, ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Kɔ̃nyũur kpɛ ma naa.”

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Dʊʊ ben be ka a dãmiir sɛɛ ka ba de sapɔ 'lɔr ir chab urbanyũu daa pɔ tur a Yesu.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa mʊʊr a dãmiir ala baar, ka wʊ 'yɛr, “A baar naa,” tɩ sur a ju na wʊ ŋmaa a vʊʊr.

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: A bɩbir chiiraa Chɔɔrfʊ Bɩbir Daar lɛ ka a wɛr na chaar ɩ Bɩbir Kpɛ̃ɛ, ala lɛ so ka a Juu nɩbɛ ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a kũn a chɛnɛ be a daar jur ɛ. Ba sʊɔr a Pilate ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka ba kar a ba gbɛɛ tɩ yɔɔ ba.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Ka a sojasɩ ãsʊɔ de a pĩi wõo 'lɔ chɔr a Yesu lõboor ka jãɩ nɩ kʊ̃ɔ yi ajienaa.

english_verse: We know this is true, because it was told by someone who saw it happen. Now you can have faith too.
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nyɛ a anyãna lɛ di a dãasɩɛ, ka wʊ dãasɩɛ ɩ yelmãɛ. Wʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ, ka yɩ mɩ na sɔɔ de.

english_verse: All this happened so that the Scriptures would come true, which say, “No bone of his body will be broken”
translation_verse: A anyãna ɩ naa ka a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka, “A wʊ kɔɔr kʊ̃ kab ɛ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: and “They will see the one in whose side they stuck a spear.” Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka ba lɛ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn jie ãsʊɔ ɩka, “Ban kaa naa a 'lɔ ban chɔr.” (Jekariya

english_verse: The tomb was nearby, and since it was the time to prepare for the Sabbath, they were in a hurry to put Jesus' body there.
translation_verse: Bojũu an ɩ a bɩbir chiiraa Chɔɔrfʊ Bɩbir Daar lɛ, tɩchɛ ka a yaa mɩ gbʊr a be jũu, ba ũun a Yesu a be.

english_verse: Joseph from Arimathea was one of Jesus' disciples. He had kept it secret though, because he was afraid of the Jewish leaders. But now he asked Pilate to let him have Jesus' body. Pilate gave him permission, and Joseph took it down from the cross.
translation_verse: A Josefʊ na yi Arimatɩya, ɩ naa a Yesu poturo, tɩ a Juu nɩbɛrɛ dãbãɛ jũu, waa dɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka ba bɔ̃ɔn ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ sʊɔr a Yesu a Pilate sɛ̃. Pilate sɔɔ naa ka wʊ tɩ yɔɔ a Yesu.

english_verse: The two men wrapped the body in a linen cloth, together with the spices, which was how the Jewish people buried their dead.
translation_verse: A ba jaa ayi den a Yesu vil wʊ a fɔpɩla tɩ jɛ wʊ a kãnyũu ala tu a lɛ a Juu nɩbɛ na ma ɩ tɩ ũu a nɩrɛ.

english_verse: Thomas replied, “You are my Lord and my God!”
translation_verse: Ka a Tomasɩ 'yɛr, “N Soro nɩ n Nãaŋmɩn.”

english_verse: On Sunday morning while it was still dark, Mary Magdalene went to the tomb and saw that the stone had been rolled away from the entrance.
translation_verse: A daa gbul bɩbir dɔ̃ɔ daar wɛr na chaara wa la la la, Mɛɛr na yi a Magdala chen naa a yaa par tɩ nyɛ ka ɩ a kʊsɩr 'lɔ ban pɔɔ a yaa yuo naa.

english_verse: So the two of them went back to the other disciples. Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene (Mark
translation_verse: A poturbo ayi bala lɩɛb kul a ba taaba sɛ̃.

english_verse: The disciple who got there first then went into the tomb, and when he saw it, he believed.
translation_verse: A poturo 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ de nie ta a yaa par mɩ pãa kpɛ, na wʊ nyɛ a lɛ tɩ sɔɔ de.

english_verse: Although Thomas the Twin was one of the twelve disciples, he wasn't with the others when Jesus appeared to them.
translation_verse: Tomasɩ ban lɛ bʊɔlɔ Naa na ɩ a Poturo Pie Nɩ Ayi ãsʊɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ be be a Yesu na wa ɛ.

english_verse: and saw two angels inside. They were dressed in white and were sitting where Jesus' body had been. One was at the head and the other was at the foot.
translation_verse: na wʊ nyɛ a malakasɩ ayi na su fuu pɩɛl be a yaa pɔ, ka a ãsʊɔ jãnɛ a ju jie, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ jãnɛ a gbɛɛ jie, a jie ban dɔ̃ɔ gaal a Yesu.

english_verse: She ran to Simon Peter and to Jesus' favorite disciple and said, “They have taken the Lord from the tomb! We don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Wʊ jon chen a Simon Pita nɩ a poturo 'lɔ a Yesu na nʊ̃ sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr, “Ba ir naa a Soro ãgãn a yaa pɔ, ka saa bɔ̃ɔ a jie ban bin wʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: Peter and the other disciple started for the tomb.
translation_verse: Ka a Pita nɩ a poturo yi na chen a yaa par.

english_verse: They ran side by side, until the other disciple ran faster than Peter and got there first.
translation_verse: Ba jaa 'mantaa joro, tɩchɛ ka a poturo 'lɔ jo vɩɛ a Pita bar tɩ de nie ta a yaa par.

english_verse: He bent over and saw the strips of linen cloth lying inside the tomb, but he did not go in.
translation_verse: Na wʊ muul nyɛ a fɔpɩla 'lɔ na gã, tɩ waa kpɛ ɛ.

english_verse: When Simon Peter got there, he went into the tomb and saw the strips of cloth.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ka a Pita na turo a puor mɩ ta, na wʊ kpɛ a yaa pɔ, na wʊ nyɛ a fɔpɩla mɩ na gã.

english_verse: He also saw the piece of cloth that had been used to cover Jesus' face. It was rolled up and in a place by itself.
translation_verse: Ka a fɔ-ũu naa 'lɔ ban vil a Yesu ju mɩ pil yi a fɔpɩla pɔ gã wʊ yõ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene stood crying outside the tomb. She was still weeping, when she stooped down
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Mɛɛr ara a yaa par kõnõ. Wʊ kõn wa muul kaa a yaa pɔ,

english_verse: The angels asked Mary, “Why are you crying?” She answered, “They have taken away my Lord's body! I don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Ka ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Pɔɔ, bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ fʊ kõnõ?” A wʊ 'yɛr ba, “Ba ir naa a n Soro, ka n ba bɔ̃ɔ a jie ban bin wʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked her, “Why are you crying? Who are you looking for?” She thought he was the gardener and said, “Sir, if you have taken his body away, please tell me, so I can go and get him.”
translation_verse: Ka Yesu sʊʊr wʊ, “Pɔɔ, bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ fʊ kõnõ? An lɛ fʊ bʊɔrɔ?” Mɛɛr tɩɛr naa ɩka a jikaara lɛ, tɩ 'yɛr, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ir wʊ, wiil ma a jie fʊn bin, ka n chen tɩ 'mɔɔ wʊ.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Don't hold on to me! I have not yet gone to the Father. But tell my disciples I am going to the one who is my Father and my God, as well as your Father and your God.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Ta gɔɔ ma ɛ, n ba chen a n Sãa sɛ̃ sɛrɛ ɛ. Chen a n poturbo sɛ̃ tɩ 'yɛr ba, n lɩɛb chiine a n Sãa Nãaŋmɩn mɩ na ɩ a yɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.”

english_verse: and showed them his hands and his side. When the disciples saw the Lord, they became very happy.
translation_verse: Wʊn 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃, wʊ wiil ba naa a nuur nɩ a lõboor. Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ̃n a poturbo ban nyɛ a Soro.

english_verse: The disciples were afraid of the Jewish leaders, and on the evening of that same Sunday they locked themselves in a room. Suddenly, Jesus appeared in the middle of the group. He greeted them
translation_verse: A daa gbul bɩbir dɔ̃ɔ daar jãanʊɔr, a poturbo lɔ̃ɔn taa a die pɔ, tɩ kpal a pãma a Juu nɩbɛ dãbãɛ jũu. A Yesu tɩ kpɛ ara a ba sɛ̃ tɩ puor ba 'yɛr, “Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: After Jesus had greeted them again, he said, “I am sending you, just as the Father has sent me.”
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ 'yɛr kʊ ba go, “Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃, lɛ a Sãa na tʊ̃ ma, lɛ lɛ n mɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ.”

english_verse: Then he breathed on them and said, “Receive the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa vʊʊr 'yɔ̃ɔ ba tɩ 'yɛr, “Yɩ de a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.”

english_verse: If you forgive anyone's sins, they will be forgiven. But if you don't forgive their sins, they will not be forgiven.” Jesus and Thomas
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ vɛ̃n nɩrɛ yeldɛɛr bar, Nãaŋmɩn mɩ na vɛ̃n bar wʊ. Ala ɩ yaa mɩ wa vɛ̃ bar ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn mɩ kʊ̃ vɛ̃ bar ɛ.

english_verse: So they told him, “We have seen the Lord!” But Thomas said, “First, I must see the nail scars in his hands and touch them with my finger. I must put my hand where the spear went into his side. I won't believe unless I do this!”
translation_verse: Ka a poturbo bala na be be nyɛ a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Sɩ nyɛn a Soro,” tɩ wʊ 'yɛr, “Maa ba nyɛ a natɩɛ a wʊ nũu pɔ ɛ, naa de a n nubir tũ a kpafʊ jie ɛ, naa mɩ lɛ de nũu tũ a lõboor bɔɔ pɔ ɛ, n kʊ̃ sɔɔ de jaa ɛ.”

english_verse: A week later the disciples were together again. This time, Thomas was with them. Jesus came in while the doors were still locked and stood in the middle of the group. He greeted his disciples
translation_verse: A ber aniin daar, a wʊ poturbo ba jaa lɛ lɔ̃ɔn taa a yir pɔ, ka a Tomasɩ mɩ be be. A pãma kpal naa, tɩchɛ ka a Yesu wa ara a ba sɛ̃ puor ba tɩ 'yɛr, “Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.”

english_verse: and said to Thomas, “Put your finger here and look at my hands! Put your hand into my side. Stop doubting and have faith!”
translation_verse: Tɩ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a Tomasɩ, “Tur a fʊ nubir a ka, nyɛ a n nuur na fʊ tur a fʊ nũu su a n lõboor bɔɔ pɔ, na fʊ bar a baal tɩ sɔɔ de.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Thomas, do you have faith because you have seen me? The people who have faith in me without seeing me are the ones who are really blessed!” Why John Wrote His Book
translation_verse: A Yesu pãa sʊʊr wʊ, “Fʊn nyɛ ma jũu lɛ fʊ sɔɔ de ɔ? Pʊpɛl dẽme lɛ a bala na ba nyɛ ɛ, tɩ sɔɔ de.”

english_verse: Jesus worked many other miracles for his disciples, and not all of them are written in this book.
translation_verse: Yesu tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃ yɔɔ a wʊ poturbo niem, ban ba sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a gãn nyã pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: But these are written so that you will put your faith in Jesus as the Messiah and the Son of God. If you have faith in him, you will have true life.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a anyãna sɛb naa ka yɩn sɔɔ de ɩka, a Yesu lɛ a Nɩ-iraa, na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie. Yɩn sɔɔ de jũu, yɩn tara naa nyɛvʊr yin a wʊ yuor pɔ.

english_verse: Jesus later appeared to his disciples along the shore of Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: A anyã puor, Yesu lɛ ir wʊ mãɛ wiil kʊ a wʊ poturbo be a Tiberiyas man pɔ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a tu.

english_verse: Simon Peter, Thomas the Twin, Nathanael from Cana in Galilee, and the brothers James and John, were there, together with two other disciples.
translation_verse: Simon Pita, Tomasɩ ban bʊɔlɔ Naa, Natanɩɛl na yi Keena na be a Galilee paal pɔ, Jebedee bibiir ayi pʊɔn a poturbo ayi bamɩne 'mantaa.

english_verse: Simon Peter said, “I'm going fishing!” The others said, “We will go with you.” They went out in their boat. But they didn't catch a thing that night.
translation_verse: Ka a Simon Pita 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Maa chiine naa jãmɛ nyɔɔrfʊ jie.” Ka ba mɩ 'yɛr, “Sɩn 'mantaa chen!” Ba yin kpɛ a gboro chen, tɩchɛ a tãsɔɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ baa nyɔɔ bon ɛ.

english_verse: Early the next morning Jesus stood on the shore, but the disciples did not realize who he was.
translation_verse: Bibio pipi Yesu ben a gogoro ju ara, tɩchɛ a poturbo ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus shouted, “Friends, have you caught anything?” “No!” they answered.
translation_verse: Ka wʊ bʊɔl ba sʊʊr, “Barmɩne, yaa nyɔɔ jãm ɛ?” Ka ba 'yɛr “Kai.”

english_verse: So he told them, “Let your net down on the right side of your boat, and you will catch some fish.” They did, and the net was so full of fish that they could not drag it up into the boat.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr ba, “Yɩ lɔb a lɔyaar 'yɔ̃ɔ a gboro nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, yɩn nyɔɔr amɩne.” Ban lɔb a lɔyaar 'yɔ̃ɔ, baa lɛ tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ tɔɔrɔ ɛ, bojũu wʊ nyɔɔr jãyɔɔ.

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple told Peter, “It's the Lord!” When Simon heard it was the Lord, he put on the clothes he had taken off while he was working. Then he jumped into the water.
translation_verse: Ka a poturo 'lɔ a Yesu na nʊ̃ 'yɛr kʊ a Simon Pita, “A sɩ Soro lɛ.” A lɛ a Pita na wõ ɩka, “A sɩ Soro lɛ,” wʊ sun a fuu wʊn dɔ̃ɔ yaa bar na wʊ ɔɔ lon a kʊ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: When the disciples got out of the boat, they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it.
translation_verse: Ban wa do a gogoro ju, ba nyɛn saalaa bũu jãmɛ na be be nɩ paanʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “Bring some of the fish you just caught.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ ir a jãmɛ ala yɩn nyɔɔr a pʊ̃pãanyã amɩne waan.”

english_verse: Simon Peter got back into the boat and dragged the net to shore. In it were
translation_verse: Ka a Simon Pita kpɛ a gboro pɔ, tɩ tɔɔ a lɔyaar na sɛɛn a jãbɛrɛ don a gogoro ju. A ɩn jãmɛ kɔbaa lɩjaayi nɩ pie nɩ ata (

english_verse: large fish, but still the net did not rip.
translation_verse: ), an ɩ a yɔɔ a lɛ, tɩchɛ a lɔyaar ba chɩɛr ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said, “Come and eat!” But none of the disciples dared ask who he was. They knew he was the Lord.
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ wa suor nɛɛ.” Tɩ a poturbo ãsʊɔ jaa ba 'la sʊʊr wʊ ɩka, “An lɛ fʊ ɩ?” Ba jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Soro lɛ.

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave some of it to his disciples. He did the same with the fish.
translation_verse: Yesu ir a paanʊ̃ɔ na wʊ kʊ ba, tɩ lɛ ir a jãmɛ mɩ kʊ ba.

english_verse: This was the third time Jesus appeared to his disciples after he was raised from death. Jesus and Peter
translation_verse: A nyã lɛ ɩ gbɛɛ ata Yesu na ir a wʊ mãɛ wiil a poturbo wʊn ir a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr.

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples had finished eating, he asked, “Simon son of John, do you love me more than the others do?” Simon Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I do!” “Then feed my lambs,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Ban di baar ka Yesu sʊʊr a Simon Pita, “Simon, Jɔɔn bie, fʊ nʊ̃ man gar a banyãna ɔ?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ, n Soro, fʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩn nʊ̃ fʊ.” A Yesu 'yɛr wʊ, “Kʊrɔ a n pelsɩ a bʊ̃diir.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a second time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I love you!” “Then take care of my sheep,” Jesus told him.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ sʊʊr go, “Simon, Jɔɔn bie, fʊ nʊ̃ man sɩrɛ jaa?” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “Ɔ̃ɔ, n Soro, fʊ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩn nʊ̃ fʊ.” Ka a Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Bɔ̃ɔ kaara ma a piir.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a third time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter was hurt because Jesus had asked him three times if he loved him. So he told Jesus, “Lord, you know everything. You know I love you.” Jesus replied, “Feed my sheep.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ sʊʊr wʊn gbɛɛ ata, “Simon Jɔɔn bie, fʊ nʊ̃ ma naa?” Ka a Pita pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ bojũu gbɛɛ ata nɩ nyã a Yesu na sʊʊr wʊ, ɩka wʊ, “Nʊ̃ wʊ naa?” Tɩ 'yɛr, “N Soro fʊ bɔ̃ɔn yele a jaa, fʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩn nʊ̃ fʊ.” A Yesu 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Kʊrɔ ma a piir bʊ̃diir.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that when you were a young man, you dressed yourself and went wherever you wanted to go. But when you are old, you will hold out your hands. Then others will wrap your belt around you and lead you where you don't want to go.”
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, a fʊ pɔlbile daar fʊ mãɛ ma sun fʊ fuusɩ na fʊ chiin jie 'lɔ jaa fʊn bʊɔrɔ. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ wa kor baar, fʊ ma jãn a nuur ka nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ su fʊ a fuu tɩ tɔɔ fʊ chiin a jie 'lɔ fʊn ba bʊɔrɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this to tell how Peter would die and bring honor to God. Then he said to Peter, “Follow me!” Jesus and His Favorite Disciple
translation_verse: Yesu 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ na wʊ wiil a kũu 'lɔ tɔ Pita na wa kpi 'yɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr. Tɩ pãa 'yɛr kʊ a Pita, “Turo ma.”

english_verse: Peter turned and saw Jesus' favorite disciple following them. He was the same one who had sat next to Jesus at the meal and had asked, “Lord, who is going to betray you?”
translation_verse: Pita lɩɛb nyɛ a poturo 'lɔ a Yesu na nʊ̃ ka wʊ turo ba. A poturo nyã lɛ dɔ̃ɔ dɩɛl a Yesu lɛ ban dire a di baaraa, na dɔ̃ɔ sʊʊr a Yesu, “N Soro, an lɛ na gar 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ?”

english_verse: When Peter saw this disciple, he asked Jesus, “Lord, what about him?”
translation_verse: Pita na nyɛ wʊn turo ba, ka wʊ sʊʊr, “N Soro, tɩ nyã mɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return? You must follow me.”
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr, “Maa nʊ̃ ɩka wʊ be be tɩ tãn ɩn na lɩɛb wa, a ɩ bo a fʊ sʊrɔ? Fʊ̃ʊ turo ma.”

english_verse: So the rumor spread among the other disciples that this disciple would not die. But Jesus did not say he would not die. He simply said, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return?”
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ a poturbo 'yɛr yʊɔrɔ nɩ ɩka a poturo 'lɔ kʊ̃ kpi ɛ. Tɩchɛ Yesu ba 'yɛr ɩka wʊ kʊ̃ kpi ɛ, wʊ 'yɛr ɩka, “Maa nʊ̃ ɩka wʊ be be tɩ tãn ɩn na lɩɛb wa, a ɩ bo a fʊ sʊrɔ?”

english_verse: This disciple is the one who told all of this. He wrote it, and we know he is telling the truth.
translation_verse: A poturo nyãna lɛ di a anyãna dãasɩɛ na wʊ sɛb bin, ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔn a wʊ dãasɩɛ na ɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: Jesus did many other things. If they were all written in books, I don't suppose there would be room enough in the whole world for all the books.
translation_verse: Yesu tʊ̃n tʊ̃yɔɔ mɩ, ala ɩ a jaa ta sɛb bʊ̃'yen 'yen, a wɛr wʊ jaa kʊ̃ naa tara jie bin a ala na sɛb ɛ.

english_verse: Theophilus, I first wrote to you about all that Jesus did and taught from the very first
translation_verse: Teofilusɩ a n gãn dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ pɔ, n sɛb a ala a jaa a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ piel maal tɩ na wʊ wiil a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: until he was taken up to heaven. But before he was taken up, he gave orders to the apostles he had chosen with the help of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Yesu tu naa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ na wʊ wiil a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ bala wʊn ir lɛ ban na ɩrɛ tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn de wʊ don a saaju.

english_verse: While he was still with them, he said: Don't leave Jerusalem yet. Wait here for the Father to give you the Holy Spirit, just as I told you he has promised to do.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa lɔ̃ɔn ba ka ba 'mataa dire, ka wʊ kpãkpãan ba nɩ a 'yɛr bir nyã, “Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa yire a Jerusalɛm ɛ, yɩ chɛlɛ a kʊfʊ 'lɔ a n Sãa na põl ka n 'yɛr kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: John baptized with water, but in a few days you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit. Jesus Is Taken to Heaven
translation_verse: Jɔɔn 'lɔ, kʊ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ de son a nɩbɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ, a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na so yɩ naa nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.”

english_verse: While the apostles were still with Jesus, they asked him, “Lord, are you now going to give Israel its own king again?”
translation_verse: Ba lɛ wa lɔ̃ɔn naa a Yesu go, na ba sʊʊr wʊ, “Sɩ Soro, a sɔ̃ɔ nyãna pɔ lɛ fʊn lɩɛb a Isɩral nãalʊ̃ʊ kʊ ba bɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “You don't need to know the time of those events that only the Father controls.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A ba ɩ yɩ 'yɛr ɛ, ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ bɩɩ a bɩbir a Sãa na bin a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus had said this and while they were watching, he was taken up into a cloud. They could not see him,
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ wʊ 'yɛr baar tɩ duoro a saaju a lɛ nɛ a ba nɩbiru ka a julõjuur tɩ pɔɔ wʊ.

english_verse: but as he went up, they kept looking up into the sky. Suddenly two men dressed in white clothes were standing there beside them.
translation_verse: Ka ba chɛnɛ dʊl kaara a saaju a lɛ nɛ wʊn duoro, be lɛ a dɔɔr ayi na su fuu pɩɛl wa dũu ba a lɛ nɛ ara a ba sɛ̃.

english_verse: They said, “Why are you men from Galilee standing here and looking up into the sky? Jesus has been taken to heaven. But he will come back in the same way you have seen him go.” Someone To Take the Place of Judas
translation_verse: Na ba sʊʊr ba, “Galilee dɔɔr, bãa lɛ so a yɩ kaara a saaju a lɛ mɔ̃? A Yesu nyãna nɩ wʊ ju yɩn nyɛ na duoro a saaju, na lɩɛb a lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju wa, nɩtãa a lɛ nɛ yɩn nyɛ wʊn duoro a saaju.”

english_verse: The Mount of Olives was about a kilometer from Jerusalem. The apostles who had gone there were Peter, John, James, Andrew, Philip, Thomas, Bartholomew, Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus, Simon, known as the Eager One, and Judas the son of James. After the apostles returned to the city, they went upstairs to the room where they had been staying.
translation_verse: Ban wa ta, ba don a bɔɔpɩɛ pɔ, be lɛ ba dɔ̃ɔ lɔ̃ɔ taa. Ka a bala na dɔ̃ɔ be be lɛ Pita, Jɔɔn, Jemesɩ nɩ Andiru. Filip, Tomasɩ, Batolomi nɩ Matiu nɩ Alfayasɩ bidaba Jemesɩ nɩ Simon na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a wʊ wɛr yele, nɩ a Jemesɩ bidaba Judas.

english_verse: The apostles often met together and prayed with a single purpose in mind. The women and Mary the mother of Jesus would meet with them, and so would his brothers.
translation_verse: A banyãna ba jaa lɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn, ka a pɔbɔ bamɩne pʊɔ ba ka a Yesu yɛɛr nɩ a wʊ ma Mɛɛr mɩ be be.

english_verse: Then Judas bought some land with the money he was given for doing that evil thing. He fell headfirst into the field. His body burst open, and all his insides came out.
translation_verse: Judas putuyar wʊn nyɛ lɛ ɩka wʊ dãn wɛr, be lɛ wʊ chʊr ju pur ka a nyaba a jaa yi.

english_verse: When the people of Jerusalem found out about this, they called the place Akeldama, which in the local language means “Field of Blood.”
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na be ka a Jerusalɛm lɛ wõ a 'yɛr nyã na ba bʊɔlɔ a jie a ba kɔkɔr pɔ ɩka, Akeldama. A par lɛ, Jãɩ Wɛr.

english_verse: In the book of Psalms it says, “Leave his house empty, and don't let anyone live there.” It also says, “Let someone else have his job.”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita 'yɛr, “Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Nãa David sɛb a wʊ yiel gãn pɔ, ‘A wʊ jie wʊ lɩɛb dãlpʊɔ, ka a nɩrɛ jaa taa kpɩɛrɛ be ɛ,’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: So we need someone else to help us tell others that Jesus has been raised from death. He must also be one of the men who was with us from the very beginning. He must have been with us from the time the Lord Jesus was baptized by John until the day he was taken to heaven.
translation_verse: Piel a Jɔɔn Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ sɔ̃ɔ wa tãn a sɔ̃ɔ nyã a Yesu na yi a sɩ sɛ̃ do a saaju. A nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ na pʊɔ sɩ dire a wʊ kũu pɔ irfʊ dãasɩɛ.”

english_verse: Two men were suggested: One of them was Joseph Barsabbas, known as Justus, and the other was Matthias.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩbɛ ayi. Josefʊ ban bʊɔlɔ Basabasɩ na ba lɛ bʊɔlɔ wʊ Jusɩtusɩ nɩ Matɩyasɩ.

english_verse: Then they all prayed, “Lord, you know what everyone is like! Show us the one you have chosen
translation_verse: Na ba pãa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrɛ, “Sɩ Soro, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ jaa pʊtɩɛr, wiil sɩ a nɩbɛ ayi banyãna ãsʊɔ fʊn na ir.

english_verse: to be an apostle and to serve in place of Judas, who got what he deserved.”
translation_verse: Ka wʊn de a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jie a Judas na bar, tɩ chen a jie wʊn pʊɔ.”

english_verse: They drew names, and Matthias was chosen to join the group of the eleven apostles.
translation_verse: A ba pãa gba gbãm ka a gbãbie tɩ ir Matɩyasɩ a wʊ pʊɔ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ pie nɩ bʊ̃'yen pɔ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit took control of everyone, and they began speaking whatever languages the Spirit let them speak.
translation_verse: Ka ba jaa sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ba piel 'yɛrɛ kɔkɔyor lɛ a Sɩɛ na kʊ ba.

english_verse: Many religious Jews from every country in the world were living in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ na joro a Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ na ba yi a tẽn tẽn wa kpɩɛrɛ a be a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: And when they heard this noise, a crowd gathered. But they were surprised, because they were hearing everything in their own languages.
translation_verse: Ban wa wõ a gɔ̃mɔ̃ nyã, a nɩyɔɔ ba nyãna ba jaa wa lɔ̃ɔn taa na ba ɩ chĩcham, bojũu ãsʊɔ ma wõn ban 'yɛrɛ a wʊ kɔkɔr.

english_verse: They were excited and amazed, and said: Don't all these who are speaking come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Ka a ɩ yel dũu naa, na a 'maa ba jaa nɛɛ ka ba sʊrɔ taa, “A ba ɩ Galilee dẽme lɛ a banyãna na 'yɛrɛ ɛ?

english_verse: Some of us are from Parthia, Media, and Elam. Others are from Mesopotamia, Judea, Cappadocia, Pontus, Asia,
translation_verse: Parti dẽme, Mede dẽme, nɩ a Elam dẽme. Bamɩne mɩ yin Mesopotamiya, Judiya, Kapadosiya nɩ Pontus nɩ Asɩya.

english_verse: Everyone was excited and confused. Some of them even kept asking each other, “What does all this mean?”
translation_verse: Ka a anyãna sɔb ba nɩbir ka ba nɛɛr 'maa a ba sʊrɔ taa, “A anyãna par nɩ bo?”

english_verse: Others made fun of the Lord's followers and said, “They are drunk.” Peter Speaks to the Crowd
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne kpɛrɛ 'yɛrɛ, “Dãa lɛ maal ba a lɛ nɛ.”

english_verse: Peter stood with the eleven apostles and spoke in a loud and clear voice to the crowd: Friends and everyone else living in Jerusalem, listen carefully to what I have to say!
translation_verse: Ka a Pita nɩ a Pie Nɩ Bʊ̃'yen pãa ir ara ka wʊ 'yɛr kpɛ̃ɔ jaa kʊ a nɩbɛ, “Juu nɩbɛ nɩ nɩrɛ jaa na kpɩɛrɛ ka a Jerusalɛm, yɩ vɛ̃ ka n wiil yɩ a par. Yɩ chɛlɛ a lɛ ɩn na 'yɛr.

english_verse: You are wrong to think that these people are drunk. After all, it is only nine o'clock in the morning.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna ba nyũ dãa ɛ, nɩtãa a lɛ yɩn tɩɛr ɛ, a chɛnɛ na ɩ bibi'maar.

english_verse: “When the last days come, I will give my Spirit to everyone. Your sons and daughters will prophesy. Your young men will see visions, and your old men will have dreams.
translation_verse: ‘Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka a ber baaraa daar, wʊn kpaaraa a wʊ Sɩɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ ba jaa. Ka a yɩ dabil nɩ a pɔɔbil 'yɛrɛ a 'yɛrsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ba, ka a yɩ dabil nyɛrɛ nyɛfʊsɩ, ka a yɩ danyɔ̃n mɩ jãna jãnsɩ.

english_verse: In those days I will give my Spirit to my servants, both men and women, and they will prophesy.
translation_verse: A bala gba na ɩ a n gbãgbadɔɔr nɩ a pɔbɔ, ba jaa pɔ lɛ ɩn kpaar a n Sɩɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba a ber ala pɔ, ka ba 'yɛrɛ a n 'yɛr.

english_verse: “I will work miracles in the sky above and wonders on the earth below. There will be blood and fire and clouds of smoke.
translation_verse: Ɩn wiil ban yelfɛrsɩ na yi saaju ka a jãnsɩ mɩ be ka a tẽe, jãɩ, bũu nɩ jʊʊr na den jie wʊ jaa.

english_verse: The sun will turn dark, and the moon will be as red as blood before the great and wonderful day of the Lord appears.
translation_verse: Ka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ lɩɛb lĩi ka a ŋmɛra mɩ lɩɛb jãɩ kaar tɩchɛ ka a sɩ Soro bɩbir 'lɔn na chaar pãa wa.

english_verse: Then the Lord will save everyone who asks for his help.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ nɩrɛ jaa na pãa bʊɔlɔ a sɩ Soro yuor na nyɛn faafʊ.’ (Joɛl

english_verse: Now, listen to what I have to say about Jesus from Nazareth. God proved he sent Jesus to you by having him work miracles, wonders, and signs. All of you know this.
translation_verse: “Isɩral nɩbɛ yɩ chɛlɛ ka, A Yesu nyã na yi a Najaretɩ 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn ir kʊ yɩ, na wʊ de wʊ tʊ̃n a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, nɩ tʊ̃fɛrsɩ, nɩ jãnsɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a yɩ pɔ, ka yɩ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn.

english_verse: God had already planned and decided that Jesus would be handed over to you. So you took him and had evil men put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: Ba nyɔɔn a daba nyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nuur pɔ nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ tu a wʊ bɔfʊ nɩ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ, de nie 'yɛr bin, ka a putudẽme sʊ̃ʊ yɩ ka yɩ kpa wʊ a daa ju a wʊ kpi.

english_verse: But God set him free from death and raised him to life. Death could not hold him in its power.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn sãɩ wʊ a kũu pɔ, na wʊ faa wʊ a kũu wõm pɔ, bojũu a kũu ba tara kpɛ̃ɔ na nyɔɔ wʊ taa lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: What David said are really the words of Jesus, “I always see the Lord near me, and I will not be afraid with him at my right side.
translation_verse: “A Nãa David dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr, ‘Bɩbir jaa lɛ n nyɛrɛ a n Soro, bojũu wʊ ben a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, n kʊ̃ wa lɔɔ gbɛr ɛ.

english_verse: Because of this, my heart will be glad, my words will be joyful, and I will live in hope.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka n pʊɔ pɛl ka n jãlbir chɩlɛ, ka a n ãgãn mɩ tara tɩɛr tɔfʊ jie.

english_verse: The Lord won't leave me in the grave. I am his holy one, and he won't let my body decay.
translation_verse: Bojũu fʊ kʊ̃ wa bar ma be a yaa pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ ka fʊ bar a fʊ Chɛchɛ Sʊɔ 'lɔ ka wʊ pʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: He has shown me the path to life, and he makes me glad by being near me.”
translation_verse: Fʊ wiil man a nyɛvʊr sɔr, fʊn vɛ̃n ka nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma a fʊ niem.’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: My friends, it is right for me to speak to you about our ancestor David. He died and was buried, and his tomb is still here.
translation_verse: “N yɛɛr, n 'yɛr chãa pɔ kʊ yɩ ɩka a sɩ sãakpã David kpi naa a ba ũu, a wʊ yaa lɛ anyãna na be ka dɩna.

english_verse: But David was a prophet, and he knew that God had made a promise he would not break. He had told David someone from his own family would someday be king.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ wʊ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr nɛɛ kʊ wʊ ɩka, wʊn vɛ̃ naa ka 'lɔ David yɔ̃ɔ jãnɛ a wʊ nãa dakɔɔ ju.

english_verse: David knew this would happen, and so he told us Christ would be raised to life. He said God would not leave him in the grave or let his body decay.
translation_verse: David den nie nyɛ a lɛ na be a wʊ niem, ala lɛ so ka wʊ 'yɛr a Kɩrɩsɩto kũu pɔ irfʊ 'yɛr, na wʊ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ kʊ̃ gã be a yaa pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ ka a wʊ ãgãn pʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: All of us can tell you that God has raised Jesus to life!
translation_verse: “Nãaŋmɩn sãɩ naa a Yesu nyãna ka wʊ ir ɩ vʊr, sɩn lɛ ɩ a anyãna a jaa dãasɩɛ dẽme.

english_verse: Jesus was taken up to sit at the right side of God, and he was given the Holy Spirit, just as the Father had promised. Jesus is also the one who has given the Spirit to us, and this is what you are now seeing and hearing.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ wʊ 'mɔɔ don bin a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, ka a Sãa kʊ a Yesu a wʊ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ wʊ. A Sɩɛ nyã lɛ wʊ kpaar 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ ka yɩ nyɛ tɩ be wõnõ.

english_verse: David didn't go up to heaven. So he wasn't talking about himself when he said, “The Lord told my Lord to sit at his right side,
translation_verse: David ba dɔ̃ɔ do a saaju ɛ, tɩ wʊ 'yɛr naa, ‘A Soro 'yɛr kʊ a n Soro, “Jãnɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie,

english_verse: until he made my Lord's enemies into a footstool for him.”
translation_verse: ka n wa de a fʊ dɔ̃dẽme ka ba ɩ a fʊ gbɛɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie.” ’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Everyone in Israel should then know for certain that God has made Jesus both Lord and Christ, even though you put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: “A lɛ jũu, vɛ̃ ka a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba jaa bɔ̃ɔ sɩrɛ jaa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn maal naa Yesu nyã yɩn kpa a daa ju ka wʊ ɩ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Nɩ-iraa.”

english_verse: When the people heard this, they were very upset. They asked Peter and the other apostles, “Friends, what should we do?”
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ na wõ a nɩtɔ̃, ka a ŋmara ba a nyãn, ka ba sʊʊr a Pita nɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ, “N yɛɛr, ŋmɩnɛ sɩn ɩ?”

english_verse: Peter said to them, “Turn to God and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Ka a Pita 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr, ka ba de a Yesu yuor son yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, ka a yɩ yelbier baar. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ yɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.

english_verse: This promise is for you and your children. It is for everyone our Lord God will choose, no matter where they live.”
translation_verse: Yɩn nɩ a yɩ bibiir lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ, yɩn nɩ a bala ba jaa na be a tɛɛr, nɩ a bala ba jaa a sɩ Soro Nãaŋmɩn na wa bʊɔl.”

english_verse: Peter told them many other things as well. Then he said, “I beg you to save yourselves from what will happen to all these evil people.”
translation_verse: Pita den 'yɛr yɔɔ kpãan ba, na wʊ kpãkpãan ba 'yɛrɛ, “Yɩ faa yɩ mãɛ yin a dɩna nɩfɩlefɩlesɩ pɔ.”

english_verse: believed his message and were baptized.
translation_verse: ) pʊɔ ba a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: They spent their time learning from the apostles, and they were like family to each other. They also broke bread and prayed together. Life among the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Ba den ba mãɛ kʊ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ wiilfʊ, na ba tara nɛbʊ̃'yen lɔ̃ɔ dire, na ba lɔ̃ɔ puoro a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed by the many miracles and wonders that the apostles worked.
translation_verse: Dãbãɛ kpɛ̃n nɩrɛ jaa a lɛ ban nyɛ ka a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ tʊ̃ a tʊ̃fɛrsɩ nɩ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers often met together, and they shared everything they had.
translation_verse: A bala na sɔɔ de, ba jaa lɔ̃ɔn taa jibʊ̃'yen na ba sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa.

english_verse: They would sell their property and possessions and give the money to whoever was in need.
translation_verse: Na ba daara a ba bʊ̃tarsɩ na ba ma põ ir kʊ taa lɛ jaa ãsʊɔ na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Day after day they met together in the temple. They broke bread together in different homes and shared their food happily and freely,
translation_verse: Bɩbir jaa lɛ ba ma lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ, na ba yʊɔrɔ taa yie ŋmara a paanʊ̃ɔ dire nɩ pʊpɛl nɩ pʊtɩɛr bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: while praising God. Everyone liked them, and each day the Lord added to their group others who were being saved.
translation_verse: Ba pɛɛrɛ naa Nãaŋmɩn ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa mɩ ara a ba puor. A sɩ Soro ma vɛ̃ naa ka a bala na nyɛ faafʊ, pʊɔ ba bɩbir jaa.

english_verse: The time of prayer was about three o'clock in the afternoon, and Peter and John were going into the temple.
translation_verse: Bɩbir ãsʊɔ Pita nɩ Jɔɔn duoro naa a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ, a puorfʊ jie mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na gɔr.

english_verse: A man who had been born lame was being carried to the temple door. Each day he was placed beside this door, known as the Beautiful Gate. He sat there and begged from the people who were going in.
translation_verse: Ka a daba ban lɔ̃ɔ dɔɔn a wʊ gbɛr, a ba ma tuo wʊ tɩ bin a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ, Vɩla. Be lɛ ba ma tuo wʊ tɩ bin bɩbir jaa a wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ a bala na kpɩɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir bɛchaar pɔ libie.

english_verse: The man saw Peter and John entering the temple, and he asked them for money.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa nyɛ a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn na kpɩɛrɛ, a wʊ sʊɔrɔ ba a libir.

english_verse: But they looked straight at him and said, “Look up at us!”
translation_verse: Ka a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn kaara wʊ a lɛ a tãɩɩ, ka a Pita wa 'yɛr, “Kaara sɩ.”

english_verse: The man stared at them and thought he was going to get something.
translation_verse: Ka a daba tɔ̃ɔ fur a nɩbir a lɛ chir chir chir 'yɔ̃ɔ ba tɩɛrɛ ɩka wʊn nyɛn bon.

english_verse: But Peter said, “I don't have any silver or gold! But I will give you what I do have. In the name of Jesus Christ from Nazareth, get up and start walking.”
translation_verse: A Pita pãa 'yɛr, “N ba tara libir bɩɩ, sɛlma kʊrɔ fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ ɩn tara lɛ ɩn kʊ fʊ. Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yi a Najaretɩ yuor pɔ, ir chiine.”

english_verse: Peter then took him by the right hand and helped him up. At once the man's feet and ankles became strong,
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ nyɔɔ a daba nũsʊ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ ka wʊ ir ka a ɩ a gbɛpɛlɛ nɩ a nakɔɔtɩɛ kpɛ̃mɛ naa.

english_verse: and he jumped up and started walking. He went with Peter and John into the temple, walking and jumping and praising God.
translation_verse: Ka a daba ɔɔ chʊr a gbɛɛ na wʊ piel chiine, na wʊ pãa tu ba kpɛ̃n be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir bɛchaar pɔ. Be lɛ wʊ tɩ ɔɔrɔ yʊɔrɔ na wʊ pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Everyone saw him walking around and praising God.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ ba jaa na wa nyɛ wʊ, a lɛ wʊn chiine pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn,

english_verse: They knew he was the beggar who had been lying beside the Beautiful Gate, and they were completely surprised. They could not imagine what had happened to the man. Peter Speaks in the Temple
translation_verse: ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa an ɩ 'lɔ lɛ ma jãnɛ sʊɔrɔ libie be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir dɔ̃dɔr 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a, Vɩla. Ka a ɩ ba chĩcham naa 'maa ba nɛɛ a lɛ na ɩ.

english_verse: While the man kept holding on to Peter and John, the whole crowd ran to them in amazement at the place known as Solomon's Porch.
translation_verse: An ɩ a daba chɛnɛ na pɔɔ a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn ka a nɩbɛ nɛɛr 'maa a ba jo wa titaa a be ban bʊɔlɔ a Solomon Bɛchaar pɔ.

english_verse: Peter saw that a crowd had gathered, and he said: Friends, why are you surprised at what has happened? Why are you staring at us? Do you think we have some power of our own? Do you think we were able to make this man walk because we are so religious?
translation_verse: Pita na nyɛ a lɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ, “Isɩral dɔɔr woɩ, bãa lɛ so ka a nɛɛr 'maa yɩ a lɛ mɔ̃? Bãa lɛ yɩ fur a nɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ fɩka sɩn mãɛ kpɛ̃ɔ bɩɩ sɩn mãɛ maal vɩla lɛ sɩ maal a daba nyã ka wʊ chiine?

english_verse: The God that Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and our other ancestors worshiped has brought honor to his Servant Jesus. He is the one you betrayed. You turned against him when he was being tried by Pilate, even though Pilate wanted to set him free.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a Abraham, Isaakɩ nɩ a Jekɔb Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ sãakpãmɩne Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ Yesu yuor. Yɩn lɛ nyɔɔ wʊ tɩr ɩka ba kʊ wʊ, ka a Pilate ŋme nyãa na bar wʊ tɩ yɩ 'yɛr ɩka yaa bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: You rejected Jesus, who was holy and good. You asked for a murderer to be set free,
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɛr naa ɩka yaa bɔ̃ɔ a chɛchɛ sʊɔ nɩ a yelmãɛ sʊɔ ɛ, tɩ na yɩ sʊɔr ka ba yuo a nɩkʊrɔ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: You see this man, and you know him. He put his faith in the name of Jesus and was made strong. Faith in Jesus made this man completely well while everyone was watching.
translation_verse: A daba nyãna nɩ a sɩn na 'mataa sɔɔ a Yesu lɛ sa a daba nyãna baal yɩn nyɛ na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ, sɩrɛ jaa sɩn sɔɔ de a Yesu yuor lɛ wʊ sa, a daba nyãna yɩn ben nyɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure you and your leaders didn't know what you were doing.
translation_verse: “Pʊ̃pãanyã, yɛɛr, n bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka ba bɔ̃ɔ fʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka yɩ tʊ̃ a lɛ nɛ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ na dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃.

english_verse: Then the time will come when the Lord will give you fresh strength. He will send you Jesus, his chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: ka wʊ gba na tʊ̃ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'lɔ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ ir bin kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: But Jesus must stay in heaven until God makes all things new, just as his holy prophets promised long ago.
translation_verse: Wʊn chɛnɛ na jãnɛ be a saaju, tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ Nãaŋmɩn na 'mataa a bonsɩ a jaa nɩtãa lɛ wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ a kõr jaa tu, a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ chɛchɛsɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: No one who disobeys this prophet will be one of God's people any longer.”
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa ba wa chɛlɛ a lɛ wʊn na 'yɛrɛ ɛ, ban ir wʊ nũu bar a wʊ nɩbɛ pɔ.’ (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: Samuel and all the other prophets who came later also spoke about what is now happening.
translation_verse: “Sɩrɛ jaa, a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ba jaa na yi a Samuwɛl sɔ̃ɔ mɩ 'yɛr naa a bɩbie anyãna 'yɛr.

english_verse: You are really the ones God told his prophets to speak to. And you were given the promise God made to your ancestors. He said to Abraham, “All nations on earth will be blessed because of someone from your family.”
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ banyãna bibiir nɩ a nɛtɩraa 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tara nɩ a sɩ sãamɩne. Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Abraham, ‘An tu naa a fʊ yɔn pɔ, ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa na be ka a tẽe na nyɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ.’ (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: God sent his chosen Son to you first, because God wanted to bless you and make each one of you turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na wa ir a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃, yɩn sɛ̃ lɛ wʊ de nie tʊ̃ wʊ ka wʊ tɩ sʊ̃ʊ yɩ na wʊ lɩɛb a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa yin a wʊ putusɔr pɔ.”

english_verse: It was already late in the afternoon, and they arrested Peter and John and put them in jail for the night.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba nyɔɔ a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn na ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ba pɔɔfʊ die pɔ bar ka wɛr na chaar, bojũu mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ mʊr baar.

english_verse: But a lot of people who had heard the message believed it. So by now there were about
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a bala na wõ a lɛ a Pita na 'yɛr a Yesu 'yɛr na ba sɔɔ de na ɩn dɔɔr tur anũu (

english_verse: The next morning the leaders, the elders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: A wɛr na wa chaar, a ba nɩdierbe nɩ a ba nɩbɛrɛ 'matãan a Mosesɩ nɛɛ wiwiilbe lɔ̃ɔn taa be a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: The high priest Annas was there, as well as Caiaphas, John, Alexander, and other members of the high priest's family.
translation_verse: Ka Anasɩ na ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nɩ Kayafasɩ, Jɔɔn nɩ Aleksanda 'matãan a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nɩbɛ bamɩne.

english_verse: They brought in Peter and John and made them stand in the middle while they questioned them. They asked, “By what power and in whose name have you done this?”
translation_verse: A ba tɩ yuo a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn waan a ba wa sʊrɔ ba, “Kpɛ̃ɔ buor nɩ yobuor lɛ yɩ de tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a anyãna?”

english_verse: Peter was filled with the Holy Spirit and told the nation's leaders and the elders:
translation_verse: Ka a Pita na sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “A yɩn nɩdierbe nɩ a yɩn nɩbɛrɛ,

english_verse: You are questioning us today about a kind deed in which a man who could not walk was healed.
translation_verse: ala ɩ yɩ ben bʊɔl sɩ dɩna ɩka sɩ wa man a maal vɩla nyã na vɛ̃ ka a gbɛrɛ sa.

english_verse: But there is something we must tell you and everyone else in Israel. This man is standing here completely well because of the power of Jesus Christ from Nazareth. You put Jesus to death on a cross, but God raised him to life.
translation_verse: Yɩ pãa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yaa, a yɩn nɩ nɩrɛ jaa na be a Isɩral, ɩka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nyã na yi a Najaretɩ yuor pɔ, a 'lɔ yɩn kʊ a daa ju, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn sãɩ wʊ a kũu pɔ, ka wʊ ɩ vʊr, lɛ sa a daba nyãna na ben ara a kana.

english_verse: He is the stone you builders thought was worthless, and now he is the most important stone of all.
translation_verse: Wʊ ɩ naa ‘A kʊsɩr 'lɔ a yɩn mɩmɩɛrbɛ na tɔr bar, 'lɔ lɛ wa ɩ a kʊsɩr ju.’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Only Jesus has the power to save! His name is the only one in all the world that can save anyone.
translation_verse: Fafaara jaa ba lɛ be be ɛ, bojũu yuor jaa ba lɛ be ka a tẽe pɔ, na tʊ̃ɔ nɩrɛ faa ɛ.”

english_verse: The officials were amazed to see how brave Peter and John were, and they knew that these two apostles were only ordinary men and not well educated. The officials were certain these men had been with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ban nyɛ a lɛ a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn na ba joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ban ba jãn gãn chen tɛɛr ɛ, ka nɛ'maa ba. Ka ba tɩɛrtɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ be a Yesu sɛ̃.

english_verse: But they could not deny what had happened. The man who had been healed was standing there with the apostles.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ba mɩ nyɛn a daba 'lɔ na sa 'mataa ara nɩ ba, baa lɛ tara 'yɛr na 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: The officials commanded them to leave the council room. Then the officials said to each other,
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ ba 'yɛr ba a ba yi chɛ̃chɛ̃ɛ, tɩ ba pãa guoro taa 'yɛrɛ,

english_verse: “What can we do with these men? Everyone in Jerusalem knows about this miracle, and we cannot say it didn't happen.
translation_verse: “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ sɩn ɩ a nɩbɛ banyãna? Nɩrɛ jaa na be ka a Jerusalɛm bɔ̃ɔn naa a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ban tʊ̃ a sɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ chiir ɛ.

english_verse: But to keep this thing from spreading, we will warn them never again to speak to anyone about the name of Jesus.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ sɩn pɔɔ naa a yele nyãna sɔr ka nɩrɛ kʊ̃ lɛ wõ naa ɛ, yɩ ɩ a sɩ fuu ba ka ba taa ɩrɛ wa pʊrɔ a yuor nyãna kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa ɛ.”

english_verse: So they called the two apostles back in and told them they must never, for any reason, teach anything about the name of Jesus.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba bʊɔl ba a ba kpɛ ka ba kpãkpãan ba ɩka, ba taa ɩrɛ wa 'yɛrɛ bɩɩ wile nɩ a Yesu yuor go ɛ.

english_verse: Peter and John answered, “Do you think God wants us to obey you or to obey him?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn mãɛ yɩ pɛ kaa, a sɛɛn Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ka sɩn tu a yɩ nɛɛ gar a Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ?

english_verse: We cannot keep quiet about what we have seen and heard.”
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩn 'lɔ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bar a 'yɛr sɩn nyɛn nɩbir tɩ wõ 'yɛrfʊ ɛ.”

english_verse: As soon as Peter and John had been set free, they went back and told the others everything the chief priests and the leaders had said to them.
translation_verse: Ban wa bar a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn, ba chen a ba taaba sɛ̃ tɩ man ala a jaa a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ na 'yɛr kʊ ba.

english_verse: When the rest of the Lord's followers heard this, they prayed together and said: Master, you created heaven and earth, the sea, and everything in them.
translation_verse: A ba taaba na wõ a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃, ba jaa 'mantaa nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen puor Nãaŋmɩn na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ Sʊɔ, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ maal a saaju nɩ a tẽe nɩ a man kpɛ̃ɛ nɩ bon jaa na be a pɔ.

english_verse: And by the Holy Spirit you spoke to our ancestor David. He was your servant, and you told him to say: “Why are all the Gentiles so furious? Why do people make foolish plans?
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a fʊ Sɩɛ haa a fʊ gbãgbaa na ɩ a sɩ sãa David nɛɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr, ‘Bo lɛ so ka a paalsɩ nyɛ suur, ka a nɩbɛ ŋmara a dɔɔl pɔrsɩ?

english_verse: The kings of earth prepare for war, and the rulers join together against the Lord and his Messiah.”
translation_verse: A wɛr nãmɩne tʊɔrɔ naa gbɛchile, ka a nɩbɛrɛ mɩ lɔ̃ɔ taa jɛɛrɛ nɩ a Soro nɩ a fʊ Nɩ-iraa.’ (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Here in Jerusalem, Herod and Pontius Pilate got together with the Gentiles and the people of Israel. Then they turned against your holy Servant Jesus, your chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ a Hɛrɔd nɩ a Pontius Pilate lɔ̃ɔ taa nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, nɩ a Juu nɩbɛ a tẽe nyãna pɔ, na ba jɛb a fʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃chɛchɛ Yesu, a 'lɔ fʊn ir.

english_verse: Lord, listen to their threats! We are your servants. So make us brave enough to speak your message.
translation_verse: “Pʊ̃pãanyã sɩ Soro, kaa lɛ ban fuu sɩ, tɩ na fʊ sʊ̃ʊ a fʊ gbãgbaar a sɩ mʊɔl a fʊ 'yɛr nɩ 'lafʊ.

english_verse: Show your mighty power, as we heal people and work miracles and wonders in the name of your holy Servant Jesus.
translation_verse: Tur a fʊ nũu sãan baalsɩ, na fʊ tʊ̃ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a fʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃chɛchɛ Yesu yuor.”

english_verse: After they had prayed, the meeting place shook. They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and bravely spoke God's message. Sharing Possessions
translation_verse: Ban wa puor baar, a jie 'lɔ ban lɔ̃ɔ taa damaa. Ka ba jaa sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ, na ba 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ 'lafʊ.

english_verse: The group of followers all felt the same way about everything. None of them claimed that their possessions were their own, and they shared everything they had with each other.
translation_verse: Ka a bala na sɔɔ de, ba jaa tara na tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen nɩ nyãbʊ̃'yen. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa maa 'yɛr ɩka a wʊ bonsɩ ɩ naa a 'lɔ tɛɛ bon ɛ, ba ma põn bon jaa ban tara.

english_verse: In a powerful way the apostles told everyone that the Lord Jesus was now alive. God greatly blessed his followers,
translation_verse: A nɩtʊ̃nsɩ den kpɛ̃ɔ mana nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu kũu pɔ irfʊ 'yɛr, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ be a ba jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: and no one went in need of anything. Everyone who owned land or houses would sell them and bring the money
translation_verse: Ba ãsʊɔ jaa ba dɔ̃ɔ faa bon ɛ, sɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ a bala na tara por nɩ yie ma da na ba ma waan a libie,

english_verse: to the apostles. Then they would give the money to anyone in need.
