translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na tɔɔr naa a bala na ɩrɛ a yelsɩ anyãna 'yɛr tun yelmãɛ sɔr pɔ.

english_verse: Do you really think God won't punish you, when you behave exactly like the people you accuse?
translation_verse: A lɛ a fʊ̃ʊ nɩsaal mɩ na tɔɔrɔ nɩbɛ 'yɛr, tɩ na fʊ mɩ maal a yele ala nɩ a ju, fʊ tɩɛr ɩka fʊn pɔl yi a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ pɔ ɔ?

english_verse: You surely don't think much of God's wonderful goodness or of his patience and willingness to put up with you. Don't you know that the reason God is good to you is because he wants you to turn to him?
translation_verse: Bɩɩ yɩ nyɛ naa Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ bɔ̃ɔn yɔɔ jũu, nɩ a wʊ maalvɩla, nɩ a wʊ kãnyir, na yaa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn maalvɩla wile yɩn tɩɛr lɩɛb fʊ sɔr ɛ?

english_verse: God will reward each of us for what we have done.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn “na yab nɩrɛ jaa lɛ wʊn tũ jã.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: He will give eternal life to everyone who has patiently done what is good in the hope of receiving glory, honor, and life that lasts forever.
translation_verse: Bala na mar ara na ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ vɩla bʊɔrɔ tɩɩr, nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ a ala na ba pʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, wʊn kʊ ban nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: But he will show how angry and furious he can be with every selfish person who rejects the truth and wants to do evil.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bala na bʊɔrɔ a ba mãɛ bɔb, na ba tɔr a yelmãɛ tɩ turo dɛɛr, Nãaŋmɩn suur nɩ a wʊ kpãafʊ gãn kʊ ba.

english_verse: All who are wicked will be punished with trouble and suffering. It doesn't matter if they are Jews or Gentiles.
translation_verse: Wõm nɩ tuo difʊ na ben be kʊ nɩsaal jaa na ɩrɛ yelbier. An piel naa a Juu nɩbɛ sɛ̃, tɩ mɩ lʊ̃ɔ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But all who do right will be rewarded with glory, honor, and peace, whether they are Jews or Gentiles.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ tɩɩr nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na ben be kʊ nɩrɛ jaa na maala vɩla, a Juu nɩbɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God doesn't have any favorites!
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba tara kaa gar taa ɛ.

english_verse: Those people who don't know about God's Law will still be punished for what they do wrong. And the Law will be used to judge everyone who knows what it says.
translation_verse: Bala jaa na ba bɔ̃ɔ a Mosesɩ nɛɛ tɩ tʊ̃ dɛɛr, mɩn wɛ naa ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a nɛɛ jũu, ka bala jaa mɩn bɔ̃ɔ a Mosesɩ nɛɛ tɩ tʊ̃ a dɛɛr Nãaŋmɩn na den a nɛɛ nyã tɔɔr a ba 'yɛr.

english_verse: This proves that the conscience is like a law written in the human heart. And it will show whether we are forgiven or condemned,
translation_verse: Ba wiil ɩka a lɛ a nɛɛ na bʊɔrɔ sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ be a ba nyãa pɔ, ka a ba tɩɛr mɩ di dãasɩɛ ma gɔ̃nɔ̃ ba bɩɩ 'yɛrɛ pʊɔrɔ ba.

english_verse: when God appoints Jesus Christ to judge everyone's secret thoughts, just as my message says. The Jews and the Law
translation_verse: A anyãna na ɩ naa a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn na tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ na wʊ tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa yelsɔɔlsɩ nɩtãa lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ a n 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Some of you call yourselves Jews. You trust in the Law and take pride in God.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a fʊ̃ʊ, ala ɩ fʊ bʊɔlɔ na a fʊ mãɛ Juu nɩrɛ, na fʊ dɩɛl a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na fʊ jɩrɛ lɛ fʊ̃ʊ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na tara nɛbʊ̃'yen,

english_verse: By reading the Scriptures you learn how God wants you to behave, and you discover what is right.
translation_verse: ala ɩ fʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa a wʊ bɔfʊ na fʊ bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na gar a jaa bojũu a nɛɛ lɛ wiil fʊ,

english_verse: You are sure that you are a guide for the blind and a light for all who are in the dark.
translation_verse: ala ɩ fʊ chɛn nyãa ɩka jɔ̃tɔɔrɔ lɛ fʊ ɩ, na fʊ ɩ chãa chaara a bala na be a libe pɔ,

english_verse: And since there is knowledge and truth in God's Law, you think you can instruct fools and teach young people.
translation_verse: na fʊ wile a jɔlɔ, na fʊ wile a bibiir, bojũu a Mosesɩ nɛɛ pɔ lɛ fʊ nyɛ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: But how can you teach others when you refuse to learn? You preach it is wrong to steal. But do you steal?
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ nyã na wile a fʊ taaba, faa wiil a fʊ mãɛ ɛ? Fʊ̃ʊ nyã na ma 'yɛrɛ ɩka jufʊ ba ɩ ɛ, fʊ ma ju naa ɔ?

english_verse: You say people should be faithful in marriage. But are you faithful? You hate idols, yet you rob their temples.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ na ma 'yɛrɛ ɩka nɩbɛ ba ta sɛ̃nɛ ɛ, fʊ ma sɛ̃n bɩɩ? Fʊ̃ʊ nyã na kpɛrɛ a tɩbɛ tɩ fʊ ma juro naa a tɩbɛ der bonsɩ bɩɩ?

english_verse: You take pride in the Law, but you disobey the Law and bring shame to God.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ nyã na jɩrɛ nɩ a Mosesɩ nɛɛ nyã, fʊ ma 'yɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn vã fʊn sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nɛɛ ɔ?

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures tell us, “You have made foreigners say insulting things about God.”
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “A yɩ jũu lɛ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a n yuor.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Being circumcised is worthwhile, if you obey the Law. But if you don't obey the Law, you are no better off than people who are not circumcised.
translation_verse: Yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃ ala ɩ fʊ turo naa lɛ a nɛɛ na 'yɛr, tɩchɛ ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ baa turo a nɛɛ ɛ, fʊn kaara fɩka faa ŋmaa yʊɔr ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, if they obey the Law, they are as good as anyone who is circumcised.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a bala na ba ŋmaa a yʊɔr ɛ, turo na lɛ a nɛɛ na bin, ba kʊ̃ kaara fɩka yɔŋmarba lɛ ba ɩ ɛ?

english_verse: So everyone who obeys the Law, but has never been circumcised, will condemn you. Even though you are circumcised and have the Law, you still don't obey its teachings.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba ŋmaa a yʊɔr a ãgãn pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ na wʊ turo a nɛɛ jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn 'yɛr, a yɩn bala gba na tara a nɛbinsɩ gãn na fʊ ŋmaa a yʊɔr tɩ faa turo a nɛbinsɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Just because you live like a Jew and are circumcised doesn't make you a real Jew.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ na ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ba ɩ a ãgãn nyã yele tɛɛ lɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ na ɩ a ãgãn yele ɛ.

english_verse: To be a real Jew you must obey the Law. True circumcision is something that happens deep in your heart, not something done to your body. And besides, you should want praise from God and not from humans.
translation_verse: Kai, wʊ ɩn a Juu nɩrɛ na be a pʊɔm, ka a wʊ yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ŋmaa a wʊ nyãa yʊɔr a ba yi a nɛbinsɩ gãn pɔ ɛ. A nɩrɛ nyãna pɛɛfʊ ba yire nɩbɛ sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yin Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: It is good in a lot of ways! First of all, God's messages were spoken to the Jews.
translation_verse: Sɔr jaa pɔ, ala na de nie lɛ ɩka bala lɛ Nãaŋmɩn de nie kʊ a wʊ 'yɛrbie.

english_verse: But the answer is, “No.” Otherwise, how could God judge the world?
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa ba lɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ tɔɔr a wɛr nɩbɛ 'yɛr?

english_verse: Not one of them understands or even searches for God.
translation_verse: Nɩbʊ̃'yen jaa ba be be bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ 'yɛr par ɛ, nɩbʊ̃'yen jaa ba yʊɔrɔ bʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: They have all turned away and are worthless. There isn't one person who does right.
translation_verse: Ba jaa lɩɛb puor, ka ba jaa lɩɛb ɩ nɩsɔ̃ɔnsɩ. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa ba maala vɩla ɛ, nɩbʊ̃'yen gba ba be be ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Their words are like an open pit, and their tongues are good only for telling lies. Each word is as deadly as the fangs of a snake,
translation_verse: “A ba kɔkɔbɔɔr yuon fɩka yar, ka a ba jãlbie bɔ̃ɔ bɛlfʊ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: and they say nothing but bitter curses.
translation_verse: “Pɔ'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ 'yɛr bitor lɛ ma yire a ba nɛɛr pɔ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: These people quickly become violent.
translation_verse: “A ba gbɛɛ ma pɔɔrɔ naa jãɩ kpaarfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Wherever they go, they leave ruin and destruction.
translation_verse: Sɔr jaa ban de, sɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ dɔɔyɛ lɛ ma ɩ a jãnɛ.

english_verse: They don't know how to live in peace.
translation_verse: Baa bɔ̃ɔ nyã'maar sɔr ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: They don't even fear God.”
translation_verse: “A ba nɩbie ba joro Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: We know that everything in the Law was written for those who are under its power. The Law says these things to stop anyone from making excuses and to let God show that the whole world is guilty.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka lɛ jaa a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na 'yɛr, wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a bala na be a nɛɛ pɔ ɩka, a kpal nɩrɛ jaa nɛɛ, ka a wɛr nɩbɛ ba jaa wa man a ba nɛɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: God doesn't accept people simply because they obey the Law. No, indeed! All the Law does is to point out our sin. God's Way of Accepting People
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ ɩ nɩtor a Nãaŋmɩn niem wʊn turo a nɛɛ jũu ɛ, an ɩ a tun a nɛɛ nyã pɔ, ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ bier.

english_verse: Now we see how God does make us acceptable to him. The Law and the Prophets tell how we become acceptable, and it isn't by obeying the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, a chaar naa ɩka a torfʊ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, ba yi a Mosesɩ nɛɛ pɔ ɛ, ala lɛ a nɛɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ di dãasɩɛ.

english_verse: All of us have sinned and fallen short of God's glory.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa maal dɛɛr na baa ta a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr ɛ.

english_verse: But God treats us much better than we deserve, and because of Christ Jesus, he freely accepts us and sets us free from our sins.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ jũu, wʊ vɛ̃n ka sɩ tor na wʊ 'yɛrfaa sɩ pɔrɔ tu a faafʊ 'lɔ na yi a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃.

english_verse: What is left for us to brag about? Not a thing! Is it because we obeyed some law? No! It is because of faith.
translation_verse: Nyɩnɛ lɛ a yobɔyele lɛ be? A ba pʊɔ be ɛ. Yelbuor jũu? A Mosesɩ nɛɛ ban turo jũu bɩɩ? Kai, sɔɔfʊ jũu lɛ.

english_verse: We see that people are acceptable to God because they have faith, and not because they obey the Law.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka sɩn chɛnɛ sɔɔ ɩka nɩrɛ yele ma tor naa wʊn tara sɔɔfʊ a ba ɩ wʊn turo a nɛbinãa jũu ɛ.

english_verse: Does God belong only to the Jews? Isn't he also the God of the Gentiles? Yes, he is!
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ɩn a Juu nɩbɛ tɛɛ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ? Waa ɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ mɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ? Ɔ̃ɔ, wʊ ɩn a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ mɩ tʊɔr.

english_verse: Do we destroy the Law by our faith? Not at all! We make it even more powerful.
translation_verse: Sɩ pãa den a sɔɔfʊ nyã sɔ̃ɔn a nɛbinãa bar bɩɩ? Kai, sɔr ba be be ɛ. Sɩn lɛ pãa bɔ̃ɔ turo wʊ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God accepted Abraham because Abraham had faith in him.”
translation_verse: Bo lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr? Wʊ 'yɛr ɩka, “Abraham sɔɔn de Nãaŋmɩn ka a lɛ vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: Money paid to workers isn't a gift. It is something they earn by working.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã nɩrɛ wa tʊ̃tʊ̃mɔ̃, a wʊ sãyar ba ɩ kʊfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ sãyar lɛ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures David talks about the blessings that come to people who are acceptable to God, even though they don't do anything to deserve these blessings. David says,
translation_verse: A Nãa David mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a 'yɛr bir nyãna nɩ wʊ ju, na wʊ 'yɛr ɩka, bɔɔsʊ̃n sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ a wʊ ɩ nɩtor ka tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba pʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: “What a blessing when God forgives our sins and our evil deeds. What a blessing when the Lord erases our sins from his book.”
translation_verse: Bɔɔsʊ̃n lɛ a 'lɔ a sɩ Soro na ba lɛ sɔrɔ a wʊ yelbier dɔɔlɔ wʊ ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Are these blessings meant for circumcised people or for those who are not circumcised? Well, the Scriptures say that God accepted Abraham because Abraham had faith in him.
translation_verse: A bɔɔsʊ̃n nyãna ɩn a yɔŋmarba tɛɛ bon bɩɩ, a mɩ ɩn a bala na ba ŋmaa a yʊɔr ɛ, bon? Sɩ 'yɛr ɩka Abraham sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃n ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor.

english_verse: But when did this happen? Was it before or after Abraham was circumcised? Of course, it was before.
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ anyãna dɔ̃ɔ ɩ kʊ wʊ? Wʊn ŋmaa a yʊɔr baar lɛ bɩɩ wʊn ba ŋmaa sɛrɛ lɛ? A ba ɩ wʊn ŋmaa baar ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ ba ŋmaa sɛrɛ lɛ.

english_verse: Abraham let himself be circumcised to show he had been accepted because of his faith even before he was circumcised. This makes Abraham the father of all who are acceptable to God because of their faith, even though they are not circumcised.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn wa bɩɛr man wʊ a yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ yele, ka a ɩ jãnɛ ɩka a wʊ yele tor naa a wʊ sɔɔfʊ jũu wʊn dɔ̃ɔ ba ŋmaa a yʊɔr sɛrɛ ɛ. Lɛ lɛ wʊ pãa ɩ a bala jaa na sɔɔ de sãa, tɩchɛ na baa ŋmaa a ba yɔɩ ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ a ba ɩ nɩtorsɩ.

english_verse: This also makes Abraham the father of everyone who is circumcised and has faith in God, as Abraham did before he was circumcised. The Promise Is for All Who Have Faith
translation_verse: Wʊ mɩ ɩ naa bala jaa na ŋma a yɔɩ sãa. A ba ɩ yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ban tara a sɔɔfʊ na ba turo nɩ a lɛ a sɩ sãa Abraham na dɔ̃ɔ turo tɩ wa ŋmaa a yʊɔr.

english_verse: God promised Abraham and his descendants that he would give them the world. This promise wasn't made because Abraham had obeyed a law, but because his faith in God made him acceptable.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a nɛbinãa jũu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ a Abraham nɩ a wʊ yɔn ɩka bala lɛ na so a wɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊn ɩ nɩtor a wʊ sɔɔfʊ jũu lɛ.

english_verse: If Abraham and his descendants were given this promise because they had obeyed a law, then faith would mean nothing, and the promise would be worthless.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a bala na turo a nɛbinãa lɛ so a wɛr ɛ, sɔɔfʊ ba lɛ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn tɩr mɩ ɩ pɔrɔ.

english_verse: Everything depends on having faith in God, so that God's promise is assured by his gift of undeserved grace. This promise isn't only for Abraham's descendants who have the Law. It is for all who are Abraham's descendants because they have faith, just as he did. Abraham is the ancestor of us all.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a nɛtɩraa wa naa a sɔɔfʊ jũu, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ na sʊ̃ʊ a Abraham yɔn ba jaa, a ba ɩ a bala na turo a nɛɛ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala na tara a Abraham sɔɔfʊ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩ jaa sãa.

english_verse: God promised Abraham a lot of descendants. And when it all seemed hopeless, Abraham still had faith in God and became the ancestor of many nations.
translation_verse: Tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie ba lɛ be be ɛ, tɩ Abraham tara tɩɛrtɔ jie, na wʊ sɔɔ de ka a lɛ vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ a paal yɔɔ sãa, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Lɛ lɛ a fʊ yɔn na wa be.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: But Abraham never doubted or questioned God's promise. His faith made him strong, and he gave all the credit to God.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Abraham ba tara baal a wʊ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, nɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ nyɛn kpɛ̃ɔ a wʊ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na wʊ de tɩɩr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Abraham was certain that God could do what he had promised.
translation_verse: Wʊ sɔɔn de nuur ayi ɩka Nãaŋmɩn tara na kpɛ̃ɔ na maal a lɛ wʊn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: just as we read in the Scriptures. But these words were not written only for Abraham.
translation_verse: A 'yɛrbir na 'yɛr ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃n a wʊ ɩ nɩtor, a ba sɛb a 'lɔ tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ,

english_verse: They were written for us, since we will also be accepted because of our faith in God, who raised our Lord Jesus to life.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a mɩ ɩn a sɩ bon, Nãaŋmɩn mɩ na vɛ̃n a sɩ yele ka a tor, sɩn bala jaa na sɔɔ ɩka, 'lɔ lɛ sãɩ a Yesu na ɩ a sɩ Soro a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: God gave Jesus to die for our sins, and he raised him to life, so that we would be made acceptable to God.
translation_verse: A sɩ yelbebe jũu lɛ ba dɔ̃ɔ kʊn wʊ, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn sãɩ wʊ a kũu pɔ a wʊ ɩ vʊr, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka sɩ tor.

english_verse: By faith we have been made acceptable to God. And now, thanks to our Lord Jesus Christ, we have peace with God.
translation_verse: Wʊn ben vɛ̃ a sɩ tor a sɩ sɔɔfʊ jũu, sɩ tara na nyã'maar Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Christ has also introduced us to God's gift of undeserved grace on which we now take our stand. So we are happy, as we look forward to sharing in the glory of God.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩ tu nyɛ sɔr a sɩ sɔɔfʊ jũu kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ nyã pɔ sɩn ben ara a pʊ̃pãanyã, na sɩ chɩlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr tɩɛrtɔ nyã jũu.

english_verse: But that's not all! We gladly suffer, because we know that suffering helps us to endure.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ lɛ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ mɩ chɩlɛ na a sɩ dɔɔyɛ pɔ, bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a dɔɔyɛ lɛ na waan kãnyir,

english_verse: And endurance builds character, which gives us a hope
translation_verse: ka a kãnyir wiil a lɛ fʊn be, ka a lɛ fʊn be mɩ waan tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie.

english_verse: that will never disappoint us. All of this happens because God has given us the Holy Spirit, who fills our hearts with his love.
translation_verse: Ka a tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ vã ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn kpaar naa a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nyãn pɔ, tu a wʊ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn de kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: Christ died for us at a time when we were helpless and sinful.
translation_verse: Yaa nyɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na sɛɛ lɛ, sɩn sɔɔ chɛnɛ ba tara kpɛ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩ Kɩrɩsɩto kpin kʊ a bala na ba puoro ɛ.

english_verse: No one is really willing to die for an honest person, though someone might be willing to die for a truly good person.
translation_verse: An kpɛ̃mɛ naa ɩka nɩrɛ na sɔɔn kpi kʊ nɩrɛ yele na tor, amɩne nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na tʊ̃ɔn sɔɔ kpi kʊ nɩrɛ na ɩ nɩsʊ̃.

english_verse: But God showed how much he loved us by having Christ die for us, even though we were sinful.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn wiil a wʊ mãɛ nʊ̃fʊ a nɩtɔ̃ kʊ sɩ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn chɛnɛ ɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ, Kɩrɩsɩto kpin kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: But there is more! Now that God has accepted us because Christ sacrificed his life's blood, we will also be kept safe from God's anger.
translation_verse: An ben ɩka pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ ben vɛ̃ a sɩ tor a wʊ jãɩ jũu, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an pãa kaara wʊn faa sɩ yin a Nãaŋmɩn suur pɔ.

english_verse: Even when we were God's enemies, he made peace with us, because his Son died for us. Yet something even greater than friendship is ours. Now that we are at peace with God, we will be saved by the life of his Son.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dẽme, ka a wʊ Bie kũu wa 'maal wʊ kʊ sɩ, a lɛ wʊn ben 'maal sɩ, wʊn faa sɩ naa tu a wʊ nyɛvʊr pɔ.

english_verse: And in addition to everything else, we are happy because God sent our Lord Jesus Christ to make peace with us. Adam and Christ
translation_verse: A ba ɩ anyã tɛɛ lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ chɩlɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, tu a 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn ben nyɛ a 'maalfʊ a pʊ̃pãanyã.

english_verse: Adam sinned, and that sin brought death into the world. Now everyone has sinned, and so everyone must die.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ jũu lɛ a yelbier kpɛ a wɛr pɔ tu nɩbʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a kũu mɩ tu a yelbier 'yɔ̃ɔ mɩ wa, sɔr nyã lɛ a kũu mɩ tu pɔɔ nɩrɛ jaa, bojũu ba jaa maal yelbier.

english_verse: Sin was in the world before the Law came. But no record of sin was kept, because there was no Law.
translation_verse: Sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka a Mosesɩ wa bin a nɛɛ, yelbier den nie be ka a wɛr pɔ, tɩchɛ lɛ a nɛbinãa na ba dɔ̃ɔ be be ɛ, ba maa de yelbier maal bon ɛ.

english_verse: Yet death still had power over all who lived from the time of Adam to the time of Moses. This happened, though not everyone disobeyed a direct command from God, as Adam did. In some ways Adam is like Christ who came later.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ kũu din nãa yi a Adama sɔ̃ɔ tɩ tãn a Mosesɩ sɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ gba mɩ tʊ̃ɔ a bala na ba maal a yelbier sɔ̃ɔ a nɛɛ a Adama kaar ɛ, Adama lɛ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a 'lɔ na wa wa gãagiel.

english_verse: But the gift of God's undeserved grace was very different from Adam's sin. That one sin brought death to many others. Yet in an even greater way, Jesus Christ alone brought God's gift of undeserved grace to many people.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a kʊfʊ ba kaara a bɔrfʊ kaar ɛ, bojũu ala ɩ nɩyɔɔ kpi naa nɩbʊ̃'yen bɔrfʊ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ nɩ a wʊ kʊfʊ ala na wa tu a nɩbʊ̃'yen Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ jũu, na yaar kʊ nɩyɔɔ gar a lɛ.

english_verse: There is a lot of difference between Adam's sin and God's gift. That one sin led to punishment. But God's gift made it possible for us to be acceptable to him, even though we have sinned many times.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ gba ba nyɛtãan a nɩbʊ̃'yen yelbier 'lɔ ɛ. 'Yɛr tɔɔrfʊ tun a yelbe bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ na wʊ waan sɔ̃ɔfʊ, tɩchɛ a kʊfʊ mɩ tun a bɔrfʊsɩ yɔɔ pɔ, naa waan torfʊ.

english_verse: Death ruled like a king because Adam had sinned. But that cannot compare with what Jesus Christ has done. God has treated us with undeserved grace, and he has accepted us because of Jesus. And so we will live and rule like kings.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a nɩbʊ̃'yen bɔrfʊ jũu kũu din nãa tu a nɩbʊ̃'yen 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a bala na nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ nɩ a kʊfʊ 'lɔ na ɩ a torfʊ, na din nãa a ba nyɛvʊr pɔ tu a nɩbʊ̃'yen Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Everyone was going to be punished because Adam sinned. But because of the good thing that Christ has done, God accepts us and gives us the gift of life.
translation_verse: An ɩ nɩbʊ̃'yen bɔrfʊ jũu lɛ waan sɔ̃ɔfʊ wa 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ ba jaa, lɛ lɛ so nɩbʊ̃'yen mɩ na maal ka a tor, mɩ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a nɩbɛ ba jaa tor na ba nyɛ nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: Adam disobeyed God and caused many others to be sinners. But Jesus obeyed him and will make many people acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a bawõno bʊ̃'yen na vɛ̃ ka a nɩyɔɔ ɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ, lɛ mɩ lɛ a tu nɩbʊ̃'yen na tu Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ mɩ vɛ̃, ka a nɩyɔɔ mɩ ɩ nɩtorsɩ.

english_verse: The Law came, so that the full power of sin could be seen. Yet where sin was powerful, God's gift of undeserved grace was even more powerful.
translation_verse: A nɛɛ pʊɔn 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a bɔrfʊsɩ mɩ waa. Tɩchɛ jie 'lɔ a yelbier na pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ ma pʊɔn 'yɔ̃ɔ gar a lɛ.

english_verse: Sin ruled by means of death. But God's gift of grace now rules, and God has accepted us because of Jesus Christ our Lord. This means that we will have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a yelbier na di nãa a kũu pɔ, lɛ mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ na di a nãa tu a yeltorsɩ pɔ, na wʊ waan nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: What should we say? Should we keep on sinning, so that God's gift of undeserved grace will show up even better?
translation_verse: Sɩ pãa 'yɛr ɩka bo? Sɩ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ a yelbier tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ pʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃?

english_verse: No, we should not! If we are dead to sin, how can we go on sinning?
translation_verse: Kai, sɔr ba be be ɛ! Sɩ kpin kʊ yelbier, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a ɩ a sɩn lɛ chɛnɛ be a pɔ?

english_verse: Don't you know that all who share in Christ Jesus by being baptized also share in his death?
translation_verse: Bɩɩ yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a sɩn bala jaa na so a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, wʊ pɔl sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, a sɩ lɔ̃ɔ kpin wʊ nɩ a wʊ kũu pɔ ɛ?

english_verse: When we were baptized, we died and were buried with Christ. We were baptized, so we would live a new life, as Christ was raised to life by the glory of God the Father.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ba ũu sɩ naa a kʊ̃ɔ pɔ, a kũu kaar, ka a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na dɔ̃ɔ ir a kũu pɔ, tu a Sãa tɩɩr pɔ, ka sɩ mɩ na be be tara nyɛvʊr paalaa.

english_verse: If we shared in Jesus' death by being baptized, we will be raised to life with him.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩn nɩ 'lɔ 'mantaa a wʊ kũu pɔ, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ na 'mantaa ir a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: We know that the persons we used to be were nailed to the cross with Jesus. This was done, so our sinful bodies would no longer be the slaves of sin.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ ãgãn koraa pʊɔ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, a ba kpan wʊ a be a daa ju, ka a yelbier ãgãn ba lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, saa lɛ ɩ a yelbier gbãgbaar ɛ.

english_verse: We know sin doesn't have power over dead people.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na kpi, wʊ yin yelbier pɔ.

english_verse: As surely as we died with Christ, we believe we will also live with him.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩn nɩ Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ 'mataa kpi, sɩ sɔɔ naa ɩka sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na 'mataa be be tara a nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: We know that death no longer has any power over Christ. He died and was raised to life, never again to die.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto na ir a kũu pɔ, wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ, kũu ba lɛ tʊ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: When Christ died, he died for sin once and for all. But now he is alive, and he lives only for God.
translation_verse: A kũu wʊn kpi, wʊ kpin kʊ yelbier gbɛbʊ̃'yen kʊ nɩrɛ jaa, tɩchɛ a wʊ nyɛvʊr pɔ wʊn be, wʊ ben be kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: In the same way, you must think of yourselves as dead to the power of sin. But Christ Jesus has given life to you, and you live for God.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ ɩka, yɩ kaa a yɩ mãɛ ɩka, yɩ kpin kʊ yelbier, tɩ be be kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

english_verse: Don't let sin rule your body. After all, your body is bound to die, so don't obey its desires
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta sɔɔ ka yelbier lɛ di nãa a yɩ ãgãn nyãn na kpi ka yɩ turo a wʊ dɛɛr bɔfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: or let any part of it become a slave of evil. Give yourselves to God, as people who have been raised from death to life. Make every part of your body a slave that pleases God.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa diere a yɩ ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ jaa kʊrɔ yelbier maalfʊ ɛ, ka a ɩ putuyele tʊ̃tʊ̃bomo ɛ. Tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔ de a yɩ mãɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn, nɩtãa nɩbɛ na yi kũu pɔ tara nyɛvʊr, na yɩ sɔɔ de a yɩ ãgãn jiir kʊ wʊ, ka a ɩ yeltorsɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃bomo.

english_verse: Don't let sin keep ruling your lives. You are ruled by God's undeserved grace and not by the Law. Slaves Who Do What Pleases God
translation_verse: Bojũu, yelbier ba lɛ ɩ a yɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ɛ, bojũu yaa chɛnɛ be a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa pĩlem ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ben a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ pĩlem.

english_verse: What does all this mean? Does it mean we are free to sin, because we are ruled by God's gift of undeserved grace and not by the Law? Certainly not!
translation_verse: Ka bo go? Sɩ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ a yelbier bojũu sɩn ba lɛ chɛnɛ be a nɛɛ pĩlem ɔ, tɩ be a wãɛfʊ pĩlem bɩɩ? Kai, sɔr ba be be ɛ!

english_verse: Don't you know that you are slaves of anyone you obey? You can be slaves of sin and die, or you can be obedient slaves of God and be acceptable to him.
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka ala ɩ fʊ wa den fʊ mãɛ kʊ nɩrɛ na fʊ turo a wʊ nɛɛ gbãgbaa kaar, fʊ ɩn gbãgbaa kʊ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɛɛ fʊn turo, ka yelbier gbãgbaa lɛ fʊ ɩ a 'lɔ na chiine a kũu pɔ, bɩɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ tufʊ 'lɔ mɩ na chiine nɩ fʊ a yeltorsɩ jie.

english_verse: You used to be slaves of sin. But I thank God that with all your heart you followed the example set forth in the teaching you received.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, yɩn dɔ̃ɔ gba ɩ a yelbier gbãgbaar, tɩ yɩ wa sɔɔn naa a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa na yɩ de a yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wiilfʊ nyã pɔ.

english_verse: Now you are set free from sin and are slaves who please God.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn faa yɩn yin a yelbier pɔ a yɩ so yɩ mãɛ, na yɩ lɩɛb yeltorsɩ gbãgbaar.

english_verse: I am using these everyday examples, because in some ways you are still weak. You used to let the different parts of your body be slaves of your evil thoughts. But now you must make every part of your body serve God, so that you will belong completely to him.
translation_verse: Nɩsaal 'yɛr lɛ n de man a yɩ ãgãma yɩn ba tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nyɔɔrɔ jũu. Nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ ma de a yɩ ãgãn jiir ka a ɩ gbãgbaar kʊ a ala na ba vɩɛl ɛ, naa ma pʊɔrɔ putuyele 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, yɩ de a yɩ mãɛ ka a ɩ yeltorsɩ nɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ gbãgbaar.

english_verse: When you were slaves of sin, you didn't have to please God.
translation_verse: Yɩn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a yelbier gbãgbaar, a yeltorsɩ ba so yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: But what good did you receive from the things you did? All you have to show for them is your shame, and they lead to death.
translation_verse: Tɔ̃nɔ̃ buor lɛ yɩ nyɛ yin a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a yelsɩ ala na ben ɩ vã a pʊ̃pãanyã? A bomo ala baarfʊ daar ɩn kũu.

english_verse: Now you have been set free from sin, and you are God's slaves. This will make you holy and will lead you to eternal life.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, Nãaŋmɩn na ben faa yɩ yin a yelbier pɔ a yɩ ɩ a wʊ gbãgbaar, a tɔ̃nɔ̃ yɩn nyɛ ɩn chɛchɛ ɩfʊ ka a baaraa ɩ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Sin pays off with death. But God's gift is eternal life given by Jesus Christ our Lord.
translation_verse: Bojũu yelbier sãyar ɩn kũu, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ ɩ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you surely understand enough about law to know that laws only have power over people who are alive.
translation_verse: Yaa be bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, yɛɛr, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ a bala na bɔ̃ɔ a nɛbinãa ɩka a nɛbinãa ma tʊ̃ɔn nɩrɛ na chɛnɛ nɩ nɩbir ɛ?

english_verse: For example, the Law says that a man's wife must remain his wife as long as he lives. But once her husband is dead, she is free
translation_verse: De man pɔɔ na kul sɩrɛ, a nɛɛ lũ wʊn mar a sɩrɛ ka wʊ chire dayuo na gãn wʊ, a sɩrɛ na chɛnɛ ba kpi ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩrɛ wa kpi, a kul taa nɛɛ 'lɔ ba lɛ lũ wʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: to marry someone else. However, if she goes off with another man while her husband is still alive, she is said to be unfaithful.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ wa tɩ ir dayuo a sɩrɛ na chɛnɛ vʊrɔ, ban 'yɛr naa ɩka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ naa. Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a sɩrɛ kpi naa, a nɛɛ ba lɛ lũ wʊ go ɛ, ala ɩ wʊ gba na kul dayuo, waa sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: That is how it is with you, my friends. You are now part of the body of Christ and are dead to the power of the Law. You are free to belong to Christ, who was raised to life so we could serve God.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ, n yɛɛr yɩ mɩ kpin kʊ a nɛbinãa tu a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn pɔ, ka yɩn be be kʊ nɩyuo, a 'lɔ na ir a kũu pɔ ka sɩn tʊ̃ɔ wɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: When we thought only of ourselves, the Law made us have sinful desires. It made every part of our bodies into slaves who are doomed to die.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a yelbier ãgãn na so sɩ, ka a yelbier vɔlaa ma de a nɛbinãa tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a sɩ ãgãn pɔ a sɩ wɔ̃nɔ̃ kũu wɔ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: But the Law no longer rules over us. We are like dead people, and it cannot have any power over us. Now we can serve God in a new way by obeying his Spirit, and not in the old way by obeying the written Law. The Battle with Sin
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ kpin kʊ a 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ lũ sɩ, sɩ son sɩ mãɛ yi a nɛbinãa 'lɔ pɔ, na sɩ pãa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a sɔpaalaa nyã pɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ba ɩ a sɔkoraa ban sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a gãn pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Does this mean that the Law is sinful? Certainly not! But if it had not been for the Law, I would not have known what sin is really like. For example, I would not have known what it means to want something that belongs to someone else, unless the Law had told me not to do this.
translation_verse: Bo lɛ sɩn lɛ 'yɛr go? A nɛbinãa ɩn yeldɛɛr bɩɩ? Kai, sɔr ba be be ɛ! Waa ɩ yeldɛɛr ɛ. Sɩrɛ jaa n kʊ̃ naa bɔ̃ɔ yelbier ɛ, ala ɩ a nɛbinãa ba be be ɛ. Bojũu n kʊ̃ naa bɔ̃ɔ jɩɛlfʊ ɛ, ala ɩ a nɛbinãa ba ta 'yɛr ɩka, “Taa jɩɛlɛ nɩrɛ bon ɛ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: It was sin that used this command as a way of making me have all kinds of desires. But without the Law, sin is dead.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yelbier far kpɛ na wʊ nyɛ sɔr a nɛbinãa sɛ̃ vɛ̃ ka n wɔ̃ jɩɛlfʊ jaa bʊrɔ vɔlaa. A nɛbinãa baa be be ɛ, yelbier ɩn bʊ̃kũu.

english_verse: Before I knew about the Law, I was alive. But as soon as I heard that command, sin came to life,
translation_verse: Ɩn dɔ̃ɔ be be ba bɔ̃ɔ a nɛbinãa ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɛbinãa na wa wa, yelbier faan a nyɛvʊr, ka a kũu kʊ ma.

english_verse: and I died. The very command that was supposed to bring life to me, instead brought death.
translation_verse: Be lɛ n nyɛ ɩka a nɛbinãa 'lɔ naa waan nyɛvʊr, kũu lɛ wʊ bar tɩ waan.

english_verse: Still, the Law and its commands are holy and correct and good.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a nɛbinãa ɩn chɛchɛ, ka a nɛbinãa 'yɛr mɩ ɩ chɛchɛ, naa tor ɩ vɩla.

english_verse: Am I saying something good caused my death? Certainly not! It was sin that killed me by using something good. Now we can see how terrible and evil sin really is.
translation_verse: Bon 'lɔ na ɩ bʊ̃vɩla pãa lɩɛb kũu wa kʊ ma? A ba ɩ lɛ lɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a ɩn yelbier, na a lɩɛb kũu kʊ ma tu a bon 'lɔ na ɩ vɩla pɔ. A tu naa 'yɛr binãa pɔ, ka bier na ɩ yelbier sɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: We know that the Law is spiritual. But I am merely a human, and I have been sold as a slave to sin.
translation_verse: Sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nɛbinãa ɩn Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bon lɛ, tɩchɛ ka a maa ɩ ãgãn yelbier na da ka n ɩ a wʊ gbãgbaa.

english_verse: In fact, I don't understand why I act the way I do. I don't do what I know is right. I do the things I hate.
translation_verse: N maa bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ ɩn maala ɛ, bojũu a ala ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal n maa maal ɛ, tɩchɛ a ala ɩn 'laar lɛ n ma maala.

english_verse: Although I don't do what I know is right, I agree that the Law is good.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n ma maala naa ala ɩn ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maala ɛ, n sɔɔ naa ɩka a nɛbinãa ɩn vɩla.

english_verse: So I am not the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: An ben be a lɛ, a ba ɩ maa mãɛ lɛ bɔ̃ɔn tɩ ɩrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yelbier 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na be a n pɔ lɛ ɩrɛ.

english_verse: I know that my selfish desires won't let me do anything that is good. Even when I want to do right, I cannot.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yelvɩla jaa ba be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a maa yelbier ãgãn tɛɛ lɛ. Bojũu n ma bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n maal vɩla tɩ naa maa tʊ̃ɔ maal ɛ.

english_verse: And so, if I don't do what I know is right, I am no longer the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, ala ɩ n maala naa a ala ɩn ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal ɛ, a ba lɛ ɩ maa lɛ lɛ maala go ɛ, tɩchɛ a yelbier 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na be a n 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ maala.

english_verse: The Law has shown me that something in me keeps me from doing what I know is right.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ, n nyɛn a lɛ a nɛbinãa na tʊ̃nɔ̃, maa wa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal vɩla, a yelbier lɛ ma tɔɔ gbʊr ma jaa yɛ̃ yɛ̃.

english_verse: With my whole heart I agree with the Law of God.
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ naa Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinãa nɩ a n pʊɔ wʊ jaa,

english_verse: But in every part of me I discover something fighting against my mind, and it makes me a prisoner of sin that controls everything I do.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ n nyɛ naa a nɛbinãa ãsʊɔ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a n ãgãn jiir amɩne. Wʊ jɛɛrɛ nɩ naa a n tɩɛr na wʊ maal ma ka n ɩ a yelbier nɩpɔɔraa a n ãgãn jiir pɔ.

english_verse: What a miserable person I am. Who will rescue me from this body that is doomed to die?
translation_verse: Nɩjarma lɛ n pãa ɩ! An lɛ na faa ma yin a yelbier ãgãn nyã na chiine ma a kũu jie?

english_verse: Thank God! Jesus Christ will rescue me. So with my mind I serve the Law of God, although my selfish desires make me serve the law of sin.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn son puorfʊ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ! A maa mãɛ a n tɩɛr pɔ, n ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ gbãgbaa, tɩchɛ a n yelbier ãgãn mɩ ɩ gbãgbaa kʊ a yelbier nɛɛ.

english_verse: If you belong to Christ Jesus, you won't be punished.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu pʊ̃pãanyã, yele ba pɔɔrɔ a bala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit will give you life that comes from Christ Jesus and will set you free from sin and death.
translation_verse: A tun a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, a nɛɛ 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nyɛvʊr faa man yin a nɛɛ 'lɔ na ɩ yelbier nɩ kũu pɔ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses cannot do this, because our selfish desires make the Law weak. But God set you free when he sent his own Son to be like us sinners and to be a sacrifice for our sin. God used Christ's body to condemn sin.
translation_verse: Bojũu a bon 'lɔ a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na ba dɔ̃ɔ tara kpɛ̃ɔ na maal ɛ, a sɩ yelbier ãgãn na bal bar, Nãaŋmɩn maal naa na wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ mãɛ Bie a wʊ nyɛtãan a sɩn na maala a yelbier kaar a wʊ wa ɩ a yelbier bɔɔrlo bon. Lɛ lɛ wʊ sɔ̃ɔ yelbier a nɩsaal pɔ bar,

english_verse: He did this, so that we would do what the Law commands by obeying the Spirit instead of our own desires.
translation_verse: ka a lɛ a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa na bʊɔrɔ ka a sɛɛ a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ turo a lɛ a yelbier ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩ turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: If our minds are ruled by our desires, we will die. But if our minds are ruled by the Spirit, we will have life and peace.
translation_verse: Yelbier sʊɔ tɩɛr ɩn kũu, tɩchɛ a tɩɛr 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na so ɩn nyɛvʊr nɩ nyã'maar.

english_verse: Our desires fight against God, because they do not and cannot obey God's laws.
translation_verse: A yelbe-ɩrɛ tɩɛr ma 'laar Nãaŋmɩn, wʊ maa siir wʊ mãɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ ɛ, wʊ mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɩ ɛ.

english_verse: If we follow our desires, we cannot please God.
translation_verse: Bala na turo a lɛ a ba ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ, kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ pɛl Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You are no longer ruled by your desires, but by God's Spirit, who lives in you. People who don't have the Spirit of Christ in them don't belong to him.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'lɔ ba lɛ turo a lɛ a yelbier ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ turo naa a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na bʊɔrɔ, ala ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ben a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba wa tara a Kɩrɩsɩto Sɩɛ ɛ, waa ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊɔr ɛ.

english_verse: But Christ lives in you. So you are alive because God has accepted you, even though your bodies must die because of your sins.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ Kɩrɩsɩto ben a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a yɩ ãgãn kpi naa a yelbier jũu, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ sɩɩr tara nyɛvʊr a yeltorsɩ jũu.

english_verse: Yet God raised Jesus to life! God's Spirit now lives in you, and he will raise you to life by his Spirit.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ na sãɩ a Yesu a kũu pɔ, ben a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ na sãɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, na kʊn a yɩ ãgãn kũn nyɛvʊr tu a wʊ Sɩɛ pɔ, a 'lɔ na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If you do, you will die. But you will live, if by the help of God's Spirit you say “No” to your desires.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ yɩ turo naa a lɛ a yɩ yelbier ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ, yɩn kpi naa, tɩchɛ ala ɩ yɩ den a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊ̃n a ãgãn ma maal bidɛbɛ bar, yɩ ben a nyɛvʊr sɔr pɔ.

english_verse: Only those people who are led by God's Spirit are his children.
translation_verse: Bojũu bala jaa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na chiine, bala lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir.

english_verse: God's Spirit makes us sure that we are his children.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ mãɛ din dãasɩɛ nɩ a sɩ sɩɩr ɩka sɩ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bibiir.

english_verse: His Spirit lets us know that together with Christ we will be given what God has promised. We will also share in the glory of Christ, because we have suffered with him. A Wonderful Future for God's People
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, ala ɩ sɩ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, sɩn lɛ so a bʊ̃sʊ̃n ala a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ, 'matãan a Kɩrɩsɩto. Ala ɩ sɩrɛ jaa, sɩ lɔ̃ɔn wʊn di a wʊ dɔɔyɛ, lɛ lɛ sɩ mɩn 'matãan wʊ põ a wʊ tɩɩr.

english_verse: I am sure what we are suffering now cannot compare with the glory that will be shown to us.
translation_verse: N man nyɛ a sɩ dɩna dɔɔyɛ ka waa jã bon ɛ, ɩn de man a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr 'lɔ na wa nyɩr a sɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: In fact, all creation is eagerly waiting for God to show who his children are.
translation_verse: A bʊ̃maalsɩ a jaa nyʊnyʊlɔ naa chɩlɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir wʊn wa vɛ̃ a ba nyɩrɛ.

english_verse: Meanwhile, creation is confused, but not because it wants to be confused. God made it this way in the hope
translation_verse: Bojũu a bʊ̃maalsɩ a jaa ben a ãgãn sal pĩlem an ba ɩ a ba mãɛ bɔfʊ ɛ,

english_verse: The Spirit makes us sure about what we will be in the future. But now we groan silently, while we wait for God to show that we are his children. This means that our bodies will also be set free.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ lɛ tɛɛ lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩn mãɛ lɛ tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊ bidɔ̃ɔ, mɩ ʊrɔ a sɩ pʊɔm na sɩ nyʊnyʊlɔ chɛlɛ nɩ wʊn wa lɩɛb sɩ a wʊ bibiir, nɩ a faafʊ wʊn wa faan a sɩ ãgãma.

english_verse: And this hope is what saves us. But if we already have what we hope for, there is no need to keep on hoping.
translation_verse: A tɩɛrtɔ nyãna jũu lɛ sɩ nyɛn a faafʊ. Tɩchɛ bon fʊn nyɛn nɩbir, fʊ maa lɛ tara a wʊ tɩɛr go ɛ. An lɛ ma tɩɛrɛ bon wʊn tara baar?

english_verse: However, we hope for something we have not yet seen, and we patiently wait for it.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ sɩ tɩɛrɛ na bon sɩn ba tara sɛrɛ ɛ, sɩ ma din kãnyir chɛlɛ.

english_verse: In certain ways we are weak, but the Spirit is here to help us. For example, when we don't know what to pray for, the Spirit prays for us in ways that cannot be put into words.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma sʊ̃nɔ̃ sɩ a sɩ balfʊ pɔ. Saa bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ sɩn taa ma sʊɔr a Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ mãɛ lɛ ma de hʊ̃ʊnfʊ 'lɔ sɩn kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ man a 'yɛrbie ɛ, na wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ sɩ.

english_verse: All of our thoughts are known to God. He can understand what is in the mind of the Spirit, as the Spirit prays for God's people.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ma chɛl a sɩ nyãa bɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ tɩɛr, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nyãna lɛ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ nɩ a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: We know that God is always at work for the good of everyone who loves him. They are the ones God has chosen for his purpose,
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a yele a jaa pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn ma tʊ̃n ka a ɩ sʊ̃ kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ wʊ, a bala wʊn tu a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ bʊɔl.

english_verse: and he has always known who his chosen ones would be. He had decided to let them become like his own Son, so his Son would be the first of many children.
translation_verse: Bojũu bala a Nãaŋmɩn na de nie bɔ̃ɔn na wʊ chɛl ir ka ba lɩɛb kaara a wʊ Bie kaar, ka wʊn ɩ a yɛɛr ba jaa pɔ Bidadɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God then accepted the people he had already decided to choose, and he has shared his glory with them. God's Love
translation_verse: A bala wʊn de nie ir, bala lɛ wʊ bʊɔl, a bala wʊn bʊɔl, bala lɛ wʊ vɛ̃ ka a ba yele tor, a bala mɩ wʊn vɛ̃ ka a ba yele tor, bala mɩ lɛ wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩɩr.

english_verse: What can we say about all this? If God is on our side, can anyone be against us?
translation_verse: Bo lɛ sɩn pãa 'yɛr nɩ a yele nyãna? Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn ben a sɩ sɛ̃, an lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ jɛb sɩ?

english_verse: God did not keep back his own Son, but he gave him for us. If God did this, won't he freely give us everything else?
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na ba mɔ̃ɔ sɩ a wʊ mãɛ bie ɛ, tɩchɛ na wʊ sɔɔ bar sɔr ka ba kʊ wʊ a sɩ jũu, bo lɛ na ŋmaa wʊ sɔr ka wʊ kʊ̃ de a wʊ wãɛfʊ 'matãan a bomo a jaa kʊ sɩ ɛ?

english_verse: If God says his chosen ones are acceptable to him, can anyone bring charges against them?
translation_verse: An lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr dɔɔl a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na ir? Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ lɛ maal ba a ba tor.

english_verse: Or can anyone condemn them? No indeed! Christ died and was raised to life, and now he is at God's right side, speaking to him for us.
translation_verse: An 'lɔ lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba 'yɛr? Nɩrɛ jaa ba be be ɛ. A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nyã na kpi, 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn mɩ sãɩ ka wʊ ir ɩ vʊr na wʊ ara Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, 'lɔ lɛ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ sɩ.

english_verse: Can anything separate us from the love of Christ? Can trouble, suffering, and hard times, or hunger and nakedness, or danger and death?
translation_verse: An lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ tɔɔ sɩ yin a Kɩrɩsɩto nʊ̃fʊ nyã pɔ? Wõm, bɩɩ wʊʊr, bɩɩ gefʊ, bɩɩ kɔ̃, bɩɩ sal'mʊɔr, bɩɩ dɔɔyɛ, bɩɩ ban na kʊ sɩ nɩ sʊɔ?

english_verse: It is exactly as the Scriptures say, “For you we face death all day long. We are like sheep on their way to be butchered.”
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “A yɩ jũu, sɩ ma tuor kũu bɩbir jaa. Ba ma kaa sɩn fɩka piir ban chiine nɩ kɔkɔɛ ŋmafʊ jie.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: In everything we have won more than a victory because of Christ who loves us.
translation_verse: Kai, a anyãna a jaa pɔ, sɩ ɩ naa tʊ̃tʊ̃ɔnbɔ tu a 'lɔ na nʊ̃ sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I am sure that nothing can separate us from God's love—not life or death, not angels or spirits, not the present or the future,
translation_verse: Bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn sɩrɛ jaa ɩka kũu, bɩɩ nyɛvʊr, bɩɩ malakasɩ, bɩɩ a sɩdɛbɛ, bɩɩ ka dɩna lɛ, bɩɩ nɩdaar, bɩɩ ka kpãɛn dẽme lɛ,

english_verse: and not powers above or powers below. Nothing in all creation can separate us from God's love for us in Christ Jesus our Lord!
translation_verse: ka dofʊ lɛ, bɩɩ suufʊ lɛ, bɩɩ bon jaa na be a bʊ̃maalsɩ pɔ lɛ, ãsʊɔ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tɔɔ sɩ yin a nʊ̃fʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na nʊ̃ sɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: They are the descendants of Israel, and they are also God's chosen people. God showed them his glory. He made agreements with them and gave them his Law. The temple is theirs and so are the promises that God made to them.
translation_verse: A Isɩral nɩbɛ bala lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn de ka ba ɩ a wʊ bibiir, na wʊ kʊ ba a wʊ tɩɩr nɩ a nɛtɩrsɩ wʊn pɔn ba, na wʊ kʊ ba a nɛbinãa, nɩ a lɛ ban na puoro wʊ a wʊ puorfʊ yir nɩ a nɛɛr wʊn tɩr kʊ ba.

english_verse: They have those famous ancestors, who were also the ancestors of the Christ. I pray that God, who rules over all, will be praised forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Bala lɛ ɩ a sãakpãmɩne, a ba pɔ lɛ ba bɩɛr a Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ na ɩ a nɩsaal yi, na wʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kaara a bomo a jaa, 'lɔ lɛ ban pɛɛrɛ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: It cannot be said that God broke his promise. After all, not all of the people of Israel are the true people of God.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ fɩka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩn faa ɛ, bojũu a ba ɩ a bala jaa ban dɔɔ a Isɩral nɩbɛ pɔ, ba jaa lɛ ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Even before they were born or had done anything good or bad, the Lord told Rebekah that her older son would serve the younger one. The Lord said this to show he makes his own choices and it wasn't because of anything either of them had done.
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ ɩ a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na bʊɔl fʊ. Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊ a Worbɛka, “A yɛkarma na tʊ̃nɔ̃ na kʊrɔ a yɛbile.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say that the Lord liked Jacob more than Esau.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “N nʊ̃n Jekɔb tɩchɛ naa 'laar a Esau.” (Malakaɩ

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says to the king of Egypt, “I let you become king, so that I could show you my power and be praised by all people on earth.”
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a Ijipitɩ nãa Faaro ɩka yaa, “Maa lɛ bin fʊ a yele nyãna jũu, ɩka n wiil a n kpɛ̃ɔ a fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka ban bʊɔl a n yuor a wɛr wʊ jaa.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: Everything depends on what God decides to do, and he can either have pity on people or make them stubborn. God's Anger and Mercy
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn ma kãan nɩrɛ 'lɔ wʊn bʊɔrɔ nɩbaal, a 'lɔ wʊ mɩn bʊɔrɔ, wʊ ma vɛ̃n ka a wʊ nyãa kpɛ̃mɛ.

english_verse: Someone may ask, “How can God blame us, if he makes us behave in the way he wants us to?”
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ na sʊʊr ma naa ɩka, “Bo lɛ so ka a Nãaŋmɩn na de yele dɔɔl sɩ? Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tɔr a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɛ?”

english_verse: But, my friend, I ask, “Who do you think you are to question God? Does the clay have the right to ask the potter why he shaped it the way he did?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ mɩ nɩ ana, nɩsaal na fʊn 'yɛr lɩɛr Nãaŋmɩn? “Laa na tʊ̃ɔn sʊʊr a 'lɔ na mɛ wʊ ɩka, ‘Bo lɛ fʊ mɛ ma a nɩtɔ̃ ɔ?’ ” (Isaiya

english_verse: Doesn't a potter have the right to make a fancy bowl and a plain bowl out of the same lump of clay?”
translation_verse: A lamɩɛrɛ ba tara sɔr ɩka wʊ de a yɔɔr bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ mɛn bʊ̃ʊdʊʊ tɩchɛ mɛn ladiraa ɛ?

english_verse: just as the Lord says in the book of Hosea, “Although they are not my people, I will make them my people. I will treat with love those nations that have never been loved.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ ka a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrɛ Hosea sɛb a wʊ gãn pɔ, “Ɩn bʊɔl ban a maa nɩbɛ, a bala na ba ɩ a n nɩbɛ ɛ, naa bʊɔl wʊ a n nɩ nʊ̃ naa, 'lɔ na ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a n nɩ nʊ̃ naa ɛ.” (Hosea

english_verse: “Once they were told, ‘You are not my people.’ But in that very place they will be called children of the living God.”
translation_verse: Ka wʊ sɛb a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ an ɩ a jie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ wʊn 'yɛr ɩka, “Yaa ɩ a n nɩbɛ ɛ, bala naa lɛ ban lɛ bʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr bibiir.” (Hosea

english_verse: And this is what the prophet Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “The people of Israel are as many as the grains of sand along the beach. But only a few who are left will be saved.
translation_verse: Isaiya mɩ dɔ̃ɔ mʊɔl a Isɩral nɩbɛ na wʊ 'yɛr, “Ala ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ gba waan fɩka man nɛɛ bire, a bãlãa bala na wa chɛ, lɛ na nyɛ faafʊ.

english_verse: The Lord will be quick and sure to do on earth what he has warned he will do.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɩ Soro na pɔɔn naa a wʊ 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ na wʊ ŋmaa a ju.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Isaiah also said, “If the Lord All-Powerful had not spared some of our descendants, we would have been destroyed like the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah.” Israel and the Good News
translation_verse: Isaiya dɔ̃ɔn de nie 'yɛr, “Ala ba ɩ a sɩ Soro na ɩ a gãdaa jaa gãdaa sʊɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ bar a sɩ par ŋmaa ɛ, sɩn taa mɩ nyʊɔl kaara a Sodom nɩ a Gomora tẽn kaar.” (Isaiya

english_verse: What does all of this mean? It means that the Gentiles were not trying to be acceptable to God, but they found that he would accept them if they had faith.
translation_verse: Bo lɛ sɩn pãa lɛ 'yɛr? A bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, na ba dɔ̃ɔ turo a yeltorsɩ ɛ, bala lɛ be tara yaa. A ba yele tor naa ban tara sɔɔfʊ jũu.

english_verse: just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a stone to make people stumble and fall. But those who have faith in that one will never be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ a wʊ 'yɛr, “Nyɛ, n bin a kʊsɩr be a Jiyon ka nɩbɛ na bãra nɩ a pie 'lɔ na vɛ̃ ka ba loro, ka nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ, vã kʊ̃ kpɛ wʊ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: what makes people acceptable to him. So they refuse to trust God, and they try to be acceptable by obeying the Law.
translation_verse: Ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yeltorsɩ ɛ, tɩ na ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba bin a ba mãɛ yeltorsɩ, baa siir ba mãɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn yeltorsɩ ɛ.

english_verse: But people whose faith makes them acceptable to God will never ask, “Who will go up to heaven to bring Christ down?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yeltorsɩ ala na yire a sɔɔfʊ pɔ 'yɛr naa, “Ta tɩɛr a fʊ nyãa pɔ sʊʊr ɩka, ‘An lɛ na do a saaju?’ (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: All who are acceptable because of their faith simply say, “The message is as near as your mouth or your heart.” And this is the same message we preach about faith.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ a 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ? “A 'yɛr gbʊr fʊ naa, a ben a fʊ nɛɛ pɔ, naa be a fʊ nyãa pɔ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: So you will be saved, if you honestly say, “Jesus is Lord,” and if you believe with all your heart that God raised him from death.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ fʊ haan a fʊ nɛɛ chiir a fʊ pʊɔ 'yɛr ɩka, “A Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a Soro,” na fʊ sɔɔn a fʊ nyãa wʊ jaa ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn ir wʊn a kũu pɔ, fʊn nyɛn faafʊ.

english_verse: God will accept you and save you, if you truly believe this and tell it to others.
translation_verse: Bojũu a fʊ nyãa 'lɔ fʊn sɔɔ den lɛ na vɛ̃ ka a fʊ yele tor, ka a fʊ nɛɛ 'lɔ fʊn haan 'yɛr lɛ na faafʊ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say no one who has faith will be disappointed,
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ, vã kʊ̃ kpɛ wʊ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: no matter if that person is a Jew or a Gentile. There is only one Lord, and he is generous to everyone who asks for his help.
translation_verse: Bojũu tɛɛ taa ba be a Juu nɩrɛ nɩ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ɛ. A Soro bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ɩ ba jaa Soro, na wʊ sʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala jaa na bʊɔlɔ a wʊ yuor.

english_verse: How can people have faith in the Lord and ask him to save them, if they have never heard about him? And how can they hear, unless someone tells them?
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ ban ɩrɛ wa bʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ ban ba sɔɔ ɛ? Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ ban ɩ wa sɔɔ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ ban ba wõ a wʊ 'yɛr ɛ? Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ ban ɩrɛ wa wõ a wʊ 'yɛr ka nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ ba wa mʊɔl a wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba ɛ?

english_verse: And how can anyone tell them without being sent by the Lord? The Scriptures say it is a beautiful sight to see even the feet of someone coming to preach the good news.
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ ban ɩrɛ wa mʊɔl ka baa tʊ̃ ba ɛ? Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Nyɛ lɛ a bala na waara nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ gbɛɛ na vɩɛlɛ ka.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Yet not everyone has believed the message. For example, the prophet Isaiah asked, “Lord, has anyone believed what we said?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a ba ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba jaa lɛ lɩɛb kaa a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɛ. Bojũu Isaiya dɔ̃ɔ sʊʊr, “Sɩ Soro, an lɛ sɔɔ de a sɩ 'yɛr?” (Isaiya

english_verse: But am I saying that the people of Israel did not hear? No, I am not! The Scriptures say, “The message was told everywhere on earth. It was announced all over the world.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka n sʊʊr, a mɔ̃ baa wõ naa ɛ? Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ba wõ naa naa. “A ba kɔkɔr yin de jie wʊ jaa, ka a ba 'yɛr tɩ ta a wɛr tɛɛfʊ jie.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Did the people of Israel understand or not? Moses answered this question when he told that the Lord had said, “I will make Israel jealous of people who are a nation of nobodies. I will make them angry with people who don't understand a thing.”
translation_verse: N lɛ sʊʊr kaa go, a mɔ̃ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ? Mosesɩ dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'yɛr, “A bala na ba ɩ paal ɛ, ɩn maal ba naa ka nyuur kpɛ yɩ, naa lɛ maal a paal 'lɔ na ba bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa ɛ, ka suur kpɛ yi.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: Isaiah was fearless enough to tell that the Lord had said, “I was found by people who were not looking for me. I appeared to the ones who were not asking about me.”
translation_verse: Ka Isaiya mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ jo dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛr ɩka, “A bala na ba dɔ̃ɔ yʊɔrɔ bʊɔrɔ ma ɛ, ba nyɛ ma naa, n wiil naa n mãɛ kʊ a bala na ba dɔ̃ɔ sʊrɔ ma ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: And Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “All day long the Lord has reached out to people who are stubborn and refuse to obey.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Isɩral nɩbɛ 'lɔ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ wʊ 'yɛr, “Bɩbir jaa lɛ n ma tur a n nuur bʊɔlɔ a bibawõnsɩ nɩ a nɩdɛbɛ, na turo a sɔɩ ala na ba vɩɛlɛ ɛ bʊɔrɔ a ba mãɛ tɩɛrsɩ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Am I saying that God has turned his back on his people? Certainly not! I am one of the people of Israel, and I myself am a descendant of Abraham from the tribe of Benjamin.
translation_verse: N pãa sʊʊr naa, a Nãaŋmɩn ben tɔr a wʊ nɩbɛ bar bɩɩ? Kai! A maa mãɛ ɩn a Isɩral nɩrɛ, naa ɩ a Abraham yɔ̃ɔ yi a Benjamin bʊrɔ pɔ.

english_verse: God did not turn his back on his chosen people. Don't you remember reading in the Scriptures how Elijah complained to God about the people of Israel?
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ba tɔr a wʊ nɩbɛ bar ɛ, bala lɛ wʊ de nie bɔ̃ɔ. Yaa bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr, lɛ a Elaija na dɔ̃ɔ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn waala dɔɔlɔ a Isɩral nɩbɛ,

english_verse: He said, “Lord, they killed your prophets and destroyed your altars. I am the only one left, and now they want to kill me.”
translation_verse: “N Soro, ba kʊn a fʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, na ba wɛl a fʊ bɔɔr lofʊ jiir bar. Maa tɛɛ lɛ chɛ, tɩ a ba bʊɔrɔ a n kʊfʊ.” (Nãmɩne Gãn Dɔ̃ɔ

english_verse: This means that only a chosen few of the people of Israel found what all of them were searching for. And the rest of them were stubborn,
translation_verse: Bo pãa lɛ? A ala a Isɩral nɩbɛ na bʊɔrɔ nɩbijɩɛ baa nyɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na ir lɛ nyɛ. Ka a bala na chɛ kpɛ̃mɛ a ba nyãa.

english_verse: It is the same way now. God treated the people of Israel with undeserved grace, and so a few of them are still his followers.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a dɩna, nɩbɛ bamɩne chɛ naa ka Nãaŋmɩn na ir ba a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu.

english_verse: This happened because of God's undeserved kindness and not because of anything they have done. It could not have happened except for God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Ala be ɩ a wãɛfʊ jũu lɛ, a ba lɛ ɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ go ɛ, ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, a wãɛfʊ kʊ̃ lɛ ɩ wãɛfʊ lɛ go ɛ.

english_verse: Then David said, “Turn their meals into bait for a trap, so that they will stumble and be given what they deserve.
translation_verse: A Nãa David mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr a wʊ gãn pɔ, “Vɛ̃ ka a ba bʊ̃diir difʊ jie ka a lɩɛb bʊ̃nyɔɔrsɩ nɩ chɛɛr, ka a ɩ a ba bãr lofʊ jie nɩ a ba sãyar.

english_verse: Blindfold their eyes! Don't let them see. Bend their backs beneath a burden that will never be lifted.” Gentiles Will Be Saved
translation_verse: A ba nɩbie a jɔ̃ɔ, a ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ jaa ɛ, na ba kab gʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ dɔl ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: But if the rest of the world's people were helped so much by their sin and loss, they will be helped even more by their full return.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a ba maal bɔrfʊ vɛ̃n ka a wɛr wʊ jaa le, ka a ba bɔrfʊ mɩ le a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, a bala mãɛ wa pʊɔ ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an kaara!

english_verse: I hope in this way to make some of my own people jealous enough to be saved.
translation_verse: A maa tɩɛr lɛ ɩka nyuur wʊ kpɛ a maa mãɛ nɩbɛ ka n tʊ̃ɔ a bamɩne faa.

english_verse: When Israel rejected God, the rest of the people in the world were able to turn to him. So when God makes friends with Israel, it will be like bringing the dead back to life.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a ba tɔr barfʊ ɩn 'maalfʊ kʊ a wɛr, ka a Nãaŋmɩn lɛ wa de ba, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an kaara, a kʊ̃ kaara fɩka nɩrɛ na yi kũu pɔ tara nyɛvʊr ɛ?

english_verse: If part of a batch of dough is made holy by being offered to God, then all of the dough is holy. If the roots of a tree are holy, the rest of the tree is holy too.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ fʊ den a paanʊ̃dɔ̃ɔ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, a paanʊ̃ɔ ala na chɛ, a jaa ɩn chɛchɛ. Ala ɩ fʊ den a tɩɛ nyɩɩr kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, a tɩɛ wilsɩ mɩ ɩn chɛchɛ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are like branches of a wild olive tree made to be part of a cultivated olive tree. You have taken the place of some branches that were cut away from it. And because of this, you enjoy the blessings that come from being part of that cultivated tree.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba 'mɛl a tɩɛ mãɛ wile ãsʊɔ bar tɩ ŋmaa a yɩn na ɩ a mʊɔ pɔ tɩɛ wile wa mar ka yɩ 'mataa tɔɔrɔ nyuro a kɔ̃bʊ̃'yen yire a tɩɛ ãgãn pɔ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃,

english_verse: But don't think you are better than the branches that were cut away. Just remember you are not supporting the roots of this tree. Its roots are supporting you.
translation_verse: taa tɩɛr ɩka fʊ sa naa a wilsɩ ala ɛ. Fʊ̃ʊ wa 'mɔɔrɔ fʊ mãɛ, lɩɛb tɩɛr kaa ɩka a ba ɩ a fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ a wile lɛ tuo a nyɩbɛ ɛ, tɩ a nyɩbɛ lɛ tuo a fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ a wile.

english_verse: Maybe you think those branches were cut away, so you could be put in their place.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'yɛr yɩn pãa na 'yɛr nɩ nyã, “Ba 'mɛl a wilsɩ ala bar tɩ pãa na de ma mar.”

english_verse: Now you see both how kind and how hard God can be. He was hard on those who fell, but he was kind to you. And he will keep on being kind to you, if you keep on trusting in his kindness. Otherwise, you will be cut away too.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a maal vɩla sʊɔ ka a wʊ yele mɩ kpɛ̃mɛ, a wʊ yele kpɛ̃mɛ na kʊ a bala na lo, tɩchɛ na wʊ maal vɩla kʊ a yɩn, ala ɩ yɩ chɛnɛ na chiine a wʊ maal vɩla pɔ. Ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, wʊn ŋmaa yɩn bar.

english_verse: If those other branches will start having faith, they will be made a part of that tree again. God has the power to put them back.
translation_verse: Ala wa ɩ ba tɛɛn a ba baal bar, Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ɔn de ba lɛ mar a tɩɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ, Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ɔn lɛ de ba mar a lɛ go.

english_verse: After all, it wasn't natural for branches to be cut from a wild olive tree and to be made part of a cultivated olive tree. So it is much more likely that God will join the natural branches back to the cultivated olive tree. The People of Israel Will Be Brought Back
translation_verse: Yɩ kaa, ala ɩ a yɩn ban ŋmaa yin a mʊɔ pɔ tɩɛ pɔ wa mar a yir tɩɛ ban sɛl, an lɛ ɩn tuo a yir tɩɛ wilsɩ ala ban dɔ̃ɔ 'mɛl bar marfʊ bɩɩ?

english_verse: My friends, I don't want you Gentiles to be too proud of yourselves. So I will explain the mystery of what has happened to the people of Israel. Some of them have become stubborn, and they will stay like that until the complete number of you Gentiles has come in.
translation_verse: N ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n vɛ̃ ka a yelsɔɔlaa nyã sɔɔl a yɩn na ɩ a n yɛɛr tɩ ba ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ɛ, ka yɩ taa bʊɔrɔ yuor nɩ a yele nyã ɛ. A Isɩral nɩbɛ tara na a nyãkpãɛn a lɛ nɛ na tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a bala na ba ɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ɛ, na wa tɩ nyɛ a faafʊ baar.

english_verse: In this way all of Israel will be saved, as the Scriptures say, “From Zion someone will come to rescue us. Then Jacob's descendants will stop being evil.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ na ɩ tɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba jaa pãa nyɛ faafʊ nɩtãa lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Fafaara na yin be a Jiyon wa, na wʊ wa lɩɛb tɩɛr jaa na ba vɩɛlɛ ɛ, yin a Jekɔb bal nɩbɛ pɔ bar.

english_verse: This is what the Lord has promised to do when he forgives their sins.”
translation_verse: A nɛtɩraa lɛ a nyãna ɩn na tara nɩ ba, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn wa de a ba yeldɛbɛ a jaa bar.” (Isaiya

english_verse: The people of Israel are treated as God's enemies, so the good news can come to you Gentiles. But they are still the chosen ones, and God loves them because of their famous ancestors.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ kaa, a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã vɛ̃n ka ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dẽme a yɩn na sɔɔ de jũu. Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a irfʊ pɔ mɩ lɛ, bala lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ yɔɔ a ba sãakpãmɩne jũu.

english_verse: God doesn't take back the gifts he has given or disown the people he has chosen.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ nɩ a wʊ bʊɔlfʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb jaa ɛ.

english_verse: At one time you Gentiles rejected God. But now Israel has rejected God, and you have been shown mercy.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a yɩn mɩ na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, na yaa dɔ̃ɔ wõnõ a Nãaŋmɩn toor ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ nyɛn a wʊ nɩbaal a ba bawõfʊ jũu.

english_verse: All people have disobeyed God, and that's why he treats them as prisoners. But he does this, so that he can have mercy on all of them.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn pɔɔn a nɩbɛ ba jaa a bawõnsɩ die pɔ, na wʊn tʊ̃ɔ kaa ba jaa nɩbaal.

english_verse: Who can measure the wealth and wisdom and knowledge of God? Who can understand his decisions or explain what he does?
translation_verse: Nyɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn lefʊ na suu jã. A wʊ yɛ̃ nɩ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔfʊ ba gbʊr ɛ! A wʊ 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ ba be bɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ. A wʊ sɔɩ mɩ ba be bɩɛrfʊ ɛ!

english_verse: “Has anyone known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?
translation_verse: “An lɛ dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro tɩɛr? Bɩɩ an lɛ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a wʊ 'yɛr sʊ̃nɔ̃.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Has anyone loaned something to the Lord that must be repaid?”
translation_verse: “An lɛ dɔ̃ɔ de nie kʊ Nãaŋmɩn bon, ka wʊ pãa wa yara a sãn?” (Job

english_verse: Everything comes from the Lord. All things were made because of him and will return to him. Praise the Lord forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Bojũu wʊ jie lɛ a bomo a jaa yi. 'Lɔ lɛ maal a jaa, na wʊ so a bonsɩ a jaa. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, God is good. So I beg you to offer your bodies to him as a living sacrifice, pure and pleasing. That's the most sensible way to serve God.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa yɛɛr, a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbaal nyã jũu, yɩ de a yɩ mãɛ na ɩ bʊ̃nɩbie lon bɔɔr kʊ Nãaŋmɩn. A ɩn chɛchɛ naa pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ. Lɛ lɛ ɩ a puorfʊ na tara par.

english_verse: Don't be like the people of this world, but let God change the way you think. Then you will know how to do everything that is good and pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa lɛ wa lɩɛrɛ maala a lɛ a wɛr nɩbɛ na maala go ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ maala a lɛ na lɩɛrɛ yɩ a tɩɛr paalaa nyã yɩn nyɛ. Yɩn pãa tʊ̃ɔn bɛɛr na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ, a ala na ɩ vɩla naa pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ naa ɩ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: I realize God has treated me with undeserved grace, and so I tell each of you not to think you are better than you really are. Use good sense and measure yourself by the amount of faith that God has given you.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ nyã wʊn wãɛ ma jũu, n sʊɔrɔ naa a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɩka, ta tɩɛr a yɩ mãɛ tɩ põn bar a lɛ yɩn taa tɩɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ma tɩɛr a yɩ mãɛ 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ nɩbijɩɛ jaa jã a sɔɔfʊ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: A body is made up of many parts, and each of them has its own use.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa na tara ãgãn tɩ ka a tara jidẽdẽme, a jidẽdẽme anyãna ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃bʊ̃'yen ɛ.

english_verse: That's how it is with us. There are many of us, but we each are part of the body of Christ, as well as part of one another.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, a sɩn bala na ɩ yɔɔ tɩ lɔ̃ɔ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ, a jidẽdẽme anyã a jaa 'mantaa tʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: God has also given each of us different gifts to use. If we can prophesy, we should do it according to the amount of faith we have.
translation_verse: Sɩ jaa tara na kʊfʊsɩ na tɛɛ taa, tu a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊn wãɛn sɩ. Ala ɩ a ãsʊɔ kʊfʊ ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ lɛ, wʊ ma 'yɛrɛ jã a lɛ a wʊ sɔɔfʊ na ta.

english_verse: If we can serve others, we should serve. If we can teach, we should teach.
translation_verse: Ka ala ɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ tʊ̃fʊ mɩ lɛ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃, ala ɩ wiilfʊ mɩ lɛ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ ma wile.

english_verse: If we can encourage others, we should encourage them. If we can give, we should be generous. If we are leaders, we should do our best. If we are good to others, we should do it cheerfully. Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãkpɛ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ lɛ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ ma 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a ãkpãɛn. Ka ala ɩ a wʊ kʊfʊ lɛ nɩbaalsɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ ma sʊ̃nɔ̃ ba nɩ pʊpɛl. Ala ɩ nɩdiere tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, vɛ̃ a wʊ ma mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃. Ala wa ɩ nɩbɛ 'maalfʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, wʊ ma maala a lɛ nɩ chɩlfʊ.

english_verse: Be sincere in your love for others. Hate everything that is evil and hold tight to everything that is good.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃fʊ wʊ ɩ yelmãɛ nʊ̃fʊ. 'Laar bon 'lɔ na ɩ dɛɛr, tɩ 'mar bon 'lɔ na ɩ sʊ̃.

english_verse: Love each other as brothers and sisters and honor others more than you do yourself.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛlɛ taa yele, na yɩ de a yɛɛr nʊ̃fʊ nʊ̃n taa. Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ taaba gar a yɩ mãɛ.

english_verse: Never give up. Eagerly follow the Holy Spirit and serve the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta ɩ nɩ tũtũlsɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ vɛ̃ ka a nʊ̃mɔ̃ yɩ a yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Let your hope make you glad. Be patient in time of trouble and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɩlɛ nɩ a yɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie, na yɩ tara kãnyir a yɩ wõm pɔ, na yɩ tara yelmãɛ nɩ a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Take care of God's needy people and welcome strangers into your home.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma lɔ̃ɔ põn a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ bala na ba tara bon jaa ɛ, na yɩ ma diere sãanba a yɩ yie pɔ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless everyone who mistreats you. Ask him to bless them and not to curse them.
translation_verse: Na yɩ 'yɛrɛ nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na gere yɩ, na yɩ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ ba, yɩ ta pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba ɛ.

english_verse: When others are happy, be happy with them, and when they are sad, be sad.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɩlɛ nɩ a bala na chɩlɛ, na yɩ mɩ pʊɔ a bala na kõnõ na yɩ kõnõ.

english_verse: Be friendly with everyone. Don't be proud and feel that you know more than others. Make friends with ordinary people.
translation_verse: A yɩn nɩ a bala na kpɩɛrɛ, yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen. Yɩ ta kaara ba pɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔ 'matãan a nɩbɛ bala na ba jã yɩ ɛ. Yɩ ta kaa ɩka yɩn ɩn yɛ̃ dẽme ɛ.

english_verse: Don't mistreat someone who has mistreated you. But try to earn the respect of others,
translation_verse: Yɩ ta de bier yãan bier sãn ɛ. Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, na yɩ maala a ala na vɩɛlɛ nɩrɛ jaa niem.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't try to get even. Let God take revenge. In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I am the one to take revenge and pay them back.”
translation_verse: N barmɩne, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa yaara taa sãn ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ baraa kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn suur. Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Maa lɛ so a sãn yaafʊ, ɩn lɩɛb yaa a sãn.” Lɛ lɛ a Soro 'yɛr. (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “If your enemies are hungry, give them something to eat. And if they are thirsty, give them something to drink. This will be the same as piling burning coals on their heads.”
translation_verse: Lɛ an na ɩ lɛ ɩka, “Ala ɩ kɔ̃ kpɛ̃n a fʊ dɔ̃sʊɔ, kʊ wʊ bʊ̃diir a wʊ di. Ala ɩ kɔ̃nyũur wa kpɛ wʊ naa, kʊ wʊ kʊ̃ɔ a wʊ nyũ. Fʊ̃ʊ be maala a nɩtɔ̃, an kaara fɩka bũu saalbie lɛ fʊ mʊ̃ɔ dɔɔl wʊ a jum.” (Sʊkpar Gãn

english_verse: Don't let evil defeat you, but defeat evil with good.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka bier tʊ̃ɔ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ de vɩla tʊ̃ɔn bier.

english_verse: Obey the rulers who have authority over you. Only God can give authority to anyone, and he puts these rulers in their places of power.
translation_verse: A yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma siir a wʊ mãɛ kʊ a paal nɩbɛrɛ, bojũu kpɛ̃ɔ jaa ba be be ka a ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ bin ɛ. Kpɛ̃ɔ sʊɔ jaa ba be be ka Nãaŋmɩn ba lɛ bin wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Rulers are a threat to evil people, not to good people. There is no need to be afraid of the authorities. Just do right, and they will praise you for it.
translation_verse: Bojũu a kpãɛn dẽme maa diere bier dɔɔlɔ a bala na maala vɩla ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala na maala a dɛɛr lɛ ba ma de yele dɔɔlɔ. Fʊ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ ta joro a kpãɛn dẽme dãbãɛ bɩɩ? Fʊ pãa maala a lɛ na vɩɛlɛ, ban dãna fʊ naa.

english_verse: After all, they are God's servants, and it is their duty to help you. If you do something wrong, you ought to be afraid, because these rulers have the right to punish you. They are God's servants who punish criminals to show how angry God is.
translation_verse: Bojũu wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ɩka wʊ maal fʊ vɩla. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ wa maal dɛɛr 'lɔ, vɛ̃ ka dãbãɛ kʊrɔ fʊ, a ba ɩ pɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ tara a sʊɔ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ lɛ wʊ ɩ na ara kʊ yeltorsɩ ɩka wʊ kpãana a bala na maala dɛɛr.

english_verse: But you should obey the rulers because you know it is the right thing to do, and not just because of God's anger.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a tara na sɔr ka yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a kpãɛn dẽme, a ba ɩ ban na kpãa yɩ tɛɛ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ an ɩ a yɩn mãɛ mɩ bɔ̃ɔ nyɔɔfʊ jũu.

english_verse: You must also pay your taxes. The authorities are God's servants, and it is their duty to take care of these matters.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ so yɩn yara lõpoo kʊrɔ a kpãɛn dẽme na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ na de a ba sɔ̃ɔ wʊ jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ.

english_verse: In the Law there are many commands, such as, “Be faithful in marriage. Do not murder. Do not steal. Do not want what belongs to others.” But all of these are summed up in the command that says, “Love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: A 'yɛrbinsɩ lɛ a anyãna, “Ta sɛ̃ ɛ.” “Ta kʊ nɩrɛ ɛ.” “Ta ju nɩrɛ bon ɛ.” “Ta jɩɛlɛ nɩrɛ bon ɛ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: No one who loves others will harm them. So love is all that the Law demands. The Day When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ wa nʊ̃ nɩrɛ, faa maala wʊ bier ɛ. Ala lɛ so, fʊ̃ʊ wa tara nʊ̃fʊ, fʊ tu naa a lɛ jaa a Mosesɩ nɛɛ na 'yɛr.

english_verse: You know what sort of times we live in, and so you should live properly. It is time to wake up. You know that the day when we will be saved is nearer now than when we first put our faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ maala a nɩtɔ̃, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa lɛ a dɩna sɔ̃ɔ nyã na kaara. A sɔ̃ɔ ta naa ɩka yɩ jɛɔ ir a yɩ gʊ̃ɔ pɔ, bojũu a sɩ faafʊ gbʊr jaa yɛ̃yɛ̃ gar a bɩbir 'lɔ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔ de.

english_verse: Night is almost over, and day will soon appear. We must stop behaving as people do in the dark and be ready to live in the light.
translation_verse: A chɛn bãlãa ka a tãsɔɔ baar, tɩchɛ ka a ɩ a wɛr mɩ tɔ̃ɔ chaar a lɛ nɛ. Yɩ ɩ a sɩ yaar a tãsɔɔ bomo bar tɩ de a chãa bomo su.

english_verse: So behave properly, as people do in the day. Don't go to wild parties or get drunk or be vulgar or indecent. Don't quarrel or be jealous.
translation_verse: Yɩ ɩ a sɩ kpɩɛrɛ jaa kãkar fɩka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ nɩbɛ, na sɩ ir sɩ mãɛ yin dãɛn bɔyuor pɔ, dãa buufʊ pɔ, sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ, nɩ folaa ɩfʊ pɔ, bɩɩ gɔ̃mɔ̃ bɔfʊ nɩ nyuur pɔ.

english_verse: Let the Lord Jesus Christ be as near to you as the clothes you wear. Then you won't try to satisfy your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ de a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yɩ su pɔɔ a yɩ mãɛ, na yɩ ta lɛ tɩɛrɛ ɩka yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ a yɩ ãgãn vɔlaa na bʊɔrɔ go ɛ.

english_verse: Welcome all the Lord's followers, even those whose faith is weak. Don't criticize them for having beliefs that are different from yours.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ sɔɔfʊ na ba jã bon ɛ, yɩ ma sɔɔ de wʊ na yɩ ta tɔɔrɔ a wʊ yelbil 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: Some think it is all right to eat anything, while those whose faith is weak will eat only vegetables.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ sɔɔfʊ ma vɛ̃n ka waa chire bon jaa ɛ, ka a ãsʊɔ sɔɔfʊ mɩ na bal ka 'lɔ mɩ dire jɛvai tɛɛ.

english_verse: What right do you have to criticize someone else's servants? Only their Lord can decide if they are doing right, and the Lord will make sure that they do right.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ nɩ ana na fʊn tɔɔr nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ 'yɛr? A wʊ mãɛ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ sɛ̃ ka wʊ ara na bɩɩ wʊ lo naa, wʊn lɛ ara na, bojũu a wʊ Soro na tʊ̃ɔn maal wʊ a wʊ ara.

english_verse: Some of the Lord's followers think one day is more important than another. Others think all days are the same. But each of you should make up your own mind.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ma kãan a bɩbir ãsʊɔ a wʊ gar ãsʊɔ, ka ãsʊɔ kaa a bɩbie a jaa ka a ɩ bʊ̃'yen. Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ ma tɩɛr kaa a wʊ mãɛ tɩɛr pɔ.

english_verse: Any followers who count one day more important than another day do it to honor their Lord. And any followers who eat meat give thanks to God, just like the ones who don't eat meat.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de a bɩbir ãsʊɔ a wʊ gar a jaa, wʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro jũu. 'Lɔ na ɔɔrɔ a nʊ̃n, wʊ ɔɔrɔ a sɩ Soro jũu, bojũu wʊ ma sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ. A 'lɔ mɩ na ba ɔɔrɔ ɛ, wʊ mɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro jũu, wʊ mɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for God, rather than for ourselves.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ba be be kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ. Nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ ba kpi kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for the Lord. Alive or dead, we still belong to the Lord.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ ben ka, sɩ ben be kʊ a sɩ Soro. Ala ɩ sɩ mɩ kpi naa, sɩ kpin kʊ a sɩ Soro. Ka sɩ chɛnɛ na vʊrɔ, bɩɩ sɩ kpi naa, a sɩ Soro lɛ so sɩ.

english_verse: This is because Christ died and rose to life, so that he would be the Lord of the dead and of the living.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto kpi tɩ na wʊ lɛ ir ɩ vʊr, ɩka a wʊ ɩ a kũn nɩ a vʊɛ ba jaa Soro.

english_verse: Why do you criticize other followers of the Lord? Why do you look down on them? The day is coming when God will judge all of us.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, baa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ fʊ tɔɔrɔ a fʊ yɛbɛ 'yɛr, bɩɩ bo lɛ so ka fʊ kaara a fʊ yɛbɛ pɔrɔ? Bojũu sɩ jaa lɛ na ara a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ dakɔɔ par.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “I swear by my very life that everyone will kneel down and praise my name!”
translation_verse: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “A sɩ Soro lɛ 'yɛr, ɩn ɩ vʊr jũu, a gbɛdumo a jaa na gbur a n niem, ka a kɔkɔr jaa haa 'yɛr ɩka maa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn.” (Isaiya

english_verse: And so, each of us must give an account to God for what we do. Don't Cause Problems for Others
translation_verse: Be lɛ a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa na pãa 'yɛr a sɩ mãɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: The Lord Jesus has made it clear to me that God considers all foods fit to eat. But if you think some foods are unfit to eat, then for you they are not fit.
translation_verse: A maa na be a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, n sɔɔn sɩrɛ jaa ɩka bʊ̃diraa jaa ba ɩ dɛɛr a wʊ mãɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa kãan bon ɩka wʊ ɩn bʊ̃dɛɛr, a bʊ̃nyɩnɛ ɩn bʊ̃dɛɛr kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: If you are hurting others by the foods you eat, you are not guided by love. Don't let your appetite destroy someone Christ died for.
translation_verse: Ala wa ɩ a chɛn a fʊ yɛbɛ bʊ̃diraa kɔ̃ɔ fʊn di jũu, faa maala wile nɩ nʊ̃fʊ ɛ. Ta vɛ̃ ka a fʊ bʊ̃dirsɩ sɔ̃ɔ a fʊ yɛbɛ 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto na kpi ɛ.

english_verse: Don't let your right to eat bring shame to Christ.
translation_verse: Ta vɛ̃ ka a bon 'lɔ fʊ̃ʊ na bʊɔlɔ bʊ̃vɩla, ka nɩrɛ bʊɔl wʊ bʊ̃dɛɛr ɛ.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't about eating and drinking. It is about pleasing God, about living in peace, and about true happiness. All this comes from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yele ba ɩ bʊ̃diir nɩ bʊ̃nyursɩ yele ɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩn torfʊ, nɩ nyã'maar nɩ a pʊpɛl na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ yele lɛ,

english_verse: If you serve Christ in this way, you will please God and be respected by people.
translation_verse: bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto tu a sɔr nyã pɔ, wʊ maala na a lɛ na pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, ka a nɩbɛ mɩ 'yɛrɛ a nɩnyɩnɛ 'yɛr vɩla.

english_verse: We should try to live at peace and help each other have a strong faith.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir, na sɩ maala a lɛ na waan nyã'maar a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn taa ãkpãɛn.

english_verse: Don't let your appetite destroy what God has done. All foods are fit to eat, but it is wrong to cause problems for others by what you eat.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta de bʊ̃diir yele sɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ bar ɛ. Bʊ̃diraa a jaa vɩɛlɛ naa, tɩchɛ a ɩn dɛɛr ala ɩ nɩrɛ din bon na vɛ̃ ka a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ lo.

english_verse: It is best not to eat meat or drink wine or do anything else that causes problems for other followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: A lɛ a sɛɛ naa ka nɩrɛ ta 'wɔb nʊ̃n ɛ, bɩɩ nyũ dãa ɛ, bɩɩ maal yele kɔ̃ɔ na vɛ̃ ka a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ lo ɛ.

english_verse: What you believe about these things should be kept between you and God. You are fortunate, if your actions don't make you have doubts.
translation_verse: Lɛ jaa fʊn bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ, bar ka a be a fʊ̃ʊ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn chara pɔ. Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ tɩɛr na ba 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ yele nɩ a bonsɩ ala a 'lɔ mãɛ na 'yɛr ɩka a ɩ naa ɛ.

english_verse: But if you do have doubts about what you eat, you are going against your beliefs. And you know that is wrong, because anything you do against your beliefs is sin.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na dire nɩ baal, 'yɔ̃ɔn a wʊ mãɛ 'yɛr, bojũu waa dire nɩ sɔɔfʊ ɛ. Bon jaa mɩ na ba wa yi sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, a ɩn bier.

english_verse: Even Christ did not try to please himself. But as the Scriptures say, “The people who insulted you also insulted me.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a Kɩrɩsɩto mãɛ gba mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ pɛl a wʊ mãɛ pʊɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “A tʊbie ala a bala na tʊfʊ, a wa dɔɔl a n ju.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: God is the one who makes us patient and cheerful. I pray that he will help you live at peace with each other, as you follow Christ.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn na kʊrɔ yɩ a kãnyir na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ a ãkpãɛn, wʊ kʊ yɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ka yɩ turo nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: Then all of you together will praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. The Good News Is for Jews and Gentiles
translation_verse: Ka yɩ jaa 'mataa tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen na yɩ de nɛbʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa.

english_verse: Honor God by accepting each other, as Christ has accepted you.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɔɔ diere taa nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ na sɔɔ de yɩ, ka yɩn tʊ̃ɔ waan pɛɛfʊ wa kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: I tell you that Christ came as a servant of the Jews to show that God has kept the promises he made to their famous ancestors. Christ also came,
translation_verse: N 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a Kɩrɩsɩto wa lɩɛb naa a Juu nɩbɛ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ jũu, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ a sɩ Sãakpãmɩne ɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: so that the Gentiles would praise God for being kind to them. It is just as the Scriptures say, “I will tell the nations about you, and I will sing praises to your name.”
