translation_verse: Ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, mɩ na tʊ̃ɔ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr a wʊ nɩbaal jũu. Nɩtãa lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “A lɛ jũu, ɩn dãnfʊ naa a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ sɛ̃, naa yiel yiel kʊ a fʊ yuor.” (

english_verse: Isaiah says, “Someone from David's family will come to power. He will rule the nations, and they will put their hope in him.”
translation_verse: Isaiya gba mɩ lɛ 'yɛr go a wʊ gãn pɔ, “A Jesɩ nyɩɩr na lɛ tɔ naa. 'Lɔ lɛ na ir na wʊ kaara a paalsɩ a jaa, na wʊ mɩ ɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie.” (Isaiya

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives hope, will bless you with complete happiness and peace because of your faith. And may the power of the Holy Spirit fill you with hope. Paul's Work as a Missionary
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a yɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ sʊɔ, wʊ sɛɛ a yɩ nyãn nɩ chɩlfʊ, nɩ nyã'maar a lɛ yɩn sɔɔ wʊ, ka a yɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ pãa ŋme yaar nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure that you are very good and that you have all the knowledge you need to teach each other.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, maa mãɛ sɔɔ naa ɩka yɩ sɛɛn naa vɩla maalfʊ, na yɩ tara yɛ̃ na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ taa wiilfʊ.

english_verse: He chose me to be a servant of Christ Jesus for the Gentiles and to do the work of a priest in the service of his good news. God did this so that the Holy Spirit could make the Gentiles into a holy offering, pleasing to him.
translation_verse: ka n ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ naa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ pɔ jũu, naa sʊ̃nɔ̃ mʊɔlɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ. Lɛ lɛ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, puorfʊ na tara par ka a Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔ de na wʊ oon ba nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.

english_verse: Because of Christ Jesus, I can take pride in my service for God.
translation_verse: Ɩn be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yin yuor.

english_verse: Indeed, I will tell how Christ worked miracles and wonders by the power of the Holy Spirit. I have preached the good news about him all the way from Jerusalem to Illyricum.
translation_verse: wʊ den kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃n nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃fɛrsɩ tun a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ. Lɛ lɛ, n yin a Jerusalɛm chen lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ gʊɔr a Ilirikum tẽe naa man a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ.

english_verse: But I have always tried to preach where people have never heard about Christ. I am like a builder who doesn't build on someone else's foundation.
translation_verse: Maa nɩbijɩɛ yele lɛ ɩka n mʊɔl 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jie 'lɔ jaa ban ba wõ a Kɩrɩsɩto yele ɛ, naa ta ɩrɛ wa mɛ dɔɔl nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ dachin par kparaa ju ɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “All who haven't been told about him will see him, and those who haven't heard about him will understand.” Paul's Plan To Visit Rome
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “A bala ban ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ɛ, na nyɛ naa, ka a bala mɩ na ba dɔ̃ɔ wõ naa ɛ, na bɔ̃ɔn a par.” (Isaiya

english_verse: My work has always kept me from coming to see you.
translation_verse: A yele nyãna lɛ var ma a sɔr ka n ba tʊɔrɔ waara a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Now there is nothing left for me to do in this part of the world, and for years I have wanted to visit you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, n ba lɛ tara jipaalaa ka a paalsɩ anyã pɔ na lɛ tʊ̃ go ɛ, n mɩn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ a yɩ nyɛfʊ a yuon yɔ̃ɔ na po jũu.

english_verse: So I plan to stop off on my way to Spain. Then after a short, but refreshing, visit with you, I hope you will quickly send me on.
translation_verse: N guor naa ɩka n chen Sɩpẽen, maa wa tala ɩn ara na piir yɩ kaa, naa jɛ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃ bãlãa a yɩ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n chen.

english_verse: I am now on my way to Jerusalem to deliver the money that the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia collected for God's needy people.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Masedonɩya dẽme nɩ a Akaya dẽme man taa ɩka ba chɩɛr chɩɛrfʊ sʊ̃ʊn a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo bamɩne na be a Jerusalɛm na ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: This is something they really wanted to do. But sharing their money with the Jews was also like paying back a debt, because the Jews had already shared their spiritual blessings with the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Ba nyɛn a lɛ ka a ɩ sãn kʊ ba a ba de a lɛ dɔɔl a ba mãɛ. Ala ɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, põn naa a Juu nɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊsɩ, ala lɛ so ka a mɩ sɛɛ ɩka ba mɩ lɔ̃ɔn a Juu nɩbɛ põn a ba bʊ̃tarsɩ.

english_verse: After I have safely delivered this money, I will visit you and then go on to Spain.
translation_verse: Maa wa tʊ̃ a nɩtɔ̃, naa de a chɩɛrfʊsɩ anyã kʊ ba baar, ala lɛ ɩn chen a Sɩpẽen naa tɩ 'lɔɔ piir yɩ kaa.

english_verse: And when I do arrive in Rome, I know it will be with the full blessings of Christ.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka maa wa waara, ɩn waan naa a Kɩrɩsɩto sʊ̃ʊfʊ na bɛrma.

english_verse: My friends, by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the love that comes from the Holy Spirit, I beg you to pray sincerely with me and for me.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa n yɛɛr, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nʊ̃fʊ ɩka, yɩ pʊɔ ma a n mɔ̃fʊ nyã pɔ, sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma.

english_verse: Pray that God will protect me from the unbelievers in Judea, and that his people in Jerusalem will be pleased with what I am doing.
translation_verse: Yɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn, a wʊ faa ma yin a bala na ba sɔɔ be a Judiya, ka a lɛ mɩ ɩn chiine a Jerusalɛm ka a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo mɩ tɩ sɔɔ de,

english_verse: Ask God to let me come to you and have a pleasant and refreshing visit.
translation_verse: ka ala ɩka Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ, ka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃ nɩ pʊpɛl a sɩ 'mataa 'yɔ̃ɔ taa ãkpãɛn.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will be with all of you. Amen.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ, wʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: I have good things to say about Phoebe, who is a leader in the church at Cenchreae.
translation_verse: N pʊrɔ naa a sɩ yɛpɔɔ Fiibi yovɩla kʊrɔ yɩ, a pɔɔ nyã ɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ be a Kenkɩrya tẽdẽme pupuorbiir pɔ.

english_verse: Welcome her in a way that is proper for someone who has faith in the Lord and is one of God's own people. Help her in any way you can. After all, she has proved to be a respected leader for many others, including me.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka 'lɔ wa tɩ, yɩ de wʊ nɩ a sɩ Soro yuor, na yɩ maal wʊ a lɛ na sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn puoro, na yɩ mɩ kʊ wʊ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jaa wʊn na bʊɔrɔ yi a yɩ sɛ̃. Bojũu wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ nɩyɔɔ nɩ a maa mãɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila. They have not only served Christ Jesus together with me,
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Pɩrɩsɩla nɩ Akuila kʊ ma. Ba ɩ naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: but they have even risked their lives for me. I am grateful for them and so are all the Gentile churches.
translation_verse: Ba tʊ̃n kũu tʊ̃mɔ̃ kʊ ma. A ba ɩ maa tɛɛ gba lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a pupuorbo bala ba jaa na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ãgãn mɩ 'maan ba naa.

english_verse: Greet the church that meets in their home. Greet my dear friend Epaenetus, who was the first person in Asia to have faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Puor a pupuorbiir bala na ma lɔ̃ɔ puor a ba yir. Puor a n badaba Epainɩtʊsɩ, 'lɔ lɛ de nie turo a Kɩrɩsɩto be a Asɩya paal pɔ.

english_verse: Greet Mary, who has worked so hard for you.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Mɛɛr mɩ na ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ,

english_verse: Greet my relatives Andronicus and Junia, who were in jail with me. They are highly respected by the apostles and were followers of Christ before I was.
translation_verse: na yɩ mɩ puor a Andirunɩkasɩ nɩ a Junɩyasɩ. Ba ɩn a n bʊr nɩbɛ ka maa nɩ bala jaa mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'mataa be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ. A nɩtʊ̃nsɩ bɔ̃ɔ ban jaa chɛchɛ, bala mɩ lɛ de nie turo a Kɩrɩsɩto tɩchɛ ka a maa wa bɩɛr.

english_verse: Greet Ampliatus, my dear friend whose faith is in the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor Ampɩlatusɩ kʊ ma, n nʊ̃ wʊ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto tufʊ jũu,

english_verse: Greet Urbanus, who serves Christ along with us. Greet my dear friend Stachys.
translation_verse: na yɩ mɩ puor Urbanusɩ na pʊɔ sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ nɩ a n badaba Sɩtachɩsɩ.

english_verse: Greet Herodion, who is a relative of mine. Greet Narcissus and the others in his family, who have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Hɛrɔdiyɔn na ɩ a n bʊr nɩrɛ, na yɩ mɩ puor a Narsɩsusɩ nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ba jaa na turo a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who work hard for the Lord. Greet my dear friend Persis. She also works hard for the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Tɩrafaina nɩ Tɩrafosa, a pɔbɔ ba nyãna mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ puor a Persis mɩ na ɩ a pɔɔ ãsʊɔ na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Greet Rufus, that special servant of the Lord, and greet his mother, who has been like a mother to me.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Worofʊs ban ir a sɩ Soro pɔ nɩ a wʊ ma, a wʊ ma mɩ ɩn a n ma.

english_verse: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, and Hermas, as well as our friends who are with them.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor Asɩnkirtusɩ, nɩ Filegon, nɩ Hɛmɩsɩ nɩ Patrobas nɩ Hermasɩ nɩ a yɛɛr bala jaa na be a ba sɛ̃.

english_verse: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all of God's people who are with them.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Filologusɩ nɩ Juliya nɩ Nereyus nɩ a wʊ yɛpɔɔ nɩ Olinpasɩ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ba jaa na be a ba sɛ̃.

english_verse: Be sure to give each other a warm greeting. All of Christ's churches greet you.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor puor taa nɩ pʊpɛl. A pupuorbiir ba jaa puor yɩ naa nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto yuor.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to watch out for anyone who causes trouble and divides the church by refusing to do what all of you were taught. Stay away from them!
translation_verse: N kpãkpãana yɩ naa yɛɛr ɩka yɩ guro yɩ mãɛ sʊ̃ nɩ a bala na ma waara nɩ a ootaa, na ba ma vɛ̃ ka yɩ bãra loro a wiilfʊ nyã yɩn jãn pɔ. Yɩ tɔɔ 'laa tɩ bar ba.

english_verse: I am glad that everyone knows how well you obey the Lord. But still, I want you to understand what is good and not have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wõn a lɛ yɩn turo a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɛ nɛ nɛ, ka nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ sɩ a yɩ yele jũu. Tɩchɛ n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ maala vɩla nɩ yɛ̃, na yɩ ta bɔ̃ɔ yelbier maalfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Then God, who gives peace, will soon crush Satan under your feet. I pray that our Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ, a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ ŋmãɛ a Satan a yɩ gbɛɛ pĩlem. A wãɛfʊ na yi a sɩ Soro Yesu sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Timothy, who works with me, sends his greetings, and so do my relatives, Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater.
translation_verse: Timoti na ɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ puor yɩ naa, ka a Lusiyusɩ nɩ Jason nɩ Sosipater na ɩ a n bʊr nɩbɛ mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

english_verse: I, Tertius, also send my greetings. I am a follower of the Lord, and I wrote this letter.
translation_verse: Maa mɩ na ɩ Tɛrtɩyɔsɩ na sɛɛrɛ a Pɔɔl gãn nyã mɩ puoro yɩ naa nɩ a sɩ Soro yuor.

english_verse: Praise God! He can make you strong by means of my good news, which is the message about Jesus Christ. For ages and ages this message was kept secret,
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩɩr wʊ ta a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na sʊ̃ʊ yɩ a yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ara tu a n 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɩn mʊɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, naa chaar a yelsɔɔlaa nyãna na sɔɔl a kõr jaa na po.

english_verse: but now at last it has been told. The eternal God commanded his prophets to write about the good news, so that all nations would obey and have faith.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, a yelsɔɔlaa chaar naa tu a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr nyã na 'yɛr ba, ka a paalsɩ ba jaa na sɔɔ de, na ba turo wʊ.

english_verse: And now, because of Jesus Christ, we can praise the only wise God forever! Amen.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a yɛ̃ sʊɔ, wʊ nyɛrɛ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Sosthenes, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl a wʊ bɔfʊ pɔ ɩka n ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ Sosetenesɩ,

english_verse: To God's church in Corinth. Christ Jesus chose you to be his very own people, and you worship in his name, as we and all others do who call him Lord.
translation_verse: lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn na puoro a Nãaŋmɩn be a Korɩntɩ tẽe pɔ. A yɩn na oo be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ na yɩ ɩ a wʊ nɩ chɛchɛsɩ lɔ̃ɔn a bala na be jie jaa na bʊɔlɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor na ɩ a sɩn nɩ a ba jaa Soro.

english_verse: My prayer is that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I never stop thanking my God for treating you with undeserved grace by giving you Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: N ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ yɩ bojũu wʊ wãɛ yɩ naa tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Now you are certain that everything we told you about our Lord Christ Jesus is true.
translation_verse: bojũu a Kɩrɩsɩto dãasɩɛ sɩn di, yɩ sɔɔn de.

english_verse: You are not missing out on any blessings, as you wait for him to return.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yaa faa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ, na yɩ pãa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir chɛlɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na lɛ lɩɛb wa.

english_verse: And until the day Christ does return, he will keep you completely innocent.
translation_verse: Wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn ãkpãɛn tɩ tãn a baaraa, ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir.

english_verse: My dear friends, as a follower of our Lord Jesus Christ, I beg you to get along with each other. Don't take sides. Always try to agree in what you think.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n den a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor naa sʊɔrɔ nɩ yɩ ɩka yɩ jaa yɩ ta ŋma dẽdẽ ka ootaa be a yɩ pɔ ɛ, a lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ pãa tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: Several people from Chloe's family have already reported to me that you keep arguing with each other.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, nɩbɛ bamɩne na yi a Kɩloe yir wa man kʊ ma ɩka nɛchɩrɛ ben a yɩ chara pɔ.

english_verse: Has Christ been divided up? Was I nailed to a cross for you? Were you baptized in my name?
translation_verse: A Kɩrɩsɩto ŋman dẽdẽme bɩɩ? Pɔɔl lɛ ba kpa a daa ju bɩɩ? Bɩɩ Pɔɔl yuor lɛ yɩ son a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ?

english_verse: Not one of you can say that you were baptized in my name.
translation_verse: ka nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka maa yuor lɛ n son yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I did baptize the family of Stephanas, but I don't remember if I baptized anyone else.
translation_verse: Ɔ̃ɔ, n mɩ dɔ̃ɔ so a Sɩtɛfanas nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ba jaa a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ. A anyã puor n ba tɩɛr nɩrɛ jaa ɩn lɛ so a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ did not send me to baptize. He sent me to tell the good news without using words that sound wise and would make the cross of Christ lose its power. Christ Is God's Power and Wisdom
translation_verse: Bojũu Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ba tʊ̃ ma ɩka n tɩ suoro nɩbɛ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n tɩ mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na ba ɩ nɩsaal yɛ̃ 'yɛr ɛ. Ka a Kɩrɩsɩto kũu wʊn kpi a daa taa ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: The message about the cross doesn't make any sense to lost people. But for those of us who are being saved, it is God's power at work.
translation_verse: Bojũu a daa 'yɛr ɩn dãbol 'yɛr kʊ a bala na wɛrɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩn Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ a sɩn bala na nyɛ a faafʊ.

english_verse: As God says in the Scriptures, “I will destroy the wisdom of all who claim to be wise. I will confuse those who think they know so much.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Ɩn sɔ̃ɔ naa a yɛ̃ dẽme yɛ̃ bar, naa bʊ̃bʊr a bɔ̃ɔfʊ dẽme bɔ̃ɔfʊ bar.” (Isaiya

english_verse: What happened to those wise people? What happened to those experts in the Scriptures? What happened to the ones who think they have all the answers? Didn't God show that the wisdom of this world is foolish?
translation_verse: Nyɩnɛ lɛ a yɛ̃ dẽme be? Nyɩnɛ lɛ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ be? Nyɩnɛ lɛ chɩbɛ dẽme mɩ be a dɩna? A ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɩɛb a wɛr nyã yɛ̃ a wʊ ɩ jɔl ɛ?

english_verse: God was wise and decided not to let the people of this world use their wisdom to learn about him. Instead, God chose to save only those who believe the foolish message we preach.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ kʊ vɛ̃ ka a wɛr de a wʊ yɛ̃ bɔ̃ɔn wʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ pɛl naa nɩ a jɔl mʊɔl ban mʊɔl ka a na faa a bala na sɔɔ de.

english_verse: Jews ask for miracles, and Greeks want something that sounds wise.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ ma bʊɔrɔ naa nɛ'maa yele, ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, mɩ bʊɔrɔ yɛ̃.

english_verse: But we preach that Christ was nailed to a cross. Most Jews have problems with this, and most Gentiles think it is foolish.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn mʊɔl naa Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ban kpa a daa ju, ka a ɩ gbɛr bãrfʊ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ tɩ mɩ ɩ jɔl yele kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Even when God is foolish, he is wiser than everyone else, and even when God is weak, he is stronger than everyone else.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn jɔlʊ̃ ɩn yɛ̃ gar a nɩrɛ yɛ̃, ka a Nãaŋmɩn balfʊ tara kpɛ̃ɔ gar a nɩrɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember what you were when God chose you. The people of this world didn't think that many of you were wise. Only a few of you were in places of power, and not many of you came from important families.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl yɩ, nɩsaal kaafʊ pɔ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme ɛ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yuor dẽme ɛ, yaa ɩ nãmɩne bibiir ɛ.

english_verse: But God chose the foolish things of this world to put the wise to shame. He chose the weak things of this world to put the powerful to shame.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir naa a wɛr nyã jɔl bon 'yɔ̃ɔn a yɛ̃ dẽme vã, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir naa a wɛr nyã bʊ̃balaa na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a kpãɛn dẽme vã.

english_verse: What the world thinks is worthless, useless, and nothing at all is what God has used to destroy what the world considers important.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ma ir naa a wɛr bon ba 'yɔ̃ɔnaa, a ala a nɩbɛ na kaara pɔrɔ, nɩ a nɩbɛ bala gba nɩrɛ jaa na ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, wʊ ɩ naa nɩtɔ̃ ka a bon 'lɔ a wɛr na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ka wʊ ɩ pɔrɔ,

english_verse: God did all this to keep anyone from bragging to him.
translation_verse: ka nɩrɛ jaa taa bʊɔrɔ yuor a wʊ niem ɛ.

english_verse: You are God's children. He sent Christ Jesus to save us and to make us wise, acceptable, and holy.
translation_verse: A wʊ jũu lɛ yɩ be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yɛ̃ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ kʊ sɩ, na wʊ ɩ a sɩ torfʊ nɩ chɛchɛ nɩ a faafʊ.

english_verse: So if you want to brag, do what the Scriptures say and brag about the Lord.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Vɛ̃ ka a 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ yuor, wʊ bʊɔrɔ a yuor a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.” (Jeremiya

english_verse: Friends, when I came and told you the mystery that God had shared with us, I didn't use big words or try to sound wise.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wa a yɩ sɛ̃, n ba waan nɛbɔ̃ɔn bɩɩ yɛ̃ 'yɛr naa wa man a Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ kʊ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, while I was with you, I made up my mind to speak only about Jesus Christ, who had been nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Bojũu a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ be a yɛ sɛ̃, n ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa pʊɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ban kpa a daa ju ɛ.

english_verse: At first, I was weak and trembling with fear.
translation_verse: Balfʊ, dãbãɛ nɩ mĩifʊ lɛ n dɔ̃ɔ ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: That way you would have faith because of God's power and not because of human wisdom.
translation_verse: ka a yɩ sɔɔfʊ taa dɩɛl a nɩrɛ yɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a dɩɛl a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: We do use wisdom when speaking to people who are mature in their faith. But it isn't the wisdom of this world or of its rulers, who will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Faa nyɛ, sɩn ma 'yɛr a sɩ 'yɛr nɩ yɛ̃ kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr pɔ, a ba ɩ a wɛr nyã bɩɩ a kpãɛn dẽme yɛ̃ na wa ɩ pɔrɔ daar kɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: We speak of God's hidden and mysterious wisdom that God decided to use for our glory long before the world began.
translation_verse: Kai, sɩn 'yɛrɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ sɔɔlaa, a yɛ̃ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn na kaa ir a sɩ daar kɔ̃ɔ tɩɩr jũu sɛrɛ na wʊ wa maal a wɛr.

english_verse: The rulers of this world didn't know anything about this wisdom. If they had known about it, they would not have nailed the glorious Lord to a cross.
translation_verse: A wɛr nyã kpãɛn dẽme ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, ala ɩ bala ta bɔ̃ɔ ba kʊ̃ naa kpa a tɩɩr Soro a daa ju ɛ.

english_verse: But it is just as the Scriptures say, “What God has planned for people who love him is more than eyes have seen or ears have heard. It has never even entered our minds!”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Nɩbir jaa ba nyɛ ɛ, toor jaa ba wõ ɛ, tɩɛr jaa mɩ ba bɔ̃ɔn a ala a Nãaŋmɩn na chɔɔr kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ wʊ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: God's Spirit has shown you everything. His Spirit finds out everything, even what is deep in the mind of God.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ anyãna lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wiil kʊ sɩ, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma bɩɛr naa a yelsɩ a jaa, na wʊ gba ma bɔ̃ɔ a ala na be a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔm.

english_verse: You are the only one who knows what is in your own mind, and God's Spirit is the only one who knows what is in God's mind.
translation_verse: Nɩbuor lɛ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ na be a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ tɩɛr pɔ, ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ mãɛ ba lɛ ɛ? A lɛ mɩ lɛ nɩrɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ lɛ na be a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr pɔ ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ Sɩɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But God has given us his Spirit. This is why we don't think the same way that the people of this world think. This is also why we can recognize the blessings God has given us.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a wɛr nyã sɩɛ lɛ sɩ tara ɛ, tɩchɛ a Sɩɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ a sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn a ala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ sɩ a pɔrɔ.

english_verse: This is why only someone who has God's Spirit can understand spiritual blessings. Anyone who doesn't have God's Spirit thinks these blessings are foolish.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, maa sɔɔ a ala na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃ ɛ, bojũu a ɩn dãbol yele kʊ wʊ a wʊ maa bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, bojũu nɩrɛ na tʊ̃ɔn bɔ̃ɔ ala ɩ wʊ tara naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

english_verse: People who are guided by the Spirit can make all kinds of judgments, but they cannot be judged by others.
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma vɩɛr naa a yele a jaa kaa, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ tɩɛr ɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures ask, “Has anyone ever known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?” But we understand what Christ is thinking.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “An lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro tɩɛr, na wʊn kpãa wʊ?” (Isaiya

english_verse: My friends, you are acting like the people of this world. That's why I could not speak to you as spiritual people. You are like babies as far as your faith in Christ is concerned.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ fɩka nɩbɛ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ naa fɩka a wɛr nɩbɛ na yɩ ɩ bibiir a Kɩrɩsɩto sɔr pɔ.

english_verse: So I had to treat you like babies and feed you milk. You could not take solid food, and you still cannot,
translation_verse: Bɩrkʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ lɛ n kʊ yɩ a ba ɩ saa yɩn ba ta na tʊ̃ɔ di ɛ. Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ yɩ chɛnɛ ba ta ɛ.

english_verse: because you are not yet spiritual. You are jealous and argue with each other. This proves you are not spiritual and you are acting like the people of this world.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛnɛ na ɩrɛ fɩka nɩbɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, bojũu nyuur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ chɛnɛ na be a yɩ pɔ, yaa chɛnɛ ɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ ɛ? Na yɩ maala a lɛ ban maala ɛ?

english_verse: Some of you say you follow me, and others claim to follow Apollos. Isn't this how ordinary people behave?
translation_verse: A yɩ ãsʊɔ na ma 'yɛr, maa turo na Pɔɔl, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ 'yɛr ɩka, maa turo na Apolosɩ. Yaa chɛnɛ ɩrɛ fɩka nɩbɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ?

english_verse: I planted the seeds, Apollos watered them, but God made them sprout and grow.
translation_verse: Maa lɛ bʊr ka a Apolosɩ mɩ chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ so an nʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: What matters isn't those who planted or watered, but God who made the plants grow.
translation_verse: Lɛ a 'lɔ na bʊr, nɩ a 'lɔ na chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ, ba ɩ bon jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ tɛɛ na vɛ̃ ka a bonsɩ a jaa nʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: The one who plants is just as important as the one who waters. And each one will be paid for what they do.
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊr nɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na chɔr a kʊ̃ɔ ba jaa tara na tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen ka a ãsʊɔ jaa na nyɛ a lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ sãyar.

english_verse: Apollos and I work together for God, and you are God's garden and God's building. Only One Foundation
translation_verse: Bojũu, sɩn ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba, yɩn mɩ lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puo, a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊn mɩɛrɛ.

english_verse: God treated me with undeserved grace and let me become an expert builder. I laid a foundation on which others have built. But we must each be careful how we build,
translation_verse: A wãɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma lɛ so ka n kpar a dachin par kparaa nɩtãa bɔ̃ɔ mɩɛrɛ, ka a bamɩne mɩ mɩɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ. Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ bɔ̃ɔ kaara a lɛ wʊn mɩɛrɛ dɔɔlɔ.

english_verse: We will be rewarded if our building is left standing.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a lɛ wʊn mɛ dɔɔl ba sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, wʊn nyɛn a wʊ sãyar.

english_verse: But if it is destroyed by the fire, we will lose everything. Yet we ourselves will be saved, like someone escaping from flames.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a wa di naa a nɩnyɩnɛ kʊ̃ nyɛ bon jaa ɛ, wʊn nyɛn faafʊ, tɩchɛ wʊn kaara naa fɩka nɩrɛ bũu na vuul.

english_verse: All of you surely know you are God's temple and his Spirit lives in you.
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩn mãɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir ka a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɩɛrɛ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ?

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves! If any of you think you are wise in the things of this world, you will have to become foolish before you can be truly wise.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta bɛlɛ a yɩ mãɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ tɩɛr naa ɩka wʊ ɩ naa yɛ̃ sʊɔ a wɛr nyã pɔ, wʊ lɩɛb ɩ “Jɔl” na wʊ pãa tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb yɛ̃ sʊɔ.

english_verse: This is because God considers the wisdom of this world to be foolish. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God catches the wise when they try to outsmart him.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a wɛr nyã yɛ̃ ɩ naa jɔl yele a Nãaŋmɩn niem, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Wʊ ma nyɔɔ naa a yɛ̃ sʊɔ a wʊ yɛ̃ yele pɔ.” (Job

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “The Lord knows that the plans made by wise people are useless.”
translation_verse: A lɛ sɛb go, “A Soro bɔ̃ɔ naa a yɛ̃ dẽme tɩɛr ka a ɩ pɔrɔ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: So stop bragging about what anyone has done. Paul and Apollos and Peter all belong to you. In fact, everything is yours, including the world, life, death, the present, and the future. Everything belongs to you,
translation_verse: ka maa Pɔɔl lɛ bɩɩ, Apolosɩ lɛ bɩɩ, Sɩfasɩ lɛ bɩɩ, a wɛr lɛ bɩɩ, nyɛvʊr lɛ bɩɩ, kũu lɛ bɩɩ, dɩna lɛ bɩɩ, ka daar kɔ̃ɔ lɛ, yɩn lɛ so a jaa.

english_verse: and you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
translation_verse: A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ so yɩ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ so a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: Think of us as servants of Christ who have been given the work of explaining God's mysterious ways.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ma kaa sɩ a sɩ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de a wʊ yelsɔɔlsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nuur pɔ.

english_verse: And since our first duty is to be faithful to the one we work for,
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a lɛ na gã lɛ ɩka a bala ban de bon 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nuur pɔ, ba tara yelmãɛ.

english_verse: it doesn't matter to me if I am judged by you or even by a court of law. In fact, I don't judge myself.
translation_verse: A ba bã ma ɛ, ala ɩ ka yɩn lɛ bɩɩ a wɛr nɩrɛ lɛ tɔɔrɔ a n 'yɛr sɩrɛ jaa a maa mãɛ kʊ̃ tɔɔr a n 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything against me, but this doesn't prove I am right. The Lord is my judge.
translation_verse: N ba tɩɛr yele jaa ɩn ɩ bɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ a ba wiil ɩka n ba tara yele ɛ. A sɩ Soro lɛ na tɔɔr a n 'yɛr.

english_verse: So don't judge anyone until the Lord returns. He will show what is hidden in the dark and what is in everyone's heart. Then God will be the one who praises each of us.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta de nie tɔɔrɔ a 'yɛr ka a bɩbir ba ta ɛ. Yɩ chɛlɛ ka a sɩ Soro wa. 'Lɔ lɛ na yin yele a jaa na sɔɔl a libe pɔ, chãa pɔ, na wʊ mɩ wiil a ala na sɔɔl a nɩbɛ tɩɛr pɔ. A bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ãsʊɔ jaa na nyɛ a wʊ pɛɛfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: Friends, I have used Apollos and myself as examples to teach you the meaning of the saying, “Follow the rules.” I want you to stop saying one of us is better than the other.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, a yɩn jũu lɛ n de a yele anyãna naa man a maa nɩ a Apolosɩ, ka yɩn jãn a par yi a sɩ sɛ̃ a lɛ ban 'yɛr ɩka, “Taa ɩrɛ wa chen po a lɛ ban sɛb ɛ.” Ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa taa pãa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ gara taa ɛ.

english_verse: What is so special about you? What do you have that you were not given? And if it was given to you, how can you brag?
translation_verse: Ana lɛ maal yɩ a yɩ be yɩ yõ gar nɩrɛ jaa? Bo yɩ tara, ka a ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ yɩ ɛ? Ala ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ yɩ, ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ a yɩ bʊɔrɔ yuor fɩka yaa ɩ lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: Are you already satisfied? Are you now rich? Have you become kings while we are still nobodies? I wish you were kings. Then we could have a share in your kingdom.
translation_verse: Yɩ ben tara bon jaa yɩn bʊɔrɔ! Na yɩ be ɩ taraa dẽme! Yɩ ben lɩɛb nãmɩne ka sɩn ba ɩ ɛ! Maa bɔfʊ lɛ fɩka yɩ ta ɩ a nãmɩne sɩrɛ jaa, ka a sɩ mɩ ta pʊɔ yɩ ɩ a nãmɩne.

english_verse: It seems to me that God has put us apostles in the worst possible place. We are like prisoners on their way to death. Angels and the people of this world just laugh at us.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa sɛ̃, a kaara naa fɩka a Nãaŋmɩn den a sɩn na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ a sɩ pii a nɩyɔɔ puor, a ban kʊ sɩ chãa pɔ. Ka a sɩ ɩ bʊ̃manãa kʊ a wɛr nɩ a malakasɩ nɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: Even today we go hungry and thirsty and don't have anything to wear except rags. We are mistreated and don't have a place to live.
translation_verse: Wa tãn dɩna gba, kɔ̃ nɩ kɔ̃nyũur lɛ sɩ ma chiine, ka a sɩ bʊ̃sursɩ chɩɛr chɩɛr ka ba pɔɔrɔ sɩ, saa tara yir kpɩɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We work hard with our own hands, and when people abuse us, we wish them well. When we suffer, we are patient.
translation_verse: Tʊ̃ kpãɛn lɛ sɩ ma tʊ̃n a sɩ mãɛ nuur, bala wa tʊ sɩ, sɩ ma 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ ba, bala sɔɔ gere sɩ, tɩ sɩ ma tara na kãnyir.

english_verse: When someone curses us, we answer with kind words. Until now we are thought of as nothing more than the trash and garbage of this world.
translation_verse: Bala wa sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a sɩ yuor, sɩ maa 'yɛr tuo ɛ, wa tãn dɩna, baa bʊɔlɔ sɩ bon jaa ɛ, ka a sɩ ɩ a wɛr wʊ jaa tãpuor ju sɔɔr.

english_verse: I am not writing to embarrass you. I want to help you, just as parents help their own dear children.
translation_verse: N ba sɛɛrɛ a anyãna ɩka n su yɩ vã ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n kpãa yɩ maa mãɛ bi'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ kaar.

english_verse: and I want you to be like me.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka n pãa sʊɔrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ turo a lɛ ɩn turo.

english_verse: This is why I sent Timothy to you. I love him like a son, and he is a faithful servant of the Lord. Timothy will tell you what I do to follow Christ and how it agrees with what I always teach about Christ in every church.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu mɩ lɛ so ka n tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Timoti na ɩ a n bie ɩn nʊ̃, wʊ tara na yelmãɛ a sɩ Soro pɔ. Wʊn tɩ jɛɔ yɩ naa a lɛ a n befʊ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, na n mɩ wile nɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ a jiir a jaa.

english_verse: Some of you think I am not coming for a visit, and so you are bragging.
translation_verse: A yɩ bamɩne chɩɛrɛ nɩ nyãa ɩrɛ fɩka n kʊ̃ lɛ wa be go ɛ.

english_verse: But if the Lord lets me come, I will soon be there. Then I will find out if the ones who are doing all this bragging really have any power.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, ala ɩ a sɩ Soro sɔɔ naa, ɩn wan a yɩ sɛ̃, naa tɩ kaa a ba ɩ a bala na chɩɛrɛ a nyãa 'yɛrɛ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n tɩ kaa a kpɛ̃ɔ buor ban tara.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't just a lot of words. It is power.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ yele ba ɩ nɛɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: What do you want me to do when I arrive? Do you want me to be hard on you or to be kind and gentle?
translation_verse: Buor sʊɔ lɛ yɩ bʊɔrɔ? Maa wa tɩrɛ, n tɩn kpaara bɩɩ nʊ̃fʊ nɩ jomm sɩɛ?

english_verse: I have heard terrible things about some of you. In fact, you are behaving worse than Gentiles. A man is even sleeping with his own stepmother.
translation_verse: Ba wa man kʊ ma sɩrɛ jaa ɩka sɛ̃sɛ̃yele ben a yɩ pɔ, a lɛ gba na ba ɩrɛ a bala na ba puoro pɔ ɛ. Bie na na gãn a wʊ sãa pɔɔ.

english_verse: You are proud, when you ought to feel bad enough to chase away anyone who acts like this.
translation_verse: Tɩ a yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ yuor, vã kʊ̃ naa nyɔɔ yɩ ka yɩ dii a nɩrɛ nyãna na maal a nɩtɔ̃ bar a yɩ pɔ ɛ?

english_verse: I am with you only in my thoughts. But in the name of our Lord Jesus I have already judged this man, as though I were with you in person. So when you meet together and the power of the Lord Jesus is with you, I will be there too.
translation_verse: Yɩn wa lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor, a n tɩɛr mɩ ben a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a sɩ Soro Yesu kpɛ̃ɔ mɩ be be,

english_verse: You must then hand that man over to Satan. His body will be destroyed, but his spirit will be saved when the Lord Jesus returns.
translation_verse: yɩ de a daba nyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ Satan nũu pɔ, ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a wʊ ãgãn bar, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn faa a wʊ sɩɛ a sɩ Soro bɩbir daar.

english_verse: Stop being proud! Don't you know how a little yeast can spread through the whole batch of dough?
translation_verse: A yɩ yuor bɔfʊ nyã ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ. Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a dãbɩl jaa pʊʊr lɛ ma vɛ̃ ka a paanʊ̃ɔ vʊ̃ a yɔɔ ɛ?

english_verse: So don't celebrate the festival by being evil and sinful, which is like serving bread made with yeast. Be pure and truthful and celebrate by using bread made without yeast.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta ɩ a sɩ dire a Gõl Bar Difʊ nɩ a dãbɩl koraa ɛ, a dãbɩl koraa na ɩ yosɔ̃ɔ nɩ putuyele, tɩchɛ a ɩ a paanʊ̃ɔ na ba tara a dãbɩl ɛ. A paanʊ̃ɔ na ɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ nɩ yelmãɛ tarfʊ.

english_verse: In my other letter I told you not to have anything to do with immoral people.
translation_verse: A gãn 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ sɛb kʊ yɩ, n 'yɛr ɩka yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ ɛ,

english_verse: But I wasn't talking about the people of this world. You would have to leave this world to get away from everyone who is immoral or greedy or who cheats or worships idols.
translation_verse: n ba 'yɛrɛ a bala na ba puoro na sɛ̃nɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a bɔgar dẽme, bɩɩ a nɩfɔlbɔ bɩɩ a tɩpuorbo ɛ. Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ, yɩ kʊ̃ naa yi a ka a wɛr nyã pɔ.

english_verse: God judges everyone else. The Scriptures say, “Chase away any of your own people who are evil.”
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ na tɔɔr a bala na ba puoro ɛ 'yɛr. “Yɩ dii a putusʊɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ bar a yɩ pɔ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: When one of you has a complaint against another, do you take your complaint to a court of sinners? Or do you take it to God's people?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ nɩ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ wa nyɛn 'yɛr, ŋmɩnɛ a ɩ a wʊ na tara a 'yɛr chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrbɔ bala na ba puoro ɛ jie, tɩ bar a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo jie?

english_verse: Don't you know we will judge angels? And if this is so, we can surely judge everyday matters.
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka sɩn lɛ na tɔɔr a malakasɩ gba 'yɛr ɛ? Wa 'yɛrɛ nɩ a sɩ mãɛ yelbil?

english_verse: Why do you take everyday complaints to judges who are not respected by the church?
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩn wa tara a 'yɛrbil anyãna taaba, yɩ ma ir a pupuorbo bamɩne gba yɛ̃ na ba tal tɛɛr ɛ, ka ba tɔɔr a 'yɛr.

english_verse: I say this to your shame. Aren't any of you wise enough to act as a judge between one follower and another?
translation_verse: N 'yɛr naa anyãna na 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ vã, a ɩn sɩrɛ ɩka a yɩ pɔ ãsʊɔ jaa ba tara yɛ̃ jaa pʊʊr na wʊn maal a wʊ taaba 'yɛr ɛ?

english_verse: Why should one of you take another to be tried by unbelievers?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka a yɛbɛ ma tara a yɛbɛ chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie, a bala na ba ɩ a Yesu turbo sɛ̃.

english_verse: When one of you takes another to court, all of you lose. It would be better to let yourselves be cheated and robbed.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka yɩ ben maal bɔr, bojũu yɩ ma nyɔɔr taa chiin a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie. Bo lɛ so ka yɩ kʊ̃ naa sɔɔ ka a nɩbɛ maal yɩ dɛɛr ɛ? Bɩɩ sɔɔ ka ba fɔl yɩ ɛ?

english_verse: Don't you know that evil people won't have a share in the blessings of God's kingdom? Don't fool yourselves! No one who is immoral or worships idols or is unfaithful in marriage or is a pervert or behaves like a homosexual
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a putudẽme kʊ̃ kpɛ be a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ? Yɩ ta bɛlɛ yɩ mãɛ ɛ. Sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ, tɩpuorbo, a bala na fol bɩɩ a dɔɔr na lɩɛb gãna nɩ taa,

english_verse: will share in God's kingdom. Neither will any thief or greedy person or drunkard or anyone who curses and cheats others.
translation_verse: bɩɩ nãnyisɩ, bɩɩ a bɔgar dẽme, bɩɩ a dãburbo, bɩɩ a yosɔ̃ɔnbɔ, bɩɩ a nɩfɔlbɔ, ba ãsʊɔ jaa kʊ̃ kpɛ be a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Some of you used to be like that. But now the name of our Lord Jesus Christ and the power of God's Spirit have washed you and made you holy and acceptable to God. Honor God with Your Body
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a yɩ bamɩne mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kaara, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛ yɩ bar, na wʊ oo yɩ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor nɩ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ.

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do anything we want to.” But I tell you not everything is good for us. So I refuse to let anything have power over me.
translation_verse: A yɩ bamɩne 'yɛr naa ɩka, n ba chire bon jaa maalfʊ ɛ. Yele jaa ba chɩre maalfʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a ba ɩ yele a jaa lɛ vɩɛlɛ maalfʊ ɛ. Maa kʊ̃ sɔɔ ka bon jaa so ma ɛ.

english_verse: You also say, “Food is meant for our bodies, and our bodies are meant for food.” But I tell you that God will destroy them both. We are not supposed to do indecent things with our bodies. We are to use them for the Lord who is in charge of our bodies.
translation_verse: Bamɩne mɩ ma lɛ 'yɛr naa ɩka, bʊ̃diir ben be puor 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a puor mɩ be be a bʊ̃diir 'yɔ̃ɔ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔn a jaa ayi bar. Sɛ̃sɛ̃yele jũu ba lɛ a ãgãn be be ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro jũu lɛ, ka a sɩ Soro mɩ be be a ãgãn jũu.

english_verse: God will raise us from death by the same power he used when he raised our Lord to life.
translation_verse: A kpɛ̃ɔ nyãna lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sãɩn a sɩ Soro a kũu pɔ, ka wʊ mɩ na sãɩ sɩ a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: Don't you know that your bodies are part of the body of Christ? Is it right for me to join part of the body of Christ to a prostitute? No, it isn't!
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a yɩ ãgãma ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn ɛ? N pãa de a n ãgãn na ɩ bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn naa tɩ 'mar pɔɔ baa pɔ? N kʊ̃ ɩ a lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't you know that a man who does that becomes part of her body? The Scriptures say, “The two of them will be like one person.”
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de a wʊ ãgãn tɩ 'mar a pɔɔ baa pɔ, ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a wʊ ãgãn ɛ? Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: But anyone who is joined to the Lord is one in spirit with him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na de wʊ mãɛ 'mar a sɩ Soro, 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ ɩn bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: Don't be immoral in matters of sex. That is a sin against your own body in a way no other sin is.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɔɔ yi a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ. Yelbier jaa nɩrɛ na ɩrɛ ma ben a wʊ ãgãn yõo, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɛ̃nɛ, a wʊ ãgãn lɛ wʊ maala a yelbier 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.

english_verse: You surely know that your body is a temple where the Holy Spirit lives. The Spirit is in you and is a gift from God. You are no longer your own.
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a yɩ ãgãn ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ puorfʊ yir ɛ? A 'lɔ na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. A 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɔ? Yaa so yɩ mãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So use your body to honor God.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn da yɩn so. A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a yɩ ãgãma.

english_verse: Now I will answer the questions you asked in your letter. You asked, “Is it best for people not to marry?”
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yele ala yɩn sɛb kʊ ma, an taa vɩɛlɛ na ka daba ta kul pɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Well, having your own husband or wife should keep you from doing something immoral.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ an ɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele na be be jũu, daba jaa wʊ kul a wʊ mãɛ pɔɔ, ka a pɔɔ jaa mɩ kul a wʊ mãɛ sɩrɛ.

english_verse: A wife belongs to her husband instead of to herself, and a husband belongs to his wife instead of to himself.
translation_verse: A pɔɔ tɛɛ ba lɛ so a wʊ mãɛ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ sɩrɛ lɛ so. A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a daba tɛɛ mɩ ba so a wʊ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ pɔɔ lɛ so.

english_verse: So don't refuse sex to each other, unless you agree not to have sex for a little while, in order to spend time in prayer. Then Satan won't be able to tempt you because of your lack of self-control.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa mɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a gaa jie ɛ, ka ala ba wa ɩ yɩ man taa na yɩ kʊ taa sɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ jũu ɛ. Ka yɩn wa sʊɔr a Nãaŋmɩn baar, a yɩ lɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa go, ka a Satan taa nyɛ yɩn kʊ̃ lɛ wa tʊɔrɔ a yɩ mãɛ nyɔɔrɔ bɛl yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: In my opinion that is what should be done, though I don't know of anything the Lord said about this matter.
translation_verse: N 'yɛr naa ɩka anyã tara na sɔr, a ba ɩ binfʊ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My advice for the unmarried and for widows is that it is acceptable for them to remain single, just as I am.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yɩn bala na ba kul taa ɛ, nɩ a pɔɔkɔɛ, a vɩɛlɛ naa ba taa kulo taa ɛ, na ba jãnɛ nɩtãa lɛ ɩn jãnɛ.

english_verse: But if you don't have enough self-control, then go ahead and get married. After all, it is better to marry than to burn with desire.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bala ba wa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nyɔɔrɔ a ba mãɛ ɛ, ba kul taa. Ala ɩ ba kul taa, a sãn ban jɛ̃ ka a vɔlaa kʊrɔ ba.

english_verse: I instruct married couples to stay together, and this is exactly what the Lord himself taught. A wife who leaves her husband
translation_verse: A bala na kul taa, a nɛbinãa lɛ a nyã, a ba ɩ maa lɛ 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro lɛ 'yɛr. A pɔɔ wʊ taa ɩrɛ wa bara a wʊ sɩrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: should either stay single or go back to her husband. And a husband should not leave his wife.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ 'lɔ wa bar a wʊ sɩrɛ, wʊ taa lɛ kulo daba go ɛ, bɩɩ wʊ lɩɛb tɩ 'maal a wʊ sɩrɛ. Daba mɩ wʊ taa dire a wʊ pɔɔ bara ɛ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything else the Lord said about marriage. All I can do is to give you my own advice. If your wife isn't a follower of the Lord, but is willing to stay with you, don't divorce her.
translation_verse: A anyã 'lɔ, maa lɛ 'yɛrɛ, a ba ɩ a sɩ Soro lɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ a Yesu turo ãsʊɔ pɔɔ ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, tɩ sɔɔ ɩka wʊn jɛ̃n wʊ naa wʊ taa ɩrɛ wa dire wʊ bara ɛ.

english_verse: If your husband or wife isn't a follower of the Lord and decides to divorce you, then you should agree to it. You are no longer bound to that person. After all, God chose you and wants you to live at peace.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, 'lɔ wa chiine wʊ chiine. Fʊn ɩ a Yesu turo, ka daba lɛ, bɩɩ pɔɔ lɛ, ta ŋmaa wʊ sɔr ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl sɩ naa ka sɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar.

english_verse: And besides, how do you know if you will be able to save your husband or wife who isn't a follower? Obeying the Lord at All Times
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a ɩ a fʊ̃ʊ pɔɔ, ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊn tʊ̃ɔ faa a fʊ sɩrɛ ɛ? Bɩɩ a daba, faa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ mɩn tʊ̃ɔ faa a fʊ pɔɔ ɛ?

english_verse: In every church I tell the people to stay as they were when the Lord Jesus chose them and God called them to be his own. Now I say the same thing to you.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ mɔ̃ be a jie 'lɔ a sɩ Soro na bin wʊ, nɩ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl wʊ. A binfʊ nyãna lɛ n bin kʊ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa.

english_verse: Being circumcised or uncircumcised isn't really what matters. The important thing is to obey God's commands.
translation_verse: Yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ ɩn pɔrɔ, ka a yʊɔr ba ŋmaafʊ mɩ ɩ pɔrɔ, Nãaŋmɩn yelbinsɩ fʊn turo lɛ ɩ yelkpɛ̃ɛ.

english_verse: So don't try to change what you were when God chose you.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ wʊn be tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl wʊ.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So don't become slaves of anyone else.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn da yɩn da tuo, yɩ ta ɩ nɩrɛ jaa gbãgbaa ɛ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything the Lord said about people who have never been married. But I will tell you what I think. And you can trust me, because the Lord has treated me with kindness.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a bala na ba kul taa sɛrɛ ɛ, n ba tara yele jaa a sɩ Soro na kʊ ma ɩka n 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ n tara na 'yɛr ɩn na 'yɛr an ɩ a sɩ Soro nɩbaal jũu, n sɔɔ naa ɩka n ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ ka yɩn sɔɔ de.

english_verse: We are now going through hard times, and I think it is best for you to stay as you are.
translation_verse: A dɩna yelwõnsɩ jũu, n tɩɛraa ɩka a ɩn vɩla ka nɩrɛ jaa kpɩɛrɛ wʊ yõ.

english_verse: If you are married, stay married. If you are not married, don't try to get married.
translation_verse: Fʊ kul pɔɔ bɩɩ? Taa ɩrɛ wa dire wʊ bara ɛ. Dakʊɔr lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, pɔɔ kʊɔr lɛ fʊ ɩ? Taa tɩɛrɛ pɔɔ bɩɩ sɩrɛ kulfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: It isn't wrong to marry, even if you have never been married before. But those who marry will have a lot of trouble, and I want to protect you from this.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala wa ɩ fʊ kul pɔɔ, faa maal yelbier ɛ, ka ala ɩ pɔɔsaraa mɩ kul sɩrɛ, waa maal yelbier ɛ. Tɩchɛ a bala na kul taa na kpɛ̃n yelwõnsɩ pɔ ka n kʊ̃ sɔɔl yɩ a yele nyãna ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, what I mean is that the Lord will soon come, and it won't matter if you are married or not.
translation_verse: Yɛɛr, bon ɩn 'yɛrɛ lɛ ɩka, a sɔ̃ɔ ɩn jaa ŋmaa. An yi a dɩna chiine, bala na tara pɔbɔ, ba maala fɩka baa tara pɔbɔ ɛ.

english_verse: It will be all the same if you are crying or laughing, or if you are buying or are completely broke.
translation_verse: Bala na kõnõ, ba maala fɩka baa kõnõ ɛ, bala mɩ pʊɔ na pɛl, ba mɩ maala fɩka ba pʊɔ ba pɛl ɛ. Ka bala mɩ na da bon, ba maala fɩka a ba ɩ bala lɛ so bin ɛ.

english_verse: It won't make any difference how much good you are getting from this world or how much you like it. This world as we know it is now passing away.
translation_verse: Bala mɩ na tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a wɛr nyã bonsɩ, ba ta de ba mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala pɔ ɛ, bojũu a wɛr nɩ a wʊ bonsɩ a jaa poro na chiine.

english_verse: I want all of you to be free from worry. An unmarried man worries about how to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka yɩ ta tara yele jaa tɩɛr ɛ. An ɩ daba baa tara pɔɔ ɛ, a sɩ Soro yele lɛ wʊ ma tɩɛrɛ, lɛ wʊn na ɩ pɛl a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

english_verse: But a married man has more worries. He must worry about the things of this world, because he wants to please his wife.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ daba na tara pɔɔ a wɛr nyã yelsɩ lɛ wʊ ma tɩɛrɛ, lɛ wʊn na ɩ pɛl a pɔɔ pʊɔ.

english_verse: So he is pulled in two directions. Unmarried women and women who have never been married worry only about pleasing the Lord, and they keep their bodies and minds pure. But a married woman worries about the things of this world, because she wants to please her husband.
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ tɩɛr maa gã jibʊ̃'yen ɛ. Ka a pɔɔ mɩ na ba kul sɩrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ pɔɔsarbile ma tɩɛrɛ a sɩ Soro yele. A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka wʊ de a wʊ ãgãn nɩ a wʊ sɩɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro. Tɩchɛ pɔɔ na tara sɩrɛ, a wɛr nyã bonsɩ tɩɛr lɛ wʊ ma tara, lɛ wʊn na pɛl a wʊ sɩrɛ pʊɔ.

english_verse: What I am saying is for your own good—it isn't to limit your freedom. I want to help you to live right and to love the Lord above all else.
translation_verse: Yɩ mãɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jũu lɛ n 'yɛrɛ nɩ a anyãna, a ba ɩ yele lɛ n bine kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ. N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ na tor na yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen kʊ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: But suppose you are engaged to someone old enough to be married, and you want her so much that all you can think about is getting married. Then go ahead and marry. There is nothing wrong with that.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa tɩɛr ɩka waa maal a lɛ na sɛɛ nɩ a pɔɔsarbile wʊn ŋmaan a bara ɛ, ka a pɔɔbile mɩ jɛ̃ kor, ka a sɛɛ ɩka ba kul taa, wʊ ɩ a lɛ wʊn tɩɛr, a ba ɩ bier ɛ. Ba kul taa.

english_verse: It is perfectly all right to marry, but it is better not to get married at all.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na kul a pɔɔsarbile wʊ maal vɩla, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na ba kul ɛ, 'lɔ lɛ maal vɩla gar.

english_verse: A wife should stay married to her husband until he dies. Then she is free to marry again, but only to a man who is a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔɔ wa kul sɩrɛ, 'lɔ nɩ a sɩrɛ ben taa, tɩchɛ a sɩrɛ wa kpi wʊ tara na sɔr ɩka wʊ kul daba 'lɔ jaa wʊn bʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ a danyɩnɛ wʊ ɩ Yesu turo.

english_verse: However, I think I am obeying God's Spirit when I say she would be happier to stay single.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɩn nyɛ lɛ ɩka, ala ɩ waa kul sɩrɛ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ jãnɛ, wʊn ɩn bɔɔsʊ̃n sʊɔ. N tɩɛr ɩka n mɩ tara na a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

english_verse: In your letter you asked me about food offered to idols. All of us know something about this subject. But knowledge makes us proud of ourselves, while love makes us helpful to others.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a bomo ala ban ma lon bɔɔr kʊ a tɩbɛ 'yɛr lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n 'yɛr. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ jaa tara na bɔ̃ɔfʊ, ka a bɔ̃ɔfʊ ma wile wʊ mãɛ, tɩchɛ nʊ̃fʊ ma vɛ̃n ka sɩ baa.

english_verse: In fact, people who think they know so much don't know anything at all.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ na tɩɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔn bon kɔ̃ɔ, waa bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa sɛrɛ ɛ, a lɛ wʊn tɩɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔ naa ɛ.

english_verse: But God has no doubts about who loves him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn, Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa nɩnyɩnɛ.

english_verse: Even though food is offered to idols, we know that none of the idols in this world are alive. After all, there is only one God.
translation_verse: A bomo ala ban lon a tɩbɛ bɔɔr nʊ̃nɔ̃ 'wɔfʊ yele. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a tɩɩ ba ɩ bon jaa a ka a wɛr pɔ ɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn ba lɛ be be go ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Many things in heaven and on earth are called gods and lords, but none of them really are gods or lords.
translation_verse: Ka ba gba bʊɔlɔ ŋmɩnsɩ, ka saaju lɛ, bɩɩ a ka a tẽe lɛ, sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka ŋmɩn yɔɔ ben be, nɩ sorbo yɔɔ.

english_verse: We have only one God, and he is the Father. He created everything, and we live for him. Jesus Christ is our only Lord. Everything was made by him, and by him life was given to us.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn sɛ̃ 'lɔ, Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen, na ɩ a Sãa bʊ̃'yen, 'lɔ sɛ̃ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa yi, 'lɔ jũu lɛ sɩ be be, Soro bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ bonsɩ a jaa tu wa, ka sɩ mɩ be be a wʊ jũu.

english_verse: Not everyone knows these things. In fact, many people have grown up with the belief that idols have life in them. So when they eat meat offered to idols, they are bothered by a weak conscience.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna ɛ. Nɩbɛ bamɩne chɛnɛ na mɩlʊ̃ nɩ a tɩbɛ, bala wa ɔɔrɔ nʊ̃n jaa, ba ma tɩɛr ɩka tɩɩ nʊ̃n lɛ, ka a ba tɩɛr na bal a lɛ jũu, ba ma sɔ̃ɔ naa.

english_verse: But food doesn't bring us any closer to God. We are no worse off if we don't eat, and we are no better off if we do.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bʊ̃diir kʊ̃ vɛ̃ ka sɩ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, sɩn di yele jaa ba ɩrɛ sɩ ɛ. Sɩn mɩ baa di ɛ, yele jaa ba ɩrɛ sɩ mɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't cause problems for someone with a weak conscience, just because you have the right to eat anything.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ ka a lɛ yɩn maala nɩ a yɩ mãɛ sofʊ taa lɩɛb kʊsɩr bãraa kʊ a bala na ba kpɛ̃mɛ a ba sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You know all this, and so it doesn't bother you to eat in the temple of an idol. But suppose a person with a weak conscience sees you and decides to eat food that has been offered to idols.
translation_verse: Ala wa ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na ba kpɛ̃mɛ a wʊ sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, wa nyɛ naa a fʊ̃ʊ na tara a bɔ̃ɔfʊ nyãna a fʊ tɩ dire a tɩɩ yir, a mɩ kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ ãkpɛ̃ɔ ka wʊ tɩ dire a ala ban lon a bɔɔr kʊ a tɩbɛ ɛ?

english_verse: When you sin by hurting a follower with a weak conscience, you sin against Christ.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ wa maal a bier nyã tɔ kʊ a fʊ yɛɛr, fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a ba tɩɛrsɩ baal, Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mãɛ lɛ fʊ maal a bier a lɛ nɛ.

english_verse: So if I hurt one of the Lord's followers by what I eat, I will never eat meat as long as I live.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ bon ɩn na di na vɛ̃n ka a n yɛbɛ lo yelbier pɔ, n kʊ̃ lɛ 'wɔb nʊ̃n jaa ɛ, na n taa wa vɛ̃ ka wʊ lo ɛ.

english_verse: I am free. I am an apostle. I have seen the Lord Jesus and have led you to have faith in him.
translation_verse: N ba so n mãɛ bɩɩ? N ba ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa ãsʊɔ bɩɩ? N mɩ ba nyɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ nɩbir bɩɩ? A ba ɩ yɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃, tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ?

english_verse: Others may think that I am not an apostle, but you are proof that I am an apostle to you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ gba, n ba ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa bamɩne sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩ yɩn sɛ̃ 'lɔ, sɩrɛ jaa n ɩ naa! Bojũu yɩn lɛ ɩ a jãnɛ wiil sɩrɛ jaa ɩka n ɩ naa a nɩtʊ̃nãa a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: that Barnabas and I have the right to our food and drink.
translation_verse: ) A nadai yele lɛ fɛr a Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ?

english_verse: We each have the right to marry one of the Lord's followers and to take her along with us, just as the other apostles and the Lord's brothers and Peter do.
translation_verse: Sɩn tɛɛ lɛ ba tara sɔr ɩka sɩ ma tara a sɩ pɔbɔ 'mataa yʊɔrɔ nɩ nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro yɛɛr nɩ a Sɩfasɩ na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ ɛ?

english_verse: Are we the only ones who have to support ourselves by working at another job?
translation_verse: Bɩɩ maa nɩ Banabasɩ tɛɛ lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ tɩ yɩ kʊ̃ kʊ sɩ bon jaa ɛ?

english_verse: Do soldiers pay their own salaries? Don't people who raise grapes eat some of what they grow? Don't shepherds get milk from their own goats?
translation_verse: Nɩbuor lɛ ba de soja tɩ wʊ lɩɛb yara wʊ mãɛ? An lɛ ma sɛl tɩɛ tɩ ba dire a wʊ wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɛ? Bɩɩ an lɛ ɩ nachĩnɛ tɩ maa pɛ̃ a bɩr di ɛ?

english_verse: I am not saying this on my own authority. The Law of Moses tells us not to muzzle an ox when it is grinding grain. But was God concerned only about an ox?
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “Ta lũ a nadar 'lɔ fʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ vara fʊ a chi nɛɛ pɔɔ ɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: No, he wasn't! He was talking about us. This was written in the Scriptures so that all who plow and all who grind the grain will look forward to sharing in the harvest.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa a ba ɩ sɩn jũu lɛ wʊ 'yɛr a anyãna ɛ? Ɔ̃ɔ, sɩn jũu lɛ ba sɛb a yelsɩ anyãna, bojũu a bala na kʊɔrɔ nɩ a bala na vara tara na tɩɛr ɩka ban nyɛn bon kɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: When we told the message to you, it was like planting spiritual seed. So we have the right to accept material things as our harvest from you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ bʊr a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃bʊrɔ a yɩ sɛ̃, an ɩn tuo ala ɩ yɩ mɩ kʊ sɩ naa a yɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ bɩɩ?

english_verse: If others have the right to do this, we have an even greater right. But we haven't used this right of ours. We are willing to put up with anything to keep from causing trouble for the message about Christ.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ bamɩne tara na sɔr ka yɩ ma sʊ̃ʊ ba, sɩn ba lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ nyɛ gar ba ɛ? Tɩchɛ sɩn ba kpãkpãana nɩ a yele nyãna ɛ. Sɩ ma bar yele jaa ka a po, a sɩ taa pɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna sɔr ɛ.

english_verse: Don't you know that people who work in the temple make their living from what is brought to the temple? Don't you know that a person who serves at the altar is given part of what is offered?
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a be a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir, a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir pɔ lɛ ba dire ɛ? Ka a bala mɩ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔrlorbo mɩ dire a bɔɔrlo bomo ala ɛ?

english_verse: In the same way, the Lord wants everyone who preaches the good news to make a living from preaching this message.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr ɩka a bala na mʊɔlɔ a wʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, ba mɩ dire yire a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: But I have never used these privileges of mine, and I am not writing this because I want to start now. I would rather die than have someone rob me of the right to take pride in this.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa ba dɩɛl a anyãna ɛ, n mɩ ba sɛɛrɛ a anyãna tɩ tara tɩɛr ɩka yɩ maal a lɛ kʊ ma ɛ. Maa kpin kɔ̃ a sa naa nɩrɛ na wa kaa a n yo bɔ yele nyãna pɔrɔ.

english_verse: I don't have any reason to brag about preaching the good news. Preaching is something God told me to do, and if I don't do it, I am doomed.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa wa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã, n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ yuor ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ɩka n mʊɔl. Yele na pɔɔ ma naa ala ɩ n ba wa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɛ.

english_verse: If I preach because I want to, I will be paid. But even if I don't want to, it is still something God has sent me to do.
translation_verse: Maa mʊɔl a 'yɛr nyã pɔrɔ, n tara na sãyar, ala ba ɩ pɔrɔ gba lɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na kaa ir ma 'yɛr lɛ n 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: What pay am I given? It is the chance to preach the good news free of charge and not to use the privileges that are mine because I am a preacher.
translation_verse: Bo lɛ ɩ a n sãyar? Ala lɛ a anyã ɩka, n mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ pɔrɔ kʊ a nɩbɛ, naa taa bʊɔrɔ tɔ̃nɔ̃ yin a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã mʊɔlfʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I am not anyone's slave. But I have become a slave to everyone, so I can win as many people as possible.
translation_verse: N gba na so n mãɛ ka nɩrɛ jaa ba so ɛ, tɩ n maal n mãɛ gbãgbaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa lɛ an na ɩ ka n tʊ̃ɔ nɩyɔɔ tɔɔ wa kʊ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: When I am with the Jews, I live like a Jew to win Jews. They are ruled by the Law of Moses, and I am not. But I live by the Law to win them.
translation_verse: Maa wa ta a Juu nɩbɛ sɛ̃, n ma lɩɛb n mãɛ a Juu nɩrɛ, na tʊ̃ɔ ba nyɛ. A bala na be a nɛbinãa pɔ, n ma lɩɛb a ba kaar, n gba na ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, lɛ ɩn na ɩ tʊ̃ɔ ba tɔɔ wa kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: And when I am with people who are not ruled by the Law, I forget about the Law to win them. Of course, I never really forget about the law of God. In fact, I am ruled by the law of Christ.
translation_verse: A bala mɩ na ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, maa wa ta a ba sɛ̃, n mɩ ma maal fɩka n ba be a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, ka n na tʊ̃ɔ ba tɔɔ wa kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto. N gba na ba so n mãɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɛbinãa pɔ.

english_verse: When I am with people whose faith is weak, I live as they do to win them. I do everything I can to win everyone I possibly can.
translation_verse: Maa wa ta a bala sɔɔfʊ na ba kpɛ̃mɛ ɛ, n ma lɩɛb a ba kaar lɛ ɩn na ɩ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba ãkpãɛn. N ma lɩɛb bon jaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa, ala ɩ n tʊ̃ɔ naa ka n faa a bamɩne.

english_verse: I do all this for the good news, because I want to share in its blessings. A Race and a Fight
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jũu lɛ n maala nɩ a anyãna, naa mɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ a sʊ̃ʊfʊ.

english_verse: You know that many runners enter a race, and only one of them wins the prize. So run to win!
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ka a bala na ma joro dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa a joa pɔ, tɩchɛ nɩbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ ma jo na wʊ nyɛ bon ɛ? Yɩ mɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir joro a lɛ na yɩ nyɛ bon.

english_verse: I don't run without a goal. And I don't box by beating my fists in the air.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so, n ba joro fɩka nɩrɛ na bʊ̃n joro ɛ, ŋmetaa kaar, n ba bʊ̃n lɔɔrɔ a n nuur ɛ.

english_verse: I keep my body under control and make it my slave, so I won't lose out after telling the good news to others.
translation_verse: Kai, n ma ŋmen a n ãgãn na n maal wʊ a wʊ lɩɛb a n gbãgbaa, ka n taa 'yɛr Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ka a nɩyɔɔ wa nyɛ tɔ̃nɔ̃ tɩchɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka maa ba sɛɛ ɛ. N ba bʊɔrɔ a lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This was like being baptized and becoming followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Ba jaa tun a Mosesɩ puor ka a julõjuur geru pɔɔ ba, a ba tɩ kpɛ a man jɩɛ gɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: All of them also ate the same spiritual food
translation_verse: Ba jaa lɛ di a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃dibʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃,

english_verse: and drank the same spiritual drink, which flowed from the spiritual rock that followed them. That rock was Christ.
translation_verse: na ba nyũ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃nyũ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bojũu ba jaa nyũn yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a kʊsɩr pie 'mataa chiine ba, a kʊsɩr pie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: But most of them did not please God. So they died, and their bodies were scattered all over the desert.
translation_verse: A anyã a jaa pɔ, tɩ Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ ba pɛl ba ɛ, na wʊ nyɛ suur kʊn ba, ka a ba kũn yɛ̃yɛl be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: They worshiped idols, just as the Scriptures say, “The people sat down to eat and drink. Then they got up to dance around.” So don't worship idols.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa puoro tɩbɛ nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ puor a tɩɩ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “A nɩbɛ jɛ̃n na ba di na ba nyũ, tɩ pãa ir sɛ bãnɛ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: Some of those people did shameful things, and in a single day about
translation_verse: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ nɛ ka sɩ wa sɛ̃nɛ nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ sɛ̃ kaar ɛ. A ba nɩbɛ turo lɩjaata (

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do whatever we want to!” But I tell you not everything may be good or helpful.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma 'yɛr ɩka, saa chire yele jaa maalfʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a ba ɩ yele a jaa lɛ vɩɛlɛ maalfʊ ɛ. Yele jaa ba chire ɛ, tɩchɛ a ba ɩ yele jaa lɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: died. Don't do shameful things as they did.
translation_verse: ) dɔ̃ɔ lo kpi bɩbir bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: And don't try to test Christ, as some of them did and were later bitten by poisonous snakes.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ nɛ ka sɩ wa bɛɛrɛ a sɩ Soro kaara nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ, a wʊ vɛ̃ ka a waba dʊ̃ ba kʊ ɛ,

english_verse: Don't even grumble, as some of them did and were killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: na yɩ taa vʊ̃ nɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ vʊ̃n wʊ a nɛɛ ka wʊ vɛ̃ ka kũu malaka wa sɔ̃ɔ ba jaa.

english_verse: These things happened to them as a warning to us. All this was written in the Scriptures to teach us who live in these last days.
translation_verse: A yele anyãna pɔɔ ba naa, naa ɩ kpãafʊ gã, ka ba sɛb bin ka a na ɩ kpãafʊ kʊ sɩ. Bojũu a ber baaraa gbʊrɔ sɩ naa.

english_verse: Even if you think you can stand up to temptation, be careful not to fall.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ fʊ tɩɛr ɩka fʊ bɔ̃ɔn ara, bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, na fʊ taa lo ɛ.

english_verse: You are tempted in the same way that everyone else is tempted. But God can be trusted not to let you be tempted too much, and he will show you how to escape from your temptations.
translation_verse: Bɛɛrkaa tuo jaa ba wa a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a ba ɩ a ala mɩn ma wa a nɩrɛ jaa sɛ̃ lɛ ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, wʊ kʊ̃ sɔɔ ka a bɛɛrkaa tuo 'lɔ yɩn kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɛ, wa nyɔɔ yɩ ɛ. Tɩchɛ bɛɛrkaa wa nyɔɔ yɩ, wʊn wiil yɩn a sɔr ka yɩ tu yi, na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ara.

english_verse: My friends, you must keep away from idols.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n taa Yesu turbo, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa puoro tɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I am speaking to you as people who have enough sense to know what I am talking about.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa yɩn ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme ka n 'yɛrɛ a nɩtɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩn mãɛ yɩ pɛkaa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛr.

english_verse: When we drink from the cup we ask God to bless, isn't that sharing in the blood of Christ? When we eat the bread we break, isn't that sharing in the body of Christ?
translation_verse: A ŋmele 'lɔ sɩn ma de puor a Nãaŋmɩn yãan, a Yesu kũu bʊ̃diir sɔ̃ɔ ma vɛ̃n ka sɩ lɔ̃ɔ põ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jãɩ. Ka a paanʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩ mɩn ma ŋma, ma vɛ̃ ka sɩ lɔ̃ɔ põ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn.

english_verse: By sharing in the same loaf of bread, we become one body, even though there are many of us.
translation_verse: Bojũu paanʊ̃ɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ, sɩn sɔɔ waa tɩ sɩ ɩn ãgãn bʊ̃'yen, sɩ jaa lɛ a paanʊ̃ɔ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ma ta.

english_verse: Aren't the people of Israel sharing in the worship when they gather around the altar and eat the sacrifices offered there?
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a Isɩral nɩbɛ pɔ. A ba ɩ a bala na ma di a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔrlo bomo ma pʊɔn a bɔɔr lofʊ jie ɛ?

english_verse: Am I saying that either the idols or the food sacrificed to them is anything at all?
translation_verse: N pãa 'yɛrɛ na ɩka a bomo ban lon bɔɔr kʊ a tɩɩ ɩn bon bɩɩ a tɩɩ ɩn bon?

english_verse: No, I am not! This food is really sacrificed to demons and not to God. I don't want you to have anything to do with demons.
translation_verse: Kai, tɩchɛ a bɔɔrlo bomo ala a tɩbɛ dẽme na ma lon a ba bɔɔr, a sɩdɛbɛ lɛ ba ma lon a bɔɔr kʊ a ba ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ɛ, ala lɛ so n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ 'matãan a sɩdɛbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You cannot drink from the cup of demons and still drink from the Lord's cup. You cannot eat at the table of demons and still eat at the Lord's table.
translation_verse: Yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ Soro nyũn a wʊ ŋmele, tɩ lɛ lɔ̃ɔn a sɩdɛbɛ nyũn a ba ŋmele ɛ. Yɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ Soro a wʊ bʊ̃diir difʊ jie, tɩ lɛ 'mataa lɔ̃ɔn a sɩdɛbɛ bʊ̃diir difʊ jie go ɛ.

english_verse: We would make the Lord jealous if we did this. And we are not stronger than the Lord. Always Honor God
translation_verse: Sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a ɩrɛ a sɩ Soro nyuur bɩɩ? Bɩɩ sɩn lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ gar wʊ?

english_verse: However, when you buy meat in the market, go ahead and eat it. Keep your conscience clear by not asking where the meat came from.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃n jaa ban daara a daa pɔ, fʊ̃ʊ wa da ɔɔrɔ ta sʊʊr ɛ, ka a taa ɩ fʊ tɩɛr ɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “The earth and everything in it belong to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “A sɩ Soro lɛ so a tẽe nɩ bon jaa na be a pɔ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: If an unbeliever invites you to dinner, and you want to go, then go. Eat whatever you are served. Don't cause a problem for someone's conscience by asking where the food came from.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ba ɩ Yesu turo ɛ, wa maal bʊ̃diir bʊɔl fʊ, a fʊ bʊɔrɔ a chenfʊ, fʊ̃ʊ wa chen, bon jaa wʊn wa bin a fʊ niem, dire, ta sʊʊr ɛ, ka a taa ɩ fʊ tɩɛr ɛ.

english_verse: But if you are told it has been sacrificed to idols, don't cause a problem by eating it. I don't mean a problem for yourself, but for the one who told you. Why should my freedom be limited by someone else's conscience?
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛr kʊ fʊ tɩɛr lɛ n 'yɛrɛ, a ba ɩ fʊ̃ʊ tɩɛr ɛ. Bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ nɩbɛ na jɛ̃ kporo ma nɩ a maa mãɛ so fʊ?

english_verse: If I give thanks for what I eat, why should anyone accuse me of doing wrong?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan 'yɔ̃ɔ a bʊ̃diir ala ɩn dire, bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ nɩrɛ na lɛ kporo ma a bon ɩn puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan tɩ dire?

english_verse: When you eat or drink or do anything else, always do it to honor God.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu ka yɩ nyuro na bɩɩ yɩ dire naa, bon jaa yɩn maala, yɩ maala a jaa kʊrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr.

english_verse: Don't cause problems for Jews or Greeks or anyone else who belongs to God's church.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa wa maala ka ãsʊɔ jaa wa bãr lo ɛ, ka Juu nɩrɛ lɛ bɩɩ waa ɩ Juu nɩrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ɛ.

english_verse: You must follow my example, as I follow the example of Christ. Rules for Worship
translation_verse: Yɩ kaara ma na yɩ turo nɩtãa lɛ ɩn mɩ na kaara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto naa turo wʊ.

english_verse: I am proud of you, because you always remember me and obey the teachings I gave you.
translation_verse: N ma kpir yɩn jaa a lɛ yɩn chɛnɛ tara a n tɩɛr na yɩ turo a yele ala a jaa ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wiil yɩ.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that Christ is the head of all men, and a man is the head of a woman. But God is the head of Christ.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, daba jaa ju lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, ka a pɔɔ jaa ju mɩ ɩ a wʊ sɩrɛ, ka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ju mɩ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: This means that any man who prays or prophesies with something on his head brings shame to his head.
translation_verse: Daba jaa wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɩ na wʊ pɔɔ a ju wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a ju vã.

english_verse: But any woman who prays or prophesies without something on her head brings shame to her head. In fact, she may as well shave her head.
translation_verse: Ka pɔɔ jaa mɩ wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɩ mɩ ba pɔɔ a wʊ ju mɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn a ju vã, a kaara fɩka wʊ põn jukpãakpol.

english_verse: A woman should wear something on her head. It is a disgrace for a woman to shave her head or cut her hair. But if she refuses to wear something on her head, let her cut off her hair.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a pɔɔ kʊ̃ pɔɔ a ju ɛ, wʊ ŋma a ju, ala ɩ a mɩ ɩn vã pɔɔ na põ jukpãakpol wʊ ma pɔɔ a ju.

english_verse: Men were created to be like God and to bring honor to God. This means a man should not wear anything on his head. Women were created to bring honor to men.
translation_verse: Daba ba sɛɛ ɩka wʊ pɔɔ a wʊ ju ɛ, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ nyɛtãan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ tɩɩr. Tɩchɛ ka a pɔɔ mɩ ɩ a sɩrɛ tɩɩr.

english_verse: It was the woman who was made from a man, and not the man who was made from a woman.
translation_verse: Bojũu daba baa dɔ̃ɔ yi a pɔɔ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ pɔɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ yɩ a daba pɔ.

english_verse: He wasn't created for her. She was created for him.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ mɛ daba pɔɔ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mɛn pɔɔ daba jũu.

english_verse: And so, because of this, and also because of the angels, a woman ought to wear something on her head, as a sign of her authority.
translation_verse: A nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu nɩ a malakasɩ jũu, a pɔɔ sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tara a tʊ̃ɔfʊ jãnɛ a wʊ ju pɔ.

english_verse: As far as the Lord is concerned, men and women need each other.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, pɔɔ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ, daba mɩ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: It is true that the first woman came from a man, but all other men have been given birth by women. Yet God is the one who created everything.
translation_verse: Bojũu daba pɔ lɛ a pɔɔ yi, ka pɔɔ mɩ ma dɔɔ daba. Tɩchɛ a yele a jaa yin Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: Ask yourselves if it is proper for a woman to pray without something on her head.
translation_verse: Yɩn mãɛ yɩ pɛkaa. A sɛɛn ka pɔɔ na sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tɩ ba pɔɔ a ju bɩɩ?

english_verse: This is how things are done in all of God's churches, and this is why none of you should argue about what I have said. Rules for the Lord's Supper
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa chɩrɛ na a yele anyãna, sɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ba lɛ tara yele jaa go ɛ.

english_verse: Your worship services do you more harm than good. I am certainly not going to praise you for this.
translation_verse: A ala na tu ka ɩn wiil yɩ, tɩ n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ dãn yɩ ɛ, bojũu a yɩ lɔ̃ɔ taa ma maal yɩn dɛɛr gar a vɩla.

english_verse: I am told you can't get along with each other when you worship, and I am sure that some of what I have heard is true.
translation_verse: A yeldɔ̃ɔ nɩ nyã, n wõn ɩka yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔ taa na puor, yɩ ma ooro nɩ taa, ka n sɔɔ de ɩka, a lɛ ben be sɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: You are bound to argue with each other, but it is easy to see which of you have God's approval.
translation_verse: A sɛɛ naa ka tɛɛ taa na be a yɩ pɔ, ka a wiil buor sʊɔ na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: You even start eating before everyone gets to the meeting, and some of you go hungry, while others get drunk.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩn ma wa dire, ãsʊɔ jaa ma bʊ̃n dire na yɩ maa gu taa ɛ. Ka a bamɩne ma wa jɛ̃n kɔ̃, tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne mɩ ma nyũ buu.

english_verse: The Lord meant that when you eat this bread and drink from this cup, you tell about his death until he comes.
translation_verse: Sɔ̃ɔ jaa yɩn ma wa ɔɔrɔ a paanʊ̃ɔ nyãna, na yɩ nyuro nɩ a ŋmele nyãna, yɩ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a sɩ Soro kũu 'yɛr tɩ tãn a wʊ waa daar.

english_verse: If you fail to understand that you are the body of the Lord, you will condemn yourselves by the way you eat and drink.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na ɔɔrɔ na wʊ nyuro tɩ ba bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a sɩ Soro ãgãn lɛ ɛ, wʊ 'wɔb nyũn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: After the meal, Jesus took a cup of wine in his hands and said, “This is my blood, and with it God makes his new agreement with you. Drink this and remember me.”
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ ban wa di baar, wʊ den a ŋmel nyuraa na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “A dãa na be a ŋmele nyãna pɔ lɛ ɩ a n jãɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na de bin a nɛtɩr paalaa, yɩ ma maala a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ yɩn ma wa nyuro na yɩ tɩɛrɛ nɩ ma.”

english_verse: I have already told you what the Lord Jesus did on the night he was betrayed. And it came from the Lord himself. He took some bread in his hands.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wiilfʊ 'lɔ ɩn nyɛ yi a sɩ Soro sɛ̃, lɛ mɩ lɛ ɩn wiil yɩ. A tãsɔɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa ban na gar yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu, wʊ den a paanʊ̃ɔ, tɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: Then after he had given thanks, he broke it and said, “This is my body, which is given for you. Eat this and remember me.”
translation_verse: Wʊn wa puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan baar, wʊ ŋmaan a paanʊ̃ɔ tɩ 'yɛr, “Nyã lɛ ɩ a n ãgãn na wʊ kʊ yɩ, yɩ ma maala a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ tɩɛrɛ nɩ ma.”

english_verse: But if you eat the bread and drink the wine in a way that isn't worthy of the Lord, you sin against his body and blood.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ nyã na ɔɔrɔ a paanʊ̃ɔ nyã, na wʊ nyuro nɩ a ŋmele nyã nɩ ba bãma, wʊ maal yelbier nɩ a sɩ Soro ãgãn nɩ a wʊ jãɩ.

english_verse: This is why you must examine the way you eat and drink.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ma bɛɛr a wʊ mãɛ kaa tɩ pãa 'wɔb a paanʊ̃ɔ nyã, na wʊ nyũn a ŋmele nyã.

english_verse: This is why many of you are sick and weak and why a lot of others have died.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a yɩ yɔɔ bal na yɩ bɩɛrɛ, ka a yɩ yɔɔ jie mɩ kpire.

english_verse: But when the Lord judges and punishes us, he does it to keep us from being condemned with the rest of the world.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro wa tɔɔr a sɩ 'yɛr, toor lɛ wʊ tɔɔ sɩ, na wʊ taa wa lɔ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔn sɩ nɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should wait until everyone gets there before you start eating.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n taa Yesu turbo, yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ɩka yɩ di, yɩ ma gu taa.

english_verse: If you really are hungry, you can eat at home. Then you won't condemn yourselves when you meet together. After I arrive, I will instruct you about the other matters.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ kɔ̃ kʊrɔ na ãsʊɔ, wʊ ma di be a wʊ yir, ka a yɩn wa lɔ̃ɔ taa dire, a ta wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ kʊ yɩ ɛ. Maa wa tʊ̃ɔ tɩ, ɩn man yɩ naa a ala na chɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you asked me about spiritual gifts.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊsɩ yele a sɔɔl yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: I want you to remember that before you became followers of the Lord, you were led in all the wrong ways by idols that cannot even talk.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ daar yɩn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a tɩbɛ dẽme, a tɩbɛ anyãna na ba tara nyɛvʊr ɛ, tɔɔ yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ bɛlfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that if you are led by God's Spirit, you will say that Jesus is Lord, and you will never curse Jesus.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa ba be na wa 'yɛrɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na wʊ 'yɛr ɩka Yesu lɛ wʊ pɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, nɩrɛ jaa mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka, Yesu lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: There are different kinds of spiritual gifts, but they all come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: A kʊfʊsɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a jaa yin a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃.

english_verse: There are different ways to serve the same Lord,
translation_verse: Tʊ̃tʊ̃nsɩ mɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ na kʊrɔ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: and we can each do different things. Yet the same God works in all of us and helps us in everything we do.
translation_verse: Tʊ̃tʊ̃nsɩ tʊ̃fʊ mɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã lɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a jaa a nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: The Spirit has given each of us a special way of serving others.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa a wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de sʊ̃ʊn a wʊ taaba.

english_verse: Some of us can speak with wisdom, while others can speak with knowledge, but these gifts come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyãna lɛ ma kʊ wʊ a yɛ̃ 'yɛr, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ yɛ̃ bɔ̃ɔfʊ, a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ kʊrɔ a jaa.

english_verse: To others the Spirit has given great faith or the power to heal the sick
translation_verse: A Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyã lɛ ma kʊ ãsʊɔ sɔɔfʊ, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, a wʊ sãana nɩ baalsɩ.

english_verse: or the power to work mighty miracles. Some of us are prophets, and some of us recognize when God's Spirit is present. Others can speak different kinds of languages, and still others can tell what these languages mean.
translation_verse: Na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, a wʊ mɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ a wʊ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ jʊ̃mɔ̃ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nɩ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ ɛ, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ a wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔ dãgɩl a 'yɛrsɩ, na wʊ chɛnɛ kʊ ãsʊɔ mɩ ka wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb a 'yɛr dãgɩlsɩ anyãna.

english_verse: But it is the Spirit who does all this and decides which gifts to give to each of us. One Body with Many Parts
translation_verse: A anyãna a jaa ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, a wʊ de kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Some of us are Jews, and others are Gentiles. Some of us are slaves, and others are free. But God's Spirit baptized each of us and made us part of the body of Christ. Now we each drink from that same Spirit.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ jaa son a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔ a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ, ka Juu nɩrɛ lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, faa ɩ Juu nɩrɛ ɛ. Ka gbãgbaa lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, sumɩne lɛ fʊ ɩ, Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyã kʊ sɩ jaa.

english_verse: Our bodies don't have just one part. They have many parts.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a ba ɩ jibʊ̃'yen lɛ a ãgãn tara ɛ, tɩchɛ jiyɔɔ lɛ wʊ tara.

english_verse: Suppose a foot says, “I'm not a hand, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the foot still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ gbɛr wa 'yɛr naa ɩka, n ba ɩ nũu ɛ, a lɛ jũu n ba pʊɔ a ãgãn pɔ ɛ. A lɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ a waa ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Or suppose an ear says, “I'm not an eye, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the ear still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Ka ala ɩ toor mɩ 'yɛr naa, n ba ɩ nɩbir ɛ, a lɛ jũu n ba pʊɔ a ãgãn pɔ ɛ. A lɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ a waa ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If our bodies were only an eye, we couldn't hear a thing. And if they were only an ear, we couldn't smell a thing.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a ãgãn wʊ jaa ɩn nɩbir, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊn taa ma ɩ wõ 'yɛr? Ka ala ɩ a ãgãn wʊ jaa mɩ ɩn toor, ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩ mɩ wa wõ nyũu.

english_verse: But God has put all parts of our body together in the way that he decided is best.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ choo taa a jidẽdẽme anyãna ãsʊɔ jaa a ãgãn pɔ, a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ ba.

english_verse: A body isn't really a body, unless there is more than one part.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a jaa ɩn bʊ̃'yen, nyɩnɛ lɛ a ãgãn mɩn taa be?

english_verse: It takes many parts to make a single body.
translation_verse: Jiyɔɔ lɛ be a ãgãn pɔ, tɩchɛ a wʊ ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: That's why the eyes cannot say they don't need the hands. That's also why the head cannot say it doesn't need the feet.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a nɩbir kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a nũu, n ba bʊɔrɔ fʊ ɛ. A ju mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ gbɛr, n ba bʊɔrɔ fʊ ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, we cannot get along without the parts of the body that seem to be the weakest.
translation_verse: Yɩ kaa, a ãgãn jiir ala na ba kpɛ̃mɛ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir kaara.

english_verse: We take special care to dress up some parts of our bodies. We are modest about our personal parts,
translation_verse: A jiir ala sɩn ma tɩɛr ɩka a ba tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma bɔ̃ɔ kaara. Ka a jiir ala mɩ na ba be yõo yi fʊ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma bɔ̃ɔ chɔɔr.
