english_verse: but we don't have to be modest about other parts. God put our bodies together in such a way that even the parts that seem the least important are valuable.
translation_verse: Ka a ala mɩ na be a yõo yifʊ, sɩ maa chɔɔr a ala ɛ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ de a jiir anyãna 'mataa a ãgãn pɔ, na wʊ de 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ a jiir amɩne na ba dɔ̃ɔ tara ɛ.

english_verse: He did this to make all parts of the body work together smoothly, with each part caring about the others.
translation_verse: Ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ a dẽdẽme ɩfʊ kʊ̃ lɛ be a ãgãn pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a jaa ma sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa.

english_verse: If one part of our body hurts, we hurt all over. If one part of our body is honored, the whole body will be happy.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ wa bɩɛrɛ naa, a ãgãn jiir a jaa mɩ ma bɩɛrɛ naa. Ala ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ wa nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, a ãgãn wʊ jaa mɩ ma chɩlɛ naa.

english_verse: Together you are the body of Christ. Each one of you is part of his body.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩn lɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn, ka yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɩ a jie ãsʊɔ.

english_verse: First, God chose some people to be apostles and prophets and teachers for the church. But he also chose some to work miracles or heal the sick or help others or be leaders or speak different kinds of languages.
translation_verse: A pupuorbiir banyãna pɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn de nie ir a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ, na wʊ lɛ tu ir a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, na wʊ lɛ tu ir a wʊ wiwiilbe, na wʊ lɛ ir a bala mɩn na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, na wʊ ir a bala mɩn na sãana baalsɩ, na wʊ ir bamɩne ka ba sʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩbɛ, na wʊ lɛ ir bamɩne na kaara a tʊ̃mɔ̃, nɩ a bala mɩ na bɔ̃ɔ a kɔkɔɛ dãgɩlfʊ.

english_verse: Not everyone is an apostle. Not everyone is a prophet. Not everyone is a teacher. Not everyone can work miracles.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃ ba jaa lɛ ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ bɩɩ? Bɩɩ ba jaa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ɔ? Ba jaa lɛ ɩ a wiwiilbe ɔ? Ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ bɩɩ?

english_verse: Not everyone can heal the sick. Not everyone can speak different kinds of languages. Not everyone can tell what these languages mean.
translation_verse: Ba jaa lɛ wʊ kʊ a baal sãafʊ bɩɩ? Ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ dãgɩl a ba kɔkɔɛ ɔ? Bɩɩ ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa lɩɛb ɔ?

english_verse: I want you to desire the best gifts. So I will show you a much better way.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir bɔ a kʊfʊsɩ 'lɔ na gar a jaa. Pʊ̃pãanyã, ɩn wiil yɩn a sɔr 'lɔ na gar a jaa.

english_verse: What if I could speak all languages of humans and even of angels? If I did not love others, I would be nothing more than a noisy gong or a clanging cymbal.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n ma tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a nɩbɛ kɔkɔ bʊrsɩ a jaa, naa tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a malakasɩ kɔkɔɛ, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, ɩn kaara naa fɩka kur ban ŋmiere a wʊ pɔɔrɔ gɔ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: What if I could prophesy and understand all mysteries and all knowledge? And what if I had faith that moved mountains? I would be nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n tara naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ kʊfʊ, naa bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɔɔlsɩ a jaa, naa bɔ̃ɔ yɛ̃ jaa bʊrɔ, ka ala ɩ n mɩ tara na sɔɔfʊ naa ma 'yɛr tɔ̃n ka a ir, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, n ɩn bʊ̃pɔrɔ.

english_verse: What if I gave away all that I owned and let myself be burned alive? I would gain nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n den a n bʊ̃tarsɩ a jaa põ nɔ̃n dẽme, naa sɔɔ ɩka ba de a n ãgãn 'yɔ̃ɔ bũu 'lɩraa pɔ, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, n ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: rude. Love isn't selfish or quick tempered. It doesn't keep a record of wrongs that others do.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃fʊ ba tara nɛtuo ɛ, waa bʊɔrɔ wʊ yõ tɛɛ bomo ɛ, wʊ maa nyɛ suur fɔɔ ɛ, waa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩrɛ pʊ̃ɔm ɛ.

english_verse: Love rejoices in the truth, but not in evil.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃fʊ ba nʊ̃ yelbier jie ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma nʊ̃n yelmãɛ jie.

english_verse: Love never fails! Everyone who prophesies will stop, and unknown languages will no longer be spoken. All that we know will be forgotten.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃fʊ maa ɩ faa ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ na wa ŋmaa naa, ka a kɔkɔ dãgɩlsɩ 'yɛrfʊ mɩ wa tɛɛ, ka a bɔ̃ɔfʊ mɩ wa po chen.

english_verse: We don't know everything, and our prophecies are not complete.
translation_verse: Bojũu a bɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊfʊ ɩn ŋmaa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ mɩ ɩ ŋmaa,

english_verse: But what is perfect will someday appear, and what isn't perfect will then disappear.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a bʊ̃mãɛ wa wa, a bʊ̃gãagiel na bɔr naa.

english_verse: When we were children, we thought and reasoned as children do. But when we grew up, we quit our childish ways.
translation_verse: A lɛ daar ɩn ɩ a bibile, bibi'yɛr lɛ n ma 'yɛrɛ, naa tara a bibiyɛ̃ naa ma tɩɛrɛ a bibitɩɛr. Tɩchɛ ɩn wa ɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ baar, n lɔb a bibiyele a jaa bar.

english_verse: Now all we can see of God is like a cloudy picture in a mirror. Later we will see him face to face. We don't know everything, but then we will, just as God completely understands us.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, chãana pɔ lɛ sɩ kaara jaa tũfuru, tɩchɛ sɩn wa tuor taa nɩ gbie. Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ ŋmaa lɛ n bɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ɩn pãa wa bɔ̃ɔ wʊn baar nɩtãa lɛ wʊ mɩn bɔ̃ɔ ma.

english_verse: For now there are faith, hope, and love. But of these three, the greatest is love.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a yelsɩ ata anyãna lɛ ba tɛɛrɛ ɛ, sɔɔfʊ, tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie nɩ nʊ̃fʊ. Tɩchɛ a anyãna a jaa pɔ, nʊ̃fʊ lɛ gar a jaa.

english_verse: Love should be your guide. Be eager to have the gifts that come from the Holy Spirit, especially the gift of prophecy.
translation_verse: Yɩ turo a nʊ̃fʊ sɔr, na yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir bʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊsɩ, na yɩ kaa ir a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ kʊfʊ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ.

english_verse: If you speak languages that others don't know, God will understand what you are saying, though no one else will know what you mean. You will be talking about mysteries that only the Spirit understands.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bɔ̃ɔ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa 'yɛrfʊ nɩrɛ ba lɛ wʊ 'yɛrɛ nɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ wʊ ma 'yɛrɛ nɩ. Yelmãɛ nɩrɛ jaa maa bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ wʊn 'yɛrɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ lɛ wʊ ma de 'yɛrɛ nɩ a yelsɔɔlsɩ.

english_verse: But when you prophesy, you will be understood, and others will be helped. They will be encouraged and made to feel better.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, nɩbɛ lɛ wʊ ma 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ ka ban kpɛ̃mɛ, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ba ãkpãɛn na wʊ 'maala ba.

english_verse: By speaking languages that others don't know, you help only yourself. But by prophesying you help everyone in the church.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ma 'yɛrɛ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa sʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a wʊ mãɛ tɛɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr mɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo a ba baa.

english_verse: I am glad for you to speak unknown languages, although I prefer that you would prophesy. In fact, prophesying does much more good than speaking unknown languages, unless someone can help the church by explaining what you mean.
translation_verse: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka a yɩ jaa yɩ ma tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa nyã, tɩchɛ lɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ yɔɔ lɛ ɩka yɩ jaa yɩ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr. 'Lɔ na 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, gar a 'lɔ na 'yɛrɛ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa, ala ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ ba be be na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb na wʊ wiil a par kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ka a sʊ̃ʊ ba ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, what good would it do, if I came and spoke unknown languages to you and didn't explain what I meant? How would I help you, unless I told you what God had shown me or gave you some knowledge or prophecy or teaching?
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, ala ɩ n ben wa a yɩ sɛ̃, wa dãgɩl a kɔkɔr baa tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ yɩn nyɛ? Ka yelwiilaa kɔ̃ɔ ba lɛ n waan ɛ, bɩɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ kɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, bɩɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, bɩɩ kpãafʊ 'yɛr kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: If all musical instruments sounded alike, how would you know the difference between a flute and a harp?
translation_verse: De man a bʊ̃ŋmiersɩ kõn, ka wele lɛ bɩɩ kõrõjom lɛ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ nɩrɛ na ɩrɛ wa bɔ̃ɔ a sʊkpa nyɩnɛ wʊn ŋmiere bɩɩ pɛɛlɛ ala ɩ a ba tara nɛkpɛ̃ɛ nɩ kɔkɔbile ɛ?

english_verse: If a bugle call isn't clear, how would you know to get ready for battle?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ baa wa pɛɛl wɛraa a jɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ nɩrɛ na ɩrɛ wa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka jɛɛr lo na ba chɔɔr chen?

english_verse: This is how it is when you speak unknown languages. If no one can understand what you are talking about, you will only be talking to the wind.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ yɩn mɩ, a yɩ jãlbir ba wa tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ a 'yɛrbie ala na tor ɛ, an lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ yɩn 'yɛrɛ par? 'Yɛr vor lɛ yɩn 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: When we speak languages that others don't know, we should pray for the power to explain what we mean.
translation_verse: A yele nyãna jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ma tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa nyã wʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn a wʊ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ, a wʊ tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb wiil a lɛ wʊn ma 'yɛr.

english_verse: For example, if I use an unknown language in my prayers, my spirit prays but my mind is useless.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n dãgɩlaa a kɔkɔr sʊɔrɔ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn, a n sɩɛ mɩ sʊɔrɔ naa tɩchɛ a n tɩɛr a wʊ ɩ pɔrɔ.

english_verse: Then what should I do? There are times when I should pray with my spirit, and times when I should pray with my mind. Sometimes I should sing with my spirit, and at other times I should sing with my mind.
translation_verse: N pãa ɩ ŋmɩnɛ? Maa nɩ a n sɩɛ na lɔ̃ɔn sʊɔr a Nãaŋmɩn naa lɛ 'matãan a n tɩɛr mɩ sʊɔr. Maa nɩ a n sɩɛ na 'mataa yiel a Nãaŋmɩn yiel naa mɩ lɛ 'matãan a n tɩɛr yiel.

english_verse: Suppose some strangers are in your worship service, when you are praising God with your spirit. If they don't understand you, how will they know to say, “Amen”?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ yɩ dãna nɩ a yɩ sɩɛ, ka a jɛ̃gumo mɩ wa lɔ̃ɔn yɩ na waa wõnõ a lɛ yɩn 'yɛrɛ ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩrɛ wa 'yɛr ɩka, a ɩ a lɛ, yɩn dãna Nãaŋmɩn, wʊn ba bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ yɩn 'yɛrɛ ɛ?

english_verse: You may be worshiping God in a wonderful way, but no one else will be helped.
translation_verse: A yɩ Nãaŋmɩn dãnfʊ na vɩɛlɛ na jaa kper, tɩchɛ a ba sʊ̃ʊ a yɩ tɔ sʊɔ 'lɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I thank God that I speak unknown languages more than any of you.
translation_verse: N puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan an ɩ n ma tʊ̃ɔn 'yɛr a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa nyã gar yɩ jaa.

english_verse: But words that make sense can help the church. This is why in church I would rather speak five words that make sense than to speak
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ maa wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo pɔ, n ma 'yɛr 'yɛrbie anũu ban na tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par gar ɩn na 'yɛr 'yɛrbie turo pie (

english_verse: words in a language that others don't know.
translation_verse: ) ban kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, stop thinking like children. Think like mature people and be as innocent as tiny babies.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ tɛɛ a bibitɩɛr bar. Ala ɩ yelbier maalfʊ lɛ, yɩ ɩ bipɩlɛ, tɩchɛ ka a yɩ yɛ̃ pɔ 'lɔ nʊ̃ɔ bɩ nɩbɛrɛ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I will use strangers who speak unknown languages to talk to my people. They will speak to them in foreign languages, but still my people won't listen to me.”
translation_verse: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Ɩn den kɔkɔr sãan naa tu a sãanba nɛɛ pɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ banyãna, tɩchɛ ba gba kʊ̃ chɛlɛ a lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Suppose everyone in your worship service started speaking unknown languages, and some outsiders or some unbelievers come in. Won't they think you are crazy?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a pupuorbiir wa lɔ̃ɔn taa ka ba jaa dãgɩl a kɔkɔɛ, na ba 'yɛrɛ, ka a jɛ̃gumo ãsʊɔ be a yɩ pɔ bɩɩ nɩbɛ na ba ɩ a Yesu turbo ɛ, wa kpɛ nyɛ a lɛ yɩn 'yɛrɛ, ba kʊ̃ 'yɛr ɩka yɩ gele naa ɛ?

english_verse: But suppose all of you are prophesying when those unbelievers and outsiders come in. They will realize that they are sinners, and they will want to change their ways because of what you are saying.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, bɩɩ nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ mɩ na ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, 'lɔ wa kpɛ nyɛ ka a ɩ yɩ jaa 'yɛrɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr a wʊ wõ naa bɔ̃ɔn wʊn ɩ yelbe-ɩrɛ, a ala wʊn wõ na tɔɔr a wʊ 'yɛr ka wʊ lɩɛb a wʊ tɩɛr.

english_verse: They will tell what is hidden in their hearts. Then they will kneel down and say to God, “We are certain that you are with these people.” Worship Must Be Orderly
translation_verse: Wʊn chiir a wʊ pʊɔ a ba niem tɩ lo kpa tẽe puor Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ 'yɛr ɩka yelmãɛ jaa Nãaŋmɩn ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: My friends, when you meet to worship, you must do everything for the good of everyone there. That's how it should be when someone sings or teaches or tells what God has said or speaks an unknown language or explains what the language means.
translation_verse: N pãa lɛ 'yɛr bo, n yɛɛr? Yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔ taa, ãsʊɔ jaa ma tara naa yiel na yiel, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ tara kpãafʊ 'yɛrbir na 'yɛr, ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ tara yelwiilaa na yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ na wʊn 'yɛr, ka a ãsʊɔ tara a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa na 'yɛr ka ãsʊɔ mɩ tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb wiil a par. Yɩ maala a anyãna a jaa ka a sʊ̃ʊ yɩ a yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: No more than two or three of you should speak unknown languages during the meeting. You must take turns, and someone should always be there to explain what you mean.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ na wa 'yɛrɛ naa a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa, ba ɩ ayi bɩɩ ata, ba ta gar ata ɛ, na ba 'yɛrɛ tɩ chɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa. Ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ mɩ be be ma tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb wiil a par.

english_verse: If no one can explain, you must keep silent in church and speak only to yourself and to God.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ ba be be na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb na wʊ wiil a par ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊ ɩ jaa gbul a puorfʊ jie, tɩ bʊlɔ kʊrɔ wʊ mãɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Two or three persons may prophesy, and everyone else must listen carefully.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ba ɩ ayi bɩɩ ata na ba 'yɛrɛ, tɩchɛ ka a bala na chɛ jʊrɔ kaara a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: If someone sitting there receives a message from God, the speaker must stop and let the other person speak.
translation_verse: Ka ala wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn ir yele wiil a bala na jãnɛ, a 'lɔ na de nie 'yɛrɛ wʊ mɩ pɔɔ a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: Let only one person speak at a time, then all of you will learn something and be encouraged.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'yɛrɛ tɩ chɛrɛ kʊrɔ taa an kpãa yɩ naa tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpãɛn.

english_verse: A prophet should be willing to stop and let someone else speak.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr wʊ nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: God wants everything to be done peacefully and in order. When God's people meet in church,
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba ɩ nyɔ̃ nyɔ̃ɔfʊ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, a wʊ bʊɔl sɩ a sɩn kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar nɩtãa lɛ an kaara a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa jie.

english_verse: the women must not be allowed to speak. They must keep quiet and listen, as the Law of Moses teaches.
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ ba ma ɩ jaa gbulo a puorfʊ jie, baa tara sɔr na haa nɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ba siir ba mãɛ nɩtãa lɛ a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa na 'yɛr.

english_verse: If there is something they want to know, they can ask their husbands when they get home. It is disgraceful for women to speak in church.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba sʊʊr yele kɔ̃ɔ kaa, ba kul a yir tɩ sʊʊr a ba mãɛ sɩrbɛ kaa. Bojũu a ɩn vã pɔɔ na 'yɛr 'yɛr a puorfʊ jie.

english_verse: God's message did not start with you people, and you are not the only ones it has reached.
translation_verse: Yɩn sɛ̃ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr de nie yi bɩɩ? Bɩɩ yɩn tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a nɩbɛ a 'yɛr na de nie ta?

english_verse: If you think of yourself as a prophet or a spiritual person, you will know I am writing only what the Lord has commanded.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ tɩɛr ɩka wʊ ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrɛ bɩɩ tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊsɩ, vɛ̃ ka a nɩnyɩnɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a anyãna ɩn sɛb ɩ naa lɛ a sɩ Soro na bin.

english_verse: So don't pay attention to anyone who ignores what I am writing.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ba wa sɔɔ anyãna ɛ, yɩ mɩ ta sɔɔ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, be eager to prophesy and don't stop anyone from speaking languages that others don't know.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr, yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ, tɩ na yɩ taa tɔrɔ a 'yɛr dãgɩlaa 'yɛrfʊ bara ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to remember the message I preached and that you believed and trusted.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n lɛ jɛɔ yɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ mʊɔl kʊ yɩ a yɩ sɔɔ de na yɩ be ara a pɔ.

english_verse: I told you the most important part of the message exactly as it was told to me. This part is: Christ died for our sins, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Bojũu a 'yɛr ɩn dɔ̃ɔ nyɛ lɛ n mɩ de nie man kʊ yɩ ɩka, a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto kpin a sɩ yelbier jũu, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr,

english_verse: He was buried, and three days later he was raised to life, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: ka ba ũu wʊ, a wʊ lɛ ir a kũu pɔ, a ber ata daar nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr.

english_verse: After this, he appeared to more than five hundred other followers. Most of them are still alive, but some have died.
translation_verse: ) Wʊn ben 'yɛr ɩka, a yele a jaa, a Nãaŋmɩn na de a yele a jaa bin a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbɛɛ pĩlem ba pʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: He also appeared to James, then to all of the apostles.
translation_verse: ) A Adama bɩɛraa sʊɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩɛ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all the apostles. In fact, I caused so much trouble for God's church that I don't even deserve to be called an apostle.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa lɛ ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ ba jaa pɔ bʊ̃bile naa ba sɛɛn ɩka ba gba bʊɔl ma a nɩtʊ̃nãa ɛ, bojũu n gen a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo.

english_verse: But God treated me with undeserved grace! He made me what I am, and his grace wasn't wasted. I worked much harder than any of the other apostles, although it was really God's grace at work and not me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊn wãɛ ma lɛ so ka n ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa a dɩna. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ ba ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ. Yelmãɛ jaa n tʊ̃n gar a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ ba jaa, tɩ a ba ɩ maa mãɛ lɛ tʊ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ 'lɔ wʊn de wãɛn ma lɛ.

english_verse: But it doesn't matter if I preached or if they preached. All of you believed the message just the same. God's People Will Be Raised to Life
translation_verse: Ka maa lɛ bɩɩ bala lɛ, a 'yɛr lɛ anyã sɩn mʊɔl, ka anyãna lɛ yɩ mɩ sɔɔ de.

english_verse: If we preach that Christ was raised from death, how can some of you say the dead will not be raised to life?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ yɩ wõn a mʊɔl ɩka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ir naa a kũu pɔ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a yɩ bamɩne 'yɛrɛ ɩka kũu pɔ irfʊ ba be be ɛ?

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: A sɩ pãa ŋmara jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn, bojũu sɩ din dãasɩɛ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn sãɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ. Tɩchɛ waa sãɩ wʊ ɛ, ala ɩ yelmãɛ jaa kũusɩ ba ire ɛ.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a kũu pɔ irfʊ ba be be ɛ, ka lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ gba ba ir a kũu pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Ka ala ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ba ir a kũu pɔ ɛ, a yɩ sɔɔfʊ ɩn pɔrɔ, na yɩ chɛnɛ be a yɩ yelbebe pɔ.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Ka a bala mɩ na pãa sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩ kpi, mɩ wɛ.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a dɩna tɛɛ tɩɛr lɛ sɩ tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, nɩbaal nɩbɛ lɛ sɩ ɩ, na sɩ gar a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: But Christ has been raised to life! And he makes us certain that others will also be raised to life.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn sãɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ yelmãɛ jaa, ɩ a bir dɔ̃ɔ, ka a wiil ɩka a bala na kpi mɩ na ir a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Bojũu kũu tun nɩbʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔ wa, ka a kũu pɔ irfʊ mɩ tu a nɩbʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔ mɩ wa.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ wʊ irfʊ daar lɛ, Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a bir dɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ pãa wa lɩɛb waara, ka bala jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ mɩ ir.

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: Ka a baaraa pãa wa, a wʊ de a yele a jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nũu pɔ, an ɩ wʊ tʊ̃ɔn a tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme ba jaa.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: A dɔ̃ baaraa wʊn na sɔ̃ɔ lɛ ɩ a kũu.

english_verse: When the Scriptures say he will put everything under his power, they don't include God. It was God who put everything under the power of Christ.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Nãaŋmɩn den a yele a jaa bin a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbɛɛ pĩlem.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn wa ɩ a nɩtɔ̃ baar, a 'lɔ na de a yele a jaa bin a wʊ gbɛɛ pĩlem, a Bie mãɛ mɩ na siir wʊ mãɛ kʊ wʊ, ka Nãaŋmɩn pãa so a jaa.

english_verse: If the dead are not going to be raised to life, what will people do who are being baptized for them? Why are they being baptized for those dead people?
translation_verse: Nɩyɔɔ ba sɔɔ ɩka a bala na kpi na lɛ ir tara nyɛvʊr go ɛ, tɩchɛ bamɩne sɔɔ naa na ba ma so Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ kʊ ba.

english_verse: And why do we always risk our lives
translation_verse: Ka a sɩn mɩ, bãa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a dɔɔyɛ ma pɔɔ sɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa?

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: Yɛɛr, bɩbir jaa lɛ n ma tuoro kũu, jɩɩrfʊ kpɛ ma naa a yɩ jũu. A nyɛvʊr sɩn tara a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ vɛ̃ ka n 'yɛrɛ a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: What do you think I gained by fighting wild animals in Ephesus? If the dead are not raised to life, “Let's eat and drink. Tomorrow we die.”
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n jɛb naa a mɔdʊ̃ bier a ka Efesus nɩsaal jũu, bo tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n nyɛ? Ala ɩ a kũu kʊ̃ lɛ ir ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a nɩbɛ na ma 'yɛrɛ. “Yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩ di ti nyũ, bojũu bio sɩn kpi naa.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Yɩ lɩɛb de a yɩ yɛ̃, na yɩ tɛɛ bier ɩfʊ bar, bojũu a yɩ bamɩne ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, ka n 'yɛr a nɩtɔ̃ ka vã kpɛ ba.

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na sʊʊr naa, “Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a kũu na ɩrɛ wa ir? Ɩ̃gãn buor lɛ ban lɛ iru?”

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Nyɛ dãbol ka. A ala yɩn ma bʊr a ba ɩ a ma bulaa tɩ a bʊ̃koraa pʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Wheat seeds and all other seeds look different from the sprouts that come up.
translation_verse: Yɩn wa bʊr, a ba ɩ a vaar lɛ yɩ bʊr ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃bir tɛɛ lɛ yɩ ma bʊr. Ka chi lɛ bɩɩ bon bir lɛ.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ma kʊ a ãsʊɔ jaa ãgãn 'lɔ jaa wʊn bʊɔrɔ. Bʊ̃bir ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ wʊ vaar lɛ.

english_verse: People, animals, birds, and fish are each made of flesh, but none of them are alike.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃gãn nʊ̃nɔ̃ a jaa baa ɩ bʊ̃'yen ɛ. Nɩrɛ ãgãn nʊ̃n tɛɛ naa nɩ dʊ̃n ãgãn nʊ̃n, ka a lubil nʊ̃n be wʊ yõ, ka a jãmɛ nʊ̃n mɩ be a yõ.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Saaju ãgãma mɩ ben be, ka a tẽe ãgãma mɩ be be. A saaju ãgãma vɩɛl ben a yõ, ka a tẽe ãgãma vɩɛl mɩ be a yõ.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: A mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ vɩla ben wʊ yõ, ka a ŋmɛraa vɩla mɩ be wʊ yõ, ka a ŋmɛrbir ãsʊɔ vɩla mɩ tɛɛ a ŋmɛrbir ãsʊɔ.

english_verse: That's how it will be when our bodies are raised to life. These bodies will die, but the bodies that are raised will live forever.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ an be a kũn wa ir a kũu pɔ. A ãgãn 'lɔ ban ũu ɩn bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ 'lɔ wa ir a kũu pɔ, waa lɛ pʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ go ɛ.

english_verse: As surely as there are physical bodies, there are spiritual bodies. And our physical bodies will be changed into spiritual bodies.
translation_verse: A tẽe ãgãn nyã lɛ ba ũun wʊ, 'lɔ wa ir a kũu pɔ, a sɩɛ ãgãn lɛ wʊn tara. Nɩtãa lɛ a tẽe ãgãn na be be, lɛ mɩ lɛ a sɩɛ ãgãn mɩ be be.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Adama a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ de nie mɛ ɩn bʊ̃nɩbir.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: A sɩɛ sʊɔ ba lɛ de nie ɛ, tɩchɛ a ãgãn sʊɔ lɛ, ala puor ka a sɩɛ sʊɔ pãa wa.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: A nɩdɔ̃ɔ yin ka a tẽe pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn na mɛn a tã-uul, tɩchɛ a nɩbɩɛraa 'lɔ yin saaju.

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Bala na yi ka a tẽe pɔ, kaara na fɩka, a 'lɔ ban mɛn a tã-uul, ka bala mɩ na yi a saaju mɩ kaara na, fɩka a 'lɔ na yi a saaju.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju sɩn ben nyɛtãan a nɩrɛ nyã a Nãaŋmɩn na mɛn a tã-uul, lɛ mɩ lɛ sɩn su a ãgãn 'lɔ nyɛtãan a 'lɔ na yi a saaju kaar.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n 'yɛr chã kʊ yɩ ɩka, a ãgãn nɩ a jãɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ be a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ. Bɩɩ ka a bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔ naa pʊɔ a 'lɔ na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I will explain a mystery to you. Not every one of us will die, but we will all be changed.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛlɛ ka n 'yɛr 'yɛr sɔɔlaa kɔ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ. Sɩ jaa baa na kpi ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ jaa lɛ na lɩɛb,

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: fɩka a nɩbir na ma wa va a pere kaar, ka a iil baaraa wa pɛɛl. Bojũu a iil wa pɛɛl a bala na kpi na ir naa, ba kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ, ka a sɩn bala na ba kpi sɛrɛ ɛ, mɩ lɩɛb.

english_verse: Our dead and decaying bodies will be changed into bodies that won't die or decay.
translation_verse: Ka a ãgãma anyã na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, ka a lɩɛb de a ãgãma ala na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ su, ka a 'lɔ na kpire kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: A bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔ naa wa de a 'lɔ na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, su, ka a 'lɔ na kpire kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ, ka a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãma pɔ ɩ yelmãɛ, “Kũu a fʊ tʊ̃ɔfʊ baar naa.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: A kũu fɩlɩlɩlɩ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na ma kʊ ɩn a yelbier maalfʊ, ka a yelbier maalfʊ mɩ nyɛ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ yi a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa pɔ.

english_verse: But thank God for letting our Lord Jesus Christ give us the victory!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn son puor fʊ, wʊn kʊ sɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ tu a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na maal.

english_verse: My dear friends, stand firm and don't be shaken. Always keep busy working for the Lord. You know that everything you do for him is worthwhile.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr, yɩ ara chãchã, yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a bon jaa wa dam yɩ ɛ. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a ala yɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a sɩ Soro, kʊ̃ wa ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: When you collect money for God's people, I want you to do exactly what I told the churches in Galatia to do.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n 'yɛr a chɩɛrfʊ yɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ chɩɛr sʊ̃ʊn a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. Yɩ mɩ maal a lɛ ɩn man kʊ a Galatiya paal pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ɩka ba maal.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: A Pɛ̃nfʊ divɩɛ bio daar jaa, a bɩbir 'lɔ na de nie ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma ir a libie jã a lɛ wʊn ma nyɛ na yɩ bine, ka maa wa tɩ a ta lɛ ɩ chɩɛrfʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: Maa wa tɔ̃ɔ ta n de a gãma kʊ a nɩbɛ bala yɩn mãɛ na ir naa tʊ̃n nɩ a libie ala yɩn chɩɛr ka ba chiin a Jerusalɛm.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Ka ala wa ɩ fɩka a maa mãɛ sɛɛn mɩ na chen go, ba kʊ̃ bɩɛl ma.

english_verse: After I have gone through Macedonia, I hope to see you
translation_verse: Maa wa chen tɩ yi a Masedonɩya baar, ɩn wan a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu be lɛ ɩn tu.

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: Amɩne sɛ̃ ɩn jɛ̃n a yɩ sɛ̃ kor bãlãa, bɩɩ ka n jãnɛ a be ka a uon wa baar, ka yɩ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n chiine a n chenfʊ jie.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: N ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n tɔ̃ɔ tɩ nyɛ yɩ a lɛ nɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã tɩ po ɛ, n tɩɛr naa ɩka n jɛ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃ kor ala ɩ a sɩ Soro sɔɔ naa.

english_verse: I will stay in Ephesus until Pentecost,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ɩn jɛ̃n a Efesus tẽe pɔ tɩ tãn a Pentikosɩ bɩbir.

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɔr yuon kʊ ma ka ɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃, tɩchɛ ka a nɩyɔɔ mɩ kpɛrɛ ma.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a Timoti wa tɩ naa, yɩ kaa ka yele jaa taa kʊrɔ wʊ dãbãɛ ɛ, bojũu a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a n kaar.

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a ãsʊɔ jaa wa kaa wʊ pɔrɔ ɛ. Yɩ bar wʊ sɔr nɩ nyã'maar ka wʊ lɛ lɩɛb wa a n sɛ̃. Maa nɩ a yɛɛr jaa chɛlɛ wʊ naa.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: A sɩ yɛbɛ Apolosɩ, n sʊɔr wʊn gbɛɛ a ŋmɩnɛ jaa ɩka wʊ tɩ a yɩ sɛ̃ 'matãan a yɛɛr bamɩne. Tɩchɛ waa sɔɔ a be tɩfʊ a pʊ̃pãanyã sɛrɛ ɛ, 'lɔ wa nyɛ sɔr wʊn tɩ naa.

english_verse: Keep alert. Be firm in your faith. Stay brave and strong.
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ ara chãchã a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na yɩ ɩ nɩbɛ na tara nyãa na yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ.

english_verse: Show love in everything you do.
translation_verse: Na yɩ ma maala yele jaa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ.

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a Sɩtɛfanas nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme, bala lɛ dɔ̃ɔn a puorfʊ be a Akaya paal pɔ, na ba mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa yɛɛr ɩka,

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a nɩbɛ banyãna taaba nɩ nɩrɛ jaa na pʊɔ ba bala, a ba kaar.

english_verse: I was glad to see Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus. Having them here was like having you.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa ɩn wa nyɛ a Sɩtɛfanas nɩ Fortunatus nɩ a Akaikus na wa ta a n sɛ̃, bojũu bala lɛ sʊ̃ʊ ma yɩn ba be ka ɛ.

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Bojũu bala lɛ 'maa ma ãgãn nɩtãa lɛ ban mɩn 'maa a yɩ ãgãn, a nɩbɛ banyãna sɛɛn pɛɛfʊ.

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: A pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa na be a Asɩya paal pɔ puor yɩ naa. Akuila nɩ a Pɩrɩsɩla mɩ den a sɩ Soro yuor puor yɩ, nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ma lɔ̃ɔ a ba yir, mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: A yɛɛr ba jaa na be a ka mɩ puor yɩ naa. Yɩ mɩ puor puor taa nɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl mãɛ nũu lɛ n sɛb a puorfʊ nyãna.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa baa nʊ̃ a sɩ Soro ɛ, pɔ'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ben a wʊ sɛ̃. Pa sɩ Soro, wa.

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa Nãaŋmɩn na chɛl ir nɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ Timoti, lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir na be a Korɩntɩ tẽe pɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa mɩ na be a Akaya paal pɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Pɛɛfʊ wʊ ta Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa, a Sãa nyã nɩbir na bal nɩ Nãaŋmɩn nyã na tara a 'maalfʊsɩ a jaa.

english_verse: He comforts us when we are in trouble, so that we can share this same comfort with others in trouble.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ ma 'maal sɩ a sɩ wõm a jaa pɔ, ka sɩ mɩ na tʊ̃ɔ 'maal a bala mɩ na be wõm jaa pɔ, nɩ a 'maalfʊ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ sɩn nyɛ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: We share in the terrible sufferings of Christ, but also in the wonderful comfort he gives.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto dɔɔyɛ difʊ na yaar dɔɔl sɩ jaa, lɛ mɩ lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'maalfʊ yaar dɔɔl sɩ jaa.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ ben wõm pɔ, a yɩ 'maalfʊ nɩ a yɩ faafʊ jũu lɛ, ala ɩ sɩ mɩ nyɛn 'maalfʊ a mɩ ɩn a yɩ 'maalfʊ lɛ, a yɩn tʊ̃ɔ ara nɩ kãnyir a dɔɔyɛ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ sɩn mɩ na dire.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Sɩ bar tɩɛr a yɩ jũu, bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a lɛ yɩn lɔ̃ɔn sɩ dire a dɔɔyɛ, a lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ yɩn pʊɔ sɩ a sɩ 'maalfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ sɔɔl yɩ a wõm 'lɔ tɔ sʊɔ na dɔ̃ɔ pɔɔ sɩ be a Asɩya paal pɔ bar ɛ. Wõm jaa jel lɛ dɔ̃ɔ pɔɔ sɩ naa gar a sɩ kpɛ̃ɔ, saa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ tara baarfʊ tɩɛr ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa a sɩ tɩɛr pɔ, a kũu lɛ sɩ tɔ̃ɔ kaara a tãɩɩ a lɛ nɛ. Tɩchɛ a nɩtɔ̃ ɩ naa ka sɩ ta dɩɛl a sɩ mãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ dɩɛl Nãaŋmɩn nyã na sãnɛ a kũn.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn lɛ faa sɩ yin a kũu tuo nyã pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ chɛnɛ faara sɩ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie ɩka wʊn chɛnɛ na faara sɩ,

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: nɩtãa lɛ yɩn sʊ̃ʊ sɩ nɩ a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ. Yɔɔ mɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan a sɩ jũu tu a wʊ maal vɩla 'lɔ wʊn maal sɩ na wʊ sɔɔ a yɩ yɔɔ sʊɔrfʊ.

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a sɩ nyãa chɛfʊ jie lɛ a nyã. A sɩ tɩɛr din dãasɩɛ a lɛ sɩn be a wɛr dẽme sɛ̃, nɩ a lɛ a sɩn nɩ a yɩn mɩ na be taa, chɛchɛ ɩfʊ pɔ, nɩ nɛ nɛ tufʊ pɔ, ka a jaa yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. A ba ɩ a wɛr nyã bɔ̃ɔfʊ lɛ sɩ maal a lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ lɛ.

english_verse: I am not writing anything you cannot read and understand. I hope you will understand it completely,
translation_verse: Bojũu saa sɛb bon jaa kʊ yɩ yɩn kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kar ɛ, bɩɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ. N tɩɛr ɩka,

english_verse: just as you already partly understand us. Then when our Lord Jesus returns, you can be as proud of us as we are of you.
translation_verse: nɩtãa lɛ yɩn wõ a sɩ 'yɛr ŋmaa na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par, yɩn wa wõn a jaa na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par, na yɩn tʊ̃ɔ chɛ nyãa a sɩ jũu nɩtãa lɛ sɩn mɩ na chɛ nyãa a yɩ jũu a sɩ Soro Yesu bɩbir daar.

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: Bojũu ala lɛ so ka n bar tɩɛr, naa guor ɩka n tɩ piir yɩ kaa ka yɩ nyɛ tɔ̃nɔ̃ gbɛɛ ayi.

english_verse: once on my way to Macedonia and again on my return from there. Then you could send me on to Judea.
translation_verse: N guor ɩka maa wa chiine a Masedonɩya n yi a yɩ sɛ̃, maa wa lɩɛb waara ka n lɛ yi a yɩ sɛ̃ go, ka yɩ pãa sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n chen a Judiya.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: Ɩn guor a anyã, n mɩ 'yɛr bar bɩɩ? Bɩɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ guorfʊ kaar lɛ? Ka a nɛbʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ma 'yɛr, ɔ̃ɔ, ɔ̃ɔ nɩ kai, kai?

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩrɛ jaa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a yelmãɛ sʊɔ, a sɩ 'yɛr sɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ba ɩ ɔ̃ɔ nɩ kai ɛ.

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr a maa nɩ a Silasɩ nɩ a Timoti na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ba ɩ ɔ̃ɔ nɩ kai ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ pɔ, a ma ɩn ɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn nɛtɩryɔɔ ala wʊn tɩr ɩn ɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ. A tun a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a ma 'yɛrɛ ɩka, a ɩ a lɛ, kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a Nãaŋmɩn nyã lɛ maal sɩ nɩ a yɩn a sɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, na wʊ oo sɩ.

english_verse: and put his Spirit in our hearts to show that we belong only to him.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ naa a wʊ sofʊ jãnɛ, na wʊ de a wʊ Sɩɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nyãa pɔ, wile sɩ a yele ala na waara.

english_verse: God is my witness that I stayed away from Corinth, just to keep from being hard on you.
translation_verse: N bʊɔl Nãaŋmɩn a wʊ ɩ a n dãasɩɛ sʊɔ ɩka a tara na sɔr ka n bar yɩ, naa ba lɩɛb wa be a Korɩntɩ ɛ,

english_verse: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
translation_verse: n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a ɩ wõm kʊ yɩ ɛ. A ba ɩ sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka sɩ fɩr yɩ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ 'mataa tʊ̃n yɩ a yɩ wõ nʊ̃ɔ, bojũu a yɩ sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃n ka yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: N tɩɛr ɩka n kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ wa piir yɩ kaa, ka a ɩ tuo kʊ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Bojũu maa sɔ̃ɔ a yɩ pʊɔ an lɛ na maal ka n pʊɔ pɛl, ka a yɩn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka n dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a lɛ ɩka maa wa tɩ, n pʊɔ taa sɔ̃ɔn a bala na maal ma ka nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma ɛ. N bar tɩɛr ɩka yɩ jaa na lɔ̃ɔn man chɩlɛ.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Bojũu n sɛb a anyã kʊ yɩ nɩ pʊsɔ̃ɔ nɩ hʊ̃ʊnfʊ nɩ a n nyãa nɩ nɩbikʊ̃ɔ yɔɔ ɩka n taa sɔ̃ɔ a yɩ pʊɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n vɛ̃ ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka n nʊ̃ yɩn yɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ maal ka a chɛ, a ba ɩ maa tɛɛ pʊɔ lɛ wʊ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, yɩ jaa pʊɔ mɩ sɔ̃ɔ naa ka a lɛ na tu lɛ ɩka n taa vɛ̃ ka a ɩ tuo 'yɔ̃ɔ jaa kʊ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: A toor tɔɔfʊ 'lɔ wʊn nyɛ yi a yɩ yɔɔ jaa jie sɛɛ wʊ naa.

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, a sɛɛ naa ɩka yɩ vɛ̃ kʊ wʊ, na yɩ lɛ 'maal wʊ ka a wʊ pʊsɔ̃ɔ taa chen niem ɛ.

english_verse: You should make them sure of your love for them.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ de wʊ na yɩ wiil a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu ɩn sɛb kʊ yɩ lɛ ɩka n kaa, yɩn sɔɔn tu a nɛɛ a yele a jaa pɔ bɩɩ.

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ wa vɛ̃n kʊ nɩrɛ, n mɩ vɛ̃n kʊ a nɩnyɩnɛ. A ala ɩn vɛ̃ kʊ a nɩnyɩnɛ, ala ɩ amɩne chɛn ka n na vɛ̃ bar, n vɛ̃n kʊ a nɩnyɩnɛ, a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto niem a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: Lɛ an na ɩ ka a Satan taa ŋmɩɩn sɩ 'mataa ɛ, bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn a wʊ guorfʊsɩ.

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a lɛ ɩn chen a Toroyas tɩ mʊɔlɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, n nyɛn lɛ a sɩ Soro na yuo sɔr kʊ ma,

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: n ba chɛnɛ tara ãgãn 'maar sɛrɛ ɛ, bojũu n ba nyɛ a n yɛbɛ Titusɩ a be ɛ. Lɛ lɛ n puor ba tɩ po chen a Masedonɩya.

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn son puorfʊ wʊn ma tɔɔ sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔfʊ pɔ yi a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, tu a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a yɛ̃ nyũunʊ̃ɔ yaar de a jie wʊ jaa.

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: Sɩn ba kaara bamɩne kaar ɛ, saa maal a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔ̃nɔ̃ bon ɛ. A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, sɩ 'yɛrɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ an ɩ 'lɔ lɛ tʊ̃ sɩ.

english_verse: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
translation_verse: Sɩ piel naa ɩka sɩ dãn sɩ mãɛ go bɩɩ? Bɩɩ sɩ bʊɔrɔ na gãma nɩbɛ na sɛb ka a dãna sɩ yi a sɩ sɛ̃ bɩɩ yi a yɩ sɛ̃?

english_verse: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
translation_verse: Yɩn mãɛ lɛ ɩ a sɩ gãn, na sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nyãa pɔ ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ yaa, ka nɩrɛ jaa mɩ kara.

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ wiil ɩka yɩn lɛ ɩ a gãn na yi a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, na yɩ ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ tɔ̃nɔ̃, a ba ɩ ba den a tãɩ sɔɔlaa sɛb ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ lɛ sɛb. A ba ɩ a kʊsɩr pɛ̃rsɩ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩsaal nyãn pɔ.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: A tɩɛr nyãna sɩn bar ɩn a sɩ bon tu a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, a Nãaŋmɩn niem.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ fɩka sɩ ɩn yɛ̃ dẽme na sɩn tʊ̃ɔ tɔɔr a lɛ sɩn maal 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ yɛ̃ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ sʊ̃ʊ sɩ a sɩ mʊɔl a nɛtɩr paalaa nyã 'yɛr, a ba yi a ala ban dɔ̃ɔ sɛb jie ɛ, tɩchɛ a yin a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃. A sɛbie ala ɩn kũu, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, ala ɩ a 'yɛr bie ala ban sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a kʊsɩr pɛ̃rsɩ pɔ waan nɩ kũu tɩ 'matãan Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr, ka a tɩɩr a Isɩral nɩbɛ na ba tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ kaara a Mosesɩ nie a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr jũu, a wʊ tɩɩr gba na wa baar.

english_verse: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛrbie tɩɩr kʊ̃ gar a lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: If something that brings the death sentence is glorious, won't something that makes us acceptable to God be even more glorious?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a 'yɛrbie ala na 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩbɛ 'yɛr tɩɩr bɛrma naa, a 'yɛr bie ala na waara nɩ a torfʊ, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊn jã!

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa ba lɛ tara tɩɩr a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ, fʊ̃ʊ de man a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, wʊ gar wʊ naa.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Ka ala ɩ a 'lɔ gba na wa baar waan na tɩɩr, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a tɩɩr 'lɔ na ba baaraa ɛ, na jã!

english_verse: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ nyãna lɛ vɛ̃ ka saa joro dãbãɛ ɛ,

english_verse: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
translation_verse: Sɩn ba kaara fɩka a Mosesɩ na dɔ̃ɔ vil a fɔbaa pɔɔ a wʊ nie ka a Isɩral nɩbɛ ta kaa ɛ, na ba nyɛ a nyɩlfʊ 'lɔ na baar ɛ.

english_verse: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a ba nyãa pɔɔ naa wa tãn dɩna, a fɔpɔɔraa chɛnɛ naa bala wa kara a nɛtɩr koraa jie. Baa for bar sɛrɛ ɛ, bojũu Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ɔ for.

english_verse: When the Law of Moses is read, they have their minds covered over
translation_verse: A dɩna gba, bala wa kar a Mosesɩ nɛbinãa yele, a fɔbaa ma pɔɔn a ba nyãa.

english_verse: with a covering that is removed only for those who turn to the Lord.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa lɩɛb wa a sɩ Soro sɛ̃, wʊ ma for wʊn a fɔbaa 'lɔ bar. (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩ Soro lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ, ka a jie 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na be, mãɛ sofʊ mɩ ben be.

english_verse: So our faces are not covered. They show the bright glory of the Lord, as the Lord's Spirit makes us more and more like our glorious Lord.
translation_verse: Ka a sɩn bala nie na ba pɔɔ ɛ, pãa nyɩlɛ a sɩ Soro tɩɩr, naa lɩɛrɛ ka a tɩɩr pʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ na yire a sɩ Soro sɛ̃ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ tãsɔɔ yele nɩ vã yele, saa tara bɛlfʊ ɛ, bɩɩ lɩɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ ɛ. Sɩ ma man a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ ka a gã chãa pɔ, na sɩ wiil a sɩ mãɛ ka nɩrɛ jaa tɩɛr bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yelmãɛ dẽme lɛ sɩ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn niem.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: ) 'lɔ lɛ maal a chãa chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ nyãn pɔ, na wʊ kʊ sɩ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ chãa, na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto niem.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: A ŋmɩn 'lɔ na be be a dɩna jɔ̃ɔn a bala na ba sɔɔ de a sɩ 'yɛr ɛ tɩɛrsɩ, ka ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ chãa na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩɩr ɛ, na wile a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ na be ɛ.

english_verse: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
translation_verse: Bojũu a ba ɩ sɩ mãɛ 'yɛr lɛ sɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ naa a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Soro, a sɩn mɩ ɩ a yɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a wʊ jũu.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “Vɛ̃ ka a chãa chaar libe pɔ,” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: We are like clay jars in which this treasure is stored. The real power comes from God and not from us.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn kaara naa yɔɔraa dʊʊr kaar Nãaŋmɩn na de a bʊ̃sʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, a ba yi a sɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Yele ma chɩm sɩ naa a lõbobo a jaa ayi, tɩchɛ a maa ŋmɛr sɩ ɛ, ka a ma ɩ sɩ vãre vãre, tɩchɛ a sɩ tɩɛr maa yɛ̃yɛl ɛ.

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: Ba ma ge sɩ naa, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn ma ben a sɩ sɛ̃, na ba ma ŋme sɩ gaal tẽe, tɩchɛ baa sɔ̃ɔ sɩ ɛ.

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Ka a sɩn banyã na vʊrɔ be kũu nũu pɔ, a Yesu jũu, ka a nɩbɛ tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ a wʊ nyɛvʊr a sɩ ãgãma anyã na kpi pɔ.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a kũu tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ sɩn, tɩchɛ ka a nyɛvʊr tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ yɩn.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “N sɔɔn de ala lɛ so ka n 'yɛr.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a 'lɔ na sãɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, mɩ na sãɩ sɩ naa nɩ a Yesu 'matãan a yɩn a sɩ wa ara a wʊ niem.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: A anyãna a jaa ɩrɛ naa a yɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jũu, ka a wãɛfʊ 'lɔ na tara a nɩyɔɔ, na lɩɛb dãnfʊ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka saa baala ɛ. A sɩ ãgãn vaar gba na suoro, tɩchɛ a sɩ sɩɩr 'lɔ, bɩbir jaa lɛ a ma lɩɛrɛ bʊ̃paalaa.

english_verse: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wõm anyãna sɩn nyɛrɛ ɩn dẽfere naa waara nɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ɩ tɩɩr gar a jaa wa kʊrɔ sɩ.

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ, saa fur nɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala sɩn nyɛrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ fur nɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ. A anyã sɩn nyɛrɛ, a kʊ̃ kor ɛ, tɩchɛ anyã sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, ala lɛ na kor.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ ãgãma anyãna kaara naa fɩka a tãn yie anyãna sɩn kpɩɛrɛ, ala wa kpi, sɩ tara na yir Nãaŋmɩn na mɛ, yir nyã na be a saaju an ba ɩ nɩrɛ nũu lɛ mɛ ɛ.

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: Sɩ ʊrɔ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka, a saaju yir 'lɔ pɔ, sɩ tɩ kpɛ a be.

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: Sɩn wa kpɛ a be, sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ ɩ sal'mʊɔr ɛ.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: Bojũu a ãgãn tãn nyã pɔ sɩn be, sɩ ʊrɔ na ka a ɩ tuor kʊ sɩ, bojũu saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ ɩ sal'mʊɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ de a saaju jikpɩɛraa 'lɔ su pɔɔ, ka a 'lɔ na ɩ a bʊ̃kũu ka a nyɛvʊr vɔl wʊ.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ lɛ maal sɩ a lɛ a yele nyãna 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ kʊ sɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ, ka a ɩ yelmãɛ jaa lɛ an na wa.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩ ma bar tɩɛr, na sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩn chɛnɛ be a ãgãn pɔ, sɩ jãan naa a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: But we live by faith, not by what we see.
translation_verse: A nyɛvʊr sɩn tara, sɔɔfʊ lɛ, a ba ɩ nyɛfʊ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: Sɩ bar tɩɛr, ka a mɩ ɩ sɩ bɔfʊ ɩka sɩ yi a ãgãn nyã pɔ, na sɩ chen tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a sɩ Soro yir.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ, ka a ãgãn nyã pɔ lɛ sɩ be, bɩɩ ka sɩ yin a wʊ pɔ.

english_verse: After all, Christ will judge each of us for the good or the bad that we do while living in these bodies. Bringing People to God
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa na wa ara na Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ dakɔɔ par, ka wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa lɛ wʊn de a wʊ ãgãn tʊ̃n, ka vɩla lɛ fʊ tʊ̃, bɩɩ dɛɛr lɛ.

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, an yi a lɛ daar jaa sɩ bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ a sɩ Soro dãbãɛ jofʊ na be, a sɩ pãa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka sɩ lɩɛb a nɩbɛ tɩɛr. Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn lɛ sɩn be, ka a yɩ tɩɛr gba mɩ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ sɩn be.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ dãn a sɩ mãɛ kʊ yɩ go ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ kʊ yɩ sɔr ka yɩ chɛ nyãa a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a bala na ma chɩɛrɛ a nyãa nɩ a ala ban nyɛn nɩbir, tɩ bar a ala na be a nyãa pɔ.

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ gele naa, Nãaŋmɩn jũu lɛ. Ala ɩ saa lɛ gele mɩ ɛ, a yɩ jũu lɛ.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Kɩrɩsɩto nʊ̃fʊ lɛ fɩrɛ sɩ, bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nɩbʊ̃'yen lɛ kpi kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa, a lɛ jũu nɩrɛ jaa lɛ kpi.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ kpi kʊ ba jaa, ka a bala na chɛnɛ a nɩbir, ba kʊ̃ lɛ be be kʊ a ba mãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ban ben be kʊ a 'lɔ na kpi kʊ ba na wʊ lɛ ir ɩ vʊr go.

english_verse: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
translation_verse: An yi a dɩna chiine, saa lɛ kaara nɩrɛ a wɛr nɩbɛ kaafʊ kaar ɛ. Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ sɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kaa a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, saa lɛ chɛnɛ maala a lɛ go ɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ nɩrɛ jaa wa ben a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ lɩɛb nɩpaalaa, a nɩkoraa chen naa, tɩchɛ ka wʊ lɩɛb nɩpaalaa.

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: A anyãna a jaa yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, 'lɔ lɛ 'maal sɩ kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ pãa kʊ sɩ a 'maalfʊ 'yɛrbie.

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn 'maal a wɛr kʊ a wʊ mãɛ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. Waa lɛ sɔrɔ a nɩbɛ yeldɛbɛ ban maal ɛ. A 'maalfʊ 'yɛrbie anyã lɛ wʊ de tʊ̃n sɩ.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩn lɛ ara kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka a wɛr pɔ, sɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tu sʊɔrɔ yɩ. Sɩ den a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor sʊɔrɔ nɩ yɩ ɩka, yɩ tɔɔ wa gbʊr a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Christ never sinned! But God treated him as a sinner, so Christ could make us acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn den a 'lɔ na ba maal dɛɛr jaa ɛ, ka wʊ lo a sɩ dɛɛr bɔɔr kʊ sɩ, ka a wʊ jũu a sɩ lɩɛb nɩtorsɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: An ɩ sɩn nɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'mataa tʊ̃nɔ̃, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ ta kaa a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: Saa ŋmaara nɩrɛ jaa sɔr ɛ, ka ba taa wa kpɛrɛ a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yele jaa pɔ, sɩ ma maal a sɩ mãɛ wiil ɩka Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ lɛ sɩ ɩ. A anyãna lɛ a mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ pɔ, wõm nɩ tuo nɩ nɩbaal yele pɔ,

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: ba ma ŋme sɩ naa nyɔɔr sɩ pɔɔ tɩ ma dam nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ, ka sɩ ma tʊ̃ tʊ̃kpãɛn na sɩ gal gʊ̃ɔ tɩ jɛ̃n kɔ̃,

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: a sɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ nɩ a sɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a sɩ kãnyir nɩ a sɩ maal vɩla, nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wʊn kʊ sɩ pɔ, nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ sɩn tara sɩrɛ jaa,

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: na ba ma kʊ sɩ tɩɩr tɩ lɛ kpɛ sɩ, na ba ma bʊɔl sɩ yovɩla nɩ a yodɛɛr. Sɩ ɩn yelmãɛ dẽme tɩ ba maal sɩ nɩbɛlbɛ.

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: Sɩ ɩn nɩbɔ̃ɔnsɩ tɩchɛ a ba maal sɩ fɩka baa bɔ̃ɔ sɩ ɛ. Sɩ ma kpire naa tɩchɛ na sɩ ma chɛnɛ vʊrɔ. Ba ma ŋme sɩn nɛ nɛ nɛ tɩ baa kʊ ɛ.

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: Nɩbaal yele lɛ ba ma maal sɩ, tɩ sɩ chɛnɛ chɩlɛ. Nɔ̃ɔ ma kʊrɔ sɩ naa, tɩ sɩ maala nɩyɔɔ a ba lere. Saa tara bon jaa ɛ, tɩ so bomo a jaa.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: A pãa kaara naa fɩka bʊʊr, naa 'yɛrɛ nɩ yɩ fɩka n bibiir. Yɩ yuo a yɩ nyãn mɩ.

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a Satan na ɩrɛ wa tara guor taa? Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a nyã na ɩ a Yesu turo, nɩ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ, na ɩrɛ mɩ wa tara man taa?

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ fʊn ɩrɛ wa nyɛ tɩbɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir? Bojũu sɩn lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ba kpire ɛ, puorfʊ yir. Nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr, “Ɩn ben a ba sɛ̃ 'mataa chiine nɩ ba, naa ɩ a ba Nãaŋmɩn, ka ba mɩ ɩ a n nɩbɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata

english_verse: The Lord also says, “Leave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
translation_verse: “Ala lɛ so ka a sɩ Soro 'yɛr, yɩ tɔɔ yi a ba pɔ, tɩ chɛ ba bar, na yɩ oo yɩ yõ. Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa sɩrɛ bʊ̃dɛɛr jaa ɛ, ɩn de yɩ naa.” (Isaiya

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: “Ɩn ɩ naa a yɩ Sãa, ka a yɩn mɩ ɩ a n dabil nɩ a n pɔɔbil. Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a Tʊ̃ɔfʊ Sʊɔ 'yɛr.” (

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: An ɩ sɩn lɛ be tara a nɛtɩraa nyãnaa jũu, n barmɩne, yɩ ɩ a sɩ pɔl sɩ mãɛ yin yele jaa na sɔ̃ɔ a sɩ ãgãma nɩ a sɩ sɩɩr pɔ, na sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir na sɩ ɩ chɛchɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Yɩ yuo a yɩ nyãa kʊ sɩ. Saa maal a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa dɛɛr ɛ, saa fɔl a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ ɛ, saa mɩ ŋma a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: N ba 'yɛrɛ a anyãna ɩka n tʊ yɩ ɛ, n dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka yɩ ben a sɩ nyãa pɔ, ka ala ɩ nyɛvʊr lɛ, bɩɩ kũu lɛ tɩ sɩn nɩ yɩn lɛ.

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: N bar tɩɛr ka a 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ãkpɛ̃ɔ, a sɩ wõm a jaa pɔ, tɩ nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma tɩ põn bar.

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩn ben wa ta a Masedonɩya, a sɩ ãgãma anyãna ba tara pɛ̃nfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ tuor dɔɔyɛ ka jɛɛr ma be a yõo ka a dãbãɛ mɩ ma nyɔɔ sɩ.

english_verse: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ma 'maala a nɩtɔr barsɩ, wʊ 'maal sɩ naa a lɛ a Titusɩ na wa wa a sɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a wʊ waa tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a lɛ yɩn 'maal wʊ. Wʊ mɩ man kʊ sɩ a lɛ an dɔ̃ɔ kpɛ yɩ ka yɩ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ, nɩ lɛ mɩ yɩn tara a n tɩɛr, ala lɛ so ka nʊ̃ɔ pãa kpɛ ma tɩ põn bar.

english_verse: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a gãn ɩn sɛb kʊ yɩ, sɔ̃ɔn yɩ pʊɔ gba, tɩ maa pʊɔ ba sɔ̃ɔ ɛ. A sɔ̃ɔn n pʊɔ 'lɔ ɩn wa nyɛ ɩka a gãn ɩn sɛb kʊ yɩ sɔ̃ɔn a yɩ pʊɔ bãlãa.

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, n pʊɔ pɛl naa, a ba ɩ a yɩ pʊɔ na sɔ̃ɔ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ a yɩ pʊsɔ̃ɔ na vɛ̃ ka yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr. Bojũu a yɩ pʊsɔ̃ɔ ɩn a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, ala lɛ so ka yelbier ba pɔɔ yɩ tu a sɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn pɔ pʊsɔ̃ɔ ma waan na tɩɛr lɩɛbfʊ chiine faafʊ jie, a ba ɩ waalfʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a wɛr pɔ pʊsɔ̃ɔ ma waan na kũu.

english_verse: Just look what God has done by making you feel sorry! You sincerely want to prove you are innocent. You are angry. You are shocked. You are eager to see that justice is done. You have proved that you were completely right in this matter.
translation_verse: Yɩ nyɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pɔ pʊsɔ̃ɔ na waan a yɩ sɛ̃. Nyɛ lɛ yɩn ɩ nɩbijɩɛ, na yɩ ma 'yɛr wiil a yɩ mãɛ, nyɛ lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ dɔɔl yɩ, ka a dãbã chɛlma ŋme, nyɛ lɛ yɩn bʊɔrɔ taa, nyɛ lɛ yɩn tara taa tɩɛr, na yɩ chɔɔr gu ɩka yeltorsɩ a ɩ. Sɔr jaa pɔ, yɩ wiil yɩ mãɛ ɩka yaa tara chɛfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: N gba na sɛb a nɩtɔ̃ kʊ yɩ, a ba ɩ a 'lɔ na maal a dɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ bɩɩ a bala na pʊɔ wʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn niem yɩn mãɛ yɩ kaa nyɛ lɛ sɩn ma ɩrɛ yɩ a vɔlaa.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
translation_verse: A anyãna a jaa lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ ãkpãɛn, naa pʊɔ a sɩn mãɛ ãkpãɛn sɩn dɔ̃ɔ tara. A nʊ̃mɔ̃ sɩ naa a lɛ sɩn wa nyɛ a Titusɩ ka wʊ pʊɔ pɛl, bojũu yɩ jaa lɛ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ ka a wʊ nyãa 'maa.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: N dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a yɩ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, ka yaa mɩ su ma vã ɛ. Tɩchɛ a lɛ jaa sɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a yɩ 'yɛr mɩ ɩ yelmãɛ. Ka a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ dãn yɩ kʊ a Titusɩ a wʊ tɩ nyɛ ka a ɩ yelmãɛ jaa lɛ.

english_verse: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
translation_verse: Ka a wʊ bɔfʊ wʊn bʊɔrɔ yɩ pãa pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ wa tɩɛr a lɛ yɩn wõnõ a wʊ toor na yɩ de wʊ nuur ayi nɩ dãbãɛ nɩ mĩifʊ.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa ka n pãa bar tɩɛr a yɩ jũu.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a wãɛfʊ nyã a Nãaŋmɩn na wãɛ a Masedonɩya pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

english_verse: Although they were going through hard times and were very poor, they were glad to give generously.
translation_verse: A bɛɛr kaa tuo na nyɔɔ ba, ka ba ɩ nɔ̃n dẽme, tɩ a chɛnɛ na nʊ̃mɔ̃ ba, ka a nɔ̃ɔ kʊrɔ ba, a ba kʊ tɩ põn bar.

english_verse: They gave as much as they could afford and even more, simply because they wanted to.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa mãɛ din dãasɩɛ ɩka ba kʊn a lɛ ban na tʊ̃ɔ, ba gba kʊn tɩ põn bar. Bala mãɛ wʊɔ pɔ lɛ a yi.

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: Ba sʊɔr sɩn yãayãabɩlɛ ɩka, sɩ de a kʊfʊ anyãna tɩ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ka ɩ ba mɩ nyɛn sɔr pʊɔ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: Baa maal a lɛ a sɩn mãɛ na dɔ̃ɔ tɩɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ ba den nie de a ba mãɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro nɩ a sɩn lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so a sɩ sʊɔr a Titusɩ an ɩ 'lɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ piel, wʊ baar baar a wãɛfʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nyã a yɩ jie.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩtãa lɛ yɩn ma maal yele jaa tɩ põn bar, a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, a yɩ 'yɛr pɔ, nɩ a yɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ, nɩ a yɩ nɩbijɩɛ pɔ, nɩ a lɛ yɩn nʊ̃ sɩ, yɩ kaa na yɩ mɩ kʊ tɩ põn bar a wãɛfʊ nyã pɔ.

english_verse: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
translation_verse: N ba fɩrɛ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n bɛɛr a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ kaa naa mɩ de man a bamɩne mɩ maal vɩla yele kaa.

english_verse: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ na be. Wʊ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ taraa sʊɔ, tɩchɛ a yɩ jũu, wʊ wa lɩɛb nɔ̃ɔ sʊɔ, ka yɩn tu a wʊ nɔ̃ɔ pɔ, mɩ lɩɛb taraa dẽme.

english_verse: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
translation_verse: A lɛ ɩn tara na 'yɛr a yele nyãna pɔ nɩ nyã, dɩyɛ̃, yɩn lɛ ɩ nɩbɛ na de nie na ba ɩ a kʊfʊ tɛɛ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a ɩrɛ yɩ vɔlaa ɩka, yɩ ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ baar tʊ̃, ka a lɛ na ɩ a yɩ bɔfʊ ɩka, yɩ maal ka a tu taa a yɩ tɩ baar jã a lɛ yɩn tara.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a kʊfʊ vɔlaa ben be, Nãaŋmɩn ma sɔɔn de bon jaa wʊn tara, a ba ɩ a bon 'lɔ wʊn ba tara ɛ.

english_verse: I am not trying to make life easier for others by making life harder for you. But it is only fair
translation_verse: A sɩ bɔfʊ ba lɛ ɩka bamɩne ba pɛ̃nɛ, tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne 'lɔ bala ɛ, tɩchɛ jãtaa a be be.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Ka a dɩna a yɩ bʊ̃yɔɔ na sʊ̃ʊ ba a lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ, ka a lɛ mɩ a ba bʊ̃yɔɔ mɩ na lɩɛb sʊ̃ʊ yɩ, ka a jãtaa pãa be be.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “Those who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.” Titus and His Friends
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “A 'lɔ sʊɔ na wob yɔɔ, wʊ maa tara yɔɔ ɛ, ka a 'lɔ mɩ na wob bãlãa maa tara bãlãa ɛ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: N puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, 'lɔ lɛ de a tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn tara kʊ yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Titusɩ tɩɛr mɩ pɔ.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Titusɩ ba sɔɔ de a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mãɛ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kaa ir ŋme nyãa waara a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ tʊ̃n a yɛbɛ ãsʊɔ ka wʊn pʊɔ ka ba 'mataa tɩ, 'lɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa na dãna wʊ, a wʊ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ir wʊ ɩka wʊ pʊɔ sɩ, a sɩ 'mataa tuo a kʊfʊ anyãna chiin, na sɩn tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔn a sɩ Soro mãɛ na sɩ mɩ wiil a lɛ sɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ sʊ̃ʊ.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
translation_verse: Saa bʊɔrɔ hũhũfʊ nɩ a kʊfʊsɩ anyãna yele ɛ.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ lɛ sʊɔr a sɩ yɛbɛ ãsʊɔ sɩn jʊʊr kaa a wʊ tara yelmãɛ, sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ naa ka ban 'mataa tɩ, wʊ mɩ gba bar tɩɛr a yɩ jũu.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: A Titusɩ 'lɔ, n tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ lɛ, ka sɩ 'mataa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ pɔ. Tɩchɛ a sɩ yɛɛr banyã 'lɔ, a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ lɛ ir ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ ka a ɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu yɩ maal a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ wiil ba, nɩ a lɛ jũu sɩn ma chɩɛrɛ nyãa a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ na be jie jaa ka ba nyɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: A ba lɛ sɛɛ ɩka n lɛ sɛb gãn kʊ yɩ a lɛ sɩn na sʊ̃ʊ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo go ɛ.

english_verse: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
translation_verse: Bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ yɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ sʊ̃ʊ, n pɛɛ yɩ naa na n kʊ a Masedonɩya dẽme, naa 'yɛr kʊ ba ɩka, dɩyɛ̃ jaa lɛ be a Akaya yɩ chɔɔr ɩka yɩ kʊ, ka a yɩ vɔlaa dam nɩbɛ yɔɔ jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ ka ba mɩn ɩ.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n tʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a yɛɛr ba nyãna ka a lɛ sɩn chɩɛrɛ a nyãa a yɩ jũu, taa lɩɛb 'yɛr pɔrɔ ɛ. Tɩchɛ ka a ɩ yɩ chɔɔr baar nɩtãa lɛ ɩn 'yɛr ɩka yɩ ɩ naa.

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala be ɩ a Masedonɩya nɩrɛ ben pɔɔ ba tɩ, na wʊ tɩ nyɛ a yaa chɔɔr ɛ, sɩn be lɛ 'yɛr a yɩ 'yɛr, an ɩn vã a lɛ sɩn ma bar tɩɛr a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: A lɛ n nyɛn an tara sɔr ka n sʊɔr a yɛɛr ka ba dɔ̃ɔ nie tɩ piir yɩ kaa, na ba mɩ kaa a yɩ chɔɔr baar a yɩ pʊtɩɛr kʊfʊ yɩn tɩr a nɛɛ. Ka a pãa ɩ pʊpɛl kʊfʊ naa ta ɩ fɩrfʊ kʊfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma kʊ lɛ a wʊ nyãa na tɩɛr ka a ta wa ɩ pʊsɔ̃ɔ, bɩɩ ŋmʊrfʊ ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃n nɩrɛ na kʊrɔ nɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ɔn vɛ̃ ka a wʊ wãɛfʊ ɩ yɔɔ kʊ yɩ, ka a lɛ a yele a jaa pɔ, nɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa ka yɩ ma nyɛrɛ a ala jaa yɩn bʊɔrɔ na yɩ ma tʊ̃n tʊ̃sʊ̃n jaa tɩ põn bar.

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na ma kʊ a kʊɔraa a bʊ̃bʊrɔ na wʊ ma vɛ̃ ka a bʊ̃diir waa, wʊn kʊ yɩ naa na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a bʊ̃bie binfʊ jie waa, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ torfʊ ŋmafʊ bɛrmɛ.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na maal yɩ naa ka yɩ ɩ taraa dẽme ka yɩ ma kʊrɔ nɩ pʊpɛl sɔ̃ɔ jaa, naa tu a sɩ sɛ̃ ka a yɩ pʊpɛl kʊfʊ lɩɛb vɛ̃ ka nɩbɛ puoro Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: A yɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nyã yɩn tʊ̃ a ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ an wõnõ tɛɛ lɛ a sʊ̃ʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yaar ta nɩrɛ jaa, ka ba puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: A tʊ̃mɔ̃ nyã yɩn tʊ̃ jũu wiil a lɛ a yɩn mãɛ na be, nɩbɛ pɛɛn Nãaŋmɩn, bojũu a yɩ nɛɛ tufʊ 'mantãan a lɛ yɩn sɔɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, nɩ a yɩ pʊpɛl kʊfʊ 'lɔ yɩn lɔ̃ɔ põn ba nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: Ka a ba Nãaŋmɩn ban ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ yɩ, a ba tɩɛr wʊ jaa ma ben a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ bɛrmɛ naa na be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Thank God for his gift that is too wonderful for words!
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn son puorfʊ nɩ sɩn kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ man a wʊ kʊfʊ wʊn kʊ sɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl den a Kɩrɩsɩto hɛ lɛ lɛ lɛ nɩ a wʊ 'maar ɩfʊ lɔb nũu kʊ yɩ. N maa 'lara ɛ, maa wa tuor yɩ nɩ gberaa tɩ maa mɩ baa be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, n ba ɩ lɛ ɛ.
