english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka maa wa wa, n taa wa ɩ a ba ɩ lɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a nɩbɛ bamɩne jie ɛ, ba tɩɛr man taa a wɛr nɩbɛ kaar lɛ sɩ be.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩn nɩ a wɛr nɩbɛ lɛ 'mataa kpɩɛrɛ tɩ saa ŋmaara jɛɛr a ba kaar ɛ.

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: A sɩ tãjɛ bomo ba ɩ a wɛr nyã tãjɛbomo ɛ, a sɩ tãjɛbomo tara na Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ sɩn ma de wɛl a gãdaar jiir bar.

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: Sɩ ma sɔ̃ɔn a ba nɛchɩrɛ nɩ tɩɛr dɛɛr 'lɔ jaa ban ma de vara nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔfʊ bara, na sɩ ma 'yɛr nyɔɔr nɩbɛ tɩɛrsɩ ka ba lɩɛb wõnõ a Kɩrɩsɩto toor.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ chɔɔr naa ɩka sɩ kpãa a bawõnsɩ, yɩn wa ba gbɛr baar.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Yɩn kaara a anyã tɛɛ yɩn nyɛn nɩbir. Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ bar tɩɛr ɩka wʊ ɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊɔr, wʊ mɩ lɛ bɔ̃ɔ tɩɛr kaa ɩka a sɩn mɩ ɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊɔr a wʊ kaar.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa gba sɔɔ chɩɛrɛ nyãa nɩ a lɛ, a sɩ Soro ba kʊ sɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ ɩka sɩ wɛl yɩ bar ɛ, tɩ sɩ guol yɩ. Vã ba kʊrɔ ma nɩ a yele nyã ɛ.

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: Bojũu bamɩne 'yɛr ɩka, “A Pɔɔl gãma 'yɛrbie tɩrɛ naa, naa ɩ 'yɛrbikpãɛn, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ mãɛ wa be a sɩ sɛ̃, wʊ ma bal naa ka a wʊ 'yɛr mɩ maa ɩ bon ɛ.”

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ bala, yɩ vɛ̃ a ba bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, a lɛ a sɩ 'yɛrbie na kaara a gãma pɔ, sɩn ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ. Lɛ lɛ a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na kaara sɩn wa be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: We won't dare compare ourselves with those who think so much of themselves. But they are foolish to compare themselves with themselves.
translation_verse: Sɩn ba 'lara diere a sɩ mãɛ mana nɩ a bamɩne na ma pɛɛrɛ a ba mãɛ ɛ. Ba ma den a ba mãɛ na ba man a ba mãɛ, baa tara yɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Sɩn 'lɔ, sɩ kʊ̃ sɔɔ dãn a sɩ mãɛ a lɛ tɩ põn bar ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn nyɔ̃ɔn sɩ mãɛ jã a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr ɩka sɩ tʊ̃, ka sɩ gba na tʊ̃ tãn a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
translation_verse: Sɩ kʊ̃ dãn a sɩ mãɛ chiin tɛɛr ɛ, ka a na kaara fɩka saa wa a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, bojũu sɩ tãn naa a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Bɩɩ dãn sɩ mãɛ tɩ põn a tʊ̃mɔ̃ a nɩbɛ bamɩne na tʊ̃ ɛ. Sɩn tɩɛr lɛ ɩka, a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na ben nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃, a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ mɩ na yal 'yɔ̃ɔ

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: ka sɩ pãa tʊ̃ɔ mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ be a paalsɩ ala na be a yɩ niem. Bojũu saa dãna a sɩ mãɛ nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ paal pɔ, ban tʊ̃ baar ɛ.

english_verse: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
translation_verse: Bojũu a ba ɩ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na pɛɛ a wʊ mãɛ lɛ ɩ a nɩsʊ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ a sɩ Soro na pɛɛ lɛ.

english_verse: I am as concerned about you as God is. You were like a virgin bride I had chosen only for Christ.
translation_verse: N tara na nɩ yɩn nyuur a wʊ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nyuur. N tɩr nɛɛ kʊ yɩ ɩka yɩ kul dabʊ̃'yen, na ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto, ka n na de yɩ fɩka pɔɔsarbile na ba ta daba ɛ, na n kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ dãbãɛ kʊrɔ ma naa, nɩtãa lɛ a waa na dɔ̃ɔ de a wʊ yɛ̃ yele bɛl a Hawa, wʊ taa mɩ wa lɩɛb a yɩ nyãa yin a yelmãɛ yɩn tara turo nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto dẽ dẽ dẽ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ wan wa mʊɔl 'yɛr Yesu yuo 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, bɩɩ ka yɩ nyɛ a sɩyuo na ba ɩ a 'lɔ sɩn mʊɔl na ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ ɛ, bɩɩ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ yuo na ba ɩ a 'lɔ yɩn sɔɔ ɛ, yɩ ma sɔɔn jaa kayaan.

english_verse: I think I am as good as any of those super apostles.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n ba tɩɛr ɩka n ɩn pʊʊr a nɩtʊ̃n kpãɛn bala jie ɛ.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Amɩne sɛ̃ n ba jãn a 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ n tara na bɔ̃ɔfʊ. Sɩ ma vɛ̃n ka a anyã chaar kʊ yɩ yele jaa pɔ.

english_verse: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
translation_verse: N maal dɛɛr a lɛ ɩn siir a n mãɛ naa mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã kʊ yɩ a pɔrɔ bɩɩ?

english_verse: I robbed other churches by taking money from them to serve you.
translation_verse: N faan a pupuorbiir bamɩne ban dɔ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a yɩ jie.

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Ka a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, n bʊɔrɔ na bon, tɩ n ba ɩ tuor kʊ yɩ ɛ, bojũu a yɛɛr bala na dɔ̃ɔ yi a Masedonɩya wa ba kʊ man bon jaa ɩn bʊɔrɔ. N ba vɛ̃ ka n yele ɩ tuor kʊ a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ, n kʊ̃ wa vɛ̃ ka a n yele dɔɔl yɩ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: A lɛ a Yesu yelmãɛ na faa be a n sɛ̃ baar, nɩrɛ jaa ba be a be a Akaya paal pɔ, na ŋmaa ma sɔr nɩ a n nyãa chɛfʊ nyã pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
translation_verse: Baa 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ? Bojũu n ba nʊ̃ yɩ bɩɩ? Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩn nʊ̃ yɩ.

english_verse: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
translation_verse: Ɩn chɛnɛ na maala a lɛ ɩn ben maala naa tʊ̃ɔ ŋmaa a yobʊɔrbɔ sɔr, bala na bʊɔrɔ sɔr ɩka ba de a ba mãɛ mana nɩ sɩ.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Bojũu a nɩbɛ ba nyãna ɩn jir ŋmarba nɩtʊ̃nsɩ na ba ɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ na bɛlɛ nɩbɛ, na ba maal a ba mãɛ nɩtãa a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nsɩ.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ nɛ'maa yele ɛ, bojũu a Satan mãɛ mɩ na tʊ̃ɔn maal a wʊ mãɛ fɩka, a chãa malaka.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: A mɩ kʊ̃ ɩ nɛ'maa yele ɛ, ala ɩ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ãsʊɔ mɩ pãa maal a wʊ mãɛ a tʊ̃tʊ̃ toraa kaar ɛ. A ba baarfʊ daar, ban nyɛn a ba sãyar lɛ ban tʊ̃.

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: Ɩn lɛ maal 'yɛr go. Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a ãsʊɔ jaa bʊɔl ma jɔl ɛ. Tɩchɛ ala ɩ yɩ gba wa bʊɔl man jɔl, yɩ chɛnɛ sɔɔ de ma fɩka lɛ yɩn na de a jɔl ka a n mɩ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ yuor bãlãa.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: N bar tɩɛr nɩ a n yobɔyele nyã pɔ, n ba 'yɛrɛ fɩka nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro na ma 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩtãa lɛ jɔl na ma 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Yɔɔ jie jaa lɛ bʊɔrɔ yuor a wɛr nyã pɔ, n mɩn bɔn a yuor.

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma sɔɔn de jɔl vɩla jaa, yɩn ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme jũu.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ, yɩ gba ma den nɩrɛ na maal yɩ gbãgbaa bɩɩ na yɩ ɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃ ka wʊ dire, bɩɩ dara ba mãɛ yire nɩ a yɩ niem bɩɩ ma 'mara yɩ a tʊkpala pɔrɔ jaa.

english_verse: I am ashamed to say we are too weak to behave in such a way. If they can brag, so can I, but it is a foolish thing to do.
translation_verse: Vã kʊrɔ ma naa ka n 'yɛr ɩka sɩn bal naa nɩ a yele nyã. A ala a nɩbɛ bamɩne na ma de bʊɔrɔ nɩ yuor, maa 'lɔ ma 'yɛr naa jɔl kaar, n mɩ na pãa 'lan bɔ yuor.

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Baa ɩ Heburu nɩbɛ ɛ? Lɛ lɛ n mɩ ɩ a ãsʊɔ. Baa ɩ Isɩral nɩbɛ ɛ? N mɩ ɩn a Isɩral nɩrɛ. A ba ɩ Abraham bal nɩbɛ lɛ ba ɩ ɛ? Lɛ lɛ n mɩ ɩ a ãsʊɔ.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Baa ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ɛ? N sʊrɔ naa anyãna fɩka nɩrɛ na ba tara tɩɛr ɛ. N ɩn a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ gar ba. Naa tʊ̃ tʊ̃kpãɛn gar ba jaa. Ka ba ma pɔɔrɔ ma die pɔ jaa tɔ̃tɔ̃. Ba ma ŋme man kpɛ̃ɛ gar ba. N ma nyuro na kũu bɩbir jaa.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Gbɛɛ ata jaa lɛ ba pɔb ma nɩ dakʊrsɩ, na ba lɔb ma nɩ kɔsɩbɛ gbɛbʊ̃'yen. Gbɛɛ ata mɩ lɛ a gbor kpɛ̃ɛ ŋmɛr wɛl sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ be a man kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ. Tãsɔɔ gbul nɩ a mɔ̃tɔ̃gbul jaa lɛ n ma be a man kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ.

english_verse: During my many travels, I have been in danger from rivers, robbers, my own people, and foreigners. My life has been in danger in cities, in deserts, at sea, and with people who only pretended to be the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Ɩn ba gala a yɔfʊ ɛ, n bɔ̃ɔn lɛ a põn kʊ̃ɔ dɔɔyɛ na be, naa tuor nãnyisɩ, ka a maa mãɛ paal nɩbɛ ge ma, ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ mɩ ge ma. N din dɔɔyɛ a tẽe pɔ. Naa di dɔɔyɛ a mʊ̃ɔ pɔ. Naa di dɔɔyɛ a man pɔ. Naa di dɔɔyɛ a yɛɛr bala na ŋmara a jirsɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
translation_verse: Tʊ̃kpãɛn nɩ wõm pɔ, naa ma gal gʊ̃ɔ. N bɔ̃ɔn kɔ̃ nɩ kɔ̃nyũur naa ma gãna kɔ̃ tɔ̃tɔ̃. Ka ɔɔr ma kpɛ ma ka n ɩ sal'mʊɔr.

english_verse: Besides everything else, each day I am burdened down, worrying about all the churches.
translation_verse: A anyã a jaa puor, bɩbir jaa lɛ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa yele ma ɩ ma tɩɛr.

english_verse: When others are weak, I am weak too. When others are tricked into sin, I get angry.
translation_verse: An lɛ bal, ka n mɩ ba bal ɛ? A bala na faa maal yelbier, a ba lɩɛb bũu dire ma bɩɩ?

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n mɩn bɔn yuor, ɩn bɔn yuor nɩ a yelsɩ ala na maal ma ka n bal.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ a pɛɛfʊ wʊ ta bɩbir jaa, bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka n ba ŋmara jirsɩ ɛ.

english_verse: The governor of Damascus at the time of King Aretas had the city gates guarded, so he could capture me.
translation_verse: A be a Damaskus tẽe pɔ, a nãa 'lɔ na turo a nãkpɛ̃ɛ Aretas, wʊ vɛ̃ naa ka ba gu a Damaskus tẽe wʊ jaa ɩka ba nyɔɔ ma.

english_verse: But I escaped by being let down in a basket through a window in the city wall.
translation_verse: Ka ba 'mɔɔ ma 'yɔ̃ɔ pɩɛ pɔ tur bar tokoro pɔ ka n fʊɔl yi a wʊ nuur pɔ.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: N kʊ̃ wa bar a yobɔyele nyã jaa ɛ, ala ɩ n gba kʊ̃ nyɛ tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ. A nyɛfʊsɩ nɩ a yelwiilsɩ ala ɩn nyɛrɛ yire naa a sɩ Soro sɛ̃.

english_verse: I know about one of Christ's followers who was taken up into the third heaven
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ na sɔɔ Kɩrɩsɩto a wʊ yuom pie nɩ anaar (

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n chɔɔr baar ɩka n tɩ piir yɩ kaa, a gbɛɛ ata sʊɔ lɛ a nyã, n kʊ̃ tɩ ɩ tuor kʊ yɩ ɛ. Bojũu a ba ɩ a yɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn mãɛ lɛ n bʊɔrɔ. Fʊ̃ʊ kaa bibiir maa bɔ gun a ba sãamɩne ɛ, tɩchɛ sãamɩne lɛ ma bɔ gun a ba bibiir.

english_verse: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a daba nyãna ɩn ben 'yɛrɛ, ka wʊ ben ãgãn pɔ, bɩɩ waa be ãgãn pɔ ɛ, n ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔ naa.

english_verse: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn 'mɔɔ wʊn don be a wʊ tẽe. Be lɛ wʊ wõnõ yelsɩ wʊn kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ man nɛɛ ɛ, yelsɩ nɩrɛ na ba tara sɔr ɩka wʊ man ɛ.

english_verse: I will brag about that man, but not about myself, except to say how weak I am.
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ nyãna tɔ sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ n bʊɔrɔ a yuor, n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ a n mãɛ yuor ɛ, ka maa balfʊsɩ tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Maa ɩka ɩn bɔn yuor gba, n kʊ̃ ɩ jɔl ɛ, bojũu yelmãɛ lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ. Tɩchɛ n bar a lɛ, ka nɩrɛ taa tɩɛrɛ a n yele gar a ala ɩn maala bɩɩ a ala ɩn ma 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
translation_verse: Lɛ an na ɩ ka n pɔɔ a n mãɛ 'mɔɔfʊ sɔr, a yelwiilbɛrɛ anyã jũu, ka a pãa kaara fɩka gʊɔ na chɔɔrɔ ma a ãgãn pɔ, ka a kaara a Satan 'yɛ'yɛrɛ kaar, ka a ge ma.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: Gbɛɛ ata jaa lɛ n sʊɔr a n Soro ɩka wʊ vʊ̃ɔ a gʊɔ nyã bar ma.

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ma, “A n wãɛfʊ sɛɛ fʊ naa, bojũu a n kpɛ̃ɔ ma sɛɛn kʊ a nɩrɛ na bɔ̃ɔn ɩka wʊ bal naa.” A lɛ jũu, ɩn bɔn yuor gar bon jaa a n balfʊsɩ pɔ, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto kpɛ̃ɔ pãa pɔɔ ma.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu, n pʊɔ pɛl naa, a n balfʊsɩ pɔ, tʊbie pɔ, tuo pɔ, gefʊ pɔ, nɩ wõmsɩ a jaa pɔ. Bojũu maa wa bal, lɛ lɛ n pãa ma kpɛ̃mɛ.

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: N maal n mãɛ jɔl, tɩchɛ a yɩn yele lɛ tɩɛ ma 'yɔ̃ɔ. Yɩ gba sɛɛn nɩ naa bʊɔlɔ ma yovɩla, bojũu n ba ɩ pʊʊr a nɩtʊ̃n kpãɛn bala sɛ̃ ɛ, ala ɩ n gba ba ɩ bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: A yelsɩ ala na ma ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ jãnɛ lɛ jãnsɩ, tʊ̃fɛrsɩ nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃. A anyãna lɛ n mɩ dɔ̃ɔ tara kãnyir tʊ̃n a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba boo lɛ dɔ̃ɔ gar yɩ, ka a ba ɩ ɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ tuor kʊ yɩ lɛ ɛ? Yɩ vɛ̃ a n dɛɛr nyã kʊ ma.

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: A lɛ n pʊɔ na pɛl naa ka n sɔ̃ɔ bon jaa ɩn tara a yɩ nyɛvʊr jũu, 'matãan a maa mãɛ wʊ jaa. Ala ɩ n nʊ̃ yɩn yɔɔ jaa, yɩn 'lɔ na nʊ̃ man bãlãa bɩɩ?

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: A lɛ an be, lɛ a chɛnɛ be, n ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ tuor kʊ yɩ jaa ɛ. Tɩchɛ ɩn ɩ yɛ̃ sʊɔ jũu, n den a yɛ̃ yele nyɔɔn yɩ.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: N den a yɩ bʊ̃kɔ̃ɔ tu a nɩbɛ bala ɩn dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a ba wa a yɩ sɛ̃ bɩɩ?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: N sʊɔr Titusɩ ɩka wʊ tɩ a yɩ sɛ̃, naa 'mataa tʊ̃n a sɩ yɛbɛ ɩka ba 'mataa tɩ. Titusɩ den a yɩ bon kɔ̃ɔ bɩɩ? A ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩbʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ sɩ jaa tara na sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a tʊ̃bʊ̃'yen ɛ?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr man tãa sɩ 'yɛrɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a sɩ mãɛ a yɩ sɛ̃ bɩɩ? Nãaŋmɩn niem lɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ na sɩ be a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, bon jaa sɩn maala, sɩ barmɩne a yɩ ãkpãɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jũu lɛ.

english_verse: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
translation_verse: Bojũu dãbãɛ kʊrɔ ma naa ɩka maa wa tɩ, n kʊ̃ tɩ nyɛ a yɩ be a lɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɛ. Ka yɩ mɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ ma ka n be a lɛ yɩn bʊɔrɔ ɛ. Dãbãɛ chɛnɛ na kʊrɔ ma ɩka, jɛɛr, nyuur, suur nyɛfʊ, ootaa, yobɔyele, gagar yele, mãɛ 'mɔɔfʊ nɩ buburfʊ be a yɩ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: N lɛ joro na dãbãɛ ɩka maa wa lɩɛb waara, Nãaŋmɩn wʊ maal ma ka n siir n mãɛ a yɩ niem. Ka n tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ nɩ a nɩyɔɔ bala na dɔ̃ɔ maal a yeldɛɛr tɩ ba lɩɛb a ba tɩɛr yin a yele anyãna pɔ ɛ. Ban bʊ̃nɔ̃ gãna nɩ taa nɩ a ba pepe yelsɩ pɔ.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: Gbɛɛ ata nɩ nyã ɩn ben tɩrɛ a yɩ piir kaa jie. Nɩtãa lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Nɩbɛ ayi bɩɩ ata dãasɩɛ ɩn yelmãɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: A lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ tɩ a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ, n dɔ̃ɔ gɔ̃ yɩ. A 'yɛr bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n chɛnɛ gɔ̃nɔ̃ yɩ ɩn ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ. Maa wa lɩɛb tɩ 'lɔ, n kʊ̃ bar a bala na dɔ̃ɔ maal a yelbier bɩɩ a bala na wa bɩɛr maal ɛ,

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: bojũu yɩn ben bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ tu a n 'yɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ. Waa bal na wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal yele jaa faa a yɩ jie ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ a yɩ pɔ.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: Bojũu yelmãɛ jaa lɛ, ban dɔ̃ɔ kpa wʊ a daa ju, wʊ bal naa, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ lɛ vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ nyɛ nyɛvʊr. Lɛ mɩ lɛ, sɩn mɩ bal naa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ jũu, sɩn ben be na sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɛɛr a yɩ mãɛ kaa ɩka yɩ ben a sɔɔfʊ pɔ? Yɩ jʊʊr a yɩ mãɛ kaa. Yaa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ben a yɩ pɔ ɛ? Ka ala ba ɩ yɩ ɩn faa ɛ!

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa sɩn ba ɩ faa ɛ.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ sɩ sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ taa maala yeldɛɛr jaa ɛ. A ta ɩ ka a nɩbɛ nyɛ fɩka sɩn ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a ɩ yɩn lɛ maala a lɛ na tor, ala ɩ gba fɩka nɩbɛ tɩɛr ɩka sɩ ɩn faa.

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal yele jaa tɩ põn a yelmãɛ bar ɛ, tɩchɛ a yelmãɛ yele tɛɛ lɛ sɩ ma maal.

english_verse: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
translation_verse: Sɩ pʊɔ pɛl naa, a sɩn na bal, tɩchɛ ka a yɩn kpɛ̃mɛ, na sɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ ta tara chɛfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ so ɩn ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, naa sɛɛrɛ a yele nyã kʊrɔ yɩ. Maa wa tɩ, ka n taa ɩrɛ wa de a n kpɛ̃ɔ tãna nɩ yɩ ɛ, a kpɛ̃ɔ a n Soro na kʊ ma, wʊ ɩka n de sʊ̃ʊn yɩ waa 'yɛr ɩka n de sɔ̃ɔn yɩ bar ɛ.

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Yɛɛr, yɩ chɩlɛ, na yɩ mʊɔrɔ chiine niem. A baaraa lɛɛ. A n sʊɔrfʊ ɩn sʊɔrɔ yɩ nɩ nyã. Yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen, na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a nʊ̃fʊ sʊɔ nɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ, na ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor puor taa nɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: From the apostle Paul and from all the Lord's followers with me. I was chosen to be an apostle by Jesus Christ and by God the Father, who raised him from death. No mere human chose or appointed me to this work. To the churches in Galatia:
translation_verse: A yɛɛr bala na be a ka a n sɛ̃, sɩ jaa lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ bala na be a Galatiya paal pɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ a be a yɩ jie.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ de a wʊ mãɛ tɩr a sɩ yelbier jũu ɩka wʊ faa sɩ a dɩna yelbier pɔ tun a lɛ na ɩ a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Wʊ nyɛrɛ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: A 'maa man nɛɛ nɩ a lɛ yɩn lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ tun a Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ pɔ, tɩ na yɩ lɛ lɩɛb turo 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ yuo.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ yuo jaa ba lɛ be be go ɛ, tɩchɛ bamɩne nyɔ̃nyɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ naa a yɩ tɩɛr na ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba nyɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb ka wʊ be wʊ yõ.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Ala sɔɔ ɩ sɩn gba lɛ, bɩɩ ka malaka lɛ wa yɩ saaju wa mʊɔl kʊ yɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ na ba tu a lɛ sɩn mʊɔl kʊ yɩ ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ wɛ naa!

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, pʊ̃pãanyã n lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ go. Ala nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa mʊɔlɔ na 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ yuo kʊrɔ yɩ, na ba tu a lɛ sɩn mʊɔl kʊ yɩ a yɩ sɔɔ ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ wɛ naa.

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Nɩsaal lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ kʊ ma sɔr bɩɩ Nãaŋmɩn? Bɩɩ nɩsaal pʊʊr lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n pɛl? Maa ta chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka n pɛlɛ nɩsaal pʊɔ, n kʊ naa ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn mʊɔl kʊ yɩ ba yi nɩsaal sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ nɩsaal pɔ lɛ n tu tɩ nyɛ wʊ ɛ, bɩɩ nɩsaal lɛ jãn ma ɛ, tɩchɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ir wiil ma.

english_verse: You know how I used to live as a Jew. I was cruel to God's church and even tried to destroy it.
translation_verse: Yɩ wõn a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ chɛnɛ puoro a Juu nɩbɛ puorfʊ, naa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir gere a bala na turo a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, naa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n sɔ̃ɔ ba bar.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ gar a Juu nɩbɛ bala ɩn 'mataa pɔl, tɩchɛ ka a ɩ ma nɩbijɩɛ nɩ a n sãakpãmɩne puorfʊ.

english_verse: to show me his Son, so I would announce his message to the Gentiles. I didn't talk this over with anyone.
translation_verse: ka wʊ ir a wʊ Bie wiil ma, ka na mʊɔl a wʊ 'yɛr a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ pɔ. N ba sʊʊr nɩrɛ jaa kaa ɛ,

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: bɩɩ do be a Jerusalɛm a bala na dɔ̃ɔ ma nie ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ n tɔ̃ɔ tor chen Arabɩya a dẽdẽe a lɛ nɛ, a lɛ puor lɛ n pãa lɩɛb chen a Damaskus.

english_verse: Three years later I went to visit Peter in Jerusalem and stayed with him for
translation_verse: Yuom ata na wa po, n pãa don be a Jerusalɛm ɩka n tɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Pita, naa jɛ̃ a be a wʊ sɛ̃ maal ber pie nɩ anũu (

english_verse: The only other apostle I saw was James, the Lord's brother.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n ba nyɛ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɛ, ka Jemesɩ na ɩ a sɩ Soro yɛbɛ tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn niem ɩka, a yele nyã ɩn sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ba ɩ jir ɛ.

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: A lɛ puor, n lɛ chen Siriya nɩ Sɩlɩsɩya paal pɔ.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: A pupuorbiir gbulsɩ bala na be a Judiya a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ba bɔ̃ɔ ma ɛ.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: A n yele tɛɛ lɛ ba wõ ɩka, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ gere sɩ, pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ mãɛ lɛ pãa mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr 'lɔ wʊn ta dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ bar,

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: na ba pɛɛ Nãaŋmɩn yuor a maa jũu.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: N don be a Jerusalɛm bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir wiil ma ɩka n tɩ man kʊ ba a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn mʊɔl kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala na ɩ a nɩdierbe tɛɛ lɛ n dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔl man a yele anyãna kʊ. A n dãbãɛ lɛ ɩka n taa wa jo pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Titusɩ gba mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ be a n sɛ̃, na waa ɩ a Juu nɩrɛ ɛ, baa fɩr wʊ ɩka wʊ ŋmaa a yʊɔr ɛ.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: A yele nyã lo naa bojũu a yɛɛr bamɩne na ɩ jir ŋmarba fʊɔl kpɛ ɩka ba tɩ jʊʊr kaa a lɛ sɩn so a sɩ mãɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka ba na maal sɩ ka sɩ ɩ gbãgbaar.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Saa sɔɔ ba bãlãa jaa ɛ, ka a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã na ɩ a yelmãɛ na be a yɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: A bala a nɩbɛ na tɩɛr ɩka bala lɛ ɩ a nɩyɔ̃ɔnsɩ, tɩchɛ a lɛ ban be maa ba nyɛ a ba tɛɛ taa ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn ba kaara nɩsaal nie tɩ tɔɔrɔ a wʊ 'yɛr ɛ. A nɩdierbe bala ba 'yɛr 'yɛr jaa lɛ pʊɔ a maa 'yɛr 'lɔ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: A Jemesɩ nɩ a Pita nɩ a Jɔɔn ban dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔn fɩka lue, ban wa nyɛ bɔ̃ɔn a wãɛfʊ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma, ba de sɩn nuur ayi nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen maa nɩ a Banabasɩ, na ba wiil ɩka sɩ tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen, na ba sɔɔ ɩka sɩ chen a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ pɔ tɩchɛ ka ba mɩ chen a bala na ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ pɔ.

english_verse: They only asked us to remember the poor, and this was something I had always been eager to do. Paul Corrects Peter at Antioch
translation_verse: Yele bʊ̃'yen ban 'yɛr kʊ sɩ lɛ ɩka sɩ tɩɛrɛ a nɔ̃n dẽme. A yele nyã nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ n mɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka n maal.

english_verse: When Peter came to Antioch, I told him face to face that he was wrong.
translation_verse: A Pita na wa tɩ wa a Antiok, n gɔ̃ wʊ̃n a nɩyɔɔ niem bojũu wʊ maal bɔr chãa pɔ.

english_verse: He used to eat with Gentile followers of the Lord, until James sent some Jewish followers. Peter was afraid of the Jews and soon stopped eating with Gentiles.
translation_verse: Sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka a nɩbɛ bamɩne yi a Jemesɩ sɛ̃ wa, 'lɔ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ma 'mantaa dire. Tɩchɛ ban wa wa baar, wʊ oon wʊ mãɛ yin a ba pɔ, bojũu wʊ joro na a bala na ɩ a yɔŋmarba dãbãɛ.

english_verse: He and the others hid their true feelings so well that even Barnabas was fooled.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ bamɩne pʊɔ wʊ naa a nɛɛr ayi yele nyãna pɔ, ka a Banabasɩ gba tɩɛr mɩ bũbur a ba yele nyãna jũu.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: Ɩn wa nyɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka baa maala a lɛ na tor nɩ a yelmãɛ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna ɛ, n 'yɛr kʊ a Pita a ba jaa niem, “A fʊ̃ʊ ɩn Juu nɩrɛ, tɩ na fʊ kpɩɛrɛ fɩka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ kaar ɛ. Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ fʊn ɩ fɩr a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka ba kpɩɛrɛ fɩka a Juu nɩbɛ?

english_verse: We are Jews by birth and are not sinners like Gentiles.
translation_verse: A sɩn ban dɔɔ ka sɩ ɩ Juu nɩbɛ, saa ɩ nɩyor na ɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ kaar ɛ.

english_verse: But we know that God accepts only those who have faith in Jesus Christ. No one can please God by simply obeying the Law. So we put our faith in Christ Jesus, and God accepted us because of our faith.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, nɩrɛ yele kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ tor wʊ̃n turo a nɛbinsɩ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ yele na tor a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wʊ̃n sɔɔ de jũu. Lɛ lɛ a sɩn mɩ gba sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka a sɩ yele tor, ka a kʊ̃ ɩ a nɛbinãa sɩn turo jũu ɛ. Ala ɩ a nɛbinãa tufʊ jũu lɛ, nɩrɛ jaa yele kʊ̃ tor Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: “Ala ɩ sɩ mʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a sɩ yele a tor a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ka a ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka a sɩn mãɛ ɩn yelbe-ɩrbɛ, ka ala be a lɛ, a Kɩrɩsɩto pʊɔrɔ naa a yelbier 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ bɩɩ? Yelmãɛ jaa, a ba ɩ lɛ lɛ ɛ!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n lɛ mɛn a bonsɩ ala ɩn sɔ̃ɔ bar, n maal a lɛ wiil ɩka n ɩn a nɛbinãa sɔ̃sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.

english_verse: It was the Law itself that killed me and freed me from its power, so I could live for God. I have been nailed to the cross with Christ.
translation_verse: Bojũu a tu naa a nɛbinãa pɔ, ka n kpi kʊ a nɛbinãa, ka a lɛ na sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n be be kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: N ba 'yɛr ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ ba ɩ ɛ, bojũu ala ɩ nɩrɛ na tʊ̃ɔn 'yɛr faa a wʊ mãɛ a nɛbinãa jũu, ka lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto kũu ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa ɛ!”

english_verse: You stupid Galatians! I told you exactly how Jesus Christ was nailed to a cross. Has someone now put an evil spell on you?
translation_verse: A yɩn Galatiya jɔlɔ dẽme. An lɛ bɛl yɩ ka a nʊ̃mɔ̃ yɩ? A yɩ nɩbir lɛ ba nyɔɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yin a nɩyɔɔ niem kpa a daa ju.

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: ) Nɩbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn gãn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr faa a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, a ba sɔɔfʊ jũu. Nãaŋmɩn den nie 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a Abraham ɩka, “A paalsɩ ba jaa na nyɛn sʊ̃ʊfʊ tu a fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: This means everyone who has faith will share in the blessings given to Abraham because of his faith.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a bala jaa na sɔɔ de na nyɛn sʊ̃ʊfʊ pʊɔ a Abraham pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a nɩrɛ na tara sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: Anyone who tries to please God by obeying the Law is under a curse. The Scriptures say, “Everyone who doesn't obey everything in the Law is under a curse.”
translation_verse: Bala jaa na dɩɛl a nɛbinãa tufʊ ben pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ, bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ turo na a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba turo a yelsɩ a jaa a nɛbinãa gãn pɔ ɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: No one can please God by obeying the Law. The Scriptures also say, “The people God accepts because of their faith will live.”
translation_verse: A ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa kʊ nyɛ faa fʊ a Nãaŋmɩn niem a nɛbinãa 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, bojũu “A nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara sɔɔfʊ tor naa, wʊn tara na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.” (Habakuk

english_verse: But Christ rescued us from the Law's curse, when he became a curse in our place. This is because the Scriptures say that anyone who is nailed to a tree is under a curse.
translation_verse: Kɩrɩsɩto faa sɩ naa a nɛbinãa pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ, na wʊ lɩɛb ɩ pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ sɩ, bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ turo na a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yɔɔl tɩɛ ju.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Wʊ faa sɩ naa ka a sʊ̃ʊfʊ ala a Abraham na nyɛ, ka a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ mɩ na nyɛ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a sɔɔfʊ jũu, ka sɩ nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nɛtɩraa.

english_verse: My friends, I will use an everyday example to explain what I mean. Once someone agrees to something, no one else can change or cancel the agreement.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, vɛ̃ ka n de man a bɩbir jaa nyɛvʊr pɔ, nɩrɛ wa faa 'yɛr 'yɛr bin baar, nɩrɛ jaa maa lɛ 'yɛr 'yɛr dɔɔl ɛ, bɩɩ ŋmaa bar ɛ. Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a nɛtɩraa.

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ Abraham nɩ a wʊ bir. A Nãaŋmɩn gãn ba 'yɛr ɩka bʊ̃bie ɛ, naa wiil fɩka biyɔɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ 'yɛr ɩka, “A fʊ bir,” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: What I am saying is that the Law cannot change or cancel God's promise made
translation_verse: Maa 'yɛr nɩ nyã ɩka a nɛbinãa na wa a yuom kɔɔr anaar dɔɔl lɩjɛr nɩ pie (

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a bonsɩ ala sɩn wa nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɩ naa a nɛbinãa tufʊ jũu lɛ, a ba lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa yele lɛ go ɛ, tɩchɛ an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ lɛ wʊ de tɩr nɛɛ kʊ a Abraham.

english_verse: What is the use of the Law? It was given later to show that we sin. But it was only supposed to last until the coming of that descendant who was given the promise. In fact, angels gave the Law to Moses, and he gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Bo lɛ so Nãaŋmɩn na wa bɩɛr tɩr a nɛbinãa? Wʊ pʊɔn 'yɔ̃ɔ ban ba sɔɔ jũu tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a Bir 'lɔ wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ na wa. A malakasɩ lɛ waan a nɛbinãa nyã, tɩchɛ Mosesɩ na ɩ a 'ma'maala lɛ be a ba chara pɔ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and the Law did not come directly from him. Slaves and Children
translation_verse: 'Ma'maala maa ara kʊ gbul bʊ̃'yen ɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ ɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ.

english_verse: Does the Law disagree with God's promises? No, it doesn't! If any law could give life to us, we could become acceptable to God by obeying that law.
translation_verse: Ka a lɛ wiil ɩka a nɛbinãa sɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn nɛtɩraa ala bar bɩɩ? Kai. Ala ɩ a nɛbinãa kʊrɔ na nɩrɛ nyɛvʊr, nɩrɛ jaa na ɩn nɩtor tu a nɛbinãa jũu.

english_verse: But the Scriptures say that sin controls everyone, so that God's promises will be for anyone who has faith in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr ɩka a yelbier nyɔ̃ɔn a wɛr nɩbɛ ba jaa pɔɔ die pɔ, ka a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ a bala na sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na nyɛ.

english_verse: The Law controlled us and kept us under its power until the time came when we would have faith.
translation_verse: Sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka a sɔɔfʊ wa wa, sɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a nɛbinãa nɩpɔɔrsɩ, naa pɔɔ sɩ tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a sɔɔfʊ na wa nyɩr.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn kʊn a nɛbinãa sɔr ka wʊ na de sɩ nie chiin a Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, ka sɩ na nyɛ faafʊ tu a sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: But once a person has learned to have faith, there is no more need to have the Law as a teacher.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a sɔɔfʊ na wa tɩ wa, saa lɛ chɛnɛ be a nɛbinãa pĩlem ka wʊ kaara sɩ ɛ.

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Yɩ jaa ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bibiir yɩn sɔɔ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu,

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: bojũu ba so yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, ka wʊ pɔɔ yɩ fɩka fɔbaa.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Ka bamɩne ba lɛ ɩ Juu nɩbɛ bɩɩ baa ɩ Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka bamɩne mɩ ɩ gbãgbaar bɩɩ ka bamɩne ɩ sumɩne ɛ, ka bamɩne ba lɛ ɩ dɔɔr bɩɩ mɩ ɩ pɔbɔ ɛ. Bojũu yɩ jaa ɩn bʊ̃'yen a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ ɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto sofʊ, yɩ pãa ɩn a Abraham bir, na yɩ pʊɔ a Abraham na di a Nãaŋmɩn nãbonsɩ ala wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Gugurbo nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme ma pire naa bie nyãna tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a sãa na 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, sɩn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a bibiir, sɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a wɛr gbãgbaar be kpãɛn bonsɩ pĩlem.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɔ̃ɔ na wa ta, Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃n a wʊ Bie ka pɔɔ dɔɔ wʊ tun a nɛbinãa pɔ,

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: ka wʊ na faa a bala na be a nɛbinãa pĩlem, ka sɩ tara sɔr ɩ a wʊ bibiir.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Yɩn ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir jũu, Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃n a wʊ Bie Sɩɛ ka wʊ wa kpɛ a sɩ nyãn pɔ a sɩ ma bʊɔlɔ wʊ, sɩ Sãa.

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yaa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ gbãgbaar ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ɩn a wʊ bibiir. Yɩn ɩ a wʊ bibiir baar, yɩ ɩn a wʊ bʊ̃dirbe.

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: A kõro yɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, yɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ gbãgbaar kʊ a tɩbɛ ala yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: But now you know God, or better still, God knows you. How can you turn back and become the slaves of those weak and pitiful powers?
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩn bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn bɩɩ Nãaŋmɩn na wa bɔ̃ɔ yɩ baar, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a lɛ ɩ ka yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a bonsɩ ala na bal ka a ba turfʊ ɩ pʊ̃sɔ̃ɔ? Yɩ chɛnɛ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ lɛ ɩ a ba gbãgbaar bɩɩ?

english_verse: I am afraid I have wasted my time working with you.
translation_verse: Dãbãɛ kpɛ ma naa, ka n tɩɛr ɩka a maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn tʊ̃ a yɩ pɔ ɩn pɔrɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa, yɩ be a lɛ ɩn be, bojũu n mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be a lɛ yɩn be. Yaa maal ma yelbier jaa ɛ.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa an ɩ baal jũu lɛ so ka n dɔ̃ɔ nie mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: A maa baal gba na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ bɛɛr kaa kʊ yɩ tɩchɛ yaa tɔr ma bar ɛ, yɩ sɔɔn de ma Nãaŋmɩn malaka kaar, fɩka Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Bo lɛ ɩ a yɩ chɩlfʊ? Ɩn tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr yelmãɛ ɩka ala ɩ yɩn taa tʊ̃ɔ maal a lɛ, yɩn taa loor a yɩ nɩbie kʊ ma.

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã n ɩn a yɩ dɔ̃sʊɔ ɩn 'yɛr a yelmãɛ kʊ yɩ bɩɩ?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ wa a ba sɛ̃, a ba tɩɛr ba vɩɛl ɛ. A lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ lɛ ɩka yɩ ŋmaa yi na yɩ ɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ kʊ ba.

english_verse: It is always good to give your attention to something worthwhile, even when I am not with you.
translation_verse: A vɩɛl na ɩka yɩ tara sʊ̃ʊfʊ sɔ̃ɔ, ala ɩ a lɛ yɩn tɩɛr vɩɛlɛ na, na yɩ ma maala a lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, tɩchɛ ata ɩ fɩka maa wa be a yɩ sɛ̃ tɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My children, I am in terrible pain until Christ may be seen living in you.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, a yɩ yele wõnõ ma naa fɩka pɔɔ na dɔɔrɔ bie kaar, tɩ ta a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn be a lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na be.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: N ta bʊɔrɔ naa fɩka n be a yɩ sɛ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã naa ta lɩɛb a n kɔkɔr bojũu a yɩ yele wõnõ ma naa.

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, Abraham tara na bibiir ayi, a gbãgbaa pɔɔ lɛ dɔɔ a ãsʊɔ, ka a sumɩne mɩ dɔɔ a ãsʊɔ.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: A bie 'lɔ na ɩ a gbãgbaa pɔɔ bie, ba dɔɔ wʊn tu a lɛ nɩsaal na guor, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ mɩ na ɩ a sumɩne bie, ba dɔɔ wʊn tun a Nãaŋmɩn nɛtɩraa pɔ.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Sɩn tʊ̃ɔ de a pɔbɔ banyãna ayi man nɛtɩrsɩ ayi. Haga lɛ dɔɔ a gbãgbaa bibiir. 'Lɔ lɛ ara kʊ a nɛtɩraa 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal a Sinai Tɔ̃ɔ ju.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Haga ara na kʊ a Sinai Tɔ̃ɔ na be a Arabɩya fɩka a dɩna Jerusalɛm, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ dɔɔ a wʊ bibiir ka ba ɩ a nɛbinãa gbãgbaar.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Jerusalɛm 'lɔ na be a saaju son wʊ mãɛ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩ ma.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Tara pʊpɛl, a fʊ̃ʊ pɔɔ abbaa, na ba dɔɔ bibiir ɛ. Yiele ŋmiere nɩ chɛlsɩ, fʊ̃ʊ nyã na ba wõ bie dɔɔfʊ tuo ɛ. A pɔɔ nyã na ba dɔ̃ɔ dɔɔ ɛ, bojũu a wʊ bibiir waan gar a pɔɔ 'lɔ na kul sɩrɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩn a n yɛɛr, yɩ kaara fɩka a Isaakɩ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛtɩraa bibiir.

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban dɔɔ a bie 'lɔ a ãgãn pɔ, wʊ ge naa a bie 'lɔ ban dɔɔn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ. Lɛ mɩ lɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr? “Dii a gbãgbapɔɔ nɩ a wʊ bie bar, bojũu a bie 'lɔ na ɩ a gbãgbapɔɔ bie kʊ 'mataa din a Nãaŋmɩn nãbonsɩ nɩ a bie 'lɔ a sumɩne na dɔɔ ɛ.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n yɛɛr, saa ɩ a gbãgbaa pɔɔ bibiir ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ ɩn a pɔɔ sumɩne bibiir.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: A Kɩrɩsɩto faa sɩ naa, ala lɛ so ka sɩ so sɩ mãɛ. A lɛ jũu, yɩ pãa ara kpɛ̃ɔ na yɩ ta lɛ de yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ gbãgbaa tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a n 'yɛrbie jãnɛ. Maa Pɔɔl lɛ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka ala ɩ yɩ ŋman a yɩ yɔɩ, a Kɩrɩsɩto kʊ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: A yɩn bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ nyɛ faafʊ tu a nɛbinãa 'yɔ̃ɔ, ŋmaan yi a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩ ŋmaan yi a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɔɔfʊ jũu, sɩ chɩlɛ na nɩbijɩɛ ɩka sɩn nyɛn a Sɩɛ tɩɛrtɔ jie yeltorsɩ.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka nɩrɛ ŋmaan yʊɔr bɩɩ ka waa ŋmaa yʊɔr ɛ, a ba wiil yele jaa ɛ. A yele 'lɔ na fɛr lɛ ɩka sɔɔfʊ na wile wʊ mãɛ tun nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Yɩ dɔ̃ɔ joro jovɩla, an lɛ ŋmaa yɩ sɔr ɩka yɩ ta sɔɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: A sʊɔrfʊ nyã bʊrɔ ba yi a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Fɩka dãbɩl bãlãa na ma vɛ̃ ka jɔ̃ vʊ̃, lɛ lɛ yele jaa pʊʊr bile ma sɔ̃ɔ yelyɔɔ.

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: N tara na sɔɔfʊ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩ kʊ tɩɛr tɩɛr yuo ɛ. A nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na vɛ̃ ka a yɩ tɩɛr va vire na nyɛn gefʊ.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ba kʊ̃ ge ma ɛ, ala ɩ n 'yɛr yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ 'yɛr. A lɛ wiil ɩka a Yesu daa suur difʊ baar naa.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Ɩn naa bʊɔrɔ na ɩka a bala na ba vɛ̃ ka a yɩ tɩɛr gãna jibʊ̃'yen nɩ a ba yʊɔr ŋmaafʊ yele ɛ, ba ŋme a ba mãɛ lãma.

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Yɩn a n yɛɛr Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl ka yɩ so yɩ mãɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ta de a yɩ mãɛ sofʊ nyãna maala nɩ yelbier ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ de a mãɛ sofʊ nyã, na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ taa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ a jaa, ba den sɛb 'yɛrbibʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, “Nʊ̃ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ a fʊ mãɛ kaar.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Yɩn maa wa sɔɔ dʊ̃nɔ̃ taa na yɩ ɔɔrɔ taa, yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, na yɩ taa sɔ̃ɔ taar ɛ.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ben a yɩ pɔ, yaa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ a nɛbinãa gbãgbaar ɛ.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: A ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ ma gãn chãa pɔ, ala lɛ a anyãna sɛ̃fʊ, nɩ dɛɛr maalfʊ, nɩ jɔl dãɛn,

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: nɩ tɩbɛ puorfʊ, nɩ sɔyele, nɩ 'laarfʊ, nɩ nɛchɩrɛ, nɩ nyuur, nɩ suur, nɩ mãɛ 'mɔɔfʊ, nɩ ootaa,

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: nɩ nyuur, nɩ dãa buufʊ, nɩ dãnyugbulo, nɩ a ala na nyɛtãan a anyãna. N kpãana yɩ naa nɩtãa a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ de nie kpãa yɩ ɩka, a bala na maala a anyãna, kʊ̃ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: nɩ jomm ɩfʊ, nɩ mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ. Nɛɛ jaa ba be be gar a anyãna ɛ.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: A bala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ kpan a ba ãgãn nɩ a wʊ vɔlaa a daa ju.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ lɛ 'mataa kpɩɛrɛ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩn nɩ a 'lɔ 'mataa chiine.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka sɩ wile sɩ mãɛ na sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa suur, tara taa nɩ nyuur ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ala ɩ ãsʊɔ wa maal yelbier bɔr a sɔɔfʊ sɔr pɔ, fʊ̃ʊ nyã na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ, tɔɔ wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɔr pɔ nɩ mãɛ siirfʊ. Tɩchɛ gu a fʊ mãɛ na fʊ mɩ taa lo a bɛɛr kaa pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Yɩ tuoro taa a yelwõnsɩ. Yɩn wa ɩrɛ a lɛ, yɩ turo naa a Kɩrɩsɩto nɛɛ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa tɩɛr ɩka wʊ ɩn bon kɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn ba ɩ bon jaa ɛ, wʊ mãɛ lɛ wʊ bɛlɛ.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ma bɛɛr a wʊ mãɛ tʊ̃mɔ̃ kaa tɩ na wʊ pãa chɩɛrɛ a nyãa na wʊ ta de a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ mana nɩ a wʊ taaba tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Bojũu ãsʊɔ na ma tuon a wʊ mãɛ tuor.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: A bala ban wiil, ba mɩ põ a ba bʊ̃tarsɩ kʊ a bala na wile ba.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta bɛlɛ yɩ mãɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ la Nãaŋmɩn ɛ. A bon 'lɔ fʊn bʊr, 'lɔ lɛ fʊn ŋma.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ nyã na bʊr a ala na ɩ a ãgãn vɔlaa, fʊn ŋman bʊ̃dɛbɛ. Ala ɩ fʊ bʊr a ala na pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pʊɔ, na tun a Sɩɛ pɔ ŋma nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka sɩ bal nɩ vɩla maalfʊ ɛ, bojũu sɩn ŋma naa a ŋmafʊ sɔ̃ɔ, sɩn baa wa tɛɛ bar ɛ.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩn wa nyɛ vuo, yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ de maal vɩla kʊ nɩrɛ jaa, na sɩ mɔ̃ maal yɔɔ jaa kʊ a bala na be a sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Maa wa sɛɛrɛ nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu, nyɛ lɛ a sɛbie na ma ɩ a bɛrɛ jã.

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: A bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba wile a ba mãɛ a ãgãn pɔ, bala lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba fɩr yɩ ka yɩ ŋma a yɔɩ. A yele 'lɔ yɔɔ ban ɩrɛ a lɛ, baa bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba nyɛ gefʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto daa jũu ɛ.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: A bala gba mɩ na ŋma a yɔɩ ba turo a nɛbinãa ɛ, tɩchɛ ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩn yɩ ŋma a yɩ yɔɩ ka ba na chɩɛrɛ nyãa ɩka bala lɛ ŋma yɩ.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: N taa ɩrɛ wa chɩɛrɛ nyãa bon jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ ka ala ba wa ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto daa ba lɛ ɛ. A lɛ jũu lɛ so, ka a wɛr nyã ju ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ ma ɛ, ka mɩ ba ɩ bon jaa kʊ a wɛr ɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ŋmaan yʊɔr bɩɩ ka 'lɔ ba ŋmaa yʊɔr ɛ, a ba wiil yele jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a lɛ na sɛɛ lɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ nyɛ dɔɔ paalaa.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: A bala jaa na turo a sɔr nyãna, nyã'maar nɩ nɩbaal kaafʊ wʊ be a ba sɛ̃. Ba la lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kaa ir.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: An yi a pʊ̃pãanyã chiine, nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ta lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma yele go ɛ, bojũu a Yesu fɛlsɩ ben a n ãgãn pɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ka a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ, a be a yɩ sɩɩr pɔ. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn na sɔɔ ka n ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a yɩn na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ be a Efesus na yɩ sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Pɛɛfʊ wʊ ta a Nãaŋmɩn, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa. Wʊn de a Sɩɛ yelsʊ̃n a jaa na be a saaju na wʊ sʊ̃ʊn sɩ, sɩn be a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Bojũu wʊ dɔ̃ɔ ir sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, tɩ na wʊ wa maal a wɛr ka sɩ na ɩ chɛchɛ na sɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ a wʊ niem ɛ, a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ jũu.

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn den nie ir sɩ ka sɩ ɩ a wʊ bibiir tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. A ɩ naa a wʊ bɔfʊ naa pɛl a wʊ pʊɔ.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so a sɩ pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn maal vɩla kpɛ̃ɛ nyã wʊn maal sɩ na wʊ kʊ sɩ a wʊ Binʊ̃nãa.

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Wʊ maal sɩn vɩla tɩ põn bar, na wʊ kʊ sɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ yɛ̃ a jaa.

english_verse: and by what Christ has done, God has shown us his own mysterious ways.
translation_verse: An ɩ wʊ vɛ̃n ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɔɔlaa na be a wʊ tɩɛr pɔ, a ala wʊn bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Ka a ɩ sɩrɛ ɩka, wʊn kaal a bonsɩ a jaa na be a saaju nɩ ala na be ka a tẽe lɔ̃ɔ taa ka a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ bʊ̃'yen kaara ba, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: God always does what he plans, and this is why he appointed Christ to choose us.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir sɩ, wʊ kãan ir sɩ a lɛ na ɩ a wʊ pʊtɩɛr na wʊn maal yele a jaa ka a ɩ a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: A ɩ naa lɛ, ka a sɩn na ɩ a nɩdɔ̃ɔ na tara a Yesu a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie ka ban pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: A yɩn mɩ dɔ̃ɔ pʊɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ yɩn wõ a yelmãɛ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ, a 'yɛr nyã na ɩ a yɩ faafʊ 'yɛr. Yɩn wa sɔɔ de wʊ, Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ jãnɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: A Sɩɛ nyã lɛ ɩ a tɛlma ɩka sɩn nyɛ naa ala Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ na wʊ faa a bala na ɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ a sɩ pɛɛrɛ wʊ.

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: A nyã jũu lɛ so, maa na wõ a yɩ yele a lɛ yɩn sɔɔ de a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ a lɛ yɩn nʊ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: N ma dãna na Nãaŋmɩn a yɩ jũu, naa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Naa chɛnɛ sʊɔrɔ a tɩɩr Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na turo a wʊ nɛɛ ɩka wʊ kʊ yɩ a Sɩɛ yɛ̃, na wʊ wiil yɩ a wʊ mãɛ yelwiilsɩ, ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ wʊ jaa chɛchɛ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka wʊ chɩlʊ̃ a yɩ tɩɛr, ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a tɩɛrtɔ 'lɔ jũu wʊn bʊɔl yɩ, ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara baal ɛ, tɩ na yɩn tɩ de a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nãbomo wʊn tɩr nɛɛ kʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ.

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: A wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ na gar a jaa kʊ a sɩn na sɔɔ de wʊ, a kpɛ̃ɔ nyãna lɛ wʊ tʊ̃n a kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ wʊ de sãɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka wʊ jãnɛ a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie be a saaju.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Wʊ gar a tʊ̃ɔfʊ a jaa, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a sɩgãdaar ba jaa, nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa, a ba ɩ a bala na be be a dɩna tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ a bala na wa be be daar kɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn den a bomo a jaa bin a wʊ gbɛɛ pĩlem, na wʊ ir wʊ ka wʊ ɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ba jaa ju,

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: na ɩ a wʊ ãgãn, ka ba sɛɛn wʊ jaa, 'lɔ lɛ sɛɛ ba jaa, a jiir a jaa.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Yɩn 'lɔ, yɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpi be a yɩ maal dɛbɛ nɩ a yɩ yeldɛbɛ pɔ,

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: ala pɔ lɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ be, na yɩ turo a wɛr nyã sɔɩ nɩ a 'lɔ na di a sɛsɛbɛ nãa Satan. A sɩɛ nyã lɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a bawõnsɩ pɔ.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Sɩ jaa mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be a lɛ a ba kaar maala a lɛ a ãgãn na bʊɔrɔ, na sɩ turo a sɩ tɩɛr nɩ a ãgãn vɔlaa. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn suur mɩ dire nɩ sɩ a ba kaar.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: Wʊ maal sɩn ka sɩ 'mataa ir a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ an ɩ sɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpi a yeldɛbɛ pɔ, a wʊ wãɛfʊ lɛ wʊ faan sɩ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn 'mantaa sãɩn sɩ nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto ka sɩ 'mataa jãnɛ nɩ wʊ be a saaju.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: A ɩ naa nɩtɔ̃ ɩka a ber ala na waara ka wʊ na wiil sɩ a wʊ wãɛfʊ na bɛr ma nɩ a wʊ maal vɩla a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wʊ wãɛfʊ lɛ so yɩn nyɛ faafʊ tu a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, a ba yi a yɩ mãɛ sɛ̃ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ lɛ.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ yɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ka ãsʊɔ na chɛ nyãa ɛ.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Sɩ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn nũu bʊ̃maalsɩ wʊn mɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃sʊ̃n ala wʊn de nie chɔɔr bar ka sɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ tɩɛr kaa a kõro a yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka a Juu nɩbɛ bʊɔlɔ yɩ a, yɔrwʊʊr dẽme, tɩ bʊɔlɔ a ba mãɛ a yɔrŋmaar dẽme, na ɩ a ãgãn nyã tɛɛ yele.

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩka yaa bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto ɛ, ka yɩn yaa mɩ pʊɔ a Isɩral nɩbɛ pɔ ɛ, na yaa pʊɔ a nɛtɩrsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ. Yaa tara tɩɛrtɔ jie ɛ, na yaa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Yɩn bala na dɔ̃ɔ jãa tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩ wa gbʊr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ jãɩ jũu.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Bojũu, a Yesu mãɛ lɛ ɩ a sɩ nyã'maar, na wʊ maal a nɩbʊrsɩ ayi ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen, na wʊ ŋmɛr a dachin 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ var a sɩ ɩ a dɔ̃dẽme.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ nɛbinãa tara na chire yɔɔ, tɩchɛ Kɩrɩsɩto kũu sɔ̃ɔn a jaa. A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka a Juu nɩbɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɩ nɩpaalaa bʊ̃'yen, lɛ lɛ wʊ maal a nyã'maar.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Wʊ 'maal Nãaŋmɩn kʊ ba ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen. A kũu wʊn kpi a daa ju lɛ wʊ de kʊn a ba 'laar taa.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Wʊ wa mʊɔl naa a nyã'maar 'yɛr kʊ yɩn bala na jãa nɩ a bala na gbʊr.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Bojũu a tu naa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka sɩ tara sɔr na ta a Sãa sɛ̃ nɩ a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yaa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ sãanba nɩ nɩyʊɔrsɩ go ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ lɔ̃ɔn tẽe na yɩ ɩ a wʊ yir dẽme.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Ba mɩ mɛn dɔɔl a dachin par kparaa na ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ nɩ a 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, ka a Yesu ɩ a sãlsɔɔ wɛɛ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a yir wʊ jaa choo taa na wʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir chɛchɛ 'lɔ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ jaa ɩ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊɔr, ka wʊ mɩ mɛ yɩ 'matãan a yir nyã pɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kpɩɛrɛ.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ yɩ wõ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊn kʊ ma a tʊ̃mɔ̃ nyãna a yɩ jũu.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: A yelsɔɔlaa nyã lɛ wʊ wiil ma ka n bɔ̃ɔ naa de nie sɛb a ŋmaa kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Yɩn wa kar a ala, yɩn pãa bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ ɩn bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto yelsɔɔlaa ala nɩrɛ na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a kõr dẽme bɔ̃ɔ a anyãna ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ wiil kʊ a wʊ nɩtʊ̃nsɩ chɛchɛsɩ nɩ a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ chɛchɛsɩ tu a wʊ Sɩɛ pɔ.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: A yelsɔɔlaa nɩ nyã ɩka a tu naa a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã pɔ, ka a yɩn na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, nɩ a Isɩral nɩbɛ na lɔ̃ɔn ŋmabʊ̃'yen, na ba 'mataa a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ, ka ban 'mataa põ a nɛɛ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: N lɩɛb a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ tu a kʊfʊ nyã a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ na wʊ kʊ ma tu a wʊ tʊ̃kpãɛn pɔ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: An ɩ maa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa bɩr baaraa tɩchɛ ka a wãɛfʊ nyã kʊ ma sɔr ɩka n mʊɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ ɛ,

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: ka n vɛ̃ ka a yelsɔɔlaa nyã chaar kʊ nɩrɛ jaa an ɩ a dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔl a kõr jaa a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ na maal a bonsɩ a jaa.

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: A wʊ bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka a pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ tu a pupuorbiir pɔ wiil a wʊ yɛ̃ ka a tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme na be a saaju bɔ̃ɔn.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ wʊ tɩɛr a kõr jaa na wʊ wa de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a sɩ Soro na wʊ maal a wɛr.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn sɔɔ de wʊ jũu, sɔr gãn kʊ sɩ a sɩn 'la chen a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka yɩ ãgãn sal ɩn dire dɔɔyɛ a yɩ jũu ɛ, a ɩ naa a yɩ tɩɩr yele lɛ.

english_verse: I kneel in prayer to the Father.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ n ma de gbur dumo a Sãa niem.

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ a balsɩ ba jaa Sãa, a bala na be a saaju nɩ a ba nyã na be ka a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ wʊ naa ɩka a yi a wʊ tɩɩr pɔ, ka wʊ de a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ ãkpãɛn, a yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ a ãgãn pʊɔm,

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: ka a Kɩrɩsɩto kpɩɛrɛ a yɩ nyãa pɔ, yɩn sɔɔ de wʊ jũu. A n sʊɔrfʊ lɛ ɩka, yɩ ba nyɩbɛ ara jaa chãchã a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: a yɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na 'mataa nyɛ a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto nʊ̃fʊ na yalʊ̃, nɩ a wʊ wõo, nɩ a dofʊ, nɩ a lɛ wʊn suu a pĩlem,

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a nʊ̃fʊ na gar a bɔ̃ɔfʊsɩ a jaa, a yɩ pãa be a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na be.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: 'lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr a pupuorbiir pɔ, nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so a maa ban pɔɔ a die pɔ a sɩ Soro jũu kpãkpãana yɩ ɩka, yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ vɩɛlɛ nyɛtãan lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl yɩ.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ na yɩ bal yɩ mãɛ, na yɩ tara kãnyir, na yɩ diere taa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen ɩfʊ 'lɔ pɔ, a yɩ tara taa nɩ nyã'maar.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Soro bʊ̃'yen lɛ be be, sɔɔfʊ bʊ̃'yen nɩ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ, na wʊ ɩ a sɩ jaa Sãa, na wʊ kaara nɩrɛ jaa, na wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba jaa jie, na wʊ be a ba jaa pɔ.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɩ ãsʊɔ jaa nyɛn a wãɛfʊ kʊfʊ dẽdẽme nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na põ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ so an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ naa 'yɛr, “A lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ do, a wʊ sãma dẽme wʊn nyɔɔr turo wʊ naa, ka wʊ de bomo kʊ nɩbɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: A dofʊ par nɩ bo? Wʊ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ de nie suu a tẽe pɔ.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na suu, 'lɔ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ do gar a saaju wʊ jaa, na wʊ sɛɛ a bonsɩ a jaa.

english_verse: so his people would learn to serve and his body would grow strong.
translation_verse: Wʊ maal a nɩtɔ̃ ɩka wʊ chɔɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ gun a tʊ̃mɔ̃, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn na tʊ̃ɔ mɛ.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩ jaa na ɩ bʊ̃'yen a sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, na sɩ baa tɩ ta a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na be.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ pãa chɛnɛ ɩ nɩtãa bibiir vavire yʊɔrɔ kɔ̃sɛbɛ kaar ɛ. Na sɩ ma dãdaal chen a puor nɩ a niem wiilfʊ jaa bʊrɔ nɩbɛ na de a ba yɛ̃ na ba bɛlɛ nɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ na yelmãɛ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na sɩn nʊ̃ɔn a yele a jaa pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a ju na ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a ãgãn wʊ jaa choofʊ jiir choo taa, naa tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, ka ãsʊɔ jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: A ba tɩɛr lĩi naa ka baa pʊɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nyɛvʊr pɔ ɛ, bojũu a ba ba bɔ̃ɔfʊ yin a ba nyãkpãɛn ban tara.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ ɩka yɩn wõ a wʊ 'yɛr, ba wiil yɩ naa a yelmãɛ na be a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Ba wiil yɩ naa a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ maala ɩka, yɩ yaa a kõr maalfʊ 'lɔ bar na bɛl yɩ nɩ a wʊ vɔlaa,

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: tɩ na yɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa a yɩ befʊ nɩ a yɩ tɩɛr pɔ.

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
