translation_verse: Yɩ de a be paalaa 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na maal a wʊ kaar na yɩ su, a ɩ naa yelmãɛ torfʊ nɩ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ bar jir ŋmaafʊ tɩ 'yɛrɛ yelmãɛ kʊrɔ a wʊ taaba, bojũu sɩ jaa ben a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ,

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: “Fʊ̃ʊ wa nyɛ suur taa maal dɛɛr ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa yuoro sɔr kʊrɔ a Satan a wʊ bɛl yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ juro, wʊ ta ma lɛ juro ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala na tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a wʊ nuur na wʊ nyɛ bʊ̃kɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ ir sʊ̃ʊn a nɔ̃n dẽme.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a 'yɛr sɔ̃ɔnsɩ yire a yɩ nɛɛr pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ 'yɛrsɩ ala na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ taaba ãkpãɛn ala ɩ yele kɔ̃ɔ fɛr ba naa, naa mɩ ɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ kʊ a bala na chɛlɛ.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Na yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, 'lɔ wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ a jãnɛ gun a faafʊ bɩbir.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Yɩ ir putuo, pʊɔm 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ suur, tãn taa, nɩ tʊfʊ, nɩ 'laarfʊ 'yɛrbie.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Yɩ maala vɩla na yɩ kaara taa nɩbaal, na yɩ vɛ̃nɛ kʊrɔ taa nɩtãa lɛ Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃ kʊ yɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɔɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn an ɩ yɩ ɩ naa a wʊ binʊ̃nsɩ,

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩ pɔ, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka ba wa pʊr sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, bɩɩ folaa ɩfʊ, bɩɩ bɔgarfʊ ɛ, bojũu a anyãna ba sɛɛn a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ chɛchɛsɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa lɛ 'yɛrɛ vã 'yɛrbie ɛ, bɩɩ jɔl 'yɛr, bɩɩ jɔl dãɛn ɛ, ala po naa, tɩchɛ yɩ dãna Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a anyãna sɩrɛ jaa ɩka nɩrɛ na sɛ̃nɛ, nɩfolaa, bɔgar sʊɔ, wʊ ɩ naa nɩrɛ na puoro tɩbɛ, na wʊ kʊ̃ nyɛ jie be a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa bɛl yɩ nɩ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ ɛ, bojũu anyãna lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn su tuo waara a bawõnsɩ jie.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu yɩ taa mara ba ɛ.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ libe, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ ɩ naa chãa a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ. Yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩtãa a chãa bibiir.

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: A chãa wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɩ naa vɩla maalfʊ, yeltorsɩ nɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ jãn a ala na pɛlɛ a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Na yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa pʊɔrɔ a libe tʊ̃mɔ̃ na ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ yin naa chãa pɔ.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Bojũu a gba ma ɩrɛ na vã a ala a bawõnsɩ na ma maala a libe pɔ manfʊ.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bon jaa wa yi chãa pɔ, fʊ ma nyɛn wʊn chaar.

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: Bojũu chãa lɛ ma vɛ̃ ka fʊ nyɛ bon jaa chɛchɛ. Ala lɛ so a ba 'yɛr, “A fʊ̃ʊ gʊ̃ɔ sʊɔ, jɛɔ ir a kũu pɔ, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto chaar 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ.”

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ a lɛ yɩn kpɩɛrɛ, ka a ta ɩ jɔl kpɛfʊ tɩchɛ ka a ɩ yɛ̃ kpɛfʊ.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta ɩ jɔlɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a ala a sɩ Soro na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta nyũ dãa buu ɛ, an sɔ̃ɔ yɩn ju, tɩ yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛɛ yɩ.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Na yɩ yiele a Nãaŋmɩn yiel nɩ a ala na ɩ a Sɩɛ yiel kʊrɔ taa, na yɩ yiele dãnfʊ yiel nɩ a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa kʊrɔ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Yɩ ma dãna a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yele a jaa pɔ, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor.

english_verse: Honor Christ and put others first.
translation_verse: Yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ taa a Kɩrɩsɩto yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jũu.

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Bojũu an ɩ a sɩrɛ lɛ ɩ a pɔɔ ju, nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a pupuorbiir ju, na ɩ a wʊ ãgãn na wʊ ɩ a Fafaara.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na nʊ̃ a pupuorbiir na wʊ de a wʊ mãɛ kʊ ba,

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: wʊ maal ban a lɛ ka ban ɩ chɛchɛ, na wʊ de kʊ̃ɔ pɛɛn ba ka ba vɩɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Wʊ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ de a pupuorbiir banyã na vɩɛlɛ kʊ a wʊ mãɛ, na waa tara jãnɛ ɛ, 'mabfʊ jie ɛ, bɩɩ dɛɛr jie jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a ba ɩ chɛchɛ ba tara yele jaa ɛ.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a yɩn sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn nʊ̃ a yɩ mãɛ ãgãma. A 'lɔ na nʊ̃ a wʊ pɔɔ nʊ̃n a wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa ba be na 'laar a wʊ mãɛ ãgãn ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma kʊrɔ wʊn bʊ̃diir na wʊ kaara wʊ, lɛ lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto kaara a pupuorbiir.

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ ɩ naa a wʊ ãgãn jiir,

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: “A lɛ jũu, daba na bar a wʊ sãa nɩ a wʊ ma, tɩchɛ ka 'lɔ nɩ a wʊ pɔɔ ɩ bʊ̃'yen, ka ba jaa ayi ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: A anyã ɩ naa a 'yɛr sɔɔlaa, tɩchɛ maa 'yɛrɛ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a pupuorbiir 'yɛr.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: A yɩn mɩ gba, ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma nʊ̃ a wʊ pɔɔ nɩtãa lɛ wʊn nʊ̃ a wʊ mãɛ, ka a pɔɔ mɩ ma 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ sɩrɛ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Bibiir, yɩn be a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩ wõnõ a yɩ dɔɔrbɔ toor, a lɛ lɛ tor.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Sãamɩne yɩ taa maala a yɩ bibiir ka ba nyɛrɛ suur ɛ, tɩ yɩ guolo ba, na yɩ jãna ba, wile nɩ ba a ala na yi a sɩ Soro sɛ̃.

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Gbãgbaar yɩ wõnõ a yɩ sorbo toor na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba tɩ joro ba nɩ a yɩ pʊpɛl nɩtãa lɛ yɩn wõnõ a Kɩrɩsɩto toor.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Yɩ wõnõ a ba toor ka a ta ɩ ban fur nɩbir 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ yɩn ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaar na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ pʊpɛl fɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu yɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ, a ta ɩ nɩsaal lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro na yab ãsʊɔ jaa lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ a vɩla jã, ka gbãgbaa lɛ wʊ ɩ bɩɩ waa ɩ gbãgbaa ɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: A yɩn sorbo, yɩ mɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ kʊrɔ a yɩ gbãgbaar. Yɩ ta pirpire ba ɛ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a 'lɔ na ɩ a ba Soro mɩ lɛ ɩ a yɩ Soro na wʊ be a saaju, 'lɔ lɛ ba turo nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: A baaraa lɛ ɩka yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a wʊ tʊ̃ɔfʊ kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Yɩ de a Nãaŋmɩn tãjɛbonsɩ a jaa su na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ara jɛb a tɩɩ nɛbɛr.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Bojũu a ba ɩ sɩn nɩ nɩsaal lɛ jɛɛrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ jɛɛrɛ nɩ naa a sɩɩr tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a wɛr nyã libe kpãɛn dẽme, nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ ala na be a saaju.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ de a Nãaŋmɩn tãjɛbonsɩ a jaa su, ka a bɩbir bier 'lɔ wa vɩɛ, ka yɩ ba gbɛr, na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ jɛb a jɛɛr baar tɩ na yɩ chɛnɛ ara.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Yɩ pãa ara kpɛ̃ɔ, na yɩ de a yelmãɛ ka wʊ ɩ a sɩɛ gãn a yɩ sɛ, na yɩ de torfʊ ka wʊ ɩ a nyãa wɩɛ,

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: na yɩ 'mi'mine a nyã'maar 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a ɩ a yɩ gbɛɛ nafɔɔr.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na pʊɔ a jaa pɔ nɩ nyã ɩka, yɩ de a yɩ bʊ̃piiraa na ɩ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ de kpĩin a dɛɛr sʊɔ pĩme na 'lɩrɛ.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Yɩ de a kur jupil su, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yɩ faafʊ, nɩ a sɔkpɛ̃ɛ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃, na wʊ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Na yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn lɛ a wʊ Sɩɛ na wiil yɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, nɩ sʊɔrfʊ jaa bʊrɔ. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir jʊrɔ na yɩ sʊɔrɔ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma, ka maa wa haara a nɛɛ, ka Nãaŋmɩn kʊ ma a wʊ 'yɛrbie ka n taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ na n 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã yelsɔɔlaa.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: A Yesu 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã ɩn ara kʊ jũu lɛ so, ka ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ. Yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma ka n taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ na sɛɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩn na ɩ a yɛɛr sɛ̃, nɩ nʊ̃fʊ lɔ̃ɔn sɔɔfʊ na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ wʊ be a bala jaa na nʊ̃ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ na ba baaraa ɛ.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl nɩ Timoti na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ be a Filipai, lɔ̃ɔn a pupuorbiir nɩdierbe nɩ a sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: N ma puor a n Nãaŋmɩn yãan, maa wa tɩɛr yɩ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: N ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn nɩ pʊpɛl kʊrɔ a yɩ jaa a n Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ,

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: bojũu yɩ mɩ pʊɔ man mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir tɔtaa a bɩbir dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, tɩ tãn a pʊ̃pãanyã.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: A nɩtɔ̃ jũu, n tara na sɔɔfʊ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na piel a tʊ̃vɩla a yɩ pɔ, na kãan ka a tɩ baar a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: A tara na sɔr ɩka n tɩɛr a nɩtɔ̃ a yɩ jaa jũu, ɩn tara a yɩ tɩɛr jũu, ka ba lũ man nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ bɩɩ, baa lũ ma ɛ, n chɛnɛ na mana a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩka a ɩn yelmãɛ, yɩ jaa lɔ̃ɔ põn ma a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a n dãasɩɛ sʊɔ a lɛ ɩn tara a yɩ tɩɛr fɩka a lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na tara a yɩ tɩɛr.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Maa Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ nɩ nyã ɩka, a yɩ nʊ̃ taa wʊ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ jaa, nɩ yɛ̃ nɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: Yɩn wa ɩrɛ a lɛ, an sʊ̃ʊ yɩ na ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ bon 'lɔ na ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃, ka a Kɩrɩsɩto waa bɩbir, ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ tɩ na yɩ ta tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ,

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: na yɩn sɛɛn yeltorsɩ wɔ̃mɔ̃ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ, ka nɩbɛ pɛɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka a lɛ na ɩ a n sɛ̃, sʊ̃ʊ ma naa ka n mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: A lɛ na ɩ jũu, a chaar kʊ a bala na guro a nãa yir nɩ nɩrɛ jaa ɩka, ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma naa a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: A ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka, nɩbɛ bamɩne mʊɔlɔ na a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yele ban tara nɩ ma nyuur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ jũu, tɩchɛ bamɩne 'lɔ, mʊɔlɔ na a Kɩrɩsɩto yele na sʊ̃ʊn ma.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Banyãna lɛ mʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto yele yin nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, na ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka ba pɔɔ ma naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir mʊɔlfʊ jũu.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: A bala ɩn de nie 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr na mʊɔl a 'yɛr nɩ nyuur, maal a lɛ ɩka a n dɔɔyɛ wʊ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ an ɩ? A lɛ na ɩ nɩbijɩɛ lɛ ɩka ba mʊɔl a Yesu yele sɔr jaa pɔ, ka ba sɔɔn ɩka yelmãɛ lɛ bɩɩ, jire lɛ bɩɩ, a nɩtɔ̃ vɛ̃ naa ka n pʊɔ pɛl. Yelmãɛ jaa ɩn chɛnɛ na tara pʊpɛl.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka tu a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sɩɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ jũu, a lɛ na ɩ a n sɛ̃ ɩn nyɛn faafʊ.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Bon 'lɔ na ɩ ma nɩbijɩɛ nɩ a n tɩɛrtɔ jie lɛ ɩka, vã wʊ ta kpɛ ma sɔr jaa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka n tara ãkpɛ̃ɔ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto na nyɛ tɩɩr a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a n nyɛvʊr pɔ lɛ, bɩɩ a n kũu pɔ lɛ.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa 'lɔ, maa chɛnɛ nyɛvʊr pɔ, n ben be kʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto, ka maa mɩ kpi, ka a ɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ n chɛnɛ na nyɛvʊr pɔ, ɩn tʊ̃n tʊ̃vɩɛl yɔɔ, tɩchɛ n kaa ir buor? N ba bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ ɩn na kaa ir ɛ.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: A yelsɩ ayi anyã lũ ma naa, maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka n yi a ka tɩ be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃. A lɛ lɛ vɩla,

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Ɩn be na bɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃, n bɔ̃ɔn na yelmãɛ jaa ɩka ɩn chɛnɛ na be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃ naa sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ ka yɩ sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, na yɩ tara pʊpɛl a yɩn sɔɔ wʊ jũu.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: A lɛ ɩn lɛ lɛ be a yɩ sɛ̃ go, ka a yɩ pʊpɛl yɩn tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ pʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Yele jaa wa ɩ, yɩ nyɔɔ yɩ mãɛ vɩla a lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na wile. Ka n wan wa nyɛ yɩ bɩɩ, maa ba wa be a yɩ sɛ̃ tɩ wõ a yɩ yele, ɩn bɔ̃ɔn ɩka yɩ ara na kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ pɔ,

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: na yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ nɩ a bala na 'yɛr ɩka a ba ɩ lɛ lɛ ɛ. A nyã ɩn jãnɛ kʊ ba ɩka ban din dɔɔyɛ, tɩchɛ ka Nãaŋmɩn faa yɩ.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ kʊ yɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu, a ba ɩ a Yesu yɩn sɔɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn lɔ̃ɔn wʊ dire a dɔɔyɛ jũu.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Ka a dɔɔyɛ nyã yɩn be na dire ɩn a dɔɔyɛ 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ ɩn di, nɩ a dɔɔyɛ yɩn be na chɛnɛ wõnõ ɩn dire.

english_verse: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ tara na ãkpɛ̃ɔ, bojũu yɩ ɩn bʊ̃'yen nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto, na yɩ tara ãgãn 'maar a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, na yɩ tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na yɩ nyɛ vɩla nɩ nɩbaal,

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: yɩ pãa vɛ̃n ka a n pʊpɛl sɛɛ, yɩn tara tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara nʊ̃fʊ bʊ̃'yen, na yɩ tara Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nɩ tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta maal yele 'lɔ na ɩ nyuur yele bɩɩ na yɩ wile yɩ mãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ gar a yɩ mãɛ.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ ta bʊɔrɔ a wʊ pʊpɛl bonsɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ ala nɩ na pɛlɛ a yɩ taaba pʊʊr.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Yɩ tara a tɩɛr nyã nɩ wʊ ju a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na dɔ̃ɔ tara.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Wʊn sɔɔ jãtaa nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ka ba ɩ bʊ̃'yen, tɩchɛ waa de a jãtaa nyã mana nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, wʊ den bar,

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ na wʊ siir wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ maal wʊ mãɛ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃, ka ba dɔɔ wʊ ka wʊ tara nɩsaal ãgãn, na wʊ ɩ nɩsaal.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Wʊ siir wʊ mãɛ nɩsaal kaar tu a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ kpin a daa ju.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn 'mɔɔ wʊn ka wʊ do gar bon jaa, na wʊ kʊ wʊ yuor na gar a yoe a jaa.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka a Yesu yuor jũu, gbɛdumo jaa na gbur naa a saaju nɩ a wɛr pɔ, nɩ a tẽe par,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: ka a jãlbie a jaa 'yɛr ɩka, Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yuor tɩɩr.

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr, nɩtãa a lɛ jaa yɩn ma sɔɔ ma, a ba ɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn maa wa be a yɩ jie tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔ ma gar a lɛ ɩn sɔɔ ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ. Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ faafʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ dãbãɛ nɩ mɩrfʊ.

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a lɛ an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ ka yɩ tara ãkpɛ̃ɔ na yɩn tʊ̃ a lɛ wʊ̃n bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara chɛfʊ nɩ yele jaa ɛ, na yɩ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bibiir banyã na ba tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ wɛr nyã pɔ tʊ̃dɛbɛ nɩ yelbe-ɩrbɛ na be na yɩ chaar ŋmɛrbie kaar a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: A lɛ yɩn sɔɔ a nyɛvʊr 'yɛr lɛ na sʊ̃ʊ ma ka a Yesu waa bɩbir ka n na tʊ̃ɔ wiil a n mãɛ ɩka n ba jo pɔrɔ ɛ, bɩɩ a n tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Ala sɔɔ ɩ ɩn din dɔɔyɛ naa pʊɔ a yɩ dɔɔyɛ pɔ yɩn dire yɩn sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn jũu, n pʊɔ pɛl naa nɩ yɩ jaa.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ mɩ pʊɔ ma ka sɩ chɩlɛ.

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu wa sɔɔ naa, ɩn tʊ̃n Timoti ka wʊ wa a yɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ ka n wõ a yɩ yele ka a ãgãn 'maa ma.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: N ba tara nɩrɛ jaa na kaara a wʊ kaar ɛ, ka wʊ na tara a yɩ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ba jaa bʊɔrɔ naa a ba pʊpɛl bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ, na baa bʊɔrɔ ala na pɛlɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Timoti tɩɛr 'lɔ yɩn bɔ̃ɔn fɩka sãa nɩ wʊ bie, wʊ pʊɔ ma naa ka sɩ mʊɔl a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n tʊ̃ wʊ a yɩ sɛ̃, maa wa nyɛ lɛ yelsɩ na ɩrɛ kʊrɔ ma.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: N sɔɔ naa ɩka a sɩ Soro na yuon sɔr kʊ ma ka maa mãɛ wa nyɛ yɩ fɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Bojũu n nyɛn ka a ɩ fɛrfʊ kʊ ma ɩka n tʊ̃ Epafaroditusɩ na ɩ a n yɛbɛ nɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ, na wʊ mɩ dire a n dɔɔyɛ tɔ sʊɔ. Wʊ mɩ ɩn a yɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩn tʊ̃ ka wʊ wa maal a n bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ kʊ ma.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Bojũu wʊ bʊɔrɔ na ɩka wʊ nyɛ yɩ jaa tɩchɛ ka a wʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ jaa, bojũu yɩ wõn an ɔɔrɔ wʊ.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ, a ɔɔrɔ wʊn nɩbijɩɛ ka wʊ chɛ bãlãa naa kpi. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn wa kãan a wʊ nɩbaal, a ba ɩ 'lɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mɩ kãan a n nɩbaal, ka n ta tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ yɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Bojũu maa lɛ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka n tʊ̃ wʊ a yɩ sɛ̃, ka a yɩ pʊɔ na pɛl ala ɩ yɩ lɛ nyɛ wʊn go, ka a n ãgãn na 'maa.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɔɔ de wʊ nɩ pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro jũu, na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nɩbɛ banyã taaba,

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: bojũu wʊ din dɔɔyɛ a wʊ nyɛvʊr pɔ, na wʊ ta ɩrɛ na kpi a Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu ɩka wʊ tʊ̃ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala yɩn ba tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ kʊ ma ɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, a baaraa nɩ nyã ɩka yɩ tara pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ. A ba ɩ tuo kʊ ma ɩn lɛ sɛɛrɛ a yelsɩ ala nɩ a ju kʊrɔ yɩ go ɛ, an ɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃ nɩ a baar banyãna, ba ɩn yelbe-ɩrbɛ na ba ma ŋmara nɩbɛ yɔɩ pɔrɔ.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩn lɛ ɩ a yɔŋmarba sɩrɛ jaa, na sɩ puoro a Nãaŋmɩn a Sɩɛ pɔ, na sɩ tara tɩɩr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, na saa kaara a ãgãn ɛ.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Ba ŋmaan a n yʊɔr a ber aniin daar, ka n ɩ a Isɩral nɩrɛ naa ɩ a Benjamin bal nɩrɛ, naa ɩ Heburu, ka ba dɔɔ ma ka ɩ Heburu nɩrɛ. A nɛɛ tufʊ jũu, ka ɩ Farasee.

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: N dɔ̃ɔn mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir naa gere a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ, a nɛbinãa yeltorsɩ jũu, n ba tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: tɩ naa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n be a wʊ pɔ, naa ta bʊɔrɔ a maa mãɛ yeltorsɩ ala na yi a nɛbinãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yeltorsɩ ala na yi a Kɩrɩsɩto sɔɔfʊ pɔ. A yeltorsɩ anyã lɛ yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ naa ɩ sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n bɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a wʊ kũu pɔ lɩɛb irfʊ kpɛ̃ɔ, naa lɔ̃ɔn wʊ di a dɔɔyɛ wa kaara a wʊ kaar a wʊ kũu pɔ,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: ka n mɩ wa pʊɔ a bala mɩ na wa lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ n tara na a anyãna a jaa ɛ, bɩɩ n ɩn chɛchɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ n mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka n nyɔɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, ka Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ nyɔɔ ma kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n ba 'yɛr ɩka n nyɔɔn yele jaa baar ɛ. Tɩchɛ yele bʊ̃'yen ɩn ɩ lɛ ɩka, n ĩin a ala na be a puor bar, tɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tɩɛrɛ a ala na be a niem.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: N mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka n tɩ de a saaju kʊfʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl ma tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: A sɩn bala na baa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ, sɩ mɩ ma tara a bonsɩ a nyãna tɩɛr. Tɩ yɩn wa tɩɛr yelyuo yele jaa pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃n ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelnyɩnɛ.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a bonsɩ anyãna sɩn ben tara.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ pʊɔ a yɩ taaba na yɩ turo a lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ maal wiil yɩ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a bala na kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ sɩn wiil yɩ.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Bojũu n dɔ̃ɔ de nie 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã nɩbikʊ̃ɔ pɔ lɛ n 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, bamɩne kpɩɛrɛ na fɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto daa ɩn 'laarfʊ kʊ ba.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: A ba baaraa ɩn sɔ̃ɔfʊ, a ba ŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a ba ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ. Ba wile na ba mãɛ nɩ yelsɩ ala na ɩ vã nɩ ɩfʊ, a ba tɩɛrsɩ ɩn a wɛr nyã ju bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ tɛɛ tɩɛr.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'lɔ ɩn saaju Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, be lɛ sɩ chɛlɛ a Fafaara na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka wʊ na yi wa.

english_verse: has power over everything, and he will make these poor bodies of ours like his own glorious body.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na tara kpɛ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔ bon jaa na wʊ pire, wʊn den a kpɛ̃ɔ 'lɔ lɩɛb a sɩ ãgãma ka a kaara a wʊ mãɛ tɩɩr ãgãn kaar.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr yɩn ɩn nʊ̃, naa pãa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ yɩ, yɩn lɛ ɩ a n pʊpɛl nɩ a nãa jupil, yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro pɔ n barmɩne.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: N 'maal a Yuodiya nɩ Sɩntachi ɩka ba tara a tɩɛr bʊ̃'yen nyãna a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Ɔ̃ɔ, n mɩ lɛ sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa, n baraa ɩka fʊ sʊ̃ʊ a pɔbɔ banyãna, ba lɔ̃ɔn man di dɔɔyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ 'matãan Kɩlɛmɛntɩ, na ɩ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba, a bala yoe na be a nyɛvʊr gãn pɔ.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Yɩ tara pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ jaa. N lɛ bɔ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ, yɩ tara pʊpɛl.

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ lɛ yɩn siir a yɩ mãɛ jã. A sɩ Soro waa ta naa.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka yele jaa wõnõ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ, yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan, na yɩ vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔ a bon 'lɔ yɩn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã'maar na gar a nɩsaal bɔ̃ɔfʊ, na gun a yɩ nyãn, nɩ a yɩ tɩɛrsɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Bon jaa yɩn jãn tɩ na yɩ nyɛ, tɩ na yɩ wõ yi a n sɛ̃, yɩ maala yaa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ nyã'maar sʊɔ, na ben a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: N tara na pʊpɛl a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ yɩn wiil ɩka yɩ chɛnɛ na tara a n tɩɛr. Yelmãɛ yɩ dɔ̃ɔ tara a n tɩɛr tɩ na yaa tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ sɔr wiil ɛ.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: N ba 'yɛrɛ wile ɩka n bʊɔrɔ na bon jaa ɛ, bojũu n dɔ̃ɔ jãn lɛ ɩn na tara bon ka wʊ sɛɛn ma.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔn lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tara jaa pʊʊrbile, naa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tara yɔɔ. A yelsɔɔlaa nyãna lɛ n jãn naa guolo nɩ a n mãɛ, ka kɔ̃ kpɛ man bɩɩ, ka n tara na na di bɩɩ, ka bãlãa gba lɛ n tara na di, ka n tara na yɔɔ bɩɩ, n ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ maal vɩla, yɩn sʊ̃ʊ ma a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn dire a dɔɔyɛ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Yɩn Filipai nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa yɩn sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ jaa ɩn yi a Masedonɩya, pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba kʊ ma bon ɛ, ka yɩn tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ gba ɩn be a Tɛsalonika, yɩ sʊ̃ʊ man nɩ a n bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ gar gbɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ nyɛ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn wʊ yab yɩ na wʊ sʊ̃ʊ yɩ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: N nyɛn a n sãyar yɔɔ, naa gba nyɛ tɩ põn bar ka a sɛɛn ma, pʊ̃pãanyã n nũu kpɛ naa a kʊfʊ ala yɩn tʊ̃n a Epafaroditusɩ ka wʊ wa kʊ ma, ka a yɩ kʊfʊ anyãna kaar fɩka a bɔɔrlo bomo ala na nyuro nʊ̃ɔ naa pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: A n Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ yɩn a yɩ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ a jaa tu a wʊ tɩɩr nãbonsɩ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: A sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn wʊ nyɛrɛ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. A n yɛɛr na be a ka mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ mɩ ba jaa puoro yɩ naa, ka a bala mɩ na be a nãkpɛ̃ɛ Siisa yir mɩ puoro yɩ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ sɩɩr pɔ. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ pɔ nɩ Timoti na ɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ,

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ nɩ a yɛɛr na tara a sɔɔfʊ a Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ na be a Kolose. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa, sɩn wa sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ yɩ,

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: bojũu sɩ wõn a yɩ sɔɔfʊ yɩn tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ yɩn tara kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: A yɩ sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ na yi a tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie na gã gu yɩ be a saaju a 'lɔ yɩn de nie wõ, a yelmãɛ 'yɛr na ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: 'lɔ na wa a yɩ sɛ̃. A wɛr wʊ jaa, a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã wɔ̃nɔ̃ na wɔ̃mɔ̃ na a nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩtãa lɛ an ben ɩrɛ a yɩ pɔ, an yi a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ daar jaa yɩn wõ naa na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ par a yelmãɛ pɔ.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Yɩ jãn a nyã yin Epafaras sɛ̃ na ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ ãsʊɔ. Wʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ na de a sɩ jie mʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ wa man kʊ sɩ a nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ yɩn tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ pɔ.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, an yi a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa sɩn wõ naa, saa dɔ̃ɔ gal ɩka sɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn kʊ yɩ ɛ, na sɩ sʊɔrɔ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn wʊ pʊɔ yɩ a wʊ bɔfʊ yɛ̃, a sɩɛ pɔ yɛ̃, a jaa nɩ par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: A sɩ sʊɔrfʊ lɛ ɩka, a yɩ befʊ a vɩɛlɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro, ka a pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ, na yɩ wɔ̃nɔ̃ bisʊ̃n tʊ̃vɩla jaa pɔ, na yɩ baa a Nãaŋmɩn yɛ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ ma sʊɔrɔ na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn wʊ maal yɩ ka yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ nɩ a kpãɛn ala a jaa na yi a wʊ tɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ, na yɩ nyɔɔrɔ yɩ mãɛ tara kãnyir yele jaa pɔ, nɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Na yɩ ma dãna a Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ kaa a yɩ sɛɛ, ka yɩ na põ a Nãaŋmɩn nãbonsɩ nɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ a chãa pɔ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Bojũu 'lɔ lɛ faa sɩ yin a libe kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ a wʊ Binʊ̃nãa nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ.

english_verse: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
translation_verse: A wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩ nyɛ faafʊ, na sɩ nyɛ yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wʊ pɔ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa na be a saaju, nɩ a ala na be ka a wɛr pɔ maal, ala sɩn nyɛrɛ, nɩ a ala sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara kpɛ̃ɔ ɩ a tʊ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ, nɩ a malakasɩ ala gba na tara kpɛ̃ɔ, nɩ a kpãɛn bonsɩ, a jaa maal tu a wʊ pɔ, ka a ɩ a wʊ sofʊ.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ a bonsɩ a jaa be be, a wʊ pɔ lɛ a bonsɩ a jaa 'mataa.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ mɩ lɛ ɩ a ãgãn ju sʊɔ, a pupuorbiir. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a pielfʊ, nɩ a bidɔ̃ɔ na wʊ de nie ir a kũu pɔ, na waa lɛ kpi go ɛ, ka yele jaa pɔ, ka wʊ ɩ a ju sʊɔ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ pɛl wʊ naa ka wʊ befʊ wʊ jaa be a wʊ pɔ.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: A tun a wʊ pɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ 'maal a bonsɩ a jaa kʊ a wʊ mãɛ, ka a ala na be a saaju bɩɩ a ala na be ka a wɛr pɔ. Wʊ maal ka nyã'maar be be, nɩ a wʊ jãɩ a daa ju wʊn kpi.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Yɩ dɔ̃ɔ jãan a Nãaŋmɩn na yɩ ɩ a wʊ dɔ̃dẽme, a yɩ yeldɛbɛ ɩfʊ jũu.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ 'maal yɩn tun a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa ɩ nɩsaal na wʊ kpi. Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ a wʊ sɛ̃, na yɩ kʊ tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, bɩɩ tara 'yɛr dɔɔl ɛ,

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: ala ɩ yɩ chɛnɛ na ba gbɛr a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, na yɩ taa tɔɔ yi a tɩɛrtɔ 'lɔ na ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã yɩn wõ ɛ. A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã lɛ yɩ wõ ban mʊɔl kʊ nɩrɛ jaa ka a wɛr ju. Ala lɛ a maa Pɔɔl ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n pãa chɩlɛ naa a n dɔɔyɛ ɩn di a yɩ jũu, naa na di a dɔɔyɛ ala a jaa a Kɩrɩsɩto na bʊɔrɔ ɩka n di kʊ a wʊ ãgãn na ɩ a pupuorbiir jũu.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn maal man ka n ɩ a wʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a pupuorbiir naa na man a wʊ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: A yele nyãna lɛ sɔɔl a kõro jaa a sãakpãmɩne sɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ka a pãa yi chãa pɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka a wʊ nɩbɛ bɔ̃ɔn sɩrɛ jaa a lɛ wʊ tara a tɩɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa, ɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto ben a yɩ pɔ, na ɩ a tɩɩr tɩɛrtɔ jie.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: A Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ sɩ mʊɔlɔ, na sɩ kpãana nɩrɛ jaa wile nɩ nɩrɛ jaa nɩ yɛ̃ jaa bʊrɔ, ka sɩ na de nɩrɛ jaa kʊ wʊ ka wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: A nyã jũu lɛ n tʊ̃nɔ̃ hãna dire dɔɔyɛ nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa wʊn tʊ̃nɔ̃ tun a n 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ ɩn mʊɔrɔ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a bala na be a Laodisea, nɩ a bala jaa na ba nyɛ a maa mãɛ nɩ nɩbir ɛ.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka yɩ tara ãkpãɛn a yɩ nyãn pɔ, na yɩ ɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen nʊ̃ taa, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka yɩ tara par bɔ̃ɔfʊ yɔɔ jaa a nãbonsɩ a jaa pɔ, na yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yelsɔɔlsɩ, na ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: A wʊ pɔ lɛ a nãbonsɩ, nɩ a yɛ̃, nɩ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ a jaa sɔɔl.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: N 'yɛrɛ na a nɩtɔ̃ kʊrɔ yɩ ka nɩrɛ jaa taa wa bɛl yɩ nɩ nɛchɩrɛ 'yɛr na nyɛtãan yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: An sɔɔ ɩ a maa mãɛ na ba be a yɩ sɛ̃ gba ɛ, tɩchɛ n tara na a yɩ tɩɛr. N chɩlɛ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ a lɛ yɩn tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a lɛ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na kpɛ̃mɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩn de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ka wʊ ɩ a Soro, yɩ chɛnɛ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Yɩ ba nyɩbɛ na yɩ baa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, na yɩ nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ̃mɛ a sɔɔfʊ pɔ, fɩka a lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ wiil yɩ, na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Yɩ kaara sʊ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa ta wa de yɩ ka yɩ ɩ gbãgbaar tu a bɛlfʊ ala na ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ ɛ, nɩ nɩsaal yɛ̃ ɛ, na ɩ a ala na kaara a wɛr nyã ju ban taa kaara a Kɩrɩsɩto wiilfʊ.

english_verse: God lives fully in Christ.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn befʊ wʊ jaa ben a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɛɛ naa bojũu yɩ sɔɔn a Kɩrɩsɩto, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme ba jaa ju sʊɔ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Ban dɔ̃ɔ so yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, ba ũu yɩn a Kɩrɩsɩto kaar, ka yɩ ir a kũu pɔ fɩka a Kɩrɩsɩto, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na sãɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, na tara kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn fɔfɔn a sɩ yelbebe ala na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb bin bar. Ala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɛr dɔɔl sɩ. Ala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ fɩrɛ sɩ na a ŋmaa sɩ yin, wʊ den bar na wʊ kpa yaa a daa ju.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃ɔn a sɩdɛbɛ nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, na wʊ maal ba ka a ɩ dãasɩɛ nɩyɔɔ jaa niem. Wʊ tʊ̃ɔ ba naa nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto daa ju kũu.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa tɔɔr a yɩ 'yɛr nɩ bon 'lɔ yɩn dire bɩɩ nyuro ɛ, bɩɩ tun a Juu nɩbɛ lɔ̃ɔ difʊ pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ Chuu Paalaa Dãɛn pɔ ɛ, bɩɩ a Pɛ̃nfʊ Bɩbir Daar ɛ.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: A anyã ɩ naa a yelsɩ ala nɩ taa dɔ̃ɔ wa gãagiel, tɩchɛ a yelmãɛ ben a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kpãkpãan yɩ nɩ jir 'yɛr ɩka, yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ na yɩ puoro a malakasɩ ɛ, a lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ kʊ̃ nyɛ a sãyar ɛ. A nɩrɛ nyã tɔ sʊɔ ma vɩɛr kpɛ a yele pɔ tɩɛr ɩka wʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a ala wʊn nyɛ. A wʊ yelbier tɩɛr ma vɛ̃n ka wʊ wile wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ nyã ba nyɔɔ a 'lɔ na ɩ a ju ɛ. Nɩtãa a lɛ a ju na ma wile a ãgãn, ka a jile nʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a ãgãn 'mataa a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: An ɩ yɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ 'mataa kpi, a wɛr nyã ju kpãɛn bonsɩ, ba lɛ tara kpɛ̃ɔ a yɩ ju ɛ. Ŋmɩnɛ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ chɛnɛ kaara fɩka yɩ chɛnɛ na ɩ a wɛr sofʊ?

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: Ta nyɔɔ bon nyã ɛ! Ta lɛm bon nyã kaa ɛ! Ta sɩɩr bon nyã kaa ɛ!

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: A nɛɛr anyãna a jaa tufʊ ɩn yelsɩ na ba lɛ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa ɛ, bojũu a ɩn nɩsaal nɛbinsɩ nɩ nɩsaal wiilfʊsɩ lɛ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: A nɛbinsɩ anyãna nyɛntãan fɩka yɛ̃ yele na ɩ a ba mãɛ puorfʊ yele nɩ mãɛ siirfʊ yele nɩ nɩbikõo ãgãn kaafʊ yele. Tɩchɛ a anyãna maa sʊ̃ʊ ba ka ba tʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a ba mãɛ a yelbier vɔlaa pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ yɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'mataa sãɩn a kũu pɔ, yɩ de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a bonsɩ ala na be a saaju, be a Kɩrɩsɩto na jãnɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Yɩ de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a saaju bonsɩ pɔ, tɩ na yɩ ta de a yɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a wɛr ju bonsɩ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ kpi naa, ka a pʊ̃pãanyã ka a yɩ nyɛvʊr sɔɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: An ɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ kʊ yɩ a nyɛvʊr paalaa, 'lɔ wa nyɩr, yɩ mɩ na 'mantãan wʊ nyɩr, na yɩ nyɛ a wʊ tɩɩr.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ kʊ a ala na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ na ɩ a wɛr yele. A yelsɩ ala lɛ a anyãna, sɛ̃fʊ yele, dɛɛr yele, vɔldɛɛr, tɩɛr dɛɛr, nɩ bɔgar na nyɛtãan tɩbɛ puorfʊ.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: A bonsɩ anyãna jũu, Nãaŋmɩn suur ire naa.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: A sɔbie anyãna lɛ yɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ turo, a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ, suur, putuyele, gefʊ, gagar yele, nɩ 'yɛrbidɛbɛ na ma yire a yɩ nɛgãma pɔ.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta ŋmara jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ɛ. Yɩ ta maala a lɛ go ɛ, yɩ yaa a kõro yele nɩ a wʊ maalfʊsɩ bar,

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: tɩ na yɩ su a pʊ̃pãanyã yelpaalaa. Nãaŋmɩn maal yɩn ka yɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa, na wʊ maala yɩ, ka yɩ na kaara a wʊ kaar, ka yɩ na bɔ̃ɔ wʊ yelmãɛ jaa.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Bamɩne ba lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka bamɩne ŋma yɔɩ bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ba ŋma ɛ, ka bamɩne ɩ sãanba bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ɩ nɩyʊɔrsɩ ɛ, ka bamɩne ɩ gbãgbaar bɩɩ ka bamɩne mɩ ɩ sumɩne ɛ, tɩchɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ ɩ a jaa na wʊ be a jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir yɩ, ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ na wʊ nʊ̃ yɩ, yɩ pɔɔ a yɩ mãɛ nɩ nɩbaal, vɩla maalfʊ, mãɛ siirfʊ, jomm ɩfʊ nɩ kãnyir.

english_verse: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma tara kãnyir kʊ taa, ãsʊɔ jaa wa tara nɩ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ 'yɛr, yɩ ma vɛ̃ kʊ taa. Yɩ vɛ̃ bar nɩtãa a lɛ a sɩ Soro na ma vɛ̃ bar yɩ.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: A yelkpɛ̃ɛ jaa lɛ ɩka, yɩ de nʊ̃fʊ su. 'Lɔ lɛ ma nyɔɔ bonsɩ a jaa 'mataa ka a tara nɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto nyã'maar pire a yɩ nyãn, yɩ jaa pʊɔn a ãgãn jiir pɔ, na wʊ bʊɔl yɩ ka yɩ tara nyã'maar. Yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛrbir di nãa a yɩ pɔ, yɩn wa wile tɩ kpãana taa, nɩ a yɛ̃ wʊ jaa. Yɩ ma yiele Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛfʊ yiel, pʊpɛl yiel, nɩ a yiel na yi a yɩ nyãn pɔ, na yɩ kʊrɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Bon 'lɔ jaa yɩn wa maala, ka 'yɛrbir lɛ bɩɩ, ka maalfʊ pɔ lɛ, yɩ ma maal bon jaa, nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor, na yɩ ma tu a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ puor a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ, yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ, lɛ lɛ vɩɛlɛ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Sɩrbɛ, yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ pɔbɔ, na yɩ ta ma pirpire ba ɛ.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Bibiir, yɩ wõnõ a yɩ dɔɔrbɔ toor yele jaa pɔ, lɛ lɛ pɛlɛ a sɩ Soro pʊɔ.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Sãamɩne, yɩ ta ma maala ka a yɩ bibiir suur ire ɛ, a lɛ a ba tɩɛr kʊ̃ gã jibʊ̃'yen ɛ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Gbãgbaar, yɩ sɔɔrɔ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ nɛɛ yele jaa pɔ. Yɩ ta ma vɛ̃ ka ba wa fur nɩbir yɔ̃ɔ yɩ, ka yɩ pãa maala a lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ir a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa 'yɔ̃ɔ, yɩn joro a sɩ Soro dãbãɛ jũu.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Bon jaa yɩn wa maala, yɩ ir a yɩ nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ ka a kaara fɩka a sɩ Soro lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ, tɩchɛ a ta ɩ fɩka nɩsaal lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩn tɩ den a yɩ nãbonsɩ a sɩ Soro sɛ̃ na ɩ a yɩ sãyar. A sɩ Soro Kɩrɩsɩto lɛ yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wa maal yelbier, a yelbier sãyar lɛ wʊn tɩ nyɛ. Nãaŋmɩn ba turo nɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛrɛ, yɩ ma kʊrɔ a yɩ gbãgbaar a lɛ na tor na a sɛɛn, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩ mɩ tara na nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na be a saaju.

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Yɩ de a yɩ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ. Yɩ kaara sʊ̃ na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Na yɩ mɩ ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ sɩ ka Nãaŋmɩn na yuo sɔr kʊ a sɩ mʊɔlfʊ ka sɩ na mʊɔl a Kɩrɩsɩto yelsɔɔlsɩ. A 'lɔ pɔ lɛ ba 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka n na mʊɔl jaa chɛ chɛ chɛ a lɛ an sɛɛn.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Yɩ ma vɛ̃ ka a yɩ bʊʊr ma ɩ wãɛfʊ 'yɛrbie tɩ nʊ̃mɔ̃ nyaar kaar. Ka yɩ na bɔ̃ɔ lɛ yɩn na 'yɛr sɔɔ nɩrɛ 'lɔ wa sʊʊr yɩ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tɩchɩkusɩ na man a maa 'yɛr a jaa kʊ yɩ. Wʊ ɩn a yɛbɛ ɩn nʊ̃ na wʊ mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr nɩ yelmãɛ. Na wʊ ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: N tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ naa a yɩ sɛ̃ ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a lɛ sɩn ɩrɛ a ka, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nyãn ãkpãɛn.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ nɩ Onɩsɩmɔsɩ lɛ 'mataa waara. Wʊ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ na wʊ ɩ a yɛbɛ sɩn nʊ̃. Wʊ ɩn a yɩ ãsʊɔ. Ban man kʊ yɩ bon jaa na ɩrɛ a ka.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Aristakus mɩ ban 'mataa pɔɔn ma puoro yɩ naa, lɛ lɛ a Maakɩ mɩ na ɩ a Banabasɩ yɛbɛ mɩ puoro yɩ. Yɩ dɔ̃ɔ wõ a wʊ kpãafʊ yele, ala ɩ wʊ wa wan a yɩ sɛ̃, yɩ tuor de wʊ.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yesu mɩ ban bʊɔlɔ Jusɩtusɩ mɩ puoro yɩ naa. A nɩbɛ banyãna tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ pɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ jũu. Ba tara na ãgãn 'maar kʊ ma.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafaras na ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ na wʊ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃, puoro yɩ naa. Wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn nɩbijɩɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ka yɩ na ara kpɛ̃ɔ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: N din a wʊ dãasɩɛ ɩka wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ na kʊrɔ yɩ nɩ a bala na be a Laodisea nɩ a Hɩrapolis tẽn pɔ.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: A sɩ yɛbɛ sɩn nʊ̃, Luka na ɩ a tɩtɩlɛ nɩ Demas puoro yɩ naa.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Puor Nɩmfa nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ma tuor a wʊ yir na be a Laodisea.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Bala wa kar a gãn nyãna kʊ a yɩn Kolose dẽme, yɩ mɔ̃ ka ba mɩ kar wʊ be a Laodisea pupuorbiir pɔ. Yɩ mɔ̃ na yɩ mɩ kar a gãn 'lɔ ɩn sɛb kʊ a Laodisea pupuorbiir.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: 'Yɛr kʊ Archipus, “Mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ baa baar a tʊ̃mɔ̃ ala fʊn nyɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.”

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl lɛ sɛɛrɛ a puorfʊ nyã nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu. Yɩ tɩɛr a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma. Wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Pɔɔl, Silasɩ nɩ Timoti lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ Tɛsalonika pupuorbiir na be a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa kʊ yɩ, tɩ ma tara a yɩ tɩɛr a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Sɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ sɩ ma tɩɛr a yɩ sɔɔfʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a kãnyir yɩn tara chɛlɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, n yɛɛr a yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn na nʊ̃, 'lɔ lɛ kaa ir yɩ.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɩ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ na wa a yɩ sɛ̃, ba ɩ 'yɛrbir tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ba ɩ baal ɛ. Yɩ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn a lɛ sɩn be a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ yɩ a yɩ jũu.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Yɩ ɩ naa a sɩn nɩ a Soro tɔtɔɔrbɔ, bojũu dɔɔyɛ kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ lɛ yɩ tu tɩ de a 'yɛrbie nɩ pʊpɛl a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na tɩr,

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: lɛ lɛ, yɩn ɩ bʊ̃mansɩ kʊ a bala na sɔɔ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ be a Masedonɩya nɩ a Akaya tẽn pɔ.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ yaar a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie, a ba ɩ a Masedonɩya nɩ a Akaya tẽn pɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yaar jie jaa. A lɛ yɩn sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn yaar jie jaa.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Ba mãɛ lɛ man a lɛ yɩn tuor de sɩ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn wa a yɩ sɛ̃, nɩ a lɛ yɩn lɩɛb wa a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, tɩ bar a tɩbɛ tɩ wa puoro a nyɛvʊr nɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn,

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: tɩ chɛlɛ a wʊ Bie ka wʊ yi saaju wa, a 'lɔ wʊn vɛ̃ ka wʊ lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ, Yesu a 'lɔ na faa sɩ yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn suur 'lɔ na waara pɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a yɩ sɛ̃ waa ba ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ,

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: sɩn gba na dɔ̃ɔ di dɔɔyɛ a ba ge sɩ be a Filipai tẽe pɔ, nɩtãa yɩn mãɛ na bɔ̃ɔn, tɩchɛ sɩ chɛnɛ na tara nyãa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn pɔ, tɩ man a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ jaa chɛchɛ kʊ yɩ, an sɔɔ ɩ baa sɔɔ de a 'yɛr ɛ.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɩ sʊɔrfʊ ba yi jir, bɛlfʊ nɩ tɩɛr dɛɛr pɔ ɛ,

english_verse: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kaa ir sɩ ka sɩ ɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wiwiilbe. A lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ 'yɛr ɩka, a ba ɩ ka sɩ pɛl nɩsaal pʊɔ ɛ, tɩ sɩ pɛl Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, a 'lɔ na ma kaara a sɩ pʊtɩɛr.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, saa dɔ̃ɔ wa 'yɛr jir 'yɛr bɩɩ ŋmaa jir nyɛ bon ɛ.

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: Saa bʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩsaal sɛ̃ ɛ, a yɩn mãɛ sɛ̃n bɩɩ a sɩ taaba sɛ̃ ɛ, bɩɩ bʊɔrɔ bonsɩ sɩn ɩ Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nsɩ jũu ɛ,

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ sɩ siir a sɩ mãɛ a yɩ pɔ, lɛ pɔɔ na ma kaara a wʊ bibiir.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩn kaara sɩ lɛ so ka saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ põn yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, na sɩ lɔ̃ɔn a sɩ mãɛ jaa bojũu a sɩ nʊ̃fʊ ben a yɩ sɛ̃ yɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa n yɛɛr, yɩ tɩɛr a sɩ kãnyir tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a dɔɔyɛ. Sɩ tʊ̃n tãsɔɔ gbulo, nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃gbulo, ka sɩ ta kʊ nɩrɛ jaa tuor ɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩn lɛ di dãasɩɛ, nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn mɩ na ɩ a Chɛchɛ Sʊɔ nɩ nɩtor tɩ ba tara yele jaa a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a sɩ maalfʊ chaar naa a yɩn na ɩ a sɔɔfʊ dẽme.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ ma maal vɩla kʊ a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa lɛ sãa na ma maal vɩla kʊ a wʊ bibiir,

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: na sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ ãkpãɛn, 'maala yɩ tɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ ɩka yɩ kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ na pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, a 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ tɩɩr pɔ.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr yɩn wõ a sɩ sɛ̃, yaa sɔɔ de yaa nɩsaal 'yɛr kaar ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ sɔɔn de yaa Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kaar, ka a tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ bala na sɔɔ de pɔ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Bojũu n yɛɛr, yɩn 'lɔ, yɩ ɩ naa tɔtɔɔrbɔ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ a Judiya, yɩ din dɔɔyɛ a bonsɩ pɔ, a yɩ mãɛ yelsɩ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ ban tʊ̃ kʊ a Juu dẽme,

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: a bala na kʊ a sɩ Soro Yesu nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ tɩ dii sɩ bar. Ba sɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ tɩ ba sɔɔ nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr ɛ,

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: tɩ ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ 'yɛrɛ nɩ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, ka ban nyɛ faafʊ ɛ. Ba kpɛ̃n a yeldɛbɛ pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ kɔkɔɛ. Nãaŋmɩn suur ir naa ka wʊn ge ba.

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n yɛɛr, a kor bãlãa sɩn ba lɛ nyɛ taa ɛ, tɩchɛ saa vɛ̃ a yɩ tɩɛr ɛ. Sɩ mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka sɩ nyɛ yɩ, na sɩ bʊɔrɔ ɩka a sɩn mãɛ sɩ tɩ nyɛ yɩ.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: A la lɛ so ka sɩ ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ wa a yɩ sɛ̃, tɩ maa Pɔɔl ta mʊɔrɔ na bʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ ka Satan pii a sɩ sɔr.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Bo lɛ ɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie, bɩɩ a pʊpɛl bɩɩ a nyɛvʊr tɩɩr jupil kʊ sɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu waa daar? A ba ɩ yɩn lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ yɩn lɛ ɩ a sɩ tɩɩr nɩ a sɩ pʊpɛl.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Lɛ an wa gar sɩ a sɩ faa tɩ jãnɛ a be Atensɩ tẽe pɔ.

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: Sɩ tʊ̃n a sɩ yɛbɛ Timoti mɩ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ ãsʊɔ na wʊ mʊɔlɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpɛ̃ɔ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ,

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: a lɛ ka yɩ taa wa joro dãbãɛ nɩ a bɛɛr kaa nyã pɔ ɛ. Yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a dɔɔyɛ nyã lɛ sɩn di.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ, sɩn dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, lɛ lɛ sɩ 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka sɩn din dɔɔyɛ. Ka a lɛ mɩ ɩ.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ɩn kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ lɛ so, ka tʊ̃ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ tɩ kaa a lɛ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na be, n dabãɛ lɛ ɩka a bɛɛr kaa wʊ taa bɛɛr yɩ kaa, kaa sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Timoti yin a yɩ sɛ̃ wa 'yɛr a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ sɩ, a lɛ yɩn tara a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ. Wʊ 'yɛr kʊ sɩ ɩka yɩ ma tara sɩn nɩ tɩɛr vɩla sɔ̃ɔ jaa na yɩ ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ nyɛ sɩ nɩtãa lɛ sɩn mɩ na ma bʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ nyɛ yɩ.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, a lɛ jũu, a pʊsɔ̃ɔ nɩ a bɛɛr kaa anyã pɔ, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ tun a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ yɩn tara jũu.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Bojũu pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ pãa na ben be yɩn ara kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ lɛ sɩn ɩrɛ wa puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan ka a sɛɛ, a pʊpɛl nyã sɩn nyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃?

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ jaa lɛ sɩ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɩka sɩ lɛ nyɛ yɩ go, na sɩ lɛ chɔɔr bon 'lɔ jaa na ba pʊɔ a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ sʊɔrɔ naa a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu ɩka, ba yuo sɔr ka sɩ lɛ wa nyɛ yɩ.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ waa na yɩ nʊ̃nɔ̃ taa, tɩ na yɩ nʊ̃ nɩrɛ jaa nɩtãa lɛ sɩn nʊ̃ yɩ.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃n na yɩ taa tara dɛɛr jaa a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ na waan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, a baaraa nɩ nyã, sɩ kpãana yɩ naa a lɛ a yɩ kpɛfʊ na tʊ̃ɔ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn ben kpɩɛrɛ. Pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa na sɩ kpãkpãana yɩ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu ɩka yɩ maala a lɛ pʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn wiilfʊ 'lɔ sɩn wiil yɩ tun a sɩ Soro Yesu pɔ.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: A ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ wʊn ir yɩ ka yɩ ɩ nɩtorsɩ. A lɛ jũu, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: na yɩ ta bʊɔrɔ pʊpɛl bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ fɩka a nɩbɛ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ta maal dɛɛr bɩɩ ŋmɔɔl a wʊ yɛbɛ anyã pɔ ɛ, a sɩ Soro na gen nɩrɛ jaa na maala a anyãna nɩtãa a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ yɩ, tɩ na sɩ kpãa yɩ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tɔr a wiilfʊ nyã, ba tɔr nɩsaal ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ na kʊ sɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: A ba lɛ fɛr ɩka, sɩ lɛ sɛb kʊ yɩ a lɛ yɩn na nʊ̃ taa ɛ, bojũu yɩn mãɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa ɩka, yɩ nʊ̃ taa.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa yɩ nʊ̃n a yɛɛr na be a Masedonɩya paal pɔ, tɩchɛ sɩ chɛnɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ ãkpãɛn ɩka, yɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a ɩ yɩ nʊ̃ɔ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ vɩɛlɛ, na yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a yɩ mãɛ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a yɩ nuur nɩtãa a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Yɩ maal a nɩtɔ̃ ka a yɩ kpɛfʊ na vɩɛlɛ kʊ a bala na ba puor ɛ, na yɩ taa bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩbɛ ba guolo yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka a lɩɩ yɩ ɛ, nɩ a bala na gur ɛ, na yɩ taa wa tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ fɩka a bala na ba tara tɩɛrtɔ jie kaar ɛ.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
