translation_verse: Sɩ sɔɔn ɩka Yesu kpi naa, tɩ na wʊ lɩɛb ir a kũu pɔ. A lɛ lɛ sɩ sɔɔ, ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na 'mantaa waan a Yesu nɩ a bala na gur.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Sɩ den a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, a sɩn bala na chɛnɛ vʊrɔ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro waa daar, kʊ̃ dɔ̃ɔ a bala na gur nyɛ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɩ Soro mãɛ lɛ na yi a saaju wa tãna 'yɛrɛ, ka a malaka kpɛ̃ɛ bʊɔlɔ nɩ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn ɩlɛ pɛɛlɛ ɩrɛ gɔ̃mɔ̃, ka a bala na sɔɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto tɩ kpi, de nie ir.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: A anyã puor, a sɩn bala na chɛnɛ vʊrɔ, a Nãaŋmɩn pãa 'mɔɔr sɩ, ka sɩ lɔ̃ɔtaa tuor a sɩ Soro be julõjuur pɔ, na sɩ tɩ be a wʊ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn naa 'yɛrbie anyãna.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ n yɛɛr, a ba fɛr ɩka sɩ sɛb bon jaa 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a daar naa sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩn mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu bɩbir na wa naa fɩka nãnyie na ma wa tãsɔɔ kaar.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban wa 'yɛr ɩka, “Nyã'maar ben be, dãbãɛ ba lɛ be be ɛ,” sɔ̃ɔfʊ na pãa wa naa, a ba sɛ̃, fɩka pɔɔ pʊɔ dɔɔfʊ na dũu wʊ, tɩ ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ faa a ba mãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn a n yɛɛr, yaa be libe pɔ ɛ, ka a bɩbir nyã na wa dũu yɩ a nãnyie kaar ɛ.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Yɩ jaa ãn chãa nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ bibiir, saa ɩ tãsɔɔ bɩɩ, libe pɔ nɩbɛ ɛ.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Bojũu a bala na ma guro, ma gur tãsɔɔ, ka a bala na buu, mɩ ma buu tãsɔɔ.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ an ɩ a chãa lɛ so sɩ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka sɩ nyɔɔrɔ sɩ mãɛ, na sɩ de sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ su, fɩka a nyãa wɩɛ nɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie na ɩ a sɩ faafʊ kur jupil.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba ir sɩ ɩka sɩ di dɔɔyɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka sɩ nyɛ faafʊ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ kpi kʊ sɩ, a lɛ jũu, ka sɩ chɛnɛ na nɩbir bɩɩ, sɩ gur naa, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ na 'mataa be be.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔn taa ãkpãɛn na yɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩtãa a lɛ yɩn ben tʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã n yɛɛr, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na ɩ a yɩ nɩbɛrɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃, bala lɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ yɩ a sɩ Soro sɔr pɔ, na ba kpãana yɩ.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba nɩ nʊ̃fʊ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu, na yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka, yɩ kpãana a bala na ɩ a yãan dẽme tɩ na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na sɩɩr a ba mãɛ, na yɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɩbaalsɩ tara kãnyir nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, ka nɩrɛ jaa ta de yelbier yãan yelbier sãn ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ma maala vɩla kʊrɔ taa nɩ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Yɩ ma tara pʊpɛl sɔ̃ɔ jãa.

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Na yɩ ma puor wʊ yãan yele jaa pɔ, bojũu anyã lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Yɩ ta kpĩin a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bũu ɛ.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Yɩ bɛɛr yele jaa kaa na yɩ nyɔɔ bon 'lɔ na vɩla.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Tɔɔ yi yele jaa na ɩ bier pɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ na ɩ a nyã'maar sʊɔ wʊ chɔɔr yɩ ka yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ. Wʊ maal a yɩ sɩɩr nɩ a yɩ kpɛfʊ nɩ a yɩ ãgãma ka a ɩ chɛchɛ tɩ ta tara chɛfʊ jaa ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã na bʊɔl yɩ tara na yelmãɛ, wʊ̃n maal a lɛ.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ sɩ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a yɛɛr naa yɛpɔbɔ ba jaa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ puorfʊ.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: N kpãkpãana yɩ naa a sɩ Soro yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ, ɩka yɩ kar a gãn nyã kʊ a yɛɛr ba jaa.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Ka a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Pɔɔl, Silasɩ nɩ Timoti lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a Tɛsalonika pupuorbiir na be a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie, a be a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, sɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ yɩ, a mɩ vɩɛl lɛ na a lɛ, bojũu a yɩ sɔɔfʊ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, ka a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ yɩn nʊ̃ taa mɩ lɛ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩ ma wile na sɩ mãɛ pɛɛrɛ yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn pupuorbiir gbulsɩ pɔ, lɛ yɩn tara kãnyir ara kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a sɔɔfʊ yɩn tara a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban 'yɛr 'yɛrdɛbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ, nɩ a dɔɔyɛ yɩn nyɛrɛ.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: A ɩn yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ tor naa, na wʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal yɩ ka yɩ sɛɛn a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ, a 'lɔ pɔ yɩn mɩ na dire a dɔɔyɛ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn tor naa. Wʊn lɩɛb yab a bala na 'yɛr 'yɛrdɛbɛ, 'yɔ̃ɔ ba gefʊ, tɩ kʊ a bala ban 'yɛr

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: 'yɛrdɛbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ, pɛ̃nfʊ, nɩ a sɩn mãɛ. A nɩtɔ̃ na ɩ naa, Nãaŋmɩn na wa ir a sɩ Soro Yesu wiil a saaju nɩ a wʊ kpãɛn malakasɩ, fɩka bũu dagel.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Wʊn gen a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, na baa sɔɔ de a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Bala lɛ na nyɛ gefʊ 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Wʊn oor ban yɩn a sɩ Soro niem, nɩ a wʊ tɩɩr kpɛ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ wa wa a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, wʊn nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ pɔ. An ɩn nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a bala jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ. Yɩ mɩ pʊɔ naa, bojũu yɩ sɔɔn de a sɩ dãasɩɛ sɩn di a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: A anyã tɩɛr sɩn tara jũu, sɩ ma sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka wʊ vɛ̃ ka yɩ sɛɛn a wʊ bʊɔlfʊ, ka a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a yi tɩɛr vɩɛlsɩ nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa na yi a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ sɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn ɩka a sɩ Soro Yesu yuor wʊ nyɛ tɩɩr a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ mɩ pɛɛ yɩ, a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ jũu.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: A lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a lɛ sɩn na lɔ̃ɔ taa a wʊ sɛ̃, sɩ sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa, n yɛɛr,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: ɩka yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a sɔb yɩ nɩbir a nɩbɛ bamɩne na 'yɛrɛ ɩka sɩn lɛ 'yɛr bɩɩ, sɛb ɩka a Yesu wan baar.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa bɛl yɩ a sɔr nyã pɔ ɛ, a bɩbir 'lɔ kʊ̃ wa ɛ, ka a bawõnsɩ ba de nie ir ɛ. Ka a 'lɔ na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa mɩ yi chãa pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Wʊ ma chɩrɛ naa tɩ na wʊ ma 'mɔɔrɔ, wʊ mãɛ gar Nãaŋmɩn, bɩɩ bon jaa ban puoro, a lɛ lɛ wʊ jãnɛ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir maal a wʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Yaa lɩɛb tɩɛr ɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a bonsɩ anyãna a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a bon 'lɔ na pii wʊ a sɔr a wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ yɩ chãa pɔ ɛ, a wʊ sɔ̃ɔ baa wa ta ɛ.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: A wʊ yelsɔɔlaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ na tʊ̃mɔ̃, tɩchɛ a 'lɔ na pii a sɔr yi be.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Ka a bala na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa ɛ na yin chãa pɔ, a bala a Soro Yesu nɩ naa sɔ̃ɔn a wʊ nɛɛ vʊʊr, sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yele 'lɔ na ɩrɛ a wʊ waa sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: A bala na ba sɔɔ de a nɛbinãa ɛ, na wa naa an ɩ a Satan tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, a 'lɔ na de kpɛ̃ɔ, jãnsɩ nɩ jire, nɛ'maa yelsɩ,

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: nɩ yelbier jaa bʊrɔ bɛlfʊ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a nɩbɛ bala na wɛrɛ, ba wɛrɛ naa, bojũu ba tɔr naa ɩka ba nʊ̃ a yelmãɛ na ba nyɛ faafʊ.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na sɔɔ naa ka yele kɔ̃ɔ bɛl ba, nɩ lɛ ban sɔɔ de bon 'lɔ na ɩ jire.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, bala jaa na ba sɔɔ de a yelmãɛ a ãgãn vɔlaa jũu, nɩ a bon 'lɔ na ba tor ɛ, na nyɛn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn 'lɔ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊrɔ yɩ, n yɛɛr, a yɩn a sɩ Soro na nʊ̃, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn kãan ir yɩ a pielfʊ daar ka yɩn nyɛ faafʊ, ka a wʊ Sɩɛ pɛɛrɛ yɩ a yɩ sɔɔ de a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ bʊɔl yɩ a anyãna pɔ, a lɛ yɩn wõ sɩn mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ yɩ. Lɛ lɛ ka yɩn lɔ̃ɔ põn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩɩr.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n yɛɛr yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ na yɩ nyɔɔ a sɩ wiilfʊ sɩn wiil yɩ, ka 'yɛrbir lɛ bɩɩ, nɛɛ lɛ bɩɩ, gãn pɔ lɛ.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto mãɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a sɩ Sãa na nʊ̃ sɩ tun a wʊ wãɛfʊ pɔ, na 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, nɩ tɩɛrtɔ vɩla,

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpãɛn a yɩ nyãa pɔ nɩ vɩla jaa nɩ a 'yɛrbie pɔ.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, a baarfʊ nɩ nyã, yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ sɩ, ka a sɩ Soro 'yɛrbie tʊ̃ɔ yaar fɔɔ tɩ nyɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ jie jaa nɩtãa lɛ an be a yɩ pɔ.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Na yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn ka sɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ yin a putudẽme nɩ a sɩdɛbɛ dẽme nuur pɔ, bojũu nɩrɛ jaa baa tara a sɔɔfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ, wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩn ãkpɛ̃ɔ tɩ gu yɩ a dɛɛr sʊɔ nuur pɔ.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Sɩ tara na sɔɔfʊ a sɩ Soro yuor 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ pɔ ɩka, yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ na, na yɩn chɛnɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ala sɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro wʊ vɛ̃ a yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ yɩ naa nɩ lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na tara nɩ yɩ a kãnyir.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor pɔ, sɩ kpãana yɩ naa n yɛɛr ɩka yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin a bala na ɩ koro dẽme pɔ, nɩ ban ba turo a lɛ sɩn wiil yɩ ɩka yɩ turo ɛ.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Yɩn mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɛɛ naa ɩka yɩ tɔɔrɔ sɩ, saa dɔ̃ɔ yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn be a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ,

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: bɩɩ saa dɔ̃ɔ di nɩrɛ jaa bʊ̃diir tɩ na saa yab ɛ. Sɩ ma tʊ̃n tʊ̃kpãɛn tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩ ta tuo a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa tuor ɛ.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: A nyã ba wiil ɩka saa tara sɔr na ɩ a lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ kaa ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ yɩ ka yɩ tɔɔrɔ.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Sɩ gba na dɔ̃ɔ be a yɩ sɛ̃, sɩ kpãkpãan yɩ naa a yele nyãna ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa ba wa tʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, wʊ taa dire ɛ.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Sɩ wõn ban 'yɛr ɩka nɩbɛ bamɩne ben a yɩ pɔ tara koro na ba yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ, na baa tara tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa ɛ, tɩ ma kpɩɛrɛ a ba taaba yelsɩ pɔ.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna taa ba, sɩ 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor pɔ ɩka, ba tʊ̃ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa jomm na ba nyɛ a ba mãɛ bonsɩ.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩn 'lɔ yɩ taa wa bal nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'lɔ na tor pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ba wa sɔɔ de a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr a gãn nyã pɔ ɛ, yɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ yele sʊ̃ na yɩ taa tara nɩ wʊ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ, ka vã kpɛ wʊ.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Yɩ ta de wʊ ka wʊ ɩ dɔ̃sʊɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ kpãa wʊ wʊn ɩ a yɩ wʊn ɩ a yɛbɛ jũu.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩ Soro na ɩ nyã'maar sʊɔ wʊ kʊ yɩ nyã'maar sɔ̃ɔ jaa, a sɔɩ a jaa pɔ. A sɩ Soro wʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: N sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ a Timoti na ɩ a n binʊ̃nãa sɔɔfʊ jũu. Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: A lɛ ɩn chen a Masedonɩya, n kpãkpãan fʊ naa ɩka fʊ jãnɛ a Efesus na fʊ wile a nɩbɛ bamɩne a ba taa wile wiil yuo go ɛ.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Wiilfʊ ba ka ba ta de ba mãɛ kʊ jir wiilfʊ ɛ, nɩ a sãakpãmɩne tutaa na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. A anyãna lɛ waara nɩ nɛchɩrɛ, ban naa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ nɩ sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a wiilfʊ nyã lɛ waara nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na yi nyãvɩla pɔ, tɩɛr vɩla pɔ nɩ yelmãɛ sɔɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ bamɩne bar naa a anyã tɩ na ba 'yɛrɛ 'yɛr vorsɩ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Ba bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba ɩ a nɛɛ wiwiilbe, na baa bɔ̃ɔ a par a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ na a bonsɩ ala ban 'yɛr ɩka a sɛɛ naa ɛ.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Faa nyɛ, sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a nɛbinãa vɩla na, ala ɩ nɩrɛ tun a lɛ an wile.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, a nɛbinãa ba bin kʊ a nɩtorsɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ bin kʊ a bala na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nɛɛ, nɩ a bawõnsɩ, nɩ a bala na ba turo lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔr ɛ, yelbe-ɩrbɛ, nɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn yuor, nɩ a bala na kʊrɔ a ba sãamɩne, nɩ a ba mamɩne na ba ɩ nɩkʊrbɔ,

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ, nɩ a bala na lɩɛb bʊɔr taa, nɩ a bala na lɩɛb daara a ba taaba, nɩ a jir ŋmarba, nɩ a bala na ŋmara jir pɔrɔ nɩ, nɩ yele jaa na chɩrɛ nɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ.

english_verse: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
translation_verse: A wiilfʊ anyã yire na a dãnfʊ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a tɩɩr sʊɔ 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wʊn de kʊ ma sɛ̃.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: N puor naa a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yãan, wʊn kʊ ma kpɛ̃ɔ bojũu wʊ nyɛn a n sɔɔfʊ, na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: N gba na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn yosɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, gere a nɩbɛ, naa ɩ jɛbʊɔrɔ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn wa kãan a n nɩbaal, bojũu n ɩn a lɛ ɩn ba sɔɔ de nɩ babɔ̃ɔfʊ jũu,

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro wãɛfʊ waa naa, nɩ a sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: A yelmãɛ 'yɛr nɩ nyã, na a ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ sɔɔ de. Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wan a wɛr pɔ ɩka wʊ wa faa yelbe-ɩrbɛ, tɩchɛ maa lɛ gar ba jaa.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a lɛ jũu lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn kaa n nɩbaal, ka a na tʊ a n pɔ, a maa na ɩ a yelbe-ɩrɛ gar ba jaa, ka Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wiil a wʊ kãnyir na ba tara baarfʊ kʊ ma, ka n ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ a bala na wa sɔɔ wʊ nyɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baar fʊ ɛ.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a Nãa 'lɔ na ba tara pielfʊ ɛ, a 'lɔ na ba kpire ɛ, a 'lɔ sɩn ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, wʊ nyɛrɛ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: N bie Timoti, n kʊrɔ fʊ naa a wiilfʊ anyãna tun a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a fʊ 'yɛr, ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ turo a lɛ, fʊn jɛb a jɛb vɩla 'lɔ.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Tara sɔɔfʊ nɩ pʊtɩvɩla, bojũu nɩbɛ bamɩne tɔr naa a vɩla 'lɔ maalfʊ bar ka a ba sɔɔfʊ bʊ̃bʊr.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: A ba pɔ lɛ Hɩmɩnayas nɩ Aleksanda, bala lɛ n de kʊ a Satan ka ba na jãn ta fere sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn yuor ɛ.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a ala na de nie nɩ nyã, n kpãkpãan yɩn ɩka yɩ sʊɔrɔ, Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ, na yɩ ma sʊɔrɔ kʊrɔ taa, tɩ na yɩ ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ a nãmɩne nɩ a bala na ɩ a kpãɛn dẽme, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩn jɛ̃n ãgãn 'maar nɩ nyã'maar na sɩ maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: A nyã lɛ tor, naa pɛlɛ a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ jaa wʊ nyɛ faafʊ, na wʊ wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ be be, nɩ 'ma'maala bʊ̃'yen na be a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nɩsaalba chara pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ a nɩrɛ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: A lɛ lɛ so ka Nãaŋmɩn ir ma ka ɩ mʊmʊɔlɔ nɩ a nɩtʊ̃nãa. Yelmãɛ jaa lɛ n 'yɛrɛ, n ba ŋmara jir ɛ, ɩka n ɩ a wiwile kʊ a bala na ba ɩ a Juu nɩbɛ ɛ, sɔɔfʊ nɩ yelmãɛ pɔ.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Maa bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka jie jaa, a dɔɔr wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn, ba jɛɛr a ba nuur puoro, na ba maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, na ba ta tara suur nɩ nɛchɩrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a pɔbɔ mɩ, ba ma su bon pɔɔ a ãgãn, tɩ na ba ta ma mal pir a jukɔɔl nɩ a sɛlma nɩ a lɛrsɩ bɩɩ a fɔɔr ala daa na ɩ tuo ɛ,

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: tɩchɛ tʊ̃sʊ̃n lɛ sɛɛn a pɔbɔ bala na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ ba ma jãn ɩ gbul na ba siir ba mãɛ chɛlɛ a lɛ a nɩdierbe na wile.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: N ba bar sɔr ɩka pɔɔ jaa wʊ wile bɩɩ tara kpɛ̃ɔ daba ju ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma ɩ gbul.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Satan ba dɔ̃ɔ nie bɛl Adama ɛ, tɩchɛ a Hawa lɛ wʊ bɛl ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a pɔbɔ na nyɛn faafʊ tu bie dɔɔfʊ pɔ, ala ɩ ba chɛnɛ na tara sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ na ba ɩ chɛchɛ nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ vɩla.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ ɩka, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a pupuorbiir nɩdiere, wʊ bʊɔrɔ na tʊ̃sʊ̃.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a pupuorbiir nɩdiere wʊ ta tara mabfʊ jaa ɛ, na wʊ tara pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, na wʊ nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ɩ nɩ'yɔ̃ɔ naa, na wʊ diere sãanba, na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ wiilfʊ.

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: Wʊ ta ɩ dãburo ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ gɔ̃bʊɔr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ siir a wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ta ɩ jɛbʊɔrɔ ɛ, na wʊ ta nʊ̃ libie ɛ.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: A sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ mãɛ yir vɩla, ka a wʊ bibiir wõnõ a wʊ toor, na ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ wʊ.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ a wʊ mãɛ yir kaa ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩ tʊ̃ɔ kaa a pupuorbiir?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ nyã na kpɛ a puorfʊ pɔ paal ɛ, na wʊn wa bʊɔrɔ yuor na wʊ mɩ faa lo a gefʊ pɔ nɩtãa a Satan.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, ban 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊn vã ka wʊ lo a Satan bɛraa pɔ.

english_verse: Church officers should be serious. They must not be liars, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
translation_verse: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ, ba mɩ tara nɩbijɩɛ na ba ta tara nɛɛr ayi ɛ, na ba ta maal ba mãɛ dãnyurbo ɛ, na ba ta ɩ nɩfɔlbɔ ɛ.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Ba nyɔɔ a sɔɔfʊ wiilfʊ yelsɔɔlaa kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ tɩɛr vɩla.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Yɩ de nie bɛɛr ba kaa. Ka bala pãa baa tara 'mabfʊ jaa ɛ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka ba ɩ a sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: A pɔbɔ mɩ, ba tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, na ba ta sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa yoe ɛ, tɩchɛ ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, tɩ tara yelmãɛ yele jaa pɔ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ tara pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ bibiir, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ kaara a wʊ yir vɩla.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: A sʊ̃sʊ̃nbɔ bala na tʊ̃ vɩla, na nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ a ba mãɛ, nɩ a 'lafʊ nɩ sɔɔfʊ 'lɔ ban tara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pɔ.

english_verse: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ na ɩka n wa a fʊ sɛ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã, tɩchɛ n sɛɛrɛ na a kpãafʊ anyã kʊrɔ fʊ.

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ, maa baa tʊ̃ɔ wa fɔɔ ɛ, ka fʊ bɔ̃ɔ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka a pupuorbiir ba nyɔɔrɔ a ba mãɛ, bala lɛ puoro a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ vʊr na ba tɩɛ a yelmãɛ a luur kaar.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Baal ba be be ɛ, a yelsɔɔlaa a sɩ puorfʊ pɔ bɛrma naa. Yesu nyɩr a ãgãn pɔ. Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ir wiil ɩka wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bie. A malakasɩ nyɛ wʊ naa. Ba mʊɔl 'yɛr a wʊ 'yɛr a paalsɩ pɔ, ka ba sɔɔ de wʊ a wɛr wʊ jaa. Nãaŋmɩn de wʊn don be a tɩɩr pɔ.

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'yɛr ka a gã chãa pɔ ɩka a baaraa, bamɩne na bar a ba sɔɔfʊ tɩ chɛlɛ a sɩdɛbɛ bɛlfʊ, nɩ a lɛ a sɩdɛbɛ na wile.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: A wiilfʊ nyã yi naa a nɛɛr ayi dẽme na ma ŋmara a jirsɩ ka a sɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛr fɩka kur tʊl ban 'mon bon 'yɔ̃ɔ jãnɛ.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Ba wile na nɩbɛ ɩka ba ta kultaar ɛ, na ba wile ba ɩka ba chire bʊ̃diir amɩne. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn na maal a kultaa nɩ a bʊ̃diir a jaa ɩka a bala na sɔɔ tɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ, ba ma de tɩ puor wʊ yãan.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃maalaa jaa vɩɛlɛ na, ka a ba sɛɛ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ tɔr bon jaa bar ɛ, ala ɩ sɩ ma den nɩ yãan puorfʊ.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbir nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ maal yaa naa ka a ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ fʊ den a kpãafʊ nyã na fʊ wiil a yɛɛr, fʊn ɩn a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tʊ̃tʊ̃vɩla sʊɔ, na fʊn guolo a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ a sɔɔfʊ wiil vɩla 'lɔ fʊn turo.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Tɔr a jirsɩ ala ban ma ŋmara nɩ a pɔɔnyɔ̃n fuolsɩ, tɩ na fʊ wile a fʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr pɔ.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ mʊɔrɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃kpãɛn, bojũu a sɩ tɩɛrtɔ ben a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ vʊr pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a nɩbɛ bala jaa na sɔɔ wʊ Fafaara.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kpãkpãana na fʊ wile ba a yelsɩ anyãna a jaa.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kaa fʊ pɔrɔ fʊn chɛnɛ ɩ pɔlbile jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊ ɩ wiilfʊ kʊ a bala na tara sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a fʊ 'yɛr, nɩ a fʊ maalfʊ, nɩ a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ a fʊ sɔɔfʊ, nɩ a fʊ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka n wa, mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir kara a Nãaŋmɩn gãn a nɩyɔɔ pɔ, na fʊ mʊɔlɔ tɩ wile nɩ ba.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Ta mel a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn kʊ fʊ ɛ, a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a nɩdierbe na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr tɩ dɔɔl fʊ a ba nuur.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: De a yelsɩ a nyã tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃, na fʊ de fʊ mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, ka nɩrɛ jaa nyɛ lɛ a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na chiine niem.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Bɔ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a wiilfʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ, na fʊ tara kãnyir. Fʊn faan a fʊ mãɛ nɩ a bala na chɛlɛ a fʊ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Ta 'yɛr 'yɛrbikpãɛn kʊ danyɔ̃n ɛ, tɩchɛ 'yɛr baalʊ̃ʊ kʊ wʊ fʊ sãa tɔ sʊɔ kaar, 'yɛr kʊ pɔlbil a fʊ yɛɛr kaar.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: 'Yɛrɛ nɩ a pɔɔnyɔ̃n a fʊ mamɩne kaar, nɩ a pɔɔsarbil a fʊ yɛpɔbɔ kaar, nɩ chɛchɛ ɩfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: 'Yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a pɔɔkɔɛ bala na ɩ pɔɔkɔɛ, tɩ ba tara bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na ba tara bon jaa ɛ, ma den a wʊ tɩɛr wʊ jaa kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ na wʊ ma sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ a wʊ bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ,

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a pɔɔkʊɔr 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ ãgãn vɔlaa, wʊ kpin tɩ yʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Kʊ ba a kpãafʊ anyãna, ka nɩrɛ ta nyɛ a ba 'mabfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ baa sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ ɛ, bɩɩ a wʊ yir dẽme ɛ, a kaara fɩka wʊ tɔr naa a sɔɔfʊ, tɩ ɩrɛ dɛɛr gar nyã na ba ɩ a Yesu turo ɛ.

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ a wʊ tʊ̃ vɩla jũu, nɩ a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ guol a wʊ bibiir, na wʊ ma sɔɔ diere sãanba, na wʊ ma pɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ gbɛɛ, sʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a nɩbaalsɩ, tɩ maala vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ta 'yɔ̃ɔ pɔɔkɔ'yɔlɔ yuor a pɔɔkɔɛ gãn pɔ ɛ, bojũu sɩrɛ kulfʊ vɔlaa wa gar a lɛ ban nʊ̃ a Kɩrɩsɩto, ban bʊɔrɔ na sɩrɛ kulfʊ.

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: A lɛ ban lon Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ pɔ, bojũu ba sɔ̃ɔn a nɛɛ ban põl'yɔ̃ɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto bar.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: A lɛ puor, ba ma bʊɔrɔ na ɩka ba yʊɔrɔ pɔrɔ tulo yie yʊɔrɔ, a ba ɩ yie tuulfʊ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ ba ɩn gagarsɩ, na ba kpɩɛrɛ nɩbɛ 'yɛr 'yɛrsɩ pɔ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ na ba sɛɛ ɩka ba 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n bʊɔrɔ na ɩka pɔɔkɔɛ na chɛnɛ kpãɛn, ba kul sɩrbɛ, na ba dɔɔ bibiir, na ba tʊ̃ɔ ɩ pɔɔ mɩn kaara a ba yie, na ba ta kʊ a dɔ̃sʊɔ sɔr ka wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a sɩ yuor ɛ.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Ala ɩ pɔɔ nyã jaa na puoro tara yir dẽme ka ba ɩ pɔɔkɔɛ, wʊ kaara ba tɩ ta kʊ a pupuorbiir wõm ɛ. A pupuorbiir ba kaara pɔɔkɔɛ bala tɛɛ na ba tara nɩrɛ jaa, ka wʊn kaa ba ɛ.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: A nɩdierbe bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ vɩla, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba, tɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ ba nɩ bonsɩ, bala lɛ mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr tɩ wile.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn gãn 'yɛr ɩka, “Ta lũ a nadar nɛɛ 'lɔ wa vara a chi ɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Taa ɩrɛ wa sɔɔrɔ nɩbʊ̃'yen 'yɛr wʊn 'yɛr dɔɔl a nɩdiere ju ka bala ba ta ayi bɩɩ ata ɛ.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: A bala na ma maala a yeldɛbɛ, wiil ba a ba sɔ̃ɔnaa a nɩyɔɔ niem, ka a ba taaba na chɛ na joro dãbãɛ.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: N kpãana yɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩ a malakasɩ bala wʊn ir niem ɩka, yɩ gu yɩ mãɛ a kpãafʊ anyãna pɔ, na yɩ ta oor ɛ. Yɩ taa turo nɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Ta pɔɔ ir nɩrɛ ka wʊ ɩ nɩdiere ɛ, ta pʊɔ a nɩbɛ bamɩne yeldɛbɛ pɔ ɛ, gu fʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Ta nyuro kʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, ma nyũ dãa bãlãa a fʊ pʊɔ baal jũu, a fʊn maa yaar tɩ ɩ baal ɛ.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ bamɩne yeldɛbɛ gãn chãa pɔ, na a dɔ̃ɔ ba nie chen a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ jie, tɩchɛ ka bamɩne yeldɛbɛ ma tu ba chen a be.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a tʊ̃vɩɛl amɩne ma gãn chãa pɔ, a ala gba na ba yi ɛ, kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔɔl ɛ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Bala jaa na be a gbãgbaar tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na tʊ̃ɔ ba, ka nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn yuor 'yɛrdɛɛr ɛ, nɩ a sɩ wiilfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: A gbãgbaar bala na tara a nɩbɛrɛ a ba ɩ Yesu turbo, ba ta vɛ̃ ba 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, ban 'mataa puoro jũu ɛ, ba ir nyãa 'yɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ ba, bojũu ba puoro naa ka ba nʊ̃ ba. Wile a anyãna na fʊ kpãkpãana ba.

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wiil wiil yor na ba tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wiilfʊ ɛ, nɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbie na 'yɛr ɛ,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: a nɩbɛ nyã wile na wʊ mãɛ, na waa bɔ̃ɔ bon jaa ɛ. Wʊ ma chɩrɛ na nɩ a 'yɛrbie, bojũu a nyɛntãan fɩka a wʊ tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔ naa. A lɛ vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ tara nyuur na wʊ ma jɛɛrɛ, na wʊ ma tʊrɔ a wʊ taaba, na wʊ ma tara tɩɛr dɛɛr nɩ a wʊ taaba.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Na ba pãa ma chɩrɛ taa nɩ tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔnsɩ. Baa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ, na ba tɩɛr ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ ɩn lefʊ yele lɛ.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn sɔr tufʊ ɩn lefʊ bon, ala ɩ a ala fʊn tara sɛɛn fʊ naa.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Bojũu saa waan bon jaa a wɛr nyã pɔ ɛ, na sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ de bon jaa yin a wɛr pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ sɩ tara na bʊ̃diir nɩ bʊ̃sursɩ, sɩ vɛ̃ ka a sɛɛn sɩ.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: A bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba ɩ tara dẽme, ma lon bɛɛr kaa chɛbaa pɔ, ka jɔl tɩɛr nɩ vɔldɛbɛ ma tɔɔ a nɩbɛ chiine sɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a wɛfʊ jie.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Bojũu libie nʊ̃fʊ ɩ naa yelbier jaa bʊrɔ nyɩɩr, ka a bamɩne na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba le, ba tɔɔn jãan a yelmãɛ, na ba kpɛ wõm pɔ.

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ, tɔɔ yi a anyãna a jaa pɔ, na fʊ turo yeltorsɩ, na fʊ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ, tara sɔɔfʊ na fʊ tara nʊ̃fʊ, na fʊ tara kãnyir, na fʊ ɩ nɩ hɛ lɛ lɛ lɛ.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Jɛb a sɔɔfʊ jɛɛr na fʊ nyɔɔ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ taa lɛɛ. 'Lɔ pɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl fʊ a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ fʊn chiir a fʊ pʊɔ a nɩyɔɔ niem.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: N kpãkpãana fʊ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na kʊrɔ a bonsɩ a jaa nyɛvʊr niem, nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na 'yɛr a wʊ yelmãɛ na wʊ chiir a wʊ pʊɔ a nãa Pontius Pilate niem,

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: n kpãkpãana fʊ naa ɩka fʊ bɔ̃ɔ tara a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ ka a ta tara dɛɛr, bɩɩ 'mabfʊ ɛ, tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa daar.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na waan a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn 'yɔ̃ɔ. Nãaŋmɩn tɛɛ lɛ sɛɛn dãnfʊ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ, na wʊ ɩ a nãmɩne ba jaa Nãa, nɩ a sorbo ba jaa Soro.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ tɛɛ lɛ be be ba kpire ɛ, na wʊ be chãa 'lɔ pɔ nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ gbʊr ɛ, a 'lɔ nɩrɛ na ba nyɛrɛ ɛ, bɩɩ na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ wʊ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ sɛɛn sɔ̃ɔ jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: A bala na ɩ a taraa dẽme a pʊ̃pãanyã, kpãa ba ɩka ba ta wile ba mãɛ bɩɩ de a ba tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a bʊ̃tarsɩ ala pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ba dɩɛl Nãaŋmɩn nyã na kʊ sɩ a bʊ̃bʊrɔ bʊrɔsɩ a jaa a sɩ de chɩlɛ nɩ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Kpãa ba a ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ vɩla na ba nʊ̃ɔ a vɩla tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, na ba ɩ yɛ̃bɔ̃ɔnbɔ põnõ a ba bonsɩ.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: A lɛ ban bine na nãbonsɩ guro nɩ a nɩdaar, ka ba na nyɛ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: A fʊ̃ʊ Timoti, gu a ala ban de 'yɔ̃ɔ a fʊ nũu pɔ, na fʊ bar a 'yɛrvor nɩ a nɛchɩrɛ ala na ba tara par ɛ, ban bʊɔlɔ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ,

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: bamɩne na kpãkpãana nɩ a yelsɩ anyãna, ba bar a sɔɔfʊ sɔr. Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa tu a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ pɔ, nɩ a nɛɛ wʊn tɩr kʊ sɩ a nyɛvʊr nyã na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ,

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: sɛɛrɛ naa a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Timoti na ɩ a n binʊ̃nãa. Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: N ma puor a Nãaŋmɩn nyã ɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ yãan nɩ a n tɩɛr wʊ jaa nɩtãa a lɛ a n sãakpãmɩne na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ, n maa ĩin a fʊ yele ɛ, naa ma tɩɛr fʊ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ fʊ tãsɔɔ nɩ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: N ma lɩɛb tɩɛr a fʊ nɩbikʊ̃ɔ fʊn ŋma, naa bʊɔrɔ ɩka n nyɛ fʊ ka a n pʊɔ pɛl.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: N lɩɛb tɩɛr a fʊ yelmãɛ sɔɔfʊ, a 'lɔ a fʊ makʊ̃ma Loisɩ nɩ a a fʊ ma Yunɩsɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara, lɛ lɛ n mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka fʊ mɩ tara wʊ naa.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n lɩɛb tɩɛr fʊ ɩka fʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir fire a Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ 'lɔ na be a fʊ pɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ dɔɔl fʊ a n nuur ka fʊ nyɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wʊn kʊ sɩ ba ɩ dãbãɛ Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ Sɩɛ 'lɔ na kʊ sɩ kpɛ̃ɔ ka sɩ tara nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Taa joro vã nɩ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr mʊɔlfʊ ɛ, bɩɩ a maa ban pɔɔ a die pɔ a wʊ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊɔ ma a sɩ 'mataa dire a dɔɔyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ pɔ, na fʊ dɩɛl a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ faa sɩ na wʊ bʊɔl sɩ ɩka sɩ ɩ chɛchɛ, a ba ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jũu lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ bɔfʊ nɩ a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu lɛ. Sɩ nyɛn a wãɛfʊ nyã a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ tɩchɛ ka a wɛr wa maal.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã, Nãaŋmɩn wiil sɩn a wãɛfʊ nyã tu a sɩ Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa a wɛr pɔ, na wʊ wa tʊ̃ɔ kũu tɩ na wʊ de a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ wiil sɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyãna jũu lɛ wʊ ir ma ɩka n ɩ mʊmʊɔlɔ nɩ nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ wiwile.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ n dire a dɔɔyɛ, tɩchɛ vã ba kpɛ ma ɛ, bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ ɩn sɔɔ naa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka wʊn gu ma naa tɩ tãn a bɩbir 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ nɩ a ala wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔ a n nuur pɔ.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Nyɔɔ a 'yɛr sʊ̃ ala a lɛ nɛ fʊn wõ yi a n sɛ̃, a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ ala na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Gu a yelmãɛ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de 'yɔ̃ɔ a fʊ nuur pɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sʊ̃ʊfʊ 'lɔ na be a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Fʊ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a bala ba jaa na be a Asɩya tɔr man bar, Fɩgɛlusɩ nɩ Hɛmogɛnusɩ gba mɩ pʊɔ ba naa.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn wʊ maal vɩla kʊ a Onesiforusɩ nɩ a wʊ yir dẽme, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ ma 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ma ãkpɛ̃ɔ, vã ba kpɛ wʊ ɩn be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ jũu ɛ.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Wʊ gba na wa wa a Worom, wʊ yɔ bɔ man nɩbijɩɛ tɩ nyɛ ma.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro wʊ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ a wʊ nyɛ maal vɩla a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir daar. Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ wʊn sʊ̃ʊ ma jã be a Efesus.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ na ɩ a n bie, pãa kpɛ̃mɛ a wãɛfʊ 'lɔ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: A lɛ fʊn wõ a n sɛ̃ a nɩyɔɔ bala niem, de wiil a yelmãɛ dẽme mɩ nɩ na tʊ̃ɔ wiil a ba taaba.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: A fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, pʊɔ sɩ dire a dɔɔyɛ nɩtãa Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto soja mãɛ.

english_verse: No one wins an athletic contest without obeying the rules.
translation_verse: ) Na wʊ lɛ 'yɛr, “Vɛ̃ ka a bala jaa na bʊɔlɔ a sɩ Soro yuor, tɔɔ yɩ putuyele pɔ.”

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: A kʊɔraa 'lɔ na ba joro yãan ɛ, lɛ ma de a bʊ̃dɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Tɩɛr kaa a lɛ ɩn 'yɛrɛ, bojũu a sɩ Soro na kʊ fʊ naa a jaa par bɔ̃ɔfʊ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Tɩɛr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ir a kũu pɔ, na yi a David bala pɔ. A anyãna lɛ ɩ a maa 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ,

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: a pɔ lɛ n dire a dɔɔyɛ, a ba wa lũ ma nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ nɩdɛɛr kaar. Tɩchɛ baa tʊ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr lũ ɛ.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu lɛ so, ka nyɔɔ n mãɛ a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na ir jũu ka ba mɩ na nyɛ a faafʊ 'lɔ na be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr na ɩ yelmãɛ nɩ nyã ɩka, ala ɩ sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ 'mataa kpi, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na 'mataa tara a nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ nyɔɔn sɩ mãɛ, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na 'mataa di a nãa. Ala ɩ sɩ chiir wʊ naa, wʊ mɩ na chiir sɩ naa.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩn baa tara yelmãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ 'lɔ chɛnɛ na tara yelmãɛ, bojũu wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ chiir a wʊ mãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tɩɛrɛ ba a anyãna, na fʊ kpãana ba a Nãaŋmɩn niem ɩka, ba ta chɩrɛ taa nɩ a 'yɛrbie ɛ. A ba maala vɩla jaa ɛ, tɩchɛ a ma sɔ̃ɔn a bala na chɛlɛ tɩɛr.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Mɔ̃ na fʊ de fʊ mãɛ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, an ɩ a 'lɔ mãɛ lɛ pɛɛ fʊ, na fʊ ɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ 'lɔ na ba joro vĩ ɛ, na fʊ wile a yelmãɛ 'yɛr na tor.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: A ba wiilfʊ na yɔɔn gbõtor kaar. Hɩmɩnayas nɩ Filetusɩ mɩ pʊɔ ba naa.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Ba bar a yelmãɛ tɩ 'yɛr ɩka kũu pɔ ir fʊ po naa, na ba sɔ̃ɔn bamɩne sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr par kparaa ara na, ka a sɛbie anyã sɛb a wʊ pɔ, “A sɩ Soro bɔ̃ɔn a bala jaa na ɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ.” (A Sɔrfʊ Gãn

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: A yir kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ, bʊ̃dimaal bomo ma ben be, ka amɩne ɩ sɛlma, nɩ kpãna, tɩchɛ ka amɩne mɩ ɩ daar nɩ yɔɔraa, ka amɩne ɩ bʊ̃'yɔ̃ɔnsɩ, ka amɩne ɩ babãma bomo.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ jaa na pɛɛn wʊ mãɛ a bonsɩ anyã ɩn bʊɔl kaar, wʊn kaara na bʊ̃dimaal bomo na tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ na wʊ oo wʊ mãɛ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a yir sʊɔ, ka wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de maal tʊ̃vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Tɔɔ yɩ a pɔlbil ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ pɔ, na fʊ turo yeltorsɩ, na fʊ tara sɔɔfʊ, nɩ nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ nyã'maar, 'matãan a bala na puoro a sɩ Soro nɩ a nyã chɛchɛ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Tɔr a jɔl yele nɩ a nɛchɩrɛ na ba tara par ɛ, bojũu a maa yaara tɩ waan jɛɛr ɛ.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: A ba sɛɛ ɩka a sɩ Soro tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ bʊɔrɔ jɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ maala vɩla kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa, na wʊ tʊ̃ɔ wile, na wʊ tara kãnyir.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: A bala na chɩrɛ, wiil ba jomm, amɩne Nãaŋmɩn na wa sɔɔ naa ka ba lɩɛb a ba tɩɛr, na ba wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a ba tɩɛr na yuo a ba faa ba mãɛ yin a Satan chɛbaa pɔ, a lɛ wʊn nyɔɔr ba a ba ɩrɛ a wʊ bɔfʊ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bɔ̃ɔn a yele nyãna ɩka a bɩbir baaraa daar, dɔɔyɛ na ben be.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ na nʊ̃n a ba mãɛ, libinʊ̃nbɔ, mãɛ 'mɔɔfʊ, ba kʊ̃ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩbɛ ɛ, na ba kʊ̃ wõnõ a ba dɔɔrbɔ toor ɛ, ka bon maa sɛɛ ba ɛ, na ba kʊ̃ ɩ chɛchɛ ɛ.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: Ba maa tara nɩrɛ tɩɛr ɛ, ba maa vɛ̃ kʊ nɩrɛ ɛ, na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa yoe, baa nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ ɛ, na ba 'yɛrɛ 'yɛrbikpãɛn, na ba chire yelvɩla.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: Ban ɩn gagarsɩ, na ba ɩ jukpãɛn dẽme, na ba bʊɔrɔ yuor, ban nʊ̃n bʊ̃vɩɛlsɩ gar ban nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn,

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: ba maal ba mãɛ Nãaŋmɩn puorbo kaar, tɩ chiir a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ. Ta gbɛɛrɛ ba ɛ.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: A ba pɔ lɛ a bamɩne ma fara kpɩɛrɛ a yie pɔ na ba yʊɔrɔ bɛlɛ a pɔbɔ bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛr gaa jie ɛ, ka a ba yeldɛbɛ dɔl taa, ka a yeldɛbɛ jaa vɔlaa ma nyɔɔ ba.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Ba ma jãna na bɩbir jaa tɩ ba maa tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ a Janɩsɩ nɩ Jãbɩrɛsɩ na ba sɔɔ a Mosesɩ ɛ, lɛ mɩ lɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna mɩ tɔr a yelmãɛ, baa tara tɩɛr vɩla ɛ, a sɔɔfʊ yele jũu, ba ɩn faa.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: A ba yele kʊ̃ chen tɛɛr ɛ, a lɛ an kaara a nɩbɛ ayi banyãna. Nɩrɛ jaa na nyɛn a lɛ ban jɔl jã.

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ gba jaa nyɛn a n wiilfʊ bɔ̃ɔ, lɛ a n beraa na kaara, bon 'lɔ ɩn bʊɔrɔ a n nyɛvʊr pɔ, a n sɔɔfʊ, a n kãnyir, a n nʊ̃fʊ lɛ ɩn ara kpɛ̃ɔ,

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: a dɔɔyɛ ɩn di, nɩ a lɛ ban ge ma. Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ na pɔɔ ma a Antiok, nɩ a Ikoniyum, nɩ a Lɩstɩra tẽn pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a sɩ Soro faa ma yin a jaa pɔ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Sɩrɛ jaa, a bala jaa na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba turo a Nãaŋmɩn sɔr, na ba pɛlɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto pʊɔ, na nyɛn gefʊ,

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a putudẽme nɩ a bala na maal ba mãɛ nɩmɩn kaar, na kpɛ̃n sɔ̃ɔnaa pɔ, na ba wɛ, ba bɛlɛ naa ba taaba, ka ba kpɛ taa bɛlfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ, mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nɩ a lɛ fʊn jãn na fʊ sɔɔ de, bojũu fʊ bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ sɛ̃ fʊn jãn,

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: nɩ lɛ a fʊ bibile sɔ̃ɔ jaa fʊn bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn, na tʊ̃ɔ sʊ̃ʊ fʊ ka fʊ tara yɛ̃, nyɛ faafʊ, fʊn sɔɔ de a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn gãma a jaa yi naa a wʊ sɛ̃, na a sɛɛ wiilfʊ, na a wile 'mabfʊ nɩ chɔɔrfʊ, naa na wiil nɩrɛ ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor.

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩrɛ na bɔ̃ɔ na wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ kʊ tʊ̃vɩla jaa bʊrɔ.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: N kpãana fʊ naa a Nãaŋmɩn niem nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa tɔɔr a kũn nɩ a vʊɛ 'yɛr, a wʊ waa daar, nɩ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ.

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: Mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr sɔ̃ɔ jaa, ka sɔr yuon bɩɩ ka sɔr ba yuo ɛ, kpãana ba, na fʊ wile, na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba ãkpãɛn, na fʊ tara kãnyir wile nɩ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɔ̃ɔ waara ka nɩbɛ kʊ̃ lɛ chɛlɛ a wiilfʊ ala na tor ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a ba tobo jɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba 'yɛryor wõfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka ba bʊɔl wiwiilyɔɔ lɔ̃ɔtaar ka ba wile ba lɛ ban bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Ban pãa lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ na ba chɛlɛ a wiilfʊ ala na ɩ jire.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, na fʊ tara kãnyir a fʊ dɔɔyɛ pɔ, na fʊ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, na fʊ tʊ̃ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Bojũu a n nyɛvʊr nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ ma ben baaraa ka n kʊ̃ yaar tɩ kpi ɛ.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Maa jɛb a jɛbvɩla, naa jo baar tun a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, naa tara a sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩ Soro na ɩ a yelmãɛ tɔ tɔɔrɔ bin naa a nyɛvʊr nãa jupil gun ma, wʊn na kʊ ma a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, maa tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala jaa na nʊ̃ a wʊ waa.

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Mɔ̃ wa a n sɛ̃ fɔfɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Bojũu Demas na nʊ̃ a dɩna wɛr jũu tɔr ma naa tɩ chen a Tɛsalonika, ka a Kɩrɩsɩn mɩ chen Galatiya ka Titusɩ mɩ chen Dalmatiya.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka tɛɛ lɛ be a n sɛ̃. Yɔbɔ Maakɩ ka yɩ 'mataa wa, bojũu wʊ tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃ na wʊn sʊ̃ʊ ma a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: N tʊ̃n Tɩchɩkusɩ be a Efesus.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ wa waara, de a fuuvɛɛ 'lɔ ɩn bar be a Toroyas be a Kapusɩ sɛ̃ nɩ a gãma na fʊ 'mataa den a sɛɛr ala ban sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɛr gãn pɔ waan.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksanda na ɩ a sãakuro maal man dɛɛr, a sɩ Soro na yab wʊn a lɛ wʊn maal ma.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ mɩ, bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ yele sʊ̃, bojũu wʊ chɩrɛ naa a lɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: A dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ n 'yɛr faa a n mãɛ, nɩrɛ jaa ba wa pʊɔ ma ɛ, tɩchɛ ba jaa tɔr man bar. Nãaŋmɩn wʊ ta de a lɛ yãan ba sãma ɛ.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro ara na gu ma na wʊ kʊ ma kpɛ̃ɔ, ka a na tu a n 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a 'yɛrbir tʊ̃ɔ mʊɔl, ka a bala na ba puor ɛ, wõ naa. Lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn faa ma a jukpɛ̃ɛ nɛɛ pɔ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro na faa man yin yelbier a jaa pɔ, na wʊ chiin ma a wʊ saaju nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Puor Pɩrɩsɩla nɩ Akuila, nɩ a Onesiforusɩ yir dẽme ba jaa.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erastus chɛnɛ na be Korɩntɩ. Torofimusɩ an ɔɔrɔ ka n bar wʊ be Miletusɩ.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ wa tɩchɛ ka ɔɔr daar ta. Yubulus puoro fʊ naa nɩ Pudɛnsɩ nɩ Linus nɩ Kɩlaudiya nɩ a yɛɛr ba jaa.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃, ka a wʊ wãɛfʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa, Nãaŋmɩn ir man tʊ̃ ɩka n tɩ sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩchɛl irsɩ sɔɔfʊ ka ba bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ tɩ turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba turo.

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: Ala lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔn, a Nãaŋmɩn na ba ŋmaara jir ɛ, na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ a nyɛvʊr nyã yele sɛrɛ tɩ bon jaa wa piel.

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na sɛɛ na wa ta, Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa ka a wʊ 'yɛr gã chãa pɔ, ka n 'yɛrɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara na de kʊ ma ɩka n 'yɛr.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: N sɛɛrɛ na a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Titusɩ na sɔɔ a Yesu jũu, fʊ ɩ naa a n bie. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ sɩ Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jie, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Lɛ na so ka n bar fʊ a Kɩrete paal nɩ nyã, ɩka fʊ baar maal a ala na chɛ ka a tor, tɩ na fʊ ir nɩbɛrɛ a tẽn ala nɩ tãa lɛ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wiil fʊ.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: A nɩdiere wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɩbɛ na nyɛrɛ yeldɛbɛ a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, wʊ ɩ pɔɔ bʊ̃'yen sʊɔ, na wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ a wʊ bibiir na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, na ba ta ɩ bigãlsɩ nɩ bibawõnsɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: A nɩdiere an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ wʊ kaara jũu, wʊ ta ɩ tuor kʊ a nɩbɛ ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ suur na ire fɔfɔɔ ɛ, na wʊ mɩ ta ɩ dãnburo ɛ, wʊ ta ɩ nɩrɛ na jɛɛrɛ, bɩɩ bʊɔrɔ libie na ba tu sɔr ɛ.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na diere sãanba, na wʊ nʊ̃ vɩla maalfʊ, na wʊ ɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nyɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ, na wʊ ma ɩrɛ a lɛ na tor, na wʊ ɩ nɩchɛchɛ, tɩ kpãana wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
translation_verse: Wʊ nyɔɔ a yelmãɛ 'yɛr nyã tara kpɛ̃ɔ nɩtãa lɛ an wiil. Lɛ lɛ wʊn tʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a bamɩne ãkpãɛn nɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ tɩ dɛn a bala na kpɛrɛ.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Bojũu a ba yɔɔ bala na ɩ a bawõnsɩ nɩ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ nɩ bɛ̃bɛlbɛ bala na yi a yɔŋmarba jie.

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: A sɛɛ naa ɩka fʊ ŋmaa ba sɔr, bojũu ba tu naa a ba bɔdɛbɛ bɛl yir gbulo nɩbɛ na ba wile yelsɩ ala na ba sɛɛ ɩka ba wile ɛ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: A ba yɛ̃ sʊɔ kɔ̃ɔ gba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a ba 'yɛr, “Yɩn Kɩrete dẽme ɩn jir ŋmarba. Yɩ kaara fɩka dʊ̃dɛbɛ, koro dẽme na bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃diir tɛɛ.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: A dãasɩɛ nyã ɩn sɩrɛ, a lɛ jũu, kpãa ba nɩbijɩɛ ka a ba sɔɔfʊ kpɛ̃mɛ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ pɔ,

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: ka ba ta chɛlɛ a Juu nɩbɛ fuolsɩ nɩ a bala na bar a yelmãɛ ɛ. Ba tɔr a ba wiilfʊ.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Bala jaa na tara pʊtɩvɩla, yele jaa vɩla na kʊ ba, tɩchɛ bala na tara pʊtɩdɛɛr, na baa sɔɔ de ɛ, yele jaa ɩn dɛɛr a ba sɛ̃. Sɩrɛ jaa lɛ, a ba pʊtɩɛrsɩ dɛɛ naa.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Ba mɩ ɩka ba bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩchɛ a ba maalfʊ pɔ, ba tɔr wʊ naa. Ba ɩn nɩ'laarsɩ, bawõnsɩ na ba sɛɛn vɩla maalfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ Titusɩ, wile a nɩbɛ a lɛ na ɩ a yelmãɛ wiilfʊ.

english_verse: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
translation_verse: Wile a danyɔ̃n ka ba bal nɩbir, lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba na ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, ka a ba sɔɔfʊ nɩ nʊ̃fʊ nɩ kãnyir tarfʊ chaar kʊ a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ, wile a pɔɔnyɔ̃n ka ba joro Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ na ba ta ɩ gagarsɩ ɛ, bɩɩ de ba ju 'yɔ̃ɔ dãa pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka ba wile a lɛ na vɩla.

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: tɩ nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ nɩ pʊpɛl, tɩ ɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a yir na ba maala vɩla, tɩ turo a ba sɩrbɛ nɛɛ, ka nɩrɛ jaa ta nyɛ yeldɛɛr a ba Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ, 'yɔ̃ɔ a pɔlbil ãkpãɛn ka ba nyɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ.

english_verse: Always set a good example for others. Be sincere and serious when you teach.
translation_verse: Yele jaa pɔ, vɛ̃ ka ba nyɛ a fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ maal vɩla jãnɛ. Vɛ̃ ka ba nyɛ a fʊ nɩbijɩɛ nɩ yelmãɛ a fʊ wiilfʊ pɔ,

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: a fʊ 'yɛr na tor jũu, fʊ yuor kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ ɛ, ka a vĩ kpɛ a bala na kpɛrɛ fʊ, bojũu baa nyɛ 'yɛrdɛɛr jaa na 'yɛr a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Wiil a gbãgbaar ka ba turo a ba nɩbɛrɛ nɛɛ yele jaa pɔ, na yɩ pɛl a ba pʊʊr na yɩ ta lɩɛrɛ ba nɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: Ba tara yelmãɛ yele jaa pɔ, na ba ta juro a ba puor ɛ. Yɩn be ɩrɛ a lɛ, yele jaa yɩn maala, ban nyɛ naa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a sɩ yeldɛɛr Fafaara 'yɛr nʊ̃mɔ̃ a ba sɛ̃.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn wiil sɩ naa a wʊ wãɛfʊ ka nɩrɛ jaa na tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ faafʊ.

english_verse: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
translation_verse: A wile sɩ naa ka sɩ na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a ala Nãaŋmɩn na 'laar, bɩɩ vɛ̃ ka a wɛr nyã vɔlaa dib sɩ ɛ, tɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ mãɛ nyɔɔfʊ nɩ yeltorsɩ nɩ yelmãɛ a dɩna wɛr nyã pɔ.

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: A lɛ sɩn chɛnɛ chɛlɛ ka a wɛr nyã pɔ, sɩ chɛnɛ na chɛlɛ a bɩbir kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara na lɩɛb wa nɩ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ kpi a sɩ jũu na wʊ da sɩ faa sɩ yin a putuyele nyã pɔ, na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ dɛbɛ bar ka sɩ ɩ wʊ mãɛ nɩbɛ, ka vɩla maalfʊ ɩ sɩ vɔlaa.

english_verse: Teach these things, as you use your full authority to encourage and correct people. Make sure you earn everyone's respect.
translation_verse: Wile a anyãna, na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn ba ãkpãɛn tɩ kpãana ba nɩbijɩɛ. Ta vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ jaa kaa fʊ pɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Tɩɛr a Yesu turbo ɩka ba turo a ba nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme nɛɛ tɩ turo a lɛ jaa ban 'yɛr, na ba chɔɔr gu vɩla jaa maalfʊ.

english_verse: and not say cruel things or argue. They should be gentle and kind to everyone.
translation_verse: Ba ta ma ŋmara taa poe ɛ, tɩchɛ ba tara nyã'maar nɩ nɩrɛ jaa na ba tɩɛrɛ taa yele. Ba siir ba mãɛ sɩrɛ jaa ka nɩbɛ nyɛ.
