english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ jɔlɔ a ba kaar nɩ bawõnsɩ ka a Satan bɛl sɩ ka a wɛr nyã bonsɩ a jaa ma ɩrɛ sɩ vɔlaa, ka sɩ lɩɛb gbãgbaar, na sɩ pãa kpɩɛrɛ nɩ ger nɩ nyuur, ka ba 'laar sɩ, ka sɩ mɩ 'laar 'laar taa.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɔ̃ɔ na wa ta, a sɩ Fafaara Nãaŋmɩn maal vɩla nɩ a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ na wa wa,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: wʊ faa sɩ naa, a ba ɩ a sɩ yelvɩɛl sɩn maal jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ a wʊ nɩbaal jũu lɛ. Wʊ faa sɩ naa na wʊ pɛɛ sɩ tu a dɔɔfʊ gbɛɛ ayi ka a wʊ Sɩɛ maal sɩ a sɩ ɩ nɩpaalaa,

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: a Sɩɛ nyã lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tu a Yesu na ɩ a sɩ Fafaara 'yɔ̃ɔ kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: A lɛ lɛ, wʊn ben maal sɩ ka sɩ tor a wʊ wãɛfʊ jũu, sɩ ɩn a wʊ bʊ̃dirbe, na sɩ lɔb yãan bar guro nɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ 'yɛr nɩ nyã, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka fʊ do ara a yelsɩ anyãna pɔ wile nɩbijɩɛ, a lɛn vɛ̃ naa ka a bala na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn, de a ba sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a ba tɩɛr ɩrɛ nɩ yelvɩɛlsɩ tɛɛ. A lɛ vɩɛlɛ naa tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ta chɛlɛ a jɔl chiirfʊ nɩ lɛ a sãakpãmɩne na tu taa mana bɩɩ jɛɛrɛ a nɛɛ 'lɔ ban bin a kõro jaa ɛ, bojũu a anyãna ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
translation_verse: Kpãa nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ooro gbɛbʊ̃'yen, 'lɔ wa tɔr, lɛ kpãa wʊ a gbɛɛ ayi sʊɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ wa tɔr, fʊ ir nũu tɩchɛ wʊ bar.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a nɩrɛ nyã tɔ sʊɔ lo naa, wʊ mãɛ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka wʊ ɩn dɛɛr.

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n tʊ̃ Atɩmasɩ bɩɩ Tɩchɩkusɩ a fʊ sɛ̃, ãsʊɔ jaa na wa tɩ, mɔ̃ tɩ na fʊ tuor ma a be a Nikopolis, bojũu be lɛ n bʊɔrɔ ɩka n chen a ɔɔr sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Mɔ̃ na fʊ sʊ̃ʊ a 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ Jenasɩ nɩ Apolosɩ ka ba ta faa bon jaa a sɔr pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Our people should learn to spend their time doing something useful and worthwhile.
translation_verse: Vɛ̃ ka a sɩ nɩbɛ jãn vɩla maalfʊ ka ban tʊ̃ɔ maal a ala ban bʊɔrɔ na ba ta ɩ nɩhayasɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Bala jaa na be ka a n sɛ̃, puoro fʊ naa. Puor a bala na nʊ̃ sɩ a sɔɔfʊ jũu. A wãɛfʊ a be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl ban pɔɔ die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu nɩ Timoti na ɩ a sɩ yɛbɛ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a Filemon na ɩ a sɩ badatuo na wʊ ɩ a sɩ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ ãsʊɔ,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: na sɩ mɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ Afɩya na ɩ a sɩ yɛpɔɔ, nɩ Archipus na ɩ a sɩ soja ãsʊɔ, nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ma 'lɔɔ a fʊ yir puor.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, a be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: N ma puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan sɔ̃ɔ jaa, naa ma pʊrɔ a fʊ yuor a n Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ pɔ,

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: bojũu n wõn a fʊ sɔɔfʊ fʊn tara a sɩ Soro Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ fʊn tara nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka fʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir fʊ̃ʊ wa mana a sɔɔfʊ 'yɛr, na fʊ tara par bɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a yelvɩɛl ala sɩn tara a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: N yɛbɛ, a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ vɛ̃n ka n chɩlɛ, na a 'yɔ̃ɔ ma ãkpɛ̃ɔ, bojũu fʊ 'maan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ nyãn.

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: tɩchɛ n sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa a nʊ̃fʊ jũu. Maa Pɔɔl pãa ɩn danyɔ̃ɔ, naa ɩ nɩrɛ ban pɔɔ die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu.

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa a Onɩsɩmɔsɩ na ɩ a maa bie, 'lɔ lɛ lɩɛb a n bie a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ, waa dɔ̃ɔ tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ tara na tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a fʊ̃ʊ nɩ a maa.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: N tʊ̃nɔ̃ wʊ naa, wʊ ɩn a maa mãɛ nyãa ɩka wʊ lɩɛb wa a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Ɩn taa nʊ̃n ɩka wʊ be a n sɛ̃ na wʊ ta de a fʊ jie sʊ̃nɔ̃ ma ban 'yɔ̃ɔ ma a bɔ̃jɔrsɩ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ mʊɔlfʊ jũu,

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n maal yele jaa ka maa ba sʊʊr fʊ kaa ɛ, ka a vɩla jaa na yi a fʊ nyãa pɔ naa taa ɩ fɩrfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Amɩne sɛ̃, ala lɛ tɔ̃ɔ so ka wʊ ŋmaa yi a fʊ sɛ̃ a bãlãa, tɩchɛ na wʊn lɛ wa be a fʊ sɛ̃ jaa kpo kpo.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã waa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩ gbãgbaa ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn gar gbãgbaa, na wʊ ɩ yɛbɛ kʊ fʊ. Wʊ ɩn nɩrɛ ɩn nʊ̃ ka fʊ mɩ gba nʊ̃, wʊn ɩ nɩrɛ nɩ yɛbɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, ala ɩ fʊ nyɛ man ka n ɩ a fʊ tʊ̃tʊ̃tɔ sʊɔ, de wʊ nɩtãa a lɛ fʊn taa sɔɔ de ma.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ wʊ wa maal fʊn dɛɛr bɩɩ wʊ di fʊn sãn, de pʊɔ a maa sãn pɔ.

english_verse: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
translation_verse: Maa Pɔɔl lɛ sɛɛrɛ a yele nyã nɩ a maa mãɛ nũu. Ɩ̃n yab fʊ naa. N kʊ̃ 'yɛr 'yɛr jaa ɩka a fʊ̃ʊ mãɛ gba mɩ di man sãn ɛ.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Ɔ̃ɔ, n yɛbɛ, vɛ̃ ka n nyɛ a tɔ̃nɔ̃ nyã yin a fʊ sɛ̃ a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'maa a n nyãa a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I am sure you will do all I have asked, and even more.
translation_verse: N bar tɩɛr a fʊ nɛɛ tufʊ jũu, naa sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka fʊn maal gar a lɛ ɩn sʊɔr fʊ ɩka fʊ maal.

english_verse: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
translation_verse: Yele bʊ̃'yen na chɛ, chɔɔr sãan gaa jie bar ma. A yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ jũu, n tɩɛr ɩka wʊn sɔɔ naa ka a nɩbɛ banyãna yuo ma a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, ka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Epafaras na ɩ a n tɔ sʊɔ ban 'mataa pɔɔ a die pɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jũu, puoro fʊ naa.

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Ka Maakɩ mɩ nɩ Aristakus nɩ Demas nɩ Luka na ɩ a n taaba tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ, mɩ puoro fʊ naa.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: A Bie lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr chãa, na wʊ kaara a Nãaŋmɩn kaar jaa chɔ̃, ka a wʊ 'yɛr na tara kpɛ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ tɩɛn a bonsɩ a jaa taalɛ. A lɛ wʊn wa pɛɛ a yelbier baar, wʊ don tɩ jãnɛ a Tɩɩr Sʊɔ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie be a saaju.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a malaka ãsʊɔ jaa ɩka, “Fʊ ɩn a n Bie, dɩna n lɩɛb a fʊ Sãa”, (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn gãn mɩ 'yɛr a Bie 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn, a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ na ben be bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa, ka a torfʊ ɩ a fʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ dãgbal.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Fʊ nʊ̃n torfʊ tɩ na fʊ 'laar putuyele. A lɛ jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a fʊ Nãaŋmɩn, 'mɔɔ fʊ naa ka fʊ do gar a fʊ taaba ba jaa, a lɛ wʊn pʊr a pʊpɛl kãa 'yɔ̃ɔ fʊ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn gãn lɛ 'yɛr naa, “A pielfʊ daar a fʊ̃ʊ Soro, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ kpar a tẽe par, ka a saaju wʊ jaa ɩ a fʊ nuur tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: A jaa na wa sɔ̃ɔ naa, tɩchɛ ka fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ be be, a jaa na wa koraa naa chɩɛr fɔbaa kaar.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Fʊn pilãa naa fɩka fuu, naa lɩɛb fɔɔr kaar. Tɩchɛ ka a fʊ̃ʊ 'lɔ chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ, ka a fʊ yuomo ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Malaka buor sʊɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ wa 'yɛr kʊ ɩka, “Jãnɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ jie, ka n wa de a fʊ dɔ̃dẽme ka ba ɩ a fʊ gbɛɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie”? (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a malakasɩ ba jaa ɩ naa a sɩtʊ̃nsɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na ma ir tʊ̃, ka ba wa sʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na nyɛ a faafʊ ɛ?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔ chɛlɛ sʊ̃, a lɛ jũu ka a bon 'lɔ sɩn wõ, ka sɩ taa sal lo ɛ.

english_verse: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a malakasɩ 'yɛr ban dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩn yelmãɛ, ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na jɛb a 'yɛr bɩɩ tɔr a 'yɛr, ma nyɛn a toor tɔɔfʊ 'lɔ na tor,

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: ŋmɩnɛ lɛ a sɩn mɩ na ɩ chãɛ, ala ɩ sɩ kaa naa a faa kpɛ̃ɛ nyã pɔrɔ? A sɩ Soro lɛ dɔ̃ɔ nie 'yɛr a faafʊ nyã 'yɛr, ka a bala na wõ naa pãa mɩ man jaa nɛ nɛ nɛ kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a malakasɩ lɛ na so a wɛr 'lɔ na waara ɛ, a 'lɔ 'yɛr sɩn ben 'yɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: ) Nãaŋmɩn den bonsɩ a jaa kʊ wʊ, bon jaa ba be be ka waa tʊ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ. Tɩchɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã, saa nyɛ bonsɩ a jaa na siir ba mãɛ kʊ wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ maal wʊ, a wʊ ɩ jaa pʊʊr ka a malakasɩ gar wʊ, fʊ den tɩɩr nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩ nyɛn a Yesu wʊn vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ jaa pʊʊr ka a malakasɩ gar wʊ, wʊ den tɩɩr nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ wʊ, bojũu wʊ din a kũu dɔɔyɛ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ vɛ̃ a wʊ lɛm kũu kaa kʊ nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Wʊn waara nɩ dabil yɔɔ a wʊ tɩɩr pɔ, a sɛɛn kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, a 'lɔ na so bonsɩ a jaa, nɩ a 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ bon jaa na tu be be, ka wʊ maal a ba nɩdɔ̃ɔn 'lɔ na faara ba ka wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ tu a wʊ dɔɔyɛ difʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na maala a nɩbɛ ka ba ɩrɛ chɛchɛ, nɩ a bala mɩ na ɩ a chɛchɛ ɩ sãa bʊ̃'yen bibiir. A lɛ jũu, vã ba kʊrɔ a Yesu wʊn bʊɔlɔ ba yɛɛr ɛ,

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “Ɩn pʊr a fʊ yuor kʊ a n yɛɛr, naa yiel yiel pɛɛn fʊ a bala na duo puoro fʊ niem.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: A nɩ mɩ go, “Ɩn dɩɛl a n Nãaŋmɩn.” (Isaiya

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: A bibiir na tara a ãgãn nɩ a jãɩ jũu, ba mɩ dɔɔn a Yesu ka wʊ ɩ a ba ãsʊɔ, wʊ maal a lɛ, ka a wʊ kũu na tʊ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔ a Satan nyã na tara a kũu kpɛ̃ɔ bar,

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: na wʊn faa a bala jaa bar ban dɔɔ, ka a kũu dãbãɛ maal ba a ba lɩɛb gbãgbaar.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ jaa a ba ɩ a malakasɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ waan a sʊ̃ʊfʊ nyã ɛ, tɩchɛ a Abraham yɔ̃n 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu lɛ so, ka a Nãaŋmɩn maal wʊ a wʊ nyɛtãan a wʊ yɛɛr. Ka a lɛ vɛ̃ a wʊ ɩ nɩbaal kaara na wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, na wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de a wʊ mãɛ lon a bɔɔr ka a nɩbɛ yeldɛɛr baar.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Bojũu a wʊ mãɛ mɩ din tuo a bɛɛr kaa pɔ, wʊ mɩ na tʊ̃ɔn sʊ̃ʊ a bala jaa a bɛɛr kaa na nyɔɔ.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɛɛr na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, na yɩ pʊɔ a saaju bʊɔlfʊ pɔ, yɩ yuo a yɩ tɩɛr kʊ a Yesu, a nɩtʊ̃nãa nɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã 'yɛr sɩn 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Wʊ tara na yelmãɛ kʊ a 'lɔ na ir wʊ, nɩtãa lɛ a Mosesɩ mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊ jaa pɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Yesu nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ na sɛɛ na wʊ gar a Mosesɩ, nɩtãa lɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na mɛ a yir na ma nyɛ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ gar a yir mãɛ.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Bojũu a yir jaa, nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ma mɛ, tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ mɛ a bonsɩ a jaa.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Mosesɩ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a tʊ̃tʊ̃nɔ̃ na tara yelmãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn yir wʊ jaa pɔ, na wʊ dire a ala wʊn wa 'yɛr daar kɔ̃ɔ dãasɩɛ.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, wʊ tara na yelmãɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn yir. Sɩn lɛ ɩ a wʊ yir, ala ɩ sɩ nyɔɔn nyãa nɩ a tɩɛrtɔfʊ 'lɔ sɩn bʊɔrɔ nɩ a yuor.

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a yɩ sãakpãmɩne bɛɛr ma kaa na ba mɔ̃n ma lɛ̃ɛɛ tɩ tãn yuom lɩjaayi, na ba nyɛ a lɛ ɩn ɩ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka n nyɛn a nɩbɛ bala suur naa 'yɛr, ‘A ba tɩɛrsɩ ma yɛ̃yɛlɛ naa. Baa bɔ̃ɔ a n sɔɩ ɛ.’

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ gu yɩ mãɛ ka ãsʊɔ jaa taa tara yeldɛɛr bɩɩ nyãa na ba sɔɔ de ɛ, na wʊ lɩɛb a wʊ mãɛ yin a Nãaŋmɩn na ba kpire sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn bɩbir jaa, nɩtãa a bɩbir na chɛnɛ ka ba bʊɔlɔ a dɩna, ka yelbier taa bɛl ãsʊɔ jaa ka wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ a wʊ nyãa ɛ.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Sɩ wa naa ka a sɩn nɩ a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa lɔ̃ɔ põ, ala ɩ sɩ ban gbɛr tɩ tãn a baaraa, a lɛ sɩn dɔ̃ɔ bar tɩɛr,

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “If you hear his voice today, don't be stubborn like those who rebelled.”
translation_verse: fɩka a lɛ an ben 'yɛr, “Dɩna, yɩn wa wõ a Nãaŋmɩn kɔkɔr, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa kpɛ̃mɛ a yɩ nyãa ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ chɩɩr wʊ ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Ba boo lɛ dɔ̃ɔ wõ tɩ chɩrɛ? A ba ɩ a bala Mosesɩ na dɔ̃ɔ tara yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Ba boo mɩ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pɔ 'yɛr ɩka ba kʊ̃ kpɛ a wʊ pɛ̃nfʊ jie ɛ, a ba ɩ a bala na dɔ̃ɔ tɔr a wʊ nɛɛ tufʊ bar lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ, sɩ nyɛn ban ba tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ɛ, bojũu baa tara sɔɔfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: The promise to enter the place of rest is still good, and we must take care that none of you miss out.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, an ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ a wʊ pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ kpɛfʊ na chɛnɛ be be, yɩ ɩ a sɩ bɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sʊ̃, ka a ãsʊɔ jaa taa wa kpɛ faa ɛ.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɩn bala na sɔɔ de kpɛ̃n a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, “N nyɛn suur naa pɔ 'yɛr, baa be jaa na wa kpɛ a n pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ go ɛ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Bojũu a jie ãsʊɔ wʊ 'yɛr naa a ber ayopõi daar 'yɛr, “A ber ayopõi daar, Nãaŋmɩn bar a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a jaa tɩ pɛ̃n.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: A 'yɛrbie anyãna nɩ a ju pɔ, wʊ lɛ 'yɛr naa, “Baa be jaa na wa kpɛ a n pɛ̃nfʊ pɔ ɛ.”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Sɔr chɛnɛ na yuo ka bamɩne na kpɛ a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, ka a bala ban de nie mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ nyã kʊ, ba tʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ɛ, bojũu bawõnsɩ lɛ ba ɩ.

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a Josua dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔn a nɩbɛ kpɛ̃n a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ naa lɛ 'yɛr bɩbir ãsʊɔ 'yɛr go ɛ.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: A ber Ayopõi 'Lɔ Pɛ̃nfʊ chɛnɛ na be be kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ.

english_verse: On that day God's people will rest from their work, just as God rested from his work.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na wa kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, wʊ mɩ ma pɛ̃n naa a wʊ mãɛ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ na pɛ̃n a wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ mʊɔrɔ ɩka sɩ kpɛ a pɛ̃nfʊ nyã pɔ, ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa taa ɩ bawõno a ba kaar na wʊ bãr lo ɛ.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɩn bʊ̃nɩbir, na wʊ ma pɩlpɩlɛ, na wʊ dire gar sɔbʊraa. Wʊ ma ŋmaan jaa kpɛ tɩ gbem a sɩɛ, na wʊ 'mar a kɔɔr, na wʊ wɛl a choofʊ jiir tɩ tãn a kɔɔr kãa pɔ. Wʊ ma tɔɔr tɩɛr nɩ befʊsɩ a jaa na be nɩrɛ nyãa pɔ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Bon jaa ba be ka a bʊ̃maalsɩ pɔ naa sɔɔl a Nãaŋmɩn niem ɛ. Bon jaa ba pɔɔ ɛ, a jaa dɩɛl a wʊ niem. 'Lɔ lɛ sɩn wa man a yele a jaa kʊ.

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩn ben tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ na gar a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ ba jaa a wʊ do a be a saaju, Yesu na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, yɩ ɩ a sɩ ba gbɛr a sɩ sɔɔfʊ nyã sɩn sɔɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Jesus understands every weakness of ours, because he was tempted in every way that we are. But he did not sin!
translation_verse: Bojũu, saa tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ kaa a sɩ balfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ tara na a 'lɔ mɩ a bɛɛr kaa bʊrɔ bʊrɔ na dɔ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a sɩn mɩ kaar, tɩchɛ waa ɩ yelbier ɛ.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Yɩ ɩ a sɩ daa yi a wʊ wãɛfʊ nãa dakɔɔ par nɩ nyãa, na sɩ tɩ de a wʊ nɩbaal na sɩ nyɛ wãɛfʊ, ka a sʊ̃ʊ sɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ an wa wõnõ sɩ.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ so a wʊ ma de nie lo a wʊ mãɛ tulfʊ bɔɔr baar, tɩ pãa 'matãan a nɩbɛ ba jaa yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ, a Kɩrɩsɩto ba de a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nyã kʊ a wʊ mãɛ ɛ, na wʊ wa lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn mɩ lɛ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a n Bie, dɩna n lɩɛb a fʊ Sãa.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: A lɛ 'yɛr a jie ãsʊɔ go, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo, nɩtãa a Melkijedek kaar.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: A lɛ daar a Yesu na be ka a tẽe pɔ, wʊ den sʊɔrfʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn kõn nɩbikʊ̃ɔ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na tʊ̃ɔ faa wʊ a kũu pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn wõ a wʊ sʊɔrfʊ, bojũu wʊ den 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ siir a wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Wʊ gba na ɩ a bie, wʊ jãn nɛɛ tufʊ yi a wʊ wõm pɔ.

english_verse: Suffering made Jesus perfect, and now he can save forever all who obey him.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa maal a lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka wʊ maal baar, wʊ lɩɛb a faafʊ sʊɔ kʊ a bala jaa na sɔɔ tu a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir wʊ a wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a Melkijedek kaar.

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Sɩ tara na yɔɔ naa 'yɛr tun a yele anyãna pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a par wiilfʊ kpɛ̃mɛ, bojũu a yɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ ba tal tɛɛr ɛ.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ, a sɛɛ naa a sɔ̃ɔ nyãna pɔ, ka yɩn taa ɩ wiwiilbe, tɩ yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ wiil yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbidɔ̃ɔ ala go. Bɩr lɛ yɩ chɛnɛ bʊɔrɔ, yaa ta saa difʊ ɛ.

english_verse: People who live on milk are like babies who don't really know what is right.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa na chɛnɛ 'yɛnɛ bɩr, wʊ chɛnɛ na ɩ bipɩla. A wʊ yɛ̃ ba tal tɛɛr a wʊn tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ a yeltorsɩ ban wile par ɛ.

english_verse: Solid food is for mature people who have been trained to know right from wrong.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩbɛrɛ bon lɛ saa, bala 'lɔ din nyɛ ka a mɩl ba, ka ba bɔ̃ɔ vɩla nɩ dɛɛr.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ɩ a sɩ bar a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɛr pielfʊ yele, tɩ chiine niem lɩɛrɛ nɩbɛrɛ. Yɩ ta lɛ vɛ̃ ka sɩ pʊrɔ a tɩɛr lɩɛbfʊ yuor go ɛ, nɩ tʊ̃dɛɛr jaa bʊrɔ na chiine kũu pɔ ɛ, nɩ lɛ an sɛɛ ɩka fʊ tara a Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔfʊ,

english_verse: And we shouldn't need to keep teaching about baptisms or about the laying on of hands or about people being raised from death and the future judgment.
translation_verse: nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ wiilfʊ, nɩ nuur dɔɔlfʊ yele, nɩ kũu pɔ irfʊ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ yele.

english_verse: Let's grow up, if God is willing.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔ naa, sɩn ɩn a lɛ.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba faan lo, an ɩn tuo ka ba lɛ waan ba a ba wa nyɛ tɩɛr lɩɛbfʊ, bojũu a ba bɔrfʊ lɛ kpara naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie a daa ju go, na ba lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka a nɩyɔɔ lɛ wuolo wʊ.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: A lɛ a tẽe na ma nyũ a sabie kʊ̃ɔ na ma loro na wʊ bul a bonsɩ ala na tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a bala na kɔ, ma nyɛn a Nãaŋmɩn sʊ̃ʊfʊ.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a tẽe 'lɔ na ma bul a gʊʊr nɩ a mɔ-ur, waa tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ be pɔ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ. A baarfʊ daar bũu lɛ na di wʊ.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Sɩ gban 'yɛrɛ a anyãna, barmɩne, sɩ bar tɩɛr a yɩ jie, na sɩ bɔ̃ɔn yɩn tara bʊ̃sʊ̃n, bʊ̃sʊ̃n ala na lɔ̃ɔn a faafʊ.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ba ɩ nɩbur bur ɛ. Wʊ kʊ̃ ĩin a yɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ nɩ a yɩ nʊ̃fʊ yɩn wiil kʊ wʊ ɛ, na yɩ sʊ̃ʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ tɩ chɛnɛ sʊ̃nɔ̃ ba.

english_verse: We wish each of you would always be eager to show how strong and lasting your hope really is.
translation_verse: Sɩ bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala a lɛ nɛ tɩ tãn a baaraa, na yɩ kʊ̃ baala a yɩ tɩɛrtɔ jie ɛ.

english_verse: Then you would never be lazy. You would be following the example of those who had faith and were patient until God kept his promise to them. God's Promise Is Sure
translation_verse: Saa bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ ɩ koro dẽme ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ tɔɔrɔ a bala na tu a sɔɔfʊ pɔ tara kãnyir nyɛn a bonsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ.

english_verse: No one is greater than God. So he made a promise in his own name when he said to Abraham,
translation_verse: Lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩrɛ a nɛɛ kʊrɔ a Abraham, nɩrɛ jaa na ba be be gar wʊ a wʊn pɔn jũu, wʊ pɔn naa a wʊ mãɛ,

english_verse: Then after Abraham had been very patient, he was given what God had promised.
translation_verse: Lɛ lɛ a Abraham tara a kãnyir na wʊ chɛl lɛ̃ɛɛ wa de a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: When anyone wants to settle an argument, they make a vow by using the name of someone or something greater than themselves.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ma den a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na gar wʊ yuor pɔn, ka a lɛ wʊn ma tɩr a nɛɛ ɩ yelmãɛ, ka a wɩlɛwɩlɛ maa lɛ be be go ɛ.

english_verse: So when God wanted to prove for certain his promise to his people could not be broken, he made a vow.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka wʊ maal a wʊ befʊ 'lɔ na ba lɩɛrɛ ɛ, ka a chaar kʊ a bala na wa de a ala wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ. Wʊ tɩr nɛɛ ɩka wʊn maal a lɛ.

english_verse: God cannot tell lies! And so his promises and vows are two things that can never be changed. We have run to God for safety. Now his promises should greatly encourage us to take hold of the hope that is right in front of us.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn maal a nɩtɔ̃ ɩka, a bonsɩ ayi anyã na ba tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ lɩɛrɛ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ŋmaa jire ɛ, ka a sɩn bala na jo tɩ nyɔɔ a tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã wʊn kʊ sɩ a pɔrɔ taalɛ, ka a na 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ ãkpãɛn.

english_verse: This hope is like a firm and steady anchor for our souls. In fact, hope reaches behind the curtain and into the most holy place.
translation_verse: A tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã lɛ sɩ tara, naa ɩ a nɛbikur na ma lũ a sɩ sɩɛ a wʊ chɩm ba dɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ. Wʊ põn kpɛ be a diniem a fɔbaa 'lɔ ban lũ var puor.

english_verse: Jesus has gone there ahead of us, and he is our high priest forever, just like Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Yesu de nie chen a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ kpɛ naa a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ ɩ naa a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ kpo kpo nɩtãa a Melkijedek kaar.

english_verse: Melchizedek was both king of Salem and priest of God Most High. He was the one who went out and gave Abraham his blessing, when Abraham returned from killing the kings.
translation_verse: A Melkijedek nyã lɛ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a Salem nãa nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na do gar a saaju bɔɔrloro. 'Lɔ lɛ tuor a Abraham na wʊ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ jɛb a nãmɩne bala tʊ̃ɔ tɩ lɩɛb waara.

english_verse: Then Abraham gave him a tenth of everything he had. The meaning of the name Melchizedek is “King of Justice.” But since Salem means “peace,” he is also “King of Peace.”
translation_verse: Ka a Abraham ir a bonsɩ ala wʊn waara nɩ a jaa pɔ pie, bʊ̃'yen kʊ wʊ. A wʊ yodɔ̃ɔ par nɩ nyã, torfʊ nãa, a nɩ mɩ, Salem nãa, a par lɛ, nyã'maar nãa.

english_verse: We are not told he had a father or mother or ancestors or beginning or end. He is like the Son of God and will be a priest forever.
translation_verse: Waa tara sãa ɛ, bɩɩ ma ɛ, nɩrɛ jaa ba bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ dɔɔfʊ daar ɛ, bɩɩ bɔ̃ɔ a wʊ bal par ɛ, bɩɩ a wʊ kũu daar ɛ. Wʊ kaara naa a Nãaŋmɩn Bie kaar, na wʊ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo.

english_verse: The Law teaches that even Abraham's descendants must give a tenth of what they possess. And they are to give this to their own relatives, who are the descendants of Levi and are priests.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a Mosesɩ nɛɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ bin 'yɛr naa ɩka, a Levi bal par pɔ lɛ a bɔɔrloro na ma yi, 'lɔ lɛ na ma de a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen yin a Isɩral nɩbɛ ba jaa sɛ̃, a wʊ mãɛ yɛɛr sɛ̃, a ba yɛɛr gba mɩ na ɩ a Abraham bal nɩbɛ sɛ̃.

english_verse: Although Melchizedek wasn't a descendant of Levi, Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had. Then Melchizedek blessed Abraham, who had been given God's promise.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a daba nyã baa gba bɩɛr a wʊ tɩ yi a Levi bal par pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ den a pie pɔ bʊ̃'yen yi a Abraham sɛ̃, na wʊ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛr kʊ.

english_verse: Everyone agrees a person who gives a blessing is greater than the one who receives the blessing.
translation_verse: Baal ba be be ɛ, ɩka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na bɛrmɛ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na ba jã bon ɛ.

english_verse: Priests are given a tenth of what people earn. But all priests die, except Melchizedek, and the Scriptures teach that he is alive.
translation_verse: A yele ãsʊɔ nɩ nyã ɩka, a bala na kpire lɛ ma de a pie pɔ jaa bʊ̃'yen, tɩchɛ a sɔr ãsʊɔ pɔ, a Melkijedek 'lɔ na ba kpire ɛ, de naa.

english_verse: Levi's descendants are now the ones who receive a tenth from people. We could even say that when Abraham gave Melchizedek a tenth, Levi also gave him a tenth.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ gba mɩ na 'yɛr ɩka, a Levi nɩrɛ na ma de a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen, ba yab a pie jaa pɔ bʊ̃'yen tu a Abraham sɛ̃,

english_verse: This is because Levi was born later into the family of Abraham, who gave a tenth to Melchizedek.
translation_verse: bojũu a lɛ a Melkijedek na dɔ̃ɔ tuor a Abraham, a Levi chɛnɛ na be a wʊ sãakpã pʊɔm.

english_verse: Even though the Law of Moses says the priests must be descendants of Levi, those priests cannot make anyone perfect. So there needs to be a priest like Melchizedek, rather than one from the priestly family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a Levi bal nɩrɛ, a bɔɔrlo tʊ̃mɔ̃ ma ta vɛ̃n ka wʊ tor jaa dẽ dẽ, a nɛbinãa 'lɔ ban kʊ a nɩbɛ, bo lɛ so ka ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ a bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ ɩka wʊ wa, na wʊ kaara a Melkijedek kaar na waa ɩ a Aaron kaar ɛ?

english_verse: And when the rules for selecting a priest are changed, the Law must also be changed.
translation_verse: Bojũu bala wa lɩɛr a bɔɔrloro, ba mɩ ma lɩɛr a nɛbinãa.

english_verse: The person we are talking about is our Lord, who came from a tribe that had never had anyone to serve as a priest at the altar.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ ban 'yɛrɛ na so a yele anyãna, wʊ ɩn bal yuo, ka nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa ba yi a bala nyãna pɔ na wʊ tɩ tʊ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃ be a bɔɔr lofʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone knows he came from the tribe of Judah, and Moses never said priests would come from that tribe.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩ Soro ɩn a Juda bal nɩrɛ, ka a bala nyã pɔ, Mosesɩ mɩ ba pʊr a yuor ɩka nɩrɛ na yin a bala nyã pɔ tɩ ɩ a bɔɔrloro ɛ.

english_verse: All of this becomes clearer, when someone who is like Melchizedek is appointed to be a priest.
translation_verse: Ka a lɛ sɩn 'yɛr gba gãn chãa pɔ, ɩka ala ɩ a bɔɔrloro ãsʊɔ na kaara a Melkijedek kaar wa wa naa,

english_verse: The Scriptures say about him, “You are a priest forever, just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb ɩka, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo na ba tara tɛɛfʊ ɛ, nɩtãa a Melkijedek.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: In this way a weak and useless command was put aside,
translation_verse: Ba tɔɔn a kõro binfʊ lan bar, bojũu wʊ bal naa na waa ɩ bʊ̃joraa go ɛ.

english_verse: because the Law cannot make anything perfect. At the same time, we are given a much better hope, and it can bring us close to God.
translation_verse: Bojũu a nɛbinãa nyã maa tʊ̃ɔ maal bon ka wʊ tor jaa dẽ dẽ ɛ, ka a tɩɛrtɔ yuo na ɩ gar wʊ wa, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka sɩ tɔɔ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: God himself made a promise when this priest was appointed. But he did not make a promise like this when the other priests were appointed. The promise he made is, “I, the Lord, promise that you will be a priest forever! And I will never change my mind!”
translation_verse: tɩchɛ 'lɔ lɩɛb a bɔɔrloro ka a nɛtɩraa pʊɔ, a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “A sɩ Soro pɔn 'yɛr, na wʊ kʊ̃ wa puur a kʊ̃ɔ bar jaa ɛ. Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ɩ a bɔɔrlo kpo kpo.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: This means that Jesus guarantees us a better agreement with God.
translation_verse: A pɔ binfʊ nyãna jũu, Yesu lɛ wʊ de bin a nɛɛ ka wʊ ɩ a nɛtɩraa na gar.

english_verse: There have been a lot of other priests, and all of them have died.
translation_verse: A kõro a bɔɔrlorbo bala ma dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yɔɔ, bojũu kũu maa sɔɔ ka ba be be a tʊ̃mɔ̃ pɔ kor ɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus will never die, and so he will be a priest forever!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Yesu 'lɔ na ben be jaa kpo kpo, a wʊ bɔɔrlo tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba tara lɩɛrfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: He is forever able to save the people he leads to God, because he always lives to speak to God for them.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔn faa a bala na tu a wʊ jie waara a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Bojũu wʊ ma ben be sɔ̃ɔ jaa 'maala a Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ba.

english_verse: Jesus is the high priest we need. He is holy and innocent and faultless, and not at all like us sinners. Jesus is honored above all beings in heaven,
translation_verse: A bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyãna lɛ bɔ̃ɔ a lɛ sɩn bʊɔrɔ, wʊ ɩn chɛchɛ, waa tara chɛfʊ ɛ, waa bʊɔrɔ yeldɛɛr ɛ, na wʊ oo wʊ mãɛ yin yelbe-ɩrbɛ pɔ, na wʊ do gar a saaju.

english_verse: and he is better than any other high priest. Jesus doesn't need to offer sacrifices each day for his own sins and then for the sins of the people. He offered a sacrifice once for all, when he gave himself.
translation_verse: Waa kaara fɩka a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ banyã ɛ, naa ba lɛ sɛɛ ɩka wʊ loro a bɔɔr a bɩbie a jaa ɛ, na wʊn ma de nie lo a wʊ mãɛ tulo bɔɔr, tɩ pãa mɩ lo a nɩbɛ mɩ bon ɛ. Wʊ mãɛ lɛ sɔɔ na wʊ lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo dʊ̃ɔ lo a ba yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr a dẽdẽe daa ka a baar.

english_verse: The Law appoints priests who have weaknesses. But God's promise, which came later than the Law, appoints his Son. And he is the perfect high priest forever.
translation_verse: Bojũu a nɛbinãa lɛ ma ir a bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ, ka ba ɩ nɩbɛ na bal, tɩchɛ a pɔfʊ nyã na tu a nɛbinãa puor wa, a Bie lɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir, 'lɔ lɛ maal a lɛ jaa a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal.

english_verse: What I mean is we have a high priest who sits at the right side of God's great throne in heaven.
translation_verse: A 'yɛrɛ sɩn 'yɛrɛ nɩ nyã, sɩn tara na a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã na jãnɛ be a saaju kpɛ̃ɔ wʊ jaa sʊɔ nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

english_verse: He also serves as the priest in the most holy place inside the real tent there in heaven. This tent of worship was set up by the Lord, not by humans.
translation_verse: Be lɛ wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a dinie sʊɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir a sɩ Soro mãɛ na maal, a ba ɩ a gãn yir 'lɔ a nɩrɛ na maal a wʊ nũu ɛ.

english_verse: If he were here on earth, he would not be a priest at all, because here the Law appoints other priests to offer sacrifices.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ wʊ ta ben ka a tẽe pɔ, wʊ kʊ̃ naa ta ɩ bɔɔrloro ɛ, bojũu nɩbɛ den nie be ka, na ba ma diere a kʊfʊsɩ turo nɩ a lɛ a nɛbinãa na man.

english_verse: But the tent where they serve is just a copy and a shadow of the real one in heaven. Before Moses made the tent, he was told, “Be sure to make it exactly like the pattern you were shown on the mountain!”
translation_verse: Ban tʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir chɛchɛ nyã pɔ na ɩ a 'lɔ na be a saaju gãagiel ban tɔɔr maal. A anyãna jũu lɛ so ka a Nãaŋmɩn kpãkpãana a Mosesɩ a lɛ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ maal a gãn yir, na wʊ 'yɛr, “Kaara sʊ̃, na fʊ maal wʊ a lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju ɩn wiil fʊ be a tɔ̃ɔ ju.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: Now Christ has been appointed to serve as a priest in a much better way, and he has given us much assurance of a better agreement.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ 'lɔ a Yesu na nyɛ, gar a ba bon jaa bamm na ɩ a nɛtɩraa 'ma'maala na gar a bʊ̃koraa, bojũu a nɛbin paalaa na ɩ gar pɔ lɛ wʊ maal.

english_verse: If the first agreement with God had been all right, there would not have been any need for another one.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ a nɛtɩr koraa 'lɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ tara chɛfʊ ɛ, jie kʊ̃ naa be be a ba lɛ bʊɔrɔ bʊ̃yuo ɛ.

english_verse: But the Lord found fault with it and said, “I tell you the time will come, when I will make a new agreement with the people of Israel and the people of Judah.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn nyɛn a lɛ a nɩbɛ na 'mab, na wʊ 'yɛr, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr, “Bɩbir kɔ̃ɔ na wa vɩɛ naa, ka n tɩr nɛtɩr paalaa bin kʊ a Isɩral yir dẽme nɩ a Juda yir dẽme.

english_verse: It won't be like the agreement that I made with their ancestors, when I took them by the hand and led them out of Egypt. They broke their agreement with me, and I stopped caring about them!
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ lɛ nyɛtãan a nɛɛ 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ tɩr kʊ a ba sãakpãmɩne a daar 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn nyɔɔ ba a nũu tɔɔ yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ ɛ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr, bojũu baa sɔɔ ara a lɛ ɩn tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ ba ɛ, ka n mɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ ba.

english_verse: “But now I tell the people of Israel this is my new agreement: ‘The time will come when I, the Lord, will write my laws on their minds and hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
translation_verse: A anyãna lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa ɩn na tɩr kʊ a Isɩral yir dẽme, a bɩbir 'lɔ wa vɩɛ baar. Lɛ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr. Ɩn de naa a n nɛɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛrsɩ pɔ, na n sɛb dɔɔl a ba nyãn ju. Ka n ɩ a ba Nãaŋmɩn, ka ba mɩ ɩ a n nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Not one of them will have to teach another to know me, their Lord.’ “All of them will know me, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa kʊ̃ lɛ wiil a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ ɛ, bɩɩ ka nɩrɛ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ yɛbɛ ɩka, ‘Bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro ɛ.’ Bojũu ba jaa na bɔ̃ɔ ma naa, yi a bil pɔ tɩ tãn a bɛrɛ pɔ.

english_verse: I will treat them with kindness, even though they are wicked. I will forget their sins.”
translation_verse: Ɩn vɛ̃n a ba putuyele bar. N kʊ̃ lɛ tɩɛr a ba yeldɛbɛ jaa go ɛ.” (Jeremiya

english_verse: When the Lord talks about a new agreement, he means that the first one is out of date. And anything that is old and useless will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔlɔ a nɛtɩraa anyãna bʊ̃paalaa, wʊ maal a 'lɔ na de nie ka wʊ ɩ bʊ̃jʊɔlaa, ka bon mɩ na jʊɔl, wʊ maa yaara tɩ kpi ɛ.

english_verse: The first promise included rules for worship and a tent for worship here on earth.
translation_verse: Faa nyɛ, a nɛtɩr dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ tara na a puorfʊ chirsɩ nɩ a jichɛchɛ 'lɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ maal ka a tẽe pɔ.

english_verse: The first part of the tent was called the holy place, and a lampstand, a table, and the sacred loaves of bread were kept there.
translation_verse: A gãn yir nyã ban dɔ̃ɔ maal baar, a di yɛ̃yɛ̃ pɔ lɛ ba bin a fãtɩnsɩ dɔɔlfʊ jie nɩ a tɛɛbʊl 'lɔ ju ban ma dɔɔl a paanʊ̃chɛchɛ ala. A jie nyã lɛ ba bʊɔlɔ, Jichɛchɛ.

english_verse: The gold altar for burning incense was in this holy place. The gold-covered sacred chest was also there, and inside it were three things. First, there was a gold jar filled with manna. Then there was Aaron's walking stick that sprouted. Finally, there were the flat stones with the Ten Commandments written on them.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a bɔɔr lofʊ jie be na ɩ sɛlma a ba ma chʊnɔ̃ a tãɩ nyũu vɩla ala nɩ a nɛtɩraa daka ban maal tɩ waar sɛlma pɔɔ. A daka nyãna pɔ lɛ a sɛlma dulo ban 'yɔ̃ɔ a maana nɩ a Aaron dãgbal 'lɔ na dɔ̃ɔ 'mʊr a puul nɩ a kʊsɩr pɛ̃rsɩ ala ban dɔ̃ɔ sɛb a nɛbinãa 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: On top of the chest were the glorious creatures with wings opened out above the place of mercy. Now isn't the time to go into detail about these things.
translation_verse: A daka nyã ju lɛ ba maal a malakasɩ bala na wile a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr ka ba ara kʊ a malakasɩ bala ban bʊɔlɔ a cherubim, ka ba ger pɔɔ a faafʊ bɔɔr lofʊ jie. Tɩchɛ sɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ man a yelsɩ anyãna tu tu taa a pʊ̃pãanyã ɛ.

english_verse: But this is how everything was when the priests went each day into the first part of the tent to do their duties.
translation_verse: Lɛ a yelsɩ anyãna ban wa chɔɔr a nɩtɔ̃ baar, a bɔɔrlorbo pãa ma kpɩɛrɛ na a di yɛ̃yɛ̃ sʊɔ pɔ, bɩbir jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: However, only the high priest could go into the second part of the tent, and he went in only once a year. Each time he carried blood to offer for his sins and for any sins that the people had committed without meaning to.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ tɛɛ lɛ ma kpɛ a dinie sɔɔ gbɛbʊ̃'yen yuon jaa, wʊ maa faa dʊ̃ɔ jãɩ ɛ. Ala lɛ wʊ ma kpɛ̃n a be tɩ lon a wʊ mãɛ bɔɔr, nɩ a nɩbɛ mɩ yeldɛbɛ ban ba bɔ̃ɔn ɛ, tɩ faa tul maal bɔɔr.

english_verse: This also has a meaning for today. It shows we cannot make our consciences clear by offering gifts and sacrifices.
translation_verse: A anyãna dɔ̃ɔ wile a dɩna sɔ̃ɔ, naa wile ɩka a kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ ala ban ma lon a bɔɔr, maa tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ ka a 'lɔ na wa a puorfʊ jie tɩɛr chaar ɛ.

english_verse: These rules are merely about such things as eating and drinking and ceremonies for washing ourselves. And rules about physical things will last only until the time comes to change them for something better.
translation_verse: A ɩ naa bʊ̃diir tɛɛ yele, nɩ nyũfʊ yele, nɩ bʊ̃pɛɛrsɩ yelsɩ, ala lɛ ba mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala tɩ tãn a yelpaalaa na lɩɛr.

english_verse: Christ came as the high priest of the good things that are now here. He also went into a much better tent that wasn't made by humans and that doesn't belong to this world.
translation_verse: Lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã kaar, nɩ a yelsʊ̃n ala na de nie be ka, wʊ kpɛ̃n tu a jikpɛ̃ɛ nɩ a puorfʊ yir 'lɔ na ɩ chɛchɛ an ba ɩ nɩrɛ nũu lɛ maal ɛ, ka sɩ 'yɛr ɩka waa pʊɔ a bʊ̃mɩɛrsɩ pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Then Christ went once for all into the most holy place and freed us from sin forever. He did this by offering his own blood instead of the blood of goats and bulls.
translation_verse: Waa de bʊɔ bɩɩ narbil jãɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ kpɛ naa a Jichɛchɛ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ nyã pɔ, gbɛbʊ̃'yen kʊ nɩrɛ jaa nɩ a wʊ mãɛ jãɩ, a sɩ tɔ̃ɔ nyɛ a faafʊ a kpo kpo.

english_verse: According to the Law of Moses, those people who become unclean are not fit to worship God. Yet they will be considered clean, if they are sprinkled with the blood of goats and bulls and with the ashes of a sacrificed calf.
translation_verse: A bʊʊr jãɩ nɩ a nadai jãɩ nɩ a nasarbil tãpɩɛl ban ma ɔ̃ɔ mɩr a bala na sɔ̃ɔ, ka a ba ãgãma yi ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃n.

english_verse: But Christ was sinless, and he offered himself as an eternal and spiritual sacrifice to God. This is why his blood is much more powerful and makes our consciences clear. Now we can serve the living God and no longer do things that lead to death.
translation_verse: Ŋmɩnɛ pãa lɛ, a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto jãɩ a 'lɔ na tu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na ɩ nyɛvʊr, a wʊ mãɛ na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, lon bɔɔr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ tɩɛr nɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ jaa na chiine nɩ sɩ kũu pɔ, ka sɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr.

english_verse: Christ died to rescue those who had sinned and broken the old agreement. Now he brings his chosen ones a new agreement with its guarantee of God's eternal blessings!
translation_verse: Bojũu a anyãna lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɩ a nɛtɩr paalaa 'ma'maala, ka a bala a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl, na nyɛ a bʊ̃sʊ̃n ala na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Pʊ̃pãanyã wʊ kpi naa na wʊ faa ba yin a yeldɛbɛ ala ban dɔ̃ɔ maal a nɛtɩr koraa 'lɔ pɔ.

english_verse: In fact, making an agreement of this kind is like writing a will. This is because the one who makes the will must die before it is of any use.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ wa tɩr nɛɛ ɩka 'lɔ wa kpi baar, a kũu lɛ wʊ ma wa kpi, ka a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr pãa yi chãa pɔ,

english_verse: In other words, a will doesn't go into effect as long as the one who made it is still alive.
translation_verse: bojũu ala ɩ fʊ tɩr nɛɛ ɩka fʊ̃ʊ wa kpi baar. Fʊ̃ʊ wa chɛnɛ a ba ɩ yele ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊn wa kpi baar lɛ a pãa ɩ yele.

english_verse: Blood was also used to put the first agreement into effect.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ so gba, ka a nɛtɩr dɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ maa ɩ bon jaa ka a jãɩ ba pʊɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Moses told the people all the Law said they must do. Then he used red wool and a hyssop plant to sprinkle the people and the book of the Law with the blood of bulls and goats and with water.
translation_verse: Lɛ a Mosesɩ na wa man a nɛbinãa 'yɛr kʊ a nɩbɛ ba jaa baar, wʊ den a nelpɔlɔ jãɩ na wʊ de kʊ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ de pɛr kɔɔl jɩɛ na wʊ vʊ̃ɔ urbanyũu na wʊ tun mɩr a gãn pilãa 'lɔ nɩ a nɩbɛ ba jaa.

english_verse: He told the people, “With this blood God makes his agreement with you.”
translation_verse: Tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, “A anyãna lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa jãɩ, a Nãaŋmɩn na kpãkpãana yɩ ɩka yɩ turo.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: Moses also sprinkled blood on the tent and on everything else used in worship.
translation_verse: Lɛ nɩ ju mɩ lɛ wʊ de a jãɩ mɩr a gãn puorfʊ yir nɩ a bonsɩ a jaa ban ma de maala nɩ a be.

english_verse: The Law says that almost everything must be sprinkled with blood, and no sins can be forgiven unless blood is offered. Christ's Great Sacrifice
translation_verse: Yelmãɛ jaa a nɛbinãa 'yɛr ɩka, ba ma de a jãɩ mɩɩl a bonsɩ a jaa. Ka jãɩ ba wa kpaar ɛ, yelbier vɛ̃ kʊfʊ ba be be ɛ.

english_verse: These things are only copies of what is in heaven, and so they had to be made holy by these ceremonies. But the real things in heaven must be made holy by something better.
translation_verse: A tara na sɔr ka ba chɔɔr a saaju bʊ̃tɔɔr maalaa nɩ a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ anyãna, tɩchɛ a saaju bonsɩ mãɛ 'lɔ, a ba bɔɔrlo bon gar naa anyãna.

english_verse: This is why Christ did not go into a tent made by humans and was only a copy of the real one. Instead, he went into heaven and is now there with God to help us.
translation_verse: Bojũu Kɩrɩsɩto ba kpɛ a nɩrɛ nũu bʊ̃maalaa jichɛchɛ nyã pɔ, na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a saaju bon sʊ̃ 'lɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ tɔɔr maal ɛ. A saaju mãɛ lɛ wʊ tɩ kpɛ, na wʊ tɩ ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem a pʊ̃pãanyã a sɩ jũu.

english_verse: Christ did not have to offer himself many times. He wasn't like a high priest who goes into the most holy place each year to offer the blood of an animal.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ wʊ kpɛ̃n be a saaju na wʊn lɛ tɩ loro a bɔɔr bɩbir jaa ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nãa na ma kpɛ a Jichɛchɛ 'Lɔ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ pɔ, a yuon nɩ a jãɩ na ba ɩ a wʊ mãɛ jãɩ ɛ.

english_verse: If he had offered himself every year, he would have suffered many times since the creation of the world. But instead, near the end of time he offered himself once and for all, so he could be a sacrifice that does away with sin.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ a ta ɩ, Kɩrɩsɩto naa pãan din dɔɔyɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa yi a wɛr pielfʊ daar jaa. Tɩchɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã, wʊ wa daan yi a bɩbir baaraa daar na wʊ maal yele a jaa baar, ɩka wʊ wa de a wʊ mãɛ lɩɛb a bɔɔrlo bon diin a yelbier bar.

english_verse: We die only once, and then we are judged.
translation_verse: Nɩtãa lɛ ban dɔɔ nɩrɛ ka wʊn kpi daar kɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ tɩ tuor 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ,

english_verse: So Christ died only once to take away the sins of many people. But when he comes again, it will not be to take away sin. He will come to save everyone who is waiting for him.
translation_verse: lɛ lɛ, a Kɩrɩsɩto lon a bɔɔr kpo kpo kʊ nɩyɔɔ. Wʊn lɩɛb wa a gbɛɛ ayi sɔ̃ɔ, a ba ɩ fɩka a wʊ wa de a yelbier bar ɛ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ waan faafʊ wa kʊ a bala jaa na chɛlɛ wʊ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses is like a shadow of the good things to come. This shadow isn't the good things themselves, because it cannot free people from sin by the sacrifices offered year after year.
translation_verse: A nɛbinãa dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a bʊ̃sʊ̃ 'lɔ na waara gãagiel, a ba ɩ a bon mãɛ lɛ ɛ. A nɩtɔ̃ jũu, a kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ɩ a bɔɔrlo bʊ̃bʊ̃'yen ban ma lo yuon jaa ka a tʊ̃ɔ chɔɔr a bala na ma wa tɔɔ gbʊr a Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: When Christ came into the world, he said to God, “Sacrifices and offerings are not what you want, but you have given me my body.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a Kɩrɩsɩto na waara ka a wɛr pɔ, nɩtɔ̃ lɛ wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn, “A bɔɔrlo bonsɩ nɩ a bʊ̃kʊrsɩ, faa bʊɔraa ɛ, tɩchɛ ãgãn lɛ fʊ chɔɔr kʊ ma.

english_verse: Then Christ said, “And so, my God, I have come to do what you want, as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Ka n pãa 'yɛr, maa nɩ nyã, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a n yele a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ. N Nãaŋmɩn, n wa naa ɩka n wa ɩ a fʊ bɔfʊ.” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: The Law teaches that offerings and sacrifices must be made because of sin. But why did Christ mention these things and say that God did not want them?
translation_verse: Wʊ den nie 'yɛr, “A bɔɔrlo bonsɩ nɩ a kʊfʊsɩ nɩ a dʊ̃n ala ban ma kʊ chʊm nɩ a ba tulo kʊfʊsɩ ala, faa bʊɔraa ɛ, fʊ pʊɔ ba pɛl ɛ,” an sɔɔ ɩ ɩka a nɛbinãa lɛ 'yɛr ɩka ba ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Well, it was to do away with offerings and sacrifices and to replace them. This is what he meant by saying to God, “I have come to do what you want.”
translation_verse: A wʊ pãa 'yɛr, “Maa nɩ nyã, n wa naa ɩka n wa ɩ a fʊ bɔfʊ.” Wʊ tɔɔn a 'lɔ na de nie bar, tɩ de a ayi sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a jie.

english_verse: So we are made holy because Christ obeyed God and offered himself once for all.
translation_verse: A nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn maal sɩ, a sɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃n a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na de a wʊ ãgãn lon a bɔɔr kpo kpo kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: The priests do their work each day, and they keep on offering sacrifices that can never take away sins.
translation_verse: A Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrloro, bɩbir jaa lɛ wʊ ma ara tɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a ba puorfʊ tʊ̃bie. Waa gala a bɔɔr lofʊ nyã na maa tʊ̃ɔ de yelbier bar ɛ.

english_verse: But Christ offered himself as a sacrifice that is good forever. Now he is sitting at God's right side,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa lo a bɔɔr kpo kpo nyã baar a yelbier jũu, wʊ pãa tɩ jãnɛ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie.

english_verse: By his one sacrifice he has forever set free from sin the people he brings to God.
translation_verse: bojũu gbɛbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ wʊ lo a bɔɔr, ka a sɛɛ kʊ a bala wʊn maal ka ba ɩ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit also speaks of this by telling us that the Lord said,
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ mɩ 'yɛr yelmãɛ jaa kʊ sɩ nɩ a yele nyã, wʊ den nie 'yɛr,

english_verse: “When the time comes, I will make an agreement with them. I will write my laws on their minds and hearts.
translation_verse: “Nyã lɛ ɩ a nɛtɩraa nyã ɩn wa tara nɩ ba, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wa po baar. Lɛ lɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr. Ɩn den a n nɛbinsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nyãn pɔ, naa sɛb 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba tɩɛrsɩ pɔ.” (Jeremiya

english_verse: Then I will forget about their sins and no longer remember their evil deeds.”
translation_verse: Na wʊ pãa lɛ 'yɛr pʊɔ, “A ba yelbier nɩ a ba chɛfʊsɩ tʊ̃bie, n kʊ̃ lɛ tɩɛraa go ɛ.” (Jeremiya

english_verse: When sins are forgiven, there is no more need to offer sacrifices. Encouragement and Warning
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn na wa vɛ̃ a yelbier anyãna kʊ nɩrɛ, yelbier bɔɔr lofʊ ba lɛ be be go ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, the blood of Jesus gives us courage to enter the most holy place
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n yɛɛr, sɩn ben tara a 'lafʊ nyã na tɩ kpɛ a Jichɛchɛ Wʊ Jaa Chɛchɛ Jie a Yesu jãɩ jũu,

english_verse: by a new way that leads to life! And this way takes us through the curtain that is Christ himself.
translation_verse: na wʊ yuo a yelmãɛ sɔr nɩbir paalaa na 'mar tu a fɔvaraa 'lɔ pɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a wʊ ãgãn,

english_verse: We have a great high priest who is in charge of God's house.
translation_verse: na sɩ be tara a bɔɔrlo nɩkpɛ̃ɛ nyã na kaara a Nãaŋmɩn yir,

english_verse: So let's come near God with pure hearts and a confidence that comes from having faith. Let's keep our hearts pure, our consciences free from evil, and our bodies washed with clean water.
translation_verse: yɩ ɩ a sɩ tɔɔ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn nɩ nyãa nyã na vɩɛlɛ, nɩ a sɔɔfʊ na tɩrɛ. Bojũu wʊ mɩr a sɩ nyãn, na wʊ fɩɛl sɩ yin a tɩɛr sɔ̃ɔnaa pɔ, na wʊ pɛɛ a sɩ ãgãma nɩ a kɔ̃sʊ̃ɔ ala.

english_verse: We must hold tightly to the hope we say is ours. After all, we can trust the one who made the agreement with us.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ nyɔɔ a sɩ tɩɛrtɔfʊ nyã sɩn sɔɔ jaa chãchã tara, bojũu a 'lɔ na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ.

english_verse: We should keep on encouraging each other to be thoughtful and to do helpful things.
translation_verse: Yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ kpãkpãana taa mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir nʊ̃fʊ nɩ vɩla maalfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Some people have given up the habit of meeting for worship, but we must not do that. We should keep on encouraging each other, especially since you know that the day of the Lord's coming is getting closer.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa vɛ̃ ka sɩ ma bara taa sɛ̃ lɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na ma ɩrɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ãkpãɛn, na sɩ ma maala a lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, an ɩ a Bɩbir tɔɔrɔ na gbʊrɔ.

english_verse: No sacrifices can be made for people who decide to sin after they find out about the truth.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ chɛnɛ na bɔ̃ɔn jaa tɩ ma maala a yelbier sɩn wa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ baar, yelbier bɔɔrlo bon jaa ba lɛ be be go ɛ,

english_verse: They are God's enemies, and all they can look forward to is a terrible judgment and a furious fire.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ dãbãɛ tɛɛ lɛ sɩ chɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ, nɩ a bũu dagel 'lɔ na wa di a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dẽme.

english_verse: But it is much worse to dishonor God's Son and to disgrace the blood of the promise that made us holy. And it is just as bad to insult the Holy Spirit, who shows us mercy.
translation_verse: Ge buor lɛ yɩ tɩɛr Nãaŋmɩn na ge a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nɛɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie nyã nɩ gbɛɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ na maal fɩka waa ɩ bʊ̃chɛchɛ ɛ, a jãɩ nyã na ɩ a nɛtɩraa na maal wʊ a wʊ tor, ka wʊ tʊ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ Sɩɛ?

english_verse: We know that God has said he will punish and take revenge. We also know that the Scriptures say the Lord will judge his people.
translation_verse: Bojũu sɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na 'yɛr, “Maa lɛ so a sãn yaafʊ, ɩn lɩɛb yaa a sãn,” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: It is a terrible thing to fall into the hands of the living God!
translation_verse: A ɩn dãbãyele, ala ɩ fʊ faan lo a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbir nyã nũu pɔ.

english_verse: Don't forget all the hard times you went through when you first received the light.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr kaa a lɛ daar yɩn dɔ̃ɔ be be, tɩ wa nyɛ a chãa, a lɛ yɩn ba gbɛr tuor a dɔɔyɛ yɔɔ ala.

english_verse: Sometimes you were abused and mistreated in public, and at other times you shared in the sufferings of others.
translation_verse: Sɔ̃ɔ kɔ̃ɔ, chãa pɔ jaa lɛ ba ma tʊrɔ yɩ na ba gere nɩ yɩ. Daar kɔ̃ɔ, yɩ ma 'mantãan a bala mɩ ban gere a lɛ.

english_verse: You were kind to people in jail. And you gladly let your possessions be taken away, because you knew you had something better, something that would last forever.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ tara nɩbaal nɩ a bala ban nyɔɔr pɔɔ a die pɔ, na yɩ mɩ tara pʊpɛl an ba bã yɩ ɛ, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban fa a yɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka yɩ mãɛ tara naa bʊ̃tarsɩ na ɩ gar a anyãna na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Keep on being brave! It will bring you great rewards.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ taa lɔb a tɩɛr sʊ̃ nyã bar ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na yab yɩn gar a lɛ.

english_verse: Learn to be patient, so you will please God and be given what he has promised.
translation_verse: Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir tara kãnyir na yɩ maala a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ, yɩn wa nyɛn a lɛ wʊn tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “God is coming soon! It won't be very long.
translation_verse: Bojũu a chɛn bãlãa ka a, “'Lɔ na waara, wʊn wa naa. Wʊ kʊ̃ kor ɛ.

english_verse: The people God accepts will live because of their faith. But he isn't pleased with anyone who turns back.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a maa torfʊ sʊɔ 'lɔ, na kpɩɛrɛ naa nɩ sɔɔfʊ. 'Lɔ wa lɩɛb puor 'lɔ, n pʊɔ kʊ̃ pɛl wʊ ɛ.” (Habakuk

english_verse: We are not like those people who turn back and get destroyed. We will keep on having faith until we are saved.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn ba ɩ a bala na lɩɛrɛ a puor sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ ɩn a bala na sɔɔ de, na sɩ nyɛ faafʊ.

english_verse: Faith makes us sure of what we hope for and gives us proof of what we cannot see.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a sɔɔfʊ nyã vɛ̃ naa ka saa 'lɔɔrɔ gbɛr ɛ, yelmãɛ jaa a bon 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩn tara a tɩɛr tɩ ba nyɛn nɩbir ɛ.

english_verse: It was their faith that made our ancestors pleasing to God.
translation_verse: A sɔɔfʊ nyã lɛ a kõr dẽme dɔ̃ɔ tara, ka a Nãaŋmɩn dãn ba.

english_verse: Because of our faith, we know that the world was made at God's command. We also know that what can be seen was made out of what cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ a ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ɔ de a wʊ nɛɛ 'yɛrbie maal a tẽe, nɩ a saaju wʊ jaa, ka a bonsɩ sɩn ben nyɛrɛ, a ba ɩ a dɔ̃ɔ be be ka wʊ de maal ɛ.

english_verse: Because Abel had faith, he offered God a better sacrifice than Cain did. God was pleased with him and his gift, and even though Abel is now dead, his faith still speaks for him.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Abel bɔɔrlo bonsɩ wʊn de kʊ Nãaŋmɩn ɩ gar a Kain bɔɔrlo bonsɩ. Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Nãaŋmɩn dãn wʊ 'yɛr ɩka a wʊ yele tor naa, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a Abel kʊfʊsɩ nyã 'yɛr, wʊn sɔɔ kpi gba, tɩchɛ a sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃n ka wʊ chɛnɛ 'yɛrɛ.

english_verse: Enoch had faith and did not die. He pleased God, and God took him up to heaven. This is why his body was never found.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka Nãaŋmɩn wa de a Enok bʊ̃nɩbir. 'Lɔ ba kpi bɔ̃ɔ kũu ɛ, baa lɛ wa nyɛ wʊ jaa go ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ lɛ wa de wʊ. Bojũu sɛrɛ tɩchɛ ka wʊ wa chen, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr a ɩka a Enok yele nʊ̃mɔ̃ wʊ naa.

english_verse: But without faith no one can please God. We must believe that God is real and rewards everyone who searches for him.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ba wa tara sɔɔfʊ ɛ, an ɩn tuo wʊn na tʊ̃ɔ pɛl Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ, bojũu nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa wa waara a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, wʊ sɔɔn ɩka wʊ ben be, na wʊ mɩ ma yara a bala na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir bʊɔrɔ wʊ.

english_verse: Because Noah had faith, he was warned about something that had not yet happened. He obeyed and built a boat that saved him and his family. In this way the people of the world were judged, and Noah was given the blessings that come to everyone who pleases God.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Nowa tu a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ tɩ ba nyɛn nɩbir ɛ, tɩ na wʊ de dãbãɛ maal a daka bulomtum faan a wʊ yir dẽme nɩ a wʊ mãɛ. A wʊ sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ 'yɛr nɛtuo 'yɔ̃ɔ a wɛr nɩbɛ ba jaa ban tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr jũu, tɩ na wʊ lɩɛb a yeltorsɩ bʊ̃dire a wʊ sɔɔfʊ jũu.

english_verse: Abraham had faith and obeyed God. He was told to go to the land that God had said would be his, and he left for a country he had never seen.
translation_verse: Abraham sɔɔfʊ jũu, a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ bʊɔl wʊ ɩka wʊ yi chen a jie 'lɔ na wa ɩ a wʊ sofʊ daar kɔ̃ɔ, wʊ tu naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ na wʊ chen, wʊn gba na ba bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn chiine ɛ.

english_verse: Because Abraham had faith, he lived as a stranger in the promised land. He lived there in a tent, and so did Isaac and Jacob, who were later given the same promise.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka wʊ tɩ kpɩɛrɛ a nɛtɩraa tẽe 'lɔ pɔ ɩ sãan a be a paal 'lɔ pɔ. A gãma sɛɛr ala pɔ lɛ wʊ dɔ̃ɔ 'mataa kpɩɛrɛ nɩ a Isaakɩ nɩ a Jekɔb, na ba mɩ pʊɔ wʊ na wa so a jie 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: Abraham did this, because he was waiting for the eternal city God had planned and built.
translation_verse: Bojũu wʊ dɔ̃ɔ kaara niem ɩka wʊ nyɛ yir par ban sʊ̃ɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn mãɛ ɩ a mɩmɩɛrɛ.

english_verse: Even when Sarah was too old to have children, she had faith that God would do what he had promised, and she had a son.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Abraham na dɔ̃ɔ kor ɩ danyɔ̃ɔ, ka a wʊ pɔɔ Saara mɩ ab, tɩ ba chɛnɛ na dɔɔ bie. Wʊ tara na sɔɔfʊ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn tɩr kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: Every one of those people died. But they still had faith, even though they had not received what they had been promised. They were glad just to see these things from far away, and they agreed that they were only strangers and foreigners on this earth.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna sɔɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩ tãn a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban kpi. Baa nyɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ ba ɛ, nɩdaa lɛ ba gbã nyãa tɩ sɔɔ de, na ba sɔɔ ɩka sãanba nɩ nɩyʊɔrsɩ lɛ ba ɩ ka a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: When people talk this way, it is clear they are looking for a place to call their own.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna na 'yɛr a anyãna, wiil ɩka ba kaara na bʊɔrɔ a tẽe 'lɔ na ɩ a ba mãɛ tʊɔr.

english_verse: If they had been talking about the land where they had once lived, they could have gone back at any time.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ tɩɛrɛ a paal 'lɔ ban yi, ban taa tʊ̃ɔn lɛ lɩɛb kul a be.

english_verse: But they were looking forward to a better home in heaven. This is why God wasn't ashamed for them to call him their God. He even built a city for them.
translation_verse: Tɩ lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, ba dɔ̃ɔ tɩɛrɛ a paal 'lɔ na gar a be, na be a saaju. Ala lɛ so ka a vã ba kʊrɔ wʊ wʊn ɩ a ba Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, bojũu wʊ chɔɔr a tẽe kʊ ba.

english_verse: Abraham had been promised that Isaac, his only son, would continue his family. But when Abraham was tested, he had faith and was willing to sacrifice Isaac,
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn gba na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ ɩka, “Isaakɩ lɛ na 'yɔ̃ɔ a fʊ par, lɛ ɩn tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ fʊ.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: because he was sure that God could raise people to life. This was just like getting Isaac back from death.
translation_verse: Abraham tɩɛr bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na tʊ̃ɔn sãɩ kũu, ka a nyɛtãan fɩka wʊ nyɛn a Isaakɩ na yi a kũu pɔ.

english_verse: Isaac had faith, and he promised blessings to Jacob and Esau.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka Isaakɩ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ Jekɔb nɩ a Esau a ba nɩdaar kɔ̃ɔ yele.

english_verse: Later, when Jacob was about to die, he leaned on his walking stick and worshiped. Then because of his faith he blessed each of Joseph's sons.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Jekɔb na ta a kũu, wʊ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ a Josefʊ bibiir ba jaa tɩ na wʊ guun lan a wʊ dãgbal diiraa tɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.

english_verse: And right before Joseph died, he had faith that God would lead the people of Israel out of Egypt. So he told them to take his bones with them.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka a Josefʊ kũu na wa gbʊrɔ, tɩ wʊ 'yɛr kʊ a Isɩral nɩbɛ a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ yifʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, na wʊ man ba a lɛ ban na ɩ nɩ a wʊ kɔbɔ.

english_verse: Because Moses' parents had faith, they kept him hidden until he was three months old. They saw that he was a beautiful child, and they were not afraid to disobey the king's orders.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ nyã vɛ̃ naa ka a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ban dɔɔ a Mosesɩ a wʊ dɔɔrbɔ sɔɔl wʊn bar ŋmɛrsɩ ata. Bojũu ba nyɛn wʊn ɩ bivɩla, na baa joro a nãa binfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Then after Moses grew up, his faith made him refuse to be called the king's grandson.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ nyã vɛ̃n a lɛ a Mosesɩ na wa nʊ̃ɔ, waa sɔɔ ka ba bʊɔlɔ wʊ a nãkpɛ̃ɛ Faaro bipɔɔ bie ɛ.

english_verse: He chose to be mistreated with God's people instead of having the good time that sin could bring for a little while.
translation_verse: Wʊ kãan ir ban na 'mataa gen wʊ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ gar wʊn na di a yelbier nʊ̃ɔ bãlãa tɛɛ.

english_verse: Moses knew that the treasures of Egypt were not as wonderful as what he would receive from suffering for the Messiah, and he looked forward to his reward.
translation_verse: Wʊ nyɛn wʊn na di dɔɔyɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu ka a tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ gar a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ nãbomo. Bojũu daar kɔ̃ɔ sãyar lɛ wʊ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir kaara.

english_verse: Because of his faith, Moses left Egypt. Moses had seen the invisible God and wasn't afraid of the king's anger.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka a Mosesɩ yi be a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ, tɩ ba joro a nãa suur ɛ. Wʊ tara na kãnyir, bojũu wʊ nyɛn a 'lɔ a nɩbir na maa nyɛ ɛ.

english_verse: His faith also made him celebrate Passover. He sprinkled the blood of animals on the doorposts, so that the first-born sons of the people of Israel would not be killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ wʊ de tun a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr a Gõl Bar Bɩbir 'yɛr, na wʊ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ka ba bol a jãɩ a ba dɔ̃dɔ̃ ɛ, ka a sɔ̃ɔfʊ 'lɔ na waara ba tʊ̃ɔ sɩɩr a Isɩral nɩbɛ bidadɔ̃n ɛ.

english_verse: Because of their faith, the people walked through the Red Sea on dry land. But when the Egyptians tried to do it, they were drowned.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ vɛ̃ naa ka a Man Jɩɛ var lɩɛb sɔr, ka a Ijipitɩ dẽme mɩ na wa ta nyɛ a lɛ na ba kpɛ ka a man di ba jaa.

english_verse: God's people had faith, and when they had walked around the city of Jericho for seven days, its walls fell down.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ vɛ̃ ka a Jeriko dachin kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ wʊ jaa gel lo, a lɛ a Isɩral nɩbɛ na wa gʊɔr a tẽe wʊ jaa a ber ayopõi tuor.

english_verse: Rahab had been a prostitute, but she had faith and welcomed the spies. So she wasn't killed with the people who disobeyed.
translation_verse: Sɔɔfʊ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ faa a sɛ̃sɛ̃ pɔɔ 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Worahab, bojũu wʊ dɔ̃ɔ sɔɔ de a bala ban tʊ̃ ɩka ba tɩ jʊʊr a tẽe kaa. Waa dɔ̃ɔ pʊɔ a bawõnsɩ pɔ kpi ɛ.

english_verse: What else can I say? There isn't enough time to tell about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets.
translation_verse: N lɛ man bo go? N ba tara jaa na man lɛ a Gɩdɩyɔn nɩ Barakɩ nɩ Samson nɩ Jefeta nɩ a Nãa David nɩ Samuwɛl nɩ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na tʊ̃ 'yɛr ɛ,

english_verse: Their faith helped them conquer kingdoms, and because they did right, God made promises to them. They closed the jaws of lions
translation_verse: bala lɛ de sɔɔfʊ jɛb na ba tʊ̃ɔn nãmɩne, tɩ maal a lɛ na sɛɛ, nyɛn a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ. Bala lɛ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ kpal a jubɛrɛ nɛɛr,

english_verse: and put out raging fires and escaped from the swords of their enemies. Although they were weak, they were given the strength and power to chase foreign armies away.
translation_verse: na ba kpĩin a bũu dagel, tɩ na ba jo faa a ba mãɛ a sɔbɛrɛ ala ban taa kʊn ba. Bala lɛ dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a nɩbaalsɩ, na ba lɩɛb nɩkpãɛn, na ba lɩɛb gãdaar a jɛɛr pɔ tʊ̃ɔ a ba dɔ̃dẽme.

english_verse: Some women received their loved ones back from death. Many of these people were tortured, but they refused to be released. They were sure they would get a better reward when the dead are raised to life.
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ mɩ lɛ nyɛn a ba nɩbɛ na dɔ̃ɔ kpi tɩ lɛ lɩɛb ir ɩ vʊɛ. Ba gen bamɩne putuger. Bala ta sɔɔ, ba kʊ̃ naa ge ba ɛ, tɩ ba tɔr tɩ chɛnɛ ara a ba sɔɔfʊ bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba wa nyɛ a kũu 'lɔ pɔ irfʊ na ɩ gar a nyã.

english_verse: Others were made fun of and beaten with whips, and some were chained in jail.
translation_verse: Ba lan bamɩne na ba fɔb ba, tɩ lũn bamɩne mɩ nɩ bɔ̃jɔrsɩ tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ pɔɔfʊ die pɔ.

english_verse: Still others were stoned to death or sawed in two or killed with swords. Some had nothing but sheep skins or goat skins to wear. They were poor, mistreated, and tortured.
translation_verse: Ba lɔb bamɩne nɩ kusɩbɛ kʊ, tɩ ma chɛ bamɩne mɩ var a yi, tɩ kʊn bamɩne mɩ naa sʊɔ. Piir gãma nɩ bʊʊr gãkpoor lɛ bamɩne mɩ ma dɔ̃ɔ su yʊɔrɔ nɩ na ba ɩ nɔ̃n dẽme, ka ba tara ba gere tɩ sɩlɛ ba a pɔrɔ jaa a lɛ nɛ.

english_verse: The world did not deserve these good people, who had to wander in deserts and on mountains and had to live in caves and holes in the ground.
translation_verse: Ka a wɛr nyã ba ta sɛɛ ɩka wʊ tara a nɩbɛ banyãna ɛ, ka ba bãra yʊɔrɔ be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ nɩ a tɔ̃n jur, kpɩɛrɛ a tɔ̃n bɔɔr pɔ nɩ a tũlotuursɩ bɔɔr ala ban ya a tẽe.

english_verse: All of them pleased God because of their faith! But still they died without being given what had been promised.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna ba jaa nyɛn dãasɩvɩla a ba sɔɔfʊ jũu, tɩchɛ a bonsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ tɩr a nɛɛ ba ãsʊɔ jaa ba nyãa ɛ.

english_verse: This was because God had something better in store for us. And he did not want them to reach the goal of their faith without us.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn guor yelvɩɛl na gar a anyã na wʊ gun sɩ, ka wʊ na de sɩ 'matãan ba maal yele a jaa ka a jãtaa.

english_verse: Such a large crowd of witnesses is all around us! So we must get rid of everything that slows us down, especially the sin that just won't let go. And we must be determined to run the race that is ahead of us.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a nɩyɔɔ banyãna na ŋmaa jil sɩ a julõjuur kaar dire a dãasɩɛ, yɩ ɩ a sɩ lɔb bon jaa na ŋmaa sɩ sɔr bar nɩ a yelbier ala na maa yaara tɩ bãr sɩ lɔb ɛ, tɩ na sɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir joro nɩ kãnyir tɩ ta a jie ban tʊ̃ɔ gun sɩ.

english_verse: But you have forgotten that the Scriptures say to God's children, “When the Lord punishes you, don't make light of it, and when he corrects you, don't be discouraged.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta ĩin a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ a ãkpãɛn nɩtãa a wʊ bibiir ɛ, “N bie, ta de dekpele 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro kpãafʊ pɔ ɛ, na fʊ ta vɛ̃ ka a fʊ pʊɔ sɔ̃ɔ a lɛ wʊn gɔ̃nɔ̃ fʊ ɛ,

english_verse: Be patient when you are being corrected! This is how God treats his children. Don't all parents correct their children?
translation_verse: Yɩ tara kãnyir a kpãafʊ nyã pɔ. Nãaŋmɩn maala yɩ naa a wʊ bibiir. Bojũu bibuor lɛ be be, ka a wʊ sãa maa tɔɔ wʊ toor ɛ?

english_verse: God corrects all his children, and if he doesn't correct you, then you don't really belong to him.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ba wa nyɛ a toor tɔɔfʊ a wʊ bibiir kaar ɛ, ka lɛ sãa yir bibiir lɛ ba ɩ.

english_verse: Our human fathers correct us for a short time, and they do it as they think best. But God corrects us for our own good, because he wants us to be holy, as he is.
translation_verse: A sɩ sãamɩne ma kpãa sɩn jaa bãlãa tun a lɛ ban tɩɛr ɩka a ɩ naa. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ma kpãa sɩ naa, ka sɩ ɩ nɩsʊ̃n, a sɩn nɩ 'lɔ 'mataa põ a wʊ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: It is never fun to be corrected. In fact, at the time it is always painful. But if we learn to obey by being corrected, we will do right and live at peace.
translation_verse: Kpãafʊ ba be be na ɩ nʊ̃ɔ a pielfʊ daar ɛ, tɩchɛ a ma ɩn tuo. A puor lɛ a ma pãa wɔ̃ torfʊ, nɩ nyã'maar kʊ a bala na sɔɔ tu.

english_verse: Try to live at peace with everyone! Live a clean life. If you don't, you will never see the Lord.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɔ̃ lɛ jaa yɩn na tʊ̃ɔ ɩ, ka yɩn nɩ nɩrɛ jaa kpɩɛrɛ nɩ nyã'maar, na yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ. Nɩrɛ ba wa ɩ chɛchɛ ɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nyɛ a sɩ Soro ɛ.

english_verse: Make sure no one misses out on God's wonderful kindness. Don't let anyone become bitter and cause trouble for the rest of you.
translation_verse: Yɩ kaara sʊ̃, ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa taa vɩɛ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ bar ɛ, bɩɩ ka a nyɩɩr tuo kɔ̃ɔ taa tɔ yi na wʊ dam yele 'yɔ̃ɔ nɩbɛ ka a ba yɔɔ jie taa sɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You know how he later wanted it back. But there was nothing he could do to change things, even though he begged his father and cried.
translation_verse: A ala puor, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka wʊ lɛ wa bʊɔrɔ naa a wʊ difʊ jie, ka a sãa tɔr wʊ bar, a wʊ mɩ kʊ̃ lɛ tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb go ɛ. Wʊ gba wa kõn nɩbikʊ̃ɔ nɩ a yele nyã, tɩ waa lɛ nyɛ a sʊ̃ʊfʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: You have not come to a place like Mount Sinai that can be seen and touched. There is no flaming fire or dark cloud or storm
translation_verse: Yɩn 'lɔ ba wa a tɔ̃ɔ nyã par yɩn na tʊ̃ɔ sɩɩr ɛ, a 'lɔ na ma dɔ̃ɔ lɩrɛ a bũu, bɩɩ ka a jie ma sɔb lii ka a sajakpuro furo,

english_verse: because they could not obey its commands. They were even told to kill any animal that touched the mountain.
translation_verse: Bojũu baa dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ tara a lɛ a 'yɛr na kpãkpãana ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka, “Ala ɩ dʊ̃ɔ gba wa sɩɩr a tɔ̃ɔ, ba lɔb wʊ nɩ kʊsɩbɛ kʊ.” (A Yifʊ Gãn

english_verse: The sight was so frightening that Moses said he shook with fear.
translation_verse: Ka a jie dɔ̃ɔ ɩrɛ dãbãɛ wʊ jaa, ka Mosesɩ wa tɩ 'yɛr, “N mɩrɛ naa nɩ dãbãɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: You have now come to Mount Zion and to the heavenly Jerusalem. This is the city of the living God, where thousands and thousands of angels have come to celebrate.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ, yɩn 'lɔ wa naa a Jiyon Tɔ̃ɔ par na ɩ a saaju Jerusalɛm, be lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbir nyã kpɩɛrɛ. Yɩ wa lɔ̃ɔn naa a malakasɩ turo turo na lɔ̃ɔ taa nɩ pʊpɛl,

english_verse: Here you will find all of God's dearest children, whose names are written in heaven. And you will find God himself, who judges everyone. Here also are the spirits of those good people who have been made perfect.
translation_verse: nɩ a pupuorbiir bala na ɩ a bidɔ̃ɔ, bala yoe lɛ sɛb a be a saaju. Yɩn wa naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'lɔ na tɔɔr a nɩbɛ ba jaa 'yɛr sɛ̃, nɩ a 'lɔ na maal a torfʊ dẽme sɩɩr ka a ɩ chɛchɛ,

english_verse: Make sure you obey the one who speaks to you. The people did not escape, when they refused to obey the one who spoke to them at Mount Sinai. Do you think you can possibly escape, if you refuse to obey the one who speaks to you from heaven?
translation_verse: Yɩ kaara sʊ̃ na yɩ taa tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛrɛ ɛ. Ala ɩ a bala wʊn dɔ̃ɔ kpãa faa ka a wɛr pɔ ba chãɛ ɛ, ŋmɩnɛ an kaara kʊ a sɩn, ala ɩ sɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na kpãana sɩ yire a saaju?

english_verse: When God spoke the first time, his voice shook only the earth. This time he has promised to shake the earth once again, and heaven too.
translation_verse: A sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn kɔkɔr dam a tẽe wʊ jaa, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ wʊ tɩr nɛɛ ɩka, “Daar kɔ̃ɔ go, a ba ɩ a tẽe lɛ ɩn dam ɛ, tɩchɛ ɩn dam a saaju wʊ jaa.” (Hagai

english_verse: The words “once again” mean that these created things will someday be shaken and removed. Then what cannot be shaken will last.
translation_verse: A 'yɛrbir nyã wʊn 'yɛr ɩka, daar kɔ̃ɔ go, a par lɛ ɩka wʊn ir a bonsɩ ala na ɩ a bʊ̃maalsɩ na dam bar, tɩchɛ a ala na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ dam ɛ, ka ala ara.

english_verse: We should be grateful we were given a kingdom that cannot be shaken. And in this kingdom we please God by worshiping him and by showing him great honor and respect.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɩn na ben tara a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nyã na ba tara damfʊ ɛ, yɩ vɛ̃ ka a nʊ̃mɔ̃ sɩ, a sɩ dãna Nãaŋmɩn lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ dãbãɛ,

english_verse: Our God is like a destructive fire!
translation_verse: bojũu a sɩ “Nãaŋmɩn nyã ɩn bũu na dire.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: Keep being concerned about each other as the Lord's followers should.
translation_verse: Yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir na yɩ nʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩtãa yɛɛr.

english_verse: Be sure to welcome strangers into your home. By doing this, some people have welcomed angels as guests, without even knowing it.
