translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa ĩin sãanba defʊ bar ɛ, bojũu nɩbɛ bamɩne dɔ̃ɔ de sãanba maal ba vɩla, tɩ baa bɔ̃ɔn ɩka malakasɩ lɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Remember the Lord's people who are in jail and be concerned for them. Don't forget those who are suffering, but imagine you are there with them.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr a bala ban nyɔɔr pɔɔ a die pɔ fɩka yɩ mɩ pʊɔ ban be a pɔɔfʊ jie, nɩ a bala ban gere fɩka yɩ mɩ pʊɔ ban dire a dɔɔyɛ.

english_verse: Have respect for marriage. Always be faithful to your partner, because God will punish anyone who is immoral or unfaithful in marriage.
translation_verse: Yɩ jaa, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a kultaa, ka a yɩ gaa jie taa tara chɛfʊ ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn na tɔɔr a bala jaa na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a kultaa nɩ a sɛ̃sɛ̃nbɛ 'yɛr.

english_verse: Don't fall in love with money. Be satisfied with what you have. The Lord has promised that he will not leave us or desert us.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin a libie nʊ̃fʊ pɔ, na yɩ vɛ̃ ka a bãlãa jaa yɩn tara sɛɛn yi, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa a wʊ gãn pɔ ɩka, “N kʊ̃ wa bar fʊ jaa ɛ, n kʊ̃ wa tɔr fʊ jaa bar ɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Anũu

english_verse: Don't forget about your leaders who taught you God's message. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have faith like theirs.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛrtɔ a yɩ nɩdierbe na dɔ̃ɔ man a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr kʊ yɩ. Yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ na yɩ jãn a ba sɔɔfʊ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ never changes! He is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
translation_verse: Lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na be a jãa, lɛ lɛ wʊ chɛnɛ a dɩna na wʊn chɛnɛ a lɛ nɛ bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa.

english_verse: Don't be fooled by any kind of strange teachings. It is better to receive strength from God's gift of undeserved grace than to depend on certain foods. After all, these foods don't really help the people who eat them.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa vɛ̃ ka a wiil sãan jaa wa tɔɔ yɩ yin ka yɩ tɩ bɔr ɛ, a vɩɛlɛ naa kaa sɩ nyãa nyɛ kpɛ̃ɔ yi a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ pɔ, ka a ta ɩ a bʊ̃diir difʊ na ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ a bala na dire yaa ɛ.

english_verse: But we have an altar where even the priests who serve in the place of worship have no right to eat.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn tara na a bɔɔr lofʊ jie, be a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlorbo bala na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a be ba tara sɔr na di ɛ.

english_verse: Jesus himself suffered outside the city gate, so his blood would make people holy.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a Yesu di a dɔɔyɛ a tẽe yõo dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ, ka a wʊ jãɩ maal a wʊ nɩbɛ ka ba ɩ chɛchɛ.

english_verse: This is why we should go outside the camp to Jesus and share in his disgrace.
translation_verse: Yɩ mɩ ɩ a sɩ yi tɩ pʊɔ wʊ be a yõo na sɩ di a vã 'lɔ wʊn dɔ̃ɔ di.

english_verse: On this earth we don't have a city that lasts forever, but we are waiting for such a city.
translation_verse: Bojũu a tẽe nyã sɩn kpɩɛrɛ kʊ̃ kor ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ kaara a tẽe 'lɔ na wa.

english_verse: But don't forget to help others and to share your possessions with them. This too is like offering a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa ĩin a vɩla maalfʊ bar ɛ, na yɩ ma lɔ̃ɔ põn a yɩ taaba, bojũu a bɔɔrlo bonsɩ anyãna lɛ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

english_verse: Obey your leaders and do what they say. They are watching over you, and they must answer to God. So don't make them sad as they do their work. Make them happy. Otherwise, they won't be able to help you at all.
translation_verse: Yɩ turo a yɩ nɩdierbe nɛɛ, na yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ kʊ ba. Bala lɛ kaara yɩ, na ban wa man a yɩ yele kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn. Yɩ turo a ba nɛɛ ka a ba tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩ nʊ̃ɔ naa ta ɩ tuor kʊ ba ɛ, naa ta mɩ ɩ pɔrɔ a yɩ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: I especially want you to pray that I can visit you again soon. Final Prayers and Greetings
translation_verse: Maa 'lɔ, n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn kʊrɔ ma ka n nyɛ sɔr naa tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb fɔɔ tɩ a yɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: God gives peace, and he raised our Lord Jesus Christ from death. Now Jesus is like a Great Shepherd whose blood was used to make God's eternal agreement with his flock.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn nyã'maar sʊɔ na tu a jãɩ ala wʊn de tɩr a nɛtɩraa na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, na wʊ sãɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a kũu pɔ, 'lɔ na ɩ a pɛchiin gbɔɔraa,

english_verse: I pray God will make you ready to obey him and that you will always be eager to do right. May Jesus help you do what pleases God. To Jesus Christ be glory forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: wʊ sʊ̃ʊ yɩ nɩ vɩla jaa bʊrɔ ka yɩ tʊ̃ɔ maal a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ, na wʊ mɩ tũ a sɩ pɔ a lɛ na pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you, and I beg you to pay close attention to what I have said.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa ɩka yɩ tu a n kpãafʊ 'yɛrbie anyãna, bojũu a 'yɛrbie anyã ɩn sɛb ba ɩ yɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: By now you surely must know that our friend Timothy is out of jail. If he gets here in time, I will bring him with me when I come to visit you.
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka ba yuon a sɩ yɛbɛ Timoti bar, 'lɔ wa tɔ̃ɔ ta fɔɔ, ɩn tara wʊn 'mataa tɩn ka yɩ tɩ nyɛ wʊ.

english_verse: Please give my greetings to your leaders and to the rest of the Lord's people. His followers from Italy send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor a yɩ nɩdierbe ba jaa nɩ a pupuorbiir ba jaa jaa. Bala mɩ na yi a Itali mɩ puoro yɩ naa.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: A wãɛfʊ wʊ be a yɩ jaa sɛ̃.

english_verse: From James, a servant of God and of our Lord Jesus Christ. Greetings to the twelve tribes scattered all over the world. Faith and Wisdom
translation_verse: Jemesɩ, na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaa, puoro naa a Isɩral bala pie nɩ ayi na yaar a wɛr wʊ jaa.

english_verse: My friends, be glad, even if you have a lot of trouble.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ tara pʊpɛl, ala sɔɔ ɩ yelyɔɔ wõnõ yɩ naa.

english_verse: You know you learn to endure by having your faith tested.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩn jãn naa tara kãnyir a yɩ bɛɛr kaa sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But you must learn to endure everything, so you will be completely mature and not lacking in anything.
translation_verse: Yɩn jãn tʊ̃ɔ tara kãnyir, a lɛ na vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ tʊ̃ɔ baa, tɩ na yɩ taa wa faa bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: If any of you need wisdom, you should ask God, and it will be given to you. God is generous and won't correct you for asking.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa bʊɔrɔ naa yɛ̃, wʊ sʊɔr yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ na kʊrɔ nɩrɛ jaa pɔrɔ, wʊ ɩn nɩmãɛ, wʊ kʊ̃ mɔ̃ɔ fʊ ɛ.

english_verse: But when you ask for something, you must have faith and not doubt. Anyone who doubts is like an ocean wave tossed around in a storm.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn wa sʊɔr bon jaa, yɩ tara sɔɔfʊ na yɩ ta baala ɛ. Nɩrɛ jaa na baala kaara nɩtãa man kʊ̃ɔ sɛsɛbɛ na furo dãdaala.

english_verse: Any of God's people who are poor should be glad he thinks so highly of them.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn puoro nɔ̃ɔsʊɔ wʊ chɩlɛ, bojũu wʊ do naa.

english_verse: But any who are rich should be glad when God makes them humble. Rich people will disappear like wild flowers
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a taraa sʊɔ mɩ wʊ chɩlɛ a wʊ suufʊ pɔ, bojũu wʊn suor naa fɩka mɔpuul.

english_verse: scorched by the burning heat of the sun. The flowers lose their blossoms, and their beauty is destroyed. This is how the rich will disappear, as they go about their business. Trials and Temptations
translation_verse: Bojũu a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ ma nyãa naa ka a tʊl ŋme ka a ko suor, a vapuul ma suor naa ka a vɩla baar. Lɛ lɛ a taraa sʊɔ kaara, 'lɔ wa tʊ̃nɔ̃ a wʊ yar tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: God will bless you, if you don't give up when your faith is being tested. He will reward you with a glorious life, just as he rewards everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ na di kãnyir ara a bɛɛr kaa pɔ, tɩ na waa lo ɛ. Bojũu a nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ na nyɛ a nyɛvʊr nãa jupil 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ a bala na nʊ̃ wʊ.

english_verse: Don't blame God when you are tempted! God cannot be tempted by evil, and he doesn't use evil to tempt others.
translation_verse: Bɛɛr kaa wa wa nɩrɛ sɛ̃, wʊ ta 'yɛr ɩka Nãaŋmɩn lɛ bɛɛr wʊ kaa ɛ. Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ de bier bɛɛr nɩrɛ kaa ɛ, a wʊ mãɛ ba bɛɛrɛ nɩrɛ kaara ɛ.

english_verse: We are tempted by our own desires that drag us off and trap us.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ jaa yelbier vɔlaa lɛ ma bɛɛr wʊ kaa na a nyɔɔ wʊ.

english_verse: Our desires make us sin, and when sin is finished with us, it leaves us dead.
translation_verse: A vɔlaa anyãna lɛ na tara pʊɔ naa dɔɔ bier, ka a bier nʊ̃ɔ dɔɔ kũu.

english_verse: Don't be fooled, my dear friends.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr nʊ̃nʊ̃nbɔ, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka ba bɛl yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Every good and perfect gift comes down from the Father who created all the lights in the heavens. He is always the same and never makes dark shadows by changing.
translation_verse: Bʊ̃vɩla nɩ kʊfʊ vɩla jaa yire naa a chãa Sãa na be a saaju sɛ̃. Libe ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, waa lɩɛrɛ ɛ.

english_verse: He wanted us to be his own special people, and so he sent the true message to give us new birth. Hearing and Obeying
translation_verse: An wa ta a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ, wʊ dɔɔ sɩn nɩ a wʊ yelmãɛ 'yɛr ka sɩ ɩ birdɔ̃ɔ a bʊ̃maalsɩ a jaa pɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should be quick to listen and slow to speak or to get angry.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr nʊ̃nʊ̃nbɔ, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a anyãna yɩ ma chɛlɛ fɔfɔɔ tɩ na yɩ ta ma 'yɛrɛ fɔfɔɔ ɛ, bɩɩ nyɛrɛ suur fɔfɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If you are angry, you cannot do any of the good things God wants done.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ wa nyɛ suur, wʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ maal yelvɩla ala a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ ɩka a ɩ ɛ.

english_verse: You must stop doing anything immoral or evil. Instead be humble and accept the message planted in you to save you.
translation_verse: A lɛ juu, yɩ bar yele jaa na ɩ dɛɛr bɩɩ bier, tɩ na yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ de a 'yɛrbir 'lɔ na bʊr a yɩ nyãa pɔ, ala lɛ na faa a yɩ sɩɩr.

english_verse: Obey God's message! Don't fool yourselves by just listening to it.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta bɛlɛ a yɩ mãɛ a 'yɛr yɩn chɛlɛ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ yɩ ɩ a 'yɛr mamaalba.

english_verse: If you hear the message and don't obey it, you are like people who stare at themselves in a mirror
translation_verse: A nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa wõ a 'yɛr tɩ ba sɔɔ de ɛ, wʊ kaara nɩtãa a 'lɔ na chaar a wʊ mãɛ kaa chãana pɔ,

english_verse: and forget what they look like as soon as they leave.
translation_verse: wʊn wa yi baar wʊ ĩin a lɛ bar wʊn kaara.

english_verse: But you must never stop looking at the perfect law that sets you free. God will bless you in everything you do, if you listen and obey, and don't just hear and forget.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir turo a nɛbinãa na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, na ma vɛ̃ ka fʊ so a fʊ mãɛ, Nãaŋmɩn na sʊ̃ʊ wʊ naa nɩ bon jaa pɔ wʊn maal, ala ɩ wʊ chɛl tɩ sɔɔ, tɩ a ba ɩ wõ tɩ ĩin ɛ.

english_verse: If you think you are being religious, but can't control your tongue, you are fooling yourself, and your religion is useless.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ tɩɛr ɩka wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn puorbo tɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ a wʊ jãlbir ɛ, wʊ bɛlɛ na wʊ mãɛ, ka a wʊ puorfʊ ɩ pɔrɔ.

english_verse: Religion that pleases God the Father must be pure and spotless. You must help needy orphans and widows and not let this world make you evil.
translation_verse: Puorfʊ 'lɔ na pɛlɛ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ na wʊ ɩ chɛchɛ na ba tara dɛɛr ɛ. Sʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na ɩ a kpɩɩr, nɩ a pɔɔkɔɛ, a ba dɔɔyɛ pɔ, tɩ nyɔɔ fʊ mãɛ ka a wɛr ta sɔ̃ɔ fʊ ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, if you have faith in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ, you won't treat some people better than others.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩn sɔɔ de a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩɩr sʊɔ, yɩ taa turo nɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Suppose a rich person wearing fancy clothes and a gold ring comes to one of your meetings. And suppose a poor person dressed in worn-out clothes also comes.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩbɛ ayi wa kpɛ naa a yɩ lɔ̃ɔfʊ jie, ka a ãsʊɔ pãɛ na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn sɛlma mʊtʊɔ, tɩchɛ ka a ãsʊɔ mɩ ɩ nɔ̃ɔ sʊɔ su bʊ̃jarsɩ.

english_verse: You must not give the best seat to the one in fancy clothes and tell the one who is poor to stand at the side or sit on the floor.
translation_verse: Ka yɩ lɩɛb 'yɛr kʊ a 'lɔ na pãɛ, “Jãnɛ ka a dakɔɔ ju,” tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a 'lɔ mɩ na su a bʊ̃jarsɩ, “Ara ka bɩɩ wa jãnɛ ka a tẽe a n gbɛɛ par.”

english_verse: This is the same as saying that some people are better than others, and you would be acting like a crooked judge.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ lɛ lɛ, a ba ɩ yɩ turo naa a nɩbɛ bamɩne nʊ̃nɔ̃ na yɩ de tɩɛr dɛɛr tɔɔrɔ nɩ a ba 'yɛr ɛ?

english_verse: Aren't they the ones who make fun of your Lord?
translation_verse: A ba ɩ bala lɛ sɔ̃ɔ a yovɩla 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ yɩ ɛ?

english_verse: You will do all right, if you obey the most important law in the Scriptures. It is the law that commands us to love others as much as we love ourselves.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ tu naa a nɛɛ 'lɔ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Fʊ nʊ̃ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ a fʊ kaar,” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata

english_verse: But if you treat some people better than others, you have done wrong, and the Scriptures teach that you have sinned.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn wa turo nʊ̃nɔ̃, yɩ maal dɛɛr, ka a nɛɛ 'yɛr ɩka yɩ bɔr naa na yɩ ɩ a nɛɛ sɔ̃sɔ̃ɔnbɔ.

english_verse: If you obey every law except one, you are still guilty of breaking them all.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na turo a nɛɛr a jaa tɩ wa 'mab bʊ̃'yen, wʊ sɔ̃ɔn a jaa.

english_verse: Speak and act like people who will be judged by the law that sets us free.
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɛrɛ tɩ maala bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Nãaŋmɩn na tɔɔr a yɩ 'yɛr nɩtãa lɛ a nɛɛ 'lɔ na ma vɛ̃ ka nɩrɛ so a wʊ mãɛ na 'yɛr.

english_verse: Do this, because on the day of judgment there will be no pity for those who have not had pity on others. But even in judgment, God is merciful! Faith and Works
translation_verse: Bojũu a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar, fʊ̃ʊ nyã na ba dɔ̃ɔ tara nɩbibaal jofʊ ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ mɩ jo a fʊ nɩbibaal ɛ. Nɩbibaal jofʊ tʊ̃ɔn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ.

english_verse: My friends, what good is it to say you have faith, when you don't do anything to show you really do have faith? Can this kind of faith save you?
translation_verse: Vɩla buor nɩ nyã n yɛɛr, ala ɩ nɩrɛ 'yɛr naa ɩka wʊ tara na sɔɔfʊ, tɩchɛ ba lɔ̃ɔn tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɛ, a sɔɔfʊ nyã na tʊ̃ɔ faa wʊ ɔ?

english_verse: you shouldn't just say, “I hope all goes well for you. I hope you will be warm and have plenty to eat.” What good is it to say this, unless you do something to help?
translation_verse: ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ 'yɛr kʊ wʊ, “Chiine nɩ nyã'maar, a ɩ vɩla kʊ fʊ ka fʊ nyɛ di tɩɩ,” tɩchɛ na faa sʊ̃ʊ wʊ a ãgãn bʊ̃bʊɔrsɩ ɛ, bo vɩla lɛ a ɩ?

english_verse: Faith that doesn't lead us to do good deeds is all alone and dead!
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, sɔɔfʊ ka tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba pʊɔ ɛ, wʊ ɩn bʊ̃kũu.

english_verse: Suppose someone disagrees and says, “It is possible to have faith without doing kind deeds.” I would answer, “Prove that you have faith without doing kind deeds, and I will prove that I have faith by doing them.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ãsʊɔ na 'yɛr naa, “Fʊ̃ʊ tara na sɔɔfʊ ka maa mɩ tara a tʊ̃mɔ̃.” Wiil ma a fʊ sɔɔfʊ ka tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba pʊɔ ɛ, tɩ n mɩ wiil fʊ a n sɔɔfʊ nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: You surely believe there is only one God. That's fine. Even demons believe this, and it makes them shake with fear.
translation_verse: Fʊ sɔɔ naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ be be. A ɩn vɩla. A sɩdɛbɛ gba mɩ sɔɔn de a lɛ, tɩ na ba mɩ joro dãbãɛ.

english_verse: Does some stupid person want proof that faith without deeds is useless?
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ jɔl nyã, sɔɔfʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ na ba pʊɔ ɛ, faa bɔ̃ɔ ka bʊ̃kũu lɛ ɛ?

english_verse: Well, our ancestor Abraham pleased God by putting his son Isaac on the altar to sacrifice him.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ a sɩ sãakpã Abraham wiil a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃, wʊn dɔ̃ɔ de a wʊ bie Isaakɩ ɩka wʊ lon bɔɔr ɛ?

english_verse: Now you see how Abraham's faith and deeds worked together. He proved his faith was real by what he did.
translation_verse: Faa nyɛ a sɔɔfʊ nɩ a tʊ̃mɔ̃ na 'mataa ɛ, ka a wʊ sɔɔfʊ sɛɛ nɩ a lɛ wʊn tʊ̃.

english_verse: This is what the Scriptures mean by saying, “Abraham had faith in God, and God accepted him.” That's how Abraham became God's friend.
translation_verse: Ka a lɛ na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩ yelmãɛ ɩka, “Abraham sɔɔn de Nãaŋmɩn, ka a lɛ vɛ̃ ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor.” (A Pielfʊ Gãn

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Yaa nyɛ, nɩrɛ na ɩn nɩtor Nãaŋmɩn niem a lɛ wʊn tʊ̃, a ba ɩ a wʊ sɔɔfʊ tɛɛ ɛ.

english_verse: For example, Rahab had been a prostitute. But she pleased God when she welcomed the spies and sent them home by another way.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ ba dɔ̃ɔ kaa a sɛ̃sɛ̃ pɔɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Worahab ka wʊ ɩ nɩtor, wʊn dɔ̃ɔ de a tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ wiil ba sɔyuo ka ba lɩɛb kul.

english_verse: Anyone who doesn't breathe is dead, and faith that doesn't do anything is just as dead!
translation_verse: A lɛ a sɩɛ na ma wa yi a ãgãn pɔ ka wʊ ɩ bʊ̃kũu, lɛ mɩ lɛ a sɔɔfʊ ka tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba pʊɔ ɛ mɩ ɩ bʊ̃kũu.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ jaa yɩ ta bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ ɩ wiwiilbe ɛ, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a sɩn bala na ɩ a wiwiilbe na nyɛn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ gar nɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: Sɩ jaa ma maal 'mab. Ala ɩ nɩrɛ jaa ba 'yɛr 'mab ɛ, wʊ ɩn nɩtor na wʊ nyɔɔrɔ a wʊ mãɛ.

english_verse: By putting a bit into the mouth of a horse, we can turn the horse in different directions.
translation_verse: Sɩ ma 'yɔ̃ɔn a kur a wiisɩ nɛɛr pɔ, ka a ma tu a sɩ nɛɛr, ka sɩ ma lɩɛb chiin jie jaa sɩn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Bɩɩ yɩ kaa a gbor bɛrɛ ala a man kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ a sɛsɛkpɛ̃ɛ na ma furo chiine, tɩchɛ a gbor mɔ̃nɔ̃ ma den a vuur mɔ̃ chiin jie jaa wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a jãlbir na ɩ jaa pʊʊrbile a ãgãn pɔ tɩ ma fere. Wʊ kaara fɩka bũu bir na lo tuu kpɛ̃ɛ pɔ di wʊ jaa.

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: A jãlbir mɩ ɩn bũu na ɩ a wɛr dɛɛr na be a sɩ ãgãn pɔ na wʊ sɔ̃ɔ a ãgãn wʊ jaa bar, na wʊ chʊmɔ̃ a ãgãn nɩ a bũu dagel 'lɔ na ba kpĩine ɛ.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ ma tʊ̃ɔn guol mɔdʊ̃ɔ jaa bʊrɔ, nɩ lubil jaa bʊrɔ, bʊ̃vuuraa jaa bʊrɔ, nɩ a man pɔ bonsɩ.

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ maa tʊ̃ɔ a wʊ jãlbir ɛ, wʊ ɩn bʊ̃bier na ba pɛ̃nɛ ɛ, na wʊ mɩ ɩ lɔɔ na kʊrɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, with our tongues we speak both praises and curses. We praise our Lord and Father, and we curse people who were created to be like God, and this isn't right.
translation_verse: A nɛbʊ̃'yen 'lɔ pɔ lɛ a pɛɛfʊ nɩ pɔ'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ma yire. N yɛɛr a ba tor ɛ.

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Kɔ̃vɩla nɩ kɔ̃dɛɛr na tʊ̃ɔ yire bul bʊ̃'yen pɔ bɩɩ?

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ na tʊ̃ɔ wɔ̃ dãbãɩnãa bɩɩ dãbãɩnãa na tʊ̃ɔ wɔ̃ kɔ̃kɔ̃ɔ ɔ? Lɛ mɩ lɛ, kɔ̃vɩla nɩ kɔ̃dɛɛr kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'mataar yire bul bʊ̃'yen pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: A yɩ ãsʊɔ tara na yɛ̃ nɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ bɩɩ? Vɛ̃ ka a wiil a wʊ maalfʊ pɔ, nɩ lɛ wʊn siir a wʊ mãɛ maala nɩ yɛ̃.

english_verse: But if your heart is full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, don't brag or lie to cover up the truth.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ a yɩ nyãa pɔ, nyuur dɛɛr nɩ tuo, nɩ yobɔyele ben be, yɩ ta wile yɩ mãɛ ŋmara jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: A yɛ̃ nyã bʊrɔ ba yi saaju wa ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ɩ naa a wɛr nyã yɛ̃ nɩsaal na tara ka wʊ yi a sɩdɛɛr sɛ̃.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Bojũu jie 'lɔ nyuur, nɩ tuo, nɩ yobɔyele na be, be lɛ guor taa ba be ɛ, ka tʊ̃ dɛɛr jaa bʊrɔ be be.

english_verse: But the wisdom that comes from above leads us to be pure, friendly, gentle, sensible, kind, helpful, genuine, and sincere.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɛ̃ 'lɔ, na yi saaju ɩn chɛchɛ na wʊ tara nyã'maar nʊ̃fʊ, nɩ sʊ̃ʊfʊ, nɩ mãɛ siirfʊ, nɩ vɩla maalfʊ, na wʊ joro nɩbaal, na wʊ wɔ̃nɔ̃ bisʊ̃n, na waa ooro ɛ, bɩɩ tara nɛɛr ayi ɛ.

english_verse: When peacemakers plant seeds of peace, they will harvest justice.
translation_verse: A bala na ba bʊɔrɔ jɛɛr ɛ, na bʊr nɩ nyã'maar, na ŋman yeltorsɩ.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Nyɩnɛ lɛ a jɛɛr nɩ nɛchɩrɛ yi be a yɩ chara pɔ? A ba ɩ a yi naa a vɔlaa 'lɔ na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jɛɛr ɛ?

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma bʊɔrɔ na bon kɔ̃ɔ tɩ yɩ maa nyɛ ɛ, na yɩ ma kʊrɔ taa. Na yɩ ma tara nyuur nɩ bomo, tɩ na yɩ maa nyãa ɛ, na yɩ pãa tara jɛɛr nɩ nɛchɩrɛ, tɩ maa nyãa ɛ, bojũu yɩ maa sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Yɩn sɛ̃sɛ̃ nɩbɛ ba nyã, yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka nɩrɛ nyã na ɩ a wɛr baraa 'laar Nãaŋmɩn ɛ? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ŋmaa a wɛr nyã baraa ɩn Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃ sʊɔ.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Ta baala a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr ɩka, yelmãɛ jaa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kaara a Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔ sɩ.

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ma kʊ sɩ naa a wʊ wãɛfʊ, ala lɛ so a Nãaŋmɩn gãn na 'yɛr, “Nãaŋmɩn ma tɔr naa bala na bʊɔr yuor, tɩ na wʊ ma wãɛ a bala na siir ba mãɛ.” (Sʊkpar Gãn

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɔɔ gbʊr Nãaŋmɩn, wʊ mɩ na tɔɔn gbʊr yɩ. Yɩn yelbe-ɩrbɛ, yɩ pɛɛ a yɩ nuur na yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr, yɩn tɩɛr ayi dẽme.

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Yɩ waala, na yɩ tara pʊsɔ̃ɔ, na yɩ kõnõ. Yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ laar lɩɛb kõn, ka a yɩ pʊpɛl lɩɛb pʊsɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Yɩ siir a yɩ mãɛ a sɩ Soro niem, wʊn 'mɔɔ yɩn ka yɩ do.

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ ta sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa yoe ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ yuor, wʊ tɔɔr a wʊ 'yɛr, wʊ tɔɔrɔ naa a nɛbinãa 'lɔ 'yɛr. Fʊ̃ʊ wa tɔɔrɔ a nɛbinãa 'yɛr, faa turo a lɛ a nɛbinãa na 'yɛr ɛ, tɩ ɩ a wʊ 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn lɛ bin a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ sɩ, na wʊ ɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ, 'lɔ lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ faa bɩɩ sɔ̃ɔ bar. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ mɩ nɩ ana na fʊ tɔɔrɔ a fʊ tɔ sʊɔ 'yɛr?

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛlɛ, a yɩn bala na ma 'yɛr ɩka, “Dɩna bɩɩ bio sɩn chen tẽkpɛ̃ɛ pɔ tɩ maal yuon, da bomo, da nyɛ libie.”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ lɛn na ɩ bio ɛ, bo lɛ a yɩ nyɛvʊr? Wʊ kaara fɩka ul na lo tɩ wɛl ajienaa.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Yɩ ta ma 'yɛr ɩka, “Ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn sɔɔ naa ka sɩ tara nyɛvʊr, sɩn maal nyã bɩɩ anyãna.”

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Tɩ lɛ an be nɩ nyã, yɩ bʊɔrɔ na yuor, na yɩ wile yɩ mãɛ, ka a mãɛ wiilfʊ nyã ɩ yelbier.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na pãa bɔ̃ɔ vɩla tɩ ba maal ɛ, wʊ ɩn bier.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛlɛ, yɩn tara dẽme, yɩ kõnõ ŋmiere chɛlsɩ a yele 'lɔ na waara a yɩ ju.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: A yɩ nãbomo pʊ̃ɔ naa, ka yɛlɛ mʊʊ a yɩ fɔɔr.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: A yɩ sɛlma nɩ a libie lon sɔrɔ, ka a ba sɔrɔ lofʊ wiil ɩka an di yɩn bũu kaar. A baarfʊ ta naa, tɩ yɩ chɛnɛ bin a nãbomo.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Yɩ nyɛ a bala yɩn de ka ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ a yɩ por pɔ, tɩ yɩ mɔ̃ɔ ba a yar ka ba kõnõ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ yɩ, ka a yɩ bʊ̃ŋmarba kõn ta a sɩ Soro na ɩ a Tʊ̃ɔfʊ Sʊɔ.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Yɩ din nʊ̃ɔ ka a wɛr pɔ lɛ yɩn bʊɔrɔ. Yɩ guol naa yɩ mãɛ a lɛ kʊfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Yɩ ma 'yɔ̃ɔn a bala na tor 'yɛr, na yɩ kʊ ba, tɩ baa maal bon jaa ɛ.

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɛɛr yɩ tara kãnyir tɩ tãn a sɩ Soro waa daar. Kaa nyɛ a lɛ a kʊɔraa na ma tara kãnyir chɛlɛ nɩ a bonsɩ wɔ̃fʊ daar, na wʊ tara kãnyir chɛlɛ a sadɔ̃ɔ nɩ a sabaaraa.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Yɩn mɩ, yɩ tara kãnyir na yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ, bojũu a sɩ Soro waa gbʊr naa.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Yɛɛr yɩ ta hũhũnõ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa na yɩ taa nyɛ 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ ɛ. A 'yɛr tɔɔrɔ ara naa a dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Yɛɛr, yɩ kaa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ bala na de a sɩ Soro yuor 'yɛr 'yɛr, din dɔɔyɛ tɩ tara kãnyir.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka sɩ bʊɔlɔ ba bɔɔsʊ̃n dẽme. Yɩ wõn a Job kãnyir wʊn tara na yɩ mɩ nyɛ a lɛ a sɩ Soro na maal kʊ wʊ a baaraa. A sɩ Soro ɩn nɩbaal joro, na wʊ maala vɩla.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ala na chɛ lɛ a anyã, yɩ taa pɔrɔ nɩ saaju ɛ, bɩɩ a tẽe ɛ, bɩɩ bon jaa ɛ, tɩ yɩ vɛ̃ ka yɩ ɔ̃ɔ, ɩ ɔ̃ɔ, ka yɩ kai, mɩ ɩ kai. Ka yɩ taa kpɛ 'yɛr pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Wõm pɔɔn a yɩ ãsʊɔ bɩɩ? Wʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn. Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ̃n a yɩ ãsʊɔ bɩɩ? Wʊ yiele yiel dãna nɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: A yɩ ãsʊɔ bɩɛrɛ na bɩɩ? Wʊ bʊɔl a pupuorbiir nɩbɛrɛ ka ba wa jɛ wʊ kãa nɩ a sɩ Soro yuor, na ba sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn ban sʊɔr nɩ sɔɔfʊ na sa naa nɩnyɩnɛ baal, a sɩ Soro na nyɔɔ wʊ naa ka wʊ ir. Ala ɩ wʊ mɩ maal dɛɛr, Nãaŋmɩn na vɛ̃n kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɛrɛ a yɩ maal dɛbɛ kʊrɔ taa, na yɩ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa, ka wʊ sãana yɩ. Nɩtor Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ tara na kpɛ̃ɔ na maal bon.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Elaija ɩn nɩrɛ a sɩ kaar, wʊ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn nɩbijɩɛ ɩka saa wʊ ta wa ɛ, ka war ŋmaa yuomo ata nɩ ŋmaa.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Wʊ lɛ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn go ka a saa wa, ka a bonsɩ bul a tẽe naa wɔ̃.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ 'mab naa a yelmãɛ sɔr pɔ, ka a yɩ ãsʊɔ lɩɛb wʊ waan,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a anyã ɩka, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na lɩɛb yelbe-ɩrɛ yin a wʊ yelbier pɔ, wʊ faa wʊn yin kũu pɔ, na wʊ mɩ pɔɔ yelbebe yɔɔ jaa.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Maa Pita na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nãa lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn a Nãaŋmɩn na chɛl ir a yɩ ɩ sãanba yɛ̃yɛl ka a wɛr pɔ, na yɩ be a Pontus, nɩ Galatiya, nɩ Kapadosiya, nɩ Asɩya, nɩ a Bitiniya.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Pɛɛfʊ wʊ ta a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto Sãa! A wʊ nɩbaal bɛrma naa, ka wʊ dɔɔ sɩ dɔɔ paalaa, na wʊ kʊ sɩ tɩɛrtɔ vʊr tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wʊn sãɩ a kũu pɔ,

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: nɩ a nãbomo ala wʊn bin gun sɩ be a saaju, a ba wɛrɛ ɛ, a ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, bɩɩ jʊɔlɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: A tu naa yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, ka a Nãaŋmɩn Kpɛ̃ɔ ger pɔɔ yɩ, tɩ tãn a bɩbir baaraa 'lɔ a faafʊ 'lɔ na chɔɔr baar na wa nyɩr.

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: A anyãna wa naa ka a yɩ sɔɔfʊ na kpɛ̃mɛ gar a sɛlma na ɩ bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔnãa ban ma dʊʊl bũu pɔ ir a dɛɛr bar. A yɩ sɔɔfʊ na lɩɛb ɩ pɛɛfʊ, nɩ tɩɩr, nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na wa nyɩr.

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ nyɛrɛ naa a yɩ sɔɔfʊ bon na ɩ a yɩ sɩɩr faafʊ.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: A faafʊ nyã 'yɛr lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a wãɛfʊ nyã na wa a yɩ sɛ̃. Ba vɩɛr naa a faafʊ nyã na ba chɛ̃pɛ̃ wʊ jaa nɛ nɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: Ba mʊ̃ɔn nɩbir ɩka ba bɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ nɩ a yelsɩ ala a Kɩrɩsɩto Sɩɛ na be a ba sɛ̃ na wile ba, a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr a dɔɔyɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto na di nɩ a tɩɩr ala na turo.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn wiil naa a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ banyãna ɩka a ba ɩ ba mãɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ ba tʊ̃nɔ̃ a lɛ ɛ, tɩ chɛ yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ. A lɛ ban 'yɛr a nyãna yɩn ben wõnõ a pʊ̃pãanyã a bala na mʊɔlɔ a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ tu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ wʊn tʊ̃ a wʊ yi a saaju. A malakasɩ mɩ gba ta bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka ba muul kaa a anyãna.

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ chɔɔr a yɩ tɩɛr gun tʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ nyɔɔrɔ yɩ mãɛ. Yɩ de a yɩ tɩɛrtɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wãɛfʊ 'lɔ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na kʊ yɩ a wʊ waa daar.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Yɩn wõnõ a Nãaŋmɩn toor jũu, yɩ taa lɛ maala a kõro mamaalbie ɛ, a lɛ yɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩtãa lɛ a 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ na ɩ chɛchɛ, yɩ mɩ ɩ chɛchɛ a yɩ yelmaalsɩ a jaa pɔ.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Bojũu a sɛb ɩka, “Yɩ ɩ chɛchɛ, bojũu n ɩn chɛchɛ.” (Mosesɩ Gãma Na Tu Ata

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Yɩn ma bʊɔlɔ wʊ a yɩ Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ na tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr, na waa turo ɛ, yɩ kpɩɛrɛ a yɩ kpɛfʊ nɩtãa sãanba, na yɩ joro wʊ dãbãɛ.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a ba ɩ bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔnãa fɩka libir, bɩɩ sɛlma lɛ Nãaŋmɩn de yab den yɩ yin a yɩ sãakpãmɩne yelpɔrsɩ ala na lũ yɩ pɔ ɛ,

english_verse: You were rescued by the precious blood of Christ, that spotless and innocent lamb.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ a ɩ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto jãɩ vɩla ala na ɩ a pɛraabile na ba tara chɛfʊ ɛ, bɩɩ jãnɛ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn ir wʊ naa tɩ wa bɩɛr maal a wɛr, tɩchɛ wʊ vɛ̃n ka wʊ nyɩr a sɔ̃ɔ baaraa a yɩ jũu.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: A wʊ jũu lɛ yɩ sɔɔ de a Nãaŋmɩn na ir wʊ a kũu pɔ na wʊ kʊ wʊ tɩɩr, ka a yɩ sɔɔfʊ nɩ a yɩ tɩɛrtɔ na be a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩn chɔɔr a yɩ mãɛ yɩn turo a yelmãɛ jũu, yɩ nʊ̃nɔ̃ naa a yɛɛr sɩrɛ jaa. Yɩ nʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩ a yɩ nyãa wʊ jaa.

english_verse: Do this because God has given you new birth by his message that lives on forever.
translation_verse: Bojũu yɩ nyɛn dɔɔ paalaa 'lɔ na ba ɩ bʊ̃kpiraa ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊn ben be, na ba tu a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr na ɩ vʊr, na be be bɩbir jaa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Bojũu, “Nɩsaal kaara naa fɩka mʊɔr, ka a ba tɩɩr wʊ jaa kaara fɩka a mɔpuul. A mʊɔr wa jʊɔl, a puul mɩ ma suor naa.

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro 'yɛr 'lɔ ben be bɩbir jaa.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ ir yɩ mãɛ yin a yosɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr, bɛlfʊ, nɛɛr ayi tarfʊ, nyuur, nɩ kporfʊ jaa bʊrɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Yɩ kaara fɩka bipɩlɛ, na yɩ bʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ka ɩ yɩ vɔlaa a bɩr kaar, a yɩn tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ɔ a yɩ faafʊ pɔ,

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: bojũu an ɩ yɩ lɛm kaa lɛ a sɩ Soro na nʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: An ɩ yɩ wa naa a wʊ sɛ̃ na ɩ a Kʊsɩr vʊr a nɩsaal na tɔr bar, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn ir wʊ a wʊ ɩ bʊ̃sʊ̃,

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: yɩn mɩ na ɩ fɩka a kʊsɩvʊɛ a ba mɛn yɩ, nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn yir ka yɩ ɩ a wʊ bɔɔrlo chɛchɛsɩ, na yɩ loro a wʊ bɔɔr wʊn sɔɔ tu a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: A sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ ɩka, “Nyɛ, n bin a kʊsɩr be a Jiyon tẽe pɔ, a kʊsɩr vɩla 'lɔ ɩn kaa ir ka wʊ ɩ a kʊsɩr ju, ka nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ de wʊ, vã kʊ̃ di wʊ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã a yɩn bala na sɔɔ de wʊ, wʊ ɩn kʊsɩr sʊ̃. Tɩchɛ a bala na ba sɔɔ de wʊ ɛ, “A kʊsɩr 'lɔ a mɩmɩɛrbɛ na tɔr bar, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a kʊsɩr ju,” (Yiel Gãn

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Yaa dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a wʊ nɩbɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. Yaa dɔ̃ɔ tara a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbaal ɛ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ tara wʊ naa.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, n sʊɔrɔ yɩ naa nɩtãa nɩyʊɔrsɩ nɩ sãanba ka a wɛr pɔ ɩka, yɩ ir yɩ mãɛ yin a ãgãn vɔlaa na ma jɛɛrɛ nɩ a yɩ sɩɩr.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Yɩ kpɩɛrɛ vɩla a bala na ba puoro sɛ̃, ban sɔɔ gba kpɛrɛ yɩ ɩka dɛɛr lɛ yɩ maala, bala wa nyɛ a yɩ vɩla maalfʊ ban 'yɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩɩr a wʊ waa bɩbir.

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro jũu, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, ala sɔɔ ɩ a nãkpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ lɛ,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: bɩɩ a nãbil bala wʊn ir bin a tẽn tẽn ka ba kpãana a bala na maala dɛɛr tɩ pɛɛrɛ a bala mɩ na maala a lɛ na tor.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ ɩka yɩn maala vɩla na yɩ pɔɔ a ba bɔ̃ɔ dẽme na ɩ a jɔlɔ nɛɛr.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Yɩ kpɩɛrɛ nɩtãa sumɩne, tɩchɛ yɩ taa de a mãɛ sofʊ nyã pɔɔn yelbier ɛ, tɩ yɩ kpɩɛrɛ fɩka Nãaŋmɩn gbãgbaar.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩrɛ jaa na yɩ nʊ̃ a yɩ taa Yesu turbo, na yɩ joro Nãaŋmɩn dãbãɛ, tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a nãa.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Gbãgbaar, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ tʊ̃nbɔ nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, a ta ɩ a bala na bal nɩbir maala yɩ vɩla tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bala mɩ na kpɛ̃mɛ a nɩbir.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn na maal vɩla kʊ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara tɩɛr vɩla, na wʊ di dɔɔyɛ na ba tara sɔr ɛ, bojũu wʊ tara na Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ bo lɛ na ɩ a yɩ tɔ̃nɔ̃, ala ɩ ba ŋme yɩ naa yɩn tʊ̃ dɛɛr jũu? Tɩchɛ ala ɩ yɩ din dɔɔyɛ yɩn maal vɩla jũu, an ɩn tɔ̃nɔ̃ kʊ yɩ Nãaŋmɩn niem.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl yɩ, bojũu Kɩrɩsɩto mɩ dɔ̃ɔ di dɔɔyɛ, na wʊ maal wiil yɩ ɩka yɩ turo a wʊ pala.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Ka waa dɔ̃ɔ maal dɛɛr jaa ɛ, bɩɩ ka bɛlfʊ yi a wʊ nɛɛ pɔ ɛ.” (Isaiya

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: A lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ tʊrɔ wʊ, waa mɩ tʊ yaa a sãn ɛ. A dɔɔyɛ na pɔɔ wʊ, waa jo dãbãɛ ɛ. Tɩchɛ wʊ den a wʊ mãɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɔɔrɔ a 'yɛr jaa dẽ dẽ.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: A wʊ mãɛ lɛ tuo a sɩ yeldɛbɛ a wʊ ãgãn pɔ a daa ju, ka sɩ mɩ na kpi kʊ yelbier tɩ be be kʊ yeltorsɩ. A wʊ fɛlɛ ala jũu lɛ sãa sɩ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Na yɩ kaara fɩka piir na dɔ̃ɔ bɔrɔ, tɩchɛ pʊ̃pãanyã yɩ lɩɛb wa a pɛchinɛ na kaara a yɩ sɩɩr sɛ̃.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Pɔbɔ, a lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, yɩ sɩɩr yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ sɩrbɛ. Bamɩne baa sɔɔ puor ɛ, tɩchɛ a yɩ befʊ na tʊ̃ɔn lɩɛb a ba tɩɛr a ba puoro,

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: bala wa nyɛ a lɛ a yɩ maalfʊ na ɩ vɩla, nɩ lɛ yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ mãɛ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a yɩ vɩla ɩ a yõo pãɛfʊ tɛɛ ɛ, nɩtãa a ju wobfʊ, sɛlma bɔ̃jɔrsɩ yarfʊ, nɩ a fɔnɩbikpãɛn sɛfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ pãɛfʊ be pʊɔm na ba jʊɔlɔ ɛ, na ɩ vɩla, hɛ lɛ lɛ lɛ, nɩ jomm, ala lɛ ɩ vɩla a Nãaŋmɩn niem.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ a mama pɔɔsʊ̃n bala na tara a Nãaŋmɩn tɩɛr ma maal a ba mãɛ vɩla. Na ba sɔɔ turo, na ba sɩɩr ba mãɛ kʊ a ba sɩrbɛ.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Lɛ mɩ lɛ a Saara na dɔ̃ɔ wõnõ a Abraham toor na wʊ ma bʊɔlɔ wʊ a wʊ soro. Yɩn lɛ ɩ a wʊ bibiir, ala ɩ yɩ maala na a lɛ na vɩɛlɛ na yɩ kʊ̃ joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Sɩrbɛ a lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, yɩ tɩɛrɛ a yɩ pɔbɔ yɩn lɔ̃ɔ kpɩɛrɛ nɩ. Yɩ kaara ba nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, bojũu baa tara kpãɛn jã yɩ ɛ, tɩ na ba pʊɔ yɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ kʊfʊ 'lɔ na ɩ nyɛvʊr, ka bon jaa taa var a yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sʊɔrfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yɩ ta de yelbier yãan yelbier sãn ɛ, bɩɩ tʊbir yãan tʊbir sãn ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ 'yɛr nɛvɩla 'yɔ̃ɔ ba, bojũu a anyã 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔl yɩ ɩka yɩn nyɛn sʊ̃ʊfʊ.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Bojũu, “Ala ɩ nɩrɛ nʊ̃n nyɛvʊr na wʊ bʊɔrɔ bɩbivɩɛlsɩ wʊ ir wʊ nɛɛ yin 'yɛrdɛɛr nɩ bɛlfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Wʊ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ yelbier tɩ maala vɩla, na wʊ bʊɔrɔ nyã'maar joro turo a wʊ puor.

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: An lɛ na ge yɩ ala ɩ yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala vɩla?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ yɩ gba din dɔɔyɛ yɩn maala vɩla jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na sʊ̃ʊ yɩ naa. “Yɩ ta joro dãbãɛ nɩ a ba vuurfʊ ɛ. Yɩ taa joro dãbãɛ ɛ,” (Isaiya

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩ nyãn pɔ, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a yɩ Soro. Na yɩ ma chɔɔr sɔ̃ɔ jaa ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa sʊʊr yɩ naa a tɩɛrtɔ 'lɔ yɩn tara, tɩchɛ yɩ ma man naa jomm nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ,

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: na yɩ vɛ̃ ka a yɩ tɩɛr chaar, ka a bala na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ yuor yɩn turo a Kɩrɩsɩto jũu, ka vã na kpɛ ba, nɩ a ba yosɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: An ɩn vɩla ala ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ lɛ, yɩn di dɔɔyɛ vɩla maalfʊ jũu, gar yɩn na di dɔɔyɛ dɛɛr maalfʊ jũu.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Bojũu Kɩrɩsɩto kpi naa a yɩ yelbier jũu gbɛbʊ̃'yen tɛɛ, a 'lɔ na tor kʊ a bala na ba tor ɛ, ɩka wʊ waan yɩ Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Ba kʊ naa a wʊ ãgãn, tɩchɛ ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sãɩ wʊ a kũu pɔ,

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: a Sɩɛ nyã lɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto chiin a kpĩi tẽe na wʊ tɩ mʊɔl kʊ a kpĩisɩ bala na be a pɔɔfʊ die pɔ.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: A banyãna lɛ tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ, tɩchɛ ka wʊ di kãnyir ka a Nowa wa maal a daka bulomtum baar. A nɩbɛ bãlãa na ɩ aniin tɛɛ wa nyɛn faafʊ a kʊ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ɔ nyã nyɛtãan fɩka a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ na faa yɩ mɩ a pʊ̃pãanyã, a ba ɩ ãgãn dɛɛr pɛɛ barfʊ lɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɛɛ yɩn tɩr kʊ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ pʊtɩvɩla. Yɩ nyɛn faafʊ tu a Kɩrɩsɩto kũu irfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ do a saaju tɩ jãnɛ, a Nãaŋmɩn nũsʊ̃ɔ jie ka a malakasɩ, nɩ a tʊ̃ɔfʊ dẽme, nɩ a kpãɛn dẽme ba jaa turo a wʊ nɛɛ.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, a Kɩrɩsɩto na di dɔɔyɛ a wʊ ãgãn pɔ, yɩ mɩ su a tãjɛbonsɩ ala gun a tɩɛr 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bojũu a 'lɔ na di dɔɔyɛ a wʊ ãgãn pɔ ba lɛ pʊɔ yelbier pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so, wʊ ta lɛ kpɩɛrɛ a wɛr pɔ nɩ a ãgãn vɔlaa ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ kpɩɛrɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Bojũu a kõro jaa, yɩ mɩ sɔ̃ɔn sɔ̃ɔ na yɩ maala a lɛ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, na maala, na baa tʊɔrɔ a ba mãɛ nyɔɔrɔ ɛ. Ka a ãgãn vɔlaa, nɩ dãburo, nɩ a pepe dib, na yɩ pʊɔ a dãnyurbo gbul pɔ, na yɩ maala tɩbɛ na sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Ban tɩɛr naa ɩka yelsãan lɛ, yɩn ba lɛ pʊɔ ba a befʊ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ pɔ ɛ, ka ba pãa piel tʊrɔ yɩ.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ban man a ba nɛɛ 'yɛr kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn na wa tɔɔr a vʊɛ nɩ a kpĩisɩ 'yɛr.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: A anyãna jũu lɛ so ka ba gba mɩ mʊɔl a 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ kʊ a kpĩisɩ, ɩka ban tɔɔr a ba 'yɛr nɩtãa lɛ ban na tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr, tɩchɛ ka ba kpɩɛrɛ a sɩɩr pɔ Nãaŋmɩn kaar.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: A bonsɩ a jaa baarfʊ tara naa, a lɛ jũu yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir na yɩ kpãa a yɩ mãɛ tʊ̃ɔ sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: A ala na gar a jaa lɛ a anyã, yɩ chɛnɛ vɛ̃ ka a nʊ̃fʊ be a yɩ pɔ, bojũu nʊ̃fʊ ma pɔɔn yeldɛbɛ yɔɔ.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Yɩ ma diere taa a yɩ yie tɩ ta ma ɩrɛ gbʊrɔ̃ gbʊrɔ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Ɩ̃sʊɔ jaa wʊ de a Nãaŋmɩn kʊfʊ wʊn nyɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ nɩ a wʊ taaba nɩ yelmãɛ nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ a jaa.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr nʊ̃nʊ̃nbɔ, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka nɛɛ 'maa yɩ nɩ a bɛɛr kaa tuo na vulo yɩ fɩka yelsãan kɔ̃ɔ lɛ ɩrɛ yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ chɩlɛ an ɩ yɩ pʊɔ naa a Kɩrɩsɩto dɔɔyɛ difʊ pɔ, ka nʊ̃ɔ na kpɛ yɩ a wʊ tɩɩr wa nyɩr.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba tʊ yɩ naa yɩn bʊɔlɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto yuor jũu, Nãaŋmɩn na sʊ̃ʊ yɩ naa, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ben a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ din dɔɔyɛ, a ta ɩ fɩka nɩkʊrɔ, bɩɩ nãnyie, bɩɩ nɩdɛɛr, bɩɩ tɔ'yɔ̃ɔnbɔ lɛ yɩ ɩ ɛ.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Bojũu a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ sɔ̃ɔ ta naa, ka Nãaŋmɩn na piel tɔɔrɔ a wʊ nɩbɛ 'yɛr. Ala ɩ sɩn lɛ wʊn piel, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an kaara kʊ a bala na tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nʊ̃ɔ?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: A sɛb ɩka, “Ala ɩ an ɩn kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ a nɩtor, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ an kaara kʊ a bala na ba puor ɛ, nɩ a yelbe-ɩrbɛ?” (Sʊkpar Gãn

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, vɛ̃ a bala na dire a dɔɔyɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ jũu, de ba mãɛ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ na mɛ ba, tɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir maala vɩla.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: A maa na ɩ a nɩdiere naa nyɛ a Kɩrɩsɩto dɔɔyɛ nɩ nɩbir, naa mɩ ɩ nɩrɛ nyã na pʊɔ a tɩɩr 'lɔ na wa nyɩr, n 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ na a nɩdierbe na be be a yɩ pɔ ãkpãɛn,

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: ɩka ba kaara a Nãaŋmɩn piir a wʊn de 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nuur pɔ, na yɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ kaara nɩ ba, a ta ɩ fɩrfʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a ɩ yɩ bɔfʊ, bojũu lɛ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊɔrɔ. A ta ɩ libie 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a nʊ̃mɔ̃ yɩ a tʊ̃fʊ.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: A pɛchiin gbɔɔraa wa wa, yɩn nyɛn a sãyar na ɩ a tɩɩr na ba jʊɔl ɛ.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ a yɩn bala na ɩ a pɔlbil, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ kʊ a yɩ nɩdierbe. Yɩ jaa jaa yɩ ma siir yɩ mãɛ na yɩ ma tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ taa, bojũu a sɛb ɩka, “Nãaŋmɩn 'laar a bala na 'mɔɔrɔ a ba mãɛ, tɩ ma sʊ̃nɔ̃ a bala na ma siir ba mãɛ.” (Sʊkpar Gãn

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, yɩ siir yɩ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn kpɛ̃ɔ sʊɔ nuur pɔ, ka wʊ 'mɔɔ yɩ a yɩ do a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Yɩ de a yɩ yelwõnsɩ a jaa kʊ wʊ, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a yɩ tɔɔ.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Yɩ gu yɩ mãɛ na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jũmɔ̃, a yɩ dɔ̃sʊɔ tɩɩ kaara naa jukpɛ̃ɛ kaar, na uoro yʊɔrɔ na wʊ pãa kaara bʊɔrɔ nɩrɛ ɩka wʊ nyɔɔ 'wɔb.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Yɩ var wʊ sɔr, na yɩ ba gbɛr ara a yɩ sɔɔfʊ pɔ, bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a yɩ taaba na be a wɛr wʊ jaa, mɩ dire na a dɔɔyɛ nyãna tɔ yɩn dire.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Yɩn wa di a dɔɔyɛ nyãna bãlãa a Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a wãɛfʊ sʊɔ a 'lɔ na bʊɔl yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a tɩɩr nyã na ba tara baarfʊ pɔ a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ mãɛ na maal yɩ naa na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ ãkpɛ̃ɔ tɩ na wʊ vɛ̃ a yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ kʊ̃ dãm ɛ.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ so a kpɛ̃ɔ bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Silasɩ na ɩ a yɛbɛ yelmãɛ sʊɔ lɛ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n sɛb a gãn bile nyãna, naa 'yɔ̃ɔn yɩ ãkpãɛn din dãasɩɛ ɩka anyãna lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn sɩrɛ wãɛfʊ. Yɩ ara kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: A yɩ taaba pupuorbiir na be a Babilon Nãaŋmɩn na 'mataa ir yɩ, puor yɩ naa, ka a n bidaba Maakɩ mɩ puoro yɩ.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Yɩ puor puor taa nɩ nʊ̃fʊ. Nyã'maar wʊ be a yɩn bala na be a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Maa Simon Pita na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaa nɩ a wʊ nɩtʊ̃nãa lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn na tu a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn yeltorsɩ pɔ, nɩ a sɩ Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na yɩ nyɛ a sɔɔfʊ 'lɔ na kpɛ̃mɛ a sɩ kaar.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar a dɔɔlɔ yɩ taa tu a bɔ̃ɔfʊ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu.

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: A Wʊ kpɛ̃ɔ lɛ wʊ kʊn sɩ bon jaa sɩn bʊɔrɔ a nyɛvʊr nyã jũu nɩ Nãaŋmɩn puor vɩla tu a sɩ bɔ̃ɔfʊ sɩn bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na bʊɔl sɩ, nɩ a wʊ mãɛ tɩɩr nɩ a wʊ maal vɩla.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Tu anyãna pɔ lɛ wʊ kʊn sɩ a bon na bɛrma nɩ a bʊ̃sʊ̃n wʊn tɩr a nɛɛ ɩka, a tu a pɔ, ka yɩn pʊɔ a befʊ 'lɔ na ba sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, na yɩ jo yi a wɛr nyã a yelbier vɔlaa na sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Bojũu ala ɩ yɩ tara naa anyãna a jaa ka a pʊɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃, an sʊ̃ʊ yɩ naa ka yɩ kʊ̃ tara yãan na yaa tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ wɔ̃nɔ̃ wɔ̃mɔ̃ a bɔ̃ɔfʊ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɛ.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ nɩrɛ baa tara a anyãna ɛ, waa nyɛrɛ ɛ, na wʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ, na wʊ ĩin ɩka Nãaŋmɩn pɛɛn a wʊ kõro jaa yeldɛbɛ bar.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n yɛɛr, yɩ ba gbɛr ka a yɩ bʊɔlfʊ nɩ a yɩ chɛl irfʊ ɩ yelmãɛ. Ala ɩ yɩn maala a anyãna, yaa be jaa na wa lo ɛ.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Ka a sɔr yuo kʊ yɩ a yɩ kpɛ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nãalʊ̃ʊ na ba tara baarfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: A lɛ ɩn ma jɛɔ yɩ naa a yelsɩ anyãna, yɩ gba na bɔ̃ɔ yaa ka yɩ ba gbɛr ara a yelmãɛ yɩn tara pɔ.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: A tara na sɔr ka n jɛɔ a yɩ tɩɛr ɩn chɛnɛ vʊrɔ a ãgãn vaar pɔ,

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: bojũu n bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ tɩchɛ ka n kpi ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na man kʊ ma.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Ɩn ɩ naa lɛ jaa ɩn na tʊ̃ɔ, maa wa sɔɔ kpi, tɩ ka yɩ ma chɛnɛ tʊ̃ɔ tɩɛrɛ a yelsɩ anyãna.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: A ba ɩ fuol nɩ yɛ̃ 'yɛr lɛ sɩ de 'yɛr kʊ yɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto waa ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn mãɛ lɛ nyɛ a wʊ kpɛ̃ɛ nɩ nɩbir.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Wʊ nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ tɩɩr yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ lɛ a kɔkɔr na yi a tɩɩr jikpɛ̃ɛ jie wa a wʊ sɛ̃ 'yɛrɛ, “Nyã lɛ ɩ a n Bie 'lɔ ɩn nʊ̃, a wʊ yele pɛl naa n pʊɔ.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Sɩn mãɛ wõn a kɔkɔr nyãna na yi a saaju wa, an ɩ sɩn nɩ 'lɔ jaa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be a tɔ̃chɛchɛ par.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Sɩn lɛ tara a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ na dɔ̃ɔ be be 'yɛr na chaar, yɩ yuo toor chɛlɛ a 'yɛr. A kaara naa fɩka chãa na chaara libe pɔ, tɩ tãn a wɛr na chaar ka a bivɩɛ ŋmɛrbir pur 'yɔ̃ɔ a yɩ nyãn pɔ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: A yelkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ ɩka, yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a par ɩka Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ jaa kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ de a wʊ yɛ̃ wiil a ala na sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ par ɛ.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Bojũu nɩrɛ maa kpu 'yɛr a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ ma 'yɛr a lɛ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, an ɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ lɛ tara ba.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a jir ŋmarba 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ be be a nɩbɛ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a jir ŋmarba wiwiilbe na wa be a yɩ pɔ. Ban sɔɔl wiil sɔ̃ɔfʊ 'yɛr, na ba chɩɩr a Tʊ̃ɔfʊ Sʊɔ na da ba na ba waan sɔ̃ɔfʊ wa 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba mãɛ.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Nɩyɔɔ na turo naa a ba vã sɔɩ anyãna, tɩ na ba kpɛrɛ a yelmãɛ sɔr.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: A bɔgar wiwiilbe banyãna na 'mʊ̃ɔn yɩ naa nɩ a ba nɛnʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrbie. Nãaŋmɩn guor naa a ba 'yɛr kõro jaa ka a ba sɔ̃sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ba guro ɛ.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ba dɔ̃ɔ bar a malakasɩ bala na maal a dɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ban a bɔɔ fulom libe 'lɔ pɔ bar chɛlɛ nɩ a ba 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Waa dɔ̃ɔ bar a kõr nɩbɛ ɛ, na wʊ vɛ̃ ka a kʊ̃ɔ wa paal pɔɔ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, tɩ na wʊ faa a Nowa na ɩ yeltorsɩ 'yɛr mʊɔlɔ nɩ nɩbɛ ayopõi.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn den bũu chʊm a Sodom nɩ a Gomora nɩbɛ ka a di lɩɛb tãpɩɛl, a nɩtɔ̃ wiil ɩka lɛ lɛ na ɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Bojũu a nɩtor nyãna lɔ̃ɔn kpɩɛrɛ nɩ ba bɩbir jaa, ka a wʊ tɩɛr ma sɔ̃ɔ lɛ wʊn ma nyɛ tɩ wõ ban ɩrɛ.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: An ɩ nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a be, a sɩ Soro bɔ̃ɔn lɛ wʊn pãa na ɩ faa a bala na puoro yin a wõm pɔ, tɩ tara a bala na ba puoro ɛ, a ba be a ba gefʊ pɔ tɩ tãn a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: A anyãna ɩn yelmãɛ a bala na turo a ba ãgãn sɔ̃ɔnaa nyã dɛɛr vɔlaa, baa turo a kpãɛn dẽme nɛɛ ɛ. Ba ɩn jukpãɛn dẽme na ba 'mɔɔrɔ ba mãɛ, baa joro dãbãɛ ɛ, tɩ ma kpɛrɛ a saaju bʊ̃maalsɩ.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: ) ka a dobaa ban so kʊ̃ɔ mɩ lɩɛb tɩ mamar a mɛmɛrɛ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna ma fere naa nɩ a bonsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ. Ba kaara naa mɔdʊ̃n kaar bʊ̃maalaa na ba tara tɩɛrɛ, ba dɔɔ ba naa na nyɔɔr ba kʊ, ba mɩ kaara a mɔdʊ̃n kaar na ba mɩ na wɛ.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: A dɛɛr ala ban maal, a dɛɛr ala lɛ ban yãan ba a sãn. A ba tɩɛr vɔlaa ban ma maala a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ, a nʊ̃mɔ̃ ba naa, ban lɔ̃ɔn dire nɩ yɩ na ban sɔ̃ɔ a yɩ befʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ yɩ vã.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: A ba nɩbie sɛɛn naa a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, a ba maa bar dɛɛr ɩfʊ ɛ. Ba ma bɛlɛ naa a bala na bal na ba ɩ bɔgar dẽme, ba ben pɔ'yɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Ba bar a sɔr dẽ dẽ 'lɔ tɩ bɔr, na ba tu a Balaam na ɩ a Beor bidaba sɔr. 'Lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sãyar na ba ɩ ɛ,

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: tɩchɛ wʊ nyɛn a wʊ bawõno tɔ̃nɔ̃, bʊ̃ɔ na ɩ dʊ̃ɔ den nɩrɛ kɔkɔr 'yɛr 'yɛr na wʊ ŋmaan a 'yɛ'yɛrɛ nyãna dãbol yele sɔr.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna ɩ naa fɩka kʊlsɩ na ba tara kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, bɩɩ uul sɛsɛbɛ na furo chiine. Libe jaa gbɛb lɛ guro ba.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Bojũu yobɔ 'yɛr pɔrsɩ lɛ ba ma 'yɛrɛ, na ba bʊɔlɔ a ãgãn vɔldɛɛr, na ba bɛlɛ nɩ a nɩbɛ bala na faa joro a bala na bɔr sɛ̃.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Ba ma tɩr nɛɛ kʊ ba ɩka ban faa ban a gbãgbayele pɔ, tɩchɛ ka a bala mãɛ ɩ a yelsɔ̃ɔnsɩ gbãgbaar, bojũu nɩrɛ ɩn gbãgbaa kʊ bon 'lɔ jaa na tʊ̃ɔ wʊ.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ ba faan ba mãɛ yin a wɛr nyã bɔdɛɛr pɔ, ban wa bɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɩ na ba lɛ tɩ kpɛ a ala pɔ ka a tʊ̃ɔ ba, a ba baarfʊ na ɩn dɛɛr gar a lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ be.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: An taa sa naa ala ɩ baa ta bɔ̃ɔ a sɔr toraa ɛ, gar ban ben bɔ̃ɔn tɩ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɛbin chɛchɛ 'lɔ ban de kʊ ba.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Bala 'lɔ, a sʊkpa nyã ɩn yelmãɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ lɔb ɩka, baa lɩɛb tɩ di a ala wʊn ti bar, (Sʊkpar Gãn

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: N bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ lɩɛb tɩɛr a 'yɛrbie ala a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrchɛchɛ bala na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara na dɔ̃ɔ man ba tu a wʊ nɩtʊ̃nsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Yɩ de nie bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a ber baaraa sɔ̃ɔ, nɩlaarba na turo a ba ãgãn vɔlaa na wa naa wa laara yɩ.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Ban wa sʊrɔ yɩ naa, “Nyɩnɛ lɛ a 'lɔ na tɩr a nɛɛ kʊ yɩ ɩka wʊn wa naa? A lɛ daar jaa a sɩ sãamɩne na kpi a yelsɩ a jaa mɩ chɛnɛ na chiine a lɛ nɛ an piel.”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ba bɔ̃ɔn naa tɩ maala fɩka ba ĩin naa a kõro jaa an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrbie lɛ wʊ maal a saaju, nɩ a tẽe a kʊ̃ɔ ju, nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ par.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: A tẽkor, kʊ̃ɔ mɩ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ paal pɔɔ a wɛr a wʊ sɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr nyãna nɩ wʊ ju lɛ wʊ bar a saaju, nɩ a tẽe go gun a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ, na wʊn sɔ̃ɔn a bala na ba puoro ɛ, nɩ bũu.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro ba baala nɩ a wʊ nɛɛ wʊn tɩr ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na 'yɛr ɩka a kor naa ɛ. Wʊ din kãnyir kʊ yɩ, wʊn ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ wɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ lɩɛb a yɩ tɩɛr.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro bɩbir na wa naa fɩka lɛ nãnyie na ma wa, ka a saaju pɔɔn gɔ̃mɔ̃ wʊ jaa, na wʊ po chen. A bonsɩ ala na be a saaju ka a bũu nyɩl na wʊ pãa yuo yele a jaa a nɩbɛ na maala ka a gã chãa pɔ.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: An ɩ a bonsɩ a jaa na wa sɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃, nɩbotɔ lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka yɩ ɩ? A sɛɛ naa ka a yɩ maalfʊ ɩ chɛchɛ, na yɩ puoro Nãaŋmɩn,

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: nɩtãa lɛ yɩn ben kaara a Nãaŋmɩn waa bɩbir na yɩ 'mi'mine nɩ a wʊ waa. A bɩbir nyãna na waan nɩ sɔ̃ɔfʊ, a saaju wʊ jaa na di naa, ka a bonsɩ a jaa mɩ nyɩl nɩ a tʊl.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ sɩn chɛlɛ naa tẽpaalaa nɩ a saaju paalaa na ɩ a nɩtorsɩ tẽe, 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na tɩr a nɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: A lɛ n barmɩne, yɩn pãa na chɛlɛ a anyãna jũu, yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir na yɩ taa tara chɛfʊ nɩ mabfʊ jie ɛ, na yɩ tara wʊ nɩ nyã'maar.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Yɩ tɩɛr a anyã ɩka a sɩ Soro kãnyir ɩ naa a yɩ faafʊ lɛ, nɩtãa lɛ a sɩ yɛbɛ Pɔɔl mɩ na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb kʊ yɩ nɩ a yɛ̃ 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ wʊ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: A wʊ gãma a jaa pɔ, a 'yɛr bʊ̃'yen lɛ wʊ sɛb, na wʊ 'yɛrɛ a yelsɩ anyãna. A wʊ gãma pɔ yelsɩ ben be na ɩ tuo a par bɔ̃ɔfʊ, ka a ba bɔ̃ɔ nɩ a a bala na ba bɔ̃ɔ ara dẽme lɩɛb a bur bur nɩtãa lɛ ban lɩɛr a Nãaŋmɩn gãma amɩne, ka a na ɩ ba mãɛ sɔ̃ɔfʊ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu, n barmɩne, yɩn ben de nie bɔ̃ɔn a nɩtɔ̃, yɩ guro a yɩ mãɛ ka a ba bɛlfʊ ta wa vɛ̃ ka yɩ faa lo tɩ bar a yɩ gbɛr bafʊ jie ɛ.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ nʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ a sɩ Soro nɩ a Fafaara Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto wãɛfʊ nɩ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔfʊ pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr a pʊ̃pãanyã, nɩ bɩbir, nɩ a bɩbir jaa. A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Maa Jɔɔn sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ a yɩn na turo a Yesu. A 'yɛr na dɔ̃ɔ be be a wɛr pielfʊ daar, 'lɔ lɛ sɩ wõ a wʊ yele na sɩ nyɛ wʊ. Sɩ nyɛ wʊ naa nɩ a sɩ nɩbie na sɩ sɩɩr wʊ nɩ a sɩ mãɛ nuur. A 'yɛr nyã lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: A nyɛvʊr nyã lɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ka wʊ de wiil sɩ a sɩ nyɛ wʊ, 'lɔ lɛ sɩ dire a wʊ dãasɩɛ na sɩ mʊɔlɔ kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. 'Lɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, ka wʊ wa ir wʊ wiil sɩ.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Sɩ 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ a lɛ a sɩn mãɛ na nyɛ tɩ wõ, ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ ka sɩn nɩ yɩn na tara nɛbʊ̃'yen, ka a sɩn nɩ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn 'matãan a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tara a nɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: A nyã lɛ sɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ kaa sɩ chɩlfʊ na sɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: A 'yɛr wʊn kʊ sɩ ka sɩ mʊɔlɔ kʊrɔ yɩ nɩ nyã, Nãaŋmɩn ɩn chãa ka libe ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ jaa ɛ.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa ɩka sɩn nɩ 'lɔ tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen tɩ chɛnɛ chiine a libe pɔ, sɩ ɩn jir ŋmarba na saa turo a yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ sɩ chiine naa a chãa pɔ nɩtãa lɛ a 'lɔ na be a chãa pɔ, sɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen ka a wʊ Bie Yesu jãɩ pɛɛ a sɩ yeldɛbɛ a jaa bar.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr ɩka saa tara yeldɛɛr jaa ɛ, sɩ bɛlɛ na sɩ mãɛ, na saa tara yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa a sɩ yeldɛbɛ kʊ Nãaŋmɩn, wʊn vɛ̃n kʊ sɩ, tɩ pɛɛ a sɩ yeldɛbɛ a jaa bar, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn ɩn yelmãɛ sʊɔ nɩ nɩtor.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ 'yɛr naa ɩka saa maal yeldɛɛr jaa ɛ, sɩ bʊɔlɔ na Nãaŋmɩn jir ŋmara, na saa de a wʊ 'yɛr a sɩ nyãa pɔ ɛ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: N bibiir, n sɛɛrɛ naa anyã kʊrɔ yɩ ka yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa taa wa ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ ala ɩ ãsʊɔ wa ɩn yeldɛɛr, sɩ tara na po pire na be a Sãa sɛ̃. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na ɩ a Torfʊ Sʊɔ.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ lo a sɩ yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr kʊ sɩ, a ba ɩ sɩn tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ a wɛr wʊ jaa.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: A nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ be naa a wʊ sɛ̃, sɩn turo a wʊ nɛbinsɩ jũu.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn tɩ ba ɩrɛ a lɛ wʊn bin a nɛɛ ɛ, a nɩnyɩnɛ ɩn jir ŋmara na waa tara yelmãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa na turo a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, sɩrɛ jaa Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ sɛɛn a wʊ pɔ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ be naa a wʊ pɔ.
