english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa na 'yɛr ɩka wʊ be naa Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ, wʊ chiine a lɛ a Yesu na dɔ̃ɔ chen.

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, a ba ɩ nɛbin paalaa lɛ n sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃koraa 'lɔ yɩn tara yi a pielfʊ lɛ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nɛkoraa yɩn wõ.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ wʊ ɩn bʊ̃paalaa, bojũu a ɩn sɩrɛ a Yesu 'yɔ̃ɔ, naa mɩ ɩ sɩrɛ a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, bojũu a libe tɔɔn 'laa, ka a sɩrɛ chãa chaara.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wa 'yɛr ɩka maa ben chãa pɔ, tɩ 'laar a wʊ yɛbɛ, wʊ chɛnɛ na be a libe pɔ.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛbɛ ben a chãa pɔ, ka bon jaa ba be be na vɛ̃ ka wʊ ŋme gbɛr ɛ.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'laar a wʊ yɛbɛ ben a libe pɔ, na wʊ yʊɔrɔ a libe pɔ, na waa bɔ̃ɔ a jie wʊn chiine ɛ, bojũu a libe jɔ̃ɔ wʊ naa.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: N bibiir, n sɛɛrɛ na a gãn nyã kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu Nãaŋmɩn vɛ̃ naa a yɩ yeldɛbɛ kʊ yɩ a lɛ a Yesu na ɩ kʊ yɩ jũu.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Sãamɩne, n sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na yi a wɛr pielfʊ. Pɔlbil, n sɛɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu yɩ tʊ̃ɔn a dɛɛr sʊɔ. Naa mɩ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a yɩn bibiir bojũu yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: N sɛb kʊ a yɩn sãamɩne bojũu, yɩ bɔ̃ɔn a 'lɔ na yi a wɛr pielfʊ daar. N sɛb kʊ a yɩn pɔlbil a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, yɩ kpɛ̃mɛ na, na yɩ jɛb tʊ̃ɔ a dɛɛr sʊɔ.

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa nʊ̃nɔ̃ a Nãaŋmɩn dɔ̃dɔ̃mɔ̃sɩ bɩɩ bon jaa ban tara ɛ. Ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa nʊ̃n a lɛ, a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Bojũu a bonsɩ anyã sɩn nyɛ ɩ naa a ãgãn nyã vɔlaa nɩ a nɩbie vɔlaa bɩɩ tara jã jɩɩr nɩ bʊ̃tarsɩ. A nyãna a jaa wʊn na ɩrɛ ba yi a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, tɩchɛ a yi naa dɔ̃dɔ̃mɔ̃sɩ sɛ̃.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: A bɔdɛbɛ anyã mɩ poro na chiine, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ɩrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bɔfʊ na ben be sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: N bibiir, a wɛr baarfʊ ta naa, nɩtãa lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ wõ ɩka a bala na 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto na wa naa, ba yɔɔ lɛ a banyãna na be ka gba. Ala lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a baraa sɔ̃ɔ lɛ.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna dɔ̃ɔ be a sɩ sɛ̃ tɩ wa yi. Ka a ba yifʊ wiil ɩka baa tara sɩ nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ, sɩn nɩ bala ta ɩ bʊ̃'yen, ban taa be naa sɩ sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a ba yifʊ wiil ɩka baa pʊɔ sɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩn 'lɔ, Yesu kʊ yɩ naa a wʊ Sɩɛ ka yɩ jaa bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: N ba sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ yɩ bojũu yɩn ba bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩn bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ lɛ. Bojũu yɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn a jir na tɛɛ nɩ yelmãɛ.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: An lɛ ɩ a jir ŋmara? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛr ɩka a Yesu ba ɩ a Nɩ-iraa ɛ, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto. A nɩnyɩnɛ tɔr naa a Sãa nɩ a Bie jaa.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tɔr a Bie mɩ tɔr a Sãa, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na 'yɛr chãa pɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛnɛ tara a lɛ nɛ yɩn wõ a Yesu 'yɛr a pielfʊ, yɩn wa chɛnɛ tara a lɛ, yɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ a Sãa nɩ a wʊ Bie.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: A yɩn 'lɔ, ba kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ bɛl yɩ ɛ, bojũu Yesu kʊ yɩ naa a Sɩɛ ka wʊ be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. A Sɩɛ na ɩ yelmãɛ na wile yɩ jũu, yaa lɛ bʊɔrɔ ɩka nɩrɛ wʊ wiil yɩ a yelmãɛ go ɛ, tɩchɛ a Sɩɛ a Yesu na kʊ yɩ vɛ̃ naa ka yɩ bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ, ka ala mɩ a Sɩɛ na wile ɩ yelmãɛ, jir jaa ba be be ɛ. A lɛ jũu, yɩ chɛnɛ tara a Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩtãa lɛ a Sɩɛ na 'yɛr yɩ.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: A lɛ jũu n bibiir, yɩ chɛnɛ tara a Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, ka 'lɔ wa yi a saaju lɩɛb waara a wɛr pɔ, sɩn tara na nyãa ka dãbãɛ kʊ̃ kʊrɔ sɩ a wʊ tuorfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka a Yesu yele tor naa, nɩrɛ jaa mɩ na maala a lɛ, mɩ ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn bie.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Nyɛ lɛ a sɩ Sãa na nʊ̃ sɩ jã. Wʊ sɔɔn bʊɔlɔ sɩ a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, ka sɩ mɩ sɩr ɩ! A lɛ jũu, a wɛr nɩbɛ ba bɔ̃ɔ wʊ ɛ, ala lɛ so ban ba bɔ̃ɔ sɩ ɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, pʊ̃pãanyã, sɩ ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, saa bɔ̃ɔ lɛ sɩn na be daar kɔ̃ɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka, a Yesu wa lɩɛb wa a wɛr nyã pɔ, sɩn nyɛ naa a lɛ wʊn na be, na sɩ kaara a wʊ kaar.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr, a nɩnyɩnɛ sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɛbinsɩ ala wʊn bin, bojũu waa tara Nãaŋmɩn nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Yesu ba maal dɛɛr ɛ, a lɛ ka wʊ wa ɩka wʊ wa de a sɩ dɛbɛ bar.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na tara Yesu nɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen, wʊ maa lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr go ɛ, tɩchɛ a nɩnyɩnɛ wa chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr, waa bɔ̃ɔ a Yesu nɩ a nɩnyɩnɛ wʊn ɩ ɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr yi naa a tɩɩ sɛ̃, bojũu 'lɔ lɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ yi a wɛr pielfʊ. Ala lɛ so ka Yesu na ɩ Nãaŋmɩn Bie wa ɩka wʊ wa sɔ̃ɔ a tɩɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie, maa lɛ sɛɛ ɩka wʊ lɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ go ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn befʊ be naa a wʊ yɔ̃ɔ. Wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛbɛ go ɛ, bojũu wʊ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bie.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩ de bɔ̃ɔn a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir nɩ a Tɩɩ bibiir. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba wa turo a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ 'lɔ wʊn bin bɩɩ na waa lɛ nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛɛr, waa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie ɛ.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Yɩ ta ɩ a sɩ kaara a Kain kaar ɛ, wʊ tara na a dɛɛr sʊɔ tɩɛr na wʊ kʊ a wʊ yɛbile. Bo lɛ so wʊn kʊ a yɛbile? Bojũu a Kain tʊ̃mɔ̃ ɩn dɛɛr, tɩchɛ ka a wʊ yɛbile tʊ̃mɔ̃ tor.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: N yɛɛr, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka a fɛr yɩ ala ɩ a nɩbɛ na be a wɛr pɔ wa 'laar yɩ naa ɛ.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn nara ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ naa a sɩ taaba. A wiil ɩka sɩ yin kũu pɔ, tɩ kpɛ nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ pɔ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba nʊ̃ a wʊ yɛbɛ ɛ, wʊ chɛnɛ na be kũu pɔ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na 'laar a wʊ yɛɛr ɩn nɩkʊrɔ a wʊ nyãa pɔ, ka yɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka nɩkʊrɔ ba tara nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn lɛ a nʊ̃fʊ na be, bojũu Yesu sɔɔn kpi kʊ sɩ, ka a mɩ sɛɛ ɩka, sɩ mɩ sɔɔ kpi kʊ a sɩ yɛɛr.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ a yɩ ãsʊɔ tara naa ka a sɛɛn wʊ, tɩ nyɛ a wʊ taa yɛɛr an wõnõ ka wʊ lɩɛb puor yɔ̃ɔ ba, a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ be a wʊ sʊɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: N bibiir, yɩ ta vɛ̃ ka sɩ nʊ̃fʊ ɩ 'yɛrbie nɩ jãlbir 'yɛrbie ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ ɩ ka sɩ sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa nɩtãa lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na nʊ̃ sɩ sɩrɛ jaa.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: A sɩ befʊ pɔ lɛ sɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka sɩ be naa a yelmãɛ pɔ sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ jaa sɩn wa ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem sʊɔrɔ wʊ, sɩ kʊ̃ lɛ joro dãbãɛ ɛ,

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: ala gba ɩ a sɩ tɩɛr 'yɛr ɩka sɩ maal dɛɛr. Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn bɔ̃ɔn yele jaa a sɩ nyãn pɔ, na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ yele jaa sɩn ɩrɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, ala ɩ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a sɩ tɩɛr pɔ, ɩka sɩ maa chɛnɛ maala dɛɛr ɛ, sɩn wa sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn, sɩ kʊ̃ joro dãbãɛ ɛ,

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: sɩn nyɛn bon jaa sɩn sʊɔr yi a wʊ sɛ̃, bojũu sɩ turo naa a wʊ nɛɛ na sɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ na pɛlɛ a wʊ pʊɔ.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn bin nɩ nyã, ɩka sɩ sɔɔ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto yuor na sɩ nʊ̃ a sɩ taaba, nɩtãa a lɛ wʊn 'yɛr sɩ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Bala jaa na turo a Nãaŋmɩn nɛɛ wʊn bin, ba ben a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka wʊ mɩ be a ba 'yɔ̃ɔ. Sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka wʊ ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, a Sɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn de kʊ sɩ jũu.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: N barmɩne, yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa sɔɔ nɩrɛ jaa na 'yɛr ɩka wʊ tara na a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ yɩ bɛɛr a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ kaa, ka ala ɩ a 'yɛr wʊn 'yɛrɛ yin a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃. Bojũu jir 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ yi naa jie jaa na ba 'yɛrɛ ɩka a lɛ ban 'yɛrɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ ba.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ yɩn de bɔ̃ɔn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, nɩrɛ 'lɔ nɩ wa 'yɛr ɩka Yesu wa naa a wɛr pɔ nɩtãa nɩsaal, a nɩrɛ 'lɔ lɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa wa tɔr a lɛ ba yi Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ, a nɩrɛ nyã lɛ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto, a 'lɔ yɩn wõ ɩka wʊn wa naa, 'lɔ lɛ be be a wɛr pɔ a pʊ̃pãanyã.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: N bibiir, yɩn 'lɔ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ na yɩ tʊ̃ɔ ba, bojũu a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ na be a yɩ pɔ, bɛrma naa gar a dɛɛr sʊɔ 'lɔ na be a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Sɩn 'lɔ ɩn naa a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn, ma sɔɔ naa a lɛ sɩn wile, tɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, maa sɔɔ a lɛ sɩn wile ɛ. Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩn tʊ̃ɔ bɔ̃ɔn ka a nɩnyɩnɛ na 'yɛrɛ tara naa Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ na ɩ a yelmãɛ, bɩɩ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na yi a Satan sɛ̃ na ɩ a jir ŋmara.

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, yɩ vɛ̃ a sɩ wile taa nʊ̃fʊ. N 'yɛr naa a nɩtɔ̃ bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ma vɛ̃ a sɩ ma tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ taa. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na wa nʊ̃ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ, a wiil ɩka Nãaŋmɩn bie lɛ wʊ ɩ na wʊ bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na baa wa nʊ̃ a wʊ taaba ɛ, ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn befʊ wʊ jaa ɩn nʊ̃fʊ.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: A sɔr nyã lɛ Nãaŋmɩn tu wiil a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ kʊ sɩ. Wʊ vɛ̃n a wʊ Bibʊ̃'yen tɛɛ ka wʊ wa a wɛr pɔ, a wʊ jũu, sɩ tara na a yelmãɛ nyɛvʊr.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ a nʊ̃fʊ be, a ba ɩ sɩn lɛ nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, tɩchɛ 'lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ, na wʊ tʊ̃ a wʊ Bie ka wʊ wa lo a sɩ yeldɛbɛ bɔɔr kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, an ɩ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ a nɩtɔ̃, a mɩ sɛɛ naa ɩka, sɩ mɩ nʊ̃ taa.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ jaa ba nyɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ wʊn be ɛ, tɩchɛ sɩn wa nʊ̃ taa, sɩn nɩ Nãaŋmɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen. Ka a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ na be a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ chaar kʊ a nɩbɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɩ naa a wʊ Sɩɛ, a lɛ jũu lɛ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka sɩ mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ, ala lɛ so sɩn nɩ Nãaŋmɩn na tara nɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Sɩ nyɛ naa na sɩ mɩ di dãasɩɛ ɩka a Sãa tʊ̃ naa a wʊ Bie ka wʊ wa faa a wɛr nɩbɛ.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Nãaŋmɩn tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ nɩrɛ nyã na 'yɛr chãa pɔ, tɩ sɔɔ ɩka Yesu ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn Bie, ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nɩnyɩnɛ tara na nɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: A lɛ sɩn 'lɔ, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa na sɩ sɔɔ de ɩka, Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃ sɩn sɔ̃ɔ jaa. Nãaŋmɩn ɩn nʊ̃fʊ sʊɔ. Nɩrɛ mɩ na nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ taaba, wʊ ben Nãaŋmɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka Nãaŋmɩn mɩ be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: If we truly love others and live as Christ did in this world, we won't be worried about the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Sɩn 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ chaara a sɩ pɔ, ka dãbãɛ kʊ̃ kʊrɔ sɩ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ sɩn wa ara a wʊ niem a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ daar ɛ. Bojũu a wɛr nyã pɔ sɩ kaar naa nɩtãa Yesu.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Dãbãɛ ba be nʊ̃fʊ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ nʊ̃fʊ na chaar ma diin dãbãɛ bar, bojũu dãbãɛ ma kpɛ̃n nɩrɛ wʊn joro gefʊ. Nʊ̃fʊ mɩ na chaar, ba joro dãbãɛ ɛ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ 'yɛr ɩka wʊ nʊ̃n Nãaŋmɩn, tɩ chɛnɛ 'laar a wʊ yɛɛr, a nɩnyɩnɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ ɩn jir ŋmara. Bojũu nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na ba nʊ̃ a wʊ tɔ sʊɔ wʊn nyɛn nɩbir, kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ nʊ̃ Nãaŋmɩn wʊn ba nyɛn nɩbir ɛ.

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: A nɛɛ lɛ a nyã a Nãaŋmɩn na 'yɛr bin, nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na nʊ̃ a 'lɔ Nãaŋmɩn sɛɛ naa ɩka wʊ nʊ̃ a wʊ taaba.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ ɩ a Nɩ-iraa, ɩ naa Nãaŋmɩn bie. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na nʊ̃ a sãa mɩ nʊ̃ naa a bie.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Nɩtɔ̃ lɛ sɩn de bɔ̃ɔn ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ naa a Nãaŋmɩn bibiir ala ɩ sɩ nʊ̃n a Nãaŋmɩn na sɩ turo a wʊ nɛɛ wʊn bin.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: An lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb puor 'yɔ̃ɔ a wɛr? Nɩrɛ 'lɔ tɛɛ na sɔɔ ɩka Yesu lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie.

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: A Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nyã lɛ wa a ba so wʊ Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ nɩ a wʊ jãɩ. Waa so a kʊ̃ɔ tɛɛ ɛ, tɩ wʊ kpi naa na wʊ kpaar a wʊ jãɩ, ka a Sɩɛ mɩ di a wʊ dãasɩɛ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ma 'yɛrɛ naa yelmãɛ.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Bojũu dãasɩɛsɩ ata lɛ be be,

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: a Sɩɛ, nɩ a kʊ̃ɔ, nɩ a jãɩ, ka a jaa ata dãasɩɛ ɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ sɩ ma sɔɔ naa nɩsaal dãasɩɛ, sɩn sɔɔ naa Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ 'lɔ wʊn di a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ, bojũu Nãaŋmɩn dãasɩɛ bɛrma naa gar nɩsaal dãasɩɛ.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie, a dãasɩɛ nyã be naa a wʊ nyãa pɔ. Nɩrɛ nyã jaa na ba wa sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, wʊ bʊɔl wʊn jir ŋmara bojũu waa sɔɔ a dãasɩɛ wʊn di a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: A dãasɩɛ nɩ nyã, Nãaŋmɩn kʊ sɩ naa nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, ka a nyɛvʊr nyã be a wʊ Bie 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara a Bie, tara na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba wa tara a Bie ɛ, ba tara nyɛvʊr ɛ.

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: N sɛb kʊ a yɩn bala na sɔɔ a Nãaŋmɩn Bie yuor, ka yɩn bɔ̃ɔ ɩka yɩ tara na nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: We are certain God will hear our prayers when we ask for what pleases him.
translation_verse: A 'lafʊ nyã lɛ sɩ tara ɩka, sɩn wa sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ, wʊn wõ naa naa.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Ka ala ɩ sɩ bɔ̃ɔn na ɩka Nãaŋmɩn wõ naa a lɛ sɩn ma sʊɔr wʊ, sɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ tara na bon jaa sɩn sʊɔr wʊ.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ yɩ wa nyɛ naa a yɩ tɔ sʊɔ na ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr kɔ̃ɔ na kʊ̃ sʊ̃ʊ wʊ ɛ, yɩ sʊɔr Nãaŋmɩn ka wʊ vɛ̃ kʊ wʊ. Tɩchɛ yeldɛbɛ amɩne ben be fʊn na ɩ ka Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ vɛ̃ kʊ fʊ ɛ, n ba 'yɛr ɩka yɩ sʊɔr a ala ɛ.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Yeldɛbɛ a jaa ɩn yelbier, tɩchɛ yelbier a jaa baa kʊrɔ kũu ɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn bie, kʊ̃ lɛ chɛnɛ ɩrɛ yeldɛɛr ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn Bie na gu ba naa ka a dɛɛr sʊɔ kʊ̃ sɩɩr ba ɛ.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Sɩn bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka sɩ ɩn Nãaŋmɩn bibiir, ka a wɛr wʊ jaa be a dɛɛr sʊɔ tʊ̃ɔfʊ pɔ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Sɩ mɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa ɩka Nãaŋmɩn Bie wa naa, 'lɔ lɛ vɛ̃ ka sɩ bɔ̃ɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nyã na ɩ a yelmãɛ. Sɩ be naa a Nãaŋmɩn nyã nɩ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ ɩ a yelmãɛ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: N bibiir, yɩ tɔɔ yɩ mãɛ yin bʊtɩbɛ jaa pɔ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Maa nɩkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ pɔɔ nyã Nãaŋmɩn na ir nɩ a fʊ bibiir. N nʊ̃ fʊ naa nɩ a yelmãɛ, a ba ɩ maa tɛɛ ɛ, tɩchɛ bala jaa mɩ na bɔ̃ɔ a yelmãɛ mɩ nʊ̃ fʊ naa.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: An ɩ a yelmãɛ ben a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ jũu, na wʊn be a sɩ sɛ̃ sɔ̃ɔ jaa.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Wãɛfʊ, nɩ nɩbaal, nɩ nyã'maar na yi a sɩ Sãa Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ Bie Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto a be a sɩn bala na be a yelmãɛ nɩ a nʊ̃fʊ pɔ.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa ɩn nyɛ a fʊ bibiir bamɩne na chiine a yelmãɛ pɔ, nɩtãa lɛ a Sãa na bin a nɛɛ kʊ sɩ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Pʊ̃pãanyã n yɛpɔɔ, a ba ɩ nɛbin paalaa lɛ n sɛɛrɛ kʊrɔ fʊ ɛ, tɩchɛ a bʊ̃koraa 'lɔ lɛ na 'yɛr ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ taa.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: A nʊ̃fʊ nɩ nyã ɩka sɩ turo a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn na bin a wʊ nɛɛ kʊ sɩ. Wʊ 'yɛr ɩka sɩ nʊ̃ taa nɩtãa lɛ sɩn wõ yi a pielfʊ, sɩ ɩrɛ a lɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Bɛ̃bɛlbɛ sɛɛn a wɛr, bala lɛ ba sɔɔ ɩka Yesu wan a wɛr pɔ nɩtãa nɩsaal ɛ. A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ɩ a bɛ̃bɛlbɛ tɩ 'laar a Kɩrɩsɩto.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Yɩ guro yɩ mãɛ ka a yɩ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ta lo ɛ, tɩchɛ ka yɩ nyɛ a yɩ sãyar.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na ba wa turo a lɛ a Yesu na wiil ɛ, waa tara nɛbʊ̃'yen nɩ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ, tɩ fʊ̃ʊ nyã na turo a lɛ wʊn wiil, tara naa Sãa nɩ a Bie.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa wa naa a yɩ sɛ̃, tɩ ba tara a wiilfʊ nyã ɛ, yɩ ta sɔɔ ka wʊ kpɛ a yɩ yir bɩɩ puor wʊ ɛ.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na puor a nɩnyɩnɛ nyãna mɩ pʊɔ naa a wʊ tʊ̃dɛɛr pɔ.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: N chɛnɛ na tara yelyɔɔ ɩn taa sɛb kʊ fʊ, tɩchɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka n wa a yɩ sɛ̃ jũu, maa wa wa sɩn 'mataa jãnɛ 'yɛrɛ ka nʊ̃ɔ nyɔɔ sɩ.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: A yɛpɔɔ nyã mɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na ir bibiir mɩ puor fʊ naa.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Maa na ɩ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ lɛ sɛb a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a fʊ̃ʊ Gayus na ɩ a n baraa, ɩn nʊ̃ a yelmãɛ jũu.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: N baraa, n sʊɔrɔ na Nãaŋmɩn ɩka a fʊ ãgãn wʊ kpɛ̃mɛ ka a yele a jaa ɩ vɩla kʊ fʊ, nɩtãa lɛ a fʊ sɩɛ na kpɛ̃mɛ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Nʊ̃ɔ kpɛ ma naa lɛ a yɛɛr bamɩne na wa 'yɛr a lɛ fʊn turo a yelmãɛ na fʊ chiine a yelmãɛ pɔ.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Bon jaa maa ɩ ma nʊ̃ɔ jã ɩn maa wõ ɩka a n bibiir chiine naa a yelmãɛ pɔ.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: N baraa, fʊ tara na yelmãɛ a lɛ fʊn maala kʊrɔ a yɛɛr, ba gba na ɩ sãanba a fʊ sɛ̃.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Ban wa, ba wa 'yɛr naa a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ kʊ a pupuorbiir a ka. Mɔ̃ na fʊ ma bar ba a sɔr a lɛ nɛ, lɛ lɛ pɛlɛ a Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Yesu yuor jũu lɛ ba chiine, na ba maa sɔɔ de bon jaa a bala na ba ɩ a Yesu turbo sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Sɩn lɛ a sɛɛ ɩka sɩ sʊ̃ʊ ba na sɩ pʊɔ ba 'mataa tʊ̃ kʊ a yelmãɛ.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: N sɛb sɛbile kʊ a pupuorbiir na be a fʊ sɛ̃, tɩchɛ a Diotɩrefes na bʊɔrɔ ɩka wʊ ɩ a nɩdiere, sɩn nɩ 'lɔ ba tara nɛbʊ̃'yen ɛ.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so, maa wa tɩ ɩn 'yɛr yɩ naa a lɛ wʊn yʊɔrɔ hũhũnõ ŋmara a jirsɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ sɩ. A lɛ tɛɛ ba lɛ ɛ, tɩ wʊ maa sɔɔ de a sɩ yɛɛr ɛ. Wʊ ma ŋmaan a bala na bʊɔrɔ ɩka ba de ba sɔr tɩ ma dii ba bar a puorfʊ jie.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: N baraa, ta tɔɔr yeldɛɛr ɛ, tɩchɛ tɔɔrɔ yelvɩla, nɩrɛ 'lɔ na maala vɩla bɔ̃ɔn Nãaŋmɩn. Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ mɩ na maala dɛɛr ba bɔ̃ɔ Nãaŋmɩn ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Demetirus, nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr a wʊ vɩla maalfʊ 'yɛr, a yelmãɛ mɩ din a wʊ dãasɩɛ. Sɩn mɩ din a wʊ vɩla dãasɩɛ, ka yɩn mɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a sɩ dãasɩɛ ɩn sɩrɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: N chɛnɛ na tara yelyɔɔ ɩn taa sɛb kʊ fʊ, tɩchɛ n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n sɛb ɛ.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: A kʊ̃ lɛ kor ɛ, n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n nyɛ fʊ a sɩ jãnɛ 'yɛr.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Nyã'maar wʊ be a fʊ sɛ̃. A sɩ barmɩne na be ka puor fʊ naa, mɩ puor a sɩ barmɩne na be a be bʊ̃'yen 'yen.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Maa Judɩ na ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto gbãgbaa, naa mɩ ɩ a Jemesɩ yɛbɛ, lɛ sɛɛrɛ a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn bala a Sãa Nãaŋmɩn na bʊɔl a yɩ be a wʊ nʊ̃fʊ pɔ ka wʊ gu yɩ taa lɛɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Nɩbaal nɩ nyã'maar nɩ nʊ̃fʊ a dɔɔlɔ yɩ taa.

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: N barmɩne, n dɔ̃ɔ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir ɩka n sɛb a faafʊ nyã sɩ jaa na põ, naa nyɛ ɩka a sɛɛ naa ka n sɛb kpãkpãan yɩ a yɩ mʊɔrɔ nɩ a sɔɔfʊ 'yɛr 'lɔ a Nãaŋmɩn na de kʊ a wʊ nɩbɛ.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Nɩbɛ bamɩne sɔ̃ɔfʊ yele na dɔ̃ɔ sɛb bin kõr jaa sɔɔl naa na ba fʊɔl kpɛ a yɩ pɔ. Baa puoro ɛ, ba nyɔɔn a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn wãɛfʊ yele lɩɛb na ba nyɛ sɔr sɛ̃nɛ tɩ na ba tɔr a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto tɛɛ na ɩ a sɩ Tʊ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩ a sɩ Soro.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Yɩ gba den nie bɔ̃ɔn a anyãna, tɩ n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n lɛ jɛɔ yɩ ɩka, a sɩ Soro faan a wʊ nɩbɛ yin a Ijipitɩ tẽe pɔ, tɩchɛ wʊ lɛ wa nyʊɔl a bala jaa na ba sɔɔ ɛ.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: A malakasɩ bala na ba ara a ba tʊ̃ɔfʊ araa jie ɛ, tɩchɛ na ba tɔr a ba mãɛ yir bar, bala lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn lũn a bɔ̃jɔr kpãɛn 'yɔ̃ɔ be a libe pɔ chɛlɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ bɩbir kpɛ̃ɛ daar.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a Sodom nɩ a Gomora, nɩ a tẽchɛɛlsɩ ala na jilʊ̃ de a ba mãɛ kʊ a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele, ka dɔɔr gãna nɩ taa, ka a bũu na ba kpĩine ɛ, di ba, naa ɩ yelmanaa gã.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ, a jãna dẽme banyãna sɔ̃ɔn a ba ãgãma, baa turo a sɩ Soro binfʊ ɛ. Ba ma kpɛrɛ naa a saaju bʊ̃maalsɩ.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a Maɩkɩl gba na ɩ a malakasɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ a 'lɔ naa Tɩɩ na dɔ̃ɔ chɩrɛ taa nɩ Mosesɩ ãgãn yele, waa 'la tu a Tɩɩ bɩɩ kpɛ wʊ ɛ, tɩ na wʊ 'yɛr, “A sɩ Soro lɛ na kpãa fʊ.”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a nɩbɛ banyãna ma kpɛrɛ naa a bonsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ a par ɛ, ka a yelsɩ ala ban ba bɔ̃ɔ yi a ba dɔɔfʊ daar, kaara fɩka dʊ̃n na ba tara tɩɛr ɛ, a yelsɩ anyãna lɛ na sɔ̃ɔ ba.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Nɛbier nyɔɔ ba naa, bojũu ba den a Kain sɔr. Tɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu a ba far kpɛ a Balaam bɔrfʊ pɔ. A nɛchɩrɛ jũu, ba mɩ nyʊɔl naa a Kora kaar.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna kaara fɩka bʊ̃sɔ̃ɔnsɩ na jɛr yɩ a yɩ nɛbʊ̃'yen lɔ̃ɔ di daar. Ba maa bɛɛ nɩrɛ ɛ, ba mãɛ lɛ ba kaara. Ba ɩn julõjuur na ba tara kʊ̃ɔ ɛ, ka a sɛsɛbɛ furo yʊɔrɔ nɩ. Ba kaara fɩka kpãchãan tɩɩr na ba tara wɔ̃mɔ̃ ɛ, ka ba vɔ̃ dɩɛl bar ka a kpi.

english_verse: Their shameful deeds show up like foam on wild ocean waves. They are like wandering stars forever doomed to the darkest pits of hell.
translation_verse: Ba kaara na fɩka a man kpɛ̃ɛ a sɛsɛkpɛ̃ɛ na furo ka a ba vã furo a kʊ̃ɔ fuul kaar, na ba kaara fɩka ŋmarbie bɔrɔ yʊɔrɔ ka a Nãaŋmɩn chɔɔr jilibe jaa gbɛb guro nɩ ba.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Enok na ɩ a Adama yɔ̃ɔ suulaa ayopõi sʊɔ mɩ dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr a nɩbɛ banyãna 'yɛr, “Nyɛ, a sɩ Soro waara naa nɩ a wʊ nɩchɛchɛsɩ turo turo.

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: Wʊn wa tɔɔr nɩrɛ jaa 'yɛr, na wʊ 'yɛr a lɛ a bala na ba puoro ɛ, a lɛ jaa ban tʊ̃ nɩ a lɛ ban maal tɔr a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a 'yɛr bikpãɛn ala ban 'yɛr dɔɔl wʊ.”

english_verse: These people grumble and complain and live by their own selfish desires. They brag about themselves and flatter others to get what they want. More Warnings
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ma ɩrɛ gbʊrɔ̃ gbʊrɔ̃, na ba nyɛrɛ a ba taaba bɔrfʊ. Ba ma turo naa a ba mãɛ vɔldɛɛr, a ba mãɛ yobɔ 'yɛr lɛ ba ma 'yɛrɛ bɛlɛ nɩ a ba taaba tɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n barmɩne, yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩtʊ̃nsɩ na dɔ̃ɔ 'yɛr.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Ba 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka, “A ber baaraa sɔ̃ɔ, nɩlaarba na turo a ba ãgãn vɔlaa na wa naa.”

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: A nɩbɛ banyãna lɛ ma waan ootaa, na ba turo a ãgãn bɔfʊ na baa tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩn n barmɩne, yɩ mɛ a yɩ mãɛ dɔɔl a yɩ sɔɔfʊ chɛchɛ ju, na yɩ sʊɔrɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Yɩ sɔɔl yɩ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn nʊ̃fʊ pɔ na yɩ chɛlɛ a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto nɩbaal, a wʊ waan a nyɛvʊr na ba tara baarfʊ ɛ, wa kʊ yɩ.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Yɩ tara a bala na baala nɩ nɩbaal.

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Yɩ vʊ̃ɔ a bamɩne yin a bũu pɔ na yɩ faa ba. Na yɩ mɩ kaa a bamɩne nɩbaal tɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ jʊ̃mɔ̃, na yɩ taa maal a ba dɛɛr ala ban maala ɛ.

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: A Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã tɛɛ lɛ ɩ a sɩ Fafaara, wʊ nyɛ tɩɩr, nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ kpɛ̃ɔ, nɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ tu a sɩ Soro Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ sɛrɛ tɩ wʊ wa maal a wɛr nɩ pʊ̃pãanyã bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa! A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: A yelwiilsɩ ala a Nãaŋmɩn na kʊ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ɩka wʊ wiil kʊ a wʊ gbãgbaa ala kʊ̃ yaar tɩ ɩ ɛ. Yesu tʊ̃ naa a wʊ malaka ɩka wʊ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ a wʊ gbãgbaa Jɔɔn.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Jɔɔn mɩ man naa a ala a jaa wʊn nyɛ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto na 'yɛr.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who reads this prophecy to others, and he will bless everyone who hears and obeys it. The time is almost here.
translation_verse: Pʊpɛl sʊɔ lɛ a 'lɔ na kar a gãn nyã. Pʊpɛl dẽme mɩ lɛ a bala na wõ tɩ de 'yɔ̃ɔ a ba nyãn pɔ, lɛ an sɛb a gãn nyã pɔ, bojũu a bɩbir gbʊr naa.

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Maa Jɔɔn lɛ sɛb a gãn nyã kʊrɔ a yɩn pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi na be Asɩya paal pɔ. Wãɛfʊ nɩ nyã'maar yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ, 'lɔ lɛ be be, nɩ 'lɔ lɛ na wa, naa yi a Sɩɩr ayopõi na ara a Nãaŋmɩn dakɔɔ niem,

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: naa yi a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto sɛ̃, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yelmãɛ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, na wʊ ɩ a bidɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ na ir a kũu pɔ ɩ vʊr, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a nãmɩne ba jaa nãkpɛ̃ɛ na be ka a wɛr pɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ nʊ̃ sɩ na wʊ de a wʊ jãɩ pɛɛ sɩ yin a sɩ yeldɛɛr pɔ na wʊ faa sɩ,

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: na wʊ maal sɩ a wʊ nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩbɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lorbo ka sɩn tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a wʊ Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a Sãa, 'lɔ lɛ so a tɩɩr nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ a bɩbir nɩ bɩbir jaa! A ɩ a lɛ.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Nãaŋmɩn na ɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ jaa sʊɔ 'yɛr naa, “Maa lɛ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa. Maa lɛ dɔ̃ɔ be be. Maa lɛ chɛnɛ be be. Maa lɛ na wa.”

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Maa Jɔɔn na ɩ a yɩ yɛbɛ, n pʊɔ yɩ naa a dɔɔyɛ pɔ a Yesu tufʊ jũu. Maa nɩ yɩn jaa ben a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ pɔ tɩ chɛnɛ tara kãnyir. N ben a man dõdol pɔ ban bʊɔlɔ Patimosɩ bojũu n 'yɛr naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr naa di a Yesu dãasɩɛ.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: A sɩ Soro Bɩbir Daar, Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ir ma naa ka n wõ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ na tãn a n puor fɩka ɩɩl ban pɛɛl,

english_verse: The voice said, “Write in a book what you see. Then send it to the seven churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.”
translation_verse: ka a kɔkɔr 'yɛr, “Sɛb a ala a jaa fʊn nyɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ a gãn pɔ, na fʊ tɩr kʊ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi. Efesus, Semena, Pergamum, Tayatira, Saadisɩ, Feladelfiya nɩ Laodisea.”

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: N lɩɛb ɩka n kaa an lɛ 'yɛrɛ a lɛ kʊrɔ ma. Ɩn wa lɩɛb, n nyɛn sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi.

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: ) na wʊ su fuu wõo ka wʊ ta a gbɛɛ pɔ, tɩ a sɛlma gãn bãbã a wʊ nyãa ju.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: A wʊ jukɔɔl pɛl fɩka gõn, ka a nɩbie kaara fɩka bũu na 'lɩrɛ.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Ka a gbɛɛ nyɩlɛ fɩka kur jɩɛ ban juu ir sãa pɔ, ka a kɔkɔr wʊn 'yɛrɛ nyɛtãan kɔ̃kpɛ̃ɛ na joro.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Ŋmɛrbie ayopõi be naa a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ, ka a sɔbʊraa na dire a jiir a jaa ayi, yi a wʊ nɛɛ pɔ. Ka a wʊ nie nyɩlɛ fɩka mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ na ara gar ju sãlsɔɔ.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Ɩ̃n wa nyɛ a lɛ, ka n lo kpa a wʊ niem gã fɩka kũu. Ka wʊ pãa dɔɔl ma a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ tɩ 'yɛr kʊ ma, “Ta joro dãbãɛ ɛ. Maa lɛ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Maa lɛ ɩ a Nyɛvʊr Sʊɔ. Nyɛ, n dɔ̃ɔ kpi, tɩchɛ n ir naa ɩ vʊr, n kʊ̃ lɛ kpi go ɛ. Maa lɛ tara a kũu nɩ a kpĩisɩ tẽe pãn bir.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: “A lɛ juu sɛb a ala fʊn nyɛ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ nɩ a pʊ̃pãanyã, nɩ a ala na wa ɩ daar kɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: A yelsɔɔlaa 'lɔ na be a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi ala fʊn nyɛ a n nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ nɩ a sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi par nɩ nyã. A ŋmɛrbie ayopõi ala ɩ naa a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi malakasɩ, fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi mɩ ɩ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ayopõi.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Efesus pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na tara a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ na wʊ chiine a sɛlma fãtɩnɛ dɔɔlfʊ jie jiir ayopõi sãlsɔɔ 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Fʊ tara na kãnyir na fʊ di dɔɔyɛ a n yuor jũu, tɩ faa bal ɛ.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ bar naa a fʊ dɔ̃ɔ nʊ̃fʊ 'lɔ.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Tɩɛr kaa a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ wa lo! Lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr na fʊ be a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ be. Ala ɩ fʊ̃ʊ ba wa lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr ɛ, ɩn wa naa wa 'lɔɔ a fʊ fãtɩn dɔɔlfʊ jie bar.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a lɛ fʊn ba nʊ̃ nɩ nyã, fʊ 'laar naa a Nikolayitɩ nɩbɛ maalfʊ, n mɩ 'laar naa a ba maalfʊ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a ala a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn sɔr ka wʊ kpɛ a Nãaŋmɩn jɔɔ pɔ pɔr a nyɛvʊr tɩɛ wɔ̃mɔ̃ na wʊ di.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Semena pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na ɩ a Pielfʊ nɩ a Baaraa, a 'lɔ na kpi tɩ ir ɩ vʊr 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Taa joro dãbãɛ a dɔɔyɛ na wa a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ. Nyɛ, a tɩɩ na vɛ̃ naa ka ba nyɔɔr a yɩ bamɩne 'yɔ̃ɔ pɔɔfʊ die pɔ, bɛɛr yɩ kaa, ka yɩ di dɔɔyɛ ber pie. Ala ɩ yɩn kpin gba, yɩ taa bara a yɩ sɔɔfʊ ɛ, ka ɩn kʊ yɩ a nyɛvʊr 'lɔ na kaara a nãa jupil kaar.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. Whoever wins the victory will not be hurt by the second death. The Letter to Pergamum
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, a gbɛɛ ayi kũu kʊ̃ lɛ sɩɩr wʊ go ɛ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Pergamum pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ a sɔbʊraa na dire a jiir a jaa ayi 'yɛr lɛ anyãna.

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a jie fʊn kpɩɛrɛ, be lɛ ɩ a Satan dʊʊ, tɩ faa vɛ̃ a n yuor bʊɔlfʊ ɛ. Fʊ chɛnɛ na sɔɔ a n yuor. Fʊ gba na wa nyɛ a Antipasɩ na dire a n dãasɩɛ ka ba kʊ wʊ a yɩ tẽe pɔ be a Satan dʊʊ na be.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ chɛnɛ na tara nɩbɛ ka ba turo a Balaam wiilfʊ, 'lɔ lɛ wiil a Balak ɩka wʊ bɛr a Isɩral nɩbɛ nɛɛ ka ba maal dɛɛr na wʊ ɩka ba di a bʊtɩbɛ bʊ̃diir na ba gãna nɩ taa.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju mɩ lɛ fʊ mɩ chɛnɛ tara a nɩbɛ na turo a Nikolayitɩ nɩbɛ wiilfʊ.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr, ka lɛ ba lɛ ɛ, ɩn wan fɔɔ wa jɛb a nɩbɛ bala nɩ a sɔbʊraa 'lɔ na yi a n nɛɛ pɔ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ. A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn a maana ala na sɔɔl. Naa lɛ kʊ wʊ kusɩr pɩla ban sɛb yopaalaa dɔɔl nɩrɛ jaa na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɛ, a 'lɔ na so lɛ bɔ̃ɔ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Tayatira pupuorbiir ɩka, a Nãaŋmɩn Bie 'yɛr lɛ a anyãna. A 'lɔ nɩbie na kaara a bũu 'lɩraa kaar ka a wʊ gbɛɛ nyɛtãan fɩka kur jɩɛ na be bũu pɔ.

english_verse: I know everything about you, including your love, your faith, your service, and how you have endured. I know you are doing more now than you have ever done before.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, a fʊ nʊ̃fʊ, a fʊ sɔɔfʊ nɩ a fʊ kãnyir. A lɛ fʊn tʊ̃nɔ̃ a pʊ̃pãanyã gar a lɛ fʊn dɔ̃ɔ tʊ̃.

english_verse: But I still have something against you because of that woman Jezebel. She calls herself a prophet, and you let her teach and mislead my servants to do immoral things and to eat food offered to idols.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ n chɛnɛ na tara fʊ nɩ 'yɛr. Fʊ bal kʊ a pɔɔ 'lɔ ban bʊɔlɔ a Jejebɛl 'lɔ na bʊɔlɔ a wʊ mãɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrɛ. Wʊ wile naa a n tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ ka ba sɛ̃nɛ na ba ɔɔrɔ nɩ a bʊtɩbɛ nʊ̃nɔ̃.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: N kʊ wʊn sɔ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ lɩɛb a wʊ tɩɛr yin a wʊ sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ, tɩchɛ waa sɔɔrɔ ɛ.

english_verse: I am going to strike down Jezebel. Everyone who does these immoral things with her will also be punished, if they don't stop.
translation_verse: Lɛ ɩn vɛ̃n ka baal nyɔɔ wʊ ka bala naa 'lɔ na sɛ̃nɛ, ka bala baa lɩɛb bar a wʊ sɔr ɛ.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Ɩn kʊ naa a bala na turo wʊ, ka a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ bɔ̃ɔ ɩka maa lɛ bɔ̃ɔ nɩrɛ tɩɛr nɩ nɩrɛ nyãa naa na yab ãsʊɔ jaa nɩ wʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ a yɩn na chɛ a be a Tayatira na ba de a pɔɔ wiilfʊ bɩɩ jãn a Satan yelsɔɔlsɩ ɛ, n chɛnɛ na tara 'yɛr na 'yɛr kʊ yɩ. N kʊ̃ de yele jaa dɔɔl yɩ ɛ.

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Yɩ chɛnɛ nyɔɔ a lɛ nɛ wa tãn a daar 'lɔ ɩn na wa.

english_verse: I will give power over the nations to everyone who wins the victory and keeps on obeying me until the end.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ na wʊ ɩrɛ a lɛ ɩn bʊɔrɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn kpɛ̃ɔ ka wʊ tʊ̃ɔ a paalsɩ ba jaa,

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor wʊ chɛlɛ a ala Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Saadisɩ pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na tara a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɩr ayopõi nɩ a ŋmɛrbie ayopõi, n bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃. A fʊ yuor yire na ɩka fʊ ɩn bʊ̃vʊr tɩchɛ bʊ̃kũu lɛ fʊ ɩ.

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Jɛɔ ir! Na fʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a bala na chɛ na kpire ãkpãɛn, bojũu n jʊʊr nyɛ ka a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ ba sɛɛ a n Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: Remember the teaching you were given and heard. Hold firmly to it and turn from your sins. If you don't wake up, I will come when you least expect it, just as a thief does.
translation_verse: Tɩɛr tɔ a ala fʊn de tɩ wõ, turo a ala tɩ na fʊ lɩɛb a tɩɛr. Tɩchɛ fʊ̃ʊ ba jɛɔ ir ɛ, ɩn wan nãnyie kaar ka fʊ kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ ɩn na wa a fʊ sɛ̃ ɛ.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ fʊ chɛnɛ na tara nɩbɛ bãlãa a ba be a Saadisɩ ka a ba fɔɔr ba nyɔɔr dɛbɛ ɛ. Bala nɩ maa na 'mantaa chiine, ka ba su bʊ̃pɩɛl, bojũu ba sɛɛn naa.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ jaa na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ a ba kaar mɩ na sun a bʊ̃pɩɛl. N kʊ̃ kpĩin a wʊ yuor bar a nyɛvʊr gãn pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ɩn pʊr a wʊ yuor a n Sãa nɩ a wʊ malakasɩ niem.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Philadelphia
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a ala a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Feladelfiya pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ na ɩ a chɛchɛ sʊɔ nɩ a yelmãɛ sʊɔ 'yɛr lɛ a anyã, 'lɔ lɛ tara a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ David pãn bir. 'Lɔ wa yuo, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ pɔɔ ɛ, 'lɔ mɩ wa pɔɔ, nɩrɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ yuo ɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃ a jaa. Nyɛ, n yuo naa a pãn bar, nɩrɛ jaa na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ pɔɔ ɛ. N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ kpɛ̃ɔ na ba jã bon ɛ, tɩchɛ fʊ chɛnɛ na tara a n 'yɛr na faa chiir a n yuor ɛ.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a bala na ɩ a Satan lɔ̃ɔfʊ dẽme tɩ na ba 'yɛr ɩka Juu nɩbɛ lɛ ba ɩ, jir ŋmarba lɛ ba ɩ. Ɩn vɛ̃ naa ka ba wa gbur dumo a yɩ niem na ba bɔ̃ɔ ɩka n nʊ̃ yɩ naa.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: A lɛ fʊn tu a n 'yɛr na fʊ di kãnyir, ɩn gu fʊ naa a sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ a dɔɔyɛ na wa a nɩbɛ ba jaa jie na kpɩɛrɛ ka a wɛr pɔ.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: N kʊ̃ kor tɩ wa ɛ. Nyɔɔ a lɛ nɛ fʊn tara, ka nɩrɛ jaa taa faa a fʊ nãa jupil ɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: A 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn maal wʊn a luur a n Nãaŋmɩn puorfʊ yir. Wʊ kʊ̃ lɛ vʊ̃ɔ go ɛ. Ɩn sɛb naa a n Nãaŋmɩn yuor nɩ a n Nãaŋmɩn tẽe yuor na ɩ a Jerusalɛm paalaa wʊn bar ka wʊ yire a saaju suro waara mar wʊ, naa mɩ lɛ sɛb a n yopaalaa mar wʊ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Laodicea
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Sɛb kʊ a malaka 'lɔ na ara kʊ a Laodisea pupuorbiir ɩka, a 'lɔ 'yɛrbie na ɩ A Ɩ A Lɛ, a yelmãɛ dẽ dẽ sʊɔ nɩ a yelmãɛ dãasɩɛ sʊɔ, 'lɔ 'yɔ̃ɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn tu mɛ bomo a jaa.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, and you are not cold or hot. I wish you were either one or the other.
translation_verse: N bɔ̃ɔ naa a fʊ tʊ̃mɔ̃, faa 'maa ɛ, faa lɛ tʊlɔ mɩ ɛ. An taa nʊ̃mɔ̃ ma naa ala ɩ fʊ ta 'maa naa bɩɩ tʊlɔ.

english_verse: But since you are lukewarm and neither cold nor hot, I will spit you out of my mouth.
translation_verse: A lɛ fʊn ben ɩ a ʊlɔ ʊlɔ jũu, faa tʊlɔ ɛ, faa mɩ lɛ 'maa ɛ, ɩn chɩr fʊn bar a n nɛɛ pɔ.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Fʊ 'yɛr ɩka taraa sʊɔ lɛ fʊ ɩ, na fʊ tara nãbonsɩ na faa faa bon jaa ɛ. Tɩchɛ faa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka fʊ ɩn nɩkɔ̃ɔ nɩ nɩbaal nɩrɛ, nɩ nɔ̃ɔ sʊɔ, na fʊ ɩ jɔ̃ɔ nɩ sal'mʊɔr.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: N sʊɔrɔ fʊ naa ɩka fʊ da sɛlma a n sɛ̃ ɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ bũu pɔ maal na fʊ ɩ tara sʊɔ. Na fʊ mɩ da fɔpɩla a n sɛ̃ pɔɔ a fʊ sal'mʊɔr vĩ, na fʊ lɛ da a nɩbie tãɩ mɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a nɩbie pɔ nyɛrɛ.

english_verse: I correct and punish everyone I love. So make up your minds to turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: N ma gɔ̃ naa a bala ɩn nʊ̃, naa tɔɔ ba toor. A lɛ mɔ̃ nɩbijɩɛ lɩɛb a fʊ tɩɛr.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Nyɛ, n ara naa dɔ̃dɔr nɛɛ bʊɔlɔ, ala ɩ ãsʊɔ jaa wa wõ naa a n kɔkɔr na wʊ yuo a pãn, ɩn kpɛ naa ka a maa naa nɩnyɩnɛ a sɩ tɩ 'mataa dire.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will sit with me on my throne, just as I won the victory and sat with my Father on his throne.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ, ɩn kʊ wʊn sɔr ka wʊ jãnɛ a n lõboor nɩtãa lɛ ɩn jɛb tʊ̃ɔ naa jãnɛ a n Sãa lõboor.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Nɩrɛ 'lɔ na tara toor, wʊ chɛlɛ a lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ a pupuorbiir gbulsɩ.”

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: A anyã puor, n lɛ kãan nyɛ a saaju pãn na yuo ara. Ka a kɔkɔr 'lɔ ɩn dɔ̃ɔ wõ a ɩɩl ban pɛɛl kaar 'yɛr kʊ ma, “Do wa, ka n wiil fʊ a ala na ɩ a anyã puor.”

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Ajienaa kaa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ de ma naa ka n nyɛ a nãa dakɔɔ a be a saaju nɩrɛ kɔ̃ɔ na jãnɛ.

english_verse: The one who was sitting there sparkled like precious stones of jasper and carnelian. A rainbow that looked like an emerald surrounded the throne.
translation_verse: Ka a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju nyɩlɛ jaa pala pala fɩka gar kʊsɩr, nɩ kʊsɩr wolo wolo, ka a sagõgoraa na nyɩlɛ ŋmaa jilʊ̃ a nãa dakɔɔ.

english_verse: Twenty-four other thrones were in a circle around that throne. And on each of these thrones there was an elder dressed in white clothes and wearing a gold crown.
translation_verse: Dakɔɔr lɩjɛr nɩ anaar mɩ ben be jilʊ̃ a nãa dakɔɔ, ka a nɩbɛrɛ lɩjɛr nɩ anaar mɩ jãnɛ a ju, na ba su bʊ̃pɩɛl na ba sun sɛlma jupile.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Saa nyɩɩrfʊ nɩ gɔ̃mɔ̃ na tãna yire naa a nãa dakɔɔ par. Ka a fãtɩnɛ ayopõi mɩ 'lɩrɛ a nãa dakɔɔ par, anyãna lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɩr ayopõi.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: A nãa dakɔɔ niem bon ben be kaara man kʊ̃ɔ kaar jaa wel wel wel, na wʊ nyɩlɛ chãana kaar. A bʊ̃nɩbie anaar jil naa a nãa dakɔɔ tara nɩbie a jiir a jaa a puor nɩ a niem.

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: A bʊ̃nɩbir 'lɔ na de nie nyɛtãan jukpɛ̃ɛ, ka a ayi sʊɔ mɩ nyɛtãan narbile, ka a ata sʊɔ mɩ nyɛtãan nɩsaal, ka a anaar sʊɔ mɩ nyɛtãan tuu.

english_verse: Each of the four living creatures had six wings, and their bodies were covered with eyes. Day and night they never stopped singing, “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord, the all-powerful God, who was and is and is coming!”
translation_verse: A bʊ̃nɩbie anyãna ãsʊɔ jaa tara naa pɩbɛ ayʊɔb, ka a nɩbie pɔɔ a ãgãn wʊ jaa naa pɩbɛ pɔ. Ba ma yiele nɩ yiel mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ nɩ tãsɔɔ ɩka, “Chɛchɛ, chɛchɛ, chɛchɛ 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ jaa sʊɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ be be, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ, 'lɔ lɛ na wa.”

english_verse: The living creatures kept praising, honoring, and thanking the one who sits on the throne and who lives forever and ever.
translation_verse: Sɔ̃ɔ 'lɔ jaa a bʊ̃nɩbie ala na ma wa puoro pɛɛrɛ dãna nɩ a 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju, 'lɔ lɛ be be jaa kpo kpo,

english_verse: “Our Lord and God, you are worthy to receive glory, honor, and power. You created all things, and by your decision they are and were created.”
translation_verse: “A sɩ Soro nɩ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn, fʊ̃ʊ lɛ a sɛɛn ɩka fʊ de a tɩɩr, 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ. Bojũu fʊ̃ʊ lɛ maal a bomo a jaa, a fʊ bɔfʊ pɔ lɛ a jaa maal naa be be.”

english_verse: In the right hand of the one sitting on the throne I saw a scroll that had writing on the inside and on the outside. And it was sealed in seven places.
translation_verse: N pãa nyɛn a 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju ka wʊ tara a kõr gãn 'lɔ ban pilʊ̃ a wʊ nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ, ka a sɛbie be a pʊɔ pɔ nɩ a yõo, na ba de jãnsɩ ayopõi mar pɔɔ.

english_verse: I saw a mighty angel ask with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals?”
translation_verse: N nyɛn a malaka kpɛ̃ɔ sʊɔ 'lɔ na de nɛkpɛ̃ɛ sʊʊr, “An lɛ sɛɛ ɩka wʊ 'lɔɔr a jãnsɩ tɩ yuo a gãn?”

english_verse: No one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Tɩchɛ nɩrɛ jaa ba be a saaju, bɩɩ a wɛr pɔ, bɩɩ a tẽe par na tʊ̃ɔ yuo a gãn kar ɛ.

english_verse: I cried hard because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Ka n kõ nɩbaal kõn bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na ba be be sɛɛn na yuo a gãn kar kaa ɛ.

english_verse: Then one of the elders said to me, “Stop crying and look! The one who is called both the ‘Lion from the Tribe of Judah’ and ‘King David's Great Descendant’ has won the victory. He will open the scroll and its seven seals.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a nɩbɛrɛ bala ãsʊɔ pãa 'yɛr kʊ ma, “Ta kõnõ ɛ. Nyɛ a Jukpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ na yi a Juda bʊrɔ pɔ, na ɩ a Nãkpɛ̃ɛ David yɔ̃ɔ na jɛb tʊ̃ɔ. 'Lɔ lɛ sɛɛ na tʊ̃ɔ 'lɔɔr a jãnsɩ ala bar tɩ yuo a gãn.”

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a Lamb standing in the center of the throne surrounded by the four living creatures and the elders. The Lamb looked as if it had once been killed. It had seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven spirits of God, sent out to all the earth.
translation_verse: N pãa lɛ nyɛn Pɛraabile ka wʊ nyɛtãan bon ban dɔ̃ɔ kʊ ka wʊ ara a nãa dakɔɔ par, ka a bʊ̃nɩbie anaar nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ ara jilʊ̃ wʊ. Wʊ tara na ɩlɛ ayopõi nɩ nɩbie ayopõi, ala lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɩr ayopõi wʊn ma tʊ̃ a wɛr pɔ jiir a jaa.

english_verse: The Lamb went over and took the scroll from the right hand of the one who sat on the throne.
translation_verse: 'Lɔ lɛ tɩ de a gãn a nɩrɛ 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju nũsʊ̃ɔ pɔ.

english_verse: Then they sang a new song, “You are worthy to receive the scroll and open its seals, because you were killed. And with your own blood you bought for God people from every tribe, language, nation, and race.
translation_verse: Bala lɛ yiele a yiel paalaa na ba 'yɛrɛ, “Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ sɛɛn ɩka fʊ de a gãn na fʊ 'lɔɔr a jãnsɩ, bojũu fʊ̃ʊ lɛ ba kʊ, ka fʊ de a fʊ jãɩ yab den nɩbʊrɔ, 'yɛr bʊrɔ, balsɩ ba jaa nɩ a paalsɩ a jaa kʊ Nãaŋmɩn.

english_verse: You let them become kings and serve God as priests, and they will rule on earth.”
translation_verse: Fʊ̃ʊ lɛ maal ba ka ba ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn nãalʊ̃ʊ nɩbɛ nɩ a bɔɔrlorbo tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn, bala lɛ na wa ɩ a wɛr nyã wʊ jaa nãmɩne.”

english_verse: As I looked, I heard the voices of a large number of angels around the throne and the voices of the living creatures and of the elders. There were millions and millions of them,
translation_verse: Be lɛ n pãa kaa nyɛ malakasɩ turo turo fʊn kʊ̃ bɔ̃ɔ a ba nɛɛ ɛ, ka ba ara jilʊ̃ a nãa dakɔɔ nɩ a bʊ̃nɩbie ala nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ bala.

english_verse: and they were saying in a loud voice, “The Lamb who was killed is worthy to receive power, riches, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and praise.”
translation_verse: Ba yiele naa nɩ kɔkɔkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛrɛ, “A Pɛraabile 'lɔ ban dɔ̃ɔ kʊ lɛ sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tara a kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ a nãbomo, nɩ a yɛ̃, nɩ a fɔ̃ɔ, nɩ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ a tɩɩr, nɩ a dãnfʊ.”

english_verse: Then I heard all beings in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and in the sea offer praise. Together, all of them were saying, “Praise, honor, glory, and strength forever and ever to the one who sits on the throne and to the Lamb!”
translation_verse: Be lɛ n wõ a bʊ̃maalsɩ a jaa na be a saaju, nɩ a tẽe, nɩ a tẽe par, nɩ a man pɔ, nɩ bomo a jaa na be a ba pɔ, na ba yiele yiel 'yɛrɛ, “A 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju, nɩ a Pɛraabile lɛ so a dãnfʊ, nɩ a 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ a tɩɩr, nɩ a kpɛ̃ɔ, bɩbir jaa.”

english_verse: At the same time I saw the Lamb open the first of the seven seals, I heard one of the four living creatures shout with a voice like thunder. It said, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Ka n kaa naa nyɛ a Pɛraabile na 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ ayopõi ala ban mar a gãn 'lɔ na de nie, be lɛ n wõ a bʊ̃nɩbie anaar bala ãsʊɔ kɔkɔr fɩka saa na tãn, ka wʊ bʊɔl, “Wa!”

english_verse: Then I saw a white horse. Its rider carried a bow and was given a crown. He had already won some victories, and he went out to win more.
translation_verse: Be lɛ n kaa nyɛ ka a ɩ wii pɩla lɛ, ka a 'lɔ na do, jã tam a ba de nãa jupil kʊ wʊ ka wʊ yin darfʊ an ɩ tʊ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ lɛ wʊ ɩ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: A Pɛraabile na lɛ 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ ayi sʊ̃ɔ, n wõn a bʊ̃nɩbie ala ayi sʊɔ na 'yɛr, “Wa!”

english_verse: Then another horse came out. It was fiery red. And its rider was given the power to take away all peace from the earth, so people would slaughter one another. He was also given a big sword.
translation_verse: Ka a wii jɩɛ wa yi, a 'lɔ na do ba kʊ wʊn kpɛ̃ɔ ɩka wʊ faa a nyã'maar tɩ vɛ̃ ka jɛɛr ir a wɛr wʊ jaa, ka a nɩbɛ kʊrɔ taa. Ka ba kʊ wʊ a jɛɛr sɔkpɛ̃ɛ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come out!” Then I saw a black horse, and its rider had a balance scale in one hand.
translation_verse: A Pɛraabile na lɛ 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ ata sʊɔ, n wõn a bʊ̃nɩbie ata sʊɔ na 'yɛr, “Wa!” Ka n kaa ka a ɩ wii sɔɔlaa lɛ, ka a 'lɔ na do tara bʊ̃mansɩ a nũu pɔ.

english_verse: I heard what sounded like a voice from somewhere among the four living creatures. It said, “A liter of wheat will cost you a whole day's wages! Three liters of barley will cost you a day's wages too. But don't ruin the olive oil or the wine.”
translation_verse: Be lɛ n wõ a bʊ̃nɩbie anaar bala chara pɔ fɩka kɔkɔr na 'yɛrɛ, “Kɔ̃ lo naa, chi bʊ̃manãa nɛbʊ̃'yen na da naa nɩbʊ̃'yen bɩbir gbul sãyar. Ka a kamaana mɩ nɛɛr ata mɩ da nɩbʊ̃'yen bɩbir gbul sãyar, tɩ taa ɩrɛ wa sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a kãa nɩ a dãa bara ɛ.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: A Pɛraabile na lɛ 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ anaar sʊɔ, n wõ naa a bʊ̃nɩbie anaar sʊɔ na 'yɛr, “Wa!”

english_verse: Then I saw a pale green horse. Its rider was named Death, and Death's Kingdom followed close behind. They were given power over one fourth of the earth, and they could kill its people with swords, famines, diseases, and wild animals.
translation_verse: Ka n kaa nyɛ wii ul a nɩdaa. Ka a 'lɔ na do yuor di kũu, ka a kpĩisɩ tẽe mɩ turo a wʊ puor. Ba kʊ ban kpɛ̃ɔ ɩka ba de sɔkpɛ̃ɛ, nɩ kɔ̃, nɩ baal, nɩ mɔdʊ̃n kʊn a wɛr nɩbɛ ala ɩ ba põn a tẽe a wʊ jiir anaar.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of everyone who had been killed for speaking God's message and telling about their faith.
translation_verse: Wʊn lɛ 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ anũu sʊɔ, n nyɛn a nɩsɩɩr bala ban dɔ̃ɔ kʊ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr nɩ a wʊ dãasɩɛ jũu ka ba be a Nãaŋmɩn bɔɔr lofʊ jie pĩlem.

english_verse: They shouted, “Master, you are holy and faithful! How long will it be before you judge and punish the people of this earth who killed us?”
translation_verse: Ba tãna naa nɩ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ 'yɛrɛ, “A Tʊ̃ɔfʊ sʊɔ, nɩ chɛchɛ sʊɔ, nɩ yelmãɛ sʊɔ, a wa ta dabor ka fʊ tɔɔr a wɛr nɩbɛ 'yɛr na fʊ yab a sɩ jãɩ sãma?”

english_verse: Then each of those who had been killed was given a white robe and told to rest for a little while. They had to wait until the complete number of the Lord's other servants and followers would be killed.
translation_verse: Be lɛ ba kʊ ba jaa bʊ̃pɩɛl tɩ 'yɛr ɩka ba di kãnyir bãlãa ka ba baar kʊ a ba tʊ̃tʊ̃taaba nɩ a yɛɛr a ba kaar ka a ta.

english_verse: When I saw the Lamb open the sixth seal, I looked and saw a great earthquake. The sun turned as dark as sackcloth, and the moon became red as blood.
translation_verse: N kaara naa ka wʊ lɛ 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ ayʊɔb sʊɔ. Ka a tẽe mĩi wʊ jaa, ka a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ sɔb fɔsɔɔlaa kaar, ka a ŋmɛraa mɩ lɩɛb jãɩ kaar jaa kpãn kpãn,

english_verse: The stars in the sky fell to earth, just like figs shaken loose by a windstorm.
translation_verse: ka a ŋmɛrbie mɩ yi a saaju pɔrɔ loro a tẽe pɔ fɩka tɔ̃ɔ kara sɛsɛkpɛ̃ɛ na fu lɔb.

english_verse: Then the sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all mountains and islands were moved from their places.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a saaju pilʊ̃ fɩka sɔ̃gãnãa ban pil, ka a tɔ̃n a jaa nɩ a dõdolsɩ a jaa mɩ ir a ba jiir.

english_verse: The kings of the earth, its famous people, and its military leaders hid in caves or behind rocks on the mountains. They hid there together with the rich and the powerful and with all the slaves and free people.
translation_verse: Ka a tẽe nyã nãmɩne, a tẽe nyã nɩbɛrɛ, a fɔ̃ɔ dẽme, taraa dẽme, a gãdaar, nɩ a gbãgbaar ba jaa, nɩ a sumɩne ba jaa pãa sɔɔlɔ a tɔ̃n bɔɔr pɔ nɩ a tɔ̃n kʊsɩbɛ pɔ.

english_verse: Then they shouted to the mountains and the rocks, “Fall on us! Hide us from the one who sits on the throne and from the anger of the Lamb.
translation_verse: Ba pãa bʊɔlɔ na a tɔ̃n naa kʊsɩpãnsɩ, “Yɩ lo pii sɩ ka sɩ taa lɛ nyɛ a 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju ɛ, na sɩ ta mɩ lɛ nyɛ a Pɛraabile suur ɛ!

english_verse: That terrible day has come! God and the Lamb will show their anger, and who can face it?”
translation_verse: A ba sukpɛ̃ɛ bɩbir vɩɛ naa, an lɛ na tʊ̃ɔ ara a ba niem?”

english_verse: After this I saw four angels. Each one was standing on one of the earth's four corners. The angels held back the four winds, so that no wind would blow on the earth or on the sea or on any tree. These angels had also been given the power to harm the earth and the sea. Then I saw another angel come up from where the sun rises in the east, and he was ready to put the mark of the living God on people. He shouted to the four angels,
translation_verse: Be lɛ n nyɛ a malaka ãsʊɔ ka wʊ yi a mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ purfʊ jie waara na wʊ tara a Nãaŋmɩn vʊr sʊɔ jãnɛ. Wʊ bʊɔl naa a malakasɩ anaar bala nɩ nɛkpɛ̃ɛ ban kʊ sɔr ɩka ba sɔ̃ɔ a tẽe wʊ jaa naa man 'yɛrɛ kʊrɔ ba,

english_verse: “Don't harm the earth or the sea or any tree! Wait until I have marked the foreheads of the servants of our God.”
translation_verse: “Yɩ taa ɩrɛ wa sɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a tẽe, naa man, naa tɩɩr ɛ, a sɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn tʊ̃tʊ̃nbɔ a jãnsɩ a ba gbersɩ pɔ baar.”

english_verse: Then I heard how many people had been marked on the forehead. There were
translation_verse: N pãa wõ naa a nɩbɛ bala ban 'yɔ̃ɔ a jãnsɩ nɛɛ ka ba ɩ, nɩbɛ turo kɔbaa lɩjaayi nɩ anaar (

english_verse: and said, “Amen! Praise, glory, wisdom, thanks, honor, power, and strength belong to our God forever and ever! Amen!”
translation_verse: “A ɩ a lɛ! Nãaŋmɩn son pɛɛfʊ nɩ tɩɩr, nɩ yɛ̃, nɩ dãnfʊ, nɩ 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, nɩ kpɛ̃ɔ nɩ fɔ̃ɔ. A ɩ a lɛ!”

english_verse: After this, I saw a large crowd with more people than could be counted. They were from every race, tribe, nation, and language, and they stood before the throne and before the Lamb. They wore white robes and held palm branches in their hands,
translation_verse: A anyã puor, n lɛ nyɛn nɩyɔɔ nɩrɛ na kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ ba sɔr ɛ, ka ba yi a paalsɩ a jaa pɔ, balbʊrsɩ, nɩbʊrsɩ, 'yɛrbʊrsɩ a jaa pɔ, na ba ara a nãa dakɔɔ nɩ a Pɛraabile niem. Ba sun fɔpɩɛl tɩ tara bɛ wilsɩ a ba nuur pɔ.

english_verse: as they shouted, “Our God, who sits upon the throne, has the power to save his people, and so does the Lamb.”
translation_verse: Bala lɛ chɩlɛ 'yɛrɛ, “A faafʊ yi naa a sɩ Nãaŋmɩn na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju nɩ a Pɛraabile sɛ̃.”

english_verse: The angels who stood around the throne knelt in front of it with their faces to the ground. The elders and the four living creatures knelt there with them. Then they all worshiped God
translation_verse: Ka a malakasɩ bala na ara jilʊ̃ a nãa dakɔɔ, nɩ a nɩbɛrɛ, nɩ a bʊ̃nɩbie anaar bala gãn kpa a nãa dakɔɔ niem puoro a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛrɛ,

english_verse: One of the elders asked me, “Do you know who these people are that are dressed in white robes? Do you know where they come from?”
translation_verse: Be lɛ a nɩkpɛ̃ɛ ãsʊɔ sʊʊr ma, “A bala na su a bʊ̃pɩɛl, ba boo lɛ, nɩ nyɩnɛ lɛ ba yi?”

english_verse: “Sir,” I answered, “you must know.” Then he told me: “These are the ones who have gone through the great suffering. They have washed their robes in the blood of the Lamb and have made them white.
translation_verse: Ka n 'yɛr ɩka, “Nɩkpɛ̃ɛ, fʊ̃ʊ ba lɛ bɔ̃ɔ ba.” Ka wʊ 'yɛr, “A banyãna, bala lɛ yi a dɔɔyɛ kpɛ̃ɛ 'lɔ pɔ. Ba pɛɛn a ba fɔɔr nɩ a Pɛraabile jãɩ.

english_verse: And so they stand before the throne of God and worship him in his temple day and night. The one who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.
translation_verse: Ala lɛ so ka ba ara a Nãaŋmɩn nãa dakɔɔ par tʊ̃nɔ̃ kʊrɔ wʊ mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ nɩ tãsɔɔ a wʊ puorfʊ yir. A 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju na 'yɩɛr pɔɔ ba.

english_verse: They will never hunger or thirst again, and they won't be troubled by the sun or any scorching heat.
translation_verse: Kɔ̃ kʊ̃ lɛ kpɛ ba go ɛ, kɔ̃nyũur mɩ kʊ̃ lɛ kpɛ ba go ɛ. Mɔ̃tɔ̃ɔ kʊ̃ lɛ ŋme ba go ɛ, tʊl kʊ̃ lɛ kʊrɔ go ɛ.

english_verse: “The Lamb in the center of the throne will be their shepherd. He will lead them to streams of life-giving water, and God will wipe all tears from their eyes.”
translation_verse: A Pɛraabile na ara a nãa dakɔɔ sãlsɔɔ lɛ na chãnɛ ba. Wʊn ma ŋmaa ban chiin a nyɛvʊr kʊ̃ɔ par, ka Nãaŋmɩn pãa 'yɩɛr a ba nɩbikʊ̃ɔ a jaa bar.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
translation_verse: Be lɛ a Pɛraabile 'lɔɔ a jãnsɩ ayopõi sʊɔ ka a saaju wʊ jaa ŋmaa vʊʊr jaa chɩr chɩr chɩr kor bãlãa.

english_verse: I noticed that the seven angels who stood before God were each given a trumpet.
translation_verse: Ka n nyɛ a malakasɩ ayopõi bala na ara a Nãaŋmɩn niem ka ba kʊ ba ɩɩl pɛɛlsɩ ayopõi.

english_verse: Another angel, who had a gold container for incense, came and stood at the altar. This one was given a lot of incense to offer with the prayers of God's people on the gold altar in front of the throne.
translation_verse: A malaka ãsʊɔ na tara a sɛlma lapʊr, wa ara naa a bɔɔrlo bomo chʊmfʊ jie. Ba den a tãɩ nyũu vɩla ala kʊ wʊ ɩka wʊ de pʊɔ a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ ba jaa sʊɔrfʊsɩ a sɛlma bɔɔrlo bomo chʊmfʊ jie kʊ a 'lɔ na jãnɛ a nãa dakɔɔ ju.

english_verse: Then the smoke of the incense, together with the prayers of God's people, went up to God from the hand of the angel.
translation_verse: A tãɩ nyũu vɩla jʊʊr yire naa a sɛlma lapʊr 'matãan a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ sʊɔrfʊ yi a malaka nũu pɔ, duoro a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.

english_verse: After this, the angel filled the incense container with fire from the altar and threw it on the earth. Thunder roared, lightning flashed, and the earth shook. The Trumpets
translation_verse: Be lɛ a malaka lɛ mʊ̃ɔ bũu bie a sɛlma bɔɔrlo bomo chʊmfʊ jie sɛɛ a lapʊr na wʊ lɔb bar ka a wɛr pɔ ka tãnfʊ, nɩ gɔ̃mɔ̃, nɩ saa nyɩɩrfʊ ka a tẽe wʊ jaa dam.

english_verse: The seven angels now got ready to blow their trumpets.
translation_verse: Ka a malakasɩ ayopõi bala na tara a ɩlɛ, go a pɛɛlfʊ.

english_verse: When the first angel blew his trumpet, hail and fire mixed with blood were thrown down on the earth. A third of the earth, a third of the trees, and a third of all green plants were burned.
translation_verse: A malaka 'lɔ na de nie pɛɛl naa a wʊ ɩɩl, ka a sakpʊlõbie nɩ bũu na 'matãan jãɩ loro a wɛr pɔ. Ka a tẽe jiir ata jibʊ̃'yen di wʊ jaa, ka a tɩɩr mɩ jiir ata jibʊ̃'yen mɩ di lɔ̃ɔn a mɔ'yɔlɔ a jaa.

english_verse: When the second angel blew his trumpet, something like a great fiery mountain was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea turned to blood,
translation_verse: Ka a malakasɩ ayi sʊɔ mɩ pɛɛl a wʊ ɩɩl, ka ba 'lɔb bon na nyɛtãan tɔ̃kpɛ̃ɛ na nyɔɔ bũu 'yɔ̃ɔ a man pɔ. A man jiir ata jibʊ̃'yen lɩɛb jãɩ,

english_verse: a third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.
translation_verse: ka a bʊ̃nɩbie mɩ jiir ata jibʊ̃'yen kpi, ka a gborbɛrɛ ala mɩ jiir ata jibʊ̃'yen mɩ wɛ.
